label:
天则的凄凉灯塔额外内容
Tianze's Gauntlight Extras

Tianze's Gauntlight Extras.name: 天泽的凄凉灯塔额外内容 Tianze's Gauntlight Extras
Tianze's Gauntlight Extras.description:
Tianze 的凄凉灯塔扩展内容是一组旨在增强 Paizo 的《憎恨魔窟》冒险路径游戏体验的内容合集。

其中包含冒险路径中每个场景的注释版与音效氛围版，以及额外的支线任务、扩展剧情线与 NPC 时间线。

本模组运行需要《憎恨魔窟》冒险路径的 Foundry 模组。此模组中的许多场景、演员、日志与物品都直接指向《憎恨魔窟》模组文件夹中的资源。

随本模组提供的资源使用多种工具制作：

  • 原始地图使用 DungeonDraft 制作，并使用来自 Forgotten Adventures 的资源。

  • 小插图、角色美术与指示物使用以下任一工具制作：

    • Bing Image Creator，使用我自己编写的提示词

    • Affinity Designer and Photo

    • Faststone Image Viewer

Tianze's Gauntlight Extras is a collection of of content designed to enhance the gameplay of Paizo's Abomination Vaults Adventure Path.

It includes annotated and soundscaped versions of each scene in the adventure path, plus additional side quests, expanded storylines, and NPC timelines. 

The Abomination Vaults Advanture Path Foundry module is required for this mod to function. Many of the scenes, actors, journals and items in this module points directly to assets in the Abomination Vaults module folder.

Assets shipped with this module were created using several tools:

  • Original maps were created with DungeonDraft using assets from Forgotten Adventures.

  • Vignettes, character art and tokens were created using any of these:

    • Bing Image Creator using prompts written by myself

    • Affinity Designer and Photo

    • Faststone Image Viewer
Tianze's Gauntlight Extras.caption:
在此，你们这支英雄队伍将追随那些注定失败的冒险者的足迹，在竞技场中进行角斗士般的战斗，会见玫瑰团的幽灵（特征），以及更多。
Herein, your band of heroes will follow in the footsteps of doomed adventurers, fight gladiatorial battles in the arena, meet the ghosts of the Roseguard, and more.

Player Doom Check.name: 玩家 厄运检定 Player Doom Check
Player Doom Check.command: At the end of any turn in which a hero crosses a rivulet (whether by Striding, Stepping, Flying, or any other means), the hero must succeed at a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:22]{Fortitude} save or become @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed 1}. This DC increases by 2 for each additional unique rivulet crossed during that turn (for example, a hero who crosses over 3 rivulets in their turn must attempt a DC 26 Fortitude saving throw). The doomed condition is cumulative on subsequent rounds. Crossing the pools doesn’t have this effect.

Crafter's Eyepiece.name: 工匠护目镜 Crafter's Eyepiece
Crafter's Eyepiece.description:
这副坚固的金属目镜上刻有方形纹样，设计为戴在单只眼睛上。旋转镜片会显现出你计划制造或修理的物品的微弱三维轮廓，并在部件上标注有用的标签。

佩戴时，这副目镜给予你制作检定+1物品加值。当你修理一件物品时，将恢复的生命值按每个熟练度等级增加15，而不是10。

自动应用的效果：

  • 制作检定+1物品加值

This rugged metal eyepiece etched with square patterns is designed to be worn over a single eye. Twisting the lens reveals a faint three-dimensional outline of an item you plan to build or repair, with helpful labels on the component parts.

While worn, this eyepiece gives you a +1 item bonus to Crafting checks. When you Repair an item, increase the Hit Points restored by 15 per proficiency rank instead of 10.

Automatically applied effects:

  • +1 item bonus to checks to Crafting checks

Librarian's Key.name: 图书馆员之钥 Librarian's Key
Librarian's Key.description:
这把钥匙是在@UUID[JournalEntry.KeWKr2yd8dbppeS5.JournalEntryPage.Z3iUNrD6kbgazSIY]{区域 C13}中找到的。

This key was found in @UUID[JournalEntry.KeWKr2yd8dbppeS5.JournalEntryPage.Z3iUNrD6kbgazSIY]{Area C13}.

Chain Shirt.name: 链甲衫 Chain Shirt
Chain Shirt.description:
有时也被称为锁子甲衣，这是一件由与锁子甲相同的金属环构成的长衫。然而，它比锁子甲轻得多，并且只保护穿戴者的躯干、上臂和大腿。

Sometimes called a hauberk, this is a long shirt constructed of the same metal rings as chainmail. However, it is much lighter than chainmail and protects only the torso, upper arms, and upper legs of its wearer.

Portrait of Volluk Azrinae.name: 沃鲁克·阿兹里尼的肖像 Portrait of Volluk Azrinae

Cynemi's Belongings.tokenName: 西涅米的随身物品 Cynemi's Belongings

Crossbow.name: 弩 Crossbow
Crossbow.description:
这把远程武器有一个类似弓的装置，安装在称为“弩柄”的带握把框架上。弩柄有一个将弓弦锁定到位的机构，并连接到触发机制；该机制释放张力并发射弩矢。

This ranged weapon has a bow-like assembly mounted on a handled frame called a tiller. The tiller has a mechanism to lock the bowstring in place, attached to a trigger mechanism that releases the tension and launches a bolt.

Falchion.name: 弯刀 Falchion
Falchion.description:
这把武器是弯刃弯刀的更重、双手版本。它的重量集中在刀刃末端，使其成为一把强力的劈砍武器。

This weapon is a heavier, two‑handed version of the curved‑bladed scimitar. It is weighted toward the blade's end, making it a powerful slashing weapon.

Bolts.name: 弩矢 Bolts
Bolts.description:
弩矢比传统箭矢更短，但结构相似，是弩所使用的弹药。

Shorter than traditional arrows but similar in construction, bolts are the ammunition used by crossbows.

Studded Leather Armor.name: 镶嵌皮甲 Studded Leather Armor
Studded Leather Armor.description:
这副皮质护甲用金属铆钉加固，有时还会加上小块金属板，在提供与皮质护甲大致相同灵活性的同时，提供更为坚固的防护。

This leather armor is reinforced with metal studs and sometimes small metal plates, providing most of the flexibility of leather armor with more robust protection.

Cynemi's Belongings.prototypeToken: 希涅米的随身物品 Cynemi's Belongings

Idriniliss's Notes.name: 伊德里尼利斯的笔记 Idriniliss's Notes
Idriniliss's Notes.description:
这些包括 @UUID[JournalEntry.OyNcqrpRClyhr8BJ]{G: 牢房} 日志中详述的信息，包括：

  • 一份第一人称日志，记述她如何来到这里，以及她与贝科拉的会面

  • 关于她对贝科拉的复仇计划的细节

  • 她沉思祭坛时获得的、令人难以理解的灵感

  • 关于她目前在牢房内的盟友关系的笔记，以及她与夏坦和贾法基的遭遇（如有）

  • 一份用密码写成的卷轴，需要时间才能破译（这与计划在未来更新中的拉贾尼家族诅咒剧情线有关）

  • 传送门笔记：

这里有强大的入侵者，他们正在系统性地杀死这一层的所有东西。我在这里的时间有限。我已经毁掉了我仅有的一份传送门仪式副本，并计划用它加入“孩子们”，增强他们的力量。当我到达另一边时，我会再次施放它，把它封在我身后。

 

These include the information detailed in the @UUID[JournalEntry.OyNcqrpRClyhr8BJ]{G: Prison} journal, including:

  • A first-person journal of how she got here, and who her meetings with Belcorra

  • Details on her plan of revenge for Belcorra

  • Incomprehensible inspirations granted by her contemplations of the altar

  • Notes on her current alliances within the prison, and her encounters (if any) with Shaitan and Jafaki

  • A scroll written in a cypher that will take time to break (this is regarding the Rajani Family Curse storyline planned for a future update)

  • Portal note:

There are powerful intruders here, and they are systematically killing everything on this floor. My time here is limited. I have destroyed my only copy of the portal ritual and plan to use it to join the Children and bolster their strength. When I am on the other side, I will cast it again to seal it behind me.

Urevian's Papers.name: 乌瑞维安的文件 Urevian's Papers
Urevian's Papers.description:
乌瑞维安的文件内容详见 @UUID[JournalEntry.OyNcqrpRClyhr8BJ.JournalEntryPage.YSOnwMgSJVzVm31U]{G10. 乌瑞维安的领域}。

The contents of Urevian's papers are detailed in @UUID[JournalEntry.OyNcqrpRClyhr8BJ.JournalEntryPage.YSOnwMgSJVzVm31U]{G10. Urevian’s Domain}.

Sea Touch Elixir (Lesser).name: 海之接触灵药（次级） Sea Touch Elixir (Lesser)
Sea Touch Elixir (Lesser).description:
启动 A（操作）

这种咸涩的混合饮剂会改变你手脚上的皮肤。你手指与脚趾之间的空间变得有蹼，使你获得20尺的游泳速度，持续10分钟。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.thOpQunbQr77XWdF]{效果：海之接触灵药（次级）}

Activate A (manipulate)

This briny concoction alters the skin on your hands and feet. The spaces between your fingers and toes become webbed, granting you a swim Speed of 20 feet for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.thOpQunbQr77XWdF]{Effect: Sea Touch Elixir (Lesser)}

Bottled Air.name: 瓶装空气 Bottled Air
Bottled Air.description:
看起来像是一个普通的塞着软木塞的玻璃瓶，这件物品内含取之不尽的新鲜空气。你必须先以一个交互动作拔开瓶塞，才能启用它。

启动—吸入 1（操作）

效果 你从瓶中吸入一口空气。这使你即使在无空气或有毒的环境中也能呼吸。空气不会从瓶口逸出，因此把打开的瓶子留在无空气的环境中并不会改变环境。

Appearing to be an ordinary corked glass bottle, this item contains a limitless supply of fresh air. You must uncork the bottle with an Interact action before you can activate it.

Activate—Breathe In 1 (manipulate)

Effect You draw a breath of air from the bottle. This allows you to breathe even in an airless or toxic environment. Air doesn't escape the mouth of the bottle, so leaving the open bottle in an airless environment doesn't change the environment.

E13 Supply Closet.prototypeToken: E13 物资储藏间 E13 Supply Closet

Alchemist's Lab (Expanded).name: 炼金术士实验室（扩展） Alchemist's Lab (Expanded)
Alchemist's Lab (Expanded).description:
你需要一间炼金术士的实验室，才能在休整模式期间制造炼金物品。

扩展的炼金术士实验室会使你在进行制造炼金物品的制造检定时获得+1物品加值。

You need an alchemist's lab to Craft alchemical items during downtime.

An expanded alchemist's lab gives a +1 item bonus to Crafting checks to create alchemical items.

Glue Bomb (Moderate).name: 黏胶炸弹（中等） Glue Bomb (Moderate)
Glue Bomb (Moderate).description:
启动 1 打击

黏胶炸弹是一种无害的爆炸装置，会迸裂出黏稠物质。当你用黏胶炸弹命中一个生物时，该生物的各项速度在1分钟内受到–15尺的状态减值。你获得+1物品加值于攻击掷骰，且@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱}DC为19。

在大成功或大失败时，接触坚固表面的生物会黏在该表面上，并在1轮内@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身}；而通过翅膀飞行的生物其翅膀会被缠住，导致其安全地坠落到地面，并在1轮内无法再次飞行。对处于水中的生物使用黏胶炸弹没有效果。

目标可以通过逃脱或总计花费3个交互动作小心移除黏稠物质，以结束任何效果。这些交互动作不必连续，其他生物也可以提供这些动作。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.MEreOgnjoRiXPEuq]{效果：黏胶炸弹（中等）}

Activate 1 Strike

A glue bomb is a harmless explosive mechanism bursting with sticky substances. When you hit a creature with a glue bomb, that creature takes a –15-foot status penalty to its Speeds for 1 minute. You gain a +1 item bonus to attack rolls, and the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} DC is 19.

On a critical hit, a creature in contact with a solid surface becomes stuck to the surface and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} for 1 round, and a creature flying via wings has its wings tangled, causing it to fall safely to the ground and become unable to Fly again for 1 round. Glue bombs are not effective when used on a creature that is in water.

The target can end any effects by Escaping or spending a total of 3 Interact actions to carefully remove the sticky substances. These Interact actions don't have to be consecutive, and other creatures can provide the actions as well.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.MEreOgnjoRiXPEuq]{Effect: Glue Bomb (Moderate)}
