这把武器有一段短柄，末端是一个镶满尖钉的金属球。

This weapon has a short shaft ending in a metal ball studded with spikes.

Fake Skeleton Loot.prototypeToken: 假骷髅战利品 Fake Skeleton Loot

G17 Witchfire Warden Pillar.name: G17 巫火守卫石柱 G17 Witchfire Warden Pillar
G17 Witchfire Warden Pillar.tokenName: G17 巫火守卫之柱 G17 Witchfire Warden Pillar

Bands of Force.name: 力场束带 Bands of Force
Bands of Force.description:
这些厚重的金属环带镶嵌着透明宝石，在你全身铺展开一层坚硬不屈的力场。该力场使你获得AC与豁免检定+1物品加值，并作为护甲提供+5的最大敏捷调整值。你可以像它们是轻型护甲一样将护符固定在环带上。

启动—反震力场 R（力场，操作）

触发 一名生物以近战打击对你造成重度失手

效果 你使用环带的运动调整值[[/r d20+14]]{+14}对该生物进行一次推撞。

Decorated with clear gemstones, these thick metal bands spread an inflexible layer of force over your body. The force grants you a +1 item bonus to AC and saving throws, and a maximum Dexterity modifier of +5 as armor. You can affix talismans to the bands as though they were light armor.

Activate—Return Force R (force, manipulate)

Trigger A creature critically misses you with a melee Strike

Effect You Shove the creature using the bands' Athletics modifier of [[/r d20+14]]{+14}.

Spacious Pouch (Type II).name: 宽敞小袋（II型） Spacious Pouch (Type II)
Spacious Pouch (Type II).description:
尽管它看起来像一个用色彩华丽的丝绸拼片或时髦刺绣装饰的布袋，但宽敞袋会通向一个比其外部次元更大的魔法空间。袋内容纳的负载不会改变宽敞袋自身的负载。该袋的异次元空间能容纳多少负载取决于其类型。

你可以与宽敞袋进行交互，将物品收纳其中或取出，就像普通麻袋一样。尽管袋子能够容纳大量材料，物体仍必须能通过袋口才能被存放在里面。

如果袋子超载或破损，它会撕裂并报废，使得里面的物品永远遗失。若将其翻转过来，里面的物品会毫发无损地倾倒出来，但在再次使用前必须把袋子翻回正面。把活体生物放入袋中时，在开始窒息前有足够的空气维持10分钟，并且它可以尝试以DC 13进行逃脱。袋内的物品不会提供任何好处，除非先将其取回。袋中的物品无法被只能侦测同一位面上事物的魔法侦测到。

容量 50 负载

Though it appears to be a cloth bag decorated with panels of richly colored silk or stylish embroidery, a spacious pouch opens into a magical space larger than its outside dimensions. The Bulk held inside the bag doesn't change the Bulk of the spacious pouch itself. The amount of Bulk the bag's extradimensional space can hold depends on its type.

You can Interact with the spacious pouch to stow items in it or remove them just like a mundane sack. Though the bag can hold a great amount of material, an object still needs to be able to fit through the opening of the sack to be stored inside.

If the bag is overloaded or broken, it ruptures and is ruined, causing the items inside to be lost forever. If it's turned inside out, the items inside spill out unharmed, but the bag must be put right before it can be used again. A living creature placed inside the bag has enough air for 10 minutes before it begins to suffocate, and it can attempt to Escape against a DC of 13. An item inside the bag provides no benefits unless it's retrieved first. An item in the bag can't be detected by magic that detects only things on the same plane.

Capacity 50 Bulk

G17 Witchfire Warden Pillar.prototypeToken: G17 巫火守卫支柱 G17 Witchfire Warden Pillar

Backpack.name: 背包 Backpack
Backpack.description:
一个背包最多可容纳 4 负载的物品，其中前 2 负载的这些物品不计入你的负载上限。若你是提着或收纳该背包而非背在背上，则其负载为 轻型 而非 可忽略

A backpack holds up to 4 Bulk of items and the first 2 Bulk of these items don't count against your Bulk limits. If you're carrying or stowing the pack rather than wearing it on your back, its Bulk is light instead of negligible

Climbing Kit.name: 攀爬工具包 Climbing Kit
Climbing Kit.description:
这个挎包包含50英尺绳索、滑轮、一打岩钉、一把锤子、一个抓钩，以及一套冰爪。攀爬工具包允许你在攀爬时将自己固定在你正在攀爬的墙面上，移动速度只有平时的一半（最少5英尺），但当你严重失败时，你可以尝试一次 @Check[type:flat|dc:5] 以防止坠落。单个工具包只包含足够一名攀爬者使用的材料；每名攀爬者都需要自己的工具包。

This satchel includes 50 feet of rope, pulleys, a dozen pitons, a hammer, a grappling hook, and one set of crampons. Climbing kits allow you to attach yourself to the wall you're Climbing, moving half as quickly as usual (minimum 5 feet) but letting you attempt a @Check[type:flat|dc:5] whenever you critically fail to prevent a fall. A single kit has only enough materials for one climber; each climber needs their own kit.

Waterskin.name: 水袋 Waterskin
Waterskin.description:
当它装满时，一个水袋大约可容纳足够一名小型或中型生物饮用 1 天的水量。

When it's full, a waterskin contains roughly 1 day's worth of water for a Small or Medium creature.

Flint and Steel.name: 燧石与打火镰 Flint and Steel
Flint and Steel.description:
燧石和打火钢在你有时间去捕捉火花时很适合用来生火，不过在遭遇中使用它们通常太耗时间而不实用。即使在理想状态下，使用燧石和打火钢点燃火焰也至少需要使用 3 个动作，而且往往要长得多。

Flint and steel are useful in creating a fire if you have the time to catch a spark, though using them is typically too time‑consuming to be practical during an encounter. Even in ideal conditions, using flint and steel to light a flame requires using at least 3 actions, and often significantly longer.

Shortbow.name: 短弓 Shortbow
Shortbow.description:
这把较小的弓由一整块木头制成，深受散兵与骑兵的青睐。

This smaller bow is made of a single piece of wood and favored by skirmishers and cavalry.

Caltrops.name: 铁蒺藜 Caltrops
Caltrops.description:
这些四叉金属尖钉会对生物的脚造成伤害。你可以用一个交互动作将铁蒺藜撒在你相邻的一个空方格内。第一个进入该方格的生物必须在一次 @Check[type:acrobatics|dc:14|name:Avoid Caltrops] 检定中成功，否则受到 1d4 穿刺伤害与 [[/r 1[bleed]]] 伤害。因铁蒺藜而承受持续流血伤害的生物，其速度受到 -5 尺减值。花费一个交互动作将铁蒺藜拔除，会降低止血的 DC。一旦有生物因铁蒺藜受到伤害，就会有足够多的铁蒺藜损坏，使其他进入该方格的生物保持安全。若没有生物因其受到伤害，已部署的铁蒺藜可以回收并重复使用。否则，会有足够多的铁蒺藜损坏，以至于无法回收。

These four‑pronged metal spikes can cause damage to a creature's feet. You can scatter caltrops in an empty square adjacent to you with an Interact action. The first creature that moves into that square must succeed at a @Check[type:acrobatics|dc:14|name:Avoid Caltrops] check or take 1d4 piercing damage and [[/r 1[bleed]]] damage. A creature taking persistent bleed damage from caltrops takes a -5‑foot penalty to its Speed. Spending an Interact action to pluck the caltrops free reduces the DC to stop the bleeding. Once a creature takes damage from caltrops, enough caltrops are ruined that other creatures moving into the square are safe. Deployed caltrops can be salvaged and reused if no creatures took damage from them. Otherwise, enough caltrops are ruined that they can't be salvaged.

Thieves' Toolkit.name: 盗贼工具包 Thieves' Toolkit
Thieves' Toolkit.description:
你需要一个盗贼工具包才能使用贼活（技能）来 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{撬锁} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{解除装置}（某些类型）。

如果你的盗贼工具包损坏了，你可以通过用适合你工具包的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Sw7MBLASN3xK4Y44]{替换镐}更换开锁镐来修理它；这不需要使用“修理”动作。如果你穿戴着你的盗贼工具包，你可以将其抽出并收回，作为使用它的动作的一部分。

You need a thieves' toolkit to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{Pick Locks} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{Disable Devices} (of some types) using the Thievery skill.

If your thieves' toolkit is broken, you can repair it by replacing the lock picks with @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Sw7MBLASN3xK4Y44]{Replacement Picks} appropriate to your toolkit; this doesn't require using the Repair action. If you wear your thieves' toolkit, you can draw and replace it as part of the action that uses it.

Qat.name: 卡特 Qat
Qat.description:
启动 1 交互

恰特成瘾的豁免为 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:14|name:Qat Addiction|showDC:owner]，但恰特的最大成瘾阶段永远不会进展超过阶段 1。

豁免投掷 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:14|showDC:owner]

潜伏期 10 分钟

最大持续时间 8 小时

阶段 1 反射豁免获得 +1 物品加值（10 分钟）

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.rVFDLzYrJVYLiQBL]{效果：恰特（阶段 1）}

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 1}（1 小时）

Activate 1 Interact

The save for addiction to qat is @Check[type:fortitude|dc:14|name:Qat Addiction|showDC:owner], but the maximum addiction stage of qat never progresses beyond stage 1.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:14|showDC:owner]

Onset 10 minutes

Maximum Duration 8 hours

Stage 1 +1 item bonus to Reflex saves (10 minutes)

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.rVFDLzYrJVYLiQBL]{Effect: Qat (Stage 1)}

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} (1 hour)

Black Adder Venom.name: 黑蝰毒 Black Adder Venom
Black Adder Venom.description:
蝰蛇毒液是一种简单但有效的方式来强化一把武器。

启动 2（操作）

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:18]

最大持续时间 3轮

阶段 1 @Damage[1d4[poison]] 伤害（1轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]] 伤害（1轮）

阶段 3 @Damage[1d8[poison]] 伤害（1轮）

Adder venom is a simple but effective way to enhance a weapon.

Activate 2 (manipulate)

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:18]

Maximum Duration 3 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d4[poison]] damage (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[1d8[poison]] damage (1 round)

Onyx Panther.name: 缟玛瑙黑豹 Onyx Panther
Onyx Panther.description:
启动 1（专注）

这枚美丽的黑色卵石被雕刻成风格化的黑豹造型。当你启动它时，使用一个 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{潜行} 动作，并在该检定上获得+1物品加值。你在此潜行动作以及你在该回合进行的任何其他潜行动作中，都可以移动你的全速度（而非一半）。

Activate 1 (concentrate)

This beautiful black pebble is sculpted into a stylized panther shape. When you activate it, use a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak} action with a +1 item bonus to the check. You can move your full Speed (instead of half) on this Sneak action and any others you take this turn.

Arrows.name: 箭矢 Arrows
Arrows.description:
这些投射物是弓的弹药。箭的箭杆由木头制成。它在飞行中由一端的羽翎保持稳定，另一端则装有金属箭头。

These projectiles are the ammunition for bows. The shaft of an arrow is made of wood. It is stabilized in flight by fletching at one end and bears a metal head on the other.

+1 Resilient Scale Mail.name: +1 强韧鳞甲衫 +1 Resilient Scale Mail
+1 Resilient Scale Mail.description:
鳞甲由许多金属鳞片缝在加固的皮革衬底上构成，通常制成长衫的形式，用以保护躯干、手臂和腿部。

Scale mail consists of many metal scales sewn onto a reinforced leather backing, often in the form of a long shirt that protects the torso, arms, and legs.

Shortsword.name: 短剑 Shortsword
Shortsword.description:
这些刀刃有多种形状与款式，但通常长2英尺。

These blades come in a variety of shapes and styles, but they are typically 2 feet long.

Sentry Fulu.name: 哨卫符箓 Sentry Fulu
Sentry Fulu.description:
启动 3 命令术、观想、交互

哨卫符箓描绘一名全副武装的守卫。当你启动符箓时，它会变形成一名由纸制成的超小型类人生物守卫，并在一个20尺爆发的区域内警戒。该守卫的察觉DC为20，并具有精确视觉感官，以及非精确听觉和振动感官，用以侦测在其区域内移动的生物，包括在空中移动的生物。你决定守卫是在其区域内保持不动还是巡逻；若选择巡逻，你还要决定守卫行进的路径，其速度为25尺。你也要设定一个口令，其他人必须向守卫说出该口令才能绕过它。若有生物在未给出口令的情况下进入该区域，哨卫会制造可听或心灵的魔法警报。可听的魔法警报具有人类喊叫的声音与音量，并具有听觉（特征），使每个能够听见它的生物若正处于睡眠状态，皆可尝试一次@Check[type:perception|dc:15]检定以醒来。若你在已启动守卫60尺以内（见下文），心灵警报会传达到你。该守卫将持续启动8小时，随后符箓被消耗。

若你拥有多于一张哨卫符箓，你可以设置数个使其作为一个单元运作，前提是它们的区域彼此接触或重叠。当其中一个发出魔法警报时，魔法警报会穿过所有符箓，因此你只需在其中一个的射程内即可听到它或收到心灵警报。对单元中的某一张哨卫符箓给出正确口令的生物，无需再对其他符箓重复该口令。单元内由某一张符箓创造的守卫被摧毁时，会触发连接区域内其他守卫的魔法警报。

Activate 3 command, envision, Interact

A sentry fulu depicts an armed guard. When you activate the fulu, it takes the shape of a Tiny humanoid guard made of paper and keeps watch over an area in a 20-foot burst. The guard has a Perception DC of 20, along with precise visual senses and imprecise hearing and vibrational sense to detect creatures moving in its area, including through the air. You dictate whether the guard remains still in its area or patrols it; if the latter, you also determine the path the guard takes, at a Speed of 25 feet. You also determine a password others must give the guard to bypass it. If a creature enters the area without giving the password, the sentry creates either an audible or mental alarm. An audible alarm has the sound and volume of a human shouting, as well as the auditory trait, allowing each creature that can hear it to attempt a @Check[type:perception|dc:15] check to wake up if they're asleep. The mental alert reaches you if you're within 60 feet of the active guard (see below). The guard remains active for 8 hours, and then the fulu is consumed.

If you have more than one sentry fulu, you can set up several that function as a unit, provided their areas touch or overlap. When one sounds its alarm, the alarm passes through all of them, so you must be within range of only one to hear it or receive the mental alert. Creatures that give the correct password to one sentry fulu in a unit need not give that password again to the others. The destruction of one fulu-created guard in a unit sets off the alarm in others in connected areas.

Predator's Claw.name: 掠食者之爪 Predator's Claw
Predator's Claw.description:
启用 F（专注）

触发 你用已装附的武器进行一次攻击掷骰并大成功或大失败

这只爪子固定在铁制扣环与铁链上，通常来自大型掠食者。当你启用这只爪子时，触发的攻击获得该武器的大成功或大失败专精效果。

Activate F (concentrate)

Trigger You critically succeed at an attack roll with the affixed weapon

This claw set in an iron clasp and chain is usually that of a large predator. When you activate the claw, the triggering attack gains the weapon's critical specialization effect.

Bloodeye Coffee.name: 血眼咖啡 Bloodeye Coffee
Bloodeye Coffee.description:
一种浓烈的混合饮品，包含数种在珂莱士的帕迪莎帝国常见的香料，血眼咖啡是内海地区广受欢迎的晨间饮品。血眼咖啡的最大成瘾阶段不会进展到超过阶段 1。

启用 A 交互（摄入）

豁免 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:14]

潜伏期 10 分钟

最大持续时间 8 小时

阶段 1 对因 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{疲乏（状态）} 状态而承受减值的 AC 和豁免获得 +1 物品加值（10 分钟）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 1}（1 小时）

阶段 3 无法从疲乏中恢复（1 天，此后药物结束）

A strong blend including several spices common in the Padishah Empire of Kelesh, bloodeye coffee is a favorite morning drink across the Inner Sea region. The maximum addiction stage of bloodeye coffee never progresses beyond stage 1.

Activate A Interact (Ingested)

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:14]

Onset 10 minutes

Maximum Duration 8 hours

Stage 1 +1 item bonus to AC and saves to which you are taking penalties caused by the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} condition (10 minutes)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} (1 hour)

Stage 3 can't recover from fatigued (1 day, after which the drug ends)

Elixir of Life (Lesser).name: 生命灵药（次等） Elixir of Life (Lesser)
Elixir of Life (Lesser).description:
启动 A（操作）

生命灵药会加速活体生物的自然治疗过程与免疫系统。饮用此灵药后，你恢复[[/r (3d6+6)[healing]]]{3d6+6 点生命值}，并在10分钟内获得对抗疾病与毒素的豁免检定 +1 物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.EpB7yJPEuG6ez4z3]{效果：生命灵药（次级）}

Activate A (manipulate)

Elixirs of life accelerate a living creatures natural healing processes and immune system. Upon drinking this elixir, you regain [[/r (3d6+6)[healing]]]{3d6+6 Hit Points} and gain +1 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.EpB7yJPEuG6ez4z3]{Effect: Elixir of Life (Lesser)}

Webbed Corpses.name: 蛛网缠身的尸体 Webbed Corpses

Jade Bauble.name: 翡翠饰珠 Jade Bauble
Jade Bauble.description:
启动 A（专注）

这块玉石通常被雕刻成决斗者的形状，有时也会雕成多臂生物。当你启动这件小饰物时，它会以魔法吸引敌人的注意力。直到你下个回合开始前，位于该护符所附着的武器之触及范围内的敌人均为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}。

Activate A (concentrate)

This bit of jade is usually carved in the shape of a duelist, or sometimes a multi-armed creature. When you activate the bauble, it magically draws the attention of foes. Until the start of your next turn, enemies within the reach of the weapon the talisman is affixed to are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}.

Dust of Disappearance.name: 消像尘 Dust of Disappearance
Dust of Disappearance.description:
这种粉末闪烁着如同成千上万细小光点般的微光。通过将粉尘洒在你自己或触及内的一名生物身上来启用它，会对该生物施放一个4环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{隐形术} 法术，持续时间为1分钟。此隐形术无法被任何3级或更低的法术，或任何5级或更低的物品所消除或看穿。

启用 A 互动

This powder shimmers like a thousand tiny motes of light. Activating the dust by sprinkling it on yourself or a creature within reach casts a 4th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility} spell with a duration of 1 minute on that creature. This invisibility can't be negated or seen through by any spell of 3rd level or lower or any item of 5th level or lower.

Activate A Interact

Wooden Shield.name: 木制护盾术 Wooden Shield
Wooden Shield.description:
尽管木制盾牌有各种形状和体型，它们提供的防护源自其材料的坚固性。虽然木制盾牌比钢盾更便宜，但它们更容易损坏。

硬度 HP BT
3 12 6

Though they come in a variety of shapes and sizes, the protection offered by wooden shields comes from the stoutness of their materials. While wooden shields are less expensive than steel shields, they break more easily.

Hardness HP BT
3 12 6

Annis Hag.name: 安妮丝鬼婆（特征） Annis Hag
Annis Hag.tokenName: 安妮丝鬼婆（特征） Annis Hag

Control Weather.name: 控制天气 Control Weather
Control Weather.description:
你改变天气，使其平静并符合季节常态，或根据季节选择至多两种效果。

你无法具体控制其显现形式，例如龙卷风的确切路径或闪电打击的目标。

  • 秋季 寒冷天气、浓雾、温和炎热、雨夹雪
  • 春季 毛毛雨、炎热、飓风、雨夹雪、雷暴、龙卷风
  • 夏季 毛毛雨、暴雨、极端炎热、冰雹、炎热
  • 冬季 暴风雪、温和寒冷、极端寒冷、解冻

大成功或大失败：大成功 你按所愿改变天气，并且可以影响更大的区域（半径至多5英里的圆形），或更长的持续时间（任意数量的额外d12小时，至多16d12）。

成功 你按所愿改变天气。

失败 你未能按所愿改变天气。

大成功或大失败：大失败 天气以出乎意料的方式改变，由GM决定，但通常尽可能与你的真实意愿相矛盾（例如，当你希望好天气时出现可怕的风暴）。

升阶（9环） 你可以创造不合时令的天气与相互矛盾的天气效果，例如极端寒冷与飓风。你可以让天气平静并呈现不同季节的常态天气，或从任意季节的列表中选择天气效果。

You alter the weather, making it calm and normal for the season or choosing up to two effects based on the season.

You can't specifically control the manifestations, such as the exact path of a tornado or the targets of lightning strikes.

  • Autumn cold weather, fog, mild heat, sleet
  • Spring drizzle, heat, hurricane, sleet, thunderstorm, tornado
  • Summer drizzle, downpour, extreme heat, hail, heat
  • Winter blizzard, mild cold, extreme cold, thaw

Critical Success You change the weather as desired and can affect a larger area (up to a 5-mile-radius circle), or a longer duration (any number of additional d12 hours, up to 16d12).

Success You change the weather as desired.

Failure You fail to change the weather as desired.

Critical Failure The weather changes in an unanticipated way, determined by the GM but generally as contradictory to your true desires as possible (for instance, a terrible storm emerges when you would prefer good weather).

Heightened (9th) You can create unseasonable weather and contradictory weather effects, such as extreme cold and a hurricane. You can make the weather calm and normal weather for a different season or choose weather effects from any season's list.

Baleful Polymorph.name: 邪恶变形术 Baleful Polymorph
Baleful Polymorph.description:
你将目标生物变形为一种适合该区域的无害动物，其效果取决于其强韧豁免结果。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标的身体获得该无害动物的一些轻微特征。其内脏在部分变形时翻搅，使其陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心（状态） 1}。当其从恶心（状态）中恢复时，这些特征会恢复正常。

失败 目标变形1分钟，但保留其心智。若其在自己的回合将所有动作都用于专注于其原本形态，则可以尝试一次意志豁免以立即结束该效果。

大失败 目标在身体与心智上都变形为所选的无害动物，持续时间为无限。

You transform the target creature into a harmless animal appropriate to the area, with effects based on its Fortitude save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target's body gains minor features of the harmless animal. Its insides churn as they partially transform, causing it to be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}. When it recovers from the Sickened condition, its features revert to normal.

Failure The target transforms for 1 minute but keeps its mind. If it spends all its actions on its turn concentrating on its original form, it can attempt a Will save to end the effect immediately.

Critical Failure The target is transformed into the chosen harmless animal, body and mind, for an unlimited duration.

Spellwrack.name: 法术摧残 Spellwrack
Spellwrack.description:
你使任何对目标施放的法术都会溢散出能量，形成有害的涌动。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。

Critical Success 目标不受影响。

Success 每当目标受到一个具有持续时间的法术影响时，目标受到 @Damage[2d12[persistent,force]] 伤害。每次目标因法术崩坏造成的持续力场伤害而受到持续伤害时，它将使影响它的法术剩余持续时间减少1轮。只有一次对抗你法术DC的奥术学检定成功，才能帮助目标从 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.lDVqvLKA6eF3Df60]{持续伤害}中恢复；该诅咒与持续伤害在1分钟后结束。

Failure 同成功，但该诅咒与持续伤害不会自行结束。

Critical Failure 同失败，但持续力场伤害为 @Damage[4d12[persistent,force]] 伤害。

You cause any spells cast on the target to spill out their energy in harmful surges. The target must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success Whenever the target becomes affected by a spell with a duration, the target takes @Damage[2d12[persistent,force]] damage. Each time it takes persistent force damage from spellwrack, it reduces the remaining duration of spells affecting it by 1 round. Only a successful Arcana check against your spell DC can help the target recover from the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.lDVqvLKA6eF3Df60]{Persistent Damage}; the curse and the Persistent Damage end after 1 minute.

Failure As success, but the curse and Persistent Damage do not end on their own.

Critical Failure As failure, but the persistent force damage is @Damage[4d12[persistent,force]] damage.

Illusory Scene.name: 幻象场景 Illusory Scene
Illusory Scene.description:
你塑造一个想象的场景，其中最多包含10个彼此独立的生物或物体，体型各不相同，且都必须位于该法术的区域内。这些元素会产生合适的声音与气味，并且摸起来触感逼真。幻象场景的元素无法说话。不同于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.f8SBoXiXQjlCKqly]{Illusory Creature}法术，你场景中的生物不具备战斗能力与数据。你的场景不包含对其周围环境的改变，不过你可以将你的场景置于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.HBJPsonQnWcC3qdX]{Hallucinatory Terrain}法术的幻象环境之中。

当你创造该场景时，你可以选择让它静止或遵循一段程序。尽管静止场景不会移动，但它包含基本的自然移动。例如，风吹动一张幻象纸片会使其沙沙作响。程序最长可达1分钟，并在结束后重复。例如，你可以创造两个兽人互相搏斗的场景，而每次重复时战斗都会以相同方式进行。若你创建循环，这两名斗士会在场景开始与结束时都处于相同位置，但你可以平滑该程序，使人难以分辨循环在何时结束与开始。任何观察该场景超过几分钟的人几乎总会注意到它在循环。你在创造该幻象后无法更改该程序。

任何接触图像任意部分的生物，或使用搜寻动作检查它的生物，都可以尝试不相信你的幻象。若他们与幻象的某一部分互动，他们仅对该部分不相信。只有在大成功时，他们才会对整个场景不相信。

升阶（6环）你场景中的生物或物体可以说话。你在创建程序时必须为每个角色说出其具体台词。该法术会为每个角色伪装你的声音。

升阶（8环）同6环版本，并且持续时间为无限。

You form an imaginary scene that includes up to 10 discrete creatures or objects of various sizes, all of which must be within the spell's area. These elements generate appropriate sounds and smells, and they feel right to the touch. Elements of an illusory scene are incapable of speech. Unlike with the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.f8SBoXiXQjlCKqly]{Illusory Creature} spell, creatures in your scene lack combat abilities and statistics. Your scene doesn't include changes to the environment around it, though you can place your scene within the illusory environment of a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.HBJPsonQnWcC3qdX]{Hallucinatory Terrain} spell.

When you create the scene, you can choose to have it be static or follow a program. Though a static scene is stationary, it includes basic natural movement. For example, wind blowing on an illusory piece of paper would rustle it. A program can be up to 1 minute long and repeats when finished. For instance, you could create a scene of two orcs fighting each other, and the fight would go the same way for each repetition. If you create a loop, the two fighters end up in the same place at the start of the scene and at the end of it, but you can smooth the program so it's hard to tell when the loop ends and begins. Anyone observing the scene for more than a few minutes almost always notices it looping. You're unable to alter the program after you create the illusion.

Any creature that touches any part of the image or uses the Seek action to examine it can attempt to disbelieve your illusion. If they interact with a portion of the illusion, they disbelieve only that portion. They disbelieve the entire scene only on a critical success.

Heightened (6th) Creatures or objects in your scene can speak. You must speak the specific lines for each actor when creating your program. The spell disguises your voice for each actor.

Heightened (8th) As the 6th-level version, and the duration is unlimited.

Passwall.name: 穿墙术 Passwall
Passwall.description:
你在所选区域内穿过墙壁创造一条可见的隧道，用空白空间取代该区域。如果墙壁厚度超过10英尺，隧道只会向内延伸10英尺。即使墙内只有一层很薄的金属，也会阻止此法术发挥作用。此法术不会降低建筑结构的完整性。当法术结束时，任何位于隧道内的人都会被推挤到最近的出口。

强化（7环） 隧道最深可达20英尺。包含你隧道入口的墙壁区域看起来完全正常（除非以真视术或类似效果观察），尽管隧道确实存在。隧道入口的运作方式如同坚固的墙壁，但你可以指定一个口令或一个触发，使生物能够自由进入隧道。

You create a visible tunnel through the wall in the chosen area, replacing the area with empty space. If the wall is thicker than 10 feet, the tunnel ends 10 feet in. Even a small layer of metal in the wall prevents this spell from functioning. This spell doesn't reduce the integrity of the structure. When the spell ends, anyone inside the tunnel is shunted to the nearest exit.

Heightened (7th) The tunnel can be up to 20 feet deep. The areas of the wall that contain your tunnel's entrance appear completely normal (unless viewed with true seeing or a similar effect), despite the tunnel's existence. The tunnel's entrance functions as a solid wall, but you can specify a password or a trigger, allowing creatures to enter the tunnel freely.

Prying Eye.name: 窥探之眼 Prying Eye
Prying Eye.description:
你在500英尺内一个你能看见的位置创造一只@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}的漂浮之眼，直径1英寸。它以你正常的视觉感官向所有方向观察，并持续将其所见传递给你。每轮你首次维持该法术时，你可以选择将眼移动至多30英尺（仅看见眼前方的事物），或将其移动至多10英尺（看见其周围所有方向的一切）。眼离你能移动多远没有限制，但如果你与眼不再处于同一存在位面，该法术会立即结束。若你想用它进行察觉检定，你可以通过这只眼尝试搜寻动作。对这只眼造成的任何伤害都会将其摧毁并结束该法术。

You create an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}, floating eye, 1 inch in diameter, at a location you can see within 500 feet. It sees in all directions with your normal visual senses and continuously transmits what it sees to you. The first time you Sustain the Spell each round, you can either move the eye up to 30 feet, seeing only things in front of the eye, or move it up to 10 feet, seeing everything in all directions around it. There is no limit to how far from you the eye can move, but the spell ends immediately if you and the eye ever cease to be on the same plane of existence. You can attempt Seek actions through the eye if you want to attempt Perception checks with it. Any damage dealt to the eye destroys it and ends the spell.

Clairvoyance.name: 鹰眼术 Clairvoyance
Clairvoyance.description:
你在射程内的一个位置创造一只@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}的漂浮之眼（即使该位置在你的视觉线或效果线之外也可以）。这只眼睛无法移动，但你可以如同使用你正常的视觉感官一般，从该点向所有方向视物。

You create an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} floating eye at a location within range (even if it's outside your line of sight or line of effect). The eye can't move, but you can see in all directions from that point as if using your normal visual senses.

Talking Corpse.name: 会说话的尸体 Talking Corpse
Talking Corpse.description:
你赋予目标尸体一丝生命的表象，它会用这份生命来回答向它提出的三个问题。本法术调用的是肉体的潜在记忆，而非召回死者的灵魂，因此尸体必须大体完整才能使法术生效。尸体所受的伤害越多，它的回答就越不准确或越支离破碎，而且它必须有喉咙和嘴才能说话。如果在过去一周内有人曾对该尸体施放过此法术，则本法术自动失败。尸体可以使用其死亡时代原本生物的统计数据，尝试进行一次意志豁免来抗拒回答问题，产生以下效果。

大成功或大失败成功 目标可以说谎或拒绝回答你的问题，并且目标的灵魂会纠缠你24小时，打扰你并导致你在这段时间内无法获得任何休息。

成功 目标可以提供虚假信息或拒绝回答你的问题。

失败 目标必须如实作答，但它的回答可以简短、晦涩且重复。它仍然可以误导你或试图拖延，以便让法术的持续时间在你问完所有问题之前耗尽。

大成功或大失败失败 同失败，但目标的回答更直接且较少重复，尽管仍然晦涩。它在进行欺瞒检定以欺骗或误导你时承受-2状态减值。

You grant the target corpse a semblance of life, which it uses to speak the answers to three questions posed to it. This spell calls on the physical body's latent memories rather than summoning back the deceased's spirit, so the corpse must be mostly intact for the spell to function. The more damage the corpse has taken, the more inaccurate or patchwork its answers are, and it must have a throat and mouth to speak at all. If anyone has previously cast this spell on the corpse in the last week, the spell automatically fails. The corpse can attempt a Will save to resist answering the questions using the statistics of the original creature at its time of death, with the following effects.

Critical Success The target can lie or refuse to answer your questions, and the target's spirit haunts you for 24 hours, bothering you and causing you to be unable to gain any rest for that time.

Success The target can provide false information or refuse to answer your questions.

Failure The target must answer truthfully, but its answers can be brief, cryptic, and repetitive. It can still mislead you or attempt to stall so that the spell's duration runs out before you can ask all your questions.

Critical Failure As failure, but the target's answers are more direct and less repetitive, though still cryptic. It takes a -2 status penalty to Deception checks to deceive or mislead you.

Clairaudience.name: 锐耳术 Clairaudience
Clairaudience.description:
你在射程内的一个位置创造一只@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}的漂浮耳朵（即使该位置在你的视觉线或效果线之外）。它无法移动，但你可以通过这只耳朵聆听，如同使用你正常的听觉感官一样。

You create an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} floating ear at a location within range (even if it's outside your line of sight or line of effect). It can't move, but you can hear through the ear as if using your normal auditory senses.

Dream Message.name: 梦境传讯术 Dream Message
Dream Message.description:
你将一则传讯术送入你目标的梦境。该传讯术是单向的，最多可包含 1 分钟的言语（约 150 个词）。如果目标正在睡觉，他们会立刻收到传讯术。否则，他们会在下次入睡时收到它。一旦他们收到传讯术，法术就会结束，而你会知道传讯术已被送出。

升阶（4环） 你可以以最多 10 个你知道其姓名且曾亲自见过的生物为目标。你必须向他们所有人发送相同的传讯术；对于每个生物，法术会分别结束。

You send a message to your target's dream. The message is one-way, up to 1 minute of speech (roughly 150 words). If the target is asleep, they receive the message instantly. If not, they receive it the next time they sleep. As soon as they receive it, the spell ends, and you know the message was sent.

Heightened (4th) You can target up to 10 creatures you know by name and have met in person. You must send the same message to all of them; the spell ends for each creature individually.

Earthbind.name: 大地束缚 Earthbind
Earthbind.description:
你借助土的重量阻碍目标的飞行，其结果取决于其强韧豁免。如果该生物安全到达地面，则不会受到坠落伤害。

大成功或大失败 目标不受影响。

成功 目标安全坠落至多120英尺。

失败 目标安全坠落至多120英尺。如果其撞到地面，则在1轮内无法飞行、施放浮空术或以其他方式离开地面。

大成功或大失败 目标安全坠落至多120英尺。如果其撞到地面，则在1分钟内无法飞行、施放浮空术或以其他方式离开地面。

Using the weight of earth, you hamper a target's flight, with effects based on its Fortitude save. If the creature reaches the ground safely, it doesn't take falling damage.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target falls safely up to 120 feet.

Failure The target falls safely up to 120 feet. If it hits the ground, it can't Fly, levitate, or otherwise leave the ground for 1 round.

Critical Failure The target falls safely up to 120 feet. If it hits the ground, it can't Fly, levitate, or otherwise leave the ground for 1 minute.

Augury.name: 卜筮术 Augury
Augury.description:
你获得对未来的模糊一瞥。在施放该法术期间，询问某一特定行动方针的结果。该法术可以预测最多30分钟后的结果，并在以下结果中揭示GM所能做出的最佳判断：

  • 吉 结果将会很好。
  • 凶 结果将会很糟。
  • 吉与凶 结果将会好坏参半。
  • 无事 不会出现特别好或特别坏的结果。

GM进行一次秘密的 @Check[type:flat|dc:6|traits:secret] 掷骰。在一次失败时，结果总是“无事”。这使得无法判断“无事”的结果是否准确。如果在一次额外的施放中，有人询问与第一次施放卜筮术相同的话题，GM使用第一次施放的秘密掷骰结果。不过，如果情况发生变化，则有可能得到不同的结果。

You gain a vague glimpse of the future. During the casting of this spell, ask about the results of a particular course of action. The spell can predict results up to 30 minutes into the future and reveals the GM's best guess among the following outcomes:

  • Weal The results will be good.
  • Woe The results will be bad.
  • Weal and Woe The results will be a mix of good and bad.
  • Nothing There won't be particularly good or bad results.

The GM rolls a secret @Check[type:flat|dc:6|traits:secret]. On a failure, the result is always "nothing." This makes it impossible to tell whether a "nothing" result is accurate. If anyone asks about the same topic as the first casting of augury during an additional casting, the GM uses the secret roll result from the first casting. If circumstances change, though, it's possible to get a different result.

Charm.name: 魅惑术 Charm
Charm.description:
对目标而言，你的话语甜如蜜糖，你的面容仿佛沐浴在梦幻的薄雾之中。它必须尝试一次意志豁免；若你或你的盟友最近威胁过它或对其使用过敌对动作，则该豁免获得+4环境加值。

你可以解消该法术。若你对目标使用敌对动作，则该法术结束。法术结束时，目标未必会意识到自己被施加了魅惑术，除非它对你的友善关系或你说服它采取的行动与它的预期相冲突；这意味着你可能通过凡俗手段说服目标继续做你的朋友。

大成功 目标不受影响，并且知道你试图对其施展魅惑术。

成功 目标不受影响，但会认为你的法术是某种无害的法术而非魅惑术，除非它辨识该法术。

失败 目标对你的态度变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{友善}。若它原本为友善，则变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{乐于助人}。它无法对你使用敌对动作。

大失败 目标对你的态度变为乐于助人，并且它无法对你使用敌对动作。

升阶（4环） 持续时间持续至你下次进行每日准备为止。

升阶（8环） 持续时间持续至你下次进行每日准备为止，且你可以以最多10个生物为目标。

To the target, your words are honey and your visage seems bathed in a dreamy haze. It must attempt a Will save, with a +4 circumstance bonus if you or your allies recently threatened it or used hostile actions against it.

You can Dismiss the spell. If you use hostile actions against the target, the spell ends. When the spell ends, the target doesn't necessarily realize it was charmed unless its friendship with you or the actions you convinced it to take clash with its expectations, meaning you could potentially convince the target to continue being your friend via mundane means.

Critical Success The target is unaffected and aware you tried to charm it.

Success The target is unaffected but thinks your spell was something harmless instead of charm, unless it identifies the spell.

Failure The target's attitude becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{Friendly} toward you. If it was Friendly, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{Helpful}. It can't use hostile actions against you.

Critical Failure The target's attitude becomes Helpful toward you, and it can't use hostile actions against you.

Heightened (4th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations.

Heightened (8th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Illusory Disguise.name: 幻象伪装 Illusory Disguise
Illusory Disguise.description:
你创造一个幻觉，使你看起来像是另一个体型相同、且身高（相差不超过6英寸）与体重（相差不超过50磅）都与你大致相近的生物。该伪装通常足以隐藏你的身份，但不足以冒充某个特定个体。该法术不会改变你的声音、气味或举止。你可以改变你的衣物与穿戴物品的外观，例如让你的护甲看起来像一件连衣裙。手持物品不受影响，而任何你卸下的穿戴物品都会恢复其真实外观。

施放幻象伪装视为为使用欺瞒的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.action-macros.Macro.k5nW4jGyXD0Oq9LR]{冒充}而进行伪装的准备；它会忽略你因将自己伪装成不相似生物而可能承受的任何环境减值；它使你在进行欺瞒检定以防止他人看穿你的伪装时获得+4状态加值；并且即使你未受训也要加上你的等级。你可以解消该法术。

升阶（2环） 该法术也会伪装你的声音与气味，并获得听觉与嗅觉（特征）特征。

升阶（3环） 你可以看起来像任何体型相同的生物，甚至是某个特定个体。你必须见过该个体才能呈现其外观。该法术也会伪装你的声音与气味，并获得听觉与嗅觉（特征）特征。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3Ktyd5F9lOPo4myk]{法术效果：幻象伪装}

You create an illusion that causes you to appear as another creature of the same body shape, and with roughly similar height (within 6 inches) and weight (within 50 pounds), as yourself. The disguise is typically good enough to hide your identity, but not to impersonate a specific individual. The spell doesn't change your voice, scent, or mannerisms. You can change the appearance of your clothing and worn items, such as making your armor look like a dress. Held items are unaffected, and any worn item you remove returns to its true appearance.

Casting illusory disguise counts as setting up a disguise for the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.action-macros.Macro.k5nW4jGyXD0Oq9LR]{Impersonate} use of Deception; it ignores any circumstance penalties you might take for disguising yourself as a dissimilar creature, it gives you a +4 status bonus to Deception checks to prevent others from seeing through your disguise, and you add your level even if you're untrained. You can Dismiss this spell.

Heightened (2nd) The spell also disguises your voice and scent, and it gains the auditory and olfactory traits.

Heightened (3rd) You can appear as any creature of the same size, even a specific individual. You must have seen an individual to take on their appearance. The spell also disguises your voice and scent, and it gains the auditory and olfactory traits.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3Ktyd5F9lOPo4myk]{Spell Effect: Illusory Disguise}

Coven.name: 巫团 Coven
Coven.description:
一名安尼斯鬼婆将@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gPvtmKMRpg9I9D7H]{缚地}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.115Xp9E38CJENhNS]{穿墙术}和@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.8Umt1AzYfFbC4fui]{法术灾厄}加入她的集会法术列表。

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Coven]

An annis hag adds @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gPvtmKMRpg9I9D7H]{Earthbind}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.115Xp9E38CJENhNS]{Passwall}, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.8Umt1AzYfFbC4fui]{Spellwrack} to her coven's spells.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Coven]

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 对所有对抗魔法的豁免获得+1状态加值 +1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic

Bonds of Iron.name: 钢铁之绊 Bonds of Iron
Bonds of Iron.description:
每日一次，一名铁爪鬼婆（特征）可以令一个由寒铁指甲构成的笼子从虚无中在射程至多30英尺处凭空弹出，尝试一次 @Check[type:athletics|traits:action:grapple|overrideTraits:true] 检定以对抗目标的强韧DC来 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{擒抱}；如果目标具有对寒铁的弱点，则铁爪鬼婆（特征）在此检定上获得+2环境加值。

不同于普通的擒抱，铁爪鬼婆（特征）不需要在触及范围内，并且可以随意移动，而一次成功的尝试会持续到该生物逃脱（DC 24）为止，使笼子崩解成锈渣。

任何生物都可以通过攻击来尝试摧毁笼子。它的AC为19，硬度10，以及40生命值。

Once per day, an annis hag can cause a cage built of cold iron fingernails to spring out of nothingness at a range of up to 30 feet, attempting an @Check[type:athletics|traits:action:grapple|overrideTraits:true] check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{Grapple} against the target's Fortitude DC; if the target has a weakness to cold iron, the annis hag gains a +2 circumstance bonus to this check.

Unlike a normal Grapple, the annis hag doesn't need to be within reach and can move as she pleases, and a successful attempt lasts until the creature escapes (DC 24), causing the cage to crumble into rust.

Any creature can attempt to destroy the cage by attacking it. It has an AC of 19, Hardness 10, and 40 Hit Points.

Change Shape.name: 变形 Change Shape
Change Shape.description:
该鬼婆（特征）可以呈现为任何中型女性类人生物的外貌。这不会改变她的速度，也不会改变她的打击的攻击与伤害加值，但可能会改变她的打击造成的伤害类型（通常为钝击）。

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

The hag can take on the appearance of any Medium female humanoid. This doesn't change her Speed or her attack and damage bonuses with her Strikes but might change the damage type her Strikes deal (typically to bludgeoning).

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

Annis Hag.publicNotes:
安妮丝鬼婆是残忍的拷打者与杀人凶手，沉醉于年轻生物与心地纯洁之人的悦耳尖叫与可口血肉。安妮丝鬼婆是所有鬼婆中最直接的一类，会投入肉搏战，并用她们的变形能力去狩猎，而非潜入并背叛类人生物。但安妮丝鬼婆会从每次杀戮中取走一件骇人的战利品，并用它来挑起纷争：她会把战利品送到受害者亲友之一手中，且方式会让人以为另一名家人牵涉到这起谋杀。安妮丝鬼婆也被称作铁鬼婆，拥有如铁般却又柔韧的皮肉，能抵御刃类武器；而她们的接触也同样如寒铁般冰冷，会灼烧其他鬼婆的皮肉。这使她们能够蛮横地夺取鬼婆集会的领导权。

潜伏在文明边缘的恶毒老妪，鬼婆会运用其欺骗性的魔法能力来捕食类人生物，操控并腐化他们。有人说，鬼婆起源于那些被内心自私扭曲的妖精。鬼婆会结成集会以获取更强大的力量，制作被称为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.ACa9QlFqdmW4s2Th]{鬼婆之眼}的独特魔法物品，并以自己的后代替换类人生物的婴儿——这些孩子是@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.bAjHCeyNcPRqOmLv]{换生灵}，并拥有最终也成为鬼婆的潜能。

Annis hags are brutal torturers and murderers, delighting in the musical screams and tasty flesh of young creatures and those who are pure of heart. Annis hags are the most direct of all hags, engaging in physical combat and using their change shape ability to hunt rather than to infiltrate and betray humanoids. But an Annis hag takes a grisly trophy from each kill and uses it to sow discord, sending the trophy to one of her victim's loved ones in a way that implicates another family member in the murder. Also known as iron hags, annis hags have iron-like yet flexible flesh that resists edged weapons, and their own touch is the same cold iron that burns the flesh of other hags. This allows them to bully their way to the leadership of hag covens.

Malevolent crones who lurk at the edges of civilization, hags use their deceptive, magical abilities to prey upon humanoids, manipulating and corrupting them. Some say hags arose from fey that became twisted by their inner selfishness. Hags gather together in covens for greater power, craft unique magical items known as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.ACa9QlFqdmW4s2Th]{Hag Eyes}, and are known to replace infant humanoids with their own offspring-these children are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.bAjHCeyNcPRqOmLv]{Changelings} who have the potential to become hags themselves.
Annis Hag.allSaves: +1 status to all saves vs. magic
Annis Hag.prototypeToken: 安妮丝鬼婆（特征） Annis Hag

Arcana Obcsura.name: 奥秘秘法 Arcana Obcsura

Folding Drums.name: 折叠鼓 Folding Drums
Folding Drums.description:
你可以将这个 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.yw1kPxsdCoDUzOaE]{乐器（大师级打击乐器）}展开成手鼓（1 负载）、带有肩带和背部支架的行进鼓组（3 负载），或带内置凳子的大型立式鼓组（16 负载）。改变折叠鼓的体型是一个3-行动的交互行动，并且这些鼓必须有足够的开阔空间以容纳其新的体型。

启动 1 交互（专注）

频率 每小时一次

效果 你在鼓上敲出强烈的节奏。如果你接下来使用的行动是施放一个具有散发的作曲戏法，将该散发的区域增加30尺。

You can unfold this @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.yw1kPxsdCoDUzOaE]{Musical Instrument (virtuoso percussion instrument)} into a hand drum (1 Bulk), a marching drum set with a shoulder harness and back brace (3 Bulk), or a large standing drum set with a built-in stool (16 Bulk). Changing the folding drum's size is a 3-action Interact activity, and the drums must have sufficient open space to accommodate their new size.

Activate 1 Interact (concentrate)

Frequency once per hour

Effect You play a pounding rhythm on the drum. If the next action you use is to cast a composition cantrip that has an emanation, increase the area of the emanation by 30 feet.

Grim Ring.name: 阴森之戒 Grim Ring
Grim Ring.description:
这枚金戒指的侧面雕刻着一张咧嘴狞笑的骷髅面孔。佩戴此戒指时，你可以用一次探索行动来尝试侦测不死生物的存在。这会揭示该区域内是否存在不死生物，但不会精确指出它们的位置。此戒指无法侦测外观被任何2环或更高等级的幻术法术所遮蔽的不死生物。若不死生物正处于潜藏或伪装状态，GM会为你掷一次秘密察觉检定，并根据情况对抗该不死生物的隐匿或欺瞒DC，你的检定获得+2物品加值。

启动 R 想象（活力）

频率 每日1次

触发 你因一个不死生物而获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失（状态）} 状态

效果 你获得的流失（状态）状态的数值降低1，且造成该状态的不死生物受到 @Damage[2d6[vitality]] 伤害。

This golden ring is sculpted with the visage of a grinning skull on the side. While wearing the ring, you can attempt to detect the presence of undead creatures as an exploration activity. This reveals the presence or absence of undead in the area, but it doesn't pinpoint their locations. This ring can't detect undead whose appearance is masked by any illusion spell that is 2nd level or higher. If an undead is hiding or disguised, the GM rolls a secret Perception check for you against the undead's Stealth or Deception DC, as appropriate, with a +2 item bonus to your check.

Activate R envision (vitality)

Frequency once per day

Trigger You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained} condition from an undead creature

Effect Reduce the value of the drained condition you gain by 1, and the undead that caused the condition takes @Damage[2d6[vitality]] damage.

Ring of the Weary Traveler.name: 疲惫旅人之戒 Ring of the Weary Traveler
Ring of the Weary Traveler.description:
这枚奇幻的金戒指拥有一圈华丽的戒环，其上铸有精致、旋涡状的装饰，并镶嵌着三颗明亮的翠绿色祖母绿。佩戴此戒指期间，你的速度获得+10英尺物品加值，但仅在计算你每小时的长途旅行移动时适用。

启动 3 想象，交互

效果 你从疲乏中恢复精神。持续10分钟，你可以无视疲乏（状态）带来的减值。这不会移除该状态，它仅仅压制拥有该状态的减值与不利影响。若在戒指的力量生效期间，有事物会使你再次变为疲乏，则压制结束，你会立即再次承受这些减值。

This fanciful golden ring has an ornate band cast with delicate, swirling decorations and is inlaid with three bright-green emeralds. While wearing this ring, you gain a +10-foot item bonus to your Speed, but only when determining your overland movement per hour.

Activate 3 envision, interact

Effect You refresh yourself from fatigue. For 10 minutes, you can ignore the penalties from the fatigued condition. This does not remove the condition, it merely suppresses the penalties and drawbacks of having the condition. If something would cause you to become fatigued again while the ring's power is in effect, the suppression ends, and you immediately take the penalties again.

Aeon Stone (Delaying).name: 灵俑石（延缓） Aeon Stone (Delaying)
Aeon Stone (Delaying).description:
数千年来，这些神秘、切割精巧的宝石一直被神秘主义者与狂热者囤积，他们希望揭开其中的秘密。尽管它们的形态与功能千差万别，据称这些石头全都是远界实体在太古时代用来构筑宇宙的水晶工具碎片。

当你灌注其中一枚精确塑形的水晶时，这块石头会绕着你的头部盘旋，而不是佩戴在身上。你可以用一个交互动作收起一枚永劫石，而一枚正在盘旋的石头也可能被人以对你成功的缴械动作从空中夺走。被收起或移除的石头仍保持灌注，但其效果会被压制，直到你将其重新放回头部周围盘旋为止。

有多种不同类型的永劫石，各自具有不同的外观与魔法效果。每枚永劫石在嵌入一种称为寻路仪的特殊魔法物品时，也会获得一个共鸣力量。

当你将因 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{濒死（状态）}状态而死亡时（通常在濒死 4），这枚光滑的粉色石头会自动启动，并将你的濒死值降低至比通常会杀死你的值低 1（通常降至濒死 3）。随后，这块石头会永久转变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.CVTbxCY85nLoHYuw]{永劫石（已消耗）}。即使你拥有多枚此类石头，你每天也只能从此能力中受益一次。

共鸣力量使你每天一次以神圣先天法术施放 1 环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{治疗术}。

Over millennia, these mysterious, intricately cut gemstones have been hoarded by mystics and fanatics hoping to discover their secrets. Despite their myriad forms and functions, these stones are purportedly all fragments of crystal tools used by otherworldly entities to construct the universe in primeval times.

When you invest one of these precisely shaped crystals, the stone orbits your head instead of being worn on your body. You can stow an aeon stone with an Interact action, and an orbiting stone can be snatched out of the air with a successful Disarm action against you. A stowed or removed stone remains invested, but its effects are suppressed until you return it to orbit your head again.

There are various types of aeon stones, each with a different appearance and magical effect. Each aeon stone also gains a resonant power when slotted into a special magical item called a wayfinder.

When you would die from the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{Dying} condition (typically at dying 4), this smooth pink stone automatically activates and reduces your dying value to 1 less than would normally kill you (typically to dying 3). The stone then permanently turns into a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.CVTbxCY85nLoHYuw]{Aeon Stone (Consumed)}. You can benefit from this ability only once per day, even if you have multiple such stones.

The resonant power allows you to cast 1st-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{Heal} as a divine innate spell once per day.

Glittering Snare.name: 闪光陷阱 Glittering Snare
Glittering Snare.description:
细小的云母、沙粒与研磨玻璃碎屑被装入一个弹簧加载的容器中，可以安装在绊线装置上或藏在容器里。第一个进入该方格或打开容器的生物必须尝试一次 @Check[type:reflex|dc:20|traits:uncommon|showDC:all] 豁免，因为该区域会被明亮、闪烁的粉尘喷洒覆盖，这些粉尘会黏附在皮肤、毛发与衣物上。

大成功或大失败：成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物的隐匿检定承受-1状态减值，持续1分钟，或直到它使用一个交互行动移除闪粉为止。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.w0LUnfS2whVhDBUF]{Effect: Glittering Snare (Success)}

失败 该生物的隐匿检定承受-2状态减值，持续2分钟，或直到它花费一个具有操作（特征）的2行动行动移除闪粉为止。若该生物当时处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}，闪粉会勾勒出它，持续1轮，使它对视觉感官而言为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}，而非 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{未察觉}。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.D7teqZ68L21aZCpd]{Effect: Glittering Snare (Failure)}

大成功或大失败：失败 同失败，但减值为-4。闪粉会黏附5分钟，或直到该生物花费一个具有操作（特征）的3行动行动将其移除为止。闪粉会持续在该生物周围飘落，直到完全移除，并在其移动时留下痕迹，揭示其大致位置；任何能看见闪粉的生物在其本应为未察觉时，会将其视为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐匿}，而非未察觉。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.GNFNDyx8nfNXrgV6]{Effect: Glittering Snare (Critical Failure)}

Small flecks of mica, sand, and ground glass are packed into a spring-loaded canister that can be rigged to a trip wire or hidden in a container. The first creature to enter the square or open the container must attempt a @Check[type:reflex|dc:20|traits:uncommon|showDC:all] save as the area is showered with bright, glittering dust that sticks to skin, fur, and clothing.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes a -1 status penalty to Stealth checks for 1 minute or until it uses an Interact action to remove the glitter.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.w0LUnfS2whVhDBUF]{Effect: Glittering Snare (Success)}

Failure The creature takes a -2 status penalty to Stealth checks for 2 minutes or until it spends a 2-action activity, which has the manipulate trait, to remove the glitter. If the creature was @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}, the glitter outlines it for 1 round, making it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} rather than @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected} to visual senses.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.D7teqZ68L21aZCpd]{Effect: Glittering Snare (Failure)}

Critical Failure As failure, but the penalty is -4. The glitter sticks for 5 minutes or until the creature spends a 3-action activity, which has the manipulate trait, to remove it. The glitter continues to fall around the creature until completely removed, leaving a trail behind it as it moves and revealing its rough location; the creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}, rather than undetected, to any creature that can see the glitter whenever it would otherwise have been undetected.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.GNFNDyx8nfNXrgV6]{Effect: Glittering Snare (Critical Failure)}

Alabaster and obsidian game set.name: 雪花石膏与黑曜石游戏套装 Alabaster and obsidian game set

Ancient dragon skull etched with mystic.name: 刻有神秘魔法印记的远古巨龙头骨 Ancient dragon skull etched with mystic sigils

Copper and spinel puzzle box.name: 铜与尖晶石谜盒 Copper and spinel puzzle box

Fine gold spyglass.name: 精制金制望远镜 Fine gold spyglass

Porcelain Teapot.name: 瓷茶壶 Porcelain Teapot
Porcelain Teapot.description:
这把瓷茶壶上满是荨麻草渣。一旦把茶壶上的毒洗掉，它价值40 gp。

The porcelain teapot is slathered with Nettleweed Residue. Once the poison is washed off the teapot, it's worth 40 gp.

Arcana Obcsura.hazarddescription:
沙伊坦在离开竞技场约一个月后出现在这座石亭里。他想收集足够的存货，好在艾巴萨罗姆的市场开一家店。

Shaitan shows up in this pavilion about a month after he leaves the Arena. He wants to gather up enough inventory to open a shop in the Absalom markets.

Chafkhem.name: 查夫肯姆 Chafkhem

Arcane Prepared Spells.name: 奥术已准备法术 Arcane Prepared Spells

Freedom of Movement.name: 行动自如 Freedom of Movement
Freedom of Movement.description:
你排斥那些会妨碍生物或使其移动变慢的效果。在此法术效果持续期间，目标无视那些会使其速度受到环境减值的效果。当其尝试@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱}一个使其@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}的效果时，除非该效果是魔法且其等级高于行动自如法术，否则其自动成功。

You repel effects that would hinder a creature or slow its movement. While under this spell's effect, the target ignores effects that would give them a circumstance penalty to Speed. When they attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} an effect that has them @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}, they automatically succeed unless the effect is magical and of a higher level than the freedom of movement spell.

Phantasmal Killer.name: 魅影杀手 Phantasmal Killer
Phantasmal Killer.description:
你创造一个对目标而言最可怕生物的幻影图像。只有该法术的目标能看见这个杀手，不过你能看见幻象那模糊的轮廓，它疾驰而出进行攻击。杀手的效果取决于目标进行意志豁免的结果。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标受到4d6精神伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 1}。

失败 目标受到8d6精神伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 2}。

大失败 目标恐惧到可能会死去。它必须尝试一次强韧豁免；若目标失败，则它死亡。若强韧豁免成功，目标受到12d6精神伤害，获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{逃跑}直到其下一回合结束，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 4}。此效果具有失能（特征）特征。

升阶（+1） 在失败时伤害增加2d6，在大失败时伤害增加3d6。

You create a phantasmal image of the most fearsome creature imaginable to the target. Only the spell's target can see the killer, though you can see the vague shape of the illusion as it races forth to attack. The effect of the killer is based on the outcome of the target's Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes 4d6 mental damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The target takes 8d6 mental damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Critical Failure The target is so afraid it might die. It must attempt a Fortitude save; if the target fails, it dies. On a successful Fortitude save, the target takes 12d6 mental damage, is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} until the end of its next turn, and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 4}. This effect has the incapacitation trait.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6 on a failure and by 3d6 on a critical failure.

Spell Immunity.name: 法术免疫 Spell Immunity
Spell Immunity.description:
你守护一个生物，使其免受单个法术的效果影响。选择一个法术，并在言语成分中大声说出其名称。每当法术免疫的目标成为所命名法术的目标或位于该法术的区域内时，法术免疫都会尝试反制该法术。若成功反制一个以区域或多个目标为目标的法术，法术免疫仅会抵消受法术免疫影响的目标的效果。

You ward a creature against the effects of a single spell. Choose a spell and name it aloud as part of the verbal component. Spell immunity attempts to counteract that spell whenever spell immunity's target is the target of the named spell or in that spell's area. Successfully counteracting a spell that targets an area or multiple targets with spell immunity negates the effects only for the target affected by spell immunity.

Awaken Portal.name: 唤醒传送门 Awaken Portal
Awaken Portal.description:
你尝试通过注入魔法能量来重新激活一个休眠的门、传送门或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.5ZW1w9f4gWlSIuWA]{传送法阵}。该仪式必须成功施展两次，在传送门所连接的两个地点各一次。虽然在憎恨魔窟中发现的传送法阵和传送门不需要任何额外花费即可唤醒，但在GM裁量下，其他传送门可能需要稀有物品或特定材料作为该仪式的花费——有些传送门甚至可能强大到此仪式根本无法将其唤醒。

大成功或大失败 成功你唤醒传送门。若其另一端已被唤醒，该传送门即可正常使用，并且不会自然停用。若其另一端尚未被唤醒，此端会保持唤醒状态1年，这可能让你有足够的时间去找到并唤醒相连的传送门。

成功同大成功或大失败 成功，但若传送门的另一端尚未被唤醒，此端只会保持唤醒状态[[/r 1d6 #days]]{1d6 days}，之后它会淡化并再次陷入休眠。

失败你未能激活传送门，且魔法反冲使你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 1} 状态，持续24小时。

大成功或大失败 失败同失败，但除此之外，一个敌对生物会被传送门吸引穿过来，并立刻攻击在场的任何人。被吸引穿过传送门的生物会因传送门的性质而异

You attempt to reactivate a dormant gate, portal, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.5ZW1w9f4gWlSIuWA]{Teleportation Circle} by infusing it with magical energies. This ritual must be successfully performed twice, once at each location the portal connects. While the teleportation circles and portals found in the Abomination Vaults require no additional cost to awaken, other portals might require rare items or specific materials as a cost for this ritual at the GM's discretion—some portals might even be so powerful that this ritual cannot awaken them at all.

Critical Success You awaken the portal. If its other side is awakened, the portal can be used normally and won't deactivate naturally. If its other side is not awakened, this side remains awakened for 1 year, possibly allowing you enough time to find and awaken the connecting portal.

Success As critical success, but if the portal's other side is not awakened, this side remains awakened for only [[/r 1d6 #days]]{1d6 days} before it fades and falls dormant again.

Failure You fail to activate the portal, and magical backlash leaves you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 24 hours.

Critical Failure As failure, but in addition, a hostile creature is drawn through the portal and immediately attacks anyone present. The creature drawn through the portal varies, according to the portal's nature

Glyph of Warding.name: 守卫刻文 Glyph of Warding
Glyph of Warding.description:
你通过将一个敌对法术绑定进一个符号来制作一个陷阱。在你施放该法术时，你也要施放一个更低法术环阶的法术以储存在刻文中。被储存的法术必须以3个动作或更少即可施放，具有敌对效果，并以一个生物为目标或具有一个区域。你可以为刻文设置一个口令、一个触发，或两者皆有。任何生物只要移动、打开或触碰目标容器，或进入目标区域，且未说出口令或符合触发条件，就会启动刻文，释放其中的有害法术。

一旦有法术被储存在刻文中，刻文获得该法术的全部特征。若被储存的法术以一个或多个生物为目标，则它以触发刻文的生物为目标。若它具有区域，则该区域以触发刻文的生物为中心。守卫刻文的持续时间在刻文被触发时结束。该刻文视为一个魔法陷阱，使用你的法术DC来进行察觉检定以注意到它，以及进行盗贼检定以解除它；两项检定都要求尝试者受训才能成功。

你可以解消守卫刻文。你同一时间可以保持生效的守卫刻文的最大数量等于你的施法关键能力调整值。

You craft a trap by binding a hostile spell into a symbol. While Casting this Spell, you also Cast a Spell of a lower spell rank to store in the glyph. The stored spell must take 3 actions or fewer to cast, have a hostile effect, and target one creature or have an area. You can set a password, a trigger, or both for the glyph. Any creature that moves, opens, or touches the target container or enters the target area that doesn't speak the password or that matches the trigger activates the glyph, releasing the harmful spell within.

Once a spell is stored in the glyph, the glyph gains all the traits of that spell. If the stored spell targets one or more creatures, it targets the creature that set off the glyph. If it has an area, that area is centered on the creature that set off the glyph. Glyph of warding's duration ends when the glyph is triggered. The glyph counts as a magical trap, using your spell DC for both the Perception check to notice it and the Thievery check to disable it; both checks require the creature attempting them to be trained in order to succeed.

You can Dismiss glyph of warding. The maximum number of glyphs of warding you can have active at a time is equal to your spellcasting ability modifier.

Haste.name: 加速术 Haste
Haste.description:
魔法赋予目标更快行动的力量。它获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{迅捷（状态）}状态，并且每轮只能将额外的动作用于打击和疾行动作。

升阶（第7环） 你可以以最多6个生物为目标。

Magic empowers the target to act faster. It gains the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} condition and can use the extra action each round only for Strike and Stride actions.

Heightened (7th) You can target up to 6 creatures.

Mind Reading.name: 读心术 Mind Reading
Mind Reading.description:
通过一次粗略的精神接触，你尝试读取目标的心智。它必须尝试一次意志豁免。随后该目标会在1小时内对你的读心术暂时免疫。

大成功或大失败 成功 当你施放法术时，目标会从你这里感知到模糊的表层想法。

成功 你得知目标的智力调整值是高于、等于还是低于你的。

失败 当你施放法术时，你会从目标那里感知到模糊的表层想法，并且你得知其智力调整值是高于、等于还是低于你的。

大成功或大失败 失败 如失败，并且在法术的持续时间内，你可以维持法术以再次侦测目标的表层想法。目标不会获得任何额外的豁免。

With a cursory mental touch, you attempt to read the target's mind. It must attempt a Will save. The target then becomes temporarily immune to your mind reading for 1 hour.

Critical Success The target perceives vague surface thoughts from you when you Cast the Spell.

Success You find out whether the target's Intelligence modifier is higher than, equal to, or lower than yours.

Failure You perceive vague surface thoughts from the target when you Cast the Spell, and you find out whether its Intelligence modifier is higher than, equal to, or lower than yours.

Critical Failure As failure, and for the duration of the spell, you can Sustain the Spell to detect the target's surface thoughts again. The target doesn't receive any additional saves.

Blur.name: 朦胧术 Blur
Blur.description:
目标的形体看起来模糊不清。它变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}。由于该效果的性质仍然使目标的位置显而易见，目标无法利用此隐蔽来躲藏或潜行。

The target's form appears blurry. It becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}. As the nature of this effect still leaves the target's location obvious, the target can't use this concealment to Hide or Sneak.

Create Undead.name: 唤起死灵 Create Undead
Create Undead.description:
你将目标转化为一个不死生物，其等级上限如表 7-1 所示。这个仪式有许多版本，每个版本都专用于某一种特定的不死生物（例如：所有丧尸（特征）使用一种仪式、骷髅（特征）使用一种、食尸鬼使用一种，诸如此类），而用于唤起稀有不死生物的仪式同样也很稀有。有些不死生物的形态（例如巫妖）使用其自身独有的方法形成，不能用任何版本的唤起死灵来创造。

表 7-1：生物创造仪式

生物等级 所需法术环阶 花费
-1 或 0 2 15 gp
1 2 60 gp
2 3 105 gp
3 3 180 gp
4 4 300 gp
5 4 480 gp
6 5 750 gp
7 5 1,080 gp
8 6 1,500 gp
9 6 2,100 gp
10 7 3,000 gp
11 7 4,200 gp
12 8 6,000 gp
13 8 9,000 gp
14 9 13,500 gp
15 9 19,500 gp
16 10 30,000 gp
17 10 45,000 gp

大成功或大失败成功 目标成为相应类型的不死生物。若它的等级至少比你低 4 级，你可以让它成为一个仆从（特征）。这会使其获得仆从（特征）特征，意味着当你命令术它时，它可以使用 2 个动作；而命令它是一个具有听觉与专注（特征）特征的单动作。你最多可以同时控制四个仆从（特征）。若它具有智能且未成为仆从（特征），该不死生物会因你唤醒它而对你有所帮助，尽管它仍是可怖而邪恶的生物。若它没有智能且未成为仆从（特征），你可以给予它一个简单的命令。它会一心一意追求该目标，无视你后续的任何命令。

成功 同大成功或大失败成功，但具有智能且未成为你仆从（特征）的不死生物只会对你友善；而没有智能且未成为你仆从（特征）的不死生物会放你一马，除非你攻击它。它会在本地区域内肆虐，而不是遵循你的命令。

失败 你未能唤起不死生物。

大成功或大失败失败 你唤起了不死生物，但它的灵魂被你卑劣的死灵术折磨，对你充满了刻骨的憎恨。它会试图毁灭你。

You transform the target into an undead creature with a level up to that allowed in Table 7-1. There are many versions of this ritual, each specific to a particular type of undead (one ritual for all zombies, one for skeletons, one for ghouls, and so on), and the rituals that create rare undead are also rare. Some forms of undead, such as liches, form using their own unique methods and can't be created with a version of create undead.

Table 7-1: Creatures Creation Rituals

Creature Level Spell Rank Required Cost
-1 or 0 2 15 gp
1 2 60 gp
2 3 105 gp
3 3 180 gp
4 4 300 gp
5 4 480 gp
6 5 750 gp
7 5 1,080 gp
8 6 1,500 gp
9 6 2,100 gp
10 7 3,000 gp
11 7 4,200 gp
12 8 6,000 gp
13 8 9,000 gp
14 9 13,500 gp
15 9 19,500 gp
16 10 30,000 gp
17 10 45,000 gp

Critical Success The target becomes an undead creature of the appropriate type. If it's at least 4 levels lower than you, you can make it a minion. This gives it the minion trait, meaning it can use 2 actions when you command it, and commanding it is a single action that has the auditory and concentrate traits. You can have a maximum of four minions under your control. If it's intelligent and doesn't become a minion, the undead is helpful to you for awakening it, though it's still a horrid and evil creature. If it's unintelligent and doesn't become a minion, you can give it one simple command. It pursues that goal single-mindedly, ignoring any of your subsequent commands.

Success As critical success, except an intelligent undead that doesn't become your minion is only friendly to you, and an unintelligent undead that doesn't become your minion leaves you alone unless you attack it. It marauds the local area rather than following your command.

Failure You fail to create the undead.

Critical Failure You create the undead, but its soul, tortured by your foul necromancy, is full of nothing but hatred for you. It attempts to destroy you.

Dispel Magic.name: 解除魔法 Dispel Magic
Dispel Magic.description:
你解开一个法术或效果背后的魔法。对目标进行一次反制检定。若你成功反制一个魔法物品，该物品在10分钟内变为其类型的普通物品。这不会改变该物品的非魔法属性。若目标是神器或类似物品，你自动失败。

You unravel the magic behind a spell or effect. Attempt a counteract check against the target. If you successfully counteract a magic item, the item becomes a mundane item of its type for 10 minutes. This doesn't change the item's non-magical properties. If the target is an artifact or similar item, you automatically fail.

Hideous Laughter.name: 狂笑术 Hideous Laughter
Hideous Laughter.description:
目标被无法控制的笑声淹没。它必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标被无法控制的笑声所困扰。它无法使用反应动作。

失败 目标获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}且无法使用反应动作。

大失败 目标倒下@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}且在1轮内无法使用动作或反应动作。随后它承受失败效果。

The target is overtaken with uncontrollable laughter. It must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is plagued with uncontrollable laughter. It can't use reactions.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} and can't use reactions.

Critical Failure The target falls @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} and can't use actions or reactions for 1 round. It then suffers the failure effects.

Inveigle.name: 迷心咒 Inveigle
Inveigle.description:
你赢取了目标的心智，使其将你视为亲密且值得信赖的朋友，并把你提出的每一个暗示术都看作合理。目标对你很有帮助，因此会不遗余力地协助你。与任何其他有帮助的生物一样，你能要求它做的事也有其限度。若你曾要求目标去做完全违背其天性，或对目标或其利益而言毫无必要且有害的事，它不仅会拒绝，还可以尝试进行一次意志豁免以提前结束效果。由于施法时间与射程的缘故，除非目标愿意（也许被说服相信该仪式会产生其他效果）或被束缚，否则通常很难施放该仪式。若该生物不愿接受该仪式，它可以尝试进行一次意志豁免以抵消效果。

大成功 仪式成功，且目标在为结束该效果而进行的意志豁免上承受-4状态减值。

成功 仪式成功。

失败 仪式失败。

大失败 仪式失败，且目标转而憎恨你，在持续时间内对你变为敌对。

升阶（6环） 你可以在整个施法过程中对最远1英里外的生物使用迷心咒，只要你持有一缕毛发、一滴血，或该生物身体的其他部分，并将其混入成本中使用的油料里。基础成本提高至100 gp。持续时间比通常更短，取决于你使用了多大一部分该生物的身体。血液、毛发、鳞片等会使该仪式持续1周，而一只手或其他相当的身体部位会使该仪式持续1个月。

You win over the target's mind, causing it to see you as a close and trusted friend and look upon your every suggestion as reasonable. The target is helpful toward you, so it will go out of its way to help you. As with any other helpful creature, there are limits to what you can ask of it. If you ever ask the target to do something completely against its nature or needlessly harmful to the target or its interests, not only does it refuse, but it also can attempt a Will save to end the effect early. Because of the casting time and range, it's generally difficult to cast this ritual unless the target is willing (perhaps convinced the ritual will have some other effect) or restrained. If the creature is unwilling to accept the ritual, it can attempt a Will save to negate the effect.

Critical Success The ritual succeeds and the target takes a -4 status penalty to Will saves to end the effect.

Success The ritual succeeds.

Failure The ritual fails.

Critical Failure The ritual fails and the target instead hates you, becoming hostile to you for the duration.

Heightened (6th) You can use inveigle on a creature up to 1 mile away throughout the casting, as long as you have a lock of hair, a drop of blood, or some other piece of the creature's body, which you mix into the oils used in the cost. The base cost increases to 100 gp. The duration is shorter than normal, based on how large a piece of the creature's body you use. Blood, hair, scales, and the like cause the ritual to last 1 week, while a hand or other substantial body part causes the ritual to last 1 month.

Invisibility.name: 隐形术 Invisibility
Invisibility.description:
目标披上幻象斗篷，成为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}。这使其对所有生物而言均为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{未察觉}，不过这些生物可以尝试寻找目标，使其对他们而言改为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐匿}。如果目标使用敌对动作，则该法术会在该敌对动作完成后结束。

升阶（4环） 该法术持续1分钟，但即使目标使用敌对动作也不会结束。

Cloaked in illusion, the target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}. This makes it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected} to all creatures, though the creatures can attempt to find the target, making it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} to them instead. If the target uses a hostile action, the spell ends after that hostile action is completed.

Heightened (4th) The spell lasts 1 minute, but it doesn't end if the target uses a hostile action.

See Invisibility.name: 识破隐形 See Invisibility
See Invisibility.description:
你可以看见@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}的生物和物体。它们在你眼中呈现为半透明的形状，并且对你而言处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}状态。

升阶（5环） 该法术的持续时间为8小时。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.T5bk6UH7yuYog1Fp]{法术效果：看见不可见}

You can see @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} creatures and objects. They appear to you as translucent shapes, and they are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} to you.

Heightened (5th) The spell has a duration of 8 hours.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.T5bk6UH7yuYog1Fp]{Spell Effect: See the Unseen}

Chill Touch.name: 恐吓之触 Chill Touch
Chill Touch.description:
将虚空能量虹吸入体，你的手散发出苍白的黑暗。你的接触会削弱活物并使不死生物迷惑，甚至可能令其逃离。效果取决于目标是活物还是不死生物。

  • 活体生物 该法术造成等于1d4加上你的施法调整值的虚空伤害。目标进行一次基础强韧豁免，但若出现大失败，还会在1轮内处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{衰弱 1}。
  • 不死生物 若强韧豁免失败，目标在1轮内处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}。若出现大失败，除非其在一次意志豁免中成功，否则目标还会在1轮内处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{逃窜}。

升阶（+1） 对活体生物造成的虚空伤害增加1d4。

Siphoning void energy into yourself, your hand radiates a pale darkness. Your touch weakens the living and disorients undead, possibly even causing them to flee. The effect depends on whether the target is living or undead.

  • Living Creature The spell deals void damage equal to 1d4 plus your spellcasting modifier. The target attempts a basic Fortitude save, but is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} for 1 round on a critical failure.
  • Undead Creature The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} for 1 round on a failed Fortitude save. On a critical failure, the target is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} for 1 round unless it succeeds at a Will save.

Heightened (+1) The void damage to living creatures increases by 1d4.

Command.name: 命令术 Command
Command.description:
你喊出一道难以忽视的命令。你可以命令目标接近你、逃离（如同它具有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{逃跑（状态）}状态）、放开它正抓着的东西、卧倒@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}，或原地不动。在它服从你的命令之前，它不能延迟或进行任何反应动作（）。这些效果取决于目标的意志豁免。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 在它下个回合的第一个动作中，该生物必须使用一个单动作来照你的命令行事。

大失败 目标必须在它的下个回合用尽其所有动作来服从你的命令。

强化（5环） 你可以以至多10个生物为目标。

You shout a command that's hard to ignore. You can command the target to approach you, run away (as if it had the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} condition), release what it's holding, drop @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}, or stand in place. It can't Delay or take any reactions until it has obeyed your command. The effects depend on the target's Will save.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure For the first action on its next turn, the creature must use a single action to do as you command.

Critical Failure The target must use all its actions on its next turn to obey your command.

Heightened (5th) You can target up to 10 creatures.

Daze.name: 眩晕术 Daze
Daze.description:
你令目标的思维变得混乱，并用一次精神冲击使其眩晕。该冲击造成等同于你施法能力调整值的精神伤害；目标必须尝试一次基础意志豁免。若目标豁免大失败，它还会获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

升阶（+2） 伤害增加1d6。

You cloud the target's mind and daze it with a mental jolt. The jolt deals mental damage equal to your spellcasting ability modifier; the target must attempt a basic Will save. If the target critically fails the save, it is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Heightened (+2) The damage increases by 1d6.

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你放出一道脉冲，以登记魔法的存在。除了魔法是否存在之外，你不会获得任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，比如你和盟友的魔法物品以及持续中的法术。

你只有在幻术魔法的效果等级低于你的侦测魔法法术的阶位时，才能侦测到该幻术魔法。然而，带有幻术灵光但外观并不具有欺骗性的物品（例如隐形术药水）通常仍会被正常侦测到。

升阶（3环） 你得知该法术在射程内所侦测到的、等级最高的效果所属的魔法学派。若有多个效果同样强大，则由GM决定你得知哪一个。

升阶（4环） 同3环，但你还会定位等级最高的魔法之来源。如同模糊感官，你不会得知精确位置，但可以将来源缩小到一个5尺立方体之内（若来源大于此，则缩小到最近的范围）。

You send out a pulse that registers the presence of magic. You receive no information beyond the presence or absence of magic. You can choose to ignore magic you're fully aware of, such as the magic items and ongoing spells of you and your allies.

You detect illusion magic only if that magic's effect has a lower level than the rank of your detect magic spell. However, items that have an illusion aura but aren't deceptive in appearance (such as an invisibility potion) typically are detected normally.

Heightened (3rd) You learn the school of magic for the highest-level effect within range that the spell detects. If multiple effects are equally strong, the GM determines which you learn.

Heightened (4th) As 3rd level, but you also pinpoint the source of the highest-level magic. Like for an imprecise sense, you don't learn the exact location, but can narrow down the source to within a 5-foot cube (or the nearest if larger than that).

Grim Tendrils.name: 邪影触须 Grim Tendrils
Grim Tendrils.description:
黑暗的触须从你的指尖卷出，穿过空气疾驰。你对线内的活体生物造成2d4点虚空伤害和[[/r (@item.level)[bleed]]]点伤害。线内的每个活体生物都必须尝试一次强韧豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物承受一半的虚空伤害，且不承受持续流血伤害。

失败 该生物承受全部伤害。

大失败 该生物承受双倍虚空伤害和双倍持续流血伤害。

强化（+1） 虚空伤害增加2d4点，持续流血伤害增加1点。

Tendrils of darkness curl out from your fingertips and race through the air. You deal 2d4 void damage and [[/r (@item.level)[bleed]]] damage to living creatures in the line. Each living creature in the line must attempt a Fortitude save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half the void damage and no persistent bleed damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage.

Critical Failure The creature takes double void damage and double persistent bleed damage.

Heightened (+1) The void damage increases by 2d4, and the persistent bleed damage increases by 1.

Mending.name: 修复术 Mending
Mending.description:
你修复目标物品。你每个法术环阶为目标恢复5点生命值，这可能会在将该物品修复至超过其破损阈值时移除 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6dNUvdb1dhToNDj3]{Broken} 状态。你无法替换遗失的部件，也无法修复已被完全摧毁的物体。

强化（2环） 你可以以一个负载为1或更少的非魔法物体为目标。

强化（3环） 你可以以一个负载为2或更少的非魔法物体为目标，或以一个负载为1或更少的魔法物体为目标。

You repair the target item. You restore 5 Hit Points per spell rank to the target, potentially removing the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6dNUvdb1dhToNDj3]{Broken} condition if this repairs it past the item's Broken Threshold. You can't replace lost pieces or repair an object that's been completely destroyed.

Heightened (2nd) You can target a non-magical object of 1 Bulk or less.

Heightened (3rd) You can target a non-magical object of 2 Bulk or less, or a magical object of 1 Bulk or less.

Ray of Enfeeblement.name: 衰弱射线 Ray of Enfeeblement
Ray of Enfeeblement.description:
一道削弱敌人力量的射线从你手中闪现。对目标进行一次远程法术攻击。若你成功，该生物进行一次强韧豁免以决定法术的效果。若你的攻击掷骰为大成功，使用其豁免结果低一档的结果。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1}。

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2}。

大失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 3}。

A ray that saps a foe's strength flashes from your hand. Attempt a ranged spell attack against the target. If you succeed, that creature attempts a Fortitude save to determine the spell's effect. If your attack roll is a critical success, use the outcome for one degree of success worse than the result of its save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1}.

Failure The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2}.

Critical Failure The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 3}.

Shield.name: 护盾术 Shield
Shield.description:
你升起一道魔法力场护盾术。这算作用了【举起护盾】动作，使你在下个回合开始前获得 AC +1 环境加值，但不需要一只手来使用。

在该法术生效期间，你可以用你的魔法护盾术使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{Shield Block} 反应动作（）。该护盾的硬度为 5。在你使用 Shield Block 后，该法术结束，且你在 10 分钟内无法再次施放它。与普通的 Shield Block 不同，你可以用该法术的反应动作（）来对抗 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gKKqvLohtrSJj3BM]{Force Barrage} 法术。

强化该法术会提高护盾的硬度。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{法术效果：护盾术}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.QF6RDlCoTvkVHRo4]{效果：护盾术免疫}

强化（3环） 该护盾的硬度为 10。

强化（5环） 该护盾的硬度为 15。

强化（7环） 该护盾的硬度为 20。

强化（9环） 该护盾的硬度为 25。

You raise a magical shield of force. This counts as using the Raise a Shield action, giving you a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn, but it doesn't require a hand to use.

While the spell is in effect, you can use the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{Shield Block} reaction with your magic shield. The shield has Hardness 5. After you use Shield Block, the spell ends and you can't cast it again for 10 minutes. Unlike a normal Shield Block, you can use the spell's reaction against the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gKKqvLohtrSJj3BM]{Force Barrage} spell.

Heightening the spell increases the shield's Hardness.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{Spell Effect: Shield}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.QF6RDlCoTvkVHRo4]{Effect: Shield Immunity}

Heightened (3rd) The shield has Hardness 10.

Heightened (5th) The shield has Hardness 15.

Heightened (7th) The shield has Hardness 20.

Heightened (9th) The shield has Hardness 25.

Tanglefoot.name: 绊足术 Tanglefoot
Tanglefoot.description:
一根覆盖着黏稠树液的藤蔓从虚空中出现，从你手中甩出并缠向目标。对目标进行一次法术攻击。

大成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{禁足（状态）}状态，并在1轮内其速度受到-10尺环境减值。它可以尝试以你的法术DC进行逃脱，以移除该减值以及 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{禁足（状态）}状态。

成功 目标在1轮内其速度受到-10尺环境减值。它可以尝试以你的法术DC进行逃脱，以移除该减值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.TwtUIEyenrtAbeiX]{法术效果：缠绕藤蔓}

失败 目标不受影响。

升阶（2环） 效果持续2轮。

升阶（4环） 效果持续1分钟。

A vine covered in sticky sap appears from thin air, flicking from your hand and lashing itself to the target. Attempt a spell attack against the target.

Critical Success The target gains the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} condition and takes a -10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds for 1 round. It can attempt to Escape against your spell DC to remove the penalty and the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} condition.

Success The target takes a -10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds for 1 round. It can attempt to Escape against your spell DC to remove the penalty.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.TwtUIEyenrtAbeiX]{Spell Effect: Tangle Vine}

Failure The target is unaffected.

Heightened (2nd) The effects last for 2 rounds.

Heightened (4th) The effects last for 1 minute.

Unseen Servant.name: 隐形仆役 Unseen Servant
Unseen Servant.description:
你召唤一个隐形仆役，你可以在维持法术时将其作为一部分来施加命令术。它为你服务，直到其生命值降至0（此时该法术结束），或直到你停止维持法术。该隐形仆役获得被召唤（特征）特征。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.j7NNPfZwD19BwSEZ]{隐形仆役}（无阵营）

You summon an unseen servant, which you can command as part of Sustaining the Spell. It serves you until its Hit Points are reduced to 0, at which point the spell ends, or until you stop Sustaining the Spell. The unseen servant gains the summoned trait.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.j7NNPfZwD19BwSEZ]{Unseen Servant} (No Alignment)

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Vitality.name: 对抗活力的所有豁免获得+1状态加值 +1 Status to All Saves vs. Vitality

Despair.name: 绝望灵光 Despair
Despair.description:
30英尺。活体生物在查夫肯姆的绝望灵光中时为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 1}。它们在该区域内无法自然从此恐惧术中恢复，但一旦离开便会立刻恢复。当一名生物首次进入该区域时，它必须在承受恐慌带来的减值后进行一次 @Check[type:will|dc:24] 意志 豁免，失败则 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹} 1轮。

随后，该生物获得24小时的暂时免疫。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.1bOSJ2LbEC28aI9f]{效果：绝望灵光}

30 feet. Living creatures are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1} while in Chafkhem's despair aura. They can't naturally recover from this fear while in the area but recover instantly once they leave it. When a creature first enters the area, it must succeed at a @Check[type:will|dc:24] save (after taking the penalty from being frightened) or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} for 1 round.

The creature is then temporarily immune for 24 hours.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.1bOSJ2LbEC28aI9f]{Effect: Despair}

Rejuvenation.name: 复生 Rejuvenation
Rejuvenation.description:
当查夫肯姆被摧毁时，死灵能量会在他房间里的魔法法阵中重塑他的身体，耗时 [[/br 1d10 #Rejuvenation]]{1d10天}。如果正在重塑的身体在此期间被摧毁，该过程会重新开始。查夫肯姆可以通过 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Dbd5W6G8U2vzWolN]{祝圣术} 仪式，或摧毁该魔法法阵，从而被永久摧毁。

When Chafkhem is destroyed, necromantic energies rebuild his body in the magic circle in his room over [[/br 1d10 #Rejuvenation]]{1d10 days}. If the re-forming body is destroyed during that time, the process starts anew. Chafkhem can be destroyed for good with a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Dbd5W6G8U2vzWolN]{Consecrate} ritual, or if the magic circle is destroyed.

Warding Script.name: 防护刻文 Warding Script
Warding Script.description:
触发 查夫肯姆能看见的一个生物对查夫肯姆进行一次近战打击

效果 查夫肯姆在空中描绘一个会发光并淡化的魔法符文。触发的生物必须尝试一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:25] 豁免。

成功 目标不受影响。

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲} 状态，直到其下个回合开始。

大成功或大失败 失败 目标目盲 1 分钟。

Trigger A creature Chafkhem can see makes a melee Strike against Chafkhem

Effect Chafkhem traces a magical glyph in the air that glows and fades. The triggering creature must attempt a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:25] save.

Success The target is unaffected.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} until the start of its next turn.

Critical Failure The target is blinded for 1 minute.

Mummy Rot.name: 腐尸症 Mummy Rot
Mummy Rot.description:
该疾病及其造成的任何伤害在诅咒移除前都无法被治疗。被腐尸症杀死的生物会化为尘土，除非通过一个7环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.kqhPt9344UkcGVYO]{Resurrect} 仪式或类似的魔法，否则无法起死回生。

豁免投掷 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:24]

阶段 1 携带者，无不良效果（1分钟）

阶段 2 @Damage[6d6[void]] 伤害并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1}（1天）

This disease and any damage from it can't be healed until this curse is removed. A creature killed by mummy rot turns to dust and can't be resurrected except by a 7th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.kqhPt9344UkcGVYO]{Resurrect} ritual or similar magic.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:24]

Stage 1 carrier with no ill effect (1 minute)

Stage 2 @Damage[6d6[void]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} (1 day)

Chafkham's Spellbook Pages.name: 查夫卡姆的法术书书页 Chafkham's Spellbook Pages
Chafkham's Spellbook Pages.description:
条目 法术 奥术准备法术
无拘移动,
魅影杀手,
法术免疫,
符文陷阱,
加速术,
读心术,
朦胧术,
解除魔法,
狂笑发作,
隐形术,
看见不可见,
虚空扭曲,
命令术,
眩晕术,
侦测魔法,
邪影触须,
修复术,
虚弱术,
护盾术,
纠缠藤蔓,
魅影仆从
仪式
唤醒传送门,
唤起死灵,
迷心咒
Entry Spells

Unfettered Movement,
Phantasmal Killer,

Rune Trap,

Blur,

Laughing Fit,
Invisibility,
See the Unseen,
Void Warp,
Command,
Daze,
Detect Magic,
Grim Tendrils,
Mending,
Enfeeble,
Shield,
Tangle Vine,
Phantasmal Minion
Rituals
Awaken Portal,
Create Undead,
Inveigle

Chafkhem's Magic Circle.name: 查夫肯姆的魔法法阵 Chafkhem's Magic Circle
Chafkhem's Magic Circle.description:
这个魔法法阵仅专用于查夫肯姆。从他在《憎恨魔窟》中的日志条目：

房间中央的魔法法阵协助查夫肯姆维持魔法能量。当施行仪式时，该法阵使他的技能检定获得+2状态加值。此外，当他在法阵内时会获得加速，但这额外动作只能用于维持一个法术。
