如果有机会，查夫肯姆会将该魔法法阵誊写到从长沙发上撕下的室内装潢布料上，并随身携带。

This magic circle is specific to Chafkhem only. From his journal entry in Abomination Vaults:

The magic circle at the center of the room assists Chafkhem with maintaining magical energy. The circle gives him a +2 status bonus to skill checks when performing rituals. Additionally, he’s quickened while within the circle but can use the additional action only to Sustain a Spell.

If given the opportunity, Chafkhem will transcribe the magic circle to uphulstery torn off of the divan, and will carry it on his person.

Staff of Protection.name: 防护法杖 Staff of Protection
Staff of Protection.description:
这根木制法杖异常坚固且不可撼动。持用该法杖时，你的DC获得+1环境加值，用以避免被推撞或绊倒。

启动 施法

效果 你从法杖中消耗一定数量的充能，以从其列表中施放一个法术。

  • 戏法 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.TVKNbcgTee19PXZR]{护盾术}
  • 1环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.4WAib3GichxLjp5p]{魔法警报}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.aAbfKn8maGjJjk2W]{秘法护甲}
  • 2环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{解除魔法}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.5esP2GVzvxWsMgaX]{环境耐受}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Fr58LDSrbndgld9n]{抗能量}

制造需求 提供所有所列环阶的所有所列法术各一次的施放。

This wooden staff is remarkably sturdy and unyielding. While wielding the staff, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to your DC to avoid being shoved or tripped.

Activate Cast a Spell

Effect You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list.

  • Cantrip @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.TVKNbcgTee19PXZR]{Shield}
  • 1st @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.4WAib3GichxLjp5p]{Alarm}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.aAbfKn8maGjJjk2W]{Mystic Armor}
  • 2nd @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.5esP2GVzvxWsMgaX]{Environmental Endurance}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Fr58LDSrbndgld9n]{Resist Energy}

Craft Requirements Supply one casting of all listed ranks of all listed spells.

Chafkhem.blurb:
男性木乃伊（特征）仪式师
Male mummy ritualist
Chafkhem.allSaves: +1 status to all saves vs. vitality

Cynemi.name: 西内米 Cynemi

Hunt Prey.name: 猎杀目标 Hunt Prey
Hunt Prey.description:
赏金猎人将一个他们能看见并听见的生物，或一个他们正在追踪的生物，指定为他们的猎物。赏金猎人在对猎物进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜寻}的察觉检定，以及在对猎物进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{追踪}的生存检定上，获得+2环境加值。此效果持续到赏金猎人再次使用猎杀目标为止。

The bounty hunter designates a single creature they can see and hear, or one they're Tracking, as their prey. The bounty hunter gains a +2 circumstance bonus to Perception checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} the prey and to Survival checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{Track} the prey. This effect lasts until the bounty hunter uses Hunt Prey again.

Precision Edge.name: 精准锋刃 Precision Edge
Precision Edge.description:
在每一轮中，赏金猎人第一次命中其被追猎的猎物时，会额外造成 1d8 点精准伤害。

The first time the bounty hunter hits their hunted prey in a round, they deal an additional 1d8 precision damage.

Running Reload.name: 移动装填 Running Reload
Running Reload.description:
赏金猎人疾行、快步或潜行，然后交互以装填。

The bounty hunter Strides, Steps, or Sneaks, and then Interacts to reload.

Cynemi's Rhythm Bone.name: 塞涅米的律动骨 Cynemi's Rhythm Bone
Cynemi's Rhythm Bone.description:
这块小巧的附魔骨头（最常见的是下颚骨）通常在两端包覆金属。通过将其敲击在坚硬表面上来启动。

启动 1 交互

效果 骨头开始记录接下来 1 分钟的环境声响（包括言语），这些声响需要进行 DC 15 或更低的察觉检定才能听见。骨头的记录不会复制魔法性的听觉效果，例如施法的声音、鹰身女妖的歌声或女妖的哀嚎。一旦节奏骨以此方式启动，它会在其余下的存在期间保留所记录的声音，并且不能再次以此方式启动。

启动 1 交互

效果 骨头重放其记录的声音。

制作需求 提供一次施放 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.atlgGNI1E1Ox3O3a]{幻音术}。

播放时的对话：

（沙沙声）

女人：你为什么喜欢我？

卡门：（困倦）啊？

女人：你为什么会被我吸引？

卡门：我真的很喜欢你的尾巴。

女人：认真点。

卡门：我很认真。

女人：（恼火地叹气）

卡门：好吧，你想要个答案？那你先来。

女人：嗯……你一点也不像我想的那样。

卡门：真的？你为什么会期待任何东西？

女人：（局促）你知道……你名声在外。

卡门：真的？跟我讲讲我……名声在外的那些事。

女人：嗯，我知道你有点像个小偷和无赖……从你的名声……而且我没想到……会有这么令人印象深刻的体格。

卡门：所以我喜欢你是因为你的尾巴，你喜欢我因为我的身体。听起来我们俩都挺肤浅的。

女人：不只是你的身体。

卡门：那还能是什么？我要给你个答案，我也想要个答案。

女人：我觉得你只是在拖时间，好让你想点什么出来。

卡门：我觉得你也一样。

女人：你很有趣。

卡门：我很有趣？只是床上？

女人：不。我们现在不就很开心吗？

卡门：我想也是。我就只是有趣？就这样？

女人：那你觉得呢？你觉得我想给你生孩子吗？

卡门：我觉得你想。他们会像我一样体格出众。

女人：而且他们可能会有我的尾巴。好吧，现在轮到你了。

卡门：我觉得你宁愿我这么做。

女人：（恼火）卡门！）

（录音的剩余部分只有沙沙声，以及偶尔传来的女性咯咯笑声。）

This small, enchanted bone (most often a jaw) is usually capped with metal at its ends. It's activated by striking it against a hard surface.

Activate 1 Interact

Effect The bone begins recording the next 1 minute of ambient sounds (including speech) that require a DC 15 or lower Perception check to hear. The bone's recording doesn't copy magical auditory effects, such as those of spellcasting, a harpy's song, or a banshee's wail. Once the rhythm bone has been activated in this way, it retains the recorded sound for the rest of its existence and can't be activated this way again.

Activate 1 Interact

Effect The bone replays its recorded sounds.

Craft Requirements Supply a casting of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.atlgGNI1E1Ox3O3a]{Ghost Sound}.

Dialog when played:

(Rustling sound)

Woman: Why do you like me?

Carman: (sleepy) Huh?

Woman: Why are you attracted to me?

Carman: I really like your tail.

Woman: Be serious.

Carman: I do.

Woman: (exasperated sigh)

Carman: Okay, you want an answer? You go first.

Woman: Well ... you're nothing like what I expected.

Carman: Really? Why were you expecting anything at all?

Woman: (flustered) You know ... you have a reputation.

Carman: Really? Tell me all about my . . . reputation.

Woman: Well, I knew you were a bit of a thief and a scoundrel ... from your reputation ... and I didn't expect ... such a impressive physical speciman.

Carman: So I like you for your tail, and you like me for my body. Sounds like we're both pretty shallow.

Woman: It wasn't just your body.

Carman: Well then, what is it? If I'm gonna give you an answer, I want an answer too.

Woman: I think you're just stalling so you can think of something.

Carman: And I think you're doing the same thing.

Woman: You're fun.

Carman: I'm fun? Just in bed?

Woman: No. We're having fun right now, aren't we?

Carman: I guess.I'm just fun? That's it?

Woman: Well, what do you think? That I want your babies?

Carman: I think you do. They'd be physical specimens like me.

Woman: And they might have my tail. Okay, it is your turn now.

Carman: I think you'd rather I did this.

Woman: (exasperated) Carman!)

(The rest of the recording is nothing but rustling sounds and an occasional feminine giggle.)

Tattered Clothing.name: 破烂衣物 Tattered Clothing
Tattered Clothing.description:
希涅米身上穿着的不过是她原本内衣的些许碎片。

Cynemi is wearing little more than scraps from her original underclothing.

Cynemi.publicNotes:
赏金猎人总是在四处奔波，无论是在城墙之内还是在荒野之中，追踪他们的逃犯猎物以将其捕获……或处理掉。赏金猎人常常既依赖隐秘或欺骗，也依赖武艺技能，他们运用种类繁多的才能来达成目标，更不用说收取随之而来的丰厚报酬了。

雇佣兵是一个广泛的类别，涵盖那些挥舞武器、施展法术，甚至运用狡诈与机敏的人；他们将自身与其专长租售给那些付得起黄金的人。

Bounty hunters are constantly on the move, whether within city walls or the wilderness, trailing their fugitive quarries for capture... or disposal. Often relying on stealth or deception as much as martial skill, bounty hunters employ a vast array of talents to accomplish their goals, not to mention to collect the hefty payout that follows.

A broad category that includes those wielding arms, spells, or even guile and cunning, mercenaries hire themselves and their expertise to those with the gold to pay for it.
Cynemi.privateNotes:
这是“Cynemi”角色的一个副本，随《憎恨魔窟》模组一同发布；她是一名使用涅菲利姆数据的赏金猎人。

我做的唯一改动是把她的物品栏移除到一个战利品角色上，并为她添加了破烂衣物和韵律骨。

This is a copy of the "Cynemi" actor, that shipped with the Abomination Vaults module, which was a Bounty Hunter with Nephilim stats.

The only changes I made was to remove her inventory to a loot actor, and to add her ragged clothing and rhythm bone.

Scent (Imprecise) 30 feet.name: 嗅觉（不精确）30尺 Scent (Imprecise) 30 feet

Support.name: 支援 Support
Support.description:
动物伙伴支援它的德鲁伊主人，每次破绽都撕裂肌腱。直到德鲁伊下个回合开始前，任何对动物伙伴所威胁的目标造成伤害的打击，都会使该目标的速度在1分钟内受到-5尺的状态减值（大成功或大失败时为-10）。使用支援时，动物伙伴在其回合中唯一还能使用的其他动作是用于就位的移动动作。如果动物伙伴在其回合中使用过任何其他动作，它就无法支援其主人。

The animal companion supports its druid master, tearing tendons with each opening. Until the start of the druid's next turn, any Strikes that damage targets that the animal companion threatens give the target a -5-foot status penalty to its Speeds for 1 minute (-10 on a critical success). While using Support, the only other actions an Animal Companion can use on its turn are movement actions to get into position. If an Animal Companion has used any other actions on its turn, it cannot Support its master.

Ghostly Spectators.name: 幽灵旁观者 Ghostly Spectators

Site Bound.name: 束缚之地 Site Bound
Site Bound.description:
幽魂暴民只能离其成员被杀之处或其所盘踞之地中等距离。典型限制为240尺。

A ghostly mob can stray only a moderate distance from where its members were killed or the place it haunts. A typical limit is 240 feet.

Rejuvenation.name: 复生 Rejuvenation
Rejuvenation.description:
只要让幽魂观众确信竞技场比赛已永远结束，它们就会得以安息。说服它们的一种方法是摧毁竞技场铜锣的悬挂装置，使其坠落到竞技场地面。

当一个幽魂暴民被摧毁时，它会在 [[/br 2d4 #Days]]{2d4天} 后重新形成，并完全痊愈。只有当有人查明其存在的原因，并纠正任何阻止该部队休息的因素时，幽魂暴民才能被永久摧毁。

The Ghostly Spectators will be put to rest if they are convinced that the Arena games are over for good. One way to convince them is to destroy the mounting for the arena gong so it falls to the Arena floor.

When a ghostly mob is destroyed, it re-forms after [[/br 2d4 #Days]]{2d4 days}, fully healed. A ghostly mob can be permanently destroyed only if someone determines the reason for its existence and sets right whatever prevents the troop from resting.

Clutching Hands.name: 攫握之手 Clutching Hands
Clutching Hands.description:
1 到 3

频率 每轮一次

效果 该部队攻击5尺内的敌人（@Check[type:reflex|dc:25|basic:true]），其伤害取决于动作数量。

1 @Damage[(1d6+3)[void]] 伤害

2 @Damage[(3d6+6)[void]] 伤害

3 @Damage[(4d6+9)[void]] 伤害

1 to 3

Frequency once per round

Effect The troop attacks enemies within 5 feet (@Check[type:reflex|dc:25|basic:true]), with damage depending on the number of actions.

1 @Damage[(1d6+3)[void]] damage

2 @Damage[(3d6+6)[void]] damage

3 @Damage[(4d6+9)[void]] damage

Frightful Chorus.name: 骇人合唱 Frightful Chorus
Frightful Chorus.description:
幽灵般的暴民痛苦地嚎叫，迫使@Template[type:emanation|distance:30]内的每个活着的生物尝试一次@Check[type:will|dc:25]意志豁免，否则变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}（大失败则为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}）。无论豁免结果如何，该生物随后在1分钟内暂时免疫该部队的惊惧合唱。

The ghostly mob howls in anguish, forcing each living creature in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] to attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:25] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3} on a critical failure). Regardless of the save result, the creature is then temporarily immune to the troop's Frightful Chorus for 1 minute.

Troop Movement.name: 部队移动 Troop Movement
Troop Movement.description:
每当幽灵暴民进行Stride时，它会先以自由动作（）进行Form Up，将自身压缩为一个20英尺×20英尺的区域（减去任何缺失的方格），然后再移动。这与超巨型生物的移动方式完全相同；例如，如果幽灵暴民的任何方格进入困难地形，额外的移动消耗会适用于整个群体。

Whenever the ghostly mob Strides, it first Forms Up as a free action to condense into a 20-foot-by-20-foot area (minus any missing squares), and then moves. This works just like a Gargantuan creature moving; for instance, if any of the ghostly mob's squares enter difficult terrain, the extra movement cost applies to the whole group.

Ghostly Spectators.publicNotes:
当一场骇人的悲剧导致大量死亡时，众多亡者不安的灵体可能会以幽灵般的暴民之姿出现。与其他幽灵（特征）一样，幽灵暴民往往并未意识到自己已经死亡。被困在暴民之中的灵体可能会试图延续他们昔日生活的某种表象，尽管他们的记忆支离破碎，形体也虚无缥缈。当被迫直面自身的真实状态时，这些灵体会在痛苦与暴力中猛烈反击。

When a horrific tragedy results in mass death, the restless spirits of the numerous dead might arise as a ghostly mob. Like other ghosts, ghostly mobs are often unaware they're dead. The spirits trapped within the mob may try to carry out a semblance of their former lives, even though their memories are fragmentary and their forms are insubstantial. When forced to confront their true state, the spirits lash out in pain and violence.
Ghostly Spectators.blurb:
幽灵冒险者暴民
Ghostly Adventurer Mob
Ghostly Spectators.prototypeToken: 幽魂般的旁观者 Ghostly Spectators

Green Hag.name: 绿鬼婆（特征） Green Hag

Occult Innate Spells.name: 诡术天生法术 Occult Innate Spells

Coven Spells.name: 女巫集会法术 Coven Spells

Control Weather.name: 控制天气 Control Weather
Control Weather.description:
你改变天气，使其变得平静并符合季节常态，或根据季节选择至多两种效果。

你无法精确控制具体的表现形式，例如龙卷风的确切路径或闪电打击的目标。

  • 秋季 寒冷天气、浓雾、温和炎热、雨夹雪
  • 春季 毛毛雨、炎热、飓风、雨夹雪、雷暴、龙卷风
  • 夏季 毛毛雨、暴雨、极端炎热、冰雹、炎热
  • 冬季 暴风雪、温和寒冷、极端寒冷、解冻

大成功或大失败：成功 你如愿改变天气，并且可以影响更大的区域（至多半径5英里的圆形），或更长的持续时间（额外任意数量的d12小时，最多16d12）。

成功 你如愿改变天气。

失败 你未能如愿改变天气。

大成功或大失败：失败 天气以意想不到的方式变化，由GM决定，但通常尽可能与你真正的愿望相反（例如，当你希望好天气时却出现可怕的风暴）。

升阶（9环） 你可以创造反季节天气与相互矛盾的天气效果，例如极端寒冷与飓风。你可以让天气变得平静并符合另一个季节的常态天气，或从任意季节的列表中选择天气效果。

You alter the weather, making it calm and normal for the season or choosing up to two effects based on the season.

You can't specifically control the manifestations, such as the exact path of a tornado or the targets of lightning strikes.

  • Autumn cold weather, fog, mild heat, sleet
  • Spring drizzle, heat, hurricane, sleet, thunderstorm, tornado
  • Summer drizzle, downpour, extreme heat, hail, heat
  • Winter blizzard, mild cold, extreme cold, thaw

Critical Success You change the weather as desired and can affect a larger area (up to a 5-mile-radius circle), or a longer duration (any number of additional d12 hours, up to 16d12).

Success You change the weather as desired.

Failure You fail to change the weather as desired.

Critical Failure The weather changes in an unanticipated way, determined by the GM but generally as contradictory to your true desires as possible (for instance, a terrible storm emerges when you would prefer good weather).

Heightened (9th) You can create unseasonable weather and contradictory weather effects, such as extreme cold and a hurricane. You can make the weather calm and normal weather for a different season or choose weather effects from any season's list.

Baleful Polymorph.name: 恶毒变形术 Baleful Polymorph
Baleful Polymorph.description:
你将目标生物变形为一种与该区域相符的无害动物，其效果取决于其强韧豁免结果。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标的身体获得该无害动物的些许特征。其内脏在部分变形时翻搅，使其成为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}。当其从恶心状态恢复时，其特征恢复正常。

失败 目标变形 1 分钟，但保留其心智。若其在自己的回合将所有动作都用于专注于其原本形态，则它可以尝试一次意志豁免以立即终止该效果。

大失败 目标在身体与心智上都变为所选的无害动物，持续时间为无限。

You transform the target creature into a harmless animal appropriate to the area, with effects based on its Fortitude save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target's body gains minor features of the harmless animal. Its insides churn as they partially transform, causing it to be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}. When it recovers from the Sickened condition, its features revert to normal.

Failure The target transforms for 1 minute but keeps its mind. If it spends all its actions on its turn concentrating on its original form, it can attempt a Will save to end the effect immediately.

Critical Failure The target is transformed into the chosen harmless animal, body and mind, for an unlimited duration.

Illusory Scene.name: 幻象场景 Illusory Scene
Illusory Scene.description:
你塑造一个想象中的场景，其中包含至多10个彼此独立的生物或物体，体型各异，且都必须位于该法术的区域内。这些要素会产生适当的声音与气味，并且接触起来也感觉真实。幻象场景中的要素无法说话。不同于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.f8SBoXiXQjlCKqly]{Illusory Creature}法术，你场景中的生物缺乏战斗能力与数据。你的场景不包含对其周围环境的改变，不过你可以将场景置于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.HBJPsonQnWcC3qdX]{Hallucinatory Terrain}法术所制造的幻象环境之中。

当你创造该场景时，你可以选择让它保持静止或遵循一个程序。虽然静止场景是固定不动的，但它包含基本的自然移动。例如，风吹动一张幻象纸片会使其沙沙作响。一个程序最长可以持续1分钟，并在结束后重复。例如，你可以创造两个兽人互相战斗的场景，而每次重复时战斗都会以相同方式进行。如果你创建一个循环，那么两名战士在场景开始与结束时都会回到相同的位置，但你可以将程序衔接得更平滑，使人难以分辨循环何时结束并重新开始。任何人若观察该场景超过几分钟，几乎总会注意到它在循环。你在创造该幻象后无法改变该程序。

任何接触图像任意部分的生物，或使用搜寻动作检查它的生物，都可以尝试不相信你的幻象。如果他们与幻象的某一部分互动，他们只会不相信那一部分。只有在大成功时，他们才会不相信整个场景。

升阶（6环） 你场景中的生物或物体可以说话。你在创建程序时必须为每个角色说出其特定台词。该法术会为每个角色伪装你的声音。

升阶（8环） 如同6环版本，且持续时间为无限。

You form an imaginary scene that includes up to 10 discrete creatures or objects of various sizes, all of which must be within the spell's area. These elements generate appropriate sounds and smells, and they feel right to the touch. Elements of an illusory scene are incapable of speech. Unlike with the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.f8SBoXiXQjlCKqly]{Illusory Creature} spell, creatures in your scene lack combat abilities and statistics. Your scene doesn't include changes to the environment around it, though you can place your scene within the illusory environment of a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.HBJPsonQnWcC3qdX]{Hallucinatory Terrain} spell.

When you create the scene, you can choose to have it be static or follow a program. Though a static scene is stationary, it includes basic natural movement. For example, wind blowing on an illusory piece of paper would rustle it. A program can be up to 1 minute long and repeats when finished. For instance, you could create a scene of two orcs fighting each other, and the fight would go the same way for each repetition. If you create a loop, the two fighters end up in the same place at the start of the scene and at the end of it, but you can smooth the program so it's hard to tell when the loop ends and begins. Anyone observing the scene for more than a few minutes almost always notices it looping. You're unable to alter the program after you create the illusion.

Any creature that touches any part of the image or uses the Seek action to examine it can attempt to disbelieve your illusion. If they interact with a portion of the illusion, they disbelieve only that portion. They disbelieve the entire scene only on a critical success.

Heightened (6th) Creatures or objects in your scene can speak. You must speak the specific lines for each actor when creating your program. The spell disguises your voice for each actor.

Heightened (8th) As the 6th-level version, and the duration is unlimited.

Prying Eye.name: 窥探之眼 Prying Eye
Prying Eye.description:
你在一个你能看见、距你500英尺内的位置创造一只@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}的漂浮眼球，直径1英寸。它以你的正常视觉感官向所有方向观察，并持续将其所见传递给你。每轮你第一次维持该法术时，你可以选择将眼球移动至多30英尺（只能看见眼球前方的事物），或将其移动至多10英尺（能看见其周围所有方向的一切）。眼球能离你移动多远没有限制，但如果你与眼球在任何时候不再处于同一存在位面，该法术会立刻结束。若你想用它进行察觉检定，你可以通过该眼球尝试搜寻动作。对眼球造成的任何伤害都会摧毁它并结束该法术。

You create an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}, floating eye, 1 inch in diameter, at a location you can see within 500 feet. It sees in all directions with your normal visual senses and continuously transmits what it sees to you. The first time you Sustain the Spell each round, you can either move the eye up to 30 feet, seeing only things in front of the eye, or move it up to 10 feet, seeing everything in all directions around it. There is no limit to how far from you the eye can move, but the spell ends immediately if you and the eye ever cease to be on the same plane of existence. You can attempt Seek actions through the eye if you want to attempt Perception checks with it. Any damage dealt to the eye destroys it and ends the spell.

Tongues (Constant).name: 巧言术（持续） Tongues (Constant)
Tongues (Constant).description:
目标可以理解所有词语，无论语言如何，并且也能说其他生物的语言。当处于由不同生物组成的混合群体中时，每次目标说话时，它都可以选择一个生物，并用该生物能理解的语言说话，即使目标并不知道那是什么语言。

升阶（7环） 持续时间为8小时。

The target can understand all words regardless of language and also speak the languages of other creatures. When in a mixed group of creatures, each time the target speaks, it can choose a creature and speak in a language that creature understands, even if the target doesn't know what language that is.

Heightened (7th) The duration is 8 hours.

Clairvoyance.name: 鹰眼术 Clairvoyance
Clairvoyance.description:
你在射程内的一处位置创造一只@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}的漂浮眼（即使它在你的视觉线或效果线之外）。该眼睛无法移动，但你可以如同使用你正常的视觉感官一般，从该点向所有方向视物。

You create an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} floating eye at a location within range (even if it's outside your line of sight or line of effect). The eye can't move, but you can see in all directions from that point as if using your normal visual senses.

Outcast's Curse.name: 流放诅咒 Outcast's Curse
Outcast's Curse.description:
你用一道诅咒折磨目标，使其存在感令人不适且惹人反感。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 在10分钟内，目标每当尝试欺骗、交涉、威吓或表演检定时，必须掷骰两次并使用较差的结果；并且他们在遭遇到的生物对其的初始态度会差一级（例如，用@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.I1ffBVISxLr2gC4u]{不友好}代替@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fuG8dgthlDWfWjIA]{不关心}）。

失败 同成功，但效果为永久。

大失败 同失败，且目标在遭遇到的生物对其的初始态度会差两级。

You afflict the target with a curse that makes its presence abrasive and off-putting. The target must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success For 10 minutes, the target must roll twice and use the worse result whenever attempting a Deception, Diplomacy, Intimidation, or Performance check, and creatures they encounter have an initial attitude toward them of one step worse (for instance, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.I1ffBVISxLr2gC4u]{Unfriendly} instead of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fuG8dgthlDWfWjIA]{Indifferent}).

Failure As success, but the effect is permanent.

Critical Failure As failure, and creatures that the target encounters have an initial attitude toward them of two steps worse.

Talking Corpse.name: 会说话的尸体 Talking Corpse
Talking Corpse.description:
你赋予目标尸体一种生命的表象，使其用来回答你向其提出的三个问题。该法术调用的是肉体的潜在记忆，而非召回死者的灵魂，因此尸体必须基本完整该法术才能生效。尸体受到的伤害越多，其回答就越不准确或越支离破碎，并且它必须有喉咙与嘴巴才能开口说话。若在过去一周内有人曾对该尸体施放过此法术，则该法术自动失败。尸体可以使用其死亡时代的原生物数据尝试进行一次意志豁免，以抵抗回答这些问题，产生以下效果。

大成功或大失败 成功 目标可以说谎或拒绝回答你的问题，并且目标的灵魂会纠缠你24小时，骚扰你并导致你在这段时间内无法获得任何休息。

成功 目标可以提供虚假信息或拒绝回答你的问题。

失败 目标必须如实作答，但其回答可以简短、晦涩且重复。它仍可以误导你，或试图拖延，使得法术的持续时间在你问完所有问题之前耗尽。

大成功或大失败 失败 同失败，但目标的回答更直接且较少重复，但仍然晦涩。它在进行欺瞒检定以欺骗或误导你时承受-2状态减值。

You grant the target corpse a semblance of life, which it uses to speak the answers to three questions posed to it. This spell calls on the physical body's latent memories rather than summoning back the deceased's spirit, so the corpse must be mostly intact for the spell to function. The more damage the corpse has taken, the more inaccurate or patchwork its answers are, and it must have a throat and mouth to speak at all. If anyone has previously cast this spell on the corpse in the last week, the spell automatically fails. The corpse can attempt a Will save to resist answering the questions using the statistics of the original creature at its time of death, with the following effects.

Critical Success The target can lie or refuse to answer your questions, and the target's spirit haunts you for 24 hours, bothering you and causing you to be unable to gain any rest for that time.

Success The target can provide false information or refuse to answer your questions.

Failure The target must answer truthfully, but its answers can be brief, cryptic, and repetitive. It can still mislead you or attempt to stall so that the spell's duration runs out before you can ask all your questions.

Critical Failure As failure, but the target's answers are more direct and less repetitive, though still cryptic. It takes a -2 status penalty to Deception checks to deceive or mislead you.

Clairaudience.name: 锐耳术 Clairaudience
Clairaudience.description:
你在射程内的一个位置创造一只@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}的漂浮耳朵（即使该位置在你的视觉线或效果线之外）。它无法移动，但你可以通过这只耳朵听见，就如同使用你正常的听觉感官一样。

You create an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} floating ear at a location within range (even if it's outside your line of sight or line of effect). It can't move, but you can hear through the ear as if using your normal auditory senses.

Dream Message.name: 梦境传讯术 Dream Message
Dream Message.description:
你将一段传讯术送入你的目标的梦境。该传讯术是单向的，最多可包含 1 分钟的讲话（约 150 个单词）。如果目标正在睡觉，他们会立即收到传讯术。否则，他们会在下次入睡时收到。一旦他们收到，法术就会结束，并且你知道传讯术已被送出。

升阶（4环）你可以以最多 10 个你知道名字且曾亲自见过的生物为目标。你必须向他们所有人发送相同的传讯术；法术会针对每个生物分别结束。

You send a message to your target's dream. The message is one-way, up to 1 minute of speech (roughly 150 words). If the target is asleep, they receive the message instantly. If not, they receive it the next time they sleep. As soon as they receive it, the spell ends, and you know the message was sent.

Heightened (4th) You can target up to 10 creatures you know by name and have met in person. You must send the same message to all of them; the spell ends for each creature individually.

Wall of Thorns.name: 棘墙术 Wall of Thorns
Wall of Thorns.description:
在一分钟的过程中，你使一堵厚实的带刺荆棘墙从地面生长出来。你创造一堵5英尺厚的荆棘与尖刺之墙，呈直线，最长60英尺、最高10英尺。你必须在一段不中断的开放空间内创造这堵墙，使其边缘不会穿过任何生物或物体，否则该法术失效。墙垂直矗立。若你愿意，墙可以缩短长度或降低高度。墙两侧的一切都会获得来自对侧生物的掩蔽，并且墙的空间为困难地形。每当一个生物使用一次移动动作进入至少一个墙的空间时，该生物受到3d4穿刺伤害。

墙每个10英尺×10英尺的区段具有AC 10、硬度10，以及20生命值。它免疫大成功或大失败命中与精准伤害。被摧毁的区段可以被自由穿过。

强化（+1） 墙每个区段的生命值增加5，并且穿刺伤害增加1d4。

Over the course of a minute, you cause a thick wall of thorny brambles to grow from the ground. You create a 5-foot-thick wall of brambles and thorns in a straight line up to 60 feet long and 10 feet high. You must create the wall in an unbroken open space so its edges don't pass through any creatures or objects, or the spell is lost. The wall stands vertically. If you wish, the wall can be of a shorter length or height. Everything on each side of the wall has cover from creatures on the opposite side, and the wall's spaces are difficult terrain. For every move action a creature uses to enter at least one of the wall's spaces, that creature takes 3d4 piercing damage.

Each 10-foot-by-10-foot section of the wall has AC 10, Hardness 10, and 20 Hit Points. It's immune to critical hits and precision damage. A destroyed section can be moved through freely.

Heightened (+1) The Hit Points of each section of the wall increase by 5, and the piercing damage increases by 1d4.

Augury.name: 卜筮术 Augury
Augury.description:
你获得对未来的模糊一瞥。在施放此法术期间，询问某个特定行动方案的结果。该法术可以预测最长达未来30分钟的结果，并揭示GM在以下结局中所作的最佳猜测：

  • 吉 结果会很好。
  • 凶 结果会很糟。
  • 吉与凶 结果会好坏参半。
  • 无 不会出现特别好或特别坏的结果。

GM暗中进行一次@Check[type:flat|dc:6|traits:secret]。在一次失败时，结果总是“无”。这使得无法判断“无”的结果是否准确。如果在额外一次施放卜筮术时，有人询问与第一次施放时相同的主题，GM使用第一次施放时的暗掷结果。不过，如果情况发生变化，则有可能得到不同的结果。

You gain a vague glimpse of the future. During the casting of this spell, ask about the results of a particular course of action. The spell can predict results up to 30 minutes into the future and reveals the GM's best guess among the following outcomes:

  • Weal The results will be good.
  • Woe The results will be bad.
  • Weal and Woe The results will be a mix of good and bad.
  • Nothing There won't be particularly good or bad results.

The GM rolls a secret @Check[type:flat|dc:6|traits:secret]. On a failure, the result is always "nothing." This makes it impossible to tell whether a "nothing" result is accurate. If anyone asks about the same topic as the first casting of augury during an additional casting, the GM uses the secret roll result from the first casting. If circumstances change, though, it's possible to get a different result.

Entangle.name: 纠缠 Entangle
Entangle.description:
区域 20英尺爆发内所有包含植物或真菌的方格

区域内的植物与真菌会缠绕生物。该区域视为困难地形。每轮当一个生物在该区域内开始其回合时，它必须尝试一次反射豁免。失败时，它的速度在离开该区域前承受-10英尺的环境减值；大失败时，它还会在1轮内陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}。生物可以以缠绕的DC尝试逃脱以移除这些效果。

Area all squares in a 20-foot burst that contain plants or fungi

Plants and fungi in the area entangle creatures. The area counts as difficult terrain. Each round that a creature starts its turn in the area, it must attempt a Reflex save. On a failure, it takes a -10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds until it leaves the area, and on a critical failure, it is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} for 1 round. Creatures can attempt to Escape at entangle's DC to remove these effects.

Invisibility (At Will).name: 隐形术（意志） Invisibility (At Will)
Invisibility (At Will).description:
笼罩在幻象之中，目标变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}。这会使其对所有生物而言处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected} 状态，不过这些生物可以尝试寻找目标，使其改为对它们而言处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} 状态。若目标使用敌对动作，则该法术在该敌对动作完成后结束。

升阶（4环） 该法术持续1分钟，但若目标使用敌对动作也不会结束。

Cloaked in illusion, the target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}. This makes it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected} to all creatures, though the creatures can attempt to find the target, making it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} to them instead. If the target uses a hostile action, the spell ends after that hostile action is completed.

Heightened (4th) The spell lasts 1 minute, but it doesn't end if the target uses a hostile action.

Tree Shape (At Will).name: 树形术（随意） Tree Shape (At Will)
Tree Shape (At Will).description:
你变形为一棵大型树。察觉检定无法揭示你的真实本性，但以你的法术DC为目标进行一次成功的自然或生存检定会揭示你看起来像是一棵对该区域而言异常新出现的树。在树形态下，你可以观察周围的一切，但你无法采取除结束该法术及你的回合之外的任何行动；你可以通过使用一个带有专注（特征）的单动作来结束法术。作为一棵树，你的AC为20，且只有状态加值、状态减值、环境加值和环境减值会影响你。你在反射豁免上掷出的任何成功与大成功都视为失败。

You transform into a Large tree. Perception checks don't reveal your true nature, but a successful Nature or Survival check against your spell DC reveals that you appear to be a tree that is strangely new to the area. While in tree form, you can observe everything around you, but you can't act other than to end the spell, and your turn, by using a single action, which has the concentrate trait. As a tree, your AC is 20, and only status bonuses, status penalties, circumstance bonuses, and circumstance penalties affect you. Any successes and critical successes you roll on Reflex saves are failures.

Water Breathing (Constant).name: 水下呼吸（恒定） Water Breathing (Constant)
Water Breathing (Constant).description:
目标可以在水下呼吸。

强化（3环） 持续时间增加至8小时。

强化（4环） 持续时间增加至直到你下一次每日准备。

The targets can breathe underwater.

Heightened (3rd) The duration increases to 8 hours.

Heightened (4th) The duration increases to until your next daily preparations.

Acid Splash.name: 酸液飞溅 Acid Splash
Acid Splash.description:
你泼洒出一团酸液，飞溅到你的目标以及附近的生物身上。进行一次法术攻击。若你命中，你造成1d6点酸性伤害外加[[/r (1[splash])[acid]]]。若为大成功，目标还会受到@Damage[1[persistent,acid]]伤害。

增幅（3环） 初始伤害提升至1d6 + 你的施法关键属性调整值，且@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.lDVqvLKA6eF3Df60]{持续伤害}提升至@Damage[2[persistent,acid]]。

增幅（5环） 初始伤害提升至2d6 + 你的施法关键属性调整值，持续伤害提升至@Damage[3[persistent,acid]]，且飞溅伤害提升至[[/r (2[splash])[acid]]]。

增幅（7环） 初始伤害提升至3d6 + 你的施法关键属性调整值，持续伤害提升至@Damage[4[persistent,acid]]，且飞溅伤害提升至[[/r (3[splash])[acid]]]。

增幅（9环） 初始伤害提升至4d6 + 你的施法关键属性调整值，持续伤害提升至@Damage[5[persistent,acid]]，且飞溅伤害提升至[[/r (4[splash])[acid]]]。

You splash a glob of acid that splatters your target and nearby creatures. Make a spell attack. If you hit, you deal 1d6 acid damage plus [[/r (1[splash])[acid]]]. On a critical success, the target also takes @Damage[1[persistent,acid]] damage.

Heightened (3rd) The initial damage increases to 1d6 + your spellcasting ability modifier, and the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.lDVqvLKA6eF3Df60]{Persistent Damage} increases to @Damage[2[persistent,acid]].

Heightened (5th) The initial damage increases to 2d6 + your spellcasting ability modifier, the Persistent Damage increases to @Damage[3[persistent,acid]], and the splash damage increases to [[/r (2[splash])[acid]]].

Heightened (7th) The initial damage increases to 3d6 + your spellcasting ability modifier, the Persistent Damage increases to @Damage[4[persistent,acid]], and the splash damage increases to [[/r (3[splash])[acid]]].

Heightened (9th) The initial damage increases to 4d6 + your spellcasting ability modifier, the Persistent Damage increases to @Damage[5[persistent,acid]], and the splash damage increases to [[/r (4[splash])[acid]]].

Charm.name: 魅惑术 Charm
Charm.description:
对目标而言，你的话语如蜜般甜美，你的容貌仿佛笼罩在梦幻般的薄雾之中。它必须尝试一次意志豁免；若你或你的盟友近期曾威胁它或对其使用敌对动作，则该豁免获得+4环境加值。

你可以解消该法术。若你对目标使用敌对动作，该法术结束。当法术结束时，目标不一定会意识到自己曾被魅惑术影响，除非它对你的友谊或你说服它采取的动作与它的预期相冲突；这意味着你有可能通过世俗手段说服目标继续成为你的朋友。

大成功或大失败 成功 目标不受影响，且知道你曾试图魅惑它。

成功 目标不受影响，但会认为你的法术是某种无害效果而非魅惑术，除非它辨识出该法术。

失败 目标对你的态度变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{友善}。若它原本为友善，则变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{乐于助人}。它不能对你使用敌对动作。

大成功或大失败 失败 目标对你的态度变为乐于助人，且它不能对你使用敌对动作。

升阶（4环） 持续时间持续至你下一次进行每日准备。

升阶（8环） 持续时间持续至你下一次进行每日准备，且你最多可以以10个生物为目标。

To the target, your words are honey and your visage seems bathed in a dreamy haze. It must attempt a Will save, with a +4 circumstance bonus if you or your allies recently threatened it or used hostile actions against it.

You can Dismiss the spell. If you use hostile actions against the target, the spell ends. When the spell ends, the target doesn't necessarily realize it was charmed unless its friendship with you or the actions you convinced it to take clash with its expectations, meaning you could potentially convince the target to continue being your friend via mundane means.

Critical Success The target is unaffected and aware you tried to charm it.

Success The target is unaffected but thinks your spell was something harmless instead of charm, unless it identifies the spell.

Failure The target's attitude becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{Friendly} toward you. If it was Friendly, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{Helpful}. It can't use hostile actions against you.

Critical Failure The target's attitude becomes Helpful toward you, and it can't use hostile actions against you.

Heightened (4th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations.

Heightened (8th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Dancing Lights.name: 舞光术 Dancing Lights
Dancing Lights.description:
你创造至多四个漂浮的光亮术，彼此之间任意两个相距不超过10尺。每个都像火把一样发出光亮。当你维持该法术时，你可以将任意数量的光亮术移动至多60尺。每个光亮术必须保持在你120尺以内，并且与所有其他光亮术相距不超过10尺，否则它会熄灭。

You create up to four floating lights, no two of which are more than 10 feet apart. Each sheds light like a torch. When you Sustain the Spell, you can move any number of lights up to 60 feet. Each light must remain within 120 feet of you and within 10 feet of all others, or it winks out.

Ghost Sound.name: 幻音术 Ghost Sound
Ghost Sound.description:
你创造一个简单声音的听觉幻象，其最大音量相当于四名正常人同时喊叫。声音从你在射程内指定的一个方格中发出。你无法创造可理解的词语或其他复杂声音（例如音乐）。

强化（3环） 射程增加至60尺。

强化（5环） 射程增加至120尺。

You create an auditory illusion of simple sounds that has a maximum volume equal to four normal humans shouting. The sounds emanate from a square you designate within range. You can't create intelligible words or other intricate sounds (such as music).

Heightened (3rd) The range increases to 60 feet.

Heightened (5th) The range increases to 120 feet.

Illusory Disguise.name: 幻象伪装 Illusory Disguise
Illusory Disguise.description:
你创造一个幻象，使你看起来像另一个与你体型相同、且身高（相差不超过6英寸）与体重（相差不超过50磅）大致相近的生物。该伪装通常足以隐藏你的身份，但不足以冒充某个特定个体。该法术不会改变你的声音、气味或举止。你可以改变你的衣物与穿戴物品的外观，例如让你的护甲看起来像一件连衣裙。手持物品不受影响，而你移除的任何穿戴物品都会恢复其真实外观。

施放幻象伪装视为为使用欺瞒进行的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.action-macros.Macro.k5nW4jGyXD0Oq9LR]{冒充}设置伪装；它无视你因将自己伪装成不相似生物而可能承受的任何环境罚值；它使你在防止他人看穿你伪装的欺瞒检定上获得+4状态加值，并且即使你未受训也要加入你的等级。你可以解消该法术。

升阶（2环）该法术也会伪装你的声音与气味，并获得听觉与嗅觉（特征）特征。

升阶（3环）你可以看起来像任何与你体型相同的生物，甚至是某个特定个体。你必须见过该个体才能呈现其外观。该法术也会伪装你的声音与气味，并获得听觉与嗅觉（特征）特征。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3Ktyd5F9lOPo4myk]{法术效果：幻象伪装}

You create an illusion that causes you to appear as another creature of the same body shape, and with roughly similar height (within 6 inches) and weight (within 50 pounds), as yourself. The disguise is typically good enough to hide your identity, but not to impersonate a specific individual. The spell doesn't change your voice, scent, or mannerisms. You can change the appearance of your clothing and worn items, such as making your armor look like a dress. Held items are unaffected, and any worn item you remove returns to its true appearance.

Casting illusory disguise counts as setting up a disguise for the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.action-macros.Macro.k5nW4jGyXD0Oq9LR]{Impersonate} use of Deception; it ignores any circumstance penalties you might take for disguising yourself as a dissimilar creature, it gives you a +4 status bonus to Deception checks to prevent others from seeing through your disguise, and you add your level even if you're untrained. You can Dismiss this spell.

Heightened (2nd) The spell also disguises your voice and scent, and it gains the auditory and olfactory traits.

Heightened (3rd) You can appear as any creature of the same size, even a specific individual. You must have seen an individual to take on their appearance. The spell also disguises your voice and scent, and it gains the auditory and olfactory traits.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3Ktyd5F9lOPo4myk]{Spell Effect: Illusory Disguise}

Message.name: 传讯术 Message
Message.description:
你轻声地动着嘴唇，但这些话语不会从你口中发出，而是直接传到目标的耳中。其他人听不见你的话语，和你平时只动嘴不出声时并无区别；但目标能听见你的话，就仿佛他们正站在你身旁。

目标可以以反应动作（）给出简短回应；或若他们愿意，也可以在其下一回合以自由动作（）回应，但他们必须能够看见你且处于射程内才能这么做。若他们回应，其回应也会像原本的传讯术一样，直接传到你的耳中。

强化（3环） 该法术的射程增加至500英尺。

You mouth words quietly, but instead of coming out of your mouth, they're transferred directly to the ears of the target. While others can't hear your words any better than if you normally mouthed them, the target can hear your words as if they were standing next to you.

The target can give a brief response as a reaction, or as a free action on their next turn if they wish, but they must be able to see you and be within range to do so. If they respond, their response is delivered directly to your ear, just like the original message.

Heightened (3rd) The spell's range increases to 500 feet.

Pass Without Trace (Constant).name: 无踪步 (恒常) Pass Without Trace (Constant)
Pass Without Trace (Constant).description:
你会遮蔽自己留下的足迹，并使他人更难找到你。对你进行追踪的检定DC获得+4状态加值，或等同于你的法术DC，以使DC更高者为准。你同一时间只能从一个不留痕迹法术中获益。

升阶（2环） 持续时间增加至8小时。

升阶（4环） 持续时间增加至8小时。该法术的射程为20尺，区域为20尺发散，影响该区域内你所选择的至多10个生物。

You obscure the tracks you leave behind and make it harder for others to find you. The DC of checks to Track you gains a +4 status bonus or is equal to your spell DC, whichever results in a higher DC. You can benefit from only one pass without trace spell at a time.

Heightened (2nd) The duration increases to 8 hours.

Heightened (4th) The duration increases to 8 hours. The spell has a range of 20 feet and an area of a 20-foot-emanation, affecting up to 10 creatures of your choice within that area.

Coven.name: 女巫集会 Coven
Coven.description:
绿鬼婆会将@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.J6vNvrUT3b1hx2iA]{纠缠植物}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.KSAEhNfZyXMO7Z7V]{流放诅咒}以及@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.KsWhliKfUs3IpW3c]{棘墙术}加入她的巢会法术列表。

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Coven]

A green hag adds @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.J6vNvrUT3b1hx2iA]{Entangling Flora}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.KSAEhNfZyXMO7Z7V]{Outcast's Curse}, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.KsWhliKfUs3IpW3c]{Wall of Thorns} to her coven's spells.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Coven]

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 对所有针对魔法的豁免获得 +1 状态加值 +1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic

Sound Imitation.name: 拟声 Sound Imitation
Sound Imitation.description:
一名绿鬼婆在成功通过一次用于说谎的欺骗检定后，可以模仿其巢穴附近出现的任何动物的声音。她在此检定上获得+4环境加值。

A green hag who succeeds at a Deception check to Lie can mimic the sounds of any animal found near her lair. She has a +4 circumstance bonus to this check.

Betraying Touch.name: 背叛之接触 Betraying Touch
Betraying Touch.description:
绿鬼婆接触一个没有意识到鬼婆是敌人的生物。被背叛的生物受到鬼婆的衰弱体液影响，并在对抗该效果的豁免检定上承受-4环境减值。

The green hag touches a creature that doesn't realize the hag is an enemy. The betrayed creature is affected by the hag's enfeebling humors and takes a -4 circumstance penalty to their saving throw against that effect.

Change Shape.name: 变形 Change Shape
Change Shape.description:
绿鬼婆可以呈现为任何中型类人生物女性的外貌。这不会改变她的速度或她的打击的攻击和伤害加值，但可能会改变她的打击造成的伤害类型（通常为钝击）。

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

The green hag can take on the appearance of any Medium humanoid woman. This doesn't change her Speed or her attack and damage bonuses with her Strikes, but might change the damage type her Strikes deal (typically to bludgeoning).

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

Enfeebling Humors.name: 弱化体液 Enfeebling Humors
Enfeebling Humors.description:
被鬼婆（特征）的爪击伤害的生物必须成功通过一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:20] 豁免，否则将获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1}，持续1天。若大失败，或如果它再次被命中并第二次豁免失败，则它将获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2}，持续1天。

A creature damaged by a hag's claw must succeed at a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:20] save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} for 1 day. On a critical failure, or if it gets hit again and fails its save a second time, it's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} for 1 day.

Exhale Miasma.name: 呼出瘴气 Exhale Miasma
Exhale Miasma.description:
绿鬼婆呼出一团绿色瘴气。每个处于@Template[type:cone|distance:15]内的活体生物都会受到她的虚弱体液影响（如常尝试一次豁免）。

她在[[/br 1d4 #Recharge Exhale Miasma]]{1d4轮}内无法再次使用“呼出瘴气”。

The green hag exhales a miasma of green vapors. Each living creature in a @Template[type:cone|distance:15] is affected by her enfeebling humors (attemping a save as normal).

She can't use Exhale Miasma again for [[/br 1d4 #Recharge Exhale Miasma]]{1d4 rounds}.

Green Hag.publicNotes:
绿鬼婆憎恨美丽与纯洁，因此她们使用伪装与背叛来引诱并谋杀无辜者，腐化心地纯良之人，并摧毁受害者的心智与道德。绿鬼婆会构思富有想象力的阴谋，彻底毁掉任何冒犯她们的人，以及那些仅因其善良或正直的存在就冒犯了鬼婆扭曲感性之人。绿鬼婆所炮制的复杂丑闻，往往涉及冒名顶替、认错身份、对挚爱之人的勾引与背叛，或以上种种的组合。

作为潜伏在文明边缘的恶毒老妪，鬼婆利用其欺瞒性的魔法能力来掠食类人生物，操纵并腐化他们。有人说鬼婆源自精类，只是后来被其内在的自私扭曲。鬼婆会以集会结社以获得更强力量，制作被称为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.ACa9QlFqdmW4s2Th]{鬼婆之眼}的独特魔法物品，并且以自己的后代替换类人生物婴儿而闻名——这些孩子是@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.bAjHCeyNcPRqOmLv]{换生灵}，并具有成长为鬼婆的潜能。

Green hags hate beauty and purity, so they use disguises and treachery to lure and murder innocents, corrupt the pure of heart, and shatter the minds and morals of their victims. Green hags create imaginative schemes to utterly ruin anyone who crosses them, as well as good or righteous folk whose very existence insults the hag's twisted sensibilities. The complicated scandals perpetuated by green hags involve impersonation, mistaken identity, the seduction and betrayal of loved ones, or all these things in combination.

Malevolent crones who lurk at the edges of civilization, hags use their deceptive, magical abilities to prey upon humanoids, manipulating and corrupting them. Some say hags arose from fey that became twisted by their inner selfishness. Hags gather together in covens for greater power, craft unique magical items known as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.ACa9QlFqdmW4s2Th]{Hag Eyes}, and are known to replace infant humanoids with their own offspring-these children are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.bAjHCeyNcPRqOmLv]{Changelings} who have the potential to become hags themselves.
Green Hag.allSaves: +1 status to all saves vs. magic

Idriniliss.name: 伊德里尼利斯 Idriniliss

Specific Deity Lore.name: 特定神祇传说 Specific Deity Lore

Divine Prepared Spells.name: 神圣预备法术 Divine Prepared Spells

Divine Spontaneous Spells.name: 神圣自发法术 Divine Spontaneous Spells

Guidance.name: 指引 Guidance
Guidance.description:
你祈求神圣指引，使目标在持续时间结束前进行的一次攻击掷骰、察觉检定、豁免检定或技能检定中获得+1状态加值。目标必须在掷骰前选择将该加值用于哪一次掷骰。若目标使用了该加值，则该法术结束。不论是否使用该加值，目标随后获得1小时的临时免疫。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3qHKBDF7lrHw8jFK]{法术效果：指引术}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3LyOkV25p7wA181H]{效果：指引术免疫}

You ask for divine guidance, granting the target a +1 status bonus to one attack roll, Perception check, saving throw, or skill check the target attempts before the duration ends. The target chooses which roll to use the bonus on before rolling. If the target uses the bonus, the spell ends. Either way, the target is then temporarily immune for 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3qHKBDF7lrHw8jFK]{Spell Effect: Guidance}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3LyOkV25p7wA181H]{Effect: Guidance Immunity}

Wash Your Luck.name: 洗去你的厄运 Wash Your Luck
Wash Your Luck.description:
一些施法者认为该法术会从字面意义上将你的命运从一切影响中洗净，无论是恶意还是善意；另一些人则主张它只是清除你对好运与命运的执念。你整理衣物、调整椅子的坐姿、摆弄宗教圣徽，或进行其他无害且对你个人意义重大的动作，以洗去厄运。

在该法术的持续时间内一次，在为一次检定进行掷骰之前，你可以在该次掷骰上抵消一个厄运效果，如同在同一次掷骰上同时适用一个幸运效果与一个厄运效果时的正常规则。抵消该厄运效果后，该法术结束，并且你在接下来的10分钟内暂时免疫于洗运。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.npFFTAxN44WWrGnM]{法术效果：洗运}

Some practitioners argue this spell literally washes your fortunes of all influences, malign or benign, while others claim it simply cleanses your mind of obsessions about luck and destiny. You adjust your garments, change the posture of your chair, fidget with a religious symbol, or make some other innocuous and personally significant action to wash away bad luck.

Once during the spell's duration, before rolling a check, you can cancel out a misfortune effect on that roll, as normal when a fortune and misfortune effect apply to the same roll. After canceling out the misfortune effect, the spell ends, and you are then temporarily immune to wash your luck for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.npFFTAxN44WWrGnM]{Spell Effect: Wash Your Luck}

Chill Touch.name: 恐吓之触 Chill Touch
Chill Touch.description:
将负能量虹吸入自身，你的手散发出苍白的黑暗。你的接触会削弱活物并扰乱亡灵，甚至可能使其逃离。该效果取决于目标是活物还是亡灵。

  • 活的生物该法术造成等于1d4加上你的施法调整值的负能量伤害。目标尝试一次基础强韧豁免，但若出现大失败，还会在1轮内陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1}。
  • 亡灵生物若强韧豁免失败，目标在1轮内陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}。若出现大失败，目标还会在1轮内陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing}，除非其通过一次意志豁免。

升阶（+1）对活的生物造成的负能量伤害提高1d4。

Siphoning negative energy into yourself, your hand radiates a pale darkness. Your touch weakens the living and disorients undead, possibly even causing them to flee. The effect depends on whether the target is living or undead.

  • Living Creature The spell deals negative damage equal to 1d4 plus your spellcasting modifier. The target attempts a basic Fortitude save, but is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} for 1 round on a critical failure.
  • Undead Creature The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} for 1 round on a failed Fortitude save. On a critical failure, the target is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} for 1 round unless it succeeds at a Will save.

Heightened (+1) The negative damage to living creatures increases by 1d4.

Lock.name: 锁定 Lock
Lock.description:
目标的闩锁机构咔哒一声扣上，在看不见的魔法束缚下牢牢固定。当你以魔法锁住一个目标时，你设定一个用于开启它的运动与盗窃DC，数值等于你的法术DC，或基础锁DC获得+4状态加值后的数值，取较高者。任何曾经能打开受此法术影响之锁的钥匙或密码组合，在法术的持续时间内都无法再打开它，不过该钥匙或密码组合会使开启门的检定获得+4环境加值。

若目标被打开，则法术结束。假设目标未以其他方式上闩或上锁，你可以用一个在其中接触目标的交互动作将其解锁并打开。这不会结束法术。你可以在任何时间、从任何距离解消此法术。

升阶（2环） 持续时间增加至无限，但你必须额外消耗价值6 gp的金粉作为额外成本。

The target's latch mechanism clinks shut, held fast by unseen magical restraints. When you magically lock a target, you set an Athletics and Thievery DC to open it equal to your spell DC or the base lock DC with a +4 status bonus, whichever is higher. Any key or combination that once opened a lock affected by this spell does not do so for the duration of the spell, though the key or combination does grant a +4 circumstance bonus to checks to open the door.

If the target is opened, the spell ends. Assuming the target is not barred or locked in some additional way, you can unlock and open it with an Interact action during which you touch the target. This does not end the spell. You can Dismiss this spell at any time and from any distance.

Heightened (2nd) The duration increases to unlimited, but you must expend 6 gp worth of gold dust as an additional cost.

Thoughtful Gift.name: 体贴的赋礼 Thoughtful Gift
Thoughtful Gift.description:
你将手中一件光亮或可忽略负载的物体传送至目标处。若目标有一只空手，该物体会立刻出现在目标手中；若没有，则出现在其脚边。目标知晓你正试图送给他们何种物体。若目标处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{无意识} 状态或拒绝接受你的赋礼，或该法术会传送一个生物（即使该生物在一个异次元容器内），则该法术失败。

增幅（3环） 该法术的射程提升至500尺。

增幅（5环） 如3环增幅，且物体的最大负载提升至1。你可以以3个动作而非1个动作来 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.aBQ8ajvEBByv45yz]{施放法术}；如此做会将射程提升至1英里，并且你不需要对目标具备视觉线，但你必须对目标极为熟悉。

You teleport one object of light or negligible Bulk held in your hand to the target. The object appears instantly in the target's hand, if they have a free hand, or at their feet if they don't. The target knows what object you are attempting to send them. If the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} or refuses to accept your gift, or if the spell would teleport a creature (even if the creature is inside an extradimensional container), the spell fails.

Heightened (3rd) The spell's range increases to 500 feet.

Heightened (5th) As 3rd level, and the object's maximum Bulk increases to 1. You can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.aBQ8ajvEBByv45yz]{Cast the Spell} with 3 actions instead of 1; doing so increases the range to 1 mile and you don't need line of sight to the target, but you must be extremely familiar with the target.

Fear.name: 恐惧术 Fear
Fear.description:
你向目标植入恐惧术；它必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}。

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}。

大失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing}，持续 1 轮。

升阶（3环） 你可以以最多五个生物为目标。

You plant fear in the target; it must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} for 1 round.

Heightened (3rd) You can target up to five creatures.

Imp Sting.name: 小魔鬼蜇刺 Imp Sting
Imp Sting.description:
你重现小魔鬼邪恶、剧毒的蜇刺，刺向一名敌人，并可能以恶魔的麻痹毒液影响他们。你对被触碰的生物造成 @Damage[1d4[piercing]] 伤害，并使该生物感染小魔鬼毒液。若目标受到穿刺伤害，他们还会受到 @Damage[1d6[spirit]] 伤害，并必须尝试一次强韧豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标受到 @Damage[1d6[poison]] 伤害。

失败 目标感染小魔鬼毒液，处于第1阶段。

大失败 目标感染小魔鬼毒液，处于第2阶段。

小魔鬼毒液（毒素）等级 3

最大持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]] 伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}

阶段 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]] 伤害、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}，以及 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}（1 轮）。

You reproduce an imp's evil, poisonous sting, stabbing at an enemy and possibly affecting them with the devil's benumbing venom. You deal @Damage[1d4[piercing]] damage to the touched creature and afflict the creature with imp venom. If the target takes piercing damage, they also take @Damage[1d6[spirit]] damage and must attempt a Fortitude save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage.

Failure The target is afflicted with Imp Venom at stage 1.

Critical Failure The target is afflicted with imp venom at stage 2.

Imp Venom (poison) Level 3

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}

Stage 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} (1 round).

Echoing Weapon.name: 回响武器 Echoing Weapon
Echoing Weapon.description:
你将魔法能量灌注进目标武器中，每当你击中一击时，周围的空气都会发出微弱的嗡鸣，因为冲击被武器吸收。若在其回合结束时有生物正持用该武器，该武器会释放一次音爆，以持用者相邻的一名生物为目标（若有）。该音波伤害等于该回合中持用者用目标武器成功进行的打击次数（若持用者以四次打击命中，则最多造成4点音波伤害）。

强化（+2） 音波伤害每次打击增加1点（且最大伤害增加4点）。

You channel magical energy into the target weapon, and the air around it faintly hums each time you strike a blow, as the impact is absorbed into the weapon. If a creature is wielding the weapon at the end of its turn, the weapon discharges a burst of sound targeting one creature adjacent to the wielder (if any). The sonic damage this deals is equal to the number of successful Strikes with the target weapon that the wielder made that turn (to a maximum of 4 sonic damage if the wielder hits with four Strikes).

Heightened (+2) The sonic damage increases by 1 per Strike (and the maximum damage increases by 4).

Locate.name: 定位术 Locate
Locate.description:
你知晓目标的方向（如果你选择了一个特定的物体，例如“我母亲的剑”），或最近的目标（如果你选择了一类物体，例如“剑”）。如果目标是特定物体，你必须曾用你自己的感官直接观察过它。如果是一类物体，你仍需要对该类物体有准确的心象。如果你与目标之间有铅或流动的水，这个法术无法定位术该物体。这意味着如果最近的那件物体在铅或流动的水之后，你可能会找到更远处的同类物体。

升阶（5环） 你可以以特定生物或族裔为目标，而非物体，但你必须曾与想要作为目标的该生物或族裔见过面或近距离见过。

You learn the direction to the target (if you picked a specific object, such as "my mother's sword") or the nearest target (if you picked a type of object, such as "swords"). If the target is a specific object, you must have observed it directly with your own senses. If it's a type of object, you still need to have an accurate mental image of the type of object. If there's lead or running water between you and the target, this spell can't locate the object. This means you might find a type of object farther away if the nearest one is behind lead or running water.

Heightened (5th) You can target a specific creature or ancestry instead of an object, but you must have met or seen up close the creature or ancestry you want to target.

Mind of Menace.name: 威吓之心 Mind of Menace
Mind of Menace.description:
该法术防护那些试图颠覆你心智的敌人，并将精神魔法反弹回去。当该法术完成时，你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.hi56uHG1aAb84Zzu]{与恐惧术战斗} 反应动作（）；一旦你使用该反应动作（），该法术结束。

@Check[type:will|name:与恐惧术战斗|traits:惑控系]

This spell wards against those who attempt to subvert your mind and turns mental magic back on them. When the spell is complete, you gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.hi56uHG1aAb84Zzu]{Fight with Fear} reaction; once you use the reaction, the spell ends.

@Check[type:will|name:Fight with Fear|traits:enchantment]

Admonishing Ray.name: 告诫射线 Admonishing Ray
Admonishing Ray.description:
一道能量射线在不造成持久伤害的情况下，将你的目标击打得屈服。当你施放此法术时，你选择射线的感觉是如同强力一拳还是一记耳光。进行一次法术攻击掷骰。该射线造成2d6钝击伤害。

大成功 目标受到双倍伤害。

成功 目标受到全额伤害。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加2d6。

A ray of energy bludgeons your target into submission without causing lasting harm. When you cast this spell, you choose whether the ray feels like a strong punch or slap. Make a spell attack roll. The ray deals 2d6 bludgeoning damage.

Critical Success The target takes double damage.

Success The target takes full damage.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Seal Fate.name: 封印命运 Seal Fate
Seal Fate.description:
你念出一道诅咒，使一个生物将以某种结局迎来终焉——冻死、刺死或你所设想的其他方式。从以下列表中选择一种伤害类型：酸蚀、钝击、寒冷、电击、火焰、负能量、穿刺、挥砍或音波。该效果基于目标的强韧豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得对所选伤害类型的弱点2，直到你下个回合结束。

失败 同成功，但持续时间为1分钟。若该生物被所选伤害降至0 HP，且其等级为7或更低，则其死亡。

大失败 同失败，但持续时间为无限。

升阶（+2） 弱点提高1，并且可被自动杀死的生物最大等级提高4。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.r4XX7yzeEOPK7l2a]{法术效果：封印命运}

You utter a curse that a creature will meet a certain end-a death by freezing, stabbing, or another means you devise. Choose one type of damage from the following list: acid, bludgeoning, cold, electricity, fire, negative, piercing, slashing, or sonic. The effect is based on the target's Fortitude save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target gains weakness 2 to the chosen damage type until the end of your next turn.

Failure As success, but the duration is 1 minute. If the creature is reduced to 0 HP by the chosen damage and its level is 7 or less, it dies.

Critical Failure As failure, but the duration is unlimited.

Heightened (+2) The weakness increases by 1, and the maximum level of creature that can be automatically killed increases by 4.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.r4XX7yzeEOPK7l2a]{Spell Effect: Seal Fate}

Sanguine Mist.name: 血红迷雾 Sanguine Mist
Sanguine Mist.description:
你释放出一团恶臭、嗜血的迷雾云团，从活物身上汲取活力以增强自身。你施放该法术时，区域内除你之外的每个活体生物承受 6d6 负能量伤害，进行一次基础强韧豁免。区域内的生物处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}，且云团外的所有生物对云团内的生物而言变为隐蔽。

在后续回合中，你每轮首次在自己的回合维持该法术时，区域内的活体生物会额外承受一次 @Damage[2d6[void]] 伤害，并再进行一次基础强韧豁免。你还会获得等同于你在本回合维持该法术时单个生物所受伤害一半的临时生命值；使用承受伤害最多的那个生物来计算这些临时生命值。1 分钟后，你失去任何剩余的临时生命值。

升阶 (+1) 初始伤害增加 2d6，次级伤害增加 [[/r 1d6]]。

You unleash a cloud of foul, blood-sucking fog that drains the vitality from the living to bolster your own. Each living creature in the area when you Cast the Spell, aside from you, takes 6d6 negative damage with a basic Fortitude save. Creatures in the area are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}, and all creatures outside the cloud become concealed to creatures within it.

The first time each round you Sustain this Spell on subsequent turns, living creatures in the area take an additional @Damage[2d6[void]] damage with another basic Fortitude save. You also gain temporary Hit Points equal to half the damage a single creature took when you Sustained the spell this turn; calculate these temporary Hit Points using the creature that took the most damage. You lose any remaining temporary Hit Points after 1 minute.

Heightened (+1) The initial damage increases by 2d6 and the secondary damage increases by [[/r 1d6]].

Read Omens.name: 阅读机运 Read Omens
Read Omens.description:
你窥视未来。选择一个你计划在 1 周内从事的特定目标或行动，或一个你预计可能在 1 周内发生的事件。你会得知一个隐晦的线索或建议，可能有助于所选事件，通常以押韵句或征兆的形式呈现。

You peek into the future. Choose a particular goal or activity you plan to engage in within 1 week, or an event you expect might happen within 1 week. You learn a cryptic clue or piece of advice that could help with the chosen event, often in the form of a rhyme or omen.

Blood Vendetta.name: 血仇反击 Blood Vendetta
Blood Vendetta.description:
需求 你可以流血。

触发 一个生物对你造成穿刺、挥砍或持续流血伤害。

你诅咒目标，惩罚它胆敢洒落你的鲜血。目标受到 @Damage[2d6[bleed]] 并且必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标受到一半的持续流血伤害。

失败 目标受到全部持续流血伤害。直到流血停止前，目标对穿刺和挥砍伤害具有弱点 1。@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.buXx8Azr4BYWPtFg]{法术效果：血之复仇（失败）}

大失败 同失败，但目标受到双倍的持续流血伤害。

升阶（+2） 持续流血伤害增加 @Damage[2d6[bleed]]。

Requirements You can bleed.

Trigger A creature deals piercing, slashing, or persistent bleed damage to you.

You curse the target, punishing it for having the audacity to spill your blood. The target takes @Damage[2d6[bleed]] and must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes half the persistent bleed damage.

Failure The target takes the full persistent bleed damage. Until the bleeding stops, the target has weakness 1 to piercing and slashing damage. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.buXx8Azr4BYWPtFg]{Spell Effect: Blood Vendetta (Failure)}

Critical Failure As failure, but the target takes double the persistent bleed damage.

Heightened (+2) The persistent bleed damage increases by @Damage[2d6[bleed]].

Inside Ropes.name: 绳索之内 Inside Ropes
Inside Ropes.description:
你从自己的腹部抽出一大把内脏。移除这些内脏不会对你造成伤害术。你可以将这些内脏当作50尺长的绳索来帮助你 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.pprgrYQ1QnIDGZiy]{攀爬}，并且它们有助于让你附着在墙面上。当你用内脏攀爬时，你的移动速度只有平时的一半（最少5尺），但每当你严重失败时，你都可以尝试一次 @Check[type:flat|dc:5] 检定以防止坠落。其他生物也可以使用你的内脏像一条黏软的绳子一样攀爬，但这些内脏不会帮助除你之外的任何人附着在墙面上。如果你放开你的内脏，或你的内脏受到损坏，则该法术结束。

升阶（3环）你在使用你的内脏进行攀爬时，进行攀爬的运动检定获得+1物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.T3t9776ataHzrmTs]{法术效果：体内绳索（3环）}

You pull a large handful of guts from your midsection. Removing these guts doesn't harm you. You can use the guts as 50 feet of rope to help you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.pprgrYQ1QnIDGZiy]{Climb}, and they help attach you to a wall. You move half as quickly as usual while climbing with your guts (minimum 5 feet), but you can attempt a @Check[type:flat|dc:5] check whenever you critically fail to prevent a fall. Other creatures can use your guts to climb like a squishy rope, but the guts don't help anyone but you attach to a wall. If you let go of your guts or your guts are damaged, the spell ends.

Heightened (3rd) You gain a +1 item bonus to Athletics checks to Climb while using your guts.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.T3t9776ataHzrmTs]{Spell Effect: Inside Ropes (3rd level)}

Sudden Blight.name: 猝发枯萎 Sudden Blight
Sudden Blight.description:
你加速该区域内的衰败过程。该区域内的每个活体生物受到 @Damage[2d10[void]] 伤害（基础强韧豁免）。受疾病折磨的生物在此次豁免上承受 -2 环境减值。你也可以引导枯萎腐烂该区域内所有小型与超小型的非生物植物，清除非魔法的灌木丛及其造成的任何困难地形、掩蔽与隐蔽。Sudden blight 会先尝试反制植物上的任何魔法效果，再将其枯萎。

强化（+1） 伤害增加 1d10。

You accelerate the processes of decay in the area. Each living creature in the area takes @Damage[2d10[void]] damage (basic Fortitude save). A creature afflicted by a disease takes a -2 circumstance penalty to this save.You can also direct the blight to rot all Small and Tiny non-creature plants in the area, eliminating non-magical undergrowth and any resulting difficult terrain, cover, and concealment. Sudden blight attempts to counteract any magical effect on the plants before withering them.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d10.

Harm.name: 伤害术 Harm
Harm.description:
你引导负能量来伤害生者或治疗亡灵。如果目标是活体生物，你对其造成1d8点负能量伤害，并且它必须进行一次基础强韧豁免。如果目标是自愿的亡灵生物，你恢复等量的生命值。你在施放该法术时花费的动作数量决定其目标、射程、区域以及其他参数。

1 (姿势) 该法术的射程为接触。

2 (言语, 姿势) 该法术的射程为30尺。如果你在治疗亡灵生物，使恢复的生命值增加8点。

3 (材料, 言语, 姿势) 你在30尺的散发范围内散布负能量。此举以区域内所有活体与亡灵生物为目标。

升阶（+1） 治疗或伤害的数值增加1d8，且2动作版本的额外治疗增加8点。

You channel negative energy to harm the living or heal the undead. If the target is a living creature, you deal 1d8 negative damage to it, and it gets a basic Fortitude save. If the target is a willing undead creature, you restore that amount of Hit Points. The number of actions you spend when Casting this Spell determines its targets, range, area, and other parameters.

1 (somatic) The spell has a range of touch.

2 (verbal, somatic) The spell has a range of 30 feet. If you're healing an undead creature, increase the Hit Points restored by 8.

3 (material, verbal, somatic) You disperse negative energy in a 30-foot emanation. This targets all living and undead creatures in the area.

Heightened (+1) The amount of healing or damage increases by 1d8, and the extra healing for the 2-action version increases by 8.

Forbidding Ward.name: 禁戒结界 Forbidding Ward
Forbidding Ward.description:
你守护一名盟友，使其免受来自目标敌人的攻击和敌对法术。目标盟友在对抗目标敌人的攻击、法术以及其他效果时，其护甲等级与豁免检定获得+1状态加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ctMxYPGEpstvhW9C]{法术效果：禁阻守护}

升阶（6环） 该状态加值提升至+2。

You ward an ally against the attacks and hostile spells from the target enemy. The target ally gains a +1 status bonus to Armor Class and saving throws against the target enemy's attacks, spells, and other effects.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ctMxYPGEpstvhW9C]{Spell Effect: Forbidding Ward}

Heightened (6th) The status bonus increases to +2.

Death Knell.name: 死亡丧钟 Death Knell
Death Knell.description:
你将一个濒死生物的生命掐灭。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。如果这杀死了它，你获得10点临时HP以及+1状态加值到攻击和伤害掷骰，持续10分钟。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{Dying}值增加1。

失败 目标死亡。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.98XT2QUk6wvXIqf7]{法术效果：死亡丧钟}

You snuff the life out of a creature on the brink of death. The target must attempt a Will save. If this kills it, you gain 10 temporary HP and a +1 status bonus to attack and damage rolls for 10 minutes.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{Dying} value increases by 1.

Failure The target dies.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.98XT2QUk6wvXIqf7]{Spell Effect: Death Knell}

Bane.name: 绝望术 Bane
Bane.description:
你使敌人的心智充满疑虑。

区域内的敌人必须在意志豁免中成功，否则只要他们在该区域内，就会在攻击掷骰上承受-1状态减值。

每回合一次，从你施放绝望术后的下一回合开始，你可以使用一个单动作（具有专注（特征）），将该散发的半径增加5英尺，并迫使区域内尚未受影响的敌人再尝试一次豁免。

绝望术可以反制@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XSujb7EsSwKl19Uu]{祝福术}。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.UTLp7omqsiC36bso]{法术效果：绝望术}

You fill the minds of your enemies with doubt.

Enemies in the area must succeed at a Will save or take a -1 status penalty to attack rolls as long as they are in the area.

Once per turn, starting the turn after you cast bane, you can use a single action, which has the concentrate trait, to increase the emanation's radius by 5 feet and force enemies in the area that weren't yet affected to attempt another saving throw.

Bane can counteract @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XSujb7EsSwKl19Uu]{Bless}.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.UTLp7omqsiC36bso]{Spell Effect: Bane}

Ghoulish Cravings.name: 食腐渴望 Ghoulish Cravings
Ghoulish Cravings.description:
你以接触触及目标，使其感染食尸鬼热，让饥饿侵蚀其身，并使其与正能量的联结逐渐减弱；目标必须尝试一次强韧豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标感染食尸鬼热，处于第1阶段。

失败 目标感染食尸鬼热，处于第2阶段。

大失败 目标感染食尸鬼热，处于第3阶段。

食尸鬼热（疾病）；等级 3

阶段 1 携带者，无不良效果（1天）

阶段 2 3d8 负能量伤害，且该生物从所有治疗中回复的生命值只有一半（1天）

阶段 3 同第2阶段（1天）

阶段 4 3d8 负能量伤害，且该生物无法从治疗中获得任何益处（1天）

阶段 5 同第4阶段（1天）

阶段 6 该生物死亡，并在下一个午夜起身成为食尸鬼（特征）

You touch the target to afflict it with ghoul fever, infesting it with hunger and a steadily decreasing connection to positive energy; the target must attempt a Fortitude save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is afflicted with ghoul fever at stage 1.

Failure The target is afflicted with ghoul fever at stage 2.

Critical Failure The target is afflicted with ghoul fever at stage 3.

Ghoul Fever (disease); Level 3

Stage 1 carrier with no ill effects (1 day)

Stage 2 3d8 negative damage and the creature regains half as many Hit Points from all healing (1 day)

Stage 3 as stage 2 (1 day)

Stage 4 3d8 negative damage and the creature gains no benefit from healing (1 day)

Stage 5 as stage 4 (1 day)

Stage 6 the creature dies and rises as a ghoul at the next midnight

Bloodspray Curse.name: 血溅诅咒 Bloodspray Curse
Bloodspray Curse.description:
你对目标施加一道诅咒，使任何伤口都喷涌出鲜血。目标必须尝试一次强韧豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 持续1分钟，在每轮中首次当目标因一次打击而从单次攻击中受到至少10点穿刺或挥砍伤害时，它会受到[[/r 2d6]]点同类型的额外伤害。

失败 同成功，但当它受到该额外伤害时，它还会受到@Damage[2d6[bleed]]。

强化（+2） 额外伤害提高[[/r 1d6]]，且持续流血伤害提高1d6。

You inflict a curse upon the target that causes any wound to gush blood. The target must attempt a Fortitude save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success For 1 minute, the first time each round that the target takes at least 10 piercing or slashing damage from a single Strike, it takes [[/r 2d6]] additional damage of the same type.

Failure As success, but when it takes the additional damage, it also takes @Damage[2d6[bleed]].

Heightened (+2) The additional damage increases by [[/r 1d6]] and the persistent bleed damage increases by 1d6.

Implement of Destruction.name: 毁灭器具 Implement of Destruction
Implement of Destruction.description:
你庄严宣告目标武器将为敌人带来死亡，将对该武器的非理性恐惧术植入目标敌人心中。此链接在敌人心智的最前沿回响，形成一种无处不在的迫近恐怖感。该效果基于目标敌人的意志豁免。

大成功或大失败 成功 目标敌人不受影响。

成功 在法术持续时间结束前，目标武器首次命中目标敌人时，对其额外造成 @Damage[2d6[mental]] 伤害。

失败 目标武器对目标敌人额外造成 @Damage[2d6[persistent,mental]] 伤害。若该敌人被该武器大成功或大失败命中，则敌人在承受该持续性精神伤害期间为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed 1}。

大成功或大失败 失败 目标武器对目标敌人额外造成 @Damage[4d6[persistent,mental]] 伤害。若该敌人被该武器大成功或大失败命中，则该敌人为 doomed 1。

升阶 (+2) 成功时精神伤害增加 1d6；失败时持续性精神伤害增加 1d6；或在大成功或大失败失败时增加 2d6。

You solemnly declare that the target weapon will bring death to a foe, implanting an irrational fear of the weapon into the target enemy. This link echoes at the forefront of the enemy's mind, forming a looming sense of omnipresent dread. The effect is based on the target enemy's Will save.

Critical Success The target enemy is unaffected.

Success The target weapon deals an additional @Damage[2d6[mental]] damage the first time it hits the target enemy before the end of the spell's duration.

Failure The target weapon deals an additional @Damage[2d6[persistent,mental]] damage to the target enemy. If the enemy is critically hit by the weapon, the enemy is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed 1} for as long as it takes this persistent mental damage.

Critical Failure The target weapon deals an additional @Damage[4d6[persistent,mental]] damage to the target enemy. If the enemy is critically hit by the weapon, the enemy is doomed 1.

Heightened (+2) Increase the mental damage by 1d6 on a success, and increase the persistent mental damage by 1d6 on a failure or by 2d6 on a critical failure.

Whirling Scarves.name: 旋舞长巾 Whirling Scarves
Whirling Scarves.description:
你用一阵由旋转的彩色力场围巾组成的漩涡包围自身，这些围巾会遮蔽你并使你的敌人迷失方向。你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽（状态）}的好处，但仅对远程和近战攻击生效。当一次近战攻击因为隐蔽（状态）的纯骰检定而未能命中你时，围巾会缠住该武器或徒手攻击，且该生物在其回合结束前（若当时不是该生物的回合，则直到其下个回合结束前）用该武器或徒手攻击进行的后续攻击承受-1环境减值。对远程攻击者而言，围巾的移动时机更难预测，因此对抗远程攻击时，隐蔽（状态）的纯骰检定DC从DC 5提高至DC 6。你可以解消这个法术。

升阶（+2） 围巾缠住的一次近战武器或徒手攻击所导致的后续攻击的环境减值提高1。对抗远程攻击时，隐蔽（状态）的纯骰检定DC提高1。

You surround yourself in a vortex of whirling colorful scarves of force that obfuscate you and disorient your foes. You gain the benefits of the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} condition, but only against ranged and melee attacks. When a melee attack fails to hit you because of the flat check for the Concealed condition, the scarves snag the weapon or unarmed attack, and the creature takes a -1 circumstance penalty to further attacks with that weapon or unarmed attack until the end of its turn (or the end of its next turn, if it wasn't the creature's turn). The timing of the scarves' movement is harder to predict for ranged attackers, so the flat check for the Concealed condition against ranged attacks increases from DC 5 to DC 6. You can Dismiss this spell.

Heightened (+2) The circumstance penalty to further attacks with a melee weapon or unarmed attack the scarves snag increases by 1. The DC of the flat check for the Concealed condition against ranged attacks increases by 1.

Puff of Poison.name: 毒气喷云 Puff of Poison
Puff of Poison.description:
你呼出一团闪烁的剧毒吐息云雾，喷向敌人的脸部。根据其强韧豁免，目标受到等同于你施法调整值的毒素伤害和 2 点持续毒素伤害。

大成功或大失败成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 目标承受一半的初始伤害与持续伤害。

失败 目标承受全部的初始伤害与持续伤害。

大成功或大失败失败 目标承受双倍的初始伤害与持续伤害。

强化（+2） 初始毒素伤害增加 1d8，持续毒素伤害增加 1。

You exhale a shimmering cloud of toxic breath at an enemy's face. The target takes poison damage equal to your spellcasting modifier and 2 persistent poison damage, depending on its Fortitude save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The target takes half initial and persistent damage.

Failure The target takes full initial and persistent damage.

Critical Failure The target takes double initial and persistent damage.

Heightened (+2) The initial poison damage increases by 1d8 and the persistent poison damage increases by 1.

Shield.name: 护盾术 Shield
Shield.description:
你举起一道魔法力场护盾。这视为使用“举起护盾”动作，使你在你下个回合开始前获得 AC +1 环境加值，但不需要空出一只手来使用。

当该法术生效时，你可以用你的魔法护盾使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{护盾格挡} 反应动作（）。该护盾具有 硬度 5。在你使用护盾格挡后，该法术结束，且你在 10 分钟内无法再次施放它。与普通的护盾格挡不同，你可以用该法术的反应动作（）来对抗 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gKKqvLohtrSJj3BM]{魔法飞弹} 法术。

升阶该法术会提高护盾的 硬度。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{法术效果：护盾术}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.QF6RDlCoTvkVHRo4]{效果：护盾术免疫}

升阶（3环） 该护盾具有 硬度 10。

升阶（5环） 该护盾具有 硬度 15。

升阶（7环） 该护盾具有 硬度 20。

升阶（9环） 该护盾具有 硬度 25。

You raise a magical shield of force. This counts as using the Raise a Shield action, giving you a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn, but it doesn't require a hand to use.

While the spell is in effect, you can use the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{Shield Block} reaction with your magic shield. The shield has Hardness 5. After you use Shield Block, the spell ends and you can't cast it again for 10 minutes. Unlike a normal Shield Block, you can use the spell's reaction against the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gKKqvLohtrSJj3BM]{Magic Missile} spell.

Heightening the spell increases the shield's Hardness.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{Spell Effect: Shield}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.QF6RDlCoTvkVHRo4]{Effect: Shield Immunity}

Heightened (3rd) The shield has Hardness 10.

Heightened (5th) The shield has Hardness 15.

Heightened (7th) The shield has Hardness 20.

Heightened (9th) The shield has Hardness 25.

Horrifying Blood Loss.name: 骇人失血 Horrifying Blood Loss
Horrifying Blood Loss.description:
你诅咒目标，让其因失血而充满恐惧。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}。

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}。直到其停止流血为止，其恐惧值不能降低到低于 frightened 1。

大失败 如失败，但目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}。

升阶（4环） 你甚至用大量鲜血吓坏目击者。你可以将至多四个生物作为次要目标。此些次要目标不需要流血，但必须能够看到主要目标。次要目标也必须尝试意志豁免，结果相同，但其对降低恐惧值的限制取决于主要目标是否仍在流血。

You curse the target, filling it with terror at the loss of its blood. The target must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}. Until it stops bleeding, its frightened value can't decrease below frightened 1.

Critical Failure As failure, but the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}.

Heightened (4th) You even terrify witnesses with the copious quantities of blood. You can target up to four creatures as secondary targets. These secondary targets don't need to be bleeding but must be able to see the primary target. Secondary targets must also attempt Will saves, with the same results, except their restriction on decreasing their frightened value depends on whether the primary target is still bleeding.

Lightning Bolt.name: 闪电束 Lightning Bolt
Lightning Bolt.description:
一道闪电从你的手中向外劈出，造成 4d12 电击伤害。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加 1d12。

A bolt of lightning strikes outward from your hand, dealing 4d12 electricity damage.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d12.

Inflict Empty Death Curse.name: 施加空无之死诅咒 Inflict Empty Death Curse
Inflict Empty Death Curse.description:
空无之死（诅咒，死灵系，异能）

这是《呓语芦苇》中详述的空无之死诅咒的战斗版本。

豁免 DC 27 意志

大成功 施放该诅咒的牧师陷入迟钝 1，持续至其下一回合结束，因为他们不得不面对自己的诅咒居然真的失败了这一事实。

成功 你陷入迟钝 1，持续至你下一回合结束。

失败 你陷入迟钝 2，持续接下来的10分钟。

大失败 你陷入迟钝 2，持续接下来的24小时。

迟钝效果

你在上述决定的持续时间内陷入迟钝，因为你的思绪被狂乱偏执所充斥，怀疑有什么东西正从死亡的另一侧注视着你。若你在受到空无之死影响期间死亡，你会立刻变为一名混乱邪恶的幽灵（特征）。

在你成为幽灵之后每过7天，你必须在一次DC 2 纯骰检定中成功——失败表示你被宁布洛斯吞噬。其幽灵以这种方式被吞噬的生物不会旅行至灵魂之河，而是被彻底湮灭；该生物只能通过一个10级法术效果或类似许愿术的仪式才能恢复生命。

该牧师在10分钟内无法再次施加空无之死诅咒。

Empty Death (curse, necromancy, occult)

This is a combat version of the Empty Death curse detailed in The Whispering Reeds.

Saving Throw DC 27 Will

Critical Success The cleric who cast the curse is Stupefied 1  until the end of their next turn as they grapple with the fact that their curse actually failed.

Success You become Stupefied 1  until the end of your next turn.

Failure You become Stupefied 2  for the next 10 minutes.

Critical Failure You become Stupefied 2  for the next 24 hours.

Stupification Effect

You become Stupified for the length of time determined above, as your thoughts fill with paranoia that something is watching you from the other side of death. If you die while affected by the Empty Death, you immediately become a chaotic evil ghost.

Every 7 days that pass after you become a ghost, you must succeed at a DC 2 Flat Check— failure indicates that you are consumed by Nhimbaloth. A creature whose ghost is consumed in this way does not travel to the River of Souls and is utterly annihilated; this creature can only be restored to life via a 10th-level spell effect or ritual like Wish.

The cleric cannot inflict the Empty Death curse again for 10 minutes.

Weakness to Glimpse of Redemption.name: 对救赎一瞥的弱点 Weakness to Glimpse of Redemption
Weakness to Glimpse of Redemption.description:
触发 一名救赎者以“一瞥救赎”将宁布洛斯的祭司作为目标。

救赎的念头对宁布洛斯的祭司而言尤其骇人；他们相信自己在此生可以犯下任何恶行，然后前往空无之死，而非在来世遭受任何惩罚。

宁布洛斯的祭司面对“一瞥救赎”时可作的选择如下：

  • 你自己承受伤害，而不是将其施加于盟友。
  • 仍旧造成伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2}，因为其被新近挣脱的罪疚感压垮，开始怀疑空无之死是否其实是一场说谎。

注记：在震慑期间，若该祭司受到来自救赎者或其盟友的任何伤害，震慑状态立即结束。

此外，宁布洛斯的祭司不会那么轻易摆脱这一瞥。在此后与该名特定救赎者的所有交涉中，其交涉检定与意志豁免都会减少相当于救赎者等级一半的数值。

Trigger A Redeemer targets the Priest of Nhimbaloth with a Glimpse of Redemption.

Thoughts of redemption are especially frightful to a Priest of Nhimbaloth, who believes they can commit whatever evils they want in this life, and move on to the Empty Death, rather than any punishment in the afterlife.

The Glimpse of Redemption choices for a Priest of Nhimbaloth are as follows:

  • Take the damage yourself, instead of inflicting it on the ally.
  • Inflict the damage anyway, and are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2} as they is crushed by newly freed guilt, and begin to wonder if the Empty Death is actually a lie.

Note: While Stunned, if the priest takes any damage by the Redeemer or their allies, the Stunned state immediately ends.

Additionally, a Priest of Nhimbaloth does not shake off the Glimpse so easily. In all future parlays with that specific Redeemer, the diplomacy check and will saves decreases by half the Redeemer's level.

Weakness to Champions.name: 对圣武士的弱点 Weakness to Champions
Weakness to Champions.description:
由于他们对空无之死的希望，宁布洛斯的祭司对所有圣武士、救赎者与解放者都有一种非常特定的弱点。

触发: 宁布洛斯的祭司正在与一名圣武士、救赎者或解放者谈判。

结果: 该祭司在与该冠军的所有交涉检定上承受 -2，并且在对抗该冠军的所有意志豁免上承受 -2。

 

Due to their hope of the Empty Death, Priests of Nhimbaloth have a very specific weakness to all Paladins, Redeemers and Liberators.

Trigger: The Priest of Nhimbaloth is in parley with a Paladin, Redeemer or Liberator.

Result: The priest has a -2 to all Diplomacy checks with the Champion, and a -2 to all Will saves against the Champion.

Faith Tattoo.name: 信仰纹身 Faith Tattoo
Faith Tattoo.description:
先决条件 神祇的崇拜者，阵营与该神祇的追随者阵营相符

你在身上留下印记以展示你对神祇的虔敬。该纹身可以是神祇的宗教符号、另一种能唤起该神祇的图像，或你因虔敬而获得的其他印记。该纹身作为该神祇的银制宗教符号。只要你保持纹身外露，你无需持握它也能获得该益处。若你不再满足先决条件，纹身会淡化，你将失去其益处，直到你进行一次@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.7Fd4lxozd11MQ55N]{赎罪}仪式并在之后再次满足先决条件。

启动 施法

频率 每日一次

效果 该纹身施放@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wdA52JJnsuQWeyqz]{伤害术}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{治疗术}，或你所信奉神祇的牧师法术列表中的1环法术。你只能依照该神祇的神圣涌泉选择伤害术或治疗术。若该神祇允许任一法术，则在你获得该纹身时选择一种作为纹身可施放的法术。这些法术的DC均为18。此外，该纹身还具有一个特征：为其可施放法术的学派。

制造需求 价值2 gp的银，用于加入墨水中

Prerequisites worshipper of a deity, alignment matching the deity's follower alignments

You have marked your body to show your devotion to a deity. This tattoo could be the deity's religious symbol, another image that evokes that deity, or another mark you gained through your devotion. The tattoo serves as a silver religious symbol of the deity. Provided you keep the tattoo uncovered, you need not wield it to gain that benefit. If you cease meeting the prerequisites, the tattoo fades, and you lose its benefits until you perform an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.7Fd4lxozd11MQ55N]{Atone} ritual and meet the prerequisites thereafter.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day

Effect The tattoo casts @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wdA52JJnsuQWeyqz]{Harm}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{Heal}, or the 1st-level spell from your deity's cleric spells. You can choose harm or heal only in accord with the deity's divine font. If the deity allows either spell, choose one the tattoo can cast when you receive the tattoo. The DC for any of these spells is 18. Also, the tattoo has as a trait the school of the spell the tattoo can cast.

Craft Requirements silver worth 2 gp to include in the ink

Eye Slash.name: 眼部斩击 Eye Slash
Eye Slash.description:
你眼周的小伤疤或印记改善了你的远距离视力。这些伤疤在兽人斥候中尤其常见，他们偏爱形似鹰爪的伤疤。你能看得比正常远四倍。如果你拥有黑暗视觉，你能以彩色看见血液。更高等级版本的眼部斜痕会是更大、更精致的伤疤或印记，自眼周向外放射。

Small scars or marks around your eye improve your distant vision. These scars are especially common among orc scouts, who favor scars shaped like eagle talons. You can see four times farther than normal. If you have darkvision, you can see blood in color. Higher-level versions of an eye slash are larger and more elaborate scars or marks, radiating out around the eye.

Shadow Blast.name: 幽影爆破 Shadow Blast
Shadow Blast.description:
你将幽影位面的半真实物质塑造成一次爆破。选择酸蚀、钝击、寒冷、电击、火焰、力场、穿刺、挥砍或音波伤害，并选择一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:30]、一个位于120英尺内的 @Template[type:burst|distance:15]，或一个 @Template[type:line|distance:50]。爆破对区域内的每个生物造成你所选类型的5d8伤害。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加1d8。
