You shape the quasi-real substance of the Shadow Plane into a blast. Choose acid, bludgeoning, cold, electricity, fire, force, piercing, slashing, or sonic damage, and choose a @Template[type:cone|distance:30], a @Template[type:burst|distance:15] within 120 feet, or a @Template[type:line|distance:50]. The blast deals 5d8 damage of the type you chose to each creature in the area.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Prying Eye.name: 窥视之眼 Prying Eye
Prying Eye.description:
你在一个你能看见且距离不超过500尺的位置创造一只@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}、漂浮的眼睛，直径1英寸。它以你正常的视觉感官向所有方向观察，并持续将它所见到的内容传递给你。每轮你第一次维持法术时，你可以选择将眼睛移动至多30尺（只能看见眼睛前方的事物），或将其移动至多10尺（能看见其周围所有方向的一切）。眼睛能离你移动到多远没有限制，但若你与眼睛不再处于同一存在的位面，法术会立即结束。若你想用它进行察觉检定，你可以通过眼睛尝试搜寻动作。对眼睛造成的任何伤害都会摧毁它并结束该法术。

You create an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}, floating eye, 1 inch in diameter, at a location you can see within 500 feet. It sees in all directions with your normal visual senses and continuously transmits what it sees to you. The first time you Sustain the Spell each round, you can either move the eye up to 30 feet, seeing only things in front of the eye, or move it up to 10 feet, seeing everything in all directions around it. There is no limit to how far from you the eye can move, but the spell ends immediately if you and the eye ever cease to be on the same plane of existence. You can attempt Seek actions through the eye if you want to attempt Perception checks with it. Any damage dealt to the eye destroys it and ends the spell.

Dispel Magic.name: 解除魔法 Dispel Magic
Dispel Magic.description:
你解开一个法术或效果背后的魔法。对目标进行一次反制检定。若你成功反制一个魔法物品，该物品在10分钟内变为其类型的普通物品。这不会改变该物品的非魔法属性。若目标为神器或类似物品，你自动失败。

You unravel the magic behind a spell or effect. Attempt a counteract check against the target. If you successfully counteract a magic item, the item becomes a mundane item of its type for 10 minutes. This doesn't change the item's non-magical properties. If the target is an artifact or similar item, you automatically fail.

Glyph of Warding.name: 守卫刻文 Glyph of Warding
Glyph of Warding.description:
你通过将一个敌对法术束缚进一个符号来制作一个陷阱。在你施放此法术时，你还要施放一个更低法术等级的法术并将其储存在刻文中。被储存的法术必须需3个动作或更少即可施放，具有敌对效果，并以一个生物为目标或具有一个区域。你可以为刻文设定一个口令、一个触发条件，或两者兼具。任何移动、打开或触碰目标容器，或进入目标区域且未说出口令、或符合触发条件的生物，都会激活刻文，释放其中的有害法术。

一旦有法术被储存在刻文中，刻文获得该法术的所有特征。若被储存的法术以一个或多个生物为目标，它便以触发刻文的生物为目标。若它具有区域，则该区域以触发刻文的生物为中心。守卫刻文的持续时间在刻文被触发时结束。该刻文视为一个魔法陷阱，使用你的法术DC来进行察觉检定以注意到它，以及进行盗窃检定以解除它；两种检定都要求尝试者受训才能成功。

你可以解消守卫刻文。你在同一时间内能维持生效的守卫刻文的最大数量等于你的施法关键能力调整值。

You craft a trap by binding a hostile spell into a symbol. While Casting this Spell, you also Cast a Spell of a lower spell level to store in the glyph. The stored spell must take 3 actions or fewer to cast, have a hostile effect, and target one creature or have an area. You can set a password, a trigger, or both for the glyph. Any creature that moves, opens, or touches the target container or enters the target area that doesn't speak the password or that matches the trigger activates the glyph, releasing the harmful spell within.

Once a spell is stored in the glyph, the glyph gains all the traits of that spell. If the stored spell targets one or more creatures, it targets the creature that set off the glyph. If it has an area, that area is centered on the creature that set off the glyph. Glyph of warding's duration ends when the glyph is triggered. The glyph counts as a magical trap, using your spell DC for both the Perception check to notice it and the Thievery check to disable it; both checks require the creature attempting them to be trained in order to succeed.

You can Dismiss glyph of warding. The maximum number of glyphs of warding you can have active at a time is equal to your spellcasting ability modifier.

Splint Mail.name: 夹板链甲 Splint Mail
Splint Mail.description:
这种护甲是一种铁链甲，并用柔韧、相互咬合的金属板加固，通常位于穿戴者的躯干、上臂和腿部。一套这种护甲附带一件内衬的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.zBYEU9E7034ENCmh]{软甲} 和一副 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Ix2vicchE79d6Cl3]{护手}。

This type of armor is chain mail reinforced with flexible, interlocking metal plates, typically located on the wearer's torso, upper arms, and legs. A suit of this armor comes with an undercoat of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.zBYEU9E7034ENCmh]{padded armor} and a pair of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Ix2vicchE79d6Cl3]{gauntlets}.

Grim Tendrils.name: 邪影触须 Grim Tendrils
Grim Tendrils.description:
黑暗的触须从你的指尖卷出，在空中疾驰。你对直线中的活体生物造成2d4虚空伤害与@Damage[(@item.level)[bleed]]伤害。直线中的每个活体生物必须尝试一次强韧豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物承受一半虚空伤害，且不承受持续流血伤害。

失败 该生物承受全额伤害。

大失败 该生物承受双倍虚空伤害与双倍持续流血伤害。

升阶（+1） 虚空伤害提高2d4，持续流血伤害提高1。

Tendrils of darkness curl out from your fingertips and race through the air. You deal 2d4 void damage and @Damage[(@item.level)[bleed]] damage to living creatures in the line. Each living creature in the line must attempt a Fortitude save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half the void damage and no persistent bleed damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage.

Critical Failure The creature takes double void damage and double persistent bleed damage.

Heightened (+1) The void damage increases by 2d4, and the persistent bleed damage increases by 1.

Toxic Cloud.name: 毒云 Toxic Cloud
Toxic Cloud.description:
你召唤出一团剧毒迷雾。此法术如同 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9XHmC2JgTUIQ1CCm]{Mist} 运作，但该区域每轮都会远离你移动10英尺。你对每个位于法术区域内并在其回合开始时仍在呼吸的生物造成6d8点毒素伤害。你可以解消该法术。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加1d8。

You conjure a poisonous fog. This functions as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9XHmC2JgTUIQ1CCm]{Mist}, except the area moves 10 feet away from you each round. You deal 6d8 poison damage to each breathing creature that starts its turn in the spell's area. You can Dismiss the spell.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Divine Focus Spells.name: 神圣专注法术 Divine Focus Spells

Lift Nature's Caul.name: 揭开自然之帷 Lift Nature's Caul
Lift Nature's Caul.description:
你挥手一招，使目标仿佛看见周遭世界覆着的一层薄纱被揭开，显露出其所感知现实之下的真相。他们能看见的自然景观变得扭曲而骇人，建筑显得变形且残破，物体看起来也歪曲而异样。这种另类视觉很快就会淡化，但对自然世界之外的惊鸿一瞥会在法术的持续时间内萦绕不去。异怪或外神或伟大旧日支配者的崇拜者会因这扭曲现实的景象而受到鼓舞，在1分钟内对意志豁免掷骰与攻击掷骰获得+1状态加值 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ihv1azg80N3kj7Vo]{法术效果：揭开自然之帷（加值）}，而其他所有生物必须尝试一次意志豁免掷骰。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响，并在1小时内暂时免疫。

成功 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧（状态） 1}。

失败 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞（状态） 1}，持续1分钟，并陷入惊惧（状态） 1。

大成功或大失败 该生物陷入呆滞（状态） 1，持续1分钟，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧（状态） 2}。只要它仍因该法术而处于呆滞（状态），其惊惧（状态）的数值就不能降低到1以下。

升阶（+2） 你将区域增加5尺，并将呆滞（状态）的持续时间增加1分钟。

With a wave of the hand, you cause the targets to see the world around them as if a gauzy film had been lifted away to expose the truth that lies below their perceived reality. Natural features they can see grow twisted and horrendous, structures appear distorted and ruined, and objects seem warped and alien. This alternate vision fades quickly, but the glimpse beyond the natural world lingers for the spell's duration. Aberrations or worshippers of Outer Gods or Great Old Ones are bolstered by this vision of warped reality and gain a +1 status bonus to Will saving throws and attack rolls for 1 minute @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ihv1azg80N3kj7Vo]{Spell Effect: Lift Nature's Caul (Bonus)}, while all other creatures must attempt a Will saving throw.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected and temporarily immune for 1 hour.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 minute and frightened 1.

Critical Failure The creature is stupefied 1 for 1 minute and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}. It can't reduce the value of its frightened condition below 1 as long as it remains stupefied by this spell.

Heightened (+2) You increase the area by 5 feet and the duration of the stupefied condition by 1 minute.

Fearful Feast.name: 恐惧盛宴 Fearful Feast
Fearful Feast.description:
触发 射程内的一名生物变为惊惧（状态）。

你大张嘴巴并猛然吸气；你将惊惧的目标所依附的英勇、自信与希望吸入体内，随后剥夺目标那种以为这些脆弱的情绪能够将其从恐惧的湮灭中拯救出来的虚假信念。目标被窃取的希望使你重获活力。

你对该生物造成6d4点心灵伤害，它必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物承受一半伤害。

失败 该生物承受全部伤害；你恢复等同于目标承受伤害一半的生命值。

大失败 该生物的惊惧（状态）增加1（最高至@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 4}），并且承受双倍伤害；你恢复等同于目标承受伤害一半的生命值。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加[[/r 2d4]]{2d4}。

Trigger A creature within range becomes frightened.

You open your mouth wide and inhale sharply; you draw in the bravery, self-confidence, and hope to which the frightened target clings and then strip away the target's false assumption that these fragile emotions can save them from the oblivion of terror. The target's stolen hope reinvigorates you.

You deal 6d4 mental damage to the creature, which must attempt a Will saving throw.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage; you regain Hit Points equal to half the damage the target takes.

Critical Failure The creature's frightened condition increases by 1 (to a maximum of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 4}) and it takes double damage; you regain Hit Points equal to half the damage the target takes.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by [[/r 2d4]]{2d4}.

Entangling Flora.name: 纠缠植物群 Entangling Flora
Entangling Flora.description:
植物与真菌爆发而出或迅速生长，缠绕生物。区域内的所有表面都是困难地形。每一轮当一名生物在该区域内开始其回合时，它必须尝试一次反射豁免。若失败，它的速度在离开该区域前都承受–10英尺环境减值；若大成功或大失败中的大失败，它还会在1轮内处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}。生物可以尝试@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱}以移除这些效果。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.rjM25qfw5BKj9h97]{法术效果：缠绕植物群}

Plants and fungi burst out or quickly grow, entangling creatures. All surfaces in the area are difficult terrain. Each round that a creature starts its turn in the area, it must attempt a Reflex save. On a failure, it takes a –10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds until it leaves the area, and on a critical failure, it's also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} for 1 round. Creatures can attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} to remove these effects.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.rjM25qfw5BKj9h97]{Spell Effect: Entangling Flora}

Heal.name: 治疗术 Heal
Heal.description:
你引导生命能量来治疗活物或伤害不死生物。若目标是自愿的活体生物，你恢复1d8点生命值。若目标是不死生物，你对其造成等量的生命力伤害，并且它进行一次基础强韧豁免。你在施放此法术时花费的动作数量决定其目标、射程、区域以及其他参数。

1 该法术的射程为接触。

2 (concentrate) 该法术的射程为30尺。若你在治疗一个活体生物，使其恢复的生命值增加8点。

3 (concentrate) 你在一个@Template[type:emanation|distance:30]内散布生命能量。这会以爆发中的所有活体与不死生物为目标。

升阶 (+1) 治疗或伤害的数值增加1d8，且2动作版本的额外治疗增加8点。

You channel vital energy to heal the living or damage the undead. If the target is a willing living creature, you restore 1d8 Hit Points. If the target is undead, you deal that amount of vitality damage to it, and it gets a basic Fortitude save. The number of actions you spend when Casting this Spell determines its targets, range, area, and other parameters.

1 The spell has a range of touch.

2 (concentrate) The spell has a range of 30 feet. If you're healing a living creature, increase the Hit Points restored by 8.

3 (concentrate) You disperse vital energy in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]. This targets all living and undead creatures in the burst.

Heightened (+1) The amount of healing or damage increases by 1d8, and the extra healing for the 2-action version increases by 8.

Fragment of Urevian's Pendant.name: 乌瑞维安的吊坠碎片 Fragment of Urevian's Pendant

Idriniliss.publicNotes:
法术特征

需求：

混乱,寒冷,诅咒,黑暗术,死亡,疾病,梦境,电击,邪恶,异界,恐惧术,火焰,真菌,化身,厄运,变形,死灵,负能量,神秘,毒素,幽影,虚空

禁用：

奥术,善良,好运,治疗,守序,光亮术,正能量,

原始红光颜色：#ff0000 来自 乌瑞维安的领域

Spell traits

Desired:

chaotic,cold,curse,darkness,death,disease,dream,electricity,evil,extradimensional,fear,fire,fungus,incarnate,misfortune,morph,necromancy,negative,occult,poson,shadow,void

Banned:

arcane,good,fortune,healing,lawful,light,positive,

Original Red Light Color: #ff0000 from Urevian's Domain
Idriniliss.privateNotes:
Idriniliss是在《佣兵市场》第一卷以及《游戏主持人指南》中的NPC画廊的帮助下创建的。

Idriniliss was created with the help of Mercenary Marketplace Volume 1, and the NPC Gallery from the Gamemastery guide.
Idriniliss.blurb:
宁布洛斯的女祭司
Priestess of Nhimbaloth

Portaged.name: 搬运 Portaged
Portaged.description:
这艘划艇可以由2个中型生物或1个大型生物在陆地上携带。这样做时，这些生物处于负荷状态。

The rowboat can be carried overland by 2 Medium creatures or 1 Large creature. Those creatures are encumbered when doing so.

Raydolph.name: 雷道夫 Raydolph

Animal Companion.name: 动物伙伴 Animal Companion
Animal Companion.description:
雷道夫的动物伙伴被微灵杀死了。

雇佣游侠有一只成熟的犬类伙伴（@UUID[Actor.6WuJBpIPJgsiyFrt]{Drex}）与其一同旅行。当他们发动猎杀目标时，其伙伴获得相同的增益。

就遭遇构筑而言，雇佣游侠与犬类伙伴视为一个生物。

Raydolph's animal companion was killed by wisps.

The Mercenary Ranger has a mature canine companion (@UUID[Actor.6WuJBpIPJgsiyFrt]{Drex}) that travels with them. When they Hunt Prey, their companion gains the same benefits. 

For the purposes of encounter building, the Mercenary Ranger and Canine Companion count as a single creature.

Command an Animal.name: 命令动物 Command an Animal
Command an Animal.description:
当佣兵游侠使用“命令动物”动作时，犬类伙伴获得2个动作。佣兵游侠每轮只能使用一次“命令动物”。

The Canine Companion gains 2 actions when the Mercenary Ranger uses the Command an Animal action. The Mercenary Ranger can only use Command an Animal once per round.

Primal Focus Spells.name: 原初专注法术 Primal Focus Spells

Heal Companion.name: 治疗术同伴 Heal Companion
Heal Companion.description:
你引导正能量来治疗你的动物伙伴的伤口。你为你的动物伙伴恢复[[/r 1d10]]生命值。你花费的@Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.aBQ8ajvEBByv45yz]{施放该法术}的动作数量决定射程和其他参数。

  • 1（姿势）该法术的射程为接触。
  • 2（言语）该法术的射程为30尺，并额外为目标恢复8点生命值。

升阶（+1） 治疗量增加[[/r 1d10]]，且2动作版本的额外治疗量增加8点。

You harness positive energy to heal your animal companion's wounds. You restore [[/r 1d10]] Hit Points to your animal companion. The number of actions you spend @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.aBQ8ajvEBByv45yz]{Casting this Spell} determines range and other parameters.

  • 1 (somatic) The spell has a range of touch.
  • 2 (verbal) The spell has a range of 30 feet and restores an additional 8 Hit Points to the target.

Heightened (+1) The amount of healing increases by [[/r 1d10]], and the additional healing for the 2-action version increases by 8.

Hunt Prey.name: 猎杀目标 Hunt Prey
Hunt Prey.description:
该生物将其能看见且听见的一个生物，或一个其正在@Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{Tracking}的生物，指定为其猎物。该生物在对猎物进行@Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek}的察觉检定，以及对猎物进行@Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{Track}的生存检定上，获得+2环境加值。

该生物在一轮中首次命中所指定的猎物时，会造成额外[[/r 1d8[precision]]]{1d8精准伤害}。其也可以忽略在其第二射程增量内进行远程攻击的减值。

这些效果持续至该生物再次使用@Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.JYi4MnsdFu618hPm]{Hunt Prey}为止。

This creature designates a single creature they can see and hear, or one they're @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{Tracking}, as their prey. This creature gains a +2 circumstance bonus to Perception checks to @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} the prey and to Survival checks to @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{Track} the prey.

The first time this creature hits the designated prey in a round, they deal an additional [[/r 1d8[precision]]]{1d8 precision damage}. They may also ignores the penalty for making ranged attacks within their second range increment.

These effects last until this creature uses @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.JYi4MnsdFu618hPm]{Hunt Prey} again.

Trackless Step.name: 无踪步 Trackless Step
Trackless Step.description:
当佣兵游侠穿越自然地形时，他们很难被追踪。在此类地形中，他们总是获得“掩盖踪迹”动作的益处，且无需以其速度的一半移动。

When the Mercenary Ranger moves through natural terrains, they are difficult to track. They always gain the benefits of the Cover Tracks action in such terrains, without moving at half their Speed.

Hunted Shot.name: 猎袭双矢 Hunted Shot
Hunted Shot.description:
频率 每轮一次

需求 持用一把装填 0 的远程武器。

佣兵游侠对其狩猎猎物进行两次快速射击。它们使用所需的武器对其猎物进行两次打击。若两次都命中同一生物，则为了计算抗力与弱点，将两次的伤害合并。对每次打击照常应用其多重攻击减值。

Frequency once per round

Requirements wielding a ranged weapon with reload 0.

The Mercenary Ranger take two quick shots against their hunted prey. They make two Strikes against their prey with the required weapon. If both hit the same creature, combine their damage for the purpose of resistances and weaknesses. Apply their multiple attack penalty to each Strike normally.

Raydolph.privateNotes:
雷道夫是在《雇佣兵市场》第一卷和《游戏主持指南》中的 NPC 图鉴的帮助下创建的。

Raydolph was created with the help of Mercenary Marketplace Volume 1, and the NPC Gallery from the Gamemastery guide.

Shaitan Wizard.name: 沙伊坦巫师 Shaitan Wizard

Arcane Innate Spells.name: 奥术先天法术 Arcane Innate Spells

Wall of Stone.name: 石墙 Wall of Stone
Wall of Stone.description:
你塑造一面坚固的石墙。你创造一面厚1英寸、最长120英尺、高20英尺的石墙。你可以塑造墙的路径，将墙的每5英尺放置在方格之间的边界上。墙不需要竖直站立，因此你可以用它来形成一座桥或一组楼梯等。你必须在一段不间断的开阔空间中召唤这面墙，使其边缘不会穿过任何生物或物体，否则该法术失效。

墙的每个10英尺×10英尺的区段具有AC 10、硬度14和50点生命值，并且免疫大成功或大失败与精准伤害。被摧毁的墙区段可以被穿过，但由其产生的瓦砾属于困难地形。

强化（+2） 墙的每个区段的生命值增加15点。

You shape a wall of solid stone. You create a 1-inch-thick wall of stone up to 120 feet long, and 20 feet high. You can shape the wall's path, placing each 5 feet of the wall on the border between squares. The wall doesn't need to stand vertically, so you can use it to form a bridge or set of stairs, for example. You must conjure the wall in an unbroken open space so its edges don't pass through any creatures or objects, or the spell is lost.

Each 10-foot-by-10-foot section of the wall has AC 10, Hardness 14, and 50 Hit Points, and it's immune to critical hits and precision damage. A destroyed section of the wall can be moved through, but the rubble created from it is difficult terrain.

Heightened (+2) The Hit Points of each section of the wall increase by 15.

Shape Stone (At Will).name: 塑石术（随意） Shape Stone (At Will)
Shape Stone (At Will).description:
你将石头塑造成你选择的一种粗糙形状。塑形过程过于粗糙，无法制作精密部件、细微细节、可动结构或类似构造。任何在你重塑时站在石头上的生物都必须各自尝试一次反射豁免或特技检定。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 该生物跌倒为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}，并倒在石头上。

大失败 该生物从石头上跌落（如适用），并以 Prone 着地。

You shape the stone into a rough shape of your choice. The shaping process is too crude to produce intricate parts, fine details, moving pieces, or the like. Any creatures standing atop the stone when you reshape it must each attempt a Reflex save or Acrobatics check.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature falls @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} atop the stone.

Critical Failure The creature falls off the stone (if applicable) and lands Prone.

Detect Magic (Constant).name: 侦测魔法（持续） Detect Magic (Constant)
Detect Magic (Constant).description:
你释放出一道脉冲，用于登记周围是否存在魔法。你获得的信息仅限于是否存在魔法，不会得到更多内容。你可以选择忽略你已完全知晓的魔法，例如你与盟友的魔法物品以及持续中的法术。

只有当幻术魔法的效果等级低于你的侦测魔法法术等级时，你才能侦测到该幻术魔法。然而，具有幻术灵光但外观并不具欺骗性的物品（例如隐形术药水）通常仍会被正常侦测到。

升阶（3环） 你得知该法术在射程内所侦测到的最高等级效果所属的魔法学派。若有多个效果同样强，则由GM决定你得知哪一个。

升阶（4环） 如同3环，但你还会锁定最高等级魔法的来源。与模糊感官相同，你不会得知其精确位置，但可以将来源缩小到一个5尺立方体之内（若目标大于该范围，则为距离最近的等效区域）。

You send out a pulse that registers the presence of magic. You receive no information beyond the presence or absence of magic. You can choose to ignore magic you're fully aware of, such as the magic items and ongoing spells of you and your allies.

You detect illusion magic only if that magic's effect has a lower level than the level of your detect magic spell. However, items that have an illusion aura but aren't deceptive in appearance (such as an invisibility potion) typically are detected normally.

Heightened (3rd) You learn the school of magic for the highest-level effect within range that the spell detects. If multiple effects are equally strong, the GM determines which you learn.

Heightened (4th) As 3rd level, but you also pinpoint the source of the highest-level magic. Like for an imprecise sense, you don't learn the exact location, but can narrow down the source to within a 5-foot cube (or the nearest if larger than that).

Tremorsense (Imprecise) 60 feet.name: 震感（不精确）60 尺 Tremorsense (Imprecise) 60 feet

Earth Glide.name: 土遁 Earth Glide
Earth Glide.description:
沙伊坦可以以其完整的掘地速度通过@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.H6v1VgowHaKHnVlG]{掘地}穿过泥土和岩石，不会留下任何隧道或其经过的痕迹。

The shaitan can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.H6v1VgowHaKHnVlG]{Burrow} through dirt and stone at its full burrow Speed, leaving no tunnels or signs of its passing.

Shove into Stone.name: 推撞入石 Shove into Stone
Shove into Stone.description:
当沙伊坦将一个生物推入一道石质屏障时，目标必须在一次 @Check[type:reflex|dc:22] 豁免中成功，否则会与屏障融合（如同@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.vh1RpbWfqdNC4L3P]{与石合一}）。受害者可以尝试 逃脱（DC 28）。

When the shaitan Pushes a creature into a stone barrier, the target must succeed at a @Check[type:reflex|dc:22] save or become merged with the barrier (as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.vh1RpbWfqdNC4L3P]{One with Stone}). The victim can attempt to Escape (DC 28).

Push 10 feet.name: 推动 10 英尺 Push 10 feet

Arcane Prepared Spells.name: 奥术备战法术 Arcane Prepared Spells

Earthly Tuning Fork.name: 尘世音叉 Earthly Tuning Fork
Earthly Tuning Fork.description:
这把由水晶与钢制成的调谐音叉用于施放位面转移法术时，使目标旅行至土位面。

This crystal and steel tuning fork is used during the casting of a Plane Shift spell that travels the target to the Plane of Earth.

Interplanar Teleport.name: 跨位面传送 Interplanar Teleport
Interplanar Teleport.description:
需求 你拥有一个用于目的地位面的位面钥匙，用作法器

你和你的盟友穿越存在之位面之间的屏障。各个目标移动到另一个位面，例如火焰位面、冥界或外层裂隙。你必须知道目的地位面确实存在，并使用一个由该位面的材料制成的魔法位面钥匙作为该法术的法器。大多数显赫位面的位面钥匙都不常见，正如法术 interplanar teleport 一样；而更晦涩的位面与半位面往往拥有稀有，甚至可能是独一无二的位面钥匙。

该法术极不精确，你会出现在距离各个目标之一（由你选择）上一次该目标旅行到该位面时所在的最后地点 1d20×25 英里处。如果对所有目标而言这都是第一次旅行到某个位面，你会出现在该位面的随机位置。Interplanar teleport 并不提供返程旅行的手段，但再次施放 interplanar teleport 可让你返回你先前的位面，除非存在特殊情况。

Requirements You have a planar key for the destination plane, used as a locus

You and your allies traverse the barriers between planes of existence. The targets move to another plane, such as the Plane of Fire, the Netherworld, or the Outer Rifts. You must know the destination plane exists and use a magic planar key created from material from that plane as a locus for the spell. While the planar keys for most prominent planes are uncommon, just like the spell interplanar teleport, more obscure planes and demiplanes often have rare or possibly even unique planar keys.

The spell is highly imprecise, and you appear 1d20×25 miles from the last place one of the targets (of your choice) was located the last time that target traveled to the plane. If it's the first time traveling to a particular plane for all targets, you appear at a random location on the plane. Interplanar teleport doesn't provide a means of return travel, though casting interplanar teleport again allows you to return to your previous plane unless there are extenuating circumstances.

Revealing Light.name: 显露之光 Revealing Light
Revealing Light.description:
一波魔法之光席卷区域。你可以选择光亮术的外观，例如五彩斑斓、无热的火焰或闪烁的光点。受显形光亮术影响的生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}。如果该生物原本处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}，则它改为获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}。如果该生物因任何其他原因已经处于隐蔽，则它不再处于隐蔽。

大成功或大失败 目标不受影响。

成功 光亮术影响该生物2轮。

失败 光亮术影响该生物1分钟。

大成功或大失败 光亮术影响该生物10分钟。

A wave of magical light washes over the area. You choose the appearance of the light, such as colorful, heatless flames or sparkling motes. A creature affected by revealing light is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled}. If the creature was @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} instead. If the creature was already concealed for any other reason, it is no longer concealed.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The light affects the creature for 2 rounds.

Failure The light affects the creature for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The light affects the creature for 10 minutes.

Illusory Disguise.name: 幻象伪装 Illusory Disguise
Illusory Disguise.description:
你创造一个幻觉，使目标看起来像另一个具有相同体型的生物，并且身高（误差不超过6英寸）与体重（误差不超过50磅）大致相近。该伪装通常足以隐藏其身份，但不足以冒充某个特定个体。该法术会改变其外貌与声音，但不会改变举止。你可以改变其衣物与穿戴物品的外观，例如让其护甲看起来像一件裙子。手持物品不受影响，且任何从生物身上移除的穿戴物品都会恢复其真实外观。

施放幻象伪装视为为欺骗的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{冒充}用途设置伪装；它会忽略目标在将自己伪装成不同生物时可能承受的任何环境减值，给予用于防止他人看穿伪装的欺骗检定+4状态加值，并允许目标将其等级加到此类欺骗检定上，即使其未受训。你可以解消该法术。

增幅（3环） 目标可以看起来像任何与其体型相同的生物，甚至是某个特定个体。你必须见过该个体才能复制其外貌，并且必须听过其声音才能复制其声音。

增幅（4环） 你可以以至多10个自愿生物为目标。若你以多个生物为目标，你可以为每个目标选择不同的伪装，但都不能冒充某个特定个体。你可以分别解消每个伪装，或一并全部解消。

增幅（7环） 同4环，但你可以选择能冒充特定个体的伪装。你必须见过该个体才能复制其外貌，并且必须听过其声音才能复制其声音。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3Ktyd5F9lOPo4myk]{法术效果：幻象伪装}

You create an illusion that causes the target to appear as another creature of the same body shape, and with roughly similar height (within 6 inches) and weight (within 50 pounds). The disguise is typically good enough to hide their identity, but not to impersonate a specific individual. The spell changes their appearance and voice, but not mannerisms. You can change the appearance of its clothing and worn items, such as making its armor look like a dress. Held items are unaffected, and any worn item removed from the creature returns to its true appearance.

Casting illusory disguise counts as setting up a disguise for the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate} use of Deception; it ignores any circumstance penalties the target might take for disguising itself as a dissimilar creature, gives a +4 status bonus to Deception checks to prevent others from seeing through the disguise, and lets the target add its level to such Deception checks even if untrained. You can Dismiss this spell.

Heightened (3rd) The target can appear as any creature of the same size, even a specific individual. You must have seen an individual to replicate its appearance, and must have heard its voice to replicate its voice.

Heightened (4th) You can target up to 10 willing creatures. If you target multiple creatures, you can choose a different disguise for each target, but none can impersonate a specific individual. You can Dismiss each disguise individually or all collectively.

Heightened (7th) As 4th, but you can choose disguises that impersonate specific individuals. You must have seen an individual to replicate its appearance, and must have heard its voice to replicate its voice.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3Ktyd5F9lOPo4myk]{Spell Effect: Illusory Disguise}

Detect Metal.name: 侦测金属 Detect Metal
Detect Metal.description:
你使自己与磁场共鸣，察觉该区域内金属物体、矿脉与矿藏的存在或缺失。你可以选择忽略你已完全知晓的金属，例如你与盟友所穿戴与携带的道具。

你只能侦测到被幻术（例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{隐形术}）所@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐藏}的金属，前提是该幻术的阶位低于你的侦测金属法术。对抗欺骗性幻术时，若将非金属物体伪装成金属，侦测金属总会注意到金属的缺失。然而，若欺骗涉及将一种金属物体伪装成另一种金属物体，例如假装一枚铜币是由黄金制成，侦测金属只会记录到金属的存在，而非其类型，即使你的侦测金属法术阶位高于该幻术效果。

升阶（3环）你可以辨别你所侦测到的所有金属类型。若魔法效果的阶位低于你的侦测金属法术，你的法术可以克服将一种金属伪装成另一种金属的欺骗性幻术法术。

You attune yourself to magnetic fields, becoming aware of the presence or absence of metallic objects, veins, and deposits within the area. You can choose to ignore metal you're fully aware of, such as the gear you and your allies wear and carry.

You detect metal @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} by illusions (such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility}) only if the illusion has a lower rank than your detect metal spell. Against deceptive illusions, detect metal always notices an absence of metal when a non-metallic object is disguised as metallic. However, if the deception involves disguising one metallic object as another, such as pretending a copper coin is made of gold, detect metal registers only the presence of metal, not its type, even if the rank of your detect metal spell exceeds that of the illusion effect.

Heightened (3rd) You can discern all types of metal you detected. Your spell can overcome deceptive illusory spells hiding one metal as another if the magic effect's rank is lower than that of your detect metal spell.

Glass Shield.name: 玻璃护盾术 Glass Shield
Glass Shield.description:
你召唤出一层透明玻璃保护你免受伤害。此戏法如同 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.TVKNbcgTee19PXZR]{护盾术} 法术般运作，但其硬度为2且有4点生命值。若此护盾术被击破，且击破者在5尺内，则其必须成功通过一次基础反射豁免，否则会因玻璃碎片而受到 @Damage[1d4[piercing]] 伤害。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.oDDS6D2KTjpbA491]{法术效果：玻璃护盾术}

升阶（3环） 护盾术的硬度为4且有8点生命值，并且伤害提高至1d4 + 你的施法属性调整值。

升阶（5环） 护盾术的硬度为7且有16点生命值，并且伤害提高至2d4 + 你的施法属性调整值。

升阶（7环） 护盾术的硬度为10且有24点生命值，并且伤害提高至3d4 + 你的施法属性调整值。

升阶（9环） 护盾术的硬度为12且有32点生命值，并且伤害提高至4d4 + 你的施法属性调整值。eld

You summon a layer of clear glass to keep you from harm. This cantrip functions as the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.TVKNbcgTee19PXZR]{Shield} spell, except it has Hardness 2 and 4 Hit Points. If this shield breaks, provided the breaker is within 5 feet, they must succeed at a basic Reflex save or take @Damage[1d4[piercing]] damage from the glass shards.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.oDDS6D2KTjpbA491]{Spell Effect: Glass Shield}

Heightened (3rd) The shield has Hardness 4 and 8 Hit Points, and the damage increases to 1d4 + your spellcasting attribute modifier.

Heightened (5th) The shield has Hardness 7 and 16 Hit Points, and the damage increases to 2d4 + your spellcasting attribute modifier.

Heightened (7th) The shield has Hardness 10 and 24 Hit Points, and the damage increases to 3d4 + your spellcasting attribute modifier.

Heightened (9th) The shield has Hardness 12 and 32 Hit Points, and the damage increases to 4d4 + your spellcasting attribute modifier.eld

Needle Darts.name: 飞针飞镖 Needle Darts
Needle Darts.description:
你将你所持有的一块金属塑造成三根针，并将它们以紧密编队射向一个目标。对你的目标的 AC 进行一次法术攻击掷骰。针造成 3d4 穿刺伤害，并可能导致流血。

针会传递构成它们的金属的任何特殊属性；例如，冷铁针会对具有冷铁弱点的生物造成额外伤害。所有针都由同一种金属制成，并且在攻击后金属会回到你手中。

大成功或大失败 目标承受双倍伤害，并承受 [[/r (@item.level)[bleed]]] 伤害。

成功 目标承受全额伤害。

升阶 (+1) 你会额外发射一根针，使普通伤害增加 1d4，并使一次大成功或大失败命中时的持续性流血伤害增加 1。

You shape three needles out of a piece of metal in your possession and send them flying in a tight group toward one target. Make a spell attack roll against your target's AC. The needles deal 3d4 piercing damage and might cause bleeding.

The needles impart any special properties of the metal that forms them; for instance, cold iron needles deal additional damage to creatures with weakness to cold iron. All the needles are made of the same metal, and the metal returns to you after the attack.

Critical Success The target takes double damage and [[/r (@item.level)[bleed]]] damage.

Success The target takes full damage.

Heightened (+1) You send one additional needle, increasing the regular damage by 1d4 and increasing the persistent bleed damage on a critical hit by 1.

Electric Arc.name: 电 弧击 Electric Arc
Electric Arc.description:
一道闪电弧从一个目标跳跃到另一个目标。每个目标受到2d4点电击伤害，并进行一次基础反射豁免。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加1d4点。

An arc of lightning leaps from one target to another. Each target takes 2d4 electricity damage with a basic Reflex save.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Illuminate.name: 照亮 Illuminate
Illuminate.description:
你点燃区域内所有使用火焰提供照明的非魔法光源——例如蜡烛、灯具和壁灯。你可以选择使放射小于其最大范围，缩小至你选择的任意距离。若某个光源由一名不愿意的生物看管，该生物可以尝试进行一次反射豁免，在光亮变得引人注意之前将其熄灭。

升阶（+1） 最大区域增加10尺。

You light all non-magical light sources in the area that use fire to provide their light—such as candles, lamps, and sconces. You can choose to make the emanation smaller than its maximum, to any distance of your choice. If a light source is attended by an unwilling creature, that creature can attempt a Reflex save to snuff the light out before it becomes noticeable.

Heightened (+1) The maximum area increases by 10 feet.

Conductive Weapon.name: 传导武器 Conductive Weapon
Conductive Weapon.description:
你将强大的电流导入武器的金属中，使该物品命中到的任何人都遭到电击。该目标成为一把+1 震击武器。如果该武器进行一次攻击的任何目标穿着金属护甲或主要由金属构成，则震击符文的电击伤害骰为 1d12。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.WdXLgPashH5in5eB]{法术效果：导电武器}

You channel powerful electric current through the metal of a weapon, zapping anyone the item hits. The target becomes a +1 shock weapon. If any target of an attack with the weapon is wearing metal armor or is primarily made of metal, the electricity damage die from the shock rune is 1d12.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.WdXLgPashH5in5eB]{Spell Effect: Conductive Weapon}

Thunderstrike.name: 雷霆打击 Thunderstrike
Thunderstrike.description:
你召下一条噼啪作响、伴随雷鸣的闪电触须，对目标造成 1d12 电击伤害与 1d4 音波伤害，目标需进行一次基础反射豁免。穿着金属护甲或由金属构成的目标，其豁免承受 –1 环境加值；若被该法术造成伤害，则在 1 轮内成为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}。

强化（+1） 伤害增加 1d12 电击与 1d4 音波。

You call down a tendril of lightning that cracks with thunder, dealing 1d12 electricity damage and 1d4 sonic damage to the target with a basic Reflex save. A target wearing metal armor or made of metal takes a –1 circumstance bonus to its save, and if damaged by the spell is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} for 1 round.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d12 electricity and 1d4 sonic.

Signal Skyrocket.name: 信号烟花火箭 Signal Skyrocket
Signal Skyrocket.description:
你捏起一撮金属粉末与火药，唤出灼热的红色能量直冲天空并爆炸，释放出噼啪作响的轰鸣。随着时间推移，当你不断精进该法术时，你甚至可以为这枚天火火箭定制自己的图案与颜色。

你无法改变火箭的方向或距离——它必须笔直向上飞行，若可能则持续上升至最大射程。若火箭在其最大高度爆炸，在明朗天气条件下，其明亮光照最远可在10英里外看见，而爆炸声最远可在1英里外听见。

若火箭在小于爆发完整体型的封闭空间内爆炸，则区域内的每个生物根据其反射豁免结果承受1d10音波伤害。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物承受一半伤害。

失败 该生物承受全额伤害，并在1轮内处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}状态。

大失败 该生物承受双倍伤害，并在1轮内处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲}状态。

升阶（+1） 音波伤害增加1d10。

With a pinch of metallic powder and gunpowder, you call forth blistering red energy that shoots straight upward into the air and explodes, unleashing a crackling boom. Over time, you might even customize your own pattern and color for the skyrocket as you refine the spell.

You can't change the direction or distance of the rocket-it must go straight up, continuing up to the maximum range if possible. If the rocket explodes at its maximum height, the bright light can be seen up to 10 miles away, and the sound of the explosion can be heard up to 1 mile away under clear weather conditions.

If the rocket explodes in an enclosed space smaller than the full size of the burst, each creature in the area takes 1d10 sonic damage depending on the result of its Reflex save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round.

Heightened (+1) The sonic damage increases by 1d10.

Expeditious Excavation.name: 迅捷挖掘 Expeditious Excavation
Expeditious Excavation.description:
你移除松散的土、尘土、碎石、沙子等（但不包括坚固的石头），体积最多相当于一个边长5英尺的立方体。施放该法术时，任何站在土上方的中型或更小的生物必须尝试一次反射豁免或特技检定。

成功 该生物不受影响，并且可以选择要么无伤害地下到坑中，要么移动到其选择的最近的可用空间。

失败 该生物在其选择的最近的可用空间内坠落 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}，或者若它愿意则坠落进坑中。

大成功或大失败 该生物坠落进由该法术挖掘出的坑中并以 Prone 落地，照常承受坠落伤害。

升阶（+2） 该法术可以额外挖掘一个边长5英尺的土立方体。如果你挖掘了大型生物下方的全部四个5英尺立方体，则它必须如上所述尝试一次反射豁免或特技检定。

You remove loose dirt, dust, gravel, sand, and the like (though not solid stone) up to the size of a 5-foot cube. Any Medium or smaller creature standing atop the earth when the spell is cast must attempt a Reflex save or Acrobatics check.

Success The creature is unaffected and can choose to either descend the pit without damage or move to the nearest available space of its choice.

Failure The creature falls @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} in the nearest available space of its choice, or falls into the pit if it prefers.

Critical Failure The creature falls into the pit excavated by the spell and lands Prone, taking falling damage as normal.

Heightened (+2) The spell can excavate an additional 5-foot cube of earth. If you excavate all four 5-foot cubes beneath a Large creature, it must attempt a Reflex save or Acrobatics check, as above.

Ignite Fireworks.name: 点燃烟花 Ignite Fireworks
Ignite Fireworks.description:
一道耀眼而喧闹的火花与多彩烟火在你的敌人周围爆炸，对10英尺爆发内的生物造成1d8火焰伤害与1d8音波伤害。区域内所有生物都必须尝试一次反射豁免。

大成功或大失败成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物承受一半伤害，并获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}，持续1轮。

失败 该生物承受全额伤害，并目眩3轮。

大成功或大失败失败 该生物承受双倍伤害，承受@Damage[1d4[persistent,fire]]伤害，并目眩1分钟。

升阶（+2） 初始火焰伤害增加1d8，音波伤害增加1d8，且生物在大成功或大失败失败时所承受的持续火焰伤害增加1d4。

A brilliant and clamorous display of sparks and colorful fireworks explode around your enemies, dealing 1d8 fire damage and 1d8 sonic damage to creatures within a 10-foot burst. All creatures in the area must attempt a Reflex save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is dazzled for 3 rounds.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage, takes @Damage[1d4[persistent,fire]] damage, and is dazzled for 1 minute.

Heightened (+2) The initial fire damage increases by 1d8, the sonic damage increases by 1d8, and the persistent fire damage a creature takes on a critical failure increases by 1d4.

Falsify Heat.name: 伪造热量 Falsify Heat
Falsify Heat.description:
你以隐匿之纱遮蔽生命之火的迹象，改变目标表观的体温。此幻觉作用于所有感官，触碰目标的生物可以尝试识破该幻觉。你可以解消该法术。施放该法术时，选择一种幻觉体温。

  • 适中 目标的体温看起来与周围环境相同，使目标在进行唬骗检定以假扮亡灵、冷血生物或无生命的物体（如尸体）时获得+2环境加值。目标也对热视及其他以类似方式感知热量的能力而言为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}。
  • 温暖 目标看起来会散发大量体热，在进行唬骗检定以假扮温血生物时获得+2环境加值。

升阶（4环） 你可以以最多10个生物为目标，且你可以为每个生物选择不同的体温。

You veil the signs of the fires of vitality, altering the target's apparent body temperature. This illusion applies to all senses, and a creature that touches the target can attempt to disbelieve the illusion. You can Dismiss the spell. Choose an illusory body temperature when you cast the spell.

  • Moderate The target's body temperature appears the same as the surrounding environment, giving the target a +2 circumstance bonus to Deception checks to Impersonate an undead, a cold-blooded creature, or an inanimate object (such as a corpse). The target is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} to heatvision and other abilities that sense heat similarly.
  • Warm The target appears to emit substantial body heat, gaining a +2 circumstance bonus to Deception checks to Impersonate a warm-blooded creature.

Heightened (4th) You can target up to 10 creatures, and you can choose a different body temperature for each of them.

Dividing Trench.name: 堑壕分割 Dividing Trench
Dividing Trench.description:
你在周围的地形上挖出一道土沟；该地形必须是土壤、黏土、沙地或其他松软的土，但不能是地板或石头。土沟宽5英尺、深5英尺，最长可达15英尺。你可以塑造土沟的路径，但它必须是一条连续的线。你必须在一处开阔空间中召唤土沟，使其不会穿过任何生物或物体。在土沟内的生物对土沟外的生物拥有掩蔽，而土沟外的生物对土沟内的生物也拥有掩蔽。土沟中的体型特别小的生物，可能会对那些不靠近沟沿的其他生物获得更多掩蔽；反过来，那些生物也可能会对土沟中的小型生物获得更多掩蔽；额外掩蔽（若有）的程度由GM决定。进入或离开土沟需要额外5英尺的移动，但不需要任何形式的检定，也不被视为困难地形。在法术的持续时间结束时，土沟消失，所有在土沟内的生物仍留在其空间内的坚实地面上。

升阶（+2） 土沟的最大长度增加15英尺。

You dig an earthen trench across the surrounding terrain, which must be soil, clay, sand, or other soft earth, but not flooring or stone. The trench is 5 feet wide, 5 feet deep, and up to 15 feet long. You can shape the trench's path, but it must be one continuous line. You must conjure the trench in an open space so it doesn't pass through any creatures or objects. Creatures inside the trench have cover from creatures outside the trench, and creatures outside the trench have cover from creatures inside the trench. Particularly small creatures in the trench might have more cover against other creatures who aren't close to the trench's edge, and in turn, those creatures might have more cover against small creatures in the trench; the GM determines the amount of additional cover, if any. Entering or leaving the trench requires an additional 5 feet of movement but doesn't require any kind of check and isn't considered difficult terrain. At the end of the spell's duration, the trench disappears and all creatures in the trench remain in their spaces on solid ground.

Heightened (+2) The trench's maximum length increases by 15 feet.

Shifting Sand.name: 流沙 Shifting Sand
Shifting Sand.description:
你使地表翻涌。该区域变为困难地形，且区域内的任何踪迹都会被翻搅的地面摧毁。站在该区域内的生物进行 Acrobatics 检定以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.M76ycLAqHoAgbcej]{Balance} 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.21WIfSu7Xd7uKqV8]{Tumble Through}，以及进行 Athletics 检定以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2HJ4yuEFY1Cast4h]{High Jump} 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{Long Jump} 时，承受 -1 状态减值。每轮第一次你维持该法术时，你可以将这片翻涌区域向任意方向移动至多 10 尺。若可能，被该法术定身的生物会与流动沙地一同沿同一方向被带着移动；此移动为强迫移动。进入或在其回合开始时站在流动沙地中的生物必须尝试一次反射豁免。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响，且直到其回合结束前无视该区域的困难地形与对技能检定的减值。

成功 该生物直到其回合结束前无视该区域对技能检定的减值。

失败 该生物在本回合如常受到该法术影响。

大成功或大失败 该生物在法术区域内变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}，直到其 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escapes}。如果该生物已被流动沙地定身，则它还会倒地 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。

强化（5环） 状态减值提升至 -2，且该法术的射程提升至 60 尺。

强化（7环） 状态减值提升至 -3，该法术的射程提升至 60 尺，且该法术的区域提升为 30 尺爆发。

强化（9环） 状态减值提升至 -4，该法术的射程提升至 60 尺，且该法术的区域提升为 40 尺爆发。

You cause the surface to heave. The area becomes difficult terrain and any tracks in the area are destroyed by the churning ground. Creatures standing in the area take a -1 status penalty to Acrobatics checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.M76ycLAqHoAgbcej]{Balance} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.21WIfSu7Xd7uKqV8]{Tumble Through} and Athletics checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2HJ4yuEFY1Cast4h]{High Jump} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{Long Jump}. The first time each round you Sustain the Spell, you can move the churning area up to 10 feet in any direction. Creatures immobilized by the spell are carried along with the shifting sand in the same direction, if possible; this movement is forced movement. Creatures that enter or begin their turn standing in the shifting sand must attempt a Reflex save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected and ignores the area's difficult terrain and penalty to skill checks until the end of its turn.

Success The creature ignores the area's penalty to skill checks until the end of its turn.

Failure The creature is affected normally by the spell this turn.

Critical Failure The creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} within the spell's area until it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escapes}. If the creature was already immobilized by shifting sands, it also falls @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Heightened (5th) The status penalty increases to -2 and the spell's range increases to 60 feet.

Heightened (7th) The status penalty increases to -3, the spell's range increases to 60 feet, and the spell's area increases to a 30-foot burst.

Heightened (9th) The status penalty increases to -4, the spell's range increases to 60 feet, and the spell's area increases to a 40-foot burst.

Pyrotechnics.name: 烟火术 Pyrotechnics
Pyrotechnics.description:
你将一处火焰转变为令人目眩的烟花爆裂或浓厚的呛人烟云之一，在你施放该法术时选择。该法术以一个火源为目标；若其为非魔法火焰且体型为篝火或更小，则立即被熄灭。若该火源是一名生物，则该生物受到1d6点寒冷伤害，且不会被熄灭。

  • 烟花 作为目标的火焰在一个20尺半径爆发区域内爆炸，化作缤纷炫目的、火热发光的空中烟花阵列。每轮你第一次维持该法术时，你可以使烟花的区域向上升高至多20尺，但你无法使该区域进行水平移动。在烟花区域内开始其回合的生物必须尝试一次强韧豁免，随后在1分钟内暂时免疫。

    大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响

    成功 该生物获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled}，持续至其下个回合结束。

    失败 该生物获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded}，持续至其下个回合结束。

    大成功或大失败 该生物获得Blinded，持续1分钟。

  • 烟云 浓烟从火焰中翻涌而出并凝聚成云团，扩散以填满以目标火焰为中心的20尺半径爆发区域。处于烟云内的生物进行视觉察觉检定时承受-4环境减值；处于烟云外的生物进行视觉察觉检定以察觉烟云内的生物或物体时，也承受-4环境减值。每轮你第一次维持该法术时，你可以使烟云向下下降至多20尺，但你无法使该区域进行水平移动。在烟云内开始其回合的生物必须尝试一次强韧豁免，随后在1分钟内暂时免疫。

    成功 该生物不受影响。

    失败 该生物获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心（状态） 1}。

    大成功或大失败 该生物获得恶心（状态）1，且在烟云的区域内时无法从恶心（状态）中恢复。

You turn a fire into either a burst of blinding fireworks or a thick cloud of choking smoke, chosen when you Cast the Spell. The spell targets one fire source, which is immediately extinguished if it is a non-magical fire the size of a campfire or smaller. If the fire source is a creature, the creature takes 1d6 points of cold damage and is not extinguished.

  • Fireworks The targeted fire explodes into a colorful array of flashy, fiery, glowing aerial fireworks in a 20-foot-radius burst. The first time you Sustain the Spell each round, you can cause the area of fireworks to ascend up to 20 feet, but you cannot move the area laterally. Creatures that start their turn within the area of the fireworks must attempt a Fortitude save, and are then temporarily immune for 1 minute.

    Critical Success The creature is unaffected

    Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} until the end of its next turn.

    Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} until the end of its next turn.

    Critical Failure The creature is Blinded for 1 minute.

  • Smoke Cloud Thick smoke billows out from the fire and coalesces into a cloud that spreads to fill a 20-foot-radius burst centered on the targeted fire. Creatures within the smoke cloud take a -4 circumstance penalty to visual Perception checks, and creatures outside the smoke cloud take a -4 circumstance penalty to visual Perception checks to detect creatures or objects within it. The first time you Sustain the Spell each round, you can cause the smoke cloud to descend up to 20 feet, but you cannot move the area laterally. Creatures that start their turn within the smoke cloud must attempt a Fortitude save, and are then temporarily immune for 1 minute.

    Success The creature is unaffected.

    Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

    Critical Failure The creature is Sickened 1 and cannot recover from the sickened condition while in the area of the smoke cloud.

Shape Stone.name: 塑石术 Shape Stone
Shape Stone.description:
你将石头塑造成你选择的一种粗略形状。塑形过程过于粗糙，无法制作精密部件、细微细节、可动组件或类似结构。任何在你重塑石头时站在石头上的生物都必须各自尝试一次反射豁免或特技检定。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 该生物在石头上倒下，获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。

大失败 该生物从石头上跌落（如适用）并倒地，获得Prone。

You shape the stone into a rough shape of your choice. The shaping process is too crude to produce intricate parts, fine details, moving pieces, or the like. Any creatures standing atop the stone when you reshape it must each attempt a Reflex save or Acrobatics check.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature falls @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} atop the stone.

Critical Failure The creature falls off the stone (if applicable) and lands Prone.

Cozy Cabin.name: 温馨小屋 Cozy Cabin
Cozy Cabin.description:
你塑造出一间每边20尺、10尺高的小屋。这间小屋具有构造物（特征），并且与创造构造物的魔法物品具有相同的限制。小屋的墙壁简朴且由木材制成，带有小型的方形玻璃窗，并有一扇木门。它不包含自带的锁，但有一个可安装锁具的扣件。

内部包含三张行军床、一个便壶，以及一个小壁炉，里面燃着魔法火焰。内部由一盏小型魔法光亮术照明，你可以使用维持动作随意点亮或熄灭。小屋内的气候舒适，使其中的生物能够抵御大多数敌对天气状态，但极端的高温或严寒、强力风暴，以及达到或高于飓风强度的风会摧毁小屋。其他生物可以自由进出小屋而不会损坏它，但如果你离开小屋，该法术结束。你可以【解消】该法术。

You shape a cabin 20 feet on each side and 10 feet high. This cabin has the structure trait and the same restrictions as magic items that create structures. The walls of the hut are simple and wooden, with small, square glass windows, and it has one wooden door. It doesn't include its own lock, but it has a fastener to which a lock can be applied.

The interior contains three cots, one chamber pot, and a small fireplace holding a magical fire. The interior is lit with a small magical light that you can light or extinguish at will using a Sustain action. The climate inside the hut is comfortable and allows creatures inside it to withstand most hostile weather conditions, but incredible heat or cold, powerful storms, and winds of hurricane force or greater destroy the hut. Other creatures can freely enter and exit the hut without damaging it, but if you exit the hut, the spell ends. You can Dismiss the spell.

Grasping Earth.name: 攫握之土 Grasping Earth
Grasping Earth.description:
如手一般的岩石与土的突起抓住并掩埋生物。你施放该法术时处于区域内的每个生物，以及在该法术持续时间内于其回合结束时处于区域内的每个生物，都必须尝试一次强韧豁免。你每轮第一次维持该法术时，每个仍被土@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{擒抱}的生物受到@Damage[1d6[bludgeoning]]伤害，而每个被土@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{束缚}的生物受到@Damage[2d6[bludgeoning]]伤害。生物可以尝试@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱}，其检定对抗你的法术DC。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 该生物被土擒抱。

大成功或大失败 失败 该生物被土束缚。

升阶（+2） 你维持该法术时造成的钝击伤害增加：对被擒抱的生物增加1d6，对被束缚的生物增加2d6。

Handlike protrusions of rock and soil grab and bury creatures. Each creature in the area when you cast the spell, and each creature that ends its turn in the area during the spell's duration, must attempt a Fortitude save. The first time each round you Sustain this spell, each creature still @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} by the earth takes @Damage[1d6[bludgeoning]] damage, and each creature @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained} by the earth takes @Damage[2d6[bludgeoning]] damage. A creature can attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape}, rolling against your spell DC.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature is grabbed by the earth.

Critical Failure The creature is restrained by the earth.

Heightened (+2) The bludgeoning damage dealt when you Sustain this spell increases by 1d6 for grabbed creatures and 2d6 for restrained creatures.

Tremorsense.name: 震颤感知 Tremorsense
Tremorsense.description:
你察觉到周围地面中的振动。你获得颤振感知作为一种模糊感官，射程为30英尺。按照颤振感知的常规，你只能在目标与您处于同一表面上时侦测到该生物，并且只有当目标沿着（或掘行穿过）该表面移动时才能侦测到它。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.7cYUiOONB2lZfSaA]{法术效果：颤振感知}

升阶（3环） 该法术的持续时间为1小时。

升阶（5环） 该法术的持续时间为8小时。

You become aware of vibrations in the ground around you. You gain tremorsense as an imprecise sense with a range of 30 feet. As normal for tremorsense, you can detect a creature only if it's on the same surface as you and only if the subject is moving along (or burrowing through) the surface.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.7cYUiOONB2lZfSaA]{Spell Effect: Tremorsense}

Heightened (3rd) The spell's duration is 1 hour.

Heightened (5th) The spell's duration is 8 hours.

Blazing Fissure.name: 炽焰裂隙 Blazing Fissure
Blazing Fissure.description:
一道细长的裂缝撕裂土，喷涌出岩浆，随后迅速闭合。线上的每个生物且站在坚实地面上的生物都受到4d6钝击伤害和6d6火焰伤害，并进行一次反射豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全部伤害，且它倒下 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。

大失败 目标受到双倍伤害，且它倒下趴伏。

升阶（+1）伤害增加1d6钝击和1d6火焰

A thin crack rips through the earth, erupting with magma, then swiftly seals up. Each creature along the line and on solid ground takes 4d6 bludgeoning damage and 6d6 fire damage with a Reflex save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage, and it falls @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Critical Failure The target takes double damage, and it falls prone.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d6 bludgeoning and 1d6 fire

Transmute Rock And Mud.name: 岩石与泥沼变换 Transmute Rock And Mud
Transmute Rock And Mud.description:
你扭曲土石材料的结构，将岩石变为泥浆，或将泥浆变为岩石。当你 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.aBQ8ajvEBByv45yz]{Cast the Spell} 时，从以下两个选项中选择一个。

•岩石化泥 你将区域内非魔法、未经加工且无人看管的石头转化为等体积的泥浆。若你将此法术施放在石质地面上，它会变为困难地形；若产生的泥浆至少有3英尺深，则它为高等困难地形，或生物可以尝试 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.c8TGiZ48ygoSPofx]{Swim} 穿过它（@Check[type:athletics|dc:10|traits:action:swim]）。若泥浆深到生物无法触及底部，该生物必须通过游泳才能在其中移动。若你将此法术施放在天花板上，坠落的泥浆造成 @Damage[8d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害（基础反射豁免），并向外扩散，在半径比原法术区域大10英尺的区域内制造困难地形。一旦岩石被转化为泥浆，该泥浆为非魔法，并会一直存在，直到自然条件使其干燥或以其他方式散开为止。

•泥浆化岩 区域内的泥浆变为未经加工的石头。若生物在泥浆变为石头时身处其中，它们必须尝试一次反射豁免。

大成功 该生物从泥浆中逃脱并位于石头上方，不受影响。

成功 该生物在泥浆变为岩石时爬出，并在石头上方处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} 状态。

失败 该生物部分卡在泥浆中，并处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} 状态，持续1轮或直到其 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escapes}，以先发生者为准。

大失败 该生物完全被卡住。它处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained} 状态，持续1轮或直到其 Escape，以先发生者为准。

升阶（+2） 为区域额外增加一个10英尺立方体，且该立方体与至少一个其他立方体相邻。

You warp the structure of earthen material, turning rock into mud or mud into rock. Choose one of these two options when you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.aBQ8ajvEBByv45yz]{Cast the Spell}.

•Rock to Mud You transform non-magical, unworked, and unattended stone in the area into an equal volume of mud. If you Cast this Spell on a stone floor, it becomes difficult terrain; if the resulting mud is at least 3 feet deep, it is greater difficult terrain, or the creature can try to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.c8TGiZ48ygoSPofx]{Swim} through it (@Check[type:athletics|dc:10|traits:action:swim]). If the mud is deep enough that a creature can't reach the bottom, the creature must Swim to move through it. If you Cast this Spell on a ceiling, the falling mud deals @Damage[8d6[bludgeoning]] damage (basic Reflex save) and spreads out, creating difficult terrain in an area 10 feet larger in radius than the original spell's area. Once the rock is transformed into mud, the mud is non-magical and remains until natural conditions cause it to dry out or otherwise disperse.

•Mud to Rock Mud in the area turns into unworked stone. If creatures are in the mud when it is transformed to stone, they must attempt a Reflex saving throw.

Critical Success The creature escapes the mud and is atop the stone, unaffected.

Success The creature climbs out of the mud as it turns to rock and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} atop the stone.

Failure The creature is partially stuck in the mud and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} for 1 round or until it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escapes}, whichever comes first.

Critical Failure The creature is entirely stuck. It is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained} for 1 round or until it Escapes, whichever comes first.

Heightened (+2) Add an additional 10-foot cube to the area, adjacent to at least one of the other cubes.

Mountain Resilience.name: 山岳韧性 Mountain Resilience
Mountain Resilience.description:
目标的皮肤硬化，如同山崖的岩石。它获得对物理伤害的抗力5，精金除外。每当目标被一次钝击、穿刺或挥砍攻击命中时，山之韧性的持续时间减少1分钟。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.JHpYudY14g0H4VWU]{法术效果：山之韧性}

强化（6环） 抗力提升至10。

强化（8环） 抗力提升至15。

强化（10环） 抗力提升至20。

The target's skin hardens like the stone of a mountain face. It gains resistance 5 to physical damage, except adamantine. Each time the target is hit by a bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing attack, mountain resilience's duration decreases by 1 minute.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.JHpYudY14g0H4VWU]{Spell Effect: Mountain Resilience}

Heightened (6th) The resistance increases to 10.

Heightened (8th) The resistance increases to 15.

Heightened (10th) The resistance increases to 20.

Spells of Earthen Mystery.name: 大地秘法的法术 Spells of Earthen Mystery
Spells of Earthen Mystery.description:
这是沙伊坦的法术书。它至少包含他奥术准备法术中的法术，外加一批其他法术。

This is Shaitan's spellbook. It holds at least the spells in his Arcane Prepared Spells, plus an assortment of others.

Shaitan Wizard.publicNotes:
来自土位面的沙伊坦是骄傲而放肆的巨灵。他们重视体能技能，热爱讨价还价、赌博游戏，以及与金属和石头打交道。他们的母位面遍布巨大的宝石与贵金属矿脉，而勤勉的沙伊坦正是凭借这些丰富的自然资源建立起了庞大的商业帝国。

法术特征

偏好：寒冷、土、电击、火焰、金属、音波、变化系、

禁忌：风、植物、水、木质

每个元素位面都有一种独特的巨灵，而巨灵的身体由与其母位面相对应的元素物质构成：灯灵由风、云与风暴形成；火巨灵是火焰化作血肉；水巨灵是由水构成的存在；而沙伊坦则由金属、宝石与岩石组成。最后，詹恩由四大元素共同构成，是巨灵一族中最弱者。

Hailing from the Plane of Earth, shaitans are proud and brazen genies. They value physical skill and love bargaining, games of chance, and working with metal and stone. Immense gemstones and veins of precious metal crisscross their home plane, and the industrious shaitans have built a vast mercantile empire from these abundant natural resources.

Spell Traits

Desired: cold, earth, electricity, fire, metal, sonic, transmutation, 

Banned: air, plant, water, wood

A unique type of genie exists for each Elemental Plane, and the bodies of genies are formed out of elemental matter corresponding to their native plane: djinn are formed from wind, clouds, and storms; efreet are fire made flesh; marids are beings of water; and shaitans are composed of metal, gems, and stone. Lastly, the jann are formed out of all four elements, and are the weakest of geniekind.
Shaitan Wizard.privateNotes:
沙伊坦巫师由《开拓者怪物图鉴》创建。

 

Shaitan Wizard was created from the Pathfinder Bestiary.
Shaitan Wizard.blurb:
巫师沙伊坦竞技场大宗师
Wizardly Shaitan Arena Grandmaster

Tangletop.name: 鸡窝头 Tangletop

Primal Innate Spells.name: 原初先天法术 Primal Innate Spells

Dimension Door (Self Only).name: 次元门（仅自身） Dimension Door (Self Only)
Dimension Door (Self Only).description:
打开一扇绕过正常空间的门，你会立刻将自己以及你所穿戴和持有的任何物品从你当前的空间传送到射程内你能看见的一处空旷空间。若这会让另一名生物随你一同前往——即使你正把它装在一个异次元容器里携带——该法术会失效。

强化（5环） 射程提升至1英里。你不需要能看见你的目的地，只要你过去去过那里，并且知道它相对于你的位置与距离即可。你会暂时免疫1小时。

Opening a door that bypasses normal space, you instantly transport yourself and any items you're wearing and holding from your current space to a clear space within range you can see. If this would bring another creature with you-even if you're carrying it in an extradimensional container-the spell is lost.

Heightened (5th) The range increases to 1 mile. You don't need to be able to see your destination, as long as you have been there in the past and know its relative location and distance from you. You are temporarily immune for 1 hour.

Dancing Lights.name: 舞光术 Dancing Lights
Dancing Lights.description:
你创造至多四个漂浮的光亮术，且任意两个之间的距离不超过10英尺。每个都像火把一样发光。当你维持该法术时，你可以将任意数量的光亮术移动至多60英尺。每个光亮术必须保持在你120英尺范围内，并且与所有其他光亮术之间的距离不超过10英尺，否则它会熄灭。

You create up to four floating lights, no two of which are more than 10 feet apart. Each sheds light like a torch. When you Sustain the Spell, you can move any number of lights up to 60 feet. Each light must remain within 120 feet of you and within 10 feet of all others, or it winks out.

Mending.name: 修复术 Mending
Mending.description:
你修复目标物品。你每法术阶位为目标恢复5点生命值，这可能会在其被修复至高于该物品的破损阈值时移除@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6dNUvdb1dhToNDj3]{破损（状态）}状态。你无法替换遗失的部件，也无法修复已被完全摧毁的物体。

升阶（2环） 你可以以一个负载为1或更低的非魔法物体为目标。

升阶（3环） 你可以以一个负载为2或更低的非魔法物体为目标，或以一个负载为1或更低的魔法物体为目标。

You repair the target item. You restore 5 Hit Points per spell rank to the target, potentially removing the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6dNUvdb1dhToNDj3]{Broken} condition if this repairs it past the item's Broken Threshold. You can't replace lost pieces or repair an object that's been completely destroyed.

Heightened (2nd) You can target a non-magical object of 1 Bulk or less.

Heightened (3rd) You can target a non-magical object of 2 Bulk or less, or a magical object of 1 Bulk or less.

Prestidigitation.name: 魔法伎俩 Prestidigitation
Prestidigitation.description:
最简单的魔法会听从你的差遣。只要你维持该法术，你就能施展简单的魔法效果。每次你维持该法术时，你可以从四个选项中选择一个。

  • 烹调 使1磅的非生物材料变凉、变暖或调味。
  • 举起 缓慢地 将一件无人持用且负载为轻或更低的物体抬离地面1英尺。
  • 制造 创造一件临时物体，其负载可忽略不计，由凝结的魔法物质制成。该物体外观粗糙且不自然，并且极其脆弱——不能用作工具、武器或法术材料。
  • 整理 为一件负载为轻或更低的物体上色、清洁或弄脏。你可以用10轮专注影响一件负载为1的物体，而更大的物体则每负载需要1分钟。

魔法伎俩无法造成伤害或施加不利状态。对物体造成的任何实际改变（除上述内容之外）仅会在你维持该法术期间持续。

The simplest magic does your bidding. You can perform simple magical effects for as long as you Sustain the Spell. Each time you Sustain the Spell, you can choose one of four options.

  • Cook Cool, warm, or flavor 1 pound of nonliving material.
  • Lift Slowly lift an unattended object of light Bulk or less 1 foot off the ground.
  • Make Create a temporary object of negligible Bulk, made of congealed magical substance. The object looks crude and artificial and is extremely fragile-it can't be used as a tool, weapon, or spell component.
  • Tidy Color, clean, or soil an object of light Bulk or less. You can affect an object of 1 Bulk with 10 rounds of concentration, and a larger object a 1 minute per Bulk.

Prestidigitation can't deal damage or cause adverse conditions. Any actual change to an object (beyond what is noted above) persists only as long as you Sustain the Spell.

Ventriloquism.name: 腹语术 Ventriloquism
Ventriloquism.description:
每当你说话或用嗓音发出任何其他声音时，你可以让你的发声看起来像是从60尺内的其他位置传出，并且在你发声时可以自由改变该表观位置。任何听到该声音的生物都可以尝试识破你的幻觉。

升阶（2环）该法术的持续时间增加至1小时，并且你也可以改变你声音的音调、质感与其他性相。在生物能够尝试识破你的幻觉之前，它必须主动尝试一次察觉检定，或以其他方式使用动作与该声音互动。

Whenever you speak or make any other sound vocally, you can make your vocalization seem to originate from somewhere else within 60 feet, and you can change that apparent location freely as you vocalize. Any creature that hears the sound can attempt to disbelieve your illusion.

Heightened (2nd) The spell's duration increases to 1 hour, and you can also change the tone, quality, and other aspects of your voice. Before a creature can attempt to disbelieve your illusion, it must actively attempt a Perception check or otherwise use actions to interact with the sound.

Baffling Bluff.name: 令人困惑的虚张声势 Baffling Bluff
Baffling Bluff.description:
棕仙的恶作剧可以使一名生物感到困惑并失去方向感。当棕仙使用迷惑虚张声势时，它以30尺内的单一生物为目标；该生物必须尝试一次@Check[type:will|dc:17]意志豁免。

该目标对迷惑虚张声势暂时免疫1分钟。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标短暂受骗，并在棕仙的下一回合结束前，对棕仙接下来对其进行的下一次近战打击处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}。

失败 目标获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused}（状态）1轮。

大失败 目标陷入困惑（状态）1分钟。它可以在其每个回合结束时尝试一次新的豁免，以结束困惑（状态）。

The brownie's antics can confuse and disorient a creature. When the brownie uses Baffling Bluff, it targets a single creature within 30 feet; that creature must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:17] save.

The target is temporarily immune to Baffling Bluff for 1 minute.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is fooled momentarily and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} against the next melee Strike the brownie makes against it before the end of the brownie's next turn.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The target is confused for 1 minute. It can attempt a new save at the end of each of its turns to end the confused condition.

Tangletop.publicNotes:
棕仙把家安在空心树的树干里、小小的泥土洞穴中，甚至在门廊下或农舍的爬行空间内。棕仙常穿着看起来由植物或叶片制成的衣物，并系着一条缀满小袋与工具的腰带。无论它们选择用什么语言说话，往往都夹杂着古怪的发音与口语化的用法。它们的说话方式可能会引用早已在几十年甚至几个世纪前就不再流行的措辞，例如如此；或者它们会以奇怪的方式把比喻混在一起。看起来棕仙似乎是有意采用这些古怪的说话方式——它们肯定不会对纠正其闲谈作出友善反应。惹恼一只棕仙，往往没有比试图纠正它的语法更快的办法。棕仙身高仅略高于2英尺，体重大约20磅。

面对危险时，棕仙很少投入战斗，而更倾向于使攻击者困惑与迷乱，以争取足够的时间用于逃脱。满足于诚实的劳作与亲族的爱，棕仙保持着和平主义的天性；它们骚扰生物也只是为了把对方赶走，或是因受到侮辱而加以惩戒。尽管如此，每一只棕仙都会携带一把刀刃。它们提到自己的剑时带着一丝厌恶，并开玩笑地把刀刃称作自己的“最终把戏”，只在最危急的情况下才会动用。

棕仙诚实得近乎迂腐；它们会随意取用，但总会以劳动偿还其债，或留下某物作为供奉。它们也许会吃掉农夫果园里的一只苹果，却以收获整棵树作为回报。一只棕仙可能吃光窗台上留下的一整块馅饼，然后把厨房收拾整齐或清洗餐具。棕仙可以与一家人同住经年累月而不被发现。知晓家中有棕仙的人家通常会觉得这是一种有益的关系，并会留下几碟牛奶、几块水果、小饰物，有时甚至还有葡萄酒作为赋礼。作为交换，居住其间的棕仙会保持家中整洁、缝补衣物、修理工具，并驱赶害兽与小型掠食者。吹嘘家里有棕仙，是失去它的最佳方式。棕仙不信任狐狸并畏惧狼，它们也会避开有狗的农场。

Brownies make their homes in the trunks of hollow trees, small earthy burrows, and even under porches or within the crawl spaces of farmhouses. Often attired in clothes that appear to be made of plants or leaves, brownies wear belts lined with pouches and tools. Whatever language they choose to speak is often is riddled with odd pronunciations and colloquialisms. Their manner of speaking might call upon turns of phrase that are decades or even centuries out of vogue, for example, or they might mix up their metaphors in strange ways. It almost seems as if brownies adopt these quirky ways of speaking intentionally-certainly they do not react favorably to corrections to their chatter. There's often no swifter way to annoy a brownie than to try to correct its grammar. Brownies stand barely 2 feet tall and weigh about 20 pounds.

When facing danger, brownies rarely engage in combat, preferring instead to confound and confuse their attackers in order to buy enough time for escape. Content with honest toil and the love of their kin, brownies maintain a pacifist nature, harassing creatures only to run them off or punish them for an insult. Despite this nature, all brownies carry a blade. They refer to their swords with a hint of disgust, and jokingly call their blades their "final trick," reserving their use for the direst of circumstances.

Honest to a fault, brownies take freely but always repay their debt through work or leave something behind as an offering. They may eat an apple from a farmer's orchard but harvest the entire tree as repayment. A brownie might eat an entire pie left on a windowsill, only to straighten up the kitchen or wash the dishes. A brownie can share a home with a family for years and years while avoiding detection. A family that is aware of a brownie in their midst usually finds this a beneficial relationship and leaves dishes of milk, pieces of fruit, trinkets, and sometimes even wine as gifts. In exchange, the resident brownie keeps the home clean, mends clothes, repairs tools, and shoos away vermin and small predators. Bragging about having a brownie in the house is the best way to lose one. Brownies distrust foxes and fear wolves, and they avoid farms with dogs.
Tangletop.privateNotes:
这是随《憎恨魔窟》发布的“鸡窝头”角色的一份副本，修改了插图。

This is a copy of the "Tangletop" actor that shipped with Abomination Vaults, with a change of artwork.

Emnala Menhemes.name: 艾娜拉·门赫梅斯 Emnala Menhemes
Emnala Menhemes.tokenName: 艾娜拉·门赫梅斯 Emnala Menhemes

Clothing (High-Fashion Fine).name: 服装（高级时尚·精制） Clothing (High-Fashion Fine)
Clothing (High-Fashion Fine).description:
适合贵族或王室的高级服装由昂贵的织物、贵金属与复杂的图案制成。穿着高级时尚的高级服装时，你在对贵族或其他上层人士进行建立印象的检定上获得+1物品加值。

Fine clothing, suitable for a noble or royal, is made with expensive fabrics, precious metals, and intricate patterns. You gain a +1 item bonus to checks to Make an Impression on nobility or other upper-class folk while wearing high-fashion fine clothing.

Lip Reader.name: 唇读者 Lip Reader
Lip Reader.description:
多年把鼻子伸到不该伸的地方后，这位贵族学会了从远处读唇，其效果如同 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.yUuU9xyotrpwpTyC]{Read Lips} 专长。

After years of sticking their nose where it doesn't belong, the noble has learned to read lips from afar, with the effects of the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.yUuU9xyotrpwpTyC]{Read Lips} feat.

Noble's Ruse.name: 贵族的诡计 Noble's Ruse
Noble's Ruse.description:
频率 每轮一次

效果 该贵族进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.QNAVeNKtHA0EUw4X]{虚招}。若成功，该贵族对目标进行打击。

Frequency Once per round

Effect The noble @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.QNAVeNKtHA0EUw4X]{Feints}. On a success, the noble Strikes the target.

Sneak Attack.name: 偷袭 Sneak Attack
Sneak Attack.description:
贵族对@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}的生物造成额外1d6点精准伤害。

The noble deals 1d6 extra precision damage to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} creatures.

Emnala Menhemes.publicNotes:
令许多人艳羡、也令另一些人厌憎的贵族，散发着自信与优雅。流言蜚语与赌博常是贵族最喜欢的消遣。贵族的日常生活往往是公务与享乐的混合体；在旁观者看来，这样的生活方式似乎不过是一连串的宴席、派对与游戏厅。然而，尽管有些人可能这么认为，贵族的生活往往相当危险，所需的智识远比表面看起来更多——还得带着十足的疑心。

尽管冒险者在危机四伏的地城中穿行、跨越险恶的荒野旅行，但有时他们最终可能置身的最危险之处，却是在贵族的宫廷之中。

Envied by many and detested by still others, nobles exude confidence and gentility. Gossip and gambling are often nobles' favorite pastimes. Day-to-day life for a noble is often a mixture of business and leisure, and to an onlooker, such a lifestyle can appear to be nothing more than a string of meals, parties, and game halls. However, despite what some might believe, life as a noble is often quite dangerous and requires far more intellect than it would appear-along with a healthy dose of suspicion.

Though adventurers travel through perilous dungeons and across treacherous wilderness, sometimes the most dangerous place they can end up is in a noble court.
Emnala Menhemes.privateNotes:
伊姆娜拉·门赫梅斯曾在《憎恨魔窟》冒险路径中被简要提及，并由《游戏主持指南》中 NPC 图库里的贵族条目创建而成。

Imnala Menhemes was briefly mentioned in the Abomination Vaults Adventure Path, and was created from the Noble in the NPC Gallery in the Gamemastery Giude.
Emnala Menhemes.prototypeToken: 艾娜拉·门赫梅斯 Emnala Menhemes

Natanya Rajani.name: 娜塔妮娅·拉贾尼 Natanya Rajani
Natanya Rajani.tokenName: 纳坦娅·拉贾尼 Natanya Rajani

Improvised Crafting Weapon.name: 临时制作武器 Improvised Crafting Weapon

Sneak Attack.name: 偷袭 Sneak Attack
Sneak Attack.description:
工匠看起来如此无害，以至于攻击出人意料。工匠的对手在初次打击时处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} 状态，且若该打击成功，则额外造成 [[/r {1d6}]]{1d6 伤害}。

The crafter appears so innocuous that attacks are unexpected. The crafter's opponent is  @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} for the initial strike, and if the strike is successful, it deals an extra [[/r {1d6}]]{1d6 damage}.

Passive.name: 被动 Passive
Passive.description:
魅力和感知按@UUID[Item.q7rPsdRgQHbPK2DV]{Rajani Family Curse}进行调整。

Charisma and Wisdom are adjusted as per the @UUID[Item.q7rPsdRgQHbPK2DV]{Rajani Family Curse}.

Rajani Family Curse.name: 拉贾尼家族诅咒 Rajani Family Curse
Rajani Family Curse.description:
该诅咒一次只影响一个人。当前的受诅者是纳坦雅·拉贾尼，卡尔曼的母亲。

阶段

豁免检定：无——当受诅者死亡时，诅咒会自动传递给同一代中距离最近的成年拉贾尼；否则传递给下一代中距离最近的成年拉贾尼。

如果没有成年者可用，则潜伏期不会开始，直到最年长的未成年人满十六岁。

诅咒会试图在转移到另一代之前耗尽同一代的所有成员，但它只能转移到在受诅者死亡时靠近他或她的人身上。它也可以转移到配偶身上，但仅限于该婚姻有子女。

潜伏期：1 年

阶段 1：对家庭成员、恋爱对象与挚爱好友的态度变为不关心 - 1年

从此刻起，当受诅者独处时，该诅咒没有效果。此外，受诅者无法对自己施加自我伤害。

阶段 2：对朋友的态度变为不友好 = 1年，且受诅者在对抗魅力时为迟钝 2，在对抗感知时为迟钝 1。

阶段 3：对熟人的态度变为不友好 - 1年，且受诅者在对抗魅力时为迟钝 4，在对抗感知时为迟钝 2。

它不会改变负面态度。

一旦诅咒到达阶段 3，除非以升阶至4环的净化苦难进行对抗，否则它会终生停留在该阶段。施法者DC：28（夜魇鬼婆（特征））。

This curse affects one person at a time. The current cursebearer is Natanya Rajani, Carman's mother.

Stages

Savings Throw: None - when the cursebearer dies, the curse passes automatically to the nearest adult Rajani who is within same generation; otherwise it passes to the nearest adult Rajani in the subsequent generation.

If there are no adults are available, the onset will not begin until the oldest minor is sixteen years old.

The curse will try to exhaust all members of one generation before moving to another, but it can only move to a person who is near the cursebearer at his or her time of death. It can move to a spouse, but only if the marriage produced children.

Onset: 1 Year

Stage 1: Disposition toward family members, romantic attachments and beloved friends changes to Indifferent - 1 year

From this point, the curse has no effect when the accursed is alone. Additionally, the accursed is unable to inflict self-harm.

Stage 2: Disposition toward friends changes to Unfriendly = 1 year, plus the accursed is Stupefied 2 vs. Charisma and Stupefied 1 vs. Wisdom.

Stage 3: Disposition toward acquaintances changes to Unfriendly - 1 year, plus the accursed is Stupefied 4 vs. Charisma and Stupefied 2 vs. Wisdom.

It does not change negative dispositions.

Once the curse reaches Stage 3, it remains at that stage for life unless counteracted with a Cleanse Affliction heightened to Rank 4. Caster DC: 28 (Night Hag).

Natanya Rajani.privateNotes:
此NPC类型是在怪物制作器模块的协助下创建的。

This NPC type was created with the assistance of the Monster Maker module.
Natanya Rajani.prototypeToken: 纳坦娅·拉贾尼 Natanya Rajani

Saamsuma.name: 萨姆苏玛 Saamsuma

Divine Prepared Spells.name: 神圣预备法术 Divine Prepared Spells

Cleric Domain Spells.name: 牧师领域法术 Cleric Domain Spells

Circle of Protection.name: 防护法阵 Circle of Protection
Circle of Protection.description:
你守护一个生物以及其附近的对象，使其免受指定阵营的侵害。选择混乱、邪恶、善良或守序；该法术获得与所选相对的特征。区域内的生物获得+1状态加值至AC，以对抗所选阵营生物的攻击，并获得+1状态加值至豁免，以对抗来自此类生物的效果。若该类生物的效果直接控制目标，或由所选阵营的召唤生物进行的攻击，则该加值提升至+3。所选阵营的召唤生物无法自愿进入该区域，除非其意志豁免成功；重复尝试使用第一次豁免结果。

升阶（4环） 持续时间增加至1小时。

You ward a creature and those nearby against a specified alignment. Choose chaotic, evil, good, or lawful; this spell gains the opposing trait. Creatures in the area gain a +1 status bonus to AC against attacks by creatures of the chosen alignment and to saves against effects from such creatures. This bonus increases to +3 against effects from such creatures that directly control the target and attacks made by summoned creatures of the chosen alignment. Summoned creatures of the chosen alignment can't willingly enter the area without succeeding at a Will save; repeated attempts use the first save result.

Heightened (4th) The duration increases to 1 hour.

Searing Light.name: 灼热光辉 Searing Light
Searing Light.description:
你射出一道炽烈的光线，夹带着神圣能量。进行一次远程法术攻击。该光线造成5d6火焰伤害。若目标是不洁生物或不死生物，你额外造成5d6灵魂伤害。

如果光线穿过一片魔法黑暗区域，或以受魔法黑暗影响的生物为目标，灼热光辉将尝试反制该黑暗。若你需要判断光线是否穿过一片黑暗区域，在你与该法术的目标之间画一条线

大成功 目标承受双倍火焰伤害；若其为不洁生物或不死生物，则也承受双倍善良伤害。

成功 目标承受全额伤害

强化（+1） 火焰伤害提高2d6，且对不洁生物与不死生物的善良伤害提高2d6。

[[/r ((@item.level*2)-1)d6[spirit]]]{分级善良伤害}

You shoot a blazing ray of light tinged with holy energy. Make a ranged spell attack. The ray deals 5d6 fire damage. If the target is a fiend or undead, you deal an extra 5d6 spirit damage.

If the light passes through an area of magical darkness or targets a creature affected by magical darkness, searing light attempts to counteract the darkness. If you need to determine whether the light passes through an area of darkness, draw a line between yourself and the spell's target

Critical Success The target takes double fire damage, as well as double good damage if a fiend or undead.

Success The target takes full damage

Heightened (+1) The fire damage increases by 2d6, and the good damage against fiends and undead increases by 2d6.

[[/r ((@item.level*2)-1)d6[spirit]]]{Leveled Good Damage}

Consecrate.name: 祝圣术 Consecrate
Consecrate.description:
你将一处地点祝圣术给你的神祇，吟诵赞词并创造一处神圣空间。处于该区域内时，你的神祇的崇拜者在攻击掷骰、技能检定、豁免检定以及察觉检定上获得+1状态加值；而对你的神祇而言属于禁忌的生物（例如对@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.QZD0u1jxwz0kj8uI]{法莱斯玛}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.BNycwu3I21dTh4D9]{莎伦莱}而言的不死生物）在这些检定上承受-1状态减值。你的神祇的崇拜者在该区域内进行的攻击额外造成1点你神祇阵营类型之一的伤害（由你选择）；若你的神祇为绝对中立，你不会获得此项增益。

大成功或大失败：成功 祝圣术成功，且其持续时间改为10年而非1年，或覆盖半径加倍的区域。偶尔在你的神祇垂青之下，这可能产生更令人惊叹的效果，例如永久祝圣的区域，或效果覆盖整座大教堂。

成功 祝圣术成功。

失败 祝圣术失败。

大成功或大失败：失败 祝圣术以戏剧性的方式失败并激怒你的神祇，祂会降下不悦的征兆。至少在1年内，进一步尝试祝圣该地点都会失败。

升阶（7环） 被祝圣术的区域也获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XZE4BawIlTf88Yl9]{异界封印}法术的效果，但该效果不会尝试反制由你的神祇的崇拜者进行的传送。花费提高为200 gp × 法术环级。

You consecrate a site to your deity, chanting praises and creating a sacred space. While within the area, worshippers of your deity gain a +1 status bonus to attack rolls, skill checks, saving throws, and Perception checks, and creatures anathema to your deity (such as undead for @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.QZD0u1jxwz0kj8uI]{Pharasma} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.BNycwu3I21dTh4D9]{Sarenrae}) take a -1 status penalty to those checks. Attacks made by worshippers of your deity within the area deal 1 damage of one of your deity's alignment types (your choice); if your deity is true neutral, you don't gain this benefit.

Critical Success The consecration succeeds, and it either lasts for 10 years instead of 1 or covers an area with twice the radius. Occasionally, with your deity's favor, this might produce an even more amazing effect, such as a permanently consecrated area or the effect covering an entire cathedral.

Success The consecration succeeds.

Failure The consecration fails.

Critical Failure The consecration fails spectacularly and angers your deity, who sends a sign of displeasure. For at least 1 year, further attempts to consecrate the site fail.

Heightened (7th) The consecrated area also gains the effects of the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XZE4BawIlTf88Yl9]{Planar Seal} spell, but the effect doesn't attempt to counteract teleportation by worshippers of your deity. The cost increases to 200 gp × the spell level.

Gentle Repose.name: 安息术 Gentle Repose
Gentle Repose.description:
被指定的尸体不会衰败，也不能被转化为亡灵。若该尸体受到某个法术影响，而该法术要求尸体必须在一定时间内死亡（例如复生死者），则不要将「安息」的持续时间计入该时间。此外，该法术还会阻止普通的虫害与害虫（例如蛆虫）啃食尸体。

升阶（5环）该法术的持续时间为无限，但施放该法术需要额外花费1个动作，并需要一个材料成分与一项花费（价值6 gp的防腐液）。

The targeted corpse doesn't decay, nor can it be transformed into an undead. If the corpse is subject to a spell that requires the corpse to have died within a certain amount of time (for example, raise dead), do not count the duration of gentle repose against that time. This spell also prevents ordinary bugs and pests (such as maggots) from consuming the body.

Heightened (5th) The spell's duration is unlimited, but the spell takes one more action to cast and requires a material component and a cost (embalming fluid worth 6 gp).

Silence.name: 沉默术 Silence
Silence.description:
目标不会发出任何声音，使生物无法仅通过听觉或其他感官察觉它。目标无法使用音波攻击，也无法使用带有听觉（特征）的动作。这会阻止其施放包含言语成分的法术。

升阶（4环）法术效果从被触碰的生物身上向外散发，使位于或穿过10尺半径内的所有声音沉寂，并阻止受影响区域内的任何听觉与音波效果。在该半径内，生物会受到与目标相同的效果影响。根据效果的位置，生物可能会注意到没有声音传到它那里（例如，阻隔来自一群同伴的噪音）。

The target makes no sound, preventing creatures from noticing it using hearing or other senses alone. The target can't use sonic attacks, nor can it use actions with the auditory trait. This prevents it from casting spells that include verbal components.

Heightened (4th) The spell effect emanates from the touched creature, silencing all sound in or passing through a 10- foot radius and preventing any auditory and sonic effects in the affected area. While within the radius, creatures are subject to the same effects as the target. Depending upon the position of the effect, a creature might notice the lack of sound reaching it (blocking off the noise coming from a party, for example).

Spiritual Weapon.name: 灵体武器 Spiritual Weapon
Spiritual Weapon.description:
一把由纯粹的魔法力构成的武器具现并攻击你在射程内指定的敌人。该武器呈幽灵般的外观，并以棍棒、匕首或你神祇所偏好的武器的形态显现。

当你施放该法术时，武器出现在你所选的射程内一名敌人旁边，并对其进行一次打击。每次你维持该法术时，你可以将武器移动到射程内一个新的目标（如有需要），并用其进行一次打击。灵体武器使用并计入你的多重攻击减值。

该武器的打击是近战法术攻击。无论其外观如何，该武器造成等同于1d8加上你的施法能力调整值的力场伤害。你可以改为造成该武器通常造成的伤害类型而非力场伤害（或一把多用武器可用的任一伤害类型）。该武器的其他任何数据或特征都不适用，甚至远程武器也只能攻击相邻的生物。尽管进行的是法术攻击，出于触发、抗力等目的，灵体武器仍视为武器。

该武器不占用空间、不提供夹击，也不具有生物所具备的任何其他属性。该武器除其打击外不能进行任何攻击，且影响武器的专长或法术都不适用于它。

升阶（+2） 该武器的伤害增加1d8。

A weapon made of pure magical force materializes and attacks foes you designate within range. This weapon has a ghostly appearance and manifests as a club, a dagger, or your deity's favored weapon.

When you cast the spell, the weapon appears next to a foe you choose within range and makes a Strike against it. Each time you Sustain the Spell, you can move the weapon to a new target within range (if needed) and Strike with it. The spiritual weapon uses and contributes to your multiple attack penalty.

The weapon's Strikes are melee spell attacks. Regardless of its appearance, the weapon deals force damage equal to 1d8 plus your spellcasting ability modifier. You can deal damage of the type normally dealt by the weapon instead of force damage (or any of the available damage types for a versatile weapon). No other statistics or traits of the weapon apply, and even a ranged weapon attacks adjacent creatures only. Despite making a spell attack, the spiritual weapon is a weapon for purposes of triggers, resistances, and so forth.

The weapon doesn't take up space, grant flanking, or have any other attributes a creature would. The weapon can't make any attack other than its Strike, and feats or spells that affect weapons do not apply to it.

Heightened (+2) The weapon's damage increases by 1d8.

Death's Call.name: 死亡的呼唤 Death's Call
Death's Call.description:
触发 你20英尺内的一名活着的生物死亡，或你20英尺内的一名不死生物被摧毁。

看到他者从此世迈向来世使你精神振奋。你获得等于触发生物的等级加上你的施法能力调整值的临时生命值。如果触发生物是不死生物，你获得的临时生命值数量加倍。这些临时生命值持续至法术的持续时间结束；若所有临时生命值更早被耗尽，则法术结束。

Trigger A living creature within 20 feet of you dies, or an undead creature within 20 feet of you is destroyed.

Seeing another pass from this world to the next invigorates you. You gain temporary Hit Points equal to the triggering creature's level plus your spellcasting ability modifier. If the triggering creature was undead, double the number of temporary Hit Points you gain. These last for the duration of the spell, and the spell ends if all the temporary Hit Points are depleted earlier.

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一道脉冲，以登记魔法的存在。你除了知道是否存在魔法之外，不会获得任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你与盟友的魔法物品以及持续中的法术。
