你只有在该魔法的效果等级低于你的侦测魔法法术等级时，才能侦测到幻术系魔法。然而，具有幻术系灵光但外观并不具欺骗性的物品（例如隐形术药水），通常仍会被正常侦测到。

升阶（3环） 你会得知该法术在射程内侦测到的、等级最高的效果所属的魔法学派。若有多个效果同等强大，则由GM决定你得知哪一个。

升阶（4环） 同3环，但你还会锁定等级最高的魔法之来源。与模糊感官类似，你不会得知精确位置，但可以将来源缩小至一个5尺立方体内（若目标大于该尺寸，则为最接近的等效区域）。

You send out a pulse that registers the presence of magic. You receive no information beyond the presence or absence of magic. You can choose to ignore magic you're fully aware of, such as the magic items and ongoing spells of you and your allies.

You detect illusion magic only if that magic's effect has a lower level than the level of your detect magic spell. However, items that have an illusion aura but aren't deceptive in appearance (such as an invisibility potion) typically are detected normally.

Heightened (3rd) You learn the school of magic for the highest-level effect within range that the spell detects. If multiple effects are equally strong, the GM determines which you learn.

Heightened (4th) As 3rd level, but you also pinpoint the source of the highest-level magic. Like for an imprecise sense, you don't learn the exact location, but can narrow down the source to within a 5-foot cube (or the nearest if larger than that).

Disrupt Undead.name: 打击死灵 Disrupt Undead
Disrupt Undead.description:
你用能量刺击目标。你造成1d6正能量伤害加上你的施法能力调整值。目标必须尝试一次基础强韧豁免。若该生物在豁免中大失败，它还会在1轮内处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1}。

强化（+1） 伤害增加1d6。

You lance the target with energy. You deal 1d6 positive damage plus your spellcasting ability modifier. The target must attempt a basic Fortitude save. If the creature critically fails the save, it is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} for 1 round.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Disrupting Weapons.name: 扰乱武器 Disrupting Weapons
Disrupting Weapons.description:
你将正能量注入武器。用这些武器进行的攻击会对不死生物造成额外 1d4 正能量伤害。

强化（3环） 伤害提高至 2d4 伤害。

强化（5环） 目标至多三把武器，且伤害提高至 3d4 伤害。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.X7RD0JRxhJV9u2LC]{法术效果：破邪武器}

You infuse weapons with positive energy. Attacks with these weapons deal an extra 1d4 positive damage to undead.

Heightened (3rd) The damage increases to 2d4 damage.

Heightened (5th) Target up to three weapons, and the damage increases to 3d4 damage.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.X7RD0JRxhJV9u2LC]{Spell Effect: Disrupting Weapons}

Heal.name: 治疗术 Heal
Heal.description:
你引导正能量来治疗活物或伤害亡灵。若目标是自愿的活体生物，你恢复其 1d8 生命值。若目标是亡灵，你对其造成等量的正能量伤害，并且它进行一次基础强韧豁免。你在施放此法术时花费的动作数量决定其目标、射程、区域及其他参数。

1 (姿势) 该法术的射程为接触。

2 (verbal, 姿势) 该法术的射程为 30 尺。若你在治疗活体生物，将恢复的生命值提高 8

3 (材料, 姿势, verbal) 你在 30 尺散发中散布正能量。这以爆发为目标，涵盖其中所有活体与亡灵生物。

升阶（+1） 治疗或伤害的数值提高 1d8，且 2 动作版本的额外治疗提高 8。

You channel positive energy to heal the living or damage the undead. If the target is a willing living creature, you restore 1d8 Hit Points. If the target is undead, you deal that amount of positive damage to it, and it gets a basic Fortitude save. The number of actions you spend when Casting this Spell determines its targets, range, area, and other parameters.

1 (somatic) The spell has a range of touch.

2 (verbal, somatic) The spell has a range of 30 feet. If you're healing a living creature, increase the Hit Points restored by 8

3 (material, somatic, verbal) You disperse positive energy in a 30-foot emanation. This targets all living and undead creatures in the burst.

Heightened (+1) The amount of healing or damage increases by 1d8, and the extra healing for the 2-action version increases by 8.

Light.name: 光亮术 Light
Light.description:
该物体发光，如同火把一般，在20尺半径内投射明亮光照（并在接下来的20尺内提供昏暗光照）。如果你再次将该法术施放于第二个物体上，则第一个物体上的光亮术结束。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.cVVZXNbV0nElVOPZ]{法术效果：光亮术}

升阶（4环） 该物体在60尺半径内投射明亮光照（并在接下来的60尺内提供昏暗光照）。

The object glows, casting bright light in a 20-foot radius (and dim light for the next 20 feet) like a torch. If you cast this spell again on a second object, the light spell on the first object ends.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.cVVZXNbV0nElVOPZ]{Spell Effect: Light}

Heightened (4th) The object sheds bright light in a 60-foot radius (and dim light for the next 60 feet).

Mindlink.name: 讯息传递 Mindlink
Mindlink.description:
你将心智与目标的心智相连，并在瞬间向该目标以心灵方式传递相当于原本需要10分钟才能沟通的信息量。

You link your mind to the target's mind and mentally impart to that target an amount of information in an instant that could otherwise be communicated in 10 minutes.

Read Aura.name: 阅读灵光 Read Aura
Read Aura.description:
你将注意力集中在目标物体上，敞开心灵以感知魔法灵光。当施法完成时，你知道该物品是否具有魔法，而如果具有魔法，你会得知其魔法学派。

如果该物体是幻觉，你只有在该效果的等级低于你的阅读灵光法术的等级时才能侦测到这一点。

升阶（3环）你可以以最多10个物体为目标。

升阶（6环）你可以以任意数量的物体为目标。

You focus on the target object, opening your mind to perceive magical auras. When the casting is complete, you know whether that item is magical, and if it is, you learn the school of magic.

If the object is illusory, you detect this only if the effect's level is lower than the level of your read aura spell.

Heightened (3rd) You can target up to 10 objects.

Heightened (6th) You can target any number of objects.

Shield.name: 护盾术 Shield
Shield.description:
你升起一道魔法力场护盾。这视为使用“举起护盾”动作，使你在下个回合开始前获得 AC +1 环境加值，但不需要空出一只手来使用。

在该法术生效期间，你可以用你的魔法护盾使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{Shield Block} 反应动作（）。该护盾的硬度为 5。你使用 Shield Block 后，法术结束，且你在 10 分钟内无法再次施放它。与普通的 Shield Block 不同，你可以用该法术的反应动作（）来对抗 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gKKqvLohtrSJj3BM]{魔法飞弹} 法术。

升阶该法术会提高该护盾的硬度。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{法术效果：护盾术}

升阶（3环） 该护盾的硬度为 10。

升阶（5环） 该护盾的硬度为 15。

升阶（7环） 该护盾的硬度为 20。

升阶（9环） 该护盾的硬度为 25。

You raise a magical shield of force. This counts as using the Raise a Shield action, giving you a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn, but it doesn't require a hand to use.

While the spell is in effect, you can use the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{Shield Block} reaction with your magic shield. The shield has Hardness 5. After you use Shield Block, the spell ends and you can't cast it again for 10 minutes. Unlike a normal Shield Block, you can use the spell's reaction against the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gKKqvLohtrSJj3BM]{Magic Missile} spell.

Heightening the spell increases the shield's Hardness.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{Spell Effect: Shield}

Heightened (3rd) The shield has Hardness 10.

Heightened (5th) The shield has Hardness 15.

Heightened (7th) The shield has Hardness 20.

Heightened (9th) The shield has Hardness 25.

Spirit Link.name: 灵魂连结 Spirit Link
Spirit Link.description:
你与另一个生物形成精神连接，替它承受痛苦。当你施放此法术以及在你每个回合开始时，如果目标的生命值低于最大值，它恢复2点生命值（或其当前与最大生命值之差，如果该差值更低）。你失去等同于目标恢复的生命值数量。

这是一次精神转移，因此任何会增加目标恢复生命值或减少你失去生命值的效果都不适用。此转移也会忽略你或目标拥有的任何临时生命值。由于该效果不涉及正能量或负能量，即使你或目标是不死生物，spirit link 也能生效。在持续时间内，你无法从再生或快速治疗中获得任何收益。你可以解消此法术，并且如果你在任何时候降至0点生命值，spirit link 会自动结束。

升阶（+1） 每次转移的生命值数量增加2点。

You form a spiritual link with another creature, taking in its pain. When you Cast this Spell and at the start of each of your turns, if the target is below maximum Hit Points, it regains 2 Hit Points (or the difference between its current and maximum Hit Points, if that's lower). You lose as many Hit Points as the target regained.

This is a spiritual transfer, so no effects apply that would increase the Hit Points the target regains or decrease the Hit Points you lose. This transfer also ignores any temporary Hit Points you or the target have. Since this effect doesn't involve positive or negative energy, spirit link works even if you or the target is undead. While the duration persists, you gain no benefit from regeneration or fast healing. You can Dismiss this spell, and if you're ever at 0 Hit Points, spirit link ends automatically.

Heightened (+1) The number of Hit Points transferred each time increases by 2.

Dagger.name: 匕首 Dagger
Dagger.description:
这把小型刃器武器可单手持用，并在近战中用来刺击一名生物。它也可以被投掷。

This small, bladed weapon is held in one hand and used to stab a creature in close combat. It can also be thrown.

Religious Symbol of Pharasma.name: 法莱斯玛的宗教圣徽 Religious Symbol of Pharasma
Religious Symbol of Pharasma.description:
这块木头或银制品上饰有代表某位神祇的图像。一些神圣施法者（例如牧师）可以将其神祇的宗教圣徽作为神圣法器，以使用某些能力并施放一些法术。使用宗教圣徽时，必须将其持于一只手中。

This piece of wood or silver is emblazoned with an image representing a deity. Some divine spellcasters, such as clerics, can use a religious symbol of their deity as a divine focus to use certain abilities and cast some spells. A religious symbol must be held in one hand to use it.

Healing Hands.name: 治疗之手 Healing Hands
Healing Hands.description:
当牧师施放 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{治疗术} 时，他们改为掷d10而非d8。

When the priest casts @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{Heal}, they roll d10s instead of d8s.

Steady Spellcasting.name: 稳定施法 Steady Spellcasting
Steady Spellcasting.description:
如果另一生物的反应动作（）会扰乱牧师的施法动作，则牧师尝试一次 @Check[type:flat|dc:15]。如果牧师成功，则其动作不会被扰乱。

If another creatures reaction would disrupt the priest's spellcasting action, the priest attempts a @Check[type:flat|dc:15]. If the priest succeeds, their action isn't disrupted.

Ghost Oil.name: 幽灵油 Ghost Oil
Ghost Oil.description:
装有这种半透明、无实体感油液的小瓶摸起来总是冰冷。将幽灵油涂抹在你正持用或携带的一把近战武器上，会使其变得半透明并获得一枚@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.JQdwHECogcTzdd8R]{幽冥}符文的效果，但也会使该武器无法对有形生物造成伤害。将该油涂抹在另一名生物的武器上时没有任何效果。该油的效果持续1分钟。

The vials containing this translucent, unsubstantial oil are always cold to the touch. Applying ghost oil to a melee weapon you're wielding or carrying causes it to become semitransparent and gain the effects of a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.JQdwHECogcTzdd8R]{Ghost Touch} rune, but it also makes the weapon unable to harm corporeal creatures. The oil has no effect when applied to another creature's weapon. The effect of the oil lasts for 1 minute.

Ghostbane Fulu.name: 弑鬼符箓 Ghostbane Fulu
Ghostbane Fulu.description:
用法 附着于一把武器

启动 f 想象

触发 你使用被符箓附着的武器成功打击一个虚体生物，但你尚未掷出伤害。

这张白纸符箓以红墨书写，使一把武器与某个虚体生物的灵性本质调谐。启动后，该武器在对抗触发的虚体生物时，于1分钟内获得幽冥武器符文的增益。

Usage affixed to a weapon

Activate f envision

Trigger You successfully Strike an incorporeal creature with the weapon to which the fulu is affixed, but you haven't rolled damage.

This white paper fulu bears red ink and attunes a weapon to the spiritual essence of an incorporeal creature. Upon activation, the weapon gains the benefit of the ghost touch property rune against the triggering incorporeal creature for 1 minute.

Occult Innate Spells.name: 神秘天生法术 Occult Innate Spells

Phase Bolt.name: 相位弩矢 Phase Bolt
Phase Bolt.description:
你指向前方，投射出一道魔法能量的箭矢，它在相位间断续闪烁，直到抵达目标。对你的目标AC进行一次远程法术攻击掷骰；如果目标的AC具有任何环境加值（例如来自护盾术或掩蔽），则在此次攻击中将该加值减少2。在成功时，你造成 @Damage[1d4[piercing]] 伤害加上你的施法能力调整值。在大成功时，目标承受双倍伤害。

升阶（+1） 该箭矢的伤害增加 [[/r 1d4]]{1d4}。

You point your finger and project a bolt of magical energy that stutters in and out of phase until it reaches the target. Make a ranged spell attack roll against your target's AC; if the target has any circumstance bonuses to AC (such as from a shield or cover), reduce that bonus by 2 for this attack. On a success, you deal @Damage[1d4[piercing]] damage plus your spellcasting ability modifier. On a critical success, the target takes double damage.

Heightened (+1) The bolt's damage increases by [[/r 1d4]]{1d4}.

Telekinetic Projectile.name: 念动射弹 Telekinetic Projectile
Telekinetic Projectile.description:
你将一个松散的、无人持用且在射程内的物体（负载为1或更低）掷向目标。对目标进行一次法术攻击掷骰。若命中，你造成钝击、穿刺或挥砍伤害——取决于你掷出的物体——其数值等于1d6加上你的施法能力调整值。被掷出的物品不具有任何会影响该次攻击或伤害的特定特征或魔法属性。

大成功 你造成双倍伤害。

成功 你造成全额伤害。

强化（+1） 伤害增加1d6。

You hurl a loose, unattended object that is within range and that has 1 Bulk or less at the target. Make a spell attack roll against the target. If you hit, you deal bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage-as appropriate for the object you hurled-equal to 1d6 plus your spellcasting ability modifier. No specific traits or magic properties of the hurled item affect the attack or the damage.

Critical Success You deal double damage.

Success You deal full damage.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Investigate Haunting.name: 作祟调研 Investigate Haunting
Investigate Haunting.description:
先决条件 幽灵猎手入门

你擅长察觉幽灵与闹鬼现象的明显征兆。即使你在探索模式下没有进行调查行动，你也能获得一次检定，用以回忆知识，了解区域内活动的无实体不死生物与祟灵。你还获得+2环境加值，用于解除祟灵的技能检定。

Prerequisites Ghost Hunter Dedication

You are skilled at noticing the telltale signs of ghosts and hauntings. Even when you aren't Investigating in exploration mode, you get a check to Recall Knowledge about incorporeal undead and haunts active in the area. You also gain a +2 circumstance bonus to skill checks to disable haunts.

Ghost Strike.name: 幽冥打击 Ghost Strike
Ghost Strike.description:
先决条件 幽灵猎手入门

每日一次，你可以将你携带的一把武器灌注以魔法能量，使其能够对抗无形的不死生物时准确命中。该武器在10分钟内获得幽冥武器符文的效果。到第10等级时，你可以将此效果应用于两把武器而非一把。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.EScdpppYsf9KhG4D]{法术效果：幽冥武器}

Prerequisites Ghost Hunter Dedication

Once per day, you can infuse a weapon you are carrying with magical energies that allow it to strike true against incorporeal undead. The weapon gains the effects of the ghost touch property rune for 10 minutes. At 10th level, you can apply this effect to two weapons instead of one.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.EScdpppYsf9KhG4D]{Spell Effect: Ghostly Weapon}

Ghost Hunter's Codex.name: 幽灵（特征）猎人的法典 Ghost Hunter's Codex
Ghost Hunter's Codex.description:
这本书由@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.QZD0u1jxwz0kj8uI]{法莱斯玛}的一位祭司呈交给获得她青睐之人。

经过为期一周的研读后，这本书将按英雄的决定产生以下效果之一。

  • 它将教授幽灵猎手入门，英雄可以在下一次升级时将其加入自己的职业专长中。
  • 或者，它会立刻重训一项已有的职业专长。

在这段研读期结束后，这本书将化为尘埃。

一旦此人开始遵循幽灵猎手入门，他或她便可自由将其教授给他人。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.mkp6lhBbTASEmKwY]{幽灵猎手入门}

This book is presented by a priest of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.QZD0u1jxwz0kj8uI]{Pharasma} to one who finds her favor. 

After a one week period of study, the book will do one of the following, as the Hero decides.

  •  It will teach the Ghost Hunter Dedication, which the hero can add to his or her class feats at the next level up.
  • Or, it will immediately retrain an existing class feat.

After this period of study, the book will crumble into dust.

Once that person has begun to follow the Ghost Hunter Dedication, he or she is free to teach it to others.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.mkp6lhBbTASEmKwY]{Ghost Hunter Dedication}

Saamsuma.publicNotes:
隐修司祭守护他们的神殿与社群。他们是其神祇教义的坚定守护者，致力于传播教义。他们提供的指引或治疗服务需要以捐献作为代价。

宗教激励虔诚信徒坚守其教义。许多信众试图带来慰藉与希望，但也有人怀有更黑暗的动机。

Cloistered priests safeguard their temples and communities. They are the stalwart keepers of their god's tenets, devoted to spreading the word. Their guidance or healing services come at the cost of a donation.

Religions inspire devout individuals to uphold their tenets. Many of these devotees seek to bring respite and hope, but others have darker motives.
Saamsuma.privateNotes:
Saamsuma 改编自《Pathfinder 游戏主持指南》中的法莱斯玛祭司。

Saamsuma was adapted from the Priest of Pharasma in the Pathfinder Gamemastery Guide.
Saamsuma.blurb:
法莱斯玛的牧师；幽灵（特征）猎人
Cleric of Pharasma; Ghost Hunter

Stewt.name: 炖菜 Stewt

Dagger.name: 匕首 Dagger
Dagger.description:
这把小型刃器武器单手持握，用于在近身战斗中刺击生物。它也可以被投掷。

This small, bladed weapon is held in one hand and used to stab a creature in close combat. It can also be thrown.

Scale Mail.name: 鳞甲 Scale Mail
Scale Mail.description:
鳞甲由许多金属鳞片缝制在加固的皮革衬底上组成，通常制成长衫的形式，用以保护躯干、手臂和腿部。

Scale mail consists of many metal scales sewn onto a reinforced leather backing, often in the form of a long shirt that protects the torso, arms, and legs.

Signal Whistle.name: 信号哨子 Signal Whistle
Signal Whistle.description:
信号哨声响起时，在开阔地形上最远半英里外都能清晰听到。

When sounded, a signal whistle can be heard clearly up to half a mile away across open terrain.

Bolts.name: 弩矢 Bolts
Bolts.description:
弩矢比传统箭矢更短，但结构相似，是弩所使用的弹药。

Shorter than traditional arrows but similar in construction, bolts are the ammunition used by crossbows.

Attack of Opportunity.name: 借机攻击 Attack of Opportunity

Stewt.publicNotes:
卫兵是城镇守夜人或城市卫队中的基层成员，受训以寻找麻烦、制服罪犯并服从命令。他们只能与最为初出茅庐的冒险者和罪犯相匹敌，但随着time推移，定居点通常能召集足够数量的他们来压制大多数威胁。

更大的社会依赖那些拥有权威与能力来解读并执行法律的人。在善良阵营的社会中，这些官员会公正地履行职责。在中立与邪恶阵营的社会中，这些官员可能严厉而残酷（并以调整后的阵营来反映这一点），对那些付不起钱以换取宽恕的人施以严重惩罚。

Guards are rank-and-file members of a town watch or city guard, trained to look for trouble, take down criminals, and follow orders. They are a match for only the most fledgling of adventurers and criminals, but, given time, the settlement can usually muster them in numbers sufficient to neutralize most threats.

Larger societies rely on those with the authority and the ability to interpret and enforce laws. In good-aligned societies, these officials carry out their duties fairly. In neutral and evil ones, these officials can be harsh and cruel (with an altered alignment to reflect this), imposing severe punishments on those who can't pay for mercy.

Ustin Menhemes.name: 乌斯廷·门赫梅斯 Ustin Menhemes
Ustin Menhemes.tokenName: 乌斯廷·门赫梅斯 Ustin Menhemes

Clothing (High-Fashion Fine).name: 服装（高级时尚·精制） Clothing (High-Fashion Fine)
Clothing (High-Fashion Fine).description:
适合贵族或皇室的精美服装由昂贵的织物、贵金属和复杂的纹样制成。穿着高级时尚的精美服装时，你在对贵族或其他上流人士进行建立印象的检定上获得+1物品加值。

Fine clothing, suitable for a noble or royal, is made with expensive fabrics, precious metals, and intricate patterns. You gain a +1 item bonus to checks to Make an Impression on nobility or other upper-class folk while wearing high-fashion fine clothing.

Lip Reader.name: 唇读者 Lip Reader
Lip Reader.description:
在多年把鼻子伸到不该伸的地方之后，这位贵族学会了从远处读唇，具有 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.yUuU9xyotrpwpTyC]{Read Lips} 专长的效果。

After years of sticking their nose where it doesn't belong, the noble has learned to read lips from afar, with the effects of the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.yUuU9xyotrpwpTyC]{Read Lips} feat.

Noble's Ruse.name: 贵族的诡计 Noble's Ruse
Noble's Ruse.description:
频率 每轮一次

效果 该贵族 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.QNAVeNKtHA0EUw4X]{虚招}。若成功，该贵族对目标进行打击。

Frequency Once per round

Effect The noble @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.QNAVeNKtHA0EUw4X]{Feints}. On a success, the noble Strikes the target.

Sneak Attack.name: 偷袭 Sneak Attack
Sneak Attack.description:
贵族对@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}的生物造成1d6额外精确伤害。

The noble deals 1d6 extra precision damage to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} creatures.

Appraising Eye.name: 鉴定之眼 Appraising Eye
Appraising Eye.description:
商人可以使用商业学识来 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 有关物品的信息，包括确定其价值。他们也可以使用商业学识尝试 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.eReSHVEPCsdkSL4G]{辨识魔法}，并且无需先知道该物品是否具有魔法。

The merchant can use Mercantile Lore to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about items, including determining their value. They can also attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.eReSHVEPCsdkSL4G]{Identify Magic} using Mercantile Lore and can do so without first knowing whether the item is magical.

Ustin Menhemes.publicNotes:
被许多人嫉妒、也被其他人厌恶，贵族们散发着自信与优雅。流言蜚语与赌博往往是贵族最喜欢的消遣。贵族的日常生活常常是生意与闲乐的混合；在旁观者看来，这样的生活方式似乎不过是一连串的宴席、派对与游戏厅。然而，尽管有些人可能如此认为，贵族生活往往相当危险，并且需要远比表面看起来更多的智谋——还得带着十足的疑心。

尽管冒险者在险恶的地城中穿行、横越危机四伏的荒野，有时他们最终会来到的最危险之地，却是在贵族宫廷之中。

Envied by many and detested by still others, nobles exude confidence and gentility. Gossip and gambling are often nobles' favorite pastimes. Day-to-day life for a noble is often a mixture of business and leisure, and to an onlooker, such a lifestyle can appear to be nothing more than a string of meals, parties, and game halls. However, despite what some might believe, life as a noble is often quite dangerous and requires far more intellect than it would appear-along with a healthy dose of suspicion.

Though adventurers travel through perilous dungeons and across treacherous wilderness, sometimes the most dangerous place they can end up is in a noble court.
Ustin Menhemes.privateNotes:
乌斯廷·门赫姆斯的灵感来自他的兄弟奥瑟夫，他出现在《憎恨魔窟》冒险路径中，并基于《游戏主持指南》中的贵族创建。

Ustin Menhemes was inspired by his brother, Oseph, in the Abomination Vaults Adventure Path, and was created from the Noble in the Gamemastery Guide.
Ustin Menhemes.prototypeToken: 乌斯廷·门赫梅斯 Ustin Menhemes

DudNoo.name: 杜德努 DudNoo

Attack of Opportunity.name: 借机攻击 Attack of Opportunity

Ancestry, Goblin (Ability Boosts).name: 族裔，地精（能力提升） Ancestry, Goblin (Ability Boosts)
Ancestry, Goblin (Ability Boosts).description:
此NPC为地精族裔

将该NPC的hp减少[[2]]，将该NPC的反射豁免、敏捷与魅力相关的技能检定以及法术伤害提高1，将该NPC的意志豁免、察觉与感知相关的技能检定降低1。

该NPC获得地精（特征）、地精语言与黑暗视觉。其体型变为小型。

从以下列表中为该NPC选择一个地精传承：@Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.CoOrXFrQVHrwnps7]{地精，炭肤}, @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.lmXqsXcds4Mhr4DK]{地精，群食}, @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.4VISujTycO8wnZgF]{地精，铁胃}, @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.wQmL3nfggSWSqkLw]{地精，雪地},  @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.OOSS8ypyWtaCJo2M]{地精，不屈}

This NPC is of Goblin Ancestry

Decrease the NPC's hp by [[2]], increase the NPC's reflex saves, dexterity and charisma based skill checks and spell damage by 1, decrease the NPC's will saves, perception and wisdom based skill checks by 1. 

The NPC gains the Goblin trait, the Goblin language and Darkvision. It becomes size small.

Select a goblin heritage for the NPC from the following list: @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.CoOrXFrQVHrwnps7]{Goblin, Charhide}, @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.lmXqsXcds4Mhr4DK]{Goblin, Hordefodder}, @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.4VISujTycO8wnZgF]{Goblin, Irongut}, @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.wQmL3nfggSWSqkLw]{Goblin, Snow},  @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.OOSS8ypyWtaCJo2M]{Goblin, Unbreakable}

Goblin, Unbreakable.name: 地精，不屈不挠 Goblin, Unbreakable
Goblin, Unbreakable.description:
这个地精可以轻松从伤势中弹跳恢复。它获得额外4点HP，并且当它坠落时，按坠落距离减半来计算坠落伤害。

This goblin can easily bounce back from injuries. It gains 4 additional HP, and when it falls reduce the falling damage as if it had fallen half the distance.

Shield Boss.name: 护盾术突击锥 Shield Boss

Steel Shield.name: 钢盾 Steel Shield
Steel Shield.description:
如同木制盾牌，钢盾有多种形状与体型。尽管比木制盾牌更昂贵，但它们更为耐用。

硬度 HP BT
5 20 10

Like wooden shields, steel shields come in a variety of shapes and sizes. Though more expensive than wooden shields, they are much more durable.

Hardness HP BT
5 20 10

Scale Mail.name: 鳞甲 Scale Mail
Scale Mail.description:
鳞甲由许多金属鳞片缝在加固的皮革衬底上组成，通常呈长衫的形式，保护躯干、手臂和腿部。

Scale mail consists of many metal scales sewn onto a reinforced leather backing, often in the form of a long shirt that protects the torso, arms, and legs.

Raise a Shield.name: 举起护盾术 Raise a Shield
Raise a Shield.description:
需求 你正持用一面护盾术。

你调整护盾术的位置来保护自己。当你已举起护盾术时，你获得其所列的AC环境加值。你的护盾术保持举起状态直到你下一回合开始。

Requirements You are wielding a shield.

You position your shield to protect yourself. When you have Raised a Shield, you gain its listed circumstance bonus to AC. Your shield remains raised until the start of your next turn.

Goblin Scuttle.name: 地精疾窜 Goblin Scuttle
Goblin Scuttle.description:
触发 一名地精盟友以移动动作结束其移动，并停在该地精相邻的位置。

效果 该地精 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.UHpkTuCtyaPqiCAB]{快步}。

Trigger A goblin ally ends a move action adjacent to the goblin.

Effect The goblin @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.UHpkTuCtyaPqiCAB]{Steps}.

DudNoo was created with the assitance of Mercenary Marketplace Volume 1.

KraDup.name: KraDup KraDup KraDup KraDup

Leather Armor.name: 皮革护甲 Leather Armor
Leather Armor.description:
这种护甲由柔韧与定型的煮皮革混合制成，在提供一定防护的同时兼具最大灵活性。

A mix of flexible and molded boiled leather, a suit of this type of armor provides some protection with maximum flexibility.

Sneak Attack.name: 偷袭 Sneak Attack
Sneak Attack.description:
佣兵游荡者对@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}的生物造成[[/r (1d6[precision])]]{1d6额外精确伤害}。

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SneakAttack]

The Mercenary Rogue deals [[/r (1d6[precision])]]{1d6 additional precision damage} to @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} creatures.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SneakAttack]

Mobile.name: 移动端 Mobile
Mobile.description:
当雇佣兵游荡者采取疾步动作并移动其速度的一半或更少时，该移动不会触发反应动作（）。

When the Mercenary Rogue takes a Stride action to move half of its Speed or less, that movement does not trigger reactions.

Feint.name: 虚招 Feint
Feint.description:
需求 你位于你试图进行虚招的目标的近战触及范围内。

你以误导性的花招动作，使对手对你真正的攻击毫无准备。进行一次欺瞒检定，对抗你目标的察觉DC。

大成功 你彻底扰乱敌人对你的防御。直到你下个回合结束前，你对其进行的近战攻击中，目标处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} 状态。

成功 你的敌人上当了，但只是一瞬间。在你当前回合结束前，你对其进行的下一次近战攻击中，目标处于 off-guard 状态。

大失败 你的虚招适得其反。直到你下个回合结束前，在目标对你进行的近战攻击中，你处于 off-guard 状态。

Requirements You are within melee reach of the target you attempt to Feint.

With a misleading flourish, you leave an opponent unprepared for your real attack. Attempt a Deception check against your target's Perception DC.

Critical Success You throw your enemy's defenses against you entirely off. The target is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} against melee attacks that you attempt against it until the end of your next turn.

Success Your foe is fooled, but only momentarily. The target is off-guard against the next melee attack that you attempt against it before the end of your current turn.

Critical Failure Your feint backfires. You are off-guard against melee attacks the target attempts against you until the end of your next turn.

Sneak.name: 潜行 Sneak
Sneak.description:
你可以尝试在成为或保持 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{未被察觉} 的同时移动到另一个位置。疾走至你速度的一半。（如果你拥有对应的移动类型，你可以在掘地、攀爬、飞行或游泳时使用潜行来代替疾走；你必须以该速度的一半移动。）

如果你未被某个生物察觉，且该生物不可能观察到你（对典型生物而言，这包括你处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形} 状态、观察者处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲} 状态、或你在黑暗中且该生物无法在黑暗中视物），那么你在进行潜行检定时掷出的任何大失败都改为失败。若你对该类生物失去掩蔽或高等掩蔽，或不再对其处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 状态，你仍会继续保持未被察觉。

在你的移动结束时，GM 会秘密掷你的 潜行 检定，并将结果与在你移动开始时你对其处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{躲藏} 或未被察觉状态的每个生物的察觉 DC 进行比较。如果你在整个疾走过程中始终对该生物拥有掩蔽或高等掩蔽，你从掩蔽获得对你的潜行检定的 +2 环境加值（或从高等掩蔽获得 +4）。由于你在移动，来自 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{采取掩护} 的加值提升不适用。如果在你的移动结束时，你既不对其处于隐蔽状态，也不对其拥有掩蔽或高等掩蔽，则你不会对该生物进行掷骰。你会自动被该生物 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.1wQY3JYyhMYeeV2G]{被观察到}。

成功 你在移动过程中未被该生物察觉，并在移动结束时仍未被其察觉。

一旦你做出躲藏、潜行或挪步以外的任何事，你立刻变为被观察到。如果你尝试对一个生物进行打击，该生物在那次攻击中仍处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}，随后你变为被观察到。若你做其他任何事，除非 GM 另有裁定，否则你会在行动前一刻变为被观察到。GM 可能允许你执行一个特别不引人注意的动作而不被注意到，可能需要再进行一次潜行检定。如果你说话或发出刻意的大声响，你会变为躲藏而非未被察觉。

如果某个生物使用 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜寻} 且你因此对其变为躲藏，那么若你想再次对该生物变为未被察觉，你必须潜行。

失败 一声暴露行踪的声响或其他迹象泄露了你的位置，但你仍未被看见。你在整个移动过程中都对该生物处于躲藏状态，并在结束时仍如此。

大失败 你被发现了！你在整个移动过程中都被该生物观察到，并在结束时仍如此。如果你是隐形的且先前对该生物处于躲藏状态，那么你不会变为被观察到，而是在整个移动过程中都处于躲藏状态，并在结束时仍如此。

You can attempt to move to another place while becoming or staying @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected}. Stride up to half your Speed. (You can use Sneak while Burrowing, Climbing, Flying, or Swimming instead of Striding if you have the corresponding movement type; you must move at half that Speed.)

If you're undetected by a creature and it's impossible for that creature to observe you (for a typical creature, this includes when you're @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}, the observer is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded}, or you're in darkness and the creature can't see in darkness), for any critical failure you roll on a check to Sneak, you get a failure instead. You also continue to be undetected if you lose cover or greater cover against or are no longer @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} from such a creature.

At the end of your movement, the GM rolls your Stealth check in secret and compares the result to the Perception DC of each creature you were @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} from or undetected by at the start of your movement. If you have cover or greater cover from the creature throughout your Stride, you gain the +2 circumstance bonus from cover (or +4 from greater cover) to your Stealth check. Because you're moving, the bonus increase from @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{Taking Cover} doesn't apply. You don't get to roll against a creature if, at the end of your movement, you neither are concealed from it nor have cover or greater cover against it. You automatically become @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.1wQY3JYyhMYeeV2G]{Observed} by such a creature.

Success You're undetected by the creature during your movement and remain undetected by the creature at the end of it.

You become observed as soon as you do anything other than Hide, Sneak, or Step. If you attempt to Strike a creature, the creature remains @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} against that attack, and you then become observed. If you do anything else, you become observed just before you act unless the GM determines otherwise. The GM might allow you to perform a particularly unobtrusive action without being noticed, possibly requiring another Stealth check. If you speak or make a deliberate loud noise, you become hidden instead of undetected.

If a creature uses @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} and you become hidden to it as a result, you must Sneak if you want to become undetected by that creature again.

Failure A telltale sound or other sign gives your position away, though you still remain unseen. You're hidden from the creature throughout your movement and remain so.

Critical Failure You're spotted! You're observed by the creature throughout your movement and remain so. If you're invisible and were hidden from the creature, instead of being observed you're hidden throughout your movement and remain so.

Goblin, Charhide.name: 地精，炭皮 Goblin, Charhide
Goblin, Charhide.description:
这只地精与火焰有联系。它获得等于其等级一半的火焰抗力（最低为1）。它用于移除持续火焰伤害的纯骰检定DC也为10而非15。

This goblin has a connection to fire. It gains fire resistance equal to half it's level (minimum 1). Its flat check to remove persistent fire damage is also DC 10 instead of 15.

Sneak.description:
你可以尝试在成为或保持 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{未被察觉} 的同时移动到另一个位置。疾走至多你 速度 的一半。（若你具有相应的 移动 类型，你可以在掘地、攀爬、飞行或游泳时使用 潜行 来代替疾走；你必须以该 速度 的一半移动。）

如果你对某个 生物 而言处于未被察觉状态，且该 生物 不可能观察到你（对一般 生物 而言，这包括你处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}、观察者处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲}，或你处于 黑暗 且该 生物 无法在 黑暗 中视物时），则你在对 潜行 进行的 检定 上所掷出的任何 大失败，改为 失败。若你对这类 生物 失去 掩蔽 或 高等掩蔽，或不再对其处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}，你也仍然保持未被察觉状态。

在你的 移动 结束时，GM 会暗掷你的 隐秘 检定，并将结果与在你开始 移动 时你所 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{躲藏} 于其面前或对其未被察觉的每个 生物 的 察觉 DC 进行比较。若在你整个疾走过程中都对该 生物 具有 掩蔽 或 高等掩蔽，你的隐秘 检定 获得来自 掩蔽 的 +2 环境加值（或来自 高等掩蔽 的 +4）。由于你正在移动，来自 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{采取掩蔽} 的 加值 增加不适用。若在你 移动 结束时，你既不对某个 生物 处于隐蔽，也没有针对其的 掩蔽 或 高等掩蔽，则你不会对该 生物 进行 掷骰。你会自动对该 生物 变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.1wQY3JYyhMYeeV2G]{被观察到}。

成功 你在 移动 期间对该 生物 处于未被察觉，并在 移动 结束时仍对其未被察觉。

只要你进行任何非 躲藏、潜行或小步的行为，你就会立刻变为被观察到。若你尝试对一个 生物 进行打击，该 生物 仍会对那次 攻击 处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}，随后你变为被观察到。若你做任何其他事情，除非 GM 另有裁定，否则你会在行动前立刻变为被观察到。GM 可能允许你执行一个尤其不引人注意的动作而不被注意到，可能需要再进行一次隐秘 检定。若你说话或刻意发出很大的噪音，你会变为躲藏而非未被察觉。

若某个 生物 使用 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜寻} 且因此你对其变为躲藏，若你想再次对该 生物 变为未被察觉，你必须进行 潜行。

失败 一个明显的声响或其他迹象暴露了你的位置，不过你仍然未被看见。你在整个 移动 过程中对该 生物 处于躲藏，并在结束时仍然如此。

大失败 你被发现了！你在整个 移动 过程中都被该 生物 观察到，并在结束时仍然如此。若你处于 隐形 且原本对该 生物 处于躲藏，则你不会变为被观察到，而是在整个 移动 过程中都处于躲藏，并在结束时仍然如此。

You can attempt to move to another place while becoming or staying @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected}. Stride up to half your Speed. (You can use Sneak while Burrowing, Climbing, Flying, or Swimming instead of Striding if you have the corresponding movement type; you must move at half that Speed.)

If you're undetected by a creature and it's impossible for that creature to observe you (for a typical creature, this includes when you're @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}, the observer is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded}, or you're in darkness and the creature can't see in darkness), for any critical failure you roll on a check to Sneak, you get a failure instead. You also continue to be undetected if you lose cover or greater cover against or are no longer @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} from such a creature.

At the end of your movement, the GM rolls your Stealth check in secret and compares the result to the Perception DC of each creature you were @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} from or undetected by at the start of your movement. If you have cover or greater cover from the creature throughout your Stride, you gain the +2 circumstance bonus from cover (or +4 from greater cover) to your Stealth check. Because you're moving, the bonus increase from @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{Taking Cover} doesn't apply. You don't get to roll against a creature if, at the end of your movement, you neither are concealed from it nor have cover or greater cover against it. You automatically become @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.1wQY3JYyhMYeeV2G]{Observed} by such a creature.

Success You're undetected by the creature during your movement and remain undetected by the creature at the end of it.

You become observed as soon as you do anything other than Hide, Sneak, or Step. If you attempt to Strike a creature, the creature remains @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} against that attack, and you then become observed. If you do anything else, you become observed just before you act unless the GM determines otherwise. The GM might allow you to perform a particularly unobtrusive action without being noticed, possibly requiring another Stealth check. If you speak or make a deliberate loud noise, you become hidden instead of undetected.

If a creature uses @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} and you become hidden to it as a result, you must Sneak if you want to become undetected by that creature again.

Failure A telltale sound or other sign gives your position away, though you still remain unseen. You're hidden from the creature throughout your movement and remain so.

Critical Failure You're spotted! You're observed by the creature throughout your movement and remain so. If you're invisible and were hidden from the creature, instead of being observed you're hidden throughout your movement and remain so.

Ancestry, Goblin (Ability Boosts).name: 族裔，地精（能力提升） Ancestry, Goblin (Ability Boosts)
Ancestry, Goblin (Ability Boosts).description:
该NPC为地精族裔

将该NPC的hp减少[[2]]，将该NPC的反射豁免、敏捷与魅力相关的技能检定以及法术伤害提高1，将该NPC的意志豁免、察觉以及感知相关的技能检定降低1。

该NPC获得地精（特征）、地精语言以及黑暗视觉。其体型变为小型。

从以下列表中为该NPC选择一个地精传承：@Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.CoOrXFrQVHrwnps7]{Goblin, Charhide}, @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.lmXqsXcds4Mhr4DK]{Goblin, Hordefodder}, @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.4VISujTycO8wnZgF]{Goblin, Irongut}, @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.wQmL3nfggSWSqkLw]{Goblin, Snow},  @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.OOSS8ypyWtaCJo2M]{Goblin, Unbreakable}

This NPC is of Goblin Ancestry

Decrease the NPC's hp by [[2]], increase the NPC's reflex saves, dexterity and charisma based skill checks and spell damage by 1, decrease the NPC's will saves, perception and wisdom based skill checks by 1. 

The NPC gains the Goblin trait, the Goblin language and Darkvision. It becomes size small.

Select a goblin heritage for the NPC from the following list: @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.CoOrXFrQVHrwnps7]{Goblin, Charhide}, @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.lmXqsXcds4Mhr4DK]{Goblin, Hordefodder}, @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.4VISujTycO8wnZgF]{Goblin, Irongut}, @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.wQmL3nfggSWSqkLw]{Goblin, Snow},  @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.OOSS8ypyWtaCJo2M]{Goblin, Unbreakable}

Goblin, Charhide.name: 地精，焦皮地精 Goblin, Charhide
Goblin, Charhide.description:
这个地精与火焰有联系。它获得等同于其等级一半的火焰抗力（最低1）。它用于移除持续性火焰伤害的纯骰检定DC也为10而非15。

This goblin has a connection to fire. It gains fire resistance equal to half it's level (minimum 1). Its flat check to remove persistent fire damage is also DC 10 instead of 15.

Cunning Template [+1].name: 狡诈模板 [+1] Cunning Template [+1]
Cunning Template [+1].description:
这个生物聪明得近乎邪恶，能毫不费力地让它的敌人走向失败。

模板 将该生物的等级提高1。将其奥术、制造、通灵师与社群（技能）技能以及察觉的调整值提高3。将其AC、攻击调整值、DC、豁免，以及所有其他技能调整值提高1。将其打击，以及其他进攻能力的伤害提高1；这不包括法术。

将该生物的HP提高10。此HP调整值会随着基础生物每达到5个等级而再提高5，因此若基础生物为等级5+则变为15，若基础生物为等级10+则变为20，以此类推。

如果该生物是施法者，其戏法会基于该生物的新等级自动成长。

该生物获得以下之一：@Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.dTfDgjVSu5q6HVGq]{狡黠：诡计}动作，或@Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.fdeYmvfA0a4drt96]{狡黠：闪避}反应动作（）。

This creature is wickedly smart, and effortlessly sets up its foes for failure.

Template Increase the creature's level by 1. Increase the modifier for its Arcane, Crafting, Occultist and Society skills and Perception by 3. Increase its AC, attack modifiers, DCs, saving throws and all other skill modifiers by 1. Increase the damage of its Strikes, and other offensive abilities by 1, this does not include spells. 

Increase the creature's HP by 10. This HP adjustment increases by 5 for every 5 levels the base creature has, thus becoming 15 if the base creature is level 5+, 20 if the base creature is level 10+ and so on.

If the creature is a spellcaster the cantrips automatically scale based on the creatures new level. 

The creature gains either the @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.dTfDgjVSu5q6HVGq]{Cunning: Ploy} action or the @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.fdeYmvfA0a4drt96]{Cunning: Sidestep} reaction .

Cunning: Sidestep.name: 狡诈：侧步 Cunning: Sidestep
Cunning: Sidestep.description:
触发 敌人在对该生物进行一次打击的攻击掷骰时失败或大失败，且该生物正被夹击。

该生物将自己摆在一种位置，使其只需少量移动就能迫使夹击它的生物之一替它承受打击。它将此次攻击重定向至它所选择的、正在夹击它的一个生物；该生物不需要在触发此次攻击的触及范围内。攻击者对新的目标重骰该打击的攻击掷骰。

Trigger A foe fails or critically fails the attack roll for a Strike against this creature and this creature is flanked. 

The creature positions itself in such a way that with only a little movement it can force one of the flanking creatures to take the blow in its place. It redirects the attack to a creature of its choice that is flanking it, the creature does not need to be in the reach of the triggering attack. The attacker rerolls the Strike's attack roll against the new target.

Lump of Decayed Flesh Strung on a Neckla.name: 串在项链上的一团腐烂血肉 Lump of Decayed Flesh Strung on a Necklace

Consume Flesh.name: 啃食尸体 Consume Flesh
Consume Flesh.description:
需求 溃烂教徒与一具在过去1小时内死亡的生物的尸体相邻，或携带一块特制的腐烂肉块。

效果 溃烂教徒吞食尸体的一块肉或腐烂肉块并恢复生命值。他们通过食用在过去1小时内死亡的生物的血肉来恢复[[/r 1d6[healing]]]{1d6生命值}，并通过腐烂肉块来恢复[[/r 2d6[healing]]]{2d6生命值}。

教徒只能从任意给定的尸体中恢复生命值一次。

Requirements The Canker cultist is adjacent to the corpse of a creature that died within the last hour, or is carrying a specially prepared lump of decaying flesh.

Effect The Canker cultist devours a chunk of the corpse or the lump of decaying flesh and regains Hit Points. They regain [[/r 1d6[healing]]]{1d6 Hit Points} from consuming the flesh of a creature that died within the last hour, and [[/r 2d6[healing]]]{2d6 Hit Points} from the lump.

The cultist can regain Hit Points from any given corpse only once.

Swift Leap.name: 迅捷跳跃 Swift Leap
Swift Leap.description:
邪教徒跳跃至其速度的一半。此移动不会触发反应动作。

The cultist jumps up to half its Speed. This movement doesn't trigger reactions.

Ghoul Fever.name: 食尸鬼热 Ghoul Fever
Ghoul Fever.description:
豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:20]

阶段 1 携带者且无任何不良效果（1天）

阶段 2 [[/r 2d6[void]]] 伤害，且从所有治疗中恢复的生命值减半（1天）

阶段 3 同阶段 2（1天）

阶段 4 [[/r 2d6[void]]] 伤害，且无法从治疗中获得任何益处（1天）

阶段 5 同阶段 4（1天）

阶段 6 死亡，并于下一个午夜以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.LHHgGSs0ELCR4CYK]{食尸鬼} 的形式复活。

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:20]

Stage 1 carrier with no ill effect (1 day)

Stage 2 [[/r 2d6[void]]] damage and regains half as many Hit Points from all healing (1 day)

Stage 3 as stage 2 (1 day)

Stage 4 [[/r 2d6[void]]] damage and gains no benefit from healing (1 day)

Stage 5 as stage 4 (1 day)

Stage 6 dead, and rises as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.LHHgGSs0ELCR4CYK]{Ghoul} the next midnight.

Paralysis.name: 麻痹 Paralysis
Paralysis.description:
任何活着的、非精灵生物被溃烂教徒的攻击命中时，必须成功通过一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:20] 豁免，否则变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹}。它可以在其每个回合结束时尝试一次新的豁免，并且该DC在每次此类豁免时累计降低1。

Any living, non-elf creature hit by a Canker cultist's attack must succeed at a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:20] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}. It can attempt a new save at the end of each of its turns, and the DC cumulatively decreases by 1 on each such save.

KraDup Ghoul.publicNotes:
KraDup 属于由 PipNee 创建的邪恶地精冒险小队。他们听说在奥塔里有一群地精冒险者，于是决定前往那里，看看能否为自己找到一些冒险。

KraDup belonged to the evil adventuring group of goblins founded by PipNee. They heard about a group of goblin adventurers in Otari, and decided to go to there and see if they could find some adventure for themselves.
KraDup Ghoul.privateNotes:
​KraDup 在《佣兵市场》第 1 卷和《Pathfinder 怪物图鉴》的协助下创建。
​KraDup was created with the assistance of Mercenary Marketplace Volume 1 and the Pathfinder Bestiary.
KraDup Ghoul.prototypeToken: KraDup 食尸鬼（特征） KraDup Ghoul

NoxAg.name: 诺克斯玛瑙 NoxAg

Arcane Spontaneous Spells.name: 奥术自发法术 Arcane Spontaneous Spells

Spellcasting Entries & Ability Scores.name: 施法条目与能力分数 Spellcasting Entries & Ability Scores
Spellcasting Entries & Ability Scores.description:
已提供“预备施法”和“自发施法”的条目，包含与等级相符的 DC 与法术攻击。预备条目默认基于智力的施法，自发条目默认基于魅力的施法，不过这些都可以修改；更改关键属性不会影响 DC。删除你未使用的那个条目。

使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-macros.Macro.dLMmYYevbHCikFnH]{生成随机法术列表} 宏，为你的施法者生成一份法术列表。 

如果你在创建一名不使用基于智力施法的奥术师，你会想要用奥术师的智力属性值替换其主要施法属性值，并相应调整其技能与豁免。对于基于魅力的施法者，你可能会想要选择新的技能，例如用欺骗代替社交。 

Entries for both Prepared and Spontaneous Casting with a level appropriate DC and spell attack have been provided. The Prepared Entry defaults to Intelligence based casting and the Spontaneous Entry defaults to Charisma based casting, although these can be modified changing the key stat will not affect the DC. Delete whichever entry you are not using.

Generate a spell list for your caster using the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-macros.Macro.dLMmYYevbHCikFnH]{Generate a Random Spell List} macro. 

If you are creating an Arcanist that does not use Intelligence based casting you will wish to substitute the Arcanist's intelligence score for its primary casting score, and adjust its skills and saves appropriately.  You may wish to select new skills such as Deception instead of Society for a Charisma based caster.

Ancestry, Goblin (Ability Boosts).name: 族裔，地精（能力强化） Ancestry, Goblin (Ability Boosts)
Ancestry, Goblin (Ability Boosts).description:
该NPC为地精族裔

将该NPC的hp减少[[2]]，将该NPC的反射豁免、敏捷与魅力相关的技能检定以及法术伤害提高1，将该NPC的意志豁免、察觉以及感知相关的技能检定降低1。

该NPC获得地精（特征）、地精语言和黑暗视觉。其体型变为小型。

从以下列表中为该NPC选择一个地精传承：@Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.CoOrXFrQVHrwnps7]{Goblin, Charhide}, @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.lmXqsXcds4Mhr4DK]{Goblin, Hordefodder}, @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.4VISujTycO8wnZgF]{Goblin, Irongut}, @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.wQmL3nfggSWSqkLw]{Goblin, Snow},  @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.OOSS8ypyWtaCJo2M]{Goblin, Unbreakable}

This NPC is of Goblin Ancestry

Decrease the NPC's hp by [[2]], increase the NPC's reflex saves, dexterity and charisma based skill checks and spell damage by 1, decrease the NPC's will saves, perception and wisdom based skill checks by 1. 

The NPC gains the Goblin trait, the Goblin language and Darkvision. It becomes size small.

Select a goblin heritage for the NPC from the following list: @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.CoOrXFrQVHrwnps7]{Goblin, Charhide}, @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.lmXqsXcds4Mhr4DK]{Goblin, Hordefodder}, @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.4VISujTycO8wnZgF]{Goblin, Irongut}, @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.wQmL3nfggSWSqkLw]{Goblin, Snow},  @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.OOSS8ypyWtaCJo2M]{Goblin, Unbreakable}

Goblin, Charhide.name: 地精，炭皮 Goblin, Charhide
Goblin, Charhide.description:
这个地精与火焰有联系。它获得等同于其等级一半的火焰抗力（最低为1）。它为移除持续火焰伤害而进行的纯骰检定的DC也为10，而不是15。

This goblin has a connection to fire. It gains fire resistance equal to half it's level (minimum 1). Its flat check to remove persistent fire damage is also DC 10 instead of 15.

Goblin Scuttle.name: 地精疾窜 Goblin Scuttle
Goblin Scuttle.description:
触发 一名地精盟友以一个移动动作结束其移动并位于该地精相邻处。

效果 该地精 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.UHpkTuCtyaPqiCAB]{快步}。

Trigger A goblin ally ends a move action adjacent to the goblin.

Effect The goblin @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.UHpkTuCtyaPqiCAB]{Steps}.

Eat Fire.name: 噬火 Eat Fire
Eat Fire.description:
触发 你将要受到火焰伤害。

你吞食并摄入火焰，使其对你更不具危害性。你获得火焰伤害抗力 5，直到当前回合结束。在该法术的剩余持续时间内，你可以使用“喷吐烟雾”动作。若你陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{昏迷}、吸气或呼气（这包括说话），则该法术结束。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.BGv44XBGtD4zOJBd]{法术效果：吞火}

喷吐烟雾 1 你呼出残余的烟雾，结束该法术，并在 20 尺内的一个 @Template[type:burst|distance:5] 中制造一团烟雾云。烟雾云内的所有生物处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}，且所有其他生物对他们也处于隐蔽。烟雾持续 1 分钟，或直到被强风吹散。

升阶（+3） 该抗力提高 5。

Trigger You would take fire damage.

You consume and ingest fire, making it less harmful to you. You gain resistance 5 to fire damage until the end of the current turn. During the remaining duration of the spell, you can use the Belch Smoke action. The spell ends if you fall @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}, inhale, or exhale (this includes speaking).

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.BGv44XBGtD4zOJBd]{Spell Effect: Eat Fire}

Belch Smoke 1 You exhale what remains of the smoke, ending the spell and creating a smoke cloud in a @Template[type:burst|distance:5] within 20 feet. All creatures within the smoke cloud are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}, and all other creatures are concealed to them. The smoke lasts for 1 minute or until dispersed by a strong wind.

Heightened (+3) The resistance increases by 5.

Produce Flame.name: 燃火术 Produce Flame
Produce Flame.description:
一团小小的火焰球出现在你手掌中，你可以用它进行近战或远程挥击。对你的目标的AC进行一次法术攻击掷骰。此攻击通常为远程攻击，但你也可以对处于你徒手触及内的生物进行一次近战攻击。

成功时，你造成2d4火焰伤害。大成功时，目标受到双倍伤害，并受到[[/r (@item.level)d4[persistent,fire]]]伤害。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加1d4，且大成功时的持续伤害增加1d4。

A small ball of flame appears in the palm of your hand, and you lash out with it either in melee or at range. Make a spell attack roll against your target's AC. This is normally a ranged attack, but you can also make a melee attack against a creature in your unarmed reach.

On a success, you deal 2d4 fire damage. On a critical success, the target takes double damage and [[/r (@item.level)d4[persistent,fire]]] damage.

Heightened (+1) Increase the damage by 1d4 and the persistent damage on a critical hit by 1d4.

Illuminate.name: 照明 Illuminate
Illuminate.description:
你点燃区域内所有使用火焰来提供光亮的非魔法光源——例如蜡烛、油灯与壁灯。你可以选择让该发散小于其最大范围，缩小到你所选择的任意距离。如果某个光源正被一名不情愿的生物持用，该生物可以尝试进行一次反射豁免，以在光亮变得显眼之前将其熄灭。

升阶（+1） 最大区域增加10尺。

You light all non-magical light sources in the area that use fire to provide their light—such as candles, lamps, and sconces. You can choose to make the emanation smaller than its maximum, to any distance of your choice. If a light source is attended by an unwilling creature, that creature can attempt a Reflex save to snuff the light out before it becomes noticeable.

Heightened (+1) The maximum area increases by 10 feet.

Ignition.name: 点燃 Ignition
Ignition.description:
你弹响手指并指向一个目标，目标开始闷燃。对目标的 AC 进行一次法术攻击掷骰，命中时造成 2d4 火焰伤害。若目标在你的近战触及范围内，你可以选择用火焰进行一次近战法术攻击来代替远程法术攻击，这会将该法术的所有伤害骰提升为 d6。

大成功 目标受到双倍伤害并受到 1d4 持续火焰伤害。

成功 目标受到全额伤害。

升阶（+1） 初始伤害增加 1d4，且大成功时的持续火焰伤害增加 1d4。

[[/r (@item.level)d4[persistent,fire]]]{Leveled Persistent Fire Damage}

[[/r (@item.level)d6[persistent,fire]]]{Leveled Persistent Fire Damage (Melee)}

You snap your fingers and point at a target, which begins to smolder. Make a spell attack roll against the target's AC, dealing 2d4 fire damage on a hit. If the target is within your melee reach, you can choose to make a melee spell attack with the flame instead of a ranged spell attack, which increases all the spell's damage dice to d6s.

Critical Success The target takes double damage and 1d4 persistent fire damage.

Success The target takes full damage.

Heightened (+1) The initial damage increases by 1d4 and the persistent fire damage on a critical hit increases by 1d4.

[[/r (@item.level)d4[persistent,fire]]]{Leveled Persistent Fire Damage}

[[/r (@item.level)d6[persistent,fire]]]{Leveled Persistent Fire Damage (Melee)}

Electric Arc.name: 电 弧击 Electric Arc
Electric Arc.description:
一道闪电弧从一个目标跳跃到另一个目标。每个目标受到 2d4 电击伤害，并进行一次基础反射豁免。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加 1d4。

An arc of lightning leaps from one target to another. Each target takes 2d4 electricity damage with a basic Reflex save.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Shocking Grasp.name: 电击之触 Shocking Grasp
Shocking Grasp.description:
你用噼啪作响的闪电场笼罩你的双手。进行一次近战法术攻击掷骰。命中时，目标受到2d12电击伤害。如果目标穿着金属护甲或由金属制成，你在使用电爪时获得+1环境加值加到你的攻击掷骰上，且目标在命中时还会受到[[/r (1d4+((@item.level)-1))[persistent,electricity]]]伤害。大成功时，使初始伤害加倍，但不使持续伤害加倍。

增幅（+1） 伤害增加1d12，且持续电击伤害增加1。

You shroud your hands in a crackling field of lightning. Make a melee spell attack roll. On a hit, the target takes 2d12 electricity damage. If the target is wearing metal armor or is made of metal, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to your attack roll with shocking grasp, and the target also takes [[/r (1d4+((@item.level)-1))[persistent,electricity]]] damage on a hit. On a critical hit, double the initial damage, but not the persistent damage.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d12, and the persistent electricity damage increases by 1.

Breathe Fire.name: 吐息火焰 Breathe Fire
Breathe Fire.description:
一股火焰从你口中喷涌而出。你对区域内的生物造成2d6点火焰伤害，且其需进行一次基础反射豁免。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加2d6。

A gout of flame sprays from your mouth. You deal 2d6 fire damage to creatures in the area with a basic Reflex save.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Dehydrate.name: 脱水 Dehydrate
Dehydrate.description:
你搅动区域内万物的内在火焰，驱逐水分。区域内所有生物承受 @Damage[1d6[persistent,fire]] 伤害，并进行一次基础强韧豁免；具有水或植物（特征）特征的生物，其结果比它们掷出的成功等级差一级。对某个生物而言，当其持续伤害结束时，该法术对其结束。

受脱水影响的生物在其每个回合结束时，在掷骰尝试从持续伤害中恢复之前，额外进行一次强韧豁免。如果它在上一轮内饮用了水或类似的补水液体，则可以放弃这次额外豁免（饮用通常需要一个单动作）。

成功 该生物不承受额外效果。

失败 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 1}，直到其下个回合结束。

大失败 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 2}，直到其下个回合结束。

升阶（+2） 射程增加10尺，爆发增加5尺，且持续火焰伤害增加[[/r 3d6]]。

You stir the inner fire of all things within the area, driving out moisture. All creatures in the area take @Damage[1d6[persistent,fire]] damage with a basic Fortitude save; creatures with the water or plant traits get a result one degree of success worse than they rolled. The spell ends for a creature when its persistent damage ends.

A creature affected by dehydrate attempts an additional Fortitude save at the end of each of its turns, before rolling to recover from the persistent damage. It can forgo this additional save if it consumed water or a similar hydrating liquid within the last round (drinking typically requires a single action).

Success The creature takes no additional effect.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} until the end of its next turn.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} until the end of its next turn.

Heightened (+2) The range increases by 10 feet, the burst increases by 5 feet, and the persistent fire damage increases by [[/r 3d6]].

Horizon Thunder Sphere.name: 地平线雷鸣球 Horizon Thunder Sphere
Horizon Thunder Sphere.description:
你将魔法能量汇聚于掌心，形成一团凝聚的电球，噼啪作响、隆隆轰鸣，宛如来自不可思议的遥远雷霆。对你的目标的 AC 进行一次远程法术攻击掷骰。若成功，你造成 3d6 电击伤害。若大成功或大失败为成功，目标承受双倍伤害，且在 1 轮内处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}。你在施放此法术时花费的动作数量决定其射程与其他参数。

2 此法术的射程为 30 英尺。

3 此法术的射程为 60 英尺，且在失败时（但非大成功或大失败为失败）造成一半伤害，因为电流会抽打并电击目标。

两轮 若你以 3 个动作施放该法术，你可以避免完成该法术，并在你的下一个回合再花费 3 个动作以进一步强化该法术。若你如此做，在对目标进行攻击后，无论命中与否，闪电球都会爆炸，对目标周围 @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] 内的所有其他生物造成 @Damage[2d6[electricity]] 伤害（基础反射豁免）。此外，你会在 1 分钟内迸发电光，对抓住你、或以徒手打击或非触及近战武器命中你的生物造成 @Damage[1[electricity]] 伤害。

强化（+1） 命中时的初始伤害，以及两轮施放时间的爆发伤害，各自增加 @Damage[2d6[electricity]]，并且当你处于迸发电光状态时，生物若擒抱或命中你所承受的伤害增加 @Damage[1[electricity]]。

You gather magical energy into your palm, forming a concentrated ball of electricity that crackles and rumbles like impossibly distant thunder. Make a ranged spell attack roll against your target's AC. On a success, you deal 3d6 electricity damage. On a critical success, the target takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round. The number of actions you spend when Casting this Spell determines the range and other parameters.

2 This spell has a range of 30 feet.

3 This spell has a range of 60 feet and deals half damage on a failure (but not a critical failure) as the electricity lashes out and jolts the target.

Two Rounds If you spend 3 actions Casting the Spell, you can avoid finishing the spell and spend another 3 actions on your next turn to empower the spell even further. If you do, after attacking the target, whether you hit or miss, the ball of lightning explodes, dealing @Damage[2d6[electricity]] damage to all other creatures in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] around the target (basic Reflex save). Additionally, you spark with electricity for 1 minute, dealing @Damage[1[electricity]] damage to creatures that Grab you or that hit you with an unarmed Strike or a non-reach melee weapon.

Heightened (+1) The initial damage on a hit, as well as the burst damage for two-round casting time, each increase by @Damage[2d6[electricity]], and the damage creatures take if they Grapple or hit you while you're in your sparking state increases by @Damage[1[electricity]].

Heat Metal.name: 灼热金属 Heat Metal
Heat Metal.description:
该法术会将目标金属瞬间加热至炽红。通常这对一件无人持用的金属物品无害，该物品不会进行豁免检定，不过GM可能会裁定与该物体相连的易燃材料会着火或熔化。若你的目标是一件由生物穿戴或携带的物品，或你的目标是一只主要由金属构成的生物，则热量会对该生物造成 @Damage[4d6[fire]] 伤害以及 @Damage[2d4[persistent,fire]] 伤害，该生物必须尝试一次反射豁免检定。

若你的目标是一件由该生物持握的物品，该生物可以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.wQYmDStjdjn0I26t]{Release} 该物品，使其豁免检定结果的成功等级提高一级。持续伤害与该物体相关，并会伤害任何正在持握或穿戴它的生物。若无人持握该物品，则该持续伤害没有效果，但你仍如常继续进行纯骰检定以终止该持续伤害，因为该物品依旧灼热，可能灼伤拾起它的人。

大成功或大失败·成功该生物不受影响。

成功该生物受到一半伤害，且该物体不造成持续火焰伤害。

失败该生物受到全额伤害，且该物体造成全额持续伤害。

大成功或大失败·失败同失败，但该生物受到双倍伤害，且该物体造成双倍持续伤害。

升阶（+1）初始伤害增加2d6，持续伤害增加1d4。

This spell heats the targeted metal to become red-hot for a moment. This is usually harmless to an unattended metal item, which doesn't get a saving throw, though the GM might rule that flammable materials connected to the object catch fire or melt. If you target an item worn or carried by a creature, or you target a creature made primarily of metal, the heat deals @Damage[4d6[fire]] damage and @Damage[2d4[persistent,fire]] damage to the creature, which must attempt a Reflex saving throw.

If you target an item held by the creature, the creature can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.wQYmDStjdjn0I26t]{Release} the item to improve their degree of success by one step from the result of their saving throw. The persistent damage is associated with the object and damages whichever creature is holding or wearing it. It has no effect if no one is holding the item, but you continue to attempt flat checks to end the persistent damage as normal, since the item remains hot and can sear someone who picks it up.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage and the object deals no persistent fire damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and the object deals full persistent damage.

Critical Failure As failure, but the creature takes double damage and the object deals double persistent damage.

Heightened (+1) The initial damage increases by 2d6 and the persistent damage increases by 1d4.

Flame Wisp.name: 火焰微灵 Flame Wisp
Flame Wisp.description:
三团微弱发光的火焰微灵漂浮在你的头周围。每当你用一次打击命中一个生物时，其中一团微灵会猛冲向该生物，造成 1d4 火焰伤害。若你在拥有少于三团微灵时施放带有火焰（特征）的法术，则会出现一团新的微灵。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ei9MIyZbIaP4AZmh]{法术效果：火焰微灵}

强化 (+2) 伤害增加 1d4。

Three faintly glowing wisps of fire float around your head. Each time you hit a creature with a Strike, one of the wisps goes hurtling towards that creature, dealing 1d4 fire damage. If you Cast a Spell with the fire trait while you have fewer than three wisps, a new wisp appears.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ei9MIyZbIaP4AZmh]{Spell Effect: Flame Wisp}

Heightened (+2) The damage increases by 1d4.

Floating Flame.name: 漂浮火焰 Floating Flame
Floating Flame.description:
你创造一团无需燃料即可燃烧，并会按你的命令移动的火焰。火焰对其出现所在方格内的每个生物造成3d6火焰伤害，进行一次基础反射豁免。当你维持此法术时，你可以用浮空术将火焰移动最多10英尺。随后，它会对其飞行过程中任意时刻与之共享空间的每个生物造成伤害。其使用相同的伤害与豁免，并且你每次维持时只掷骰一次伤害。一个特定生物在每轮中只能受到一次漂浮火焰的伤害。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加1d6。

You create a fire that burns without fuel and moves to your commands. The flame deals 3d6 fire damage to each creature in the square in which it appears, with a basic Reflex save. When you Sustain this spell, you can levitate the flame up to 10 feet. It then deals damage to each creature whose space it shared at any point during its flight. This uses the same damage and save, and you roll the damage once each time you Sustain. A given creature can take damage from floating flame only once per round.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Staff of Fire.name: 火焰法杖 Staff of Fire
Staff of Fire.description:
这根法杖看起来像一段被熏黑烧焦的白蜡木。你可以以互动来用这根法杖的尖端接触火把、火绒或可燃物质来点燃火焰。

启动 施法; 效果 你消耗法杖中一定数量的充能，以从其列表中施放一个法术。

  • 戏法 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.6DfLZBl8wKIV03Iq]{Ignition}
  • 1环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.y6rAdMK6EFlV6U0t]{Breathe Fire}

制作需求 提供所有所列法术的所有所列环阶各1次施放。

This staff resembles a blackened and burned length of ashen wood. You can Interact to touch the tip of this staff to a torch, tinder, or a flammable substance to ignite a flame.

Activate Cast a Spell; Effect You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list.

  • Cantrip @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.6DfLZBl8wKIV03Iq]{Ignition}
  • 1st @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.y6rAdMK6EFlV6U0t]{Breathe Fire}

Craft Requirements Supply one casting of all listed ranks of all listed spells.

Explorer's Clothing.name: 探索者服装 Explorer's Clothing
Explorer's Clothing.description:
不穿护甲的冒险者在旅行时会穿着耐用的衣物。尽管这不是护甲并使用你的无甲防御熟练度，它仍然有敏捷上限，并且如果蚀刻了强力符文，还能为AC提供物品加值。

Adventurers who don't wear armor travel in durable clothing. Though it's not armor and uses your unarmored defense proficiency, it still has a Dex Cap and can grant an item bonus to AC if etched with potency runes.

NoxAg.privateNotes:
NoxAg是在《雇佣兵市场》第1卷的协助下创建的。

NoxAg was created with the assistance of Mercenary Marketplace Volume 1.

NoxAg Drider.name: NoxAg 蛛化精灵 NoxAg Drider
NoxAg Drider.tokenName: 地精蛛化精灵 Goblin Drider

Arcane Spontaneous Spells.name: 奥术自发法术 Arcane Spontaneous Spells

Burning Hands.name: 燃烧之手 Burning Hands
Burning Hands.description:
火焰从你的手中喷涌而出。你对区域内的生物造成2d6火焰伤害。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加2d6。

Gouts of flame rush from your hands. You deal 2d6 fire damage to creatures in the area.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Grease.name: 油腻术 Grease
Grease.description:
你 conjure 油腻术，其效果取决于选择区域或目标。

  • 区域 [4 contiguous 5-foot squares] 区域内的所有坚实地面都被油脂覆盖。每个站在油腻表面上的生物必须在一次反射豁免或一次杂技检定（对抗你的法术DC）中成功，否则会跌倒为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。在法术持续时间内，使用一个动作移动到油腻表面上的生物必须尝试一次反射豁免或一次用于保持平衡的杂技检定。进行快步或爬行的生物不必尝试检定或豁免。
  • 目标 [1 负载 1 或更低的物体] 如果你将该法术施放在一个无人持用的物体上，任何试图拾起该物体的人必须在一次杂技检定或反射豁免（对抗你的法术DC）中成功才能这么做。如果你的目标是一个有人持用的物体，则持有该物体的生物必须尝试一次杂技检定或反射豁免。失败时，持有者或使用者在所有涉及使用该物体的检定上承受 -2 环境减值；大失败时，持有者或使用者会松手放开该物品。该物体落在GM选择的一个相邻方格中。如果你将该法术施放在一个穿戴的物体上，则穿戴者在对抗试图擒抱他们的尝试时，其强韧豁免获得 +2 环境加值。

You conjure grease, with effects based on choosing area or target.

  • Area [4 contiguous 5-foot squares] All solid ground in the area is covered with grease. Each creature standing on the greasy surface must succeed at a Reflex save or an Acrobatics check against your spell DC or fall @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. Creatures using an action to move onto the greasy surface during the spell's duration must attempt either a Reflex save or an Acrobatics check to Balance. A creature that Steps or Crawls doesn't have to attempt a check or save.
  • Target [1 object of Bulk 1 or less] If you cast the spell on an unattended object, anyone trying to pick up the object must succeed at an Acrobatics check or Reflex save against your spell DC to do so. If you target an attended object, the creature that has the object must attempt an Acrobatics check or Reflex save. On a failure, the holder or wielder takes a -2 circumstance penalty to all checks that involve using the object; on a critical failure, the holder or wielder releases the item. The object lands in an adjacent square of the GM's choice. If you cast this spell on a worn object, the wearer gains a +2 circumstance bonus to Fortitude saves against attempts to grapple them.

Light.name: 光亮术 Light
Light.description:
该物体发光，像火把一样在20尺半径内投射明亮光照（并在接下来的20尺内提供昏暗光照）。如果你再次将此法术施放在第二个物体上，第一个物体上的光亮术法术结束。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.cVVZXNbV0nElVOPZ]{法术效果：光亮术}

升阶（4环） 该物体在60尺半径内散发明亮光照（并在接下来的60尺内提供昏暗光照）。

The object glows, casting bright light in a 20-foot radius (and dim light for the next 20 feet) like a torch. If you cast this spell again on a second object, the light spell on the first object ends.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.cVVZXNbV0nElVOPZ]{Spell Effect: Light}

Heightened (4th) The object sheds bright light in a 60-foot radius (and dim light for the next 60 feet).

Mage Hand.name: 法师之手 Mage Hand
Mage Hand.description:
你创造一只单独的魔法手，可以是隐形或幽灵般的，它抓住目标物体并将其缓慢移动最多20英尺。由于你正在使物体悬浮，你可以将其向任何方向移动。当你维持该法术时，你可以使物体额外移动20英尺。如果法术结束时物体仍在空中，物体会坠落。

升阶（3环）你可以以一件无人持用且负载为1或更低的物体作为目标。

升阶（5环）射程增加至60英尺，并且你可以以一件无人持用且负载为1或更低的物体作为目标。

升阶（7环）射程增加至60英尺，并且你可以以一件无人持用且负载为2或更低的物体作为目标。

You create a single magical hand, either invisible or ghostlike, that grasps the target object and moves it slowly up to 20 feet. Because you're levitating the object, you can move it in any direction. When you Sustain the Spell, you can move the object an additional 20 feet. If the object is in the air when the spell ends, the object falls.

Heightened (3rd) You can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 1 or less.

Heightened (5th) The range increases to 60 feet, and you can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 1 or less.

Heightened (7th) The range increases to 60 feet, and you can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 2 or less.

Produce Flame.name: 燃火术 Produce Flame
Produce Flame.description:
一团小小的火焰球出现在你的掌心，你可以用它进行近战或在射程内抽击。对你的目标的 AC 进行一次法术攻击掷骰。通常这是一次远程攻击，但你也可以对你徒手触及内的一名生物进行一次近战攻击。

若成功，你造成 1d4 火焰伤害加上你的施法能力调整值。若大成功或大失败，目标承受双倍伤害并承受 [[/r 1d4[persistent,fire]]] 伤害。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加 1d4，且重击时的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.lDVqvLKA6eF3Df60]{持续伤害} 增加 1d4。

A small ball of flame appears in the palm of your hand, and you lash out with it either in melee or at range. Make a spell attack roll against your target's AC. This is normally a ranged attack, but you can also make a melee attack against a creature in your unarmed reach.

On a success, you deal 1d4 fire damage plus your spellcasting ability modifier. On a critical success, the target takes double damage and [[/r 1d4[persistent,fire]]] damage.

Heightened (+1) Increase the damage by 1d4 and the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.lDVqvLKA6eF3Df60]{Persistent Damage} on a critical hit by 1d4.

Tanglefoot.name: 绊足术 Tanglefoot
Tanglefoot.description:
一根覆盖着粘稠树液的藤蔓从无中生有，甩出你的手并缠向目标。对目标进行一次法术攻击。

大成功或大失败 成功目标获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{禁足（状态）}状态，并在1轮内其速度承受-10尺的环境减值。它可以尝试以你的法术DC进行逃脱，以移除该减值与@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{禁足（状态）}状态。

成功目标在1轮内其速度承受-10尺的环境减值。它可以尝试以你的法术DC进行逃脱，以移除该减值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.TwtUIEyenrtAbeiX]{法术效果：绊足术}

失败目标不受影响。

增幅（2环）效果持续2轮。

增幅（4环）效果持续1分钟。

A vine covered in sticky sap appears from thin air, flicking from your hand and lashing itself to the target. Attempt a spell attack against the target.

Critical Success The target gains the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} condition and takes a -10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds for 1 round. It can attempt to Escape against your spell DC to remove the penalty and the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} condition.

Success The target takes a -10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds for 1 round. It can attempt to Escape against your spell DC to remove the penalty.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.TwtUIEyenrtAbeiX]{Spell Effect: Tanglefoot}

Failure The target is unaffected.

Heightened (2nd) The effects last for 2 rounds.

Heightened (4th) The effects last for 1 minute.

Goblin Scuttle.name: 地精疾窜 Goblin Scuttle
Goblin Scuttle.description:
触发 一名地精盟友在地精相邻处以一个移动动作结束。

效果 该地精 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.UHpkTuCtyaPqiCAB]{快步}。

Trigger A goblin ally ends a move action adjacent to the goblin.

Effect The goblin @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.UHpkTuCtyaPqiCAB]{Steps}.

Sustain a Spell.name: 维持一个法术 Sustain a Spell
Sustain a Spell.description:
需求 你至少有一个带有维持持续时间的法术处于激活状态，且你未处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued}

选择一个你正在产生效果的、带有维持持续时间的法术。该法术的持续时间延续至你下一个回合结束。一些法术在你维持它们时，可能会有略微不同或扩展的效果。维持一个法术超过10分钟（100轮）会使该法术结束并使你疲乏，除非该法术列出了不同的最大持续时间（例如“维持至多1分钟”或“维持至多1小时”）。

如果你的维持一个法术动作被扰乱，该法术立即结束。

Requirements You have at least one spell active with a sustained duration, and you are not @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued}

Choose one spell with a sustained duration you have in effect. The duration of that spell continues until the end of your next turn. Some spells might have slightly different or expanded effects if you sustain them. Sustaining a Spell for more than 10 minutes (100 rounds) ends the spell and makes you fatigued unless the spell lists a different maximum duration (such as "sustained up to 1 minute" or "sustained up to 1 hour").

If your Sustain a Spell action is disrupted, the spell immediately ends.

Drider Venom.name: 蛛化精灵毒液 Drider Venom
Drider Venom.description:
豁免 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:23]

最大持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 [[/r 1d8[poison]]] 伤害和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1}

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:23]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 [[/r 1d8[poison]]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1}

Web Trap.name: 网捕 Web Trap
Web Trap.description:
被蛛化精灵的蛛网术攻击命中的生物将陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}并黏在最近的表面上（逃脱 DC 21）。

A creature hit by a drider's web attack is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} and stuck to the nearest surface (Escape DC 21).

Blazing Bolt.name: 炽焰箭矢 Blazing Bolt
Blazing Bolt.description:
你射出一道灼热与火焰之射线。对单一生物进行一次法术攻击掷骰。命中时，目标受到2d6火焰伤害；若为大成功或大失败的命中，则目标受到双倍伤害。

你在施放法术时每额外使用1个动作，便可对另一名不同的目标再发射一道额外射线，最多为3个动作时发射三道射线，分别以三个不同目标为目标。这些攻击各自都会增加你的多重攻击减值，但在你为blazing bolt进行完所有法术攻击掷骰之前，你不会增加你的多重攻击减值。若你以2个或更多动作施放法术，命中时的伤害提高为4d6火焰伤害，且在大成功或大失败的命中时仍造成双倍伤害。

升阶（+1） 对每个目标造成的伤害在1动作版本中增加1d6；在2动作与3动作版本中增加2d6。

You fire a ray of heat and flame. Make a spell attack roll against a single creature. On a hit, the target takes 2d6 fire damage, and on a critical hit, the target takes double damage.

For each additional action you use when Casting the Spell, you can fire an additional ray at a different target, to a maximum of three rays targeting three different targets for 3 actions. These attacks each increase your multiple attack penalty, but you don't increase your multiple attack penalty until after you make all the spell attack rolls for blazing bolt. If you spend 2 or more actions Casting the Spell, the damage increases to 4d6 fire damage on a hit, and it still deals double damage on a critical hit.

Heightened (+1) The damage to each target increases by 1d6 for the 1-action version, or by 2d6 for the 2-action and 3-action versions.

Invisibility.name: 隐形术 Invisibility
Invisibility.description:
目标披覆于幻术之中，变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}。这使其对所有生物而言皆为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{未侦测}，不过这些生物可以尝试寻找目标，从而使其对他们而言改为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐匿}。若目标使用一次敌对动作，则该法术会在该敌对动作完成后结束。

升阶（4环） 该法术持续1分钟，但目标使用敌对动作时不会结束。

Cloaked in illusion, the target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}. This makes it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected} to all creatures, though the creatures can attempt to find the target, making it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} to them instead. If the target uses a hostile action, the spell ends after that hostile action is completed.

Heightened (4th) The spell lasts 1 minute, but it doesn't end if the target uses a hostile action.

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 对所有对抗魔法的豁免获得+1状态加值 +1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic

Arcane Innate Spells.name: 奥术天生法术 Arcane Innate Spells

Dancing Lights.name: 舞光术 Dancing Lights
Dancing Lights.description:
你创造至多四个漂浮的光亮术，彼此之间任意两者的距离都不超过10英尺。每个都像火把一样照明。当你维持该法术时，你可以将任意数量的光亮术移动至多60英尺。每个光亮术必须始终在你120英尺范围内，并且与所有其他光亮术的距离都在10英尺以内，否则它会熄灭。

You create up to four floating lights, no two of which are more than 10 feet apart. Each sheds light like a torch. When you Sustain the Spell, you can move any number of lights up to 60 feet. Each light must remain within 120 feet of you and within 10 feet of all others, or it winks out.

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你释放出一道脉冲，用以登记周遭是否存在魔法。你不会获得除“有无魔法”之外的任何信息。你可以选择忽略你已完全知晓的魔法，例如你与盟友的魔法物品以及持续生效的法术。

你只有在幻术魔法的效果等级低于你的侦测魔法法术等级时，才能侦测到该幻术魔法。然而，带有幻术灵光但外观并不具有欺骗性的物品（例如隐形术药水）通常仍会被正常侦测到。

升阶（3环） 你得知该法术在射程内侦测到的最高等级效果所属的魔法学派。若有多个效果强度相同，则由GM决定你得知哪一个。

升阶（4环） 同3环，但你还会锁定最高等级魔法的来源。类似于模糊感官，你不会得知其确切位置，但能将来源缩小到一个5尺立方体范围内（若来源大于该范围，则缩小到最接近的范围）。

You send out a pulse that registers the presence of magic. You receive no information beyond the presence or absence of magic. You can choose to ignore magic you're fully aware of, such as the magic items and ongoing spells of you and your allies.

You detect illusion magic only if that magic's effect has a lower level than the level of your detect magic spell. However, items that have an illusion aura but aren't deceptive in appearance (such as an invisibility potion) typically are detected normally.

Heightened (3rd) You learn the school of magic for the highest-level effect within range that the spell detects. If multiple effects are equally strong, the GM determines which you learn.

Heightened (4th) As 3rd level, but you also pinpoint the source of the highest-level magic. Like for an imprecise sense, you don't learn the exact location, but can narrow down the source to within a 5-foot cube (or the nearest if larger than that).

Darkness (At Will).name: 黑暗术（随意） Darkness (At Will)
Darkness (At Will).description:
你创造出一层黑暗帷幕，阻止光线在该区域内穿透或发散。光线不会进入该区域，且任何非魔法光源（如火把或提灯）在处于该区域内时都不会发出任何光亮，即使其光照半径本应延伸到黑暗之外亦然。这也会压制你该黑暗术的等级或更低等级的魔法光亮术。光线无法穿过，因此处于该区域内的生物无法看见外面。从外部看去，它就像一个纯粹黑暗的球体。

升阶（4环） 即使具有黑暗视觉（但不包括高等黑暗视觉）的生物，也只能勉强透过这片黑暗看见。他们将透过黑暗看见的目标视为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}。

You create a shroud of darkness that prevents light from penetrating or emanating within the area. Light does not enter the area and any non-magical light sources, such as a torch or lantern, do not emanate any light while inside the area, even if their light radius would extend beyond the darkness. This also suppresses magical light of your darkness spell's level or lower. Light can't pass through, so creatures in the area can't see outside. From outside, it appears as a globe of pure darkness.

Heightened (4th) Even creatures with darkvision (but not greater darkvision) can barely see through the darkness. They treat targets seen through the darkness as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}.

Clairaudience.name: 锐耳术 Clairaudience
Clairaudience.description:
你在射程内的一处位置创造一个@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}的漂浮耳朵（即使它在你的视觉线或效果线之外）。它无法移动，但你可以通过这只耳朵听见，如同使用你正常的听觉感官一样。

You create an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} floating ear at a location within range (even if it's outside your line of sight or line of effect). It can't move, but you can hear through the ear as if using your normal auditory senses.

Levitate.name: 浮空术 Levitate
Levitate.description:
你违抗重力，并对目标施放浮空术，使其离地5英尺。在法术的持续时间内，你可以用单动作让目标上升或下降10英尺，该动作具有专注（特征）。因浮空术而漂浮在空中的生物进行攻击掷骰时承受-2环境减值。漂浮的生物可以花费一个交互动作来稳定自身，并在其回合的剩余时间内抵消该减值。若目标邻接于一个固定的物体或足够稳固的地形，它可以通过攀爬（若表面为垂直，如墙壁）或匍匐（若表面为水平，如天花板）沿着该表面移动。GM决定哪些表面可以被攀爬或匍匐通过。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.JqrTrvwV7pYStMXz]{法术效果：浮空术}

You defy gravity and levitate the target 5 feet off the ground. For the duration of the spell, you can move the target up or down 10 feet with a single action, which has the concentrate trait. A creature floating in the air from levitate takes a -2 circumstance penalty to attack rolls. A floating creature can spend an Interact action to stabilize itself and negate this penalty for the remainder of its turn. If the target is adjacent to a fixed object or terrain of suitable stability, it can move across the surface by climbing (if the surface is vertical, like a wall) or crawling (if the surface is horizontal, such as a ceiling). The GM determines which surfaces can be climbed or crawled across.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.JqrTrvwV7pYStMXz]{Spell Effect: Levitate}

Faerie Fire (At Will).name: 妖火术（随意） Faerie Fire (At Will)
Faerie Fire (At Will).description:
你施放该法术时处于区域内的所有生物，在持续时间内都会被你选择颜色的缤纷、无热火焰勾勒轮廓。可见的生物在受到妖火术影响时不能处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}状态。若这些生物处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}状态，则在受到妖火术影响时它们处于Concealed状态，而非@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected}。

All creatures in the area when you cast the spell are limned in colorful, heatless fire of a color of your choice for the duration. Visible creatures can't be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} while affected by faerie fire. If the creatures are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}, they are Concealed while affected by faerie fire, rather than being @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected}.

Dispel Magic.name: 解除魔法 Dispel Magic
Dispel Magic.description:
你解开法术或效果背后的魔法。对目标进行一次反制检定。若你成功反制一个魔法物品，该物品在10分钟内变为其类型的普通物品。这不会改变该物品的非魔法属性。若目标是神器或类似物品，你自动失败。

You unravel the magic behind a spell or effect. Attempt a counteract check against the target. If you successfully counteract a magic item, the item becomes a mundane item of its type for 10 minutes. This doesn't change the item's non-magical properties. If the target is an artifact or similar item, you automatically fail.

Fireball.name: 火球术 Fireball
Fireball.description:
一道咆哮的火焰爆炸在你指定的斑点出现，造成 6d6 火焰伤害。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加 2d6。

A roaring blast of fire appears at a spot you designate, dealing 6d6 fire damage.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Elixir of Life (Moderate).name: 生命灵药（中等） Elixir of Life (Moderate)
Elixir of Life (Moderate).description:
启动 A 交互

生命灵药会加速活体生物的自然治疗过程与免疫系统。饮用该灵药后，你恢复[[/r (5d6+12)[healing]]]{5d6+12 Hit Points}，并在10分钟内对抗疾病与毒素的豁免检定获得+2物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.Yxssrnh9UZJAM0V7]{效果：生命灵药（中等）}

Activate A Interact

Elixirs of life accelerate a living creature's natural healing processes and immune system. Upon drinking this elixir, you regain [[/r (5d6+12)[healing]]]{5d6+12 Hit Points} and gain +2 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.Yxssrnh9UZJAM0V7]{Effect: Elixir of Life (Moderate)}

NoxAg Drider.publicNotes:
一些地精将其族人对火焰的崇拜彻底推向致命的痴迷领域。这些纵火狂对一群渴望点燃敌人并制造浩劫的地精掠夺者而言，可能是巨大的助力。然而更多时候，他们的存在是一把双刃剑；在情势最炽热的瞬间，地精纵火手有时会忘记部族的目标，干脆把任何能燃烧的东西都点着——包括他们自己的盟友。

这些小型类人生物拥有绿色或灰色的皮肤，以及带着宽大耳朵的巨大头颅。尽管有些地精已被文明化，并为成为类人社群中受人尊敬的一员而努力，但大多数仍是冲动而残忍的生物，以制造浩劫为乐。这些地精会为了片刻的快感而毫不在意地屠宰牲畜、偷走婴儿，或烧毁一栋建筑。他们沉迷于对更高大的类人生物恶作剧，并将其称为“长腿”。

地精迷信，对魔法抱有强烈的敬畏，并对火焰着迷；掌握魔法或火焰的地精会赢得同族的高度尊敬。大多数其他类人生物很难理解地精的观点：他们憎恨犬类，却乐于与所谓的“地精犬”共享巢穴；他们无畏地攻击更大的生物，却对马匹惊恐万分；他们厌恶蔬菜，却把腌黄瓜视为美味珍馐。对地精来说，当然，这些全都是再合理不过的人生选择。

Some goblins take their people's admiration of fire fully into the realm of deadly obsession. These pyromaniacs can be a great boon to a band of goblin raiders eager to torch their enemies and wreak havoc. More often, however, their presence is a double-edged sword; in the heat of the moment, goblin pyros sometimes lose sight of their tribe's goals and simply set fire to anything that will burn-including their own allies.

These small humanoids have green or gray skin and large heads with wide ears. While some goblins are civilized and have worked hard to be considered upstanding members of humanoid communities, most are impetuous and vicious creatures who delight in wreaking havoc. These goblins think nothing of slaughtering livestock, stealing infants, or burning down a building purely for momentary delight. They revel in playing malicious tricks on taller humanoids, whom they call "longshanks."

Goblins are superstitious, with an intense awe of magic and a fascination with fire; goblins who master magic or fire earn great respect from their kin. Most other humanoids find it difficult to understand goblins' outlook: they hate canines but eagerly share their lairs with so-called "goblin dogs," they fearlessly attack larger creatures but are terrified of horses, and they despise vegetables yet consider pickles a delicacy. To a goblin, of course, these are all perfectly sensible life choices.
NoxAg Drider.privateNotes:
KraDup是在《雇佣兵市场》第1卷和《探路者图鉴》的协助下创建的。

KraDup was created with the assistance of Mercenary Marketplace Volume 1 and the Pathfinder Bestiary.
NoxAg Drider.blurb:
地精爆炎蛛化精灵
Goblin Pyro Drider
NoxAg Drider.prototypeToken: 地精蛛化精灵 Goblin Drider

PipNee.name: 皮普妮 PipNee

Occult Spontaneous Spells.name: 奥术即兴法术 Occult Spontaneous Spells

Spellcasting Entries & Ability Scores.name: 施法条目与能力分数 Spellcasting Entries & Ability Scores
Spellcasting Entries & Ability Scores.description:
已提供适用于预备施法与自发施法的条目，并包含与等级相符的 DC 与法术攻击。预备施法条目默认以智力为基础施法，而自发施法条目默认以魅力为基础施法，尽管这些都可以修改；更改关键属性不会影响 DC。删除你未使用的条目。

使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-macros.Macro.dLMmYYevbHCikFnH]{Generate a Random Spell List} 宏为你的施法者生成一个法术列表。 

如果你正在创建一个不使用以魅力为基础施法的秘术师，你会希望用秘术师的魅力值替换其主要施法属性值，并相应调整其技能与豁免。你可能希望为以智力为基础的施法者选择新的技能，例如用制作替代表演。 

Entries for both Prepared and Spontaneous Casting with a level appropriate DC and spell attack have been provided. The Prepared Entry defaults to Intelligence based casting and the Spontaneous Entry defaults to Charisma based casting, although these can be modified changing the key stat will not affect the DC. Delete whichever entry you are not using.
