Generate a spell list for your caster using the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-macros.Macro.dLMmYYevbHCikFnH]{Generate a Random Spell List} macro. 

If you are creating an Occultist that does not use Charisma based casting you will wish to substiute the Ocultist's Charisma score for its primary casting score, and adjust its skills and saves appropriately.  You may wish to select new skills such as Crafting instead of Performance for an Intelligence based caster.

Eat Fire.name: 吞火 Eat Fire
Eat Fire.description:
触发 你将要受到火焰伤害。

你吞食并咽下火焰，使其对你更不具伤害性。你获得火焰伤害抗力5，直到当前回合结束。在该法术的剩余持续时间内，你可以使用“喷吐烟雾”动作。若你陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{昏迷}、吸气或呼气（这包括说话），则该法术结束。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.BGv44XBGtD4zOJBd]{法术效果：吞食火焰}

喷吐烟雾 1 你呼出剩余的烟雾，结束该法术，并在20尺内的一个@Template[type:burst|distance:5]制造一团烟雾云。烟雾云内的所有生物处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}，并且所有其他生物对他们而言也处于隐蔽。烟雾持续1分钟，或直到被强风吹散。

升阶（+3） 抗力提高5。

Trigger You would take fire damage.

You consume and ingest fire, making it less harmful to you. You gain resistance 5 to fire damage until the end of the current turn. During the remaining duration of the spell, you can use the Belch Smoke action. The spell ends if you fall @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}, inhale, or exhale (this includes speaking).

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.BGv44XBGtD4zOJBd]{Spell Effect: Eat Fire}

Belch Smoke 1 You exhale what remains of the smoke, ending the spell and creating a smoke cloud in a @Template[type:burst|distance:5] within 20 feet. All creatures within the smoke cloud are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}, and all other creatures are concealed to them. The smoke lasts for 1 minute or until dispersed by a strong wind.

Heightened (+3) The resistance increases by 5.

Forbidding Ward.name: 禁阻结界 Forbidding Ward
Forbidding Ward.description:
你守护一名盟友，使其免受来自目标敌人的攻击和敌对法术。目标盟友在对抗目标敌人的攻击、法术以及其他效果时，获得 AC 和豁免检定的 +1 状态加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ctMxYPGEpstvhW9C]{法术效果：禁阻守护}

强化（6环） 该状态加值提升至 +2。

You ward an ally against the attacks and hostile spells from the target enemy. The target ally gains a +1 status bonus to Armor Class and saving throws against the target enemy's attacks, spells, and other effects.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ctMxYPGEpstvhW9C]{Spell Effect: Forbidding Ward}

Heightened (6th) The status bonus increases to +2.

Ghost Sound.name: 幻音术 Ghost Sound
Ghost Sound.description:
你制造一个简单声音的听觉幻觉，其最大音量相当于四个正常人同时喊叫。声音从你在射程内指定的一个方格中发出。你无法制造可理解的词语或其他精细的声音（例如音乐）。

升阶（3环） 射程增加至60英尺。

升阶（5环） 射程增加至120英尺。

You create an auditory illusion of simple sounds that has a maximum volume equal to four normal humans shouting. The sounds emanate from a square you designate within range. You can't create intelligible words or other intricate sounds (such as music).

Heightened (3rd) The range increases to 60 feet.

Heightened (5th) The range increases to 120 feet.

Noise Blast.name: 噪音爆破 Noise Blast
Noise Blast.description:
一阵刺耳的噪音轰然爆发，造成 2d10 音波伤害。每个生物必须尝试一次强韧豁免。

大成功或大失败 成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物承受一半伤害。

失败 该生物承受全部伤害，并在 1 轮内处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened}。

大成功或大失败 失败 该生物承受双倍伤害，在 1 分钟内失聪，并且处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

强化 (+1) 伤害增加 1d10。

A cacophonous noise blasts out, dealing 2d10 sonic damage. Each creature must attempt a Fortitude save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage, is deafened for 1 minute, and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d10.

Blood Vendetta.name: 血之复仇 Blood Vendetta
Blood Vendetta.description:
需求 你可以流血。

触发 一个生物对你造成穿刺、挥砍或持续流血伤害。

你诅咒目标，惩罚它竟敢洒出你的血。目标受到 @Damage[2d6[bleed]]，并且必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功或大失败成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标受到一半的持续流血伤害。

失败 目标受到全部持续流血伤害。直到流血停止前，目标对穿刺与挥砍伤害具有弱点1。@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.buXx8Azr4BYWPtFg]{法术效果：血之复仇（失败）}

大成功或大失败失败 同失败，但目标受到双倍的持续流血伤害。

升阶（+2） 持续流血伤害增加 @Damage[2d6[bleed]]。

Requirements You can bleed.

Trigger A creature deals piercing, slashing, or persistent bleed damage to you.

You curse the target, punishing it for having the audacity to spill your blood. The target takes @Damage[2d6[bleed]] and must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes half the persistent bleed damage.

Failure The target takes the full persistent bleed damage. Until the bleeding stops, the target has weakness 1 to piercing and slashing damage. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.buXx8Azr4BYWPtFg]{Spell Effect: Blood Vendetta (Failure)}

Critical Failure As failure, but the target takes double the persistent bleed damage.

Heightened (+2) The persistent bleed damage increases by @Damage[2d6[bleed]].

Charm.name: 魅惑术 Charm
Charm.description:
对目标而言，你的话语如蜜般甜美，你的面容仿佛笼罩在梦幻的薄雾之中。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免；若你或你的盟友最近威胁过它或对它使用过敌对动作，则该豁免获得+4环境加值。

你可以解消该法术。若你对目标使用敌对动作，则该法术结束。法术结束时，目标未必会意识到自己曾被魅惑术影响，除非它对你的友谊或你说服它采取的动作与它的预期相冲突；这意味着你可能可以通过世俗手段说服目标继续做你的朋友。

大成功或大失败：成功 目标不受影响，并且知道你试图魅惑术它。

成功 目标不受影响，但会认为你的法术是某种无害的东西而非魅惑术，除非它辨识出该法术。

失败 目标对你的态度变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{友善}。若它原本是友善，则改为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{乐于助人}。它无法对你使用敌对动作。

大成功或大失败：失败 目标对你的态度变为乐于助人，并且它无法对你使用敌对动作。

升阶（4环） 持续时间延长至你下次进行每日准备为止。

升阶（8环） 持续时间延长至你下次进行每日准备为止，且你可以以最多10个生物为目标。

To the target, your words are honey and your visage seems bathed in a dreamy haze. It must attempt a Will save, with a +4 circumstance bonus if you or your allies recently threatened it or used hostile actions against it.

You can Dismiss the spell. If you use hostile actions against the target, the spell ends. When the spell ends, the target doesn't necessarily realize it was charmed unless its friendship with you or the actions you convinced it to take clash with its expectations, meaning you could potentially convince the target to continue being your friend via mundane means.

Critical Success The target is unaffected and aware you tried to charm it.

Success The target is unaffected but thinks your spell was something harmless instead of charm, unless it identifies the spell.

Failure The target's attitude becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{Friendly} toward you. If it was Friendly, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{Helpful}. It can't use hostile actions against you.

Critical Failure The target's attitude becomes Helpful toward you, and it can't use hostile actions against you.

Heightened (4th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations.

Heightened (8th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Thicket of Knives.name: 刀刃荆棘丛 Thicket of Knives
Thicket of Knives.description:
你制造出许多武器手臂的魅影复制品，掩藏你真实的动作，使你的攻击难以预测。你在欺瞒检定上获得+2状态加值。若你在欺瞒上未受训，你仍然可以使用虚招动作，并且尽管未受训，你仍可将你的等级作为你的熟练度加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.8ecGfjmxnBY3WWao]{法术效果：刀刃荆棘}

You create numerous phantom copies of your weapon arm, hiding your true movements and rendering your attacks unpredictable. You gain a +2 status bonus to Deception checks. If you're untrained in Deception, you can use the Feint action anyway, and add your level as your proficiency bonus despite being untrained.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.8ecGfjmxnBY3WWao]{Spell Effect: Thicket of Knives}

Dizzying Colors.name: 眼花缭乱的色彩 Dizzying Colors
Dizzying Colors.description:
你释放出一片旋转翻涌的万千色彩，依据生物的意志豁免使其不堪重负。

大成功或大失败 成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物在1轮内处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}。

失败 该生物处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1}，在1轮内处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲}，并在1分钟内目眩。

大成功或大失败 失败 该生物在1轮内震慑，并在1分钟内目盲。

You unleash a swirling multitude of colors that overwhelms creatures based on their Will saves.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round, and dazzled for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The creature is stunned for 1 round and blinded for 1 minute.

Soothe.name: 安抚 Soothe
Soothe.description:
你用恩泽抚慰目标的心灵，增强其心灵防御并治疗其伤势。当你施放法术时，目标恢复 1d10+4 生命值，并在持续时间内对抗心灵效果的豁免获得 +2 状态加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.nkk4O5fyzrC0057i]{法术效果：安抚}

升阶（+1） 治疗量增加 1d10+4。

You grace the target's mind, boosting its mental defenses and healing its wounds. The target regains 1d10+4 Hit Points when you Cast the Spell and gains a +2 status bonus to saves against mental effects for the duration.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.nkk4O5fyzrC0057i]{Spell Effect: Soothe}

Heightened (+1) The amount of healing increases by 1d10+4.

Ancestry, Goblin (Ability Boosts).name: 族裔，地精（能力提升） Ancestry, Goblin (Ability Boosts)
Ancestry, Goblin (Ability Boosts).description:
该 NPC 属于地精族裔

将该 NPC 的 hp 减少 [[2]]，将该 NPC 的 反射豁免、敏捷与魅力相关的技能检定以及法术伤害提高 1，将该 NPC 的 意志豁免、察觉与感知相关的技能检定降低 1。

该 NPC 获得地精（特征）、地精语言以及黑暗视觉。其体型变为小型。

从以下列表中为该 NPC 选择一种地精传承：@Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.CoOrXFrQVHrwnps7]{Goblin, Charhide}, @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.lmXqsXcds4Mhr4DK]{Goblin, Hordefodder}, @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.4VISujTycO8wnZgF]{Goblin, Irongut}, @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.wQmL3nfggSWSqkLw]{Goblin, Snow},  @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.OOSS8ypyWtaCJo2M]{Goblin, Unbreakable}

This NPC is of Goblin Ancestry

Decrease the NPC's hp by [[2]], increase the NPC's reflex saves, dexterity and charisma based skill checks and spell damage by 1, decrease the NPC's will saves, perception and wisdom based skill checks by 1. 

The NPC gains the Goblin trait, the Goblin language and Darkvision. It becomes size small.

Select a goblin heritage for the NPC from the following list: @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.CoOrXFrQVHrwnps7]{Goblin, Charhide}, @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.lmXqsXcds4Mhr4DK]{Goblin, Hordefodder}, @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.4VISujTycO8wnZgF]{Goblin, Irongut}, @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.wQmL3nfggSWSqkLw]{Goblin, Snow},  @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.OOSS8ypyWtaCJo2M]{Goblin, Unbreakable}

Goblin, Irongut.name: 地精，铁胃 Goblin, Irongut
Goblin, Irongut.description:
这只地精几乎什么都能吃，而且几乎不会产生不良后果。即使它处于@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心（状态）}时，它也能吃喝东西。

它对抗苦难的豁免检定、对抗获得恶心（状态）的豁免检定，以及移除恶心（状态）的检定，获得+2环境加值。当它在受该加值影响的强韧豁免上掷骰获得成功时，改为获得大成功或大失败。这些好处仅在该苦难或状态源于该生物摄入的东西时适用。

This goblin can eat just about anything with few ill consequences. It can eat and drink things when it is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened}

It gains a +2 circumstance bonus to saving throws against afflictions, against gaining the sickened condition, and to remove the sickened condition. When it rolls a success on a Fortitude save affected by this bonus it gets a critical success instead. These benefits only appy when the affliction or condition resulted from something this creature ingested.

Goblin Scuttle.name: 地精疾窜 Goblin Scuttle
Goblin Scuttle.description:
触发 一名地精盟友以移动动作结束移动，且位于该地精相邻处。

效果 该地精 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.UHpkTuCtyaPqiCAB]{快步}。

Trigger A goblin ally ends a move action adjacent to the goblin.

Effect The goblin @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.UHpkTuCtyaPqiCAB]{Steps}.

Shortbow.name: 短弓 Shortbow
Shortbow.description:
这把较小的弓由一整块木头制成，深受散兵和骑兵的青睐。

This smaller bow is made of a single piece of wood and favored by skirmishers and cavalry.

Dogslicer.name: 狗切刀 Dogslicer
Dogslicer.description:
这种短小、弯曲且粗糙的临时刀刃通常会在上面钻孔以减轻重量。它是地精偏爱的武器。

This short, curved, and crude makeshift blade often has holes drilled into it to reduce its weight. It's a favored weapon of goblins.

Club.name: 木棒 Club
Club.description:
这是一段结实的木头，被削制或改造为用来钝击敌人的武器。木棒可以是精雕细琢的武艺之作，也可以简单到只是一根树枝或一段木头。

This is a piece of stout wood shaped or repurposed to bludgeon an enemy. Clubs can be intricately carved pieces of martial art or as simple as a tree branch or piece of wood.

Arrows.name: 箭矢 Arrows
Arrows.description:
这些抛射物是弓的弹药。箭的箭杆由木材制成。它在飞行中由一端的箭羽保持稳定，另一端则装有金属箭头。

These projectiles are the ammunition for bows. The shaft of an arrow is made of wood. It is stabilized in flight by fletching at one end and bears a metal head on the other.

Chain Shirt.name: 链甲衫 Chain Shirt
Chain Shirt.description:
有时也被称为锁子甲长袍，这是一件由与锁子甲相同的金属环构成的长衫。然而，它比锁子甲轻得多，并且只保护穿戴者的躯干、上臂和大腿。

Sometimes called a hauberk, this is a long shirt constructed of the same metal rings as chainmail. However, it is much lighter than chainmail and protects only the torso, upper arms, and upper legs of its wearer.

PipNee.privateNotes:
PipNee 的创建得到了《雇佣兵市场》第一卷的协助。

PipNee was created with the assistance of Mercenary Marketplace Volume 1.

PipNee Dreshkan.name: PipNee 铁骨怪 PipNee Dreshkan

Occult Spontaneous Spells.name: 神秘自发法术 Occult Spontaneous Spells

Leather Armor.name: 皮革护甲 Leather Armor
Leather Armor.description:
由柔性与成型的煮制皮革混合制成，这种护甲能在提供一定防护的同时保持最大灵活性。

A mix of flexible and molded boiled leather, a suit of this type of armor provides some protection with maximum flexibility.

Arrows.name: 箭矢 Arrows
Arrows.description:
这些弹体是弓的弹药。箭的杆由木头制成。它在飞行中由一端的羽翎保持稳定，另一端则装有金属箭头。

These projectiles are the ammunition for bows. The shaft of an arrow is made of wood. It is stabilized in flight by fletching at one end and bears a metal head on the other.

Goblin Scuttle.name: 地精疾窜 Goblin Scuttle
Goblin Scuttle.description:
触发 一个地精盟友在该地精相邻处结束一个移动动作。

效果 该地精 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.UHpkTuCtyaPqiCAB]{快步}。

Trigger A goblin ally ends a move action adjacent to the goblin.

Effect The goblin @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.UHpkTuCtyaPqiCAB]{Steps}.

Goblin Song.name: 地精之歌 Goblin Song
Goblin Song.description:
战歌者唱起恼人的地精歌曲，用愚蠢且重复的歌词分散敌人注意力。战歌者进行一次 @Check[type:performance|traits:auditory,concentrate,linguistic] 检定，对抗至多两个位于 @Template[type:emanation|distance:35]{30 feet} 内敌人的意志 DC。该动作具有表演检定的通常特征与限制。

大成功或大失败成功 目标在 1 分钟内对察觉检定与意志豁免承受 -1 状态减值。@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feat-effects.Item.bIRIS6mnynr72RDw]{Goblin Song (Critical Success)}

成功 同大成功或大失败成功，但目标仅受到影响 1 轮。@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feat-effects.Item.5veOBmMYQxywTudd]{Goblin Song (Success)}

大成功或大失败失败 目标对地精歌曲暂时免疫 1 小时。

The war chanter sings annoying goblin songs, distracting foes with silly and repetitive lyrics. The chanter attempts a @Check[type:performance|traits:auditory,concentrate,linguistic] check against the Will DCs of up to two enemies within @Template[type:emanation|distance:35]{30 feet}. This has the usual traits and restrictions for a Performance check.

Critical Success The target takes a -1 status penalty to Perception checks and Will saves for 1 minute. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feat-effects.Item.bIRIS6mnynr72RDw]{Goblin Song (Critical Success)}

Success As critical success, but the target is affected for only one round. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feat-effects.Item.5veOBmMYQxywTudd]{Goblin Song (Success)}

Critical Failure The target is temporarily immune to Goblin Song for 1 hour.

Occult Focus Spells.name: 隐秘专注法术 Occult Focus Spells

Heal.name: 治疗术 Heal
Heal.description:
你引导正能量来治疗活物或伤害不死生物。若目标是自愿的活体生物，你恢复1d8点生命值。若目标是不死生物，你对其造成等量的正能量伤害，并且它需要进行一次基础强韧豁免。你在施放此法术时花费的动作数量决定其目标、射程、区域及其他参数。

1 (姿势) 该法术的射程为接触。

2 (言语, 姿势) 该法术的射程为30尺。若你在治疗活体生物，恢复的生命值增加8点

3 (材料, 姿势, 言语) 你在30尺散发中扩散正能量。此举会以爆发中的所有活体与不死生物为目标。

增幅（+1） 治疗或伤害的数值增加1d8，而2动作版本的额外治疗增加8点。

You channel positive energy to heal the living or damage the undead. If the target is a willing living creature, you restore 1d8 Hit Points. If the target is undead, you deal that amount of positive damage to it, and it gets a basic Fortitude save. The number of actions you spend when Casting this Spell determines its targets, range, area, and other parameters.

1 (somatic) The spell has a range of touch.

2 (verbal, somatic) The spell has a range of 30 feet. If you're healing a living creature, increase the Hit Points restored by 8

3 (material, somatic, verbal) You disperse positive energy in a 30-foot emanation. This targets all living and undead creatures in the burst.

Heightened (+1) The amount of healing or damage increases by 1d8, and the extra healing for the 2-action version increases by 8.

Backpack.name: 背包 Backpack
Backpack.description:
一个背包最多可容纳 4 负载的物品，其中前 2 负载的这些物品不计入你的负载上限。如果你是携带或收纳该背包而不是将其背在背上，则它的负载为 light 而非可忽略

A backpack holds up to 4 Bulk of items and the first 2 Bulk of these items don't count against your Bulk limits. If you're carrying or stowing the pack rather than wearing it on your back, its Bulk is light instead of negligible

Waterskin.name: 水袋 Waterskin
Waterskin.description:
当它装满时，一个水袋大约装有足够一名小型或中型生物饮用1天的水。

When it's full, a waterskin contains roughly 1 day's worth of water for a Small or Medium creature.

Flint and Steel.name: 燧石与打火钢 Flint and Steel
Flint and Steel.description:
燧石和打火钢在你有时间捕捉火花时用于生火很有用，不过在遭遇期间使用它们通常太耗时而不实用。即使在理想状态下，使用燧石和打火钢点燃火焰也至少需要使用 3 个动作，而且往往要长得多。

Flint and steel are useful in creating a fire if you have the time to catch a spark, though using them is typically too time‑consuming to be practical during an encounter. Even in ideal conditions, using flint and steel to light a flame requires using at least 3 actions, and often significantly longer.

Torch.name: 火把 Torch
Torch.description:
火把在20英尺半径内投射明亮光照（并在接下来的20英尺内提供昏暗光照），持续1小时。它可以作为临时武器使用，造成1d4钝击伤害外加1点火焰伤害。

A torch sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius (and dim light to the next 20 feet) for 1 hour. It can be used as an improvised weapon that deals 1d4 bludgeoning damage plus 1 fire damage.

Bedroll.name: 铺盖 Bedroll
Bedroll.description:
一张卷起来的床铺。

A rolled up bed.

Religious Symbol (Wooden).name: 宗教圣徽（木制） Religious Symbol (Wooden)
Religious Symbol (Wooden).description:
这块木头或银质物件上饰有代表某位神祇的图像。一些神圣施法者，例如牧师，可以将其神祇的宗教圣徽作为神圣法器来使用某些能力并施放一些法术。使用宗教圣徽时必须将其持于一只手中。

This piece of wood or silver is emblazoned with an image representing a deity. Some divine spellcasters, such as clerics, can use a religious symbol of their deity as a divine focus to use certain abilities and cast some spells. A religious symbol must be held in one hand to use it.

Defensive Needle.name: 防御针刺 Defensive Needle
Defensive Needle.description:
触发 一个生物以近战打击对铁骨怪发动攻击并大失败

效果 铁骨怪对该生物进行一次针刺打击。

Trigger A creature critically fails a melee Strike against the dreshkan

Effect The dreshkan makes a needle Strike against that creature.

Needle Spray.name: 针刺喷射 Needle Spray
Needle Spray.description:
铁骨怪用四肢支撑身体，向其想要的任意数量的生物喷射针刺，覆盖一个@Template[type:cone|distance:30]，造成[[/r {2d4[piercing],4d6[electricity]}]]{2d4穿刺伤害加4d6电击伤害}。区域内每个成为目标的生物必须尝试一次@Check[type:reflex|dc:24|basic:true]。

The dreshkan braces itself on all four limbs and sprays needles at as many creatures as it would like in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30], dealing [[/r {2d4[piercing],4d6[electricity]}]]{2d4 piercing damage plus 4d6 electricity damage}. Each targeted creature in the area must attempt a @Check[type:reflex|dc:24|basic:true].

+2 Status to All Saves vs. Bleed, Death.name: 对流血、死亡效果、疾病、濒死、疲乏、麻痹、毒素、恶心的所有豁免获得+2状态加值 +2 Status to All Saves vs. Bleed, Death Effects, Disease, Doomed, Fatigued, Paralyzed, Poison, Sickened

Partially Technological.name: 半机械 Partially Technological
Partially Technological.description:
铁骨怪是半机械。正能量治疗效果对铁骨怪的治疗量只有正常的一半。

A dreshkan is partially technological. Positive healing effects only heal a dreshkan half as much as normal.

Swarming Stance.name: 集群姿态 Swarming Stance
Swarming Stance.description:
铁骨怪可以与摩洛克或另一只铁骨怪共享同一空间，但同一空间中最多只能容纳两只此类生物。当这些生物共享同一空间时，它们在攻击掷骰上获得+1环境加值。

A dreshkan can share the same space as a morlock or another dreshkan, but no more than two such creatures can occupy the same space. When these creatures share the same space, they gain a +1 circumstance bonus to attack rolls.

Athletics (14 to Climb).name: 运动（攀爬为14） Athletics (14 to Climb)

Telekinetic Projectile.name: 念动射弹 Telekinetic Projectile
Telekinetic Projectile.description:
你掷出一个在射程内的、松散且无人看管的物体（负载为1或更低）作为目标。对该目标进行一次法术攻击掷骰。若你命中，你造成2d6钝击、穿刺或挥砍伤害——取决于你掷出的物体的性质。被掷出的物品不具有任何会影响该攻击或伤害的特定特征或魔法属性。

大成功 你造成双倍伤害。

成功 你造成全部伤害。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加1d6。

You hurl a loose, unattended object that is within range and that has 1 Bulk or less at the target. Make a spell attack roll against the target. If you hit, you deal 2d6 bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage--as appropriate for the object you hurled. No specific traits or magic properties of the hurled item affect the attack or the damage.

Critical Success You deal double damage.

Success You deal full damage.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Guidance.name: 指引 Guidance
Guidance.description:
你祈求超自然实体的指引，使目标在持续时间结束前进行的一次攻击掷骰、察觉检定、豁免检定或技能检定中获得+1状态加值。目标在掷骰前选择要将该加值用于哪一次掷骰。若目标使用该加值，则该法术结束。无论如何，随后目标获得1小时的暂时免疫。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3qHKBDF7lrHw8jFK]{法术效果：指引}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3LyOkV25p7wA181H]{效果：指引免疫}

You ask for the guidance of supernatural entities, granting the target a +1 status bonus to one attack roll, Perception check, saving throw, or skill check the target attempts before the duration ends. The target chooses which roll to use the bonus on before rolling. If the target uses the bonus, the spell ends. Either way, the target is then temporarily immune for 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3qHKBDF7lrHw8jFK]{Spell Effect: Guidance}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3LyOkV25p7wA181H]{Effect: Guidance Immunity}

Ill Omen.name: 恶兆 Ill Omen
Ill Omen.description:
目标被厄运击中，令其失去平衡。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。

成功 目标不受影响。

失败 在持续时间内，目标第一次尝试进行一次攻击掷骰或技能检定时，它必须掷骰两次并使用较差的结果。

大成功或大失败 失败 在持续时间内，每当目标尝试进行一次攻击掷骰或技能检定时，它都必须掷骰两次并使用较差的结果。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.AmsVO5Q6078mEvNt]{法术效果：恶兆}

The target is struck with misfortune, which throws it off balance. The target must attempt a Will save.

Success The target is unaffected.

Failure The first time during the duration that the target attempts an attack roll or skill check, it must roll twice and use the worse result.

Critical Failure Every time during the duration that the target attempts an attack roll or skill check, it must roll twice and use the worse result.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.AmsVO5Q6078mEvNt]{Spell Effect: Ill Omen}

Force Barrage.name: 力场弹幕 Force Barrage
Force Barrage.description:
你向一名你能看见的生物发射一枚凝固的魔法碎片。它自动命中并造成1d4+1点力场伤害。你在施放该法术时每额外使用1个动作，你射出的碎片数量便增加1枚，最多在使用3个动作时射出3枚碎片。你可以为每一枚碎片分别选择目标。如果你向同一目标射出多于一枚碎片，在应用对伤害的加值或减值、抗力、弱点等之前，先将伤害合并。

升阶（+2） 你每花费1个动作就会额外发射1枚碎片。

You fire a shard of solidified magic toward a creature that you can see. It automatically hits and deals 1d4+1 force damage. For each additional action you use when Casting the Spell, increase the number of shards you shoot by one, to a maximum of three shards for 3 actions. You choose the target for each shard individually. If you shoot more than one shard at the same target, combine the damage before applying bonuses or penalties to damage, resistances, weaknesses, and so forth.

Heightened (+2) You fire one additional shard with each action you spend.

False Vitality.name: 虚假活力 False Vitality
False Vitality.description:
你用通常用于操纵不死生物的能量强化你的血肉。你获得10点临时生命值。

升阶（+1） 临时生命值增加3点。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.PANUWN5xXC20WBg2]{法术效果：虚假活力}

You augment your flesh with the energies typically used to manipulate the undead. You gain 10 temporary Hit Points.

Heightened (+1) The temporary Hit Points increase by 3.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.PANUWN5xXC20WBg2]{Spell Effect: False Vitality}

Phantom Pain.name: 幻痛术 Phantom Pain
Phantom Pain.description:
幻痛折磨着目标，造成2d4心灵伤害以及[[/r (@item.level)d4[persistent,mental]]]伤害。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功或大失败：成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标承受全部初始伤害但不承受持续伤害，且法术立即结束。

失败 目标承受全部初始伤害与持续伤害，且目标获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}。如果目标从恶心中恢复，持续伤害结束且法术结束。

大成功或大失败：失败 同失败，但目标获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加2d4，持续伤害增加1d4。

Illusory pain wracks the target, dealing 2d4 mental damage and [[/r (@item.level)d4[persistent,mental]]] damage. The target must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes full initial damage but no persistent damage, and the spell ends immediately.

Failure The target takes full initial and persistent damage, and the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}. If the target recovers from being Sickened, the persistent damage ends and the spell ends.

Critical Failure As failure, but the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d4 and the persistent damage by 1d4.

Stupefy.name: 愚钝 Stupefy
Stupefy.description:
你使目标的心智变得迟钝，效果取决于其意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 直到你下个回合开始前，目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1}。

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2}，持续1分钟。

大失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 3}，持续1分钟

You dull the target's mind, depending on its Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} until the start of your next turn.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 3} for 1 minute

Needle Darts.name: 针刺飞镖 Needle Darts
Needle Darts.description:
你将你所占有的一块金属塑成三根针，并将它们紧密成组地飞射向一个目标。对你的目标的AC进行一次法术攻击掷骰。针造成3d4穿刺伤害，并可能导致流血。

这些针会带有构成它们的金属的任何特殊性质；例如，冷铁针会对具有对冷铁弱点的生物造成额外伤害。所有针都由同一种金属制成，而金属会在攻击后回到你手中。

大成功 目标受到双倍伤害，并受到[[/r (@item.level)[bleed]]]伤害。

成功 目标受到全额伤害。

强化（+1） 你额外发射一根针，使常规伤害增加1d4，并使大成功命中时的持续流血伤害增加1。

You shape three needles out of a piece of metal in your possession and send them flying in a tight group toward one target. Make a spell attack roll against your target's AC. The needles deal 3d4 piercing damage and might cause bleeding.

The needles impart any special properties of the metal that forms them; for instance, cold iron needles deal additional damage to creatures with weakness to cold iron. All the needles are made of the same metal, and the metal returns to you after the attack.

Critical Success The target takes double damage and [[/r (@item.level)[bleed]]] damage.

Success The target takes full damage.

Heightened (+1) You send one additional needle, increasing the regular damage by 1d4 and increasing the persistent bleed damage on a critical hit by 1.

Mystic Armor.name: 秘法护甲 Mystic Armor
Mystic Armor.description:
你用闪烁的魔法能量保护自己，获得 AC +1 物品加值，以及最高 +5 的敏捷调整值上限。穿着秘法护甲时，你使用你的无甲熟练度来计算你的 AC。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.qkwb5DD3zmKwvbk0]{法术效果：秘法护甲}

升阶（4环）你获得豁免检定 +1 物品加值。

升阶（6环）AC 的物品加值提高至 +2，且你获得豁免检定 +1 物品加值。

升阶（8环）AC 的物品加值提高至 +2，且你获得豁免检定 +2 物品加值。

升阶（10环）AC 的物品加值提高至 +3，且你获得豁免检定 +3 物品加值。

You ward yourself with shimmering magical energy, gaining a +1 item bonus to AC and a maximum Dexterity modifier of +5. While wearing mystic armor, you use your unarmored proficiency to calculate your AC.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.qkwb5DD3zmKwvbk0]{Spell Effect: Mystic Armor}

Heightened (4th) You gain a +1 item bonus to saving throws.

Heightened (6th) The item bonus to AC increases to +2, and you gain a +1 item bonus to saving throws.

Heightened (8th) The item bonus to AC increases to +2, and you gain a +2 item bonus to saving throws.

Heightened (10th) The item bonus to AC increases to +3, and you gain a +3 item bonus to saving throws.

Haste.name: 加速术 Haste
Haste.description:
魔法赋予目标更快行动的能力。它获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{迅捷（状态）}状态，并且每轮只能将该额外动作用于打击与迈步动作。

升阶（7环） 你最多可以以6个生物为目标。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ElkXovNrHB0Doi6O]{法术效果：加速术}

Magic empowers the target to act faster. It gains the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} condition and can use the extra action each round only for Strike and Stride actions.

Heightened (7th) You can target up to 6 creatures.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ElkXovNrHB0Doi6O]{Spell Effect: Haste}

Invisibility.name: 隐形术 Invisibility
Invisibility.description:
幻术扭曲目标周围的光线，使其变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}。这使其对所有生物而言为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected}，不过这些生物可以尝试寻找目标，使其对它们而言改为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}。如果目标使用敌对动作，则该法术在该敌对动作完成后结束。

升阶（4环） 该法术持续1分钟，但若目标使用敌对动作也不会结束。

Illusions bend light around the target, rendering it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}. This makes it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected} to all creatures, though the creatures can attempt to find the target, making it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} to them instead. If the target uses a hostile action, the spell ends after that hostile action is completed.

Heightened (4th) The spell lasts 1 minute, but it doesn't end if the target uses a hostile action.

PipNee Dreshkan.publicNotes:
尽管所有地精都喜欢唱歌，地精战歌吟唱者却以精通声乐表演艺术为傲。他们的叙事歌谣与小调无疑朗朗上口，不过它们是否真的悦耳则完全见仁见智。

这些小型类人生物有绿色或灰色皮肤，以及带着宽大耳朵的大脑袋。尽管有些地精已被文明化，并努力成为类人生物社群中受人尊敬的一员，但大多数都是鲁莽而凶残的生物，乐于大肆破坏。这些地精对宰杀牲畜、偷走婴儿，或仅为一时快感而焚毁一栋建筑都毫不在意。他们沉迷于对更高大的类人生物耍恶作剧，并称其为“长腿”。

地精迷信，对魔法怀有强烈的敬畏并痴迷于火焰；能掌握魔法或火焰的地精会赢得同族的极大尊重。多数其他类人生物很难理解地精的观点：他们憎恨犬类，却乐意与所谓的“地精狗”同住巢穴；他们无畏地攻击更大的生物，却害怕马匹；他们厌恶蔬菜，却把腌黄瓜当作美味佳肴。对地精而言，当然，这些全都是完全合情合理的人生选择。

While all goblins enjoy singing, goblin war chanters pride themselves on mastering the art of vocal performance. Their ballads and jingles are undeniably catchy, though whether they are actually enjoyable is entirely subjective.

These small humanoids have green or gray skin and large heads with wide ears. While some goblins are civilized and have worked hard to be considered upstanding members of humanoid communities, most are impetuous and vicious creatures who delight in wreaking havoc. These goblins think nothing of slaughtering livestock, stealing infants, or burning down a building purely for momentary delight. They revel in playing malicious tricks on taller humanoids, whom they call "longshanks."

Goblins are superstitious, with an intense awe of magic and a fascination with fire; goblins who master magic or fire earn great respect from their kin. Most other humanoids find it difficult to understand goblins' outlook: they hate canines but eagerly share their lairs with so-called "goblin dogs," they fearlessly attack larger creatures but are terrified of horses, and they despise vegetables yet consider pickles a delicacy. To a goblin, of course, these are all perfectly sensible life choices.
PipNee Dreshkan.privateNotes:
KraDup 是在《雇佣兵市场》第一卷和《探路者怪物图鉴》的协助下创建的。

KraDup was created with the assistance of Mercenary Marketplace Volume 1 and the Pathfinder Bestiary.

Alymora Inkleholtz.name: 艾利莫拉·印科霍兹 Alymora Inkleholtz
Alymora Inkleholtz.tokenName: 艾利莫拉·印科霍兹 Alymora Inkleholtz

Padded Armor.name: 软垫护甲 Padded Armor
Padded Armor.description:
这套护甲只是厚实的绗缝布料层，但有时会因为非常便宜而被使用。软垫护甲比其他类型的护甲更容易受到损坏并被摧毁。重型护甲的价格中包含一层软垫护甲内衬，不过当其穿在重型护甲下方时会失去舒适特征。你可以仅穿这套软垫护甲或内衬来睡觉、在你的重型护甲被摧毁时穿着，或在其他未穿戴完整重型护甲的情况下穿着。这使你能够让护甲保持灌注状态，并从相关联的重型护甲上任何符文的力量中受益，但没有软垫护甲内衬，其他人无法穿戴你的重型护甲。

This armor is simply a layer of heavy, quilted cloth, but it is sometimes used because it's so inexpensive. Padded armor is easier to damage and destroy than other types of armor. Heavy armor comes with a padded armor undercoat included in its Price, though it loses the comfort trait when worn under heavy armor. You can wear just that padded armor or undercoat to sleep in, if your heavy armor is destroyed, or when otherwise not wearing the full heavy armor. This allows you to keep the armor invested and benefit from the power of any runes on the associated heavy armor, but no one else can wear your heavy armor without the padded undercoat.

Bolts.name: 弩矢 Bolts
Bolts.description:
弩矢比传统箭矢更短，但结构相似，是弩使用的弹药。

Shorter than traditional arrows but similar in construction, bolts are the ammunition used by crossbows.

Appraising Eye.name: 鉴定之眼 Appraising Eye
Appraising Eye.description:
商人可以使用商贸传说来@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}有关物品的信息，包括确定其价值。他们也可以尝试使用商贸传说来@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.eReSHVEPCsdkSL4G]{辨识魔法}，并且可以在未事先知道该物品是否具有魔法的情况下这样做。

The merchant can use Mercantile Lore to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about items, including determining their value. They can also attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.eReSHVEPCsdkSL4G]{Identify Magic} using Mercantile Lore and can do so without first knowing whether the item is magical.

Alymora Inkleholtz.publicNotes:
小型聚居地通常只能支援一到两名通才商人，而更大的城市则拥有多名专家——专精于某一类产品的行家。商人无处不在：在公共广场叫卖的摊贩、经营小店面的店主、乘坐马车或随商队奔走的旅行推销员，或是掌控整个以商业为目的组织的富有大亨。对于涉及谈判或经商技能的遭遇，商人是一个4级挑战。商人可能还拥有一项关于某一特定物品类别的额外学识（技能）（例如珠宝或魔法武器），其技能加值总值比商业学识高2点。

每个聚居地都需要工匠来制作新产品、促进商业往来，并防止基础设施崩坏。更大的城市往往有专门的行会，致力于制造特定商品、管理工人状态，并与当地政府合作。

Small settlements can typically support one or two generalist merchants, and larger cities house multiple specialists-experts in one type of product. Merchants can be found anywhere: vendors hustling in the public square, shopkeepers running small storefronts, traveling salespeople in carriages or caravans, or wealthy tycoons running entire organizations devoted to commerce. For encounters involving negotiation or mercantile skill, a merchant is a 4th-level challenge. A merchant might have an additional Lore skill about a specific category of item (such as jewelry or magic weapons), with a total skill bonus 2 higher than Mercantile Lore.

Every settlement needs tradespeople to create new products, facilitate commerce, and keep the infrastructure from crumbling. Larger cities often have entire guilds dedicated to the creation of specific goods, managing worker conditions, and working with local governments.
Alymora Inkleholtz.privateNotes:
此指示物基于一名出现在《憎恨魔窟》冒险路径中的角色，使用了《Pathfinder Gamemastery Guide》中的模板。

This token is based on a character that appeared in the Abomination Vaults Adventure Path, using a template from Pathfinder Gamemastery Guide.
Alymora Inkleholtz.prototypeToken: 艾利莫拉·印科霍兹 Alymora Inkleholtz

Brelda Venkervale.name: 布雷达·范克维尔 Brelda Venkervale
Brelda Venkervale.tokenName: 布雷达·范克维尔 Brelda Venkervale

Barkeep's Apron.name: 酒保围裙 Barkeep's Apron
Barkeep's Apron.description:
这套护甲只是由一层厚重的绗缝布料构成，但有时会因为非常便宜而被使用。填充护甲比其他类型的护甲更容易受到损坏并被摧毁。重型护甲的价格中包含一件填充护甲内衬，不过在重型护甲之下穿着时，它会失去舒适特征。若你的重型护甲被摧毁，或在其他未穿着完整重型护甲的情况下，你可以仅穿这件填充护甲或内衬来睡觉。这使你能够让护甲保持灌注，并从相关联的重型护甲上任何符文的力量中获益，但若没有这件填充护甲内衬，其他人无法穿上你的重型护甲。

This armor is simply a layer of heavy, quilted cloth, but it is sometimes used because it's so inexpensive. Padded armor is easier to damage and destroy than other types of armor. Heavy armor comes with a padded armor undercoat included in its Price, though it loses the comfort trait when worn under heavy armor. You can wear just that padded armor or undercoat to sleep in, if your heavy armor is destroyed, or when otherwise not wearing the full heavy armor. This allows you to keep the armor invested and benefit from the power of any runes on the associated heavy armor, but no one else can wear your heavy armor without the padded undercoat.

Flask of Whiskey.name: 威士忌酒壶 Flask of Whiskey
Flask of Whiskey.description:
酒精是一种常见物质，种类繁多、令人惊叹。每剂酒精的价格取决于具体的饮品。在受到影响期间，你无法从酒精导致的恶心（状态）中恢复。

如果你在对抗酒精的豁免（初次豁免除外）中失败，苦难的阶段不会提高；提高酒精苦难阶段的唯一方法是摄入更多酒精。

启动 A 交互（摄入）

豁免 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:12|name:Alcohol]

潜伏期 10分钟

阶段 1 对抗恐惧术的豁免获得+1物品加值（10分钟）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}，对抗恐惧术效果的豁免获得+1物品加值（10分钟）

阶段 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}，off-guard，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2}（10分钟）

阶段 4 clumsy 2 且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}（10分钟）

阶段 5 clumsy 2、sickened 2，以及 stupefied 2（10分钟）

阶段 6 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}（8小时）

阶段 7 死亡

Alcohol is a common substance available in stunning variety. The Price of a dose of alcohol depends on the specific beverage. You can't recover from the sickened condition from alcohol while affected.

If you fail a saving throw against alcohol other than initial saves, the affliction's stage doesn't increase; the only way to increase the stage of alcohol's affliction is to consume more alcohol.

Activate A Interact (Ingested)

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:12|name:Alcohol]

Onset 10 minutes

Stage 1 +1 item bonus to saving throws against fear (10 minutes)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}, +1 item bonus to saving throws against fear effects (10 minutes)

Stage 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}, off-guard, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} (10 minutes)

Stage 4 clumsy 2 and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} (10 minutes)

Stage 5 clumsy 2, sickened 2, and stupefied 2 (10 minutes)

Stage 6 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} (8 hours)

Stage 7 death

Bar Brawler.name: 酒吧斗殴者 Bar Brawler
Bar Brawler.description:
酒保经历过足够多的酒馆斗殴，知道该如何挥出几记拳头。当在自己的酒馆里战斗并进行非致命攻击时，酒保在攻击掷骰上获得+1环境加值，并造成额外[[/r {1d4}]]{1d4伤害}。

The barkeep has been in enough bar fights to know how to throw a few punches. When fighting in their bar and making a nonlethal attack, the barkeep gains a +1 circumstance bonus to attack rolls and deals an additional [[/r {1d4}]]{1d4 damage}.

Barkeep's Advice.name: 酒保的忠告 Barkeep's Advice
Barkeep's Advice.description:
频率 每天一次

效果 酒保向除自身以外的单个生物提供一些相关的建议。在24小时内，当该生物在一次技能检定或豁免掷骰中失败时，他们可以回想起这条建议并重骰该次检定，改用第二次结果。一旦该生物使用了此能力，其效果便结束。

接受酒保忠告的生物会在1个月内暂时免疫该能力。

Frequency once per day

Effect The barkeep gives some pertinent advice to a single creature other than themself. For 24 hours, when that creature fails a skill check or saving throw, they can recall this advice and reroll the check, using the second result instead. Once that creature uses this ability, its effect ends.

A creature that receives the Barkeep's Advice is temporarily immune to the ability for 1 month.

Brelda Venkervale.publicNotes:
酒保常常是社区中的朋友和导师，一边提供酒水，一边倾听他人倾诉。最出色的酒保往往还擅长讲故事，并传授宝贵的建议。

无数场冒险都始于酒馆或酒吧。也许是因为这类地方会吸引爱冒险的人，也许是因为在他们决定去对付一群横冲直撞的食人魔之前，每个人都需要一点液体勇气。

Barkeeps are often friends and mentors within a community, lending an ear while supplying libations. The best barkeeps have some talent for storytelling and passing on valuable advice.

Countless adventures begin in a tavern or a pub. Maybe it's because such places attract the risk-prone, or maybe it's because everyone needs a little liquid courage before they decide to take on a group of rampaging ogres.
Brelda Venkervale.privateNotes:
此指示物基于一名出现在《憎恨魔窟》冒险路径中的角色，并使用了《Pathfinder Gamemastery Guide》中的模板。

This token is based on a character that appeared in the Abomination Vaults Adventure Path, using a template from Pathfinder Gamemastery Guide.
Brelda Venkervale.prototypeToken: 布雷达·范克维尔 Brelda Venkervale

Jala Highstepper.name: 贾拉·海斯泰珀 Jala Highstepper
Jala Highstepper.tokenName: 贾拉·海斯泰珀 Jala Highstepper

Leather Armor.name: 皮革护甲 Leather Armor
Leather Armor.description:
由柔韧与塑形的煮皮革混合制成，这种护甲在提供一定防护的同时拥有最大的灵活性。

A mix of flexible and molded boiled leather, a suit of this type of armor provides some protection with maximum flexibility.

Pitch Bale.name: 草捆 Pitch Bale
Pitch Bale.description:
需求 农夫的上一个动作是一次成功的干草叉打击

效果 农夫将他们用干草叉命中的生物移动至多5英尺，且目标坠落 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。目标可以尝试一次 @Check[type:reflex|dc:15] 豁免以避免坠落倒地，并在大成功时完全避免被移动。

Requirements The farmer's last action was a successful pitchfork Strike

Effect The farmer moves the creature they hit with their pitchfork up to 5 feet, and the target falls @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. The target can attempt a @Check[type:reflex|dc:15] save to avoid falling prone, and avoids being moved altogether on a critical success.

Jala Highstepper.publicNotes:
作为世界各地田野、葡萄园与果园的劳动者，农民以坚韧的耐力以及对植物与动物的技能而闻名。

每天，劳工都在进行令人腰酸背痛的体力劳动。

Workers of the fields, vineyards, and orchards of the world, farmers are known for their rugged endurance and their skill with both plants and animals.

Every day, laborers perform backbreaking physical work.
Jala Highstepper.privateNotes:
此指示物基于一个出现在《憎恨魔窟》冒险路径中的角色，并使用《Pathfinder Gamemastery Guide》中的模板。

This token is based on a character that appeared in the Abomination Vaults Adventure Path, using a template from Pathfinder Gamemastery Guide.
Jala Highstepper.prototypeToken: 贾拉·海斯泰珀 Jala Highstepper

Keeleno Lathenar.name: 基莱诺·拉瑟纳 Keeleno Lathenar
Keeleno Lathenar.tokenName: 基莱诺·拉瑟纳 Keeleno Lathenar

Padded Armor.name: 软垫护甲 Padded Armor
Padded Armor.description:
这件护甲只是一层厚重的绗缝布料，但有时会因为非常便宜而被使用。软垫护甲比其他类型的护甲更容易受到伤害并被摧毁。重型护甲的价格中包含一件软垫护甲内衬，但在重型护甲下穿着时会失去舒适特征。你可以仅穿这件软垫护甲或内衬来睡觉、在你的重型护甲被摧毁时，或在其他情况下不穿整套重型护甲时穿着。这使你能够让护甲保持灌注状态，并从与之相关的重型护甲上任何符文的力量中获益，但没有软垫护甲内衬，其他任何人都无法穿戴你的重型护甲。

Shorter than traditional arrows but similar in construction, bolts are the ammunition used by crossbows.

Appraising Eye.name: 鉴定之眼 Appraising Eye
Appraising Eye.description:
商人可以使用商业学识来 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 关于物品，包括确定其价值。他们也可以尝试使用商业学识来 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.eReSHVEPCsdkSL4G]{辨识魔法}，并且无需先知道该物品是否具有魔法。

此标记基于一个出现在《憎恨魔窟》冒险路径中的角色，并使用《Pathfinder 游戏主持人指南》中的模板。

Keeleno Lathenar.prototypeToken: 基莱诺·拉瑟纳 Keeleno Lathenar

Klorte Hengus.name: 克洛特·亨格斯 Klorte Hengus
Klorte Hengus.tokenName: 克洛特·亨格斯 Klorte Hengus

Studded Leather Armor.name: 镶嵌皮甲 Studded Leather Armor
Studded Leather Armor.description:
这件皮革护甲用金属铆钉加固，有时还带有小型金属板，在保有皮革护甲大部分灵活性的同时提供更坚固的防护。

This leather armor is reinforced with metal studs and sometimes small metal plates, providing most of the flexibility of leather armor with more robust protection.

Sling Bullets.name: 投石索弹丸 Sling Bullets
Sling Bullets.description:
这些是小型金属球，通常由铁或铅制成，设计用于作为投石索的弹药。

These are small metal balls, typically either iron or lead, designed to be used as ammunition in slings.

Attack of Opportunity.name: 借机攻击 Attack of Opportunity

Brutal Beating.name: 残酷殴打 Brutal Beating
Brutal Beating.description:
暴徒的残忍动摇敌人的信心。

当暴徒在一次大成功命中时造成伤害，目标成为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}，且暴徒可以将目标击退至多10尺远（这是强迫移动）。

The ruffian's brutality shakes foes' confidence.

When the ruffian deals damage on a critical hit, the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}, and the ruffian can knock the target up to 10 feet away (this is forced movement).

Sneak Attack.name: 偷袭 Sneak Attack
Sneak Attack.description:
暴徒对@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}生物造成额外1d6精准伤害。

The ruffian deals an extra 1d6 precision damage to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} creatures.

Net.name: 网 Net
Net.description:
你可以单独使用网，也可以将其系在绳子上使用。系在绳子上时，你可以使用网来@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{擒抱}一只至多中型的生物，距离最远10尺（而非仅限相邻的生物）。只要目标仍在10尺内且你继续握持这张网，你就可以继续擒抱以保持对目标的控制。除非你与其相邻，否则被抓住的生物在进行逃脱时获得+2环境加值，并且它可以尝试一次@Check[type:athletics|dc:16|traits:action:force-open]检定来破拆并将网完全扯开。一旦目标不再被抓住，在你以带有专注（特征）且需要双手的交互动作将其重新折叠之前，这张网就会变得笨拙；若未重新折叠就使用，用网进行的擒抱检定承受-2减值。

当网未系在绳子上时，你可以使用你的简易武器熟练度，对20尺内一只至多中型的生物尝试一次远程攻击掷骰。命中时，目标陷入措手不及，且在其逃脱之前，其速度承受-10尺环境减值；大成功或大失败时，它在其逃脱之前还会陷入定身。逃脱DC为16。与目标相邻的一只生物可以交互来移除网。

You can use a net either on its own or attached to a rope. When attached to a rope, you can use the net to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{Grapple} a Medium or smaller creature up to 10 feet away (instead of only adjacent creatures). You can continue to Grapple to keep your hold on the target so long as the target remains within 10 feet and you continue to hold the net. The grabbed creature gains a +2 circumstance bonus to Escape unless you are adjacent to them, and it can attempt a @Check[type:athletics|dc:16|traits:action:force-open] check to Force Open the net entirely. Once the target is no longer grabbed, the net is unwieldy until refolded with an Interact action with the concentrate trait that requires two hands; if used without being refolded, Grapple checks made with the net take a -2 penalty.

When the net is unattached, you can attempt a ranged attack roll using your simple weapon proficiency against a Medium or smaller creature within 20 feet. On a hit, the target is off-guard and takes a -10- foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds until it Escapes, and on a critical hit, it's also immobilized until it Escapes. The Escape DC is 16. A creature adjacent to the target can Interact to remove the net.

Arrows.name: 箭矢 Arrows
Arrows.description:
这些投射物是弓使用的弹药。箭杆由木头制成。它在飞行中通过一端的羽翎保持稳定，另一端则装有金属箭头。

These projectiles are the ammunition for bows. The shaft of an arrow is made of wood. It is stabilized in flight by fletching at one end and bears a metal head on the other.

Net Attack.name: 网击 Net Attack
Net Attack.description:
克洛特可以用他的网在命中时缠住一名对手，这是他在角斗士时期用过的把戏。

Klorte can use his net to ensnare an opponent on a hit, which is a trick that he used during his gladiator days.

Klorte Hengus.publicNotes:
流氓常常凭借力量欺压他人、迫使其屈服，并经常为强大的罪犯（例如江湖骗子与销赃者）担任保镖与打手。

有些罪犯是走投无路之人，别无选择只能违法求生；而另一些人则为了刺激而选择犯罪生涯，组成帮派或地下行会，专门从事某些特定的非法营生。

Using their strength to bully others into submission, ruffians often work as bodyguards and enforcers for powerful criminals like charlatans and fences.

Some criminals are the desperate who have no option but to break the law to survive, while others choose a life of crime for thrills, forming gangs or underworld guilds that specialize in certain illegal ventures.
Klorte Hengus.privateNotes:
此指示物基于一个出现在《憎恨魔窟》冒险路径中的角色，并使用了《Pathfinder Gamemastery Guide》中的模板。

This token is based on a character that appeared in the Abomination Vaults Adventure Path, using a template from Pathfinder Gamemastery Guide.
Klorte Hengus.prototypeToken: 克洛特·亨格斯 Klorte Hengus

Lardus Longsaddle.name: 拉杜斯·长鞍 Lardus Longsaddle

Dagger.name: 匕首 Dagger
Dagger.description:
这把小型刃类武器单手持握，用于在近身战斗中刺击生物。它也可以被投掷。

This small, bladed weapon is held in one hand and used to stab a creature in close combat. It can also be thrown.

Steel Shield.name: 钢盾 Steel Shield
Steel Shield.description:
像木制盾牌一样，钢盾有多种形状和体型。尽管比木制盾牌更昂贵，但它们要耐用得多。

硬度 HP BT
5 20 10

Like wooden shields, steel shields come in a variety of shapes and sizes. Though more expensive than wooden shields, they are much more durable.

Hardness HP BT
5 20 10

Full Plate.name: 全身板甲 Full Plate
Full Plate.description:
板甲由互相咬合的金属板组成，将几乎全身包裹在钢铁甲壳之中。它昂贵而沉重，穿戴者通常需要他人帮助才能正确穿上，但它提供了护甲所能提供的一些最佳防护。一套这种护甲配有一件内衬的填充护甲和一副护手。

Plate mail consists of interlocking plates that encase nearly the entire body in a carapace of steel. It is costly and heavy, and the wearer often requires help to don it correctly, but it provides some of the best defense armor can supply. A suit of this armor comes with an undercoat of padded armor and a pair of gauntlets.

Bolts.name: 弩矢 Bolts
Bolts.description:
弩矢比传统箭矢更短，但构造相似，是弩使用的弹药。

Shorter than traditional arrows but similar in construction, bolts are the ammunition used by crossbows.

Attack of Opportunity.name: 借机攻击 Attack of Opportunity

Aura of Command.name: 命令术灵光 Aura of Command
Aura of Command.description:
30英尺。卫队队长强化其命令术下的低等级卫兵，给予他们攻击掷骰+1状态加值，以及意志豁免+2状态加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.T9wQ1LvsvPWTefQR]{效果：在命令术之下}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.OxOMYmlPtjsEkRtY]{效果：命令术灵光}

30 feet. The captain of the guard bolsters lower-level guards under their command, granting them a +1 status bonus to their attack rolls and a +2 status bonus to their Will saves.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.T9wQ1LvsvPWTefQR]{Effect: Under Command}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.OxOMYmlPtjsEkRtY]{Effect: Aura of Command}

Bravery.name: 英勇 Bravery
Bravery.description:
当卫队队长在对抗恐惧术效果的意志豁免中掷出成功时，改为获得大成功或大失败。此外，每当其获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧（状态）} 状态时，将其数值降低1。

When the captain of the guard rolls a success on a Will save against a fear effect, they get a critical success instead. In addition, any time they gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened} condition, reduce its value by 1.

Shield Warden.name: 护盾术守卫 Shield Warden
Shield Warden.description:
当队长举起他们的护盾术时，当一次攻击对相邻的盟友进行时，他们可以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.m4HQ2o5aPxjXf2kY]{盾牌格挡}。若他们这么做，护盾术会防止该盟友承受伤害，而不是队长。

When the captain has their shield raised, they can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.m4HQ2o5aPxjXf2kY]{Shield Block} when an attack is made against an adjacent ally. If they do, the shield prevents that ally from taking damage instead of the captain.

Shielded Advance.name: 护盾推进 Shielded Advance
Shielded Advance.description:
需求 卫兵队长已举起其护盾术

效果 卫兵队长向前逼近，用其护盾术将敌人推回。

队长以任意顺序进行一次移动与一次 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{推撞}。多重攻击减值不适用于此次推撞，但此次推撞仍计入队长的多重攻击减值。

Requirements The captain of the guard has their shield raised

Effect The captain of the guard presses forward, using their shield to push back foes.

The captain Strides and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shoves}, in either order. The multiple attack penalty doesn't apply to this Shove, though the Shove does count toward the captain's multiple attack penalty.

Lardus Longsaddle.publicNotes:
卫队长率领一队士兵，为一位有权势的人物担任安保力量，最常见的是高阶贵族或极其富有的商人，不过该数据表也可以代表某个国家领袖麾下较低阶的卫队长。卫队长本身就是强劲的对手，能熟练地运用麾下部队来保护其被护卫者的生命与健康。

更大的社会依赖那些拥有权威与解读并执行法律能力的人员。在善良阵营的社会中，这些官员会公正地履行职责。在中立与邪恶的社会中，这些官员可能严苛而残酷（并调整阵营以反映这一点），对那些无法为怜悯付费的人施加严重的惩罚。

The captain of the guard leads a troop of soldiers who serve as security forces for a powerful individual, most often a high-ranking noble or very rich merchant, though this stat block could also represent a lower-ranking captain of the guard for the leader of a nation. A formidable opponent in their own right, the captain of the guard skillfully employs their troops to protect the life and health of their ward.

Larger societies rely on those with the authority and the ability to interpret and enforce laws. In good-aligned societies, these officials carry out their duties fairly. In neutral and evil ones, these officials can be harsh and cruel (with an altered alignment to reflect this), imposing severe punishments on those who can't pay for mercy.
Lardus Longsaddle.privateNotes:
此标记基于一个出现在《憎恨魔窟》冒险路径中的角色，并使用了《Pathfinder Gamemastery Guide》中的一个模板。

This token is based on a character that appeared in the Abomination Vaults Adventure Path, using a template from Pathfinder Gamemastery Guide.

Magiloy.name: 玛吉洛 Magiloy

Crystal Shards (Moderate).name: 水晶碎片（中等） Crystal Shards (Moderate)

Alchemist's Fire (Moderate).name: 炼金术士之火（中等） Alchemist's Fire (Moderate)

Studded Leather Armor.name: 镶嵌皮甲 Studded Leather Armor
Studded Leather Armor.description:
这套皮革护甲用金属铆钉加固，有时还会加上小型金属板，在提供与皮革护甲大致相同灵活性的同时，提供更强的防护。

This leather armor is reinforced with metal studs and sometimes small metal plates, providing most of the flexibility of leather armor with more robust protection.

Quick Bomber.name: 快速炸弹客 Quick Bomber
Quick Bomber.description:
鲁莽的科学家使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.pvQ5rY2zrtPI614F]{Interact} 来抽出一枚炸弹，然后用它进行打击。

The reckless scientist @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.pvQ5rY2zrtPI614F]{Interact} to draw a bomb, then Strikes with it.

Infused Items.name: 灌注物品 Infused Items
Infused Items.description:
一名鲁莽的科学家携带以下灌注物品：

  • 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.SgtqZxt26BdjUmEB]{Acid Flask (Moderate)},
  • 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.gWr4q4HiyGhETA8H]{Alchemist's Fire (Moderate)},
  • 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.T4ouD4mVFHA3EHs6]{Bomber's Eye Elixir (Lesser)},
  • 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.nVvH1ZcM7OwIVIs8]{Frost Vial (Moderate)},
  • 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.TZUskLT7yvP7N2co]{Elixir of Life (Lesser)}

这些物品持续 24 小时，或直到该科学家下一次进行每日准备为止。

A reckless scientist carries the following infused items:

  • 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.SgtqZxt26BdjUmEB]{Acid Flask (Moderate)},
  • 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.gWr4q4HiyGhETA8H]{Alchemist's Fire (Moderate)},
  • 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.T4ouD4mVFHA3EHs6]{Bomber's Eye Elixir (Lesser)},
  • 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.nVvH1ZcM7OwIVIs8]{Frost Vial (Moderate)},
  • 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.TZUskLT7yvP7N2co]{Elixir of Life (Lesser)}

These items last for 24 hours, or until the next time the scientist makes their daily preparations.

Magiloy.privateNotes:
此标记基于一个出现在《憎恨魔窟》冒险路径和《Pathfinder Gamemastery Guide》中的角色。

This token is based on a character that appeared in the Abomination Vaults Adventure Path and the Pathfinder Gamemastery Guide.

Oloria Gallentine.name: 奥罗瑞亚·加仑丁 Oloria Gallentine
Oloria Gallentine.tokenName: 奥罗瑞亚·加仑丁 Oloria Gallentine

Studded Leather Armor.name: 镶嵌皮甲 Studded Leather Armor
Studded Leather Armor.description:
这套皮革护甲用金属铆钉加固，有时还会加装小型金属板，在保有皮革护甲大部分灵活性的同时，提供更强的防护。

This leather armor is reinforced with metal studs and sometimes small metal plates, providing most of the flexibility of leather armor with more robust protection.

Manacles (Simple).name: 镣铐（简易） Manacles (Simple)
Manacles (Simple).description:
你可以将镣铐铐在自愿者身上，或铐在任你摆布的人身上，作为一项探索行动，花费10–30秒，取决于生物的体型以及你使用了多少副镣铐。双足生物若其双腿被绑缚，其速度会受到-15尺的环境减值；双手生物若其手腕被绑缚，则每当其使用一个操作行动时，必须成功通过一次@Check[type:flat|dc:5]，否则该行动失败。根据镣铐对双手的束缚有多紧，此DC可能更高。被绑在固定物体上的生物陷入定身。对于肢体更多或更少的生物，GM决定镣铐是否产生效果，以及产生何种效果。将生物从简易镣铐中解脱需要三次成功的@Check[type:thievery|dc:22|traits:action:pick-a-lock]检定。

You can manacle someone who is willing or otherwise at your mercy as an exploration activity taking 10-30 seconds depending on the creature's size and how many manacles you apply. A two-legged creature with its legs bound takes a -15-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds, and a two-handed creature with its wrists bound has to succeed at a @Check[type:flat|dc:5] any time it uses a manipulate action or else that action fails. This DC may be higher depending on how tightly the manacles constrain the hands. A creature bound to a stationary object is immobilized. For creatures with more or fewer limbs, the GM determines what effect manacles have, if any. Freeing a creature from simple manacles requires three successful @Check[type:thievery|dc:22|traits:action:pick-a-lock] checks.

Bolts.name: 弩箭 Bolts
Bolts.description:
弩矢比传统箭矢更短，但结构相似，是弩使用的弹药。

Shorter than traditional arrows but similar in construction, bolts are the ammunition used by crossbows.

Hunt Prey.name: 猎杀目标 Hunt Prey
Hunt Prey.description:
赏金猎人指定一个他们能看见并听见的生物，或一个他们正在追踪的生物，作为他们的猎物。赏金猎人获得+2环境加值，用于对猎物进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜寻}的察觉检定，以及用于对猎物进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{追踪}的生存检定。此效果持续至赏金猎人再次使用猎杀目标为止。

The bounty hunter designates a single creature they can see and hear, or one they're Tracking, as their prey. The bounty hunter gains a +2 circumstance bonus to Perception checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} the prey and to Survival checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{Track} the prey. This effect lasts until the bounty hunter uses Hunt Prey again.

Precision Edge.name: 精准锋芒 Precision Edge
Precision Edge.description:
在每轮中，赏金猎人第一次命中其被追猎的猎物时，会额外造成 1d8 点精准伤害。

The first time the bounty hunter hits their hunted prey in a round, they deal an additional 1d8 precision damage.

Running Reload.name: 移动装填 Running Reload
Running Reload.description:
赏金猎人可大步、快步或潜行，然后交互以装填。

The bounty hunter Strides, Steps, or Sneaks, and then Interacts to reload.

Oloria Gallentine.publicNotes:
赏金猎人总是在路上，无论是在城墙之内还是荒野之中，追踪他们逃亡的猎物以将其捕获……或处置。他们常常在依靠潜行或欺骗的程度上不亚于依靠武艺，赏金猎人运用种类繁多的才能来达成目标，更不用说收取随之而来的丰厚报酬了。

这是一个广泛的类别，包含那些挥舞武器、施展法术，甚至运用诡计与狡黠的人；雇佣兵将自己与自己的专长出卖给那些付得起黄金的人。

Bounty hunters are constantly on the move, whether within city walls or the wilderness, trailing their fugitive quarries for capture... or disposal. Often relying on stealth or deception as much as martial skill, bounty hunters employ a vast array of talents to accomplish their goals, not to mention to collect the hefty payout that follows.

A broad category that includes those wielding arms, spells, or even guile and cunning, mercenaries hire themselves and their expertise to those with the gold to pay for it.
Oloria Gallentine.privateNotes:
此标记基于一个出现在《憎恨魔窟》冒险路径和《Pathfinder Gamemastery Guide》中的角色。

This token is based on a character that appeared in the Abomination Vaults Adventure Path and the Pathfinder Gamemastery Guide.
Oloria Gallentine.prototypeToken: 奥罗瑞亚·加仑丁 Oloria Gallentine

Oseph Menhemes.name: 欧瑟夫·曼妮姆斯 Oseph Menhemes
Oseph Menhemes.tokenName: 欧瑟夫·曼妮姆斯 Oseph Menhemes

Clothing (High-Fashion Fine).name: 服装（高级时尚·精制） Clothing (High-Fashion Fine)
Clothing (High-Fashion Fine).description:
适合贵族或王室成员的精致服装由昂贵的织物、贵金属与繁复的图案制成。穿着高级时尚的精致服装时，你在对贵族或其他上流人士进行建立印象的检定中获得+1物品加值。

Fine clothing, suitable for a noble or royal, is made with expensive fabrics, precious metals, and intricate patterns. You gain a +1 item bonus to checks to Make an Impression on nobility or other upper-class folk while wearing high-fashion fine clothing.

Lip Reader.name: 读唇者 Lip Reader
Lip Reader.description:
经过多年把鼻子伸到不该伸的地方，这位贵族已经学会了从远处读唇，其效果如同@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.yUuU9xyotrpwpTyC]{读唇}专长。

After years of sticking their nose where it doesn't belong, the noble has learned to read lips from afar, with the effects of the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.yUuU9xyotrpwpTyC]{Read Lips} feat.

Noble's Ruse.name: 贵族的诡计 Noble's Ruse
Noble's Ruse.description:
频率 每轮一次

效果 该贵族进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.QNAVeNKtHA0EUw4X]{虚招}。若成功，该贵族对目标进行打击。

Frequency Once per round

Effect The noble @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.QNAVeNKtHA0EUw4X]{Feints}. On a success, the noble Strikes the target.

Sneak Attack.name: 偷袭 Sneak Attack
Sneak Attack.description:
该贵族对@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}的生物额外造成1d6点精准伤害。

The noble deals 1d6 extra precision damage to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} creatures.

Appraising Eye.name: 鉴定之眼 Appraising Eye
Appraising Eye.description:
商人可以使用商贸学识来@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}关于物品的信息，包括确定其价值。他们也可以尝试使用商贸学识来@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.eReSHVEPCsdkSL4G]{辨识魔法}，并且无需先知道该物品是否具有魔法。

The merchant can use Mercantile Lore to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about items, including determining their value. They can also attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.eReSHVEPCsdkSL4G]{Identify Magic} using Mercantile Lore and can do so without first knowing whether the item is magical.

Oseph Menhemes.publicNotes:
为许多人所嫉羡，也为另一些人所憎恨，贵族散发着自信与优雅。流言蜚语与赌博常是贵族最喜爱的消遣。贵族的日常生活往往是事务与享乐的混合体；在旁观者看来，这样的生活方式似乎不过是一连串的宴席、派对与游乐厅。然而，与一些人所想的不同，贵族的生活往往相当危险，所需的智谋远比表面看起来更多——还得带上一剂充足的疑心。

尽管冒险者在险恶的地城中穿行，并跨越危机四伏的荒野旅行，但有时他们最终可能置身的最危险之处，是贵族的宫廷。

Envied by many and detested by still others, nobles exude confidence and gentility. Gossip and gambling are often nobles' favorite pastimes. Day-to-day life for a noble is often a mixture of business and leisure, and to an onlooker, such a lifestyle can appear to be nothing more than a string of meals, parties, and game halls. However, despite what some might believe, life as a noble is often quite dangerous and requires far more intellect than it would appear-along with a healthy dose of suspicion.

Though adventurers travel through perilous dungeons and across treacherous wilderness, sometimes the most dangerous place they can end up is in a noble court.
Oseph Menhemes.privateNotes:
此指示物基于一个出现在《憎恨魔窟》冒险路径中的角色，使用了《Pathfinder 游戏主持指南》中的一个模板。
This token is based on a character that appeared in the Abomination Vaults Adventure Path, using a template from Pathfinder Gamemastery Guide.
Oseph Menhemes.prototypeToken: 欧瑟夫·曼妮姆斯 Oseph Menhemes

Tamily Tanderveil.name: 塔米莉·坦德威尔 Tamily Tanderveil
Tamily Tanderveil.tokenName: 塔米莉·坦德威尔 Tamily Tanderveil

Barkeep's Apron.name: 酒保围裙 Barkeep's Apron
Barkeep's Apron.description:
这套护甲只是由一层厚重的绗缝布料构成，但有时会因为它非常便宜而被使用。衬垫护甲比其他类型的护甲更容易受损和被摧毁。重型护甲的价格中包含了一件衬垫护甲内衬，不过当衬垫护甲穿在重型护甲之下时，会失去舒适特征。你可以只穿这件衬垫护甲或内衬来睡觉、在你的重型护甲被摧毁时，或在其他不穿完整重型护甲的情况下穿着。这使你可以让护甲保持投入状态，并从与之关联的重型护甲上任何符文的力量中获益，但没有这件衬垫护甲内衬，其他人无法穿戴你的重型护甲。

This armor is simply a layer of heavy, quilted cloth, but it is sometimes used because it's so inexpensive. Padded armor is easier to damage and destroy than other types of armor. Heavy armor comes with a padded armor undercoat included in its Price, though it loses the comfort trait when worn under heavy armor. You can wear just that padded armor or undercoat to sleep in, if your heavy armor is destroyed, or when otherwise not wearing the full heavy armor. This allows you to keep the armor invested and benefit from the power of any runes on the associated heavy armor, but no one else can wear your heavy armor without the padded undercoat.

Flask of Whiskey.name: 威士忌酒壶 Flask of Whiskey
Flask of Whiskey.description:
酒精是一种常见物质，种类繁多、令人目眩。每剂酒精的价格取决于具体饮品。在受酒精影响期间，你无法从酒精导致的恶心（状态）中恢复。

如果你在对抗酒精（初始豁免除外）的豁免中失败，苦难的阶段不会提高；提高酒精苦难阶段的唯一方式是摄入更多酒精。

启动 A 交互（摄入）

豁免 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:12|name:Alcohol]

潜伏期 10分钟

阶段 1 对抗恐惧术的豁免获得+1物品加值（10分钟）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}，对抗恐惧术效果的豁免获得+1物品加值（10分钟）

阶段 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}，off-guard，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2}（10分钟）

阶段 4 clumsy 2且@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}（10分钟）

阶段 5 clumsy 2，sickened 2，且stupefied 2（10分钟）

阶段 6 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}（8小时）

阶段 7 死亡

Alcohol is a common substance available in stunning variety. The Price of a dose of alcohol depends on the specific beverage. You can't recover from the sickened condition from alcohol while affected.

If you fail a saving throw against alcohol other than initial saves, the affliction's stage doesn't increase; the only way to increase the stage of alcohol's affliction is to consume more alcohol.

Activate A Interact (Ingested)

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:12|name:Alcohol]

Onset 10 minutes

Stage 1 +1 item bonus to saving throws against fear (10 minutes)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}, +1 item bonus to saving throws against fear effects (10 minutes)

Stage 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}, off-guard, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} (10 minutes)

Stage 4 clumsy 2 and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} (10 minutes)

Stage 5 clumsy 2, sickened 2, and stupefied 2 (10 minutes)

Stage 6 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} (8 hours)

Stage 7 death

Bar Brawler.name: 酒吧斗殴者 Bar Brawler
Bar Brawler.description:
酒保经历过足够多的酒吧斗殴，知道该如何挥出几拳。在他们的酒吧里战斗并进行非致命攻击时，酒保在攻击掷骰上获得+1环境加值，并额外造成[[/r {1d4}]]{1d4伤害}。

The barkeep has been in enough bar fights to know how to throw a few punches. When fighting in their bar and making a nonlethal attack, the barkeep gains a +1 circumstance bonus to attack rolls and deals an additional [[/r {1d4}]]{1d4 damage}.

Barkeep's Advice.name: 酒馆老板的忠告 Barkeep's Advice
Barkeep's Advice.description:
频率 每天一次

效果 酒保向一个除其自身以外的单个生物提供一些相关建议。持续24小时，当该生物在一次技能检定或豁免检定中失败时，它可以回想起这条建议并重骰该检定，且必须使用第二次结果。一旦该生物使用了此能力，其效果结束。

获得酒保建议的生物会对该能力暂时免疫1个月。

Frequency once per day

Effect The barkeep gives some pertinent advice to a single creature other than themself. For 24 hours, when that creature fails a skill check or saving throw, they can recall this advice and reroll the check, using the second result instead. Once that creature uses this ability, its effect ends.

A creature that receives the Barkeep's Advice is temporarily immune to the ability for 1 month.

Tamily Tanderveil.publicNotes:
酒馆老板往往是社区中的朋友与导师，在提供酒水的同时也愿意倾听。最出色的酒馆老板往往也擅长讲故事，并传授宝贵的建议。

无数的冒险都始于酒馆或小酒馆。也许是因为这类地方会吸引爱冒险的人，又或许是因为在决定去对付一群横冲直撞的食人魔之前，每个人都需要一点液体勇气。

Barkeeps are often friends and mentors within a community, lending an ear while supplying libations. The best barkeeps have some talent for storytelling and passing on valuable advice.

Countless adventures begin in a tavern or a pub. Maybe it's because such places attract the risk-prone, or maybe it's because everyone needs a little liquid courage before they decide to take on a group of rampaging ogres.
Tamily Tanderveil.privateNotes:
此指示物基于一名出现在《憎恨魔窟》冒险路径中的角色，使用《Pathfinder 游戏主持人指南》中的一个模板。

This token is based on a character that appeared in the Abomination Vaults Adventure Path, using a template from Pathfinder Gamemastery Guide.
Tamily Tanderveil.prototypeToken: 塔米莉·坦德威尔 Tamily Tanderveil

Vandy Banderdash.name: 万蒂·班得黛西 Vandy Banderdash

Specific Deity Lore.name: 特定神祇传说 Specific Deity Lore

Main-Gauche.name: 主手挡刺剑 Main-Gauche
Main-Gauche.description:
这把格挡匕首配有坚固的护手，用以保护持用者的手。

This parrying dagger features a robust guard to protect the wielder's hand.

Prepared Divine Spells.name: 预备神圣法术 Prepared Divine Spells

Focus Divine Spells.name: 专注神圣法术 Focus Divine Spells

Heal.name: 治疗术 Heal
Heal.description:
你引导正能量来治疗活物或伤害不死生物。如果目标是自愿的活体生物，你恢复1d10生命值。如果目标是不死生物，你对其造成等量的正能量伤害，并且它必须进行一次基础强韧豁免。你在施放该法术时所花费的动作数量决定其目标、射程、区域以及其他参数。

1 动作（姿势）该法术的射程为接触。

2 动作（姿势，言语）该法术的射程为30尺。如果你在治疗一个活体生物，使恢复的生命值增加8。

3 动作（材料，姿势，言语）你在30尺散发中散布正能量。这会以爆发为目标影响其中所有活体生物与不死生物。

升阶（+1）治疗或伤害的数值增加1d10，且2动作版本的额外治疗增加8。

You channel positive energy to heal the living or damage the undead. If the target is a willing living creature, you restore 1d10 Hit Points. If the target is undead, you deal that amount of positive damage to it, and it gets a basic Fortitude save. The number of actions you spend when Casting this Spell determines its targets, range, area, and other parameters.

1 Action (somatic) The spell has a range of touch.

2 Actions (somatic, verbal) The spell has a range of 30 feet. If you're healing a living creature, increase the Hit Points restored by 8.

3 Actions (material, somatic, verbal) You disperse positive energy in a 30-foot emanation. This targets all living and undead creatures in the burst.

Heightened (+1) The amount of healing or damage increases by 1d10, and the extra healing for the 2-action version increases by 8.

Sanctuary.name: 圣域术 Sanctuary
Sanctuary.description:
你用保护性能量守护一名生物，以阻止敌人的攻击。生物每次试图攻击目标时都必须尝试一次意志豁免。如果目标使用敌对动作，则该法术结束。

大成功或大失败 圣域术结束。

成功 该生物可以尝试进行其攻击，以及本回合中对目标的任何其他攻击。

失败 该生物无法攻击目标并浪费该动作。它本回合不能再尝试对目标进行进一步的攻击。

大成功或大失败 该生物浪费该动作，并且在圣域术持续时间的剩余时间内不能尝试攻击目标。

You ward a creature with protective energy that deters enemy attacks. Creatures attempting to attack the target must attempt a Will save each time. If the target uses a hostile action, the spell ends.

Critical Success Sanctuary ends.

Success The creature can attempt its attack and any other attacks against the target this turn.

Failure The creature can't attack the target and wastes the action. It can't attempt further attacks against the target this turn.

Critical Failure The creature wastes the action and can't attempt to attack the target for the rest of sanctuary's duration.

Create Water.name: 造水术 Create Water
Create Water.description:
当你将双手捧成杯状时，水开始从中流出。你创造2加仑的水。若无人饮用，它会在1天后蒸发。

As you cup your hands, water begins to flow forth from them. You create 2 gallons of water. If no one drinks it, it evaporates after 1 day.

Bless.name: 祝福术 Bless
Bless.description:
来自彼界的祝福帮助你的伙伴精准打击。你和你的盟友在散发范围内时，攻击掷骰获得+1状态加值。从你施放祝福术后的下个回合开始，每回合一次，你可以使用一个具有专注（特征）的单动作，将散发半径增加5尺。祝福术可以反制绝望术。

@Compendium[pf2e.spell-effects.Gqy7K6FnbLtwGpud]{法术效果：祝福术}

Blessings from beyond help your companions strike true. You and your allies gain a +1 status bonus to attack rolls while within the emanation. Once per turn, starting the turn after you cast bless, you can use a single action, which has the concentrate trait, to increase the emanation's radius by 5 feet. Bless can counteract bane.

@Compendium[pf2e.spell-effects.Gqy7K6FnbLtwGpud]{Spell Effect: Bless}

Purify Food and Drink.name: 净化饮食 Purify Food and Drink
Purify Food and Drink.description:
你从食物和饮料中去除毒素与污染物，使其可安全食用或饮用。此法术不会防止未来的污染、自然衰败或腐坏。1立方英尺的液体约为8加仑。

You remove toxins and contaminations from food and drink, making them safe to consume. This spell doesn't prevent future contamination, natural decay, or spoilage. One cubic foot of liquid is roughly 8 gallons.

Protection.name: 防护 Protection
Protection.description:
你保护一个生物免受特定阵营影响。你施放该法术时选择混乱、邪恶、善良或守序。目标获得对抗所选阵营的生物与效果时，其护甲等级与豁免检定获得+1状态加值。此加值在对抗来自此类生物、会直接控制目标的效果时，以及对抗由所选阵营的召唤生物所进行的攻击时，提高为+3。

该法术获得与你所选阵营相对立的特征——若你选择混乱，该法术获得守序特征，反之亦然；若你选择邪恶，该法术获得善良特征，反之亦然。

@Compendium[pf2e.spell-effects.lpqkZkslFMirsItL]{法术效果：防护混乱}

@Compendium[pf2e.spell-effects.nEqBnsrvJZzh8Bil]{法术效果：防护邪恶}

@Compendium[pf2e.spell-effects.qVngSDWvHcnht0fP]{法术效果：防护善良}

@Compendium[pf2e.spell-effects.B6zSwNFJV3TMafHf]{法术效果：防护守序}

You ward a creature against a specified alignment. Choose chaotic, evil, good, or lawful when you cast this spell. The target gains a +1 status bonus to Armor Class and saving throws against creatures and effects of the chosen alignment. This bonus increases to +3 against effects from such creatures that would directly control the target and against attacks made by summoned creatures of the chosen alignment.

This spell gains the trait that opposes the alignment you chose-if you choose chaos, this spell gains the lawful trait, and vice versa; if you choose evil, this spell gains the good trait, and vice versa.

@Compendium[pf2e.spell-effects.lpqkZkslFMirsItL]{Spell Effect: Protection from Chaotic}

@Compendium[pf2e.spell-effects.nEqBnsrvJZzh8Bil]{Spell Effect: Protection from Evil}

@Compendium[pf2e.spell-effects.qVngSDWvHcnht0fP]{Spell Effect: Protection from Good}

@Compendium[pf2e.spell-effects.B6zSwNFJV3TMafHf]{Spell Effect: Protection from Lawful}

Disrupt Undead.name: 打击死灵 Disrupt Undead
Disrupt Undead.description:
你以能量刺穿目标。你造成1d6正能量伤害加上你的施法能力调整值。目标必须进行一次基础强韧豁免。如果生物在该豁免中大失败，它还会在1轮内获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 1}。

升阶（+1） 伤害提高1d6。

You lance the target with energy. You deal 1d6 positive damage plus your spellcasting ability modifier. The target must attempt a basic Fortitude save. If the creature critically fails the save, it is also @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} for 1 round.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你释放出一道脉冲，用以登记魔法的存在。你不会获得任何超出“存在或不存在魔法”之外的信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你和盟友的魔法物品以及持续中的法术。

你只有在幻术魔法的效果等级低于你的侦测魔法法术的等级时，才能侦测到该幻术魔法。然而，具有幻术灵光但外观并不具欺骗性的物品（例如隐形术药水）通常仍会被正常侦测到。

升阶（3环） 你得知该法术在射程内侦测到的最高等级效果所属的魔法学派。若有多个效果强度相同，则由 GM 决定你得知哪一个。

升阶（4环） 同 3环，但你还会标定最高等级魔法的来源。就像模糊感官一样，你不会得知精确位置，但能将来源缩小到 5 尺立方体内（若来源大于该范围，则缩小到最近的同等范围）。

You send out a pulse that registers the presence of magic. You receive no information beyond the presence or absence of magic. You can choose to ignore magic you're fully aware of, such as the magic items and ongoing spells of you and your allies.

You detect illusion magic only if that magic's effect has a lower level than the level of your detect magic spell. However, items that have an illusion aura but aren't deceptive in appearance (such as an invisibility potion) typically are detected normally.

Heightened (3rd) You learn the school of magic for the highest-level effect within range that the spell detects. If multiple effects are equally strong, the GM determines which you learn.

Heightened (4th) As 3rd level, but you also pinpoint the source of the highest-level magic. Like for an imprecise sense, you don't learn the exact location, but can narrow down the source to within a 5-foot cube (or the nearest if larger than that).

Divine Lance.name: 圣枪术 Divine Lance
Divine Lance.description:
你释放出一道神圣能量射线。选择一个你的神祇拥有的阵营（混乱、邪恶、善良或守序）。如果你没有神祇，或你的神祇为绝对中立，你无法施放该法术。对目标的AC进行一次远程法术攻击掷骰。命中时，目标受到等同于1d4 + 你的施法能力调整值的、所选阵营类型的伤害（大成功时伤害加倍）。该法术获得你所选阵营的特征。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加1d4。

You unleash a beam of divine energy. Choose an alignment your deity has (chaotic, evil, good, or lawful). You can't cast this spell if you don't have a deity or if your deity is true neutral. Make a ranged spell attack roll against the target's AC. On a hit, the target takes damage of the chosen alignment type equal to 1d4 + your spellcasting ability modifier (double damage on a critical hit). The spell gains the trait of the alignment you chose.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Forbidding Ward.name: 禁制结界 Forbidding Ward
Forbidding Ward.description:
你守护一名盟友，使其免受目标敌人的攻击和敌对法术。目标盟友在对抗目标敌人的攻击、法术以及其他效果时，护甲等级与豁免检定获得+1状态加值。

@Compendium[pf2e.spell-effects.ctMxYPGEpstvhW9C]{法术效果：禁阻守护}

升阶（6环） 状态加值提升至+2。

You ward an ally against the attacks and hostile spells from the target enemy. The target ally gains a +1 status bonus to Armor Class and saving throws against the target enemy's attacks, spells, and other effects.

@Compendium[pf2e.spell-effects.ctMxYPGEpstvhW9C]{Spell Effect: Forbidding Ward}

Heightened (6th) The status bonus increases to +2.

Light.name: 光亮术 Light
Light.description:
该物体发光，像火把一样在20英尺半径内投射明亮光照（并在之后的20英尺内提供昏暗光照）。如果你在第二个物体上再次施放此法术，第一个物体上的光亮术结束。

@Compendium[pf2e.spell-effects.cVVZXNbV0nElVOPZ]{法术效果：光亮术}

强化（4环） 该物体在60英尺半径内散发明亮光照（并在之后的60英尺内提供昏暗光照）。

The object glows, casting bright light in a 20-foot radius (and dim light for the next 20 feet) like a torch. If you cast this spell again on a second object, the light spell on the first object ends.

@Compendium[pf2e.spell-effects.cVVZXNbV0nElVOPZ]{Spell Effect: Light}

Heightened (4th) The object sheds bright light in a 60-foot radius (and dim light for the next 60 feet).

Stabilize.name: 稳定伤势 Stabilize
Stabilize.description:
正能量关闭死亡之门。目标失去 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{濒死}（状态），但在生命值为0时仍保持 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{昏迷}。

Positive energy shuts death's door. The target loses the @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{Dying} condition, though it remains @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} at 0 Hit Points.

Guidance.name: 指引 Guidance
Guidance.description:
你祈求神圣指引，使目标在持续时间结束前进行的一次攻击掷骰、察觉检定、豁免掷骰或技能检定获得+1状态加值。目标必须在掷骰前选择将该加值用于哪一次掷骰。若目标使用了该加值，则该法术结束。无论如何，目标随后获得1小时的暂时免疫。

@Compendium[pf2e.spell-effects.3qHKBDF7lrHw8jFK]{法术效果：指引术}

@Compendium[pf2e.spell-effects.3LyOkV25p7wA181H]{效果：指引术免疫}

You ask for divine guidance, granting the target a +1 status bonus to one attack roll, Perception check, saving throw, or skill check the target attempts before the duration ends. The target chooses which roll to use the bonus on before rolling. If the target uses the bonus, the spell ends. Either way, the target is then temporarily immune for 1 hour.

@Compendium[pf2e.spell-effects.3qHKBDF7lrHw8jFK]{Spell Effect: Guidance}

@Compendium[pf2e.spell-effects.3LyOkV25p7wA181H]{Effect: Guidance Immunity}

Protector's Sacrifice.name: 守护者的牺牲 Protector's Sacrifice
Protector's Sacrifice.description:
触发 30尺内的一名盟友受到伤害。

你以代其受苦的方式保护你的盟友。将触发的盟友本应受到的伤害减少3点。你将这部分伤害转移到你自己身上，但你的免疫、弱点、抗力等等都不适用。你不会受到任何对盟友造成伤害之事物所附带的状态或其他效果（例如毒性咬击所带来的毒素）。即使你将所有触发的伤害都转移到自己身上，你的盟友仍然会受到这些效果影响。

升阶（+1） 你转移的伤害增加3点。

Trigger An ally within 30 feet takes damage.

You protect your ally by suffering in their stead. Reduce the damage the triggering ally would take by 3. You redirect this damage to yourself, but your immunities, weaknesses, resistances and so on do not apply. You aren't subject to any conditions or other effects of whatever damaged your ally (such as poison from a venomous bite). Your ally is still subject to those effects even if you redirect all of the triggering damage to yourself.

Heightened (+1) The damage you redirect increases by 3.

Communal Healing.name: 共享治疗 Communal Healing
Communal Healing.description:
当女祭司施放 @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{治疗术} 法术来治疗除自身以外的单一目标时，她们恢复等同于该治疗术法术等级的生命值。

When the Priestess casts a @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{Heal} spell to heal a single target other than themselves they regain Hit Points equal to the spell level of the heal spell.

Restoration.name: 复原术 Restoration
Restoration.description:
复原魔法对抗毒素或使生物无法发挥最佳状态的状态所造成的效果。当你施放复原术时，选择降低一种状态或减轻一种毒素的效果。生物每天只能从一个复原术法术中获益一次，并且对于某一特定毒素的同一次暴露，它不能从复原术中获益超过一次来降低其阶段。

  • 减轻一种毒素 将目标所受的一种毒素的阶段降低1个阶段。此效果不能将阶段降低到阶段1以下，也不能治愈该苦难。
  • 降低一种状态 将目标的 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙}、@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{衰弱} 或 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞（状态）}状态的数值降低2。你也可以改为将上述列表中的两种状态各降低1。

升阶（4环） 将 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{汲取}加入你可以降低的状态列表。当你减轻一种毒素时，将其阶段降低2个阶段。你还获得第三个选项，使你可以将目标的 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{毁灭（状态）}数值降低1。你不能用此效果来降低永久性的毁灭（状态）。

升阶（6环） 如同4环复原术，但若你在施放法术时额外加入一个施法动作和一个材料成分，你便可以降低永久性的毁灭（状态）；在此过程中，你必须提供价值100 gp的钻石粉作为花费。

Restorative magic counters the effects of toxins or conditions that prevent a creature from functioning at its best. When you cast restoration, choose to either reduce a condition or lessen the effect of a toxin. A creature can benefit from only one restoration spell each day, and it can't benefit from restoration more than once to reduce the stage of the same exposure to a given toxin.

  • Lessen a Toxin Reduce the stage of one toxin the target suffers from by one stage. This can't reduce the stage below stage 1 or cure the affliction.
  • Reduce a Condition Reduce the value of the target's @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy}, @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled}, or @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied} condition by 2. You can instead reduce two of the listed conditions by 1 each.

Heightened (4th) Add @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained} to the list of conditions you can reduce. When you lessen a toxin, reduce the stage by two. You also gain a third option that allows you to reduce the target's @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed} value by 1. You can't use this to reduce a permanent Doomed condition.

Heightened (6th) As the 4th-level restoration, but you can reduce a permanent Doomed condition if you add a spellcasting action and a material component while Casting the Spell, during which you provide 100 gp worth of diamond dust as a cost.

Remove Paralysis.name: 移除麻痹 Remove Paralysis
Remove Paralysis.description:
一股能量奔涌解放一名处于@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹（状态）}的生物。你可以尝试反制一个对目标施加麻痹（状态）的单一效果。这不能治愈因某些自然状态或效果而麻痹的人，例如由非魔法伤口或毒素导致的麻痹。

升阶（6环） 该法术的射程增加至30英尺，且你可以以最多10个生物为目标。

A surge of energy frees a @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} creature. You can attempt to counteract a single effect imposing the Paralyzed condition on the target. This does not cure someone who is Paralyzed from some natural state or effect, such as paralysis caused by non-magical wounds or toxins.

Heightened (6th) The spell's range increases to 30 feet, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Remove Fear.name: 移除恐惧术 Remove Fear
Remove Fear.description:
通过接触，你缓解一名生物的恐惧。你可以尝试反制目标所承受的单一恐惧术效果。这只会解放目标，而非任何其他处于该恐惧术效果下的生物。

升阶（6环） 该法术的射程增加至30英尺，并且你可以以最多10名生物为目标。

With a touch, you ease a creature's fears. You can attempt to counteract a single fear effect that the target suffers from. This frees only the target, not any other creatures under the fear effect.
