Heightened (6th) The spell's range increases to 30 feet, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Restore Senses.name: 复原感官卷轴 Restore Senses
Restore Senses.description:
你尝试反制施加在目标身上的单一效果，该效果使其陷入@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲}或@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{耳聋（状态）}状态，从而恢复其视觉或听觉。这可以反制临时的魔法以及魔法造成的永久性后果，但它不能治愈因某些自然状态或效果而缺失该感官的人，例如先天如此，或因非魔法的伤口或毒素所致。

升阶（6环） 该法术的射程提高至30尺，且你可以以最多10个生物为目标。你可以为每个选定的生物分别选择要反制的效果。

You attempt to counteract a single effect imposing the @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} or @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened} conditions on the target, restoring its vision or hearing. This can counteract both temporary magic and permanent consequences of magic, but it doesn't cure someone who does not have the sense due to some natural state or effect, such as from birth or from a non-magical wound or toxin.

Heightened (6th) The spell's range increases to 30 feet, and you can target up to 10 creatures. You can choose the effect to counteract separately for each selected creature.

Detect Poison.name: 侦测毒素 Detect Poison
Detect Poison.description:
你侦测一个生物是否有毒（带毒液或有毒性），或一个物体是否为毒物或已被下毒。你不会得知该目标是否以多种方式有毒，也不会了解毒物的种类。某些物质，如铅和酒精，是毒物，因此会掩盖其他毒物。

强化（2环） 你得知毒物的数量与种类。

You detect whether a creature is venomous or poisonous, or if an object is poison or has been poisoned. You do not ascertain whether the target is poisonous in multiple ways, nor do you learn the type or types of poison. Certain substances, like lead and alcohol, are poisons and so mask other poisons.

Heightened (2nd) You learn the number and types of poison.

Shield Other.name: 护盾术其他人 Shield Other
Shield Other.description:
你在目标的生命精华与你自身之间锻造一条临时链接。目标从所有造成生命值伤害的效果中仅承受一半伤害，而你承受剩余的伤害。当你通过该链接承受伤害时，你不会将任何抗力、弱点或你拥有的其他能力应用于该伤害；你只是承受等量的伤害。若目标与您的距离曾经超过30英尺，则该法术结束。若你或目标任意一方降至0生命值，则先结算由该法术产生的任何伤害，然后该法术结束。

You forge a temporary link between the target's life essence and your own. The target takes half damage from all effects that deal Hit Point damage, and you take the remainder of the damage. When you take damage through this link, you don't apply any resistances, weaknesses, or other abilities you have to that damage; you simply take that amount of damage. The spell ends if the target is ever more than 30 feet away from you. If either you or the target is reduced to 0 Hit Points, any damage from this spell is resolved and then the spell ends.

See Invisibility.name: 识破隐形 See Invisibility
See Invisibility.description:
你可以看见 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形} 生物和物体。它们在你眼中呈半透明的轮廓，并且对你而言是 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 的。

升阶（5环） 该法术的持续时间为 8 小时。

You can see @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} creatures and objects. They appear to you as translucent shapes, and they are @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} to you.

Heightened (5th) The spell has a duration of 8 hours.

Clothing (Ordinary).name: 衣物（普通） Clothing (Ordinary)
Clothing (Ordinary).description:
普通服装具有基本剪裁，实用耐穿，例如农民装束、僧侣长袍或工作服。

Ordinary clothing is functional with basic tailoring, such as peasant garb, monk's robes, or work clothes.

Circle of Protection.name: 防护法阵 Circle of Protection
Circle of Protection.description:
你为一个生物及其附近的对象对抗指定阵营的影响设置防护。选择混乱、邪恶、善良或守序；此法术获得与所选阵营相对的特征。区域内的生物在对抗所选阵营生物的攻击时，其AC获得+1状态加值；在对抗来自此类生物的效果时，其豁免也获得+1状态加值。若该效果直接控制目标，以及对抗由所选阵营召唤的生物所作的攻击时，此加值提高至+3。所选阵营的召唤生物若未能成功通过一次意志豁免，则无法自愿进入该区域；重复尝试使用第一次豁免结果。

升阶（4环） 持续时间增加至1小时。

You ward a creature and those nearby against a specified alignment. Choose chaotic, evil, good, or lawful; this spell gains the opposing trait. Creatures in the area gain a +1 status bonus to AC against attacks by creatures of the chosen alignment and to saves against effects from such creatures. This bonus increases to +3 against effects from such creatures that directly control the target and attacks made by summoned creatures of the chosen alignment. Summoned creatures of the chosen alignment can't willingly enter the area without succeeding at a Will save; repeated attempts use the first save result.

Heightened (4th) The duration increases to 1 hour.

Life Connection.name: 生命联结 Life Connection
Life Connection.description:
当你施放此法术时，你会在目标的生命力深处植入一道保险装置。只要你们彼此相距不超过1英里，你就能感知到目标何时受到伤害。一个生物同时最多只能成为一个生命连接的一部分。当法术完成时，你获得@Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.5V49l0K460CcvBOO]{Defend Life}反应动作（）；一旦你使用该反应动作（），该法术便结束。

When you cast this spell, you place a failsafe deep within the life force of the target. You can sense when the target takes damage, provided you're within 1 mile of one another. A creature can be part of no more than one life connection simultaneously. When the spell is complete, you gain the @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.5V49l0K460CcvBOO]{Defend Life} reaction; once you use the reaction, the spell ends.

Neutralize Poison.name: 中和毒素 Neutralize Poison
Neutralize Poison.description:
你将治疗魔法注入目标体内，试图治愈一种正使其受害的毒素。对该毒素进行一次反制检定。

You pour healing magic through the target in an attempt to cure one poison afflicting it. Attempt a counteract check against the poison.

Remove Disease.name: 移除疾病 Remove Disease
Remove Disease.description:
治疗魔法会从一个生物的身体中清除疾病。你尝试反制一个正在折磨目标的疾病。

Healing magic purges disease from a creature's body. You attempt to counteract one disease afflicting the target.

Soothing Blossoms.name: 抚慰花朵 Soothing Blossoms
Soothing Blossoms.description:
一小片区域内从地面长出花朵，抚慰并驱散苦难与持续性的痛楚与伤害。当该区域内的任意生物对毒素或疾病效果进行豁免并掷出成功时，改为获得大成功或大失败中的大成功。花朵为区域内所有人提供协助恢复，以终止其持续伤害：在施放该法术时，以及在你每个回合开始时各一次。持续时间结束后，花朵失去其魔法效果，但其中少数可能会在该区域内自然存活，直到它们按自然方式枯萎为止。除非该苦难的阶段持续时间为10分钟或更短，否则该法术不会在对抗苦难的豁免上提供益处。

@Compendium[pf2e.spell-effects.nIryhRgeiacQw1Em]{法术效果：舒缓花朵}

Blossoms grow from the ground in a small area, soothing away afflictions and persistent pains and harm. When any creature in that area rolls a successful save against a poison or disease effect, it gets a critical success instead. The blossoms grant assisted recovery to everyone in the area to end their persistent damage, both when the spell is cast and at the start of each of your turns. Once the duration ends, the flowers lose their magical effect, but a few of them might survive in the area as long as they can naturally. This spell doesn't give a benefit on a save against an affliction unless the stage lasts 10 minutes or less.

@Compendium[pf2e.spell-effects.nIryhRgeiacQw1Em]{Spell Effect: Soothing Blossoms}

Sanctified Ground.name: 圣化之地 Sanctified Ground
Sanctified Ground.description:
你将该区域圣化，用圣水洒遍并对抗你的敌人进行防护。选择异怪、天界生物、巨龙、邪魔、监察者或不死生物。区域内所有生物在对抗所选生物时，于AC、攻击掷骰、伤害掷骰以及豁免掷骰上获得+1状态加值。

You sanctify the area, sprinkling it with holy water and warding it against your foes. Choose aberrations, celestials, dragons, fiends, monitors, or undead. All creatures in the area gain a +1 status bonus to AC, attack rolls, damage rolls, and saving throws against the chosen creatures.

Radiant Healing.name: 光辉治疗 Radiant Healing
Radiant Healing.description:
若女祭司的下一个动作是施放 @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{治疗术} 来为单个活体生物恢复生命值，则该目标会闪烁着灿烂的光亮。

在女祭司下一个回合结束前，首个成功打击该目标的敌人必须进行一次 @Check[type:will|basic:true|dc:21] 豁免，否则受到 [[/r 1d6[vitality]]]{1d6 正能量伤害}；若为大失败，该敌人还会获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 1轮。

If the Priestess' next action it to cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{Heal} to restore Hit Points to a single living creature, the target shimmers with radiant light. 

The first foe to successfully strike the target before the end of the Priestess' next turn must make a @Check[type:will|basic:true|dc:21] save or take [[/r 1d6[vitality]]]{1d6 Positive Damage} on a critical failure the foe is also @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round.

Ancestry, Halfling (Ability Boosts).name: 族裔，半身人（能力提升） Ancestry, Halfling (Ability Boosts)
Ancestry, Halfling (Ability Boosts).description:
该NPC为半身人族裔

效果 半身人拥有敏锐之眼：你的双眼锐利，让你能分辨出他人可能错过的、关于匿藏或甚至隐形生物的小细节。你在使用 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜寻} 动作以发现30尺内的 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} 或 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected} 生物时，获得+2环境加值。当你以对你而言处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} 状态或对你而言处于Hidden状态的对手为目标时，将纯骰检定的DC降低：若目标为concealed则为3；若目标为hidden则为9。

模板 将该NPC的HP减少[[2]]，将该NPC的察觉、反射豁免、意志豁免，以及基于敏捷与感知的技能检定提高1，将该NPC的运动与打击伤害降低1。 

该NPC获得半身人（特征）、半身人语言，并变为小体型。

从以下列表中为该NPC选择一个半身人传承：@Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.EAMtIS2bDOatgpIt]{Halfling, Gutsy}, @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.QXPTD7l7D7GCze81]{Halfling, Lucky}, @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.had7kjDL5IGxq1hs]{Halfling, Shadowy}, @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.BO2ELEy1P0q8haNC]{Halfling, Twilight}, @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.BLIBgG8jHSY61zpo]{Halfling, Wildwood} 

This NPC is of Halfling Ancestry

Effect Halflings have Keen Eyes: Your eyes are sharp, allowing you to make out small details about concealed or even invisible creatures that others might miss. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus when using the @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} action to find @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} or @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected} creatures within 30 feet of you. When you target an opponent that is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} from you or hidden from you, reduce the DC of the flat check to 3 for a concealed target or 9 for a hidden one.

Template Decrease the NPC's HP by [[2]], increase the NPC's perception, reflex saves, will saves, and dexterity and wisdom based skill checks by 1, decrease the NPC's athletics and strike damage by 1. 

The NPC gains the Halfling trait, the Halfling language and becomes size small.

Select a halfling heritage for the NPC from the following list: @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.EAMtIS2bDOatgpIt]{Halfling, Gutsy}, @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.QXPTD7l7D7GCze81]{Halfling, Lucky}, @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.had7kjDL5IGxq1hs]{Halfling, Shadowy}, @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.BO2ELEy1P0q8haNC]{Halfling, Twilight}, @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.BLIBgG8jHSY61zpo]{Halfling, Wildwood}

Halfling, Gutsy.name: 半身人，勇胆 Halfling, Gutsy
Halfling, Gutsy.description:
当该生物在对抗情绪效果的豁免检定中掷骰获得成功时，它改为获得大成功或大失败。

When this creature rolls a success on a saving throw against an emotion effect, it gets a critical success instead.

Vandy Banderdash.privateNotes:
此标记基于一个出现在《憎恨魔窟》冒险路径中的角色，并使用了《雇佣兵市场》第1卷中的模板。

This token is based on a character that appeared in the Abomination Vaults Adventure Path, using a template from Mercenary Marketplace Volume 1.

Worliwynn.name: 沃里温 Worliwynn

Primal Prepared Spells.name: 原初预备法术 Primal Prepared Spells

Druid Order Spells.name: 德鲁伊教团法术 Druid Order Spells

Animal Messenger.name: 动物信使 Animal Messenger
Animal Messenger.description:
你提供食物，一只处于射程内的普通超小型动物会靠近来进食。你将一个你熟知的明显地点或地标的影像、方向与距离烙印在该动物心中。你还可以将一个至多为轻负载的小型物体或便条系在它身上。该动物会尽其所能到达目的地；若它抵达那里，它会在附近等待，并允许非敌对生物靠近并取下所附的物体。该法术在传讯送达后或在24小时后结束，以先发生者为准。

若射程内没有超小型野生动物，该法术失效。

You offer food, and an ordinary Tiny animal within range approaches to eat it. You imprint the image, direction, and distance of an obvious place or landmark well known to you within the animal. You can also attach a small object or note up to light Bulk to it. The animal does its best to reach the destination; if it makes it there, it waits nearby and allows nonhostile creatures to approach and remove the attached object. The spell ends after the message is delivered or after 24 hours, whichever comes first.

If there are no Tiny wild animals in range, the spell is lost.

Barkskin.name: 树肤术 Barkskin
Barkskin.description:
目标的皮肤被树皮覆盖。目标获得对钝击与穿刺伤害的抗力2，并获得对火焰的弱点3。在目标受到火焰伤害后，它可以以承受该伤害为触发条件，用自由动作解除该法术；这样做不会减少目标所受到的火焰伤害。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.HoOujAdQWCN4E6sQ]{法术效果：树皮术}

升阶（+2） 抗力各增加2，弱点增加3。

The target's skin becomes covered in bark. The target gains resistance 2 to bludgeoning and piercing damage and weakness 3 to fire. After the target takes fire damage, it can Dismiss the spell as a free action triggered by taking the damage; doing so doesn't reduce the fire damage the target was dealt.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.HoOujAdQWCN4E6sQ]{Spell Effect: Barkskin}

Heightened (+2) The resistances increase by 2, and the weakness increases by 3.

Dancing Lights.name: 舞光术 Dancing Lights
Dancing Lights.description:
你创造至多四团漂浮的光亮，彼此之间任意两团相距不超过10英尺。每一团都像火把一样照明。当你维持该法术时，你可以将任意数量的光亮移动至多60英尺。每一团光亮必须保持在你120英尺范围内，并且与其他所有光亮都保持在10英尺以内，否则它就会熄灭。

You create up to four floating lights, no two of which are more than 10 feet apart. Each sheds light like a torch. When you Sustain the Spell, you can move any number of lights up to 60 feet. Each light must remain within 120 feet of you and within 10 feet of all others, or it winks out.

Fear.name: 恐惧术 Fear
Fear.description:
你对目标种下恐惧术；它必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功或大失败 成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}。

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}。

大成功或大失败 失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing}，持续 1 轮。

升阶（3环） 你最多可以以五个生物为目标。

You plant fear in the target; it must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} for 1 round.

Heightened (3rd) You can target up to five creatures.

Fleet Step.name: 舰队步法 Fleet Step
Fleet Step.description:
你获得对你的速度的+30英尺状态加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ThFug45WHkQQXcoF]{法术效果：迅捷步伐}

You gain a +30-foot status bonus to your Speed.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ThFug45WHkQQXcoF]{Spell Effect: Fleet Step}

Heal Animal.name: 治疗术动物 Heal Animal
Heal Animal.description:
你治疗一只动物的伤口，使目标恢复 1d8 生命值。施放此法术时花费的动作数量决定其效果。

  • 1 姿势 该法术的射程为接触。
  • 2 姿势、言语 该法术的射程为30尺，并使目标额外恢复8点生命值。

升阶（+1） 治疗量增加1d8，且2动作版本的额外治疗增加8点。

You heal an animal's wounds, restoring 1d8 Hit Points to the target. The number of actions spent Casting this Spell determines its effect.

  • 1 somatic The spell has a range of touch.
  • 2 somatic, verbal The spell has a range of 30 feet and restores an additional 8 Hit Points to the target.

Heightened (+1) The amount of healing increases by 1d8, and the additional healing for the 2-action version increases by 8.

Know Direction.name: 指北术 Know Direction
Know Direction.description:
在你的脑海中，你看见一条向北延伸的道路。你立刻知道北方是哪个方向（如果在你当前所在的位置存在北方）。

升阶（7环） 你可以改为知晓通往一个熟悉地点的方向，例如以前的家或常去的酒馆。

In your mind's eye, you see a path northward. You immediately know which direction is north (if it exists at your current location).

Heightened (7th) You can instead know the direction to a familiar location, such as a previous home or a favorite tavern.

Magic Fang.name: 魔牙术 Magic Fang
Magic Fang.description:
选择目标的一个徒手攻击。你使该徒手攻击以原初能量闪耀。该徒手攻击成为+1强力徒手攻击，获得对攻击掷骰的+1物品加值，并且如果它原本只有一颗伤害骰，则将伤害骰数量增加到两颗。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.MqZ6FScbfGtXB8tt]{法术效果：魔牙术}

Choose one of the target's unarmed attacks. You cause that unarmed attack to shine with primal energy. The unarmed attack becomes a +1 striking unarmed attack, gaining a +1 item bonus to attack rolls and increasing the number of damage dice to two if it had only one.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.MqZ6FScbfGtXB8tt]{Spell Effect: Magic Fang}

Sigil.name: 魔法印记 Sigil
Sigil.description:
你无害地将自己独特的魔法印记（约 1 平方英寸的体型）放置在目标生物或物体上。该印记可以是可见或隐形的，你可以通过使用一个【交互】动作来接触目标，将其从一种状态变为另一种状态。该印记可以通过 5 分钟的擦洗或刮除工作去除。如果它在一个生物身上，它会在一周的过程中自然淡化。印记淡化前的时间会随着你升阶后的等级而增加。

升阶（第3环） 魔法印记改为在 1 个月后淡化。

升阶（第5环） 魔法印记改为在 1 年后淡化。

升阶（第7环） 魔法印记永不淡化。

You harmlessly place your unique magical sigil, which is about 1 square inch in size, on the targeted creature or object. The mark can be visible or invisible, and you can change it from one state to another by using an Interact action to touch the target. The mark can be scrubbed or scraped off with 5 minutes of work. If it's on a creature, it fades naturally over the course of a week. The time before the mark fades increases depending on your heightened level.

Heightened (3rd) The sigil instead fades after 1 month.

Heightened (5th) The sigil instead fades after 1 year.

Heightened (7th) The sigil never fades.

Tanglefoot.name: 绊足术 Tanglefoot
Tanglefoot.description:
一根覆盖着黏稠树脂的藤蔓凭空出现，从你手中甩出并缠向目标。对目标进行一次法术攻击。

大成功或大失败成功 目标获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{禁足（状态）}状态，并在1轮内其速度承受-10英尺的环境减值。它可以尝试以你的法术DC进行逃脱，以移除该减值与@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{禁足（状态）}状态。

成功 目标在1轮内其速度承受-10英尺的环境减值。它可以尝试以你的法术DC进行逃脱，以移除该减值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.TwtUIEyenrtAbeiX]{法术效果：绊足术}

失败 目标不受影响。

升阶（2环） 效果持续2轮。

升阶（4环） 效果持续1分钟。

A vine covered in sticky sap appears from thin air, flicking from your hand and lashing itself to the target. Attempt a spell attack against the target.

Critical Success The target gains the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} condition and takes a -10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds for 1 round. It can attempt to Escape against your spell DC to remove the penalty and the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} condition.

Success The target takes a -10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds for 1 round. It can attempt to Escape against your spell DC to remove the penalty.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.TwtUIEyenrtAbeiX]{Spell Effect: Tanglefoot}

Failure The target is unaffected.

Heightened (2nd) The effects last for 2 rounds.

Heightened (4th) The effects last for 1 minute.

Halfling Sling Staff.name: 半身人投石杖 Halfling Sling Staff

Leather Armor.name: 皮革护甲 Leather Armor
Leather Armor.description:
由柔韧与定型的硬化皮革混合制成，此类护甲在提供一定防护的同时，能保持最大的灵活性。

A mix of flexible and molded boiled leather, a suit of this type of armor provides some protection with maximum flexibility.

Holly and Mistletoe.name: 冬青与槲寄生 Holly and Mistletoe
Holly and Mistletoe.description:
具有超自然意义的植物为原初施法者（例如德鲁伊）在使用某些能力并施放一些法术时提供原初法器。使用它时必须用一只手握持一束冬青与槲寄生。对于专注于自然其他性相的德鲁伊，还存在其他原初法器。

Plants of supernatural significance provide a primal focus for primal spellcasters, such as druids, when using certain abilities and casting some spells. A bundle of holly and mistletoe must be held in one hand to use it. Other primal foci exist for druids focused on other aspects of nature.

Sling Bullets.name: 投石索弹丸 Sling Bullets
Sling Bullets.description:
这些是小型金属球，通常由铁或铅制成，设计用于作为投石索的弹药。

These are small metal balls, typically either iron or lead, designed to be used as ammunition in slings.

Support.name: 支援 Support
Support.description:
半身人德鲁伊的动物伙伴支援其主人的攻击，每当出现破绽便撕裂肌腱。直到德鲁伊下个回合开始，任何对动物伙伴所威胁的目标造成伤害的打击都会使该目标的速度在1分钟内承受-5尺的状态减值（大成功或大失败时为-10）。使用支援时，动物伙伴在其回合中唯一还能使用的其他动作是用于就位的移动动作。若动物伙伴在其回合中使用过任何其他动作，它就无法支援其主人。

The halfling druid's animal companion supports its master's attacks, tearing tendons with each opening. Until the start of the druid's next turn, any Strikes that damage a target that the animal companion threatens give the target a -5-foot status penalty to its Speeds for 1 minute (-10 on a critical success). While using Support, the only other actions an animal companion can use on its turn are movement actions to get into position. If an animal companion has used any other actions on its turn, it cannot support its master.

Barkskin Potion.name: 树肤药水 Barkskin Potion
Barkskin Potion.description:
你喝下这剂苦涩的药饮后，你的皮肤像树皮一样增厚。你获得一个2级@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.YWrfKetOqDwVFut7]{树皮术}法术的效果，持续10分钟。

After you drink this bitter draft, your skin thickens like bark. You gain the effects of a 2nd-level @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.YWrfKetOqDwVFut7]{Barkskin} spell for 10 minutes.

Worliwynn.privateNotes:
此标记基于曾出现在《憎恨魔窟》冒险路径以及《开拓者协会》剧本 #1-04：《伊门伍德的强盗》中的角色。

This token is based on characters that appeared in the Abomination Vaults Adventure Path, and in Pathfinder Society Scenario #1-04: Bandits of Immenwood.

Wrab Chertel.name: 瓦布·查泰尔 Wrab Chertel

Padded Armor.name: 软垫护甲 Padded Armor
Padded Armor.description:
这种护甲只是一层厚重的绗缝布料，但有时会因其价格极为低廉而被使用。衬垫护甲比其他类型的护甲更容易受到损坏并被摧毁。重型护甲在其价格中包含一件衬垫护甲内衬，但当穿在重型护甲下方时，它会失去舒适特征。你可以只穿这件衬垫护甲或内衬来睡觉、在你的重型护甲被摧毁时，或在其他不穿全套重型护甲的情况下穿着。这样你就能保持护甲已注能，并从与之关联的重型护甲上任何符文的力量中获益，但没有这件衬垫护甲内衬，其他人无法穿戴你的重型护甲。

This armor is simply a layer of heavy, quilted cloth, but it is sometimes used because it's so inexpensive. Padded armor is easier to damage and destroy than other types of armor. Heavy armor comes with a padded armor undercoat included in its Price, though it loses the comfort trait when worn under heavy armor. You can wear just that padded armor or undercoat to sleep in, if your heavy armor is destroyed, or when otherwise not wearing the full heavy armor. This allows you to keep the armor invested and benefit from the power of any runes on the associated heavy armor, but no one else can wear your heavy armor without the padded undercoat.

Bolts.name: 弩矢 Bolts
Bolts.description:
弩矢比传统箭矢更短，但结构相似，是弩使用的弹药。

Shorter than traditional arrows but similar in construction, bolts are the ammunition used by crossbows.

Appraising Eye.name: 鉴定之眼 Appraising Eye
Appraising Eye.description:
商人可以使用商业学识来 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 有关物品的信息，包括确定其价值。他们也可以尝试使用商业学识来 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.eReSHVEPCsdkSL4G]{辨识魔法}，并且可以在不先知道该物品是否具有魔法的情况下这么做。

The merchant can use Mercantile Lore to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about items, including determining their value. They can also attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.eReSHVEPCsdkSL4G]{Identify Magic} using Mercantile Lore and can do so without first knowing whether the item is magical.

Wrab Chertel.publicNotes:
小型聚居地通常只能支援一到两名通才商人，而较大的城市则容纳多名专精者——某一类产品的专家。商人随处可见：在公共广场忙着兜售的摊贩、经营小型店面的店主、乘坐马车或加入商队的巡回推销员，或是经营整套以商业为目的之组织的富豪巨头。对于涉及谈判或商业技能的遭遇，一名商人是4级挑战。商人可能还拥有一项关于某个特定物品类别的额外学识（技能）（例如珠宝或魔法武器），其总技能加值比商业学识高2。

每个聚居地都需要匠人来制造新产品、促进商业往来，并防止基础设施崩坏。较大的城市往往有专门的行会，致力于制造特定商品、管理工人状态，并与当地政府合作。

Small settlements can typically support one or two generalist merchants, and larger cities house multiple specialists-experts in one type of product. Merchants can be found anywhere: vendors hustling in the public square, shopkeepers running small storefronts, traveling salespeople in carriages or caravans, or wealthy tycoons running entire organizations devoted to commerce. For encounters involving negotiation or mercantile skill, a merchant is a 4th-level challenge. A merchant might have an additional Lore skill about a specific category of item (such as jewelry or magic weapons), with a total skill bonus 2 higher than Mercantile Lore.

Every settlement needs tradespeople to create new products, facilitate commerce, and keep the infrastructure from crumbling. Larger cities often have entire guilds dedicated to the creation of specific goods, managing worker conditions, and working with local governments.
Wrab Chertel.privateNotes:
此令牌基于一名出现在《憎恨魔窟》冒险路径中的角色，使用了《探路者游戏主持指南》中的一个模板。

This token is based on a character that appeared in the Abomination Vaults Adventure Path, using a template in the Pathfinder Gamemastery Guide.

Yinyasmira.name: 音雅丝米拉 Yinyasmira

Feint.name: 虚招 Feint
Feint.description:
需求 你在尝试进行虚招的目标的近战触及范围内。

你以误导性的花招，使对手无法防备你真正的攻击。尝试一次欺瞒检定，对抗你目标的察觉DC。

大成功 你彻底打乱敌人对你的防御。直到你下个回合结束前，你对其进行的近战攻击，目标都处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}状态。

成功 你的敌人被愚弄了，但只是一瞬间。在你当前回合结束前，你对其进行的下一次近战攻击，目标处于off-guard状态。

大失败 你的虚招适得其反。直到你下个回合结束前，目标对你进行的近战攻击时，你处于off-guard状态。

Requirements You are within melee reach of the target you attempt to Feint.

With a misleading flourish, you leave an opponent unprepared for your real attack. Attempt a Deception check against your target's Perception DC.

Critical Success You throw your enemy's defenses against you entirely off. The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} against melee attacks that you attempt against it until the end of your next turn.

Success Your foe is fooled, but only momentarily. The target is off-guard against the next melee attack that you attempt against it before the end of your current turn.

Critical Failure Your feint backfires. You are off-guard against melee attacks the target attempts against you until the end of your next turn.

Sneak.name: 潜行 Sneak
Sneak.description:
你可以尝试在成为或保持 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected} 的同时移动到另一个位置。疾行至多你速度的一半。（如果你具有相应的移动类型，你可以在掘地、攀爬、飞行或游泳时用潜行替代疾行；你必须以该速度的一半移动。）

如果某个生物无法侦测到你，且该生物不可能观察到你（对典型生物而言，这包括你处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}、观察者处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded}、或你处于黑暗中且该生物无法在黑暗中视物的情况），那么你在进行潜行检定时掷出的任何大失败都会改为失败。若你对该生物失去掩蔽或高等掩蔽，或不再对该生物处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} 状态，你也仍然会保持无法侦测。

在你的移动结束时，GM 会暗掷你的 Stealth 检定，并将结果与在你移动开始时你对其处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} 或无法侦测状态的每个生物的察觉 DC 进行比较。如果你在整个疾行过程中都对该生物拥有掩蔽或高等掩蔽，你的隐匿检定获得来自掩蔽的 +2 环境加值（或来自高等掩蔽的 +4）。由于你在移动，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{Taking Cover} 所提供的加值提升不适用。如果在你移动结束时，你既未对某生物处于隐蔽状态，也未对其拥有掩蔽或高等掩蔽，则你不会对该生物掷骰。你会自动变为被该生物 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.1wQY3JYyhMYeeV2G]{Observed}。

成功 在你的移动期间该生物无法侦测到你，并且在移动结束时仍无法侦测到你。

只要你做出躲藏、潜行或步行以外的任何事，你就会立刻变为被观察到。如果你尝试打击一个生物，该生物会在那次攻击中保持 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}，随后你变为被观察到。若你做其他任何事，除非 GM 另有裁定，你会在行动前一刻变为被观察到。GM 可能允许你执行一个特别不引人注意的动作而不被注意到，这可能需要再进行一次隐匿检定。如果你说话或刻意制造响亮噪音，你会变为躲藏而非无法侦测。

如果一个生物使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜寻} 并因此你对其变为躲藏状态，若你想再次对该生物变为无法侦测，你必须潜行。

失败 一个明显的声音或其他迹象暴露了你的位置，尽管你仍未被看见。你在整个移动过程中都对该生物处于躲藏状态，并且仍然如此。

大失败 你被发现了！你在整个移动过程中都被该生物观察到，并且仍然如此。如果你处于隐形且先前对该生物处于躲藏状态，那么你不会变为被观察到；你在整个移动过程中都保持躲藏，并且仍然如此。

You can attempt to move to another place while becoming or staying @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected}. Stride up to half your Speed. (You can use Sneak while Burrowing, Climbing, Flying, or Swimming instead of Striding if you have the corresponding movement type; you must move at half that Speed.)

If you're undetected by a creature and it's impossible for that creature to observe you (for a typical creature, this includes when you're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}, the observer is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded}, or you're in darkness and the creature can't see in darkness), for any critical failure you roll on a check to Sneak, you get a failure instead. You also continue to be undetected if you lose cover or greater cover against or are no longer @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} from such a creature.

At the end of your movement, the GM rolls your Stealth check in secret and compares the result to the Perception DC of each creature you were @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} from or undetected by at the start of your movement. If you have cover or greater cover from the creature throughout your Stride, you gain the +2 circumstance bonus from cover (or +4 from greater cover) to your Stealth check. Because you're moving, the bonus increase from @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{Taking Cover} doesn't apply. You don't get to roll against a creature if, at the end of your movement, you neither are concealed from it nor have cover or greater cover against it. You automatically become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.1wQY3JYyhMYeeV2G]{Observed} by such a creature.

Success You're undetected by the creature during your movement and remain undetected by the creature at the end of it.

You become observed as soon as you do anything other than Hide, Sneak, or Step. If you attempt to Strike a creature, the creature remains @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} against that attack, and you then become observed. If you do anything else, you become observed just before you act unless the GM determines otherwise. The GM might allow you to perform a particularly unobtrusive action without being noticed, possibly requiring another Stealth check. If you speak or make a deliberate loud noise, you become hidden instead of undetected.

If a creature uses @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} and you become hidden to it as a result, you must Sneak if you want to become undetected by that creature again.

Failure A telltale sound or other sign gives your position away, though you still remain unseen. You're hidden from the creature throughout your movement and remain so.

Critical Failure You're spotted! You're observed by the creature throughout your movement and remain so. If you're invisible and were hidden from the creature, instead of being observed you're hidden throughout your movement and remain so.

Studded Leather Armor.name: 镶嵌皮甲 Studded Leather Armor
Studded Leather Armor.description:
这种皮革护甲用金属铆钉加固，有时还会加上小型金属板，在提供与皮革护甲几乎相同的灵活性的同时，给予更强的防护。

This leather armor is reinforced with metal studs and sometimes small metal plates, providing most of the flexibility of leather armor with more robust protection.

Thieves' Tools (Infiltrator).name: 盗贼工具（渗透者） Thieves' Tools (Infiltrator)
Thieves' Tools (Infiltrator).description:
你需要盗贼工具来使用贼活（技能）进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{开锁} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{解除装置}（某些类型）。高等盗贼工具为开锁和解除装置的检定提供 +1 物品加值。

如果你的盗贼工具损坏，你可以通过用适用于你工具的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.BznmPaRjI4Orb0IH]{替换镐} 替换开锁镐来修理它们；这不需要使用“修理”动作。若你穿戴着盗贼工具，你可以将其抽出并替换，作为使用它们的动作的一部分。

You need thieves' tools to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{Pick Locks} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{Disable Devices} (of some types) using the Thievery skill. Infiltrator thieves' tools add a +1 item bonus to checks to Pick Locks and Disable Devices.

If your thieves' tools are broken, you can repair them by replacing the lock picks with @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.BznmPaRjI4Orb0IH]{Replacement Picks} appropriate to your tools; this doesn't require using the Repair action. If you wear your thieves' tools, you can draw and replace them as part of the action that uses them.

Mistform Elixir (Lesser).name: 薄雾形态炼金灵药（次级） Mistform Elixir (Lesser)
Mistform Elixir (Lesser).description:
启动 A 交互

一层淡淡的薄雾从你的皮肤上散发出来，使你在3轮内处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}状态。

如同往常，当你的位置仍然显而易见时处于隐蔽状态，你无法利用这份隐蔽来@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{躲藏}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{潜行}。

Activate A Interact

A faint mist emanates from your skin, making you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} for 3 rounds.

As usual being concealed when your position is still obvious, you can't use this concealment to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{Hide} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak}.

Surprise Attack.name: 突然袭击 Surprise Attack
Surprise Attack.description:
你行动之快令敌人来不及反应。在战斗的第 1 轮中，若你使用欺瞒或隐匿进行先攻掷骰，则尚未行动的生物对你处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及} 状态。

You act before foes can react. On the first round of combat, if you roll Deception or Stealth for initiative, creatures that haven't acted are @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} to you.

Yinyasmira.privateNotes:
此指示物基于一名在《憎恨魔窟》冒险路径中登场的角色，使用《Mercenary Marketplace Vol. 1》中的一个模板。

This token is based on a character that appeared in the Abomination Vaults Adventure Path, using a template from Mercenary Marketplace Vol. 1.
Yinyasmira.blurb:
人类女性走私者
Human Female Smuggler

Graulgust Ghoul.name: 格劳格斯特 食尸鬼（特征） Graulgust Ghoul

Occult Innate Spells.name: 异能天生法术 Occult Innate Spells

Mirror Image.name: 镜影术 Mirror Image
Mirror Image.description:
三个你的幻象在你的空间中盘旋，可能导致那些对你进行攻击的人击中其中一个幻象而非你本人。任何本应命中你的攻击都有一定的随机几率改为命中你的一个幻象而非你本人。若三个幻象都还存在，则有 1/4 的几率命中你（在 [[/r 1d4]] 中掷出 1）。若剩余两个幻象，则有 1/3 的几率命中你（在 [[/r 1d6]] 中掷出 1-2）。若只剩一个幻象，则几率为 1/2（在 [[/r 1d6]] 中掷出 1-3）。

一旦某个幻象被命中，它就会被摧毁。若一次攻击掷骰未能命中你的 AC 但没有大失败，它会摧毁一个幻象，但没有任何额外效果（即使该攻击通常在失败时也会产生效果）。若一次攻击掷骰为大成功且本应命中某个幻象，则摧毁一个幻象，并使该次攻击掷骰改为对你判定为成功。当所有幻象都被摧毁后，该法术结束。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.0PO5mFRhh9HxGAtv]{法术效果：镜影术}

Three illusory images of you swirl about your space, potentially causing those who attack you to hit one of the images instead of you. Any attack that would hit you has a random chance of hitting one of your images instead of you. If all three images remain, there is a 1 in 4 chance of hitting you (1 on [[/r 1d4]]). With two images remaining, there is a 1 in 3 chance of hitting you (1-2 on [[/r 1d6]]). With only one image, the chances are 1 in 2 (1-3 on [[/r 1d6]]).

Once an image is hit, it is destroyed. If an attack roll fails to hit your AC but doesn't critically fail, it destroys an image but has no additional effect (even if the attack would normally have an effect on a failure). If an attack roll is a critical success and would hit one of the images, one of the images is destroyed and the attack roll becomes a success against you. Once all the images are destroyed, the spell ends.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.0PO5mFRhh9HxGAtv]{Spell Effect: Mirror Image}

Telekinetic Maneuver.name: 念动战技 Telekinetic Maneuver
Telekinetic Maneuver.description:
随着一阵心灵遥控的力量涌动，你移动一个敌人或他们携带的某样东西。你可以尝试对目标进行缴械、推撞或绊摔，并使用法术攻击掷骰来代替运动检定。

With a rush of telekinetic power, you move a foe or something they carry. You can attempt to Disarm, Shove, or Trip the target using a spell attack roll instead of an Athletics check.

Bane.name: 绝望术 Bane
Bane.description:
你让敌人的心智充满疑虑。

区域内的敌人必须在意志豁免中成功，否则只要他们仍在该区域内，其攻击掷骰就会承受-1状态减值。

每回合一次，从你施放绝望术后的下一回合开始，你可以使用一个单动作（具有专注（特征）），将该放射的半径增加5英尺，并迫使区域内尚未受到影响的敌人尝试进行另一次豁免。

绝望术可以反制 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XSujb7EsSwKl19Uu]{祝福术}。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.UTLp7omqsiC36bso]{法术效果：绝望术}

You fill the minds of your enemies with doubt.

Enemies in the area must succeed at a Will save or take a -1 status penalty to attack rolls as long as they are in the area.

Once per turn, starting the turn after you cast bane, you can use a single action, which has the concentrate trait, to increase the emanation's radius by 5 feet and force enemies in the area that weren't yet affected to attempt another saving throw.

Bane can counteract @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XSujb7EsSwKl19Uu]{Bless}.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.UTLp7omqsiC36bso]{Spell Effect: Bane}

Daze.name: 眩晕术 Daze
Daze.description:
你使目标的心智变得混乱，并以精神冲击令其眩晕。该冲击造成等同于你施法能力调整值的精神伤害；目标必须尝试一次基础意志豁免。若目标在豁免中大失败，它还会获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

升阶（+2） 伤害增加 1d6。

You cloud the target's mind and daze it with a mental jolt. The jolt deals mental damage equal to your spellcasting ability modifier; the target must attempt a basic Will save. If the target critically fails the save, it is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Heightened (+2) The damage increases by 1d6.

Ghost Sound.name: 幻音术 Ghost Sound
Ghost Sound.description:
你制造一个简单声音的听觉幻象，其最大音量相当于四个正常人同时喊叫。声音从你在射程内指定的一个方格中发出。你不能创造可理解的词语或其他复杂声音（例如音乐）。

升阶（3环） 射程增加至60尺。

升阶（5环） 射程增加至120尺。

You create an auditory illusion of simple sounds that has a maximum volume equal to four normal humans shouting. The sounds emanate from a square you designate within range. You can't create intelligible words or other intricate sounds (such as music).

Heightened (3rd) The range increases to 60 feet.

Heightened (5th) The range increases to 120 feet.

Grim Tendrils.name: 邪影触须 Grim Tendrils
Grim Tendrils.description:
黑暗的触须从你的指尖卷出，穿过空气疾驰。你对直线中的活体生物造成2d4虚空伤害以及[[/r (@item.level)[bleed]]]伤害。直线中的每个活体生物必须尝试一次强韧豁免。

大成功或大失败 成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半的虚空伤害，且不受持续流血伤害。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害。

大成功或大失败 失败 该生物受到双倍虚空伤害与双倍持续流血伤害。

升阶（+1） 虚空伤害增加2d4，且持续流血伤害增加1。

Tendrils of darkness curl out from your fingertips and race through the air. You deal 2d4 void damage and [[/r (@item.level)[bleed]]] damage to living creatures in the line. Each living creature in the line must attempt a Fortitude save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half the void damage and no persistent bleed damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage.

Critical Failure The creature takes double void damage and double persistent bleed damage.

Heightened (+1) The void damage increases by 2d4, and the persistent bleed damage increases by 1.

Phantom Pain.name: 幻痛术 Phantom Pain
Phantom Pain.description:
幻觉般的痛苦折磨着目标，造成2d4精神伤害和1d4持续精神伤害。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标承受全部初始伤害但不承受持续伤害，且该法术立即结束。

失败 目标承受全部初始与持续伤害，且目标获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}。如果目标从恶心中恢复，持续伤害结束且该法术结束。

大失败 如失败，但目标获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加2d4，且持续伤害增加1d4。

[[/r (@item.level)d4[persistent,mental]]]{按等级提升的持续精神伤害}

Illusory pain wracks the target, dealing 2d4 mental damage and 1d4 persistent mental damage. The target must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes full initial damage but no persistent damage, and the spell ends immediately.

Failure The target takes full initial and persistent damage, and the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}. If the target recovers from being Sickened, the persistent damage ends and the spell ends.

Critical Failure As failure, but the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d4 and the persistent damage by 1d4.

[[/r (@item.level)d4[persistent,mental]]]{Leveled Persistent Mental Damage}

Ray of Enfeeblement.name: 衰弱射线 Ray of Enfeeblement
Ray of Enfeeblement.description:
一道削弱敌人力量的射线从你手中闪现。对目标进行一次远程法术攻击。若你成功，该生物进行一次强韧豁免以决定该法术的效果。若你的攻击掷骰为大成功或大失败，则将其豁免结果的成功等级降低一级来决定结果。

大成功或大失败 目标不受影响。

成功 目标变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 1}。

失败 目标变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 2}。

大成功或大失败 目标变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 3}。

A ray that saps a foe's strength flashes from your hand. Attempt a ranged spell attack against the target. If you succeed, that creature attempts a Fortitude save to determine the spell's effect. If your attack roll is a critical success, use the outcome for one degree of success worse than the result of its save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1}.

Failure The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2}.

Critical Failure The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 3}.

Shield.name: 护盾术 Shield
Shield.description:
你举起一道魔法力场护盾。这算作使用“举起护盾”动作，使你在直到你下个回合开始前获得 AC +1 环境加值，但不需要空出一只手来使用。

在该法术生效期间，你可以用你的魔法护盾使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{盾牌格挡} 反应动作（）。该护盾的硬度为 5。在你使用盾牌格挡后，该法术结束，并且你在 10 分钟内不能再次施放它。不同于正常的盾牌格挡，你可以用该法术的反应动作（）来对抗 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gKKqvLohtrSJj3BM]{力场弹幕} 法术。

升阶该法术会提高护盾的硬度。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{法术效果：护盾术}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.QF6RDlCoTvkVHRo4]{效果：护盾术免疫}

升阶（3环） 护盾具有硬度 10。

升阶（5环） 护盾具有硬度 15。

升阶（7环） 护盾具有硬度 20。

升阶（9环） 护盾具有硬度 25。

You raise a magical shield of force. This counts as using the Raise a Shield action, giving you a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn, but it doesn't require a hand to use.

While the spell is in effect, you can use the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{Shield Block} reaction with your magic shield. The shield has Hardness 5. After you use Shield Block, the spell ends and you can't cast it again for 10 minutes. Unlike a normal Shield Block, you can use the spell's reaction against the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gKKqvLohtrSJj3BM]{Force Barrage} spell.

Heightening the spell increases the shield's Hardness.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{Spell Effect: Shield}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.QF6RDlCoTvkVHRo4]{Effect: Shield Immunity}

Heightened (3rd) The shield has Hardness 10.

Heightened (5th) The shield has Hardness 15.

Heightened (7th) The shield has Hardness 20.

Heightened (9th) The shield has Hardness 25.

Telekinetic Projectile.name: 念动射弹 Telekinetic Projectile
Telekinetic Projectile.description:
你将一件在射程内、松散且无人持用、且负载为1或更低的物体掷向目标。对目标进行一次法术攻击掷骰。若你命中，你造成钝击、穿刺或挥砍伤害——取决于你掷出的物体——数值等于1d6加上你的施法关键能力调整值。被掷出的物品不具备的任何特定特征或魔法属性都不会影响此次攻击或伤害。

大成功 你造成双倍伤害。

成功 你造成全额伤害。

升阶（+1） 伤害提高1d6。

You hurl a loose, unattended object that is within range and that has 1 Bulk or less at the target. Make a spell attack roll against the target. If you hit, you deal bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage-as appropriate for the object you hurled-equal to 1d6 plus your spellcasting ability modifier. No specific traits or magic properties of the hurled item affect the attack or the damage.

Critical Success You deal double damage.

Success You deal full damage.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

+2 Status to All Saves vs. Disease and P.name: 对抗疾病与毒素的所有豁免获得+2状态加值 +2 Status to All Saves vs. Disease and Poison

Occult Attack.name: 异能攻击 Occult Attack
Occult Attack.description:
摩洛克邪教徒疾步至其速度的一半，忽略由碎石或石笋等天然洞窟特征造成的困难地形。

在其移动期间的任何时点，摩洛克邪教徒都可以施法一个通常需要两个动作或更少动作来施放的法术。

The morlock cultist Strides up to half its speed, ignoring difficult terrain caused by natural cavern features like rubble or stalagmites.

At any point during its movement, the morlock cultist can Cast a Spell that normally takes two actions or fewer to cast.

Sneak Attack.name: 偷袭 Sneak Attack
Sneak Attack.description:
摩洛克对@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}生物造成额外1d6精准伤害。

The morlock deals an extra 1d6 precision damage to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} creatures.

Consume Flesh.name: 啃食尸体 Consume Flesh
Consume Flesh.description:
需求 食尸鬼（特征）与一具在过去 1 小时内死亡的生物尸体相邻。

效果 食尸鬼（特征）吞食尸体的一块肉，并恢复 [[/r 1d6[治疗]]] 生命值。

它只能从任意一具给定的尸体中恢复生命值一次。

Requirements The ghoul is adjacent to the corpse of a creature that died within the last hour.

Effect The ghoul devours a chunk of the corpse and regains [[/r 1d6[healing]]] Hit Points.

It can regain Hit Points from any given corpse only once.

Ghoul Fever.name: 食尸鬼热 Ghoul Fever
Ghoul Fever.description:
豁免投掷 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:15]

阶段 1 携带者且无不良效果（1 天）

阶段 2 @Damage[2d6[void]] 伤害，并且从所有治疗中恢复的生命值减半（1 天）

阶段 3 同阶段 2（1 天）

阶段 4 @Damage[2d6[void]] 伤害，并且无法从治疗中获得任何益处（1 天）

阶段 5 同阶段 4（1 天）

阶段 6 死亡，并在下一个午夜作为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.LHHgGSs0ELCR4CYK]{食尸鬼} 苏醒。

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:15]

Stage 1 carrier with no ill effect (1 day)

Stage 2 @Damage[2d6[void]] damage and regains half as many Hit Points from all healing (1 day)

Stage 3 as stage 2 (1 day)

Stage 4 @Damage[2d6[void]] damage and gains no benefit from healing (1 day)

Stage 5 as stage 4 (1 day)

Stage 6 dead, and rises as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.LHHgGSs0ELCR4CYK]{Ghoul} the next midnight.

Paralysis.name: 麻痹 Paralysis
Paralysis.description:
任何被食尸鬼（特征）的攻击命中的活着的、非精灵生物必须成功通过一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:15] 豁免，否则变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹}。它可以在其每个回合结束时尝试一次新的豁免，并且该DC在每次此类豁免时累计降低1。

Any living, non-elf creature hit by a ghoul's attack must succeed at a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:15] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}. It can attempt a new save at the end of each of its turns, and the DC cumulatively decreases by 1 on each such save.

Graulgust Ghoul.publicNotes:
在他们的密会中担任祭司的摩洛克通常会涉猎诡异的秘术魔法。

摩洛克起源于早已与地表世界失联的人类。他们对机械、拾荒以及奇异的秘术行为有着亲和力。

Morlocks who serve as priests in their conclaves usually dabble in eerie occult magic.

Morlocks originate from humans long lost to the surface world. They have an affinity for machinery, scavenging, and strange occult behaviors.
Graulgust Ghoul.allSaves: +2 status to all saves vs. disease and poison

Idriniliss Haunt.name: 伊德里尼莉丝 鬼魅 Idriniliss Haunt
Idriniliss Haunt.tokenName: 伊德里尼莉丝 闹鬼 Idriniliss Haunt
Idriniliss Haunt.prototypeToken: 伊德里尼莉丝怨灵 Idriniliss Haunt

Mimic Ghoul.name: 拟形怪 食尸鬼（特征） Mimic Ghoul

Adhesive.name: 黏着剂 Adhesive
Adhesive.description:
拟形怪身上覆盖着黏性黏液。任何击中拟形怪、被拟形怪击中或以其他方式接触拟形怪的生物都必须成功通过一次 @Check[type:reflex|dc:23] 豁免，否则将变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{擒抱}（逃脱 DC 23）。击中拟形怪的武器会粘在拟形怪身上，可以通过一次成功的 @Check[type:athletics|dc:23] 检定将其移除（以单动作进行）。

拟形怪在同一时间可以有任意数量的物体或生物粘在它身上。拟形怪可以使用单动作释放一个被粘住的生物或物体，并且在拟形怪死亡 1 分钟后，黏液会溶解，释放所有被粘住的物体和生物。

The mimic is coated in an adhesive slime. Any creature that hits the mimic, is hit by the mimic, or otherwise touches the mimic must succeed at a @Check[type:reflex|dc:23] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} (Escape DC 23). A weapon that hits the mimic is stuck to the mimic and can be removed with a successful @Check[type:athletics|dc:23] check (made as a single action).

A mimic can have any number of objects or creatures stuck to it at a time. The mimic can release a stuck creature or object by using a single action, and the adhesive dissolves 1 minute after the mimic dies, releasing all stuck objects and creatures.

Object Lesson.name: 物体课 Object Lesson
Object Lesson.description:
触发 当拟形怪在使用“拟形物体”变形期间，有生物触碰或与拟形怪发生物理互动。

效果 触发生物会自动被拟形怪的黏着物黏住（不进行豁免）。随后，拟形怪对任意与其相邻的生物进行一次拟足打击。

在拟形怪逃脱并换上新的伪装之前，“物体教训”无法再次使用。

Trigger A creature touches or physically interacts with the mimic while the mimic is transformed using Mimic Object.

Effect The triggering creature is automatically stuck by the mimic's adhesive (it receives no save). The mimic then makes a pseudopod Strike against any creature adjacent to the mimic.

Object Lesson can't be used again until the mimic escapes and takes on a new disguise.

Mimic Object.name: 拟态物体 Mimic Object
Mimic Object.description:
拟形怪会变成任何中型物体的形状。这不会改变拟形怪的质地或整体体型，但可以改变其颜色和视觉外观。它在欺骗检定中以及用于冒充其正在拟形的物体的DC上具有28的自动结果。

The mimic assumes the shape of any Medium object. This doesn't change the mimic's texture or overall size but can alter its coloration and visual appearance. It has an automatic result of 28 on Deception checks and DCs to pass as the object that it's mimicking.

Dwelling Lore (applies only to the dunge.name: 居所学识（仅适用于其居住的地下城） Dwelling Lore (applies only to the dungeon it lives in)

Consume Flesh.name: 啃食尸体 Consume Flesh
Consume Flesh.description:
需求 食尸鬼（特征）与在过去1小时内死亡的一个生物的尸体相邻。

效果 食尸鬼（特征）吞食尸体的一块，恢复[[/r 1d6[治疗]]]生命值。

它从任意一具特定尸体恢复生命值只能一次。

Requirements The ghoul is adjacent to the corpse of a creature that died within the last hour.

Effect The ghoul devours a chunk of the corpse and regains [[/r 1d6[healing]]] Hit Points.

It can regain Hit Points from any given corpse only once.

Ghoul Fever.name: 食尸鬼热 Ghoul Fever
Ghoul Fever.description:
豁免投掷 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:15]

阶段 1 携带者，无任何不良效果（1天）

阶段 2 @Damage[2d6[void]] 伤害，并且从所有治疗中恢复的生命值减半（1天）

阶段 3 同阶段 2（1天）

阶段 4 @Damage[2d6[void]] 伤害，并且无法从治疗中获得任何好处（1天）

阶段 5 同阶段 4（1天）

阶段 6 死亡，并在下一个午夜作为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.LHHgGSs0ELCR4CYK]{食尸鬼}复活。

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:15]

Stage 1 carrier with no ill effect (1 day)

Stage 2 @Damage[2d6[void]] damage and regains half as many Hit Points from all healing (1 day)

Stage 3 as stage 2 (1 day)

Stage 4 @Damage[2d6[void]] damage and gains no benefit from healing (1 day)

Stage 5 as stage 4 (1 day)

Stage 6 dead, and rises as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.LHHgGSs0ELCR4CYK]{Ghoul} the next midnight.

Paralysis.name: 麻痹 Paralysis
Paralysis.description:
任何被食尸鬼（特征）的攻击命中的活体、非精灵生物必须在一次@Check[type:fortitude|dc:15]豁免中成功，否则将变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹}。它可以在其每个回合结束时尝试一次新的豁免，并且在每次此类豁免时DC累积降低1。

Any living, non-elf creature hit by a ghoul's attack must succeed at a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:15] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}. It can attempt a new save at the end of each of its turns, and the DC cumulatively decreases by 1 on each such save.

Mimic Ghoul.publicNotes:
被认为是一次旨在活化物体的失败实验的结果，或是某个邪恶的阿尔古苏造物，拟形怪是聪明的怪物，能够变成常见的人造物体的形态。拟形怪是伏击型掠食者，也是贪婪的吞食者，凭借其模仿常见家具与杂物形态的诡异能力来令猎物措手不及。它们会一直伪装，直到毫无戒心的冒险者恰好经过，然后便发动伏击猛然袭击。

拟形怪拥有复杂的异界心智，尽管它们往往残忍且自私自利，但也会时不时享受与猎物交谈。出于未知原因，它们对类人生物尤其感兴趣。拟形怪非常厌恶同类，倾向于独居。拟形怪可以在其替代形态下停留极其漫长的时间，有时会在地城房间中伪装数十年。无论它等待多久，拟形怪始终保持警觉与戒备，随时准备在任何时刻出击。

Thought to be the result of a failed experiment meant to animate objects or a sinister alghollthu creation, mimics are clever monsters that can take the form of common manufactured objects. Mimics are ambush predators and voracious eaters, surprising their prey through their uncanny ability to mimic the form of common furniture and miscellany. They remain disguised until unsuspecting adventurers happen by, then they lash out in ambush.

Mimics possess complex alien minds, and while often cruel and self-serving, they also enjoy conversation with their prey from time to time. For unknown reasons, they are especially interested in humanoids. Mimics have a strong dislike for others of their kind and tend to live alone. A mimic can remain in its alternate form for an extremely long period of time, sometimes remaining disguised in a dungeon chamber for decades. Regardless of how long it waits, the mimic remains vigilant and alert, ready to strike at any moment.

Mimnivix Ghoul.name: 米尼维克斯 食尸鬼（特征） Mimnivix Ghoul

Tremorsense (Imprecise) 30 feet (Creatur.name: 震动感知（不精确）30英尺（接触其蛛网术的生物） Tremorsense (Imprecise) 30 feet (Creatures Touching its Web)

Spider Speak.name: 蛛语 Spider Speak
Spider Speak.description:
伏网怪可以与蜘蛛交谈，其效果和限制与@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.BBvV7qoXGdw09q1C]{动物交谈}相同。

The web lurker can speak with spiders, with the same effects and limitations as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.BBvV7qoXGdw09q1C]{Speak with Animals}.

Spring upon Prey.name: 扑向猎物 Spring upon Prey
Spring upon Prey.description:
触发 当伏网怪在蛛网术上时，一个生物触碰了伏网怪的蛛网术。

需求 尚未投掷先攻。

效果 伏网怪会自动察觉该生物，并在投掷先攻前进行疾走或攀爬。

Trigger A creature touches the web lurker's web while the web lurker is on it.

Requirements Initiative has not yet been rolled.

Effect The web lurker automatically notices the creature and Strides or Climbs before rolling initiative.

Web Lurker Venom.name: 伏网怪毒液 Web Lurker Venom
Web Lurker Venom.description:
豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:19]

最长持续时间 10 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]] 伤害 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}（1 轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]] 伤害、off-guard，和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}（1 轮）

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:19]

Maximum Duration 10 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage, off-guard, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} (1 round)

Web Trap.name: 网捕 Web Trap
Web Trap.description:
被伏网怪的蛛网术攻击命中的生物会陷入定身并黏在最近的表面上，直到其成功通过一次 @Check[type:acrobatics|dc:20|traits:action:escape] 检定以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱}。

A creature hit by the web lurker's web attack is immobilized and stuck to the nearest surface until it succeeds at @Check[type:acrobatics|dc:20|traits:action:escape] check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape}.

Consume Flesh.name: 啃食尸体 Consume Flesh
Consume Flesh.description:
需求 食尸鬼（特征）与一具在过去1小时内死亡的生物尸体相邻。

效果 食尸鬼（特征）吞食尸体的一块肉并恢复[[/r 1d6[healing]]]生命值。

它从任意一具特定尸体中只能恢复生命值一次。

Requirements The ghoul is adjacent to the corpse of a creature that died within the last hour.

Effect The ghoul devours a chunk of the corpse and regains [[/r 1d6[healing]]] Hit Points.

It can regain Hit Points from any given corpse only once.

Ghoul Fever.name: 食尸鬼热 Ghoul Fever
Ghoul Fever.description:
豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:15]

阶段 1 携带者，无不良效果（1 天）

阶段 2 @Damage[2d6[void]] 伤害，并且从所有治疗中恢复的生命值减半（1 天）

阶段 3 同阶段 2（1 天）

阶段 4 @Damage[2d6[void]] 伤害，并且无法从治疗中获得任何益处（1 天）

阶段 5 同阶段 4（1 天）

阶段 6 死亡，并在下一个午夜作为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.LHHgGSs0ELCR4CYK]{食尸鬼} 复起。

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:15]

Stage 1 carrier with no ill effect (1 day)

Stage 2 @Damage[2d6[void]] damage and regains half as many Hit Points from all healing (1 day)

Stage 3 as stage 2 (1 day)

Stage 4 @Damage[2d6[void]] damage and gains no benefit from healing (1 day)

Stage 5 as stage 4 (1 day)

Stage 6 dead, and rises as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.LHHgGSs0ELCR4CYK]{Ghoul} the next midnight.

Paralysis.name: 麻痹 Paralysis
Paralysis.description:
任何被食尸鬼（特征）的攻击命中的活着的、非精灵生物必须成功通过一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:15] 豁免，否则将变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹}。它可以在其每个回合结束时尝试一次新的豁免，并且该DC在每次此类豁免时累积降低1。

Any living, non-elf creature hit by a ghoul's attack must succeed at a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:15] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}. It can attempt a new save at the end of each of its turns, and the DC cumulatively decreases by 1 on each such save.

Mimnivix Ghoul.publicNotes:
伏网怪，也被称为艾特卡普，是丑陋的怪物，它们不仅栖息在蜘蛛与虫群的巢穴中，还会主动培育并照料这些害虫。

Web lurkers, known also as ettercaps, are ugly monsters that not only dwell within the lairs of spiders and swarms, but actively cultivate and shepherd such vermin.

Scalathrax Ghoul.name: 油鳞蛛 食尸鬼（特征） Scalathrax Ghoul

Oily Scales.name: 油滑鳞片 Oily Scales
Oily Scales.description:
油鳞蛛会不断分泌闪亮的油脂，使其异常滑溜。它将用于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.kMcV8e5EZUxa6evt]{挤入空间} 的体操检定结果，或用于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱} 的任何技能检定结果，视为比掷骰结果高一级的成功度。

油鳞蛛在受到任意数量的火焰伤害后，会失去此益处 1 分钟。

A scalathrax constantly sweats a glistening oil that makes it exceptionally slick. It treats the results of Acrobatics checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.kMcV8e5EZUxa6evt]{Squeeze} or of any skill check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} as one degree of success greater than the rolled result.

A scalathrax loses this benefit for 1 minute after it takes any amount of fire damage.

Scalathrax Venom.name: 油鳞蛛毒液 Scalathrax Venom
Scalathrax Venom.description:
豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:21]

最大持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}（1 轮）

阶段 2 笨拙 1 且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}（1 轮）

阶段 3 笨拙 1 且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 2}（1 轮）

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:21]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 clumsy 1 and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} (1 round)

Stage 3 clumsy 1 and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2} (1 round)

Spray Toxic Oil.name: 毒油喷射 Spray Toxic Oil
Spray Toxic Oil.description:
油鳞蛛从口中喷吐出一股毒油，形成一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:15]。区域内的生物必须尝试一次 @Check[type:reflex|dc:21|traits:damaging-effect] 豁免。

油鳞蛛在 [[/br 1d4 #Recharge Spray Toxic Oil]]{1d4 轮}内无法再次使用毒油喷射。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到 @Damage[1d8[poison]] 伤害。

失败 该生物受到 @Damage[2d8[poison]] 伤害。持续1分钟，该生物获得火焰 弱点 5，并且每当该生物使用已持用的武器进行攻击掷骰并大失败时，它会掉落该武器。

大失败 同失败，但受到 @Damage[4d8[poison]] 伤害。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.75B7z49jfQbWcSy9]{效果：毒油喷射}

The scalathrax disgorges a gout of toxic oil from its mouth in a @Template[type:cone|distance:15]. Creatures in the area must attempt a @Check[type:reflex|dc:21|traits:damaging-effect] save.

The scalathrax can't use Toxic Oil Spray again for [[/br 1d4 #Recharge Spray Toxic Oil]]{1d4 rounds}.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes @Damage[1d8[poison]] damage.

Failure The creature takes @Damage[2d8[poison]] damage. For 1 minute, the creature gains weakness to fire 5, and whenever the creature critically fails with an attack roll with a wielded weapon, it drops the weapon.

Critical Failure As failure, but @Damage[4d8[poison]] damage.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.75B7z49jfQbWcSy9]{Effect: Spray Toxic Oil}

Consume Flesh.name: 啃食尸体 Consume Flesh
Consume Flesh.description:
需求 食尸鬼（特征）与一具在过去1小时内死亡的生物的尸体相邻。

效果 食尸鬼（特征）吞食尸体的一块肉并恢复[[/r 1d6[治疗]]]生命值。

它从任意一具尸体恢复生命值的次数至多为一次。

Requirements The ghoul is adjacent to the corpse of a creature that died within the last hour.

Effect The ghoul devours a chunk of the corpse and regains [[/r 1d6[healing]]] Hit Points.

It can regain Hit Points from any given corpse only once.

Ghoul Fever.name: 食尸鬼热 Ghoul Fever
Ghoul Fever.description:
豁免投掷 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:15]

阶段 1 携带者且无不良效果（1天）

阶段 2 @Damage[2d6[void]] 伤害，且从所有治疗中恢复的生命值减半（1天）

阶段 3 同阶段2（1天）

阶段 4 @Damage[2d6[void]] 伤害，且无法从治疗中获得任何益处（1天）

阶段 5 同阶段4（1天）

阶段 6 死亡，并在下一个午夜以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.LHHgGSs0ELCR4CYK]{食尸鬼} 的形态复起。

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:15]

Stage 1 carrier with no ill effect (1 day)

Stage 2 @Damage[2d6[void]] damage and regains half as many Hit Points from all healing (1 day)

Stage 3 as stage 2 (1 day)

Stage 4 @Damage[2d6[void]] damage and gains no benefit from healing (1 day)

Stage 5 as stage 4 (1 day)

Stage 6 dead, and rises as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.LHHgGSs0ELCR4CYK]{Ghoul} the next midnight.

Scalathrax Ghoul.publicNotes:
这些滑溜、布满鳞片的恐怖之物栖居在幽暗地域偏远的洞穴网络中，偏好在狭窄的裂隙里筑巢。狩猎时，它们会用长腿弹射倒钩，或用透明的剧毒油液喷洒敌人。同一种油也覆盖在油鳞蛛的身体表面，而这一切都极其易燃——无论是覆在受害者身上，还是覆在油鳞蛛自身。

虽然油鳞蛛看起来像野兽，但它比表面更聪明，并能用湿黏、嘶滑的嗓音说话。绝大多数油鳞蛛脾气恶劣、动辄发怒，而且大多以杀戮为乐。与油鳞蛛结盟并非不可能，但这么做要么需要不断用新的生物供它们杀死作为贿赂，要么需要极具威吓力的个性——油鳞蛛往往敬重恃强凌弱之人，把他们视为自身残酷价值观的一面镜子。

These slippery, scaly horrors dwell in remote cave networks in the Darklands, preferring to nest in narrow fissures. When on the hunt, they flick barbs from their long legs, or spray down their foes with a clear, toxic oil. The same oil coats the scalathrax's body, all of which is quite flammable-whether it's coating a victim or the scalathrax itself.

While a scalathrax appears feral, it's more intelligent than it seems and is capable of speaking in a wet, slithery voice. The vast majority of scalathraxes are foul-tempered and quick to anger, and most of them enjoy killing. It's possible to forge an alliance with a scalathrax, but doing so requires either constant bribes of new creatures to kill or a particularly intimidating personality-scalathraxes often respect bullies, seeing in them a mirror of their own cruel values.

Seugathi Guard Ghoul.name: 双尾虫怪守卫 食尸鬼（特征） Seugathi Guard Ghoul
Seugathi Guard Ghoul.tokenName: 双尾虫怪守卫 Seugathi Guard

Occult Innate Spells.name: 神秘天生法术 Occult Innate Spells

Hypercognition.name: 极化认知 Hypercognition
Hypercognition.description:
你迅速整理并汇编与你当前状况相关的信息。作为施放此法术的一部分，你可以立刻使用至多6个回忆知识动作。对于这些动作，当你回忆知识时触发的任何特殊能力、反应动作（）或自由动作（）都无法使用。

You rapidly catalog and collate information relevant to your current situation. You can instantly use up to 6 Recall Knowledge actions as part of Casting this Spell. For these actions, you can't use any special abilities, reactions, or free actions that trigger when you Recall Knowledge.

Levitate.name: 浮空术 Levitate
Levitate.description:
你违逆重力，让目标浮空术并离地5英尺。你可以维持该法术，使目标向上或向下移动10英尺。因浮空术而漂浮在空中的生物进行攻击掷骰时承受–2环境减值。漂浮的生物可以花费一个【交互】动作来稳定自身，并在其该回合剩余时间内抵消该减值。如果目标邻接于一个固定的物体或具有足够稳定性的地形，它可以通过攀爬（如果表面是垂直的，如墙壁）或匍匐（如果表面是水平的，如天花板）沿着该表面移动。GM决定哪些表面可以被攀爬或匍匐通过。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.JqrTrvwV7pYStMXz]{法术效果：浮空术}

You defy gravity and levitate the target 5 feet off the ground. You can Sustain the spell to move the target up or down 10 feet. A creature floating in the air from levitate takes a –2 circumstance penalty to attack rolls. A floating creature can spend an Interact action to stabilize itself and negate this penalty for the remainder of its turn. If the target is adjacent to a fixed object or terrain of suitable stability, it can move across the surface by climbing (if the surface is vertical, like a wall) or crawling (if the surface is horizontal, such as a ceiling). The GM determines which surfaces can be climbed or crawled across.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.JqrTrvwV7pYStMXz]{Spell Effect: Levitate}

Mind Reading.name: 读心术 Mind Reading
Mind Reading.description:
通过一次粗略的精神接触，你试图读取目标的思想。它必须尝试一次意志豁免。随后，目标在1小时内暂时免疫你的读心术。

大成功或大失败成功 当你施放法术时，目标会从你那里感知到模糊的表层思绪。

成功 你会得知目标的智力调整值是高于、等于还是低于你的。

失败 当你施放法术时，你会从目标那里感知到模糊的表层思绪，并且你会得知其智力是高于、等于还是低于你的。

大成功或大失败失败 同失败，并且在法术的持续时间内，你可以维持该法术以再次侦测目标的表层思绪。目标不会获得任何额外的豁免。

With a cursory mental touch, you attempt to read the target's mind. It must attempt a Will save. The target then becomes temporarily immune to your mind reading for 1 hour.

Critical Success The target perceives vague surface thoughts from you when you Cast the Spell.

Success You find out whether the target's Intelligence modifier is higher than, equal to, or lower than yours.

Failure You perceive vague surface thoughts from the target when you Cast the Spell, and you find out whether its Intelligence is higher than, equal to, or lower than yours.

Critical Failure As failure, and for the duration of the spell, you can Sustain the spell to detect the target's surface thoughts again. The target doesn't receive any additional saves.

Daze.name: 眩晕术 Daze
Daze.description:
你侵入目标的心智，并用一次精神冲击使其目眩神迷。该冲击造成1d6点精神伤害，需要进行一次基础意志豁免。若目标在豁免中大失败，它还会获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

高度化（+2） 伤害增加1d6。

You push into the target's mind and daze it with a mental jolt. The jolt deals 1d6 mental damage, with a basic Will save. If the target critically fails the save, it is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Heightened (+2) The damage increases by 1d6.

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你释放出一道脉冲，用以记录周围是否存在魔法。除魔法的存在与否外，你不会获得任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你与盟友所拥有的魔法物品以及持续生效的法术。你仅会在该幻术魔法的效果位阶低于你的侦测魔法法术位阶时，侦测到幻术魔法。不过，具有幻术灵光但外观并不具欺骗性的物品（例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{隐形术药水}）通常仍会被正常侦测到。

升阶（3环）你得知该法术所侦测到的最强魔法效果的位阶或等级，由GM决定。

升阶（4环）同3环位阶，但你还会锁定最高位阶魔法的来源。与模糊感官类似，你不会得知确切位置，但能将来源缩小到一个5尺立方体内（若其大于该范围，则为最接近的范围）。

You send out a pulse that registers the presence of magic. You receive no information beyond the presence or absence of magic. You can choose to ignore magic you're fully aware of, such as the magic items and ongoing spells of you and your allies. You detect illusion magic only if that magic's effect has a lower rank than the rank of your detect magic spell. However, items that have an illusion aura but aren't deceptive in appearance (such as an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{Invisibility Potion}) typically are detected normally.

Heightened (3rd) You learn the rank or level of the most powerful magical effect the spell detects, as determined by the GM.

Heightened (4th) As 3rd rank, but you also pinpoint the source of the highest-rank magic. Like for an imprecise sense, you don't learn the exact location, but can narrow down the source to within a 5-foot cube (or the nearest if larger than that).

Telekinetic Hand.name: 念动力之手 Telekinetic Hand
Telekinetic Hand.description:
你创造出一只漂浮的魔法之手，它可以是隐形的或幽灵般的，抓住目标物体并将其缓慢地向任意方向浮空移动最多20英尺。当你维持该法术时，你可以让该物体额外移动20英尺。如果该法术结束时物体仍在空中，该物体会坠落。

升阶（3环） 你可以以一个无人持用且负载为1或更低的物体为目标。

升阶（5环） 射程增加至60英尺，且你可以以一个无人持用且负载为1或更低的物体为目标。

升阶（7环） 射程增加至60英尺，且你可以以一个无人持用且负载为2或更低的物体为目标。

You create a floating, magical hand, either invisible or ghostlike, that grasps the target object and levitates it slowly up to 20 feet in any direction. When you Sustain the spell, you can move the object an additional 20 feet. If the object is in the air when the spell ends, the object falls.

Heightened (3rd) You can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 1 or less.

Heightened (5th) The range increases to 60 feet, and you can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 1 or less.

Heightened (7th) The range increases to 60 feet, and you can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 2 or less.

Telekinetic Projectile.name: 念动射弹 Telekinetic Projectile
Telekinetic Projectile.description:
你将一件松散、无人看管且在射程内的物体掷向目标，该物体的负载为1或更少。对目标进行一次法术攻击掷骰。若你命中，则你造成2d6钝击、穿刺或挥砍伤害——取决于你投掷的物体。被掷出的物品的任何特定特征或魔法属性都不会影响该攻击或伤害。

大成功 你造成双倍伤害。

成功 你造成全额伤害。

强化（+1） 伤害增加1d6。

You hurl a loose, unattended object that is within range and that has 1 Bulk or less at the target. Make a spell attack roll against the target. If you hit, you deal 2d6 bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage--as appropriate for the object you hurled. No specific traits or magic properties of the hurled item affect the attack or the damage.

Critical Success You deal double damage.

Success You deal full damage.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Wand of See Invisibility (Level 2).name: 识破隐形魔杖（等级 2） Wand of See Invisibility (Level 2)
Wand of See Invisibility (Level 2).description:
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.jwK43yKsHTkJQvQ9]{见所未见}

这根短杖长约一英尺，内含一个法术。其外观通常与其中的法术相关。

启动 施法

频率 每日一次，外加过载

效果 你以标示的等级施放该法术。

制作需求 提供一次所列等级的该法术施放。

注：要创建特定法术的卷轴或魔杖，将该法术从资料库或资料库浏览器拖入PC、NPC或战利品演员的物品栏中。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.jwK43yKsHTkJQvQ9]{See the Unseen}

This baton is about a foot long and contains a single spell. The appearance typically relates to the spell within.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day, plus overcharge

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated level.

Craft Requirements Supply a listed-level casting of the spell.

Note: To create a scroll or wand of a specific spell, drag the spell from the compendium or compendium browser into the inventory of a PC, NPC, or loot actor.

Tremorsense (Imprecise) 30 feet.name: 震颤感知（不精确）30尺 Tremorsense (Imprecise) 30 feet

Telepathy 100 feet.name: 心灵感应 100 尺 Telepathy 100 feet

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 对抗魔法的所有豁免获得+1状态加值 +1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic

Command Confusion.name: 命令困惑 Command Confusion
Command Confusion.description:
触发 一个生物未能通过对双尾虫怪的迷心灵光的豁免

效果 双尾虫怪决定该 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑术} 生物在该轮攻击谁，而非由GM随机决定目标。

如果所选目标是该困惑术生物的盟友，该生物可以立刻尝试一次 @Check[type:will|dc:21] 意志豁免；成功时，其目标如困惑术通常规则般随机决定；大成功时，该目标不再处于困惑术状态。

Trigger A creature fails its save against the seugathi's mindfog aura

Effect The seugathi determines who the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} creature attacks for that round, instead of the target being randomly determined by the GM.

If the chosen target is the confused creature's ally, the creature can immediately attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:21] save; on a success, its target is determined randomly as normal for confusion, and on a critical success the target is no longer confused.

Mindfog Aura.name: 迷心灵光 Mindfog Aura
Mindfog Aura.description:
20英尺。一名生物在该灵光中开始其回合时，必须在一次 @Check[type:will|dc:21] 豁免中获得成功，否则将陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑} 状态，持续1轮；若成功，则该生物获得持续1分钟的暂时免疫。双尾虫怪可以以具有专注（特征）的单动作来压制或启动该灵光。

20 feet. A creature that starts its turn in the aura must succeed at a @Check[type:will|dc:21] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 round; on a success, that creature is temporarily immune for 1 minute. A seugathi can suppress or activate this aura as a single action with the concentrate trait.

Envenom Weapon.name: 武器涂毒 Envenom Weapon
Envenom Weapon.description:
双尾虫怪将它们的双尾虫怪毒涂抹在它们所持用的一件武器上。

The seugathi applies their seugathi venom to one weapon they wield.

Magic Item Mastery.name: 精通魔法物品 Magic Item Mastery

Seugathi Venom.name: 双尾虫怪毒 Seugathi Venom
Seugathi Venom.description:
豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:21]

最大持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]] 伤害和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{目眩 1}（1 轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[2d6[poison]] 伤害和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{耳聋}以及 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{目眩 2}（1 轮）

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:21]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[2d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} (1 round)

Consume Flesh.name: 啃食尸体 Consume Flesh
Consume Flesh.description:
需求 食尸鬼与一具在过去 1 小时内死亡的生物的尸体相邻。

效果 食尸鬼吞食尸体的一块肉并恢复 [[/r 1d6[治疗]]] 生命值。

它从任意一具给定的尸体中恢复生命值最多只能一次。

Requirements The ghoul is adjacent to the corpse of a creature that died within the last hour.

Effect The ghoul devours a chunk of the corpse and regains [[/r 1d6[healing]]] Hit Points.

It can regain Hit Points from any given corpse only once.

Ghoul Fever.name: 食尸鬼热 Ghoul Fever
Ghoul Fever.description:
豁免掷骰 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:15]

阶段 1 携带者，无不良效果（1 天）

阶段 2 @Damage[2d6[void]] 伤害，且从所有治疗中恢复的生命值减半（1 天）

阶段 3 同阶段 2（1 天）

阶段 4 @Damage[2d6[void]] 伤害，且无法从治疗中获得任何益处（1 天）

阶段 5 同阶段 4（1 天）

阶段 6 死亡，并在下一次午夜作为一只 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.LHHgGSs0ELCR4CYK]{食尸鬼（特征）} 复起。

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:15]

Stage 1 carrier with no ill effect (1 day)

Stage 2 @Damage[2d6[void]] damage and regains half as many Hit Points from all healing (1 day)

Stage 3 as stage 2 (1 day)

Stage 4 @Damage[2d6[void]] damage and gains no benefit from healing (1 day)

Stage 5 as stage 4 (1 day)

Stage 6 dead, and rises as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.LHHgGSs0ELCR4CYK]{Ghoul} the next midnight.

Paralysis.name: 麻痹 Paralysis
Paralysis.description:
任何被食尸鬼（特征）的攻击命中的活体、非精灵生物必须成功通过一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:15] 豁免，否则将变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹}。它可以在其每个回合结束时尝试一次新的豁免，并且在每次此类豁免时DC累计降低1。

Any living, non-elf creature hit by a ghoul's attack must succeed at a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:15] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}. It can attempt a new save at the end of each of its turns, and the DC cumulatively decreases by 1 on each such save.

Seugathi Guard Ghoul.publicNotes:
夺心巨虫孕育的最常见双尾虫怪是双尾虫怪仆从。它们的主人会为其配备在任务中有用的工具（通常是一根魔杖和一把武器），并且除了能用于完成其被烙印的使命之外，它们很少重视其他材料事物。

邪恶、异域的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary-2.Actor.wxBQsGLdti2xcGVT]{夺心巨虫} 通过仪式性的魔法使自己受孕，以制造一种被称为双尾虫怪的蠕虫状仆役生物。这些生物诞生时就带有强烈的心灵驱动，去代表夺心巨虫那影响深远的计划完成某项任务。这些指令多种多样、诡异离奇，并且通常对类人生物的生命极为残酷。

The most common seugathis spawned by neothelids are seugathi servants. Their masters equip them with tools useful in their tasks (often a wand and a weapon), and they rarely value other material things beyond their usefulness in completing their imprinted mission.

The wicked, alien @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary-2.Actor.wxBQsGLdti2xcGVT]{Neothelids} impregnate themselves through ritualistic magic to produce wormlike servitor creatures called seugathis. These creatures spawn with a strong psychic drive to complete some task on behalf of the neothelids' far-reaching plans. These directives are diverse, strange, and usually cruel toward humanoid life.
Seugathi Guard Ghoul.blurb:
双尾虫怪仆从
Seugathi servant
Seugathi Guard Ghoul.allSaves: +1 status to all saves vs. magic
Seugathi Guard Ghoul.prototypeToken: 双尾虫怪守卫 Seugathi Guard

Aesephna Menhemes.name: 牧师艾斯法娜·曼妮姆斯 Aesephna Menhemes
Aesephna Menhemes.tokenName: 牧师艾斯法娜·曼妮姆斯 Aesephna Menhemes

Specific Deity Lore.name: 特定神祇传说 Specific Deity Lore

Divine Prepared Spells.name: 神圣预备法术 Divine Prepared Spells

Bless.name: 祝福术 Bless
Bless.description:
来自彼界的祝福帮助你的伙伴精准命中。你与盟友在该发散范围内时，攻击掷骰获得+1状态加值。在后续回合中，每轮1次，你可以维持该法术，使发散的半径增加10英尺。

祝福术可以反制 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.7ZinJNzxq0XF0oMx]{绝望术}。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.RfCEHpMoEAZvB9IZ]{光环：祝福术}

Blessings from beyond help your companions strike true. You and your allies gain a +1 status bonus to attack rolls while within the emanation. Once per round on subsequent turns, you can Sustain the spell to increase the emanation's radius by 10 feet.

Bless can counteract @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.7ZinJNzxq0XF0oMx]{Bane}.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.RfCEHpMoEAZvB9IZ]{Aura: Bless}

Deafness.name: 耳聋 Deafness
Deafness.description:
目标失去听力；它必须尝试一次强韧豁免。随后，目标在1分钟内暂时免疫。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened} 状态，持续1轮。

失败 目标陷入耳聋（Deafened）10分钟。

大失败 目标永久耳聋（Deafened）。

The target loses hearing; it must attempt a Fortitude save. The target is then temporarily immune for 1 minute.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened} for 1 round.

Failure The target is Deafened for 10 minutes.

Critical Failure The target is Deafened permanently.

Vital Beacon.name: 生命信标 Vital Beacon
Vital Beacon.description:
生命力从你身上向外辐射，使他人能够恳求并获得治疗。每轮一次，你或一名盟友可以使用一个交互动作来恳求并将手放在你身上以恢复生命值。每当信标治疗某人时，它的强度都会降低。它为第一个生物恢复 4d10 生命值，为第二个恢复 4d8 生命值，为第三个恢复 4d6 生命值，为第四个恢复 4d4 生命值，之后该法术结束。你同一时间只能维持一个活力信标处于生效状态。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.WWtSEJGwKY4bQpUn]{法术效果：活力信标}

升阶（+1） 信标每次进行治疗时会额外恢复 1 个生命值骰，使用与该步骤其他骰子相同的骰子大小。

Vitality radiates outward from you, allowing others to supplicate and receive healing. Once per round, either you or an ally can use an Interact action to supplicate and lay hands upon you to regain Hit Points. Each time the beacon heals someone, it decreases in strength. It restores 4d10 Hit Points to the first creature, 4d8 Hit Points to the second, 4d6 Hit Points to the third, and 4d4 Hit Points to the fourth, after which the spell ends. You can have only one vital beacon active at a time.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.WWtSEJGwKY4bQpUn]{Spell Effect: Vital Beacon}

Heightened (+1) The beacon restores one additional die of Hit Points each time it heals, using the same die size as the others for that step.

Forbidding Ward.name: 禁制结界 Forbidding Ward
Forbidding Ward.description:
你守护一名盟友，使其免受来自目标敌人的攻击与敌对法术。目标盟友在对抗目标敌人的攻击、法术与其他效果时，获得+1状态加值至护甲等级与豁免掷骰。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ctMxYPGEpstvhW9C]{法术效果：禁制守卫}

强化（6环） 状态加值提升至+2。

You ward an ally against the attacks and hostile spells from the target enemy. The target ally gains a +1 status bonus to Armor Class and saving throws against the target enemy's attacks, spells, and other effects.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ctMxYPGEpstvhW9C]{Spell Effect: Forbidding Ward}

Heightened (6th) The status bonus increases to +2.

Light.name: 光亮术 Light
Light.description:
你创造一个光球，以你选择的颜色在20英尺半径内提供明亮光照（并在接下来的20英尺提供昏暗光照）。如果你在与一名自愿生物相同的空间内创造该光球，你可以将该光球附着在该生物上，使其在该生物移动时漂浮在其附近。你可以维持该法术以将光球移动至多60英尺；你可以将其附着到或从一名生物上分离，作为该移动的一部分。

你可以解消该法术。如果你在已经有四个光亮术法术处于生效状态时施放该法术，你必须选择一个现有法术使其结束。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.cVVZXNbV0nElVOPZ]{法术效果：光亮术}

升阶（4环） 该光球在60英尺半径内提供光照（并在接下来的60英尺提供昏暗光照）。

You create an orb of light that sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius (and dim light for the next 20 feet) in a color you choose. If you create the light in the same space as a willing creature, you can attach the light to the creature, causing it to float near that creature as it moves. You can Sustain the spell to move the light up to 60 feet; you can attach or detach it from a creature as part of this movement.

You can Dismiss the spell. If you Cast the Spell while you already have four light spells active, you must choose one of the existing spells to end.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.cVVZXNbV0nElVOPZ]{Spell Effect: Light}

Heightened (4th) The orb sheds light in a 60-foot radius (and dim light for the next 60 feet).

Divine Lance.name: 圣枪术 Divine Lance
Divine Lance.description:
你释放一道神圣能量光束。对目标的AC进行一次远程法术攻击。命中时，目标受到2d4点灵魂伤害（大成功时伤害加倍）。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加1d4。

You unleash a beam of divine energy. Make a ranged spell attack against the target's AC. On a hit, the target takes 2d4 spirit damage (double damage on a critical hit).

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Fear.name: 恐惧术 Fear
Fear.description:
你向目标植入恐惧术；它必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功或大失败成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}。

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}。

大成功或大失败失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing}，持续1轮。

升阶（3环） 你最多可以以五个生物为目标。

You plant fear in the target; it must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} for 1 round.

Heightened (3rd) You can target up to five creatures.

Infuse Vitality.name: 注入活力 Infuse Vitality
Infuse Vitality.description:
你用生命能量强化攻击。目标数量等于你施放此法术时花费的动作数量。每个目标的徒手与武器打击造成额外1d4活力伤害。（此伤害通常只会伤害不死生物）。如果你具有圣洁（特征），你可以将该特征添加到此法术以及受此法术影响的打击上。

升阶（3环） 伤害提升至2d4伤害。

升阶（5环） 伤害提升至3d4伤害。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.X7RD0JRxhJV9u2LC]{法术效果：灌注活力}

You empower attacks with vital energy. The number of targets is equal to the number of actions you spent casting this spell. Each target's unarmed and weapon Strikes deal an extra 1d4 vitality damage. (This damage typically damages only undead). If you have the holy trait, you can add that trait to this spell and to the Strikes affected by the spell.

Heightened (3rd) The damage increases to 2d4 damage.

Heightened (5th) The damage increases to 3d4 damage.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.X7RD0JRxhJV9u2LC]{Spell Effect: Infuse Vitality}

Inner Radiance Torrent.name: 内在光辉洪流 Inner Radiance Torrent
Inner Radiance Torrent.description:
你逐渐将你的灵性能量显现在你捧起的双手中，随后发射出一阵箭矢与光束风暴，对一条60尺直线内的所有生物造成4d4力场伤害。区域内的生物必须尝试一次基础反射豁免。若大失败，它们还会目盲1轮。你在施放此法术时花费的动作数决定其区域。若该直线穿过一片魔法黑暗术区域，或以受魔法黑暗术影响的生物为目标，内在光辉激流会尝试反制该黑暗术。

2 (姿势, 言语) 该直线长60尺。

3 (材料, 姿势, 言语) 该直线长@Template[type:line|distance:120]{120 feet}。

两轮 该直线长120尺。若你以3个动作施放该法术，你可以选择不完成法术，并在你下个回合再花费3个动作以进一步强化该法术。若你如此选择，此法术造成的伤害提高4d4，且你进入持续1分钟的闪耀状态，使你以光亮术发光，并对在其回合结束时与你相邻的生物造成@Damage[1[force]]伤害。

升阶（+1） 初始伤害，以及2轮施放时间所获得的额外伤害，分别各提高4d4；而你在闪耀状态下对相邻生物造成的伤害提高1。

You gradually manifest your spiritual energy into your cupped hands before firing off a storm of bolts and beams that deal 4d4 force damage to all creatures in a 60-foot line. Creatures in the area must attempt a basic Reflex save. On a critical failure, they're also blinded for 1 round. The number of actions you spend when Casting this Spell determines the area. If the line passes through an area of magical darkness or targets a creature affected by magical darkness, inner radiance torrent attempts to counteract the darkness.

2 (somatic, verbal) The line is 60 feet long.

3 (material, somatic, verbal) The line is @Template[type:line|distance:120]{120 feet} long.

Two Rounds The line is 120 feet long. If you spend 3 actions casting the spell, you can avoid finishing the spell and spend another 3 actions on your next turn to empower the spell even further. If you choose to do so, the damage dealt by this spell increases by 4d4, and you enter a shining state for 1 minute, causing you to glow with light and deal @Damage[1[force]] damage to creatures that end their turn adjacent to you.
