Heightened (+1) The initial damage, as well as the additional damage for the 2-round casting time, each increase by 4d4, and the damage to adjacent creatures dealt while in your shining state increases by 1.

Mind of Menace.name: 威胁之心 Mind of Menace
Mind of Menace.description:
这个法术会防护那些试图颠覆你心智的敌人，并将精神魔法反弹给他们。当法术完成时，你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.hi56uHG1aAb84Zzu]{以恐惧术作战} 反应动作（）；一旦你使用该反应动作（），该法术结束。

@Check[type:will|name:以恐惧术作战|traits:惑控系]

This spell wards against those who attempt to subvert your mind and turns mental magic back on them. When the spell is complete, you gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.hi56uHG1aAb84Zzu]{Fight with Fear} reaction; once you use the reaction, the spell ends.

@Check[type:will|name:Fight with Fear|traits:enchantment]

Spiritual Guardian.name: 灵性守护者 Spiritual Guardian
Spiritual Guardian.description:
一个由魔法力场构成的中型守卫者出现在射程内一个未被占据的空间中。灵体守卫者半透明，并挥舞着一件你正持用或穿戴的某件武器的幽灵回响。若你拥有神祇，守卫者会呈现为你神祇的某位随从或仆役的形态。若你将该法术圣化，守卫者的攻击也会被圣化。

生物可以穿过守卫者的空间，但不能在其中结束其移动。你与盟友可以与守卫者进行夹击。守卫者不具备生物通常应有的其他任何属性，除了50点生命值；这些生命值无法以任何方式恢复，且只有在保护生物时才会损失（见下文）。

当你施放法术以及你每次维持它时，你可以让守卫者移动到你120英尺内任意一个未被占据的空间，并选择攻击或保护。

  • 攻击 守卫者对一个相邻生物进行一次近战法术攻击，命中时造成3d8伤害（若为大成功或大失败则造成双倍伤害）。伤害类型与所选武器相同（若为灵活武器，则可为其任一类型）。若那对该生物更为不利（由GM判定），则该攻击改为造成灵魂伤害。此攻击使用并计入你的多重攻击减值。
  • 保护 守卫者保护你选择的一个生物。每当所选生物将要受到伤害且守卫者与其相邻时，守卫者先承受其中前10点伤害，而非由该盟友承受。该保护持续，直到你命令术守卫者去攻击或去保护不同的生物，或守卫者被摧毁。

升阶（+2） 守卫者的伤害增加1d8，且其生命值增加20。

A Medium guardian made of magical force appears in an unoccupied space in range. The spiritual guardian is translucent and wields a ghostly echo of one weapon you're wielding or wearing. If you have a deity, the guardian takes the form of one of your deity's attendants or servitors. If you sanctify the spell, the guardian's attacks are sanctified as well.

Creatures can move through the guardian's space but can't end their movement in it. You and your allies can flank with the guardian. The guardian doesn't have any other attributes a creature would normally have, aside from 50 Hit Points that it can't recover by any means and that it can lose only when protecting a creature (see below).

When you Cast the Spell and each time you Sustain it, you can have the guardian move to any unoccupied space within 120 feet of you and either attack or protect.

  • Attack The guardian makes a melee spell attack against an adjacent creature, dealing 3d8 damage on a hit (or double damage on a critical hit). The damage type is the same as the chosen weapon (or any of its types for a versatile weapon). The attack deals spirit damage instead if that would be more detrimental to the creature (as determined by the GM). This attack uses and contributes to your multiple attack penalty.
  • Protect The guardian protects a creature of your choice. Each time the chosen creature would take damage and the guardian is adjacent to it, the guardian takes the first 10 damage instead of the ally. This protection lasts until you command the guardian to attack or to protect a different creature, or the guardian is destroyed.

Heightened (+2) The guardian's damage increases by 1d8, and its Hit Points increase by 20.

Breath of Life.name: 生命气息 Breath of Life
Breath of Life.description:
触发 射程内的一名活的生物将会死亡。

你的祝福在生物死亡的瞬间将其复苏。你阻止目标死亡，并为目标恢复 5d8 生命值。若触发的效果是死亡效果，或是不留下任何遗骸的效果（例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.r7ihOgKv19eJQnik]{Disintegrate}），你就无法使用复苏之息。

升阶（+2） 治疗量增加 1d8。

Trigger A living creature within range would die.

Your blessing revives a creature at the moment of its death. You prevent the target from dying and restore 5d8 Hit Points to the target. You can't use breath of life if the triggering effect was a death effect or an effect that leaves no remains, such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.r7ihOgKv19eJQnik]{Disintegrate}

Heightened (+2) The healing increases by 1d8.

Message.name: 传讯术 Message
Message.description:
你轻声说出词语，但它们并不会从你的口中传出，而是直接传入目标的耳中。其他人听到你的话并不会比你正常动嘴唇时更清楚，但目标能听到你的话，就仿佛他们正站在你身旁。目标可以用反应动作（）作出简短回应；若他们愿意，也可以在其下一回合用自由动作（）回应，但他们必须能看见你且在射程内才能这样做。若他们回应，其回应会像原本的传讯术一样，直接传到你的耳中。

升阶（3环） 该法术的射程增加至500英尺。

You mouth words quietly, but instead of coming out of your mouth, they're transferred directly to the ears of the target. While others can't hear your words any better than if you normally mouthed them, the target can hear your words as if they were standing next to you. The target can give a brief response as a reaction, or as a free action on their next turn if they wish, but they must be able to see you and be within range to do so. If they respond, their response is delivered directly to your ear, just like the original message.

Heightened (3rd) The spell's range increases to 500 feet.

Noise Blast.name: 噪音爆破 Noise Blast
Noise Blast.description:
一阵刺耳的噪音爆发而出，造成2d10音波伤害。每个生物必须尝试一次强韧豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害，并在1轮内处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{耳聋}。

大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，耳聋1分钟，并处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1}。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加1d10。

A cacophonous noise blasts out, dealing 2d10 sonic damage. Each creature must attempt a Fortitude save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage, is deafened for 1 minute, and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d10.

Focusing Hum.name: 专注嗡鸣 Focusing Hum
Focusing Hum.description:
你让周围的空气充满一种可维持的嗡鸣，使其中的生物能够抵抗分心。处于该区域内的生物在陷入麻木而进行施法时，任何纯骰检定的DC降低2。处于该区域内的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused}生物不会攻击任何人，包括他们自己，而是失去连贯说话的能力。你在进行潜行检定以@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{Hide}和@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak}时承受-2减值。

You infuse the air around you with a sustained hum that allows creatures within it to resist distractions. The DC of any flat check to Cast a Spell while stupefied for creatures within the area is 2 lower. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} creatures in the area don't attack anyone, including themselves, and instead lose the ability to speak coherently. You take a -2 penalty to Stealth checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{Hide} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak}.

Phoenix Ward.name: 凤凰结界 Phoenix Ward
Phoenix Ward.description:
你在自己周围升起一道炽焰护盾术，获得火焰抗力10。若你承受的火焰伤害将使你降至0生命值，凤凰结界会吸收所有超过将你降至1生命值所需数值的伤害。随后，结界以凤凰之翼形态的炽烈火焰进行一次光辉的展现来治疗你，并以光亮术笼罩你。你恢复等同于4d8 + 被吸收的伤害的生命值；这是一个治疗生命力效果。随后，凤凰结界结束，且你在24小时内无法再次施放它。

升阶（+1） 治疗增加1d8。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.0eP0JRBPwfRyu7gN]{法术效果：凤凰结界}

You raise a fiery shield around yourself, gaining resistance 10 to fire. If you take fire damage that would reduce you to 0 Hit Points, the phoenix ward absorbs any damage beyond the amount that would bring you to 1 Hit Point. The ward then heals you in a brilliant display of flames in the shape of a phoenix's wings and envelop you in light. You regain Hit Points equal to 4d8 + the absorbed damage; this is a healing vitality effect. The phoenix ward then ends, and you can't cast it again for 24 hours.

Heightened (+1) The healing increases by 1d8.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.0eP0JRBPwfRyu7gN]{Spell Effect: Phoenix Ward}

Agonizing Despair.name: 哀悔摧心 Agonizing Despair
Agonizing Despair.description:
你的目标的心智坠入一口深邃的恐惧之井，专注于根深蒂固的恐惧术以至于痛苦不堪。目标进行一次意志豁免，并受到 @Damage[4d6[mental]] 伤害。

大成功或大失败 成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标受到一半伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}。

失败 目标受到全额伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}。

大成功或大失败 失败 目标受到双倍伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加 @Damage[2d6[mental]]。

Your target's mind tumbles down a deep well of dread, dwelling so intently on deep-seated fears that it's painful. The target takes @Damage[4d6[mental]] damage with a Will saving throw.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes half damage and becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The target takes full damage and becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Critical Failure The target takes double damage and becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}.

Heightened (+1) Increase the damage by @Damage[2d6[mental]].

Divine Wrath.name: 神圣狂怒 Divine Wrath
Divine Wrath.description:
你引导神祇之怒对抗你的敌人。你对区域内的敌人造成4d10点灵魂伤害，具体取决于它们的强韧豁免。

大成功或大失败 成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害并获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}。

大成功或大失败 失败 该生物受到全额伤害并获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}；当其处于恶心状态时，它还会获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加1d10。

You channel the fury of divinity against your foes. You deal 4d10 spirit damage to enemies in the area, depending on their Fortitude save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Critical Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}; while it's sickened, it's also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d10.

Guidance.name: 指引 Guidance
Guidance.description:
你请求超自然存在的指引，使目标在持续时间结束前进行的一次攻击掷骰、察觉检定、豁免检定或技能检定中获得+1状态加值。目标必须在掷骰前选择将该加值用于哪一次掷骰。若目标使用了该加值，则该法术结束。无论如何，随后目标获得持续1小时的暂时免疫。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3qHKBDF7lrHw8jFK]{法术效果：指引}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3LyOkV25p7wA181H]{效果：指引免疫}

You ask for the guidance of supernatural entities, granting the target a +1 status bonus to one attack roll, Perception check, saving throw, or skill check the target attempts before the duration ends. The target chooses which roll to use the bonus on before rolling. If the target uses the bonus, the spell ends. Either way, the target is then temporarily immune for 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3qHKBDF7lrHw8jFK]{Spell Effect: Guidance}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3LyOkV25p7wA181H]{Effect: Guidance Immunity}

Divine Innate Spells.name: 神圣先天法术 Divine Innate Spells

Heal.name: 治疗术 Heal
Heal.description:
你引导生命能量来治疗活物或伤害不死生物。如果目标是自愿的活体生物，你恢复1d8点生命值。如果目标是不死生物，你对其造成等量的生命力伤害，并且它进行一次基础强韧豁免。你在施放此法术时花费的动作数量决定其目标、射程、区域以及其他参数。

1 该法术的射程为接触。

2 (concentrate) 该法术的射程为30尺。如果你在治疗一个活体生物，使恢复的生命值增加8点。

3 (concentrate) 你在一个@Template[type:emanation|distance:30]中散布生命能量。这会以爆发内所有活体与不死生物为目标。

升阶（+1） 治疗或伤害的数值增加1d8，而2-动作版本的额外治疗增加8点。

You channel vital energy to heal the living or damage the undead. If the target is a willing living creature, you restore 1d8 Hit Points. If the target is undead, you deal that amount of vitality damage to it, and it gets a basic Fortitude save. The number of actions you spend when Casting this Spell determines its targets, range, area, and other parameters.

1 The spell has a range of touch.

2 (concentrate) The spell has a range of 30 feet. If you're healing a living creature, increase the Hit Points restored by 8.

3 (concentrate) You disperse vital energy in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]. This targets all living and undead creatures in the burst.

Heightened (+1) The amount of healing or damage increases by 1d8, and the extra healing for the 2-action version increases by 8.

Healing Hands.name: 治疗之手 Healing Hands
Healing Hands.description:
当牧师施放 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{治疗术} 时，他们掷骰 d10 而不是 d8。

When the priest casts @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{Heal}, they roll d10s instead of d8s.

Steady Spellcasting.name: 稳定施法 Steady Spellcasting
Steady Spellcasting.description:
如果另一个生物的反应动作（）会干扰牧师的施法动作，则牧师尝试一次 @Check[type:flat|dc:15]。若牧师成功，则其动作不会被干扰。

If another creatures reaction would disrupt the priest's spellcasting action, the priest attempts a @Check[type:flat|dc:15]. If the priest succeeds, their action isn't disrupted.

Toughness.name: 坚韧 Toughness
Toughness.description:
该NPC格外坚韧。他们的最大生命值增加其等级（最低1）。他们进行的任何复苏检定的DC等于9 + 其濒死（状态）值。

This NPC is especially tough. They increase their maximum Hit Points by their level (minimum 1). The DC of any recovery check they attempt is equal to 9 + their dying condition value.

Site Bound.name: 束缚之地 Site Bound
Site Bound.description:
区域 D18

典型的幽灵（特征）只能离开其被杀之处或其出没之地很短的距离。典型的限制是120英尺。有些幽灵（特征）则不是被束缚于某个地点，而是被束缚于一个对它而言意义非凡的房间、建筑、物品或生物。

Area D18

A typical ghost can stray only a short distance from where it was killed or the place it haunts. A typical limit is 120 feet. Some ghosts are instead bound to a room, building, item, or creature that was special to it rather than a location.

Improved Communal Healing.name: 强化群体治疗 Improved Communal Healing
Improved Communal Healing.description:
当艾瑟芙娜施放以单个生物为目标的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{治疗术}时，她也会为自己或射程内的任意其他生物恢复等同于该法术环阶的生命值。

When Aesephna casts @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{Heal} targeting a single creature, she also restores Hit Points equal to the spell's rank to herself or any other creature within range of the spell.

Rejuvenation.name: 复生 Rejuvenation
Rejuvenation.description:
纠正导致平民死亡的不公正事件会让它得以前往来世。

当幽灵（特征）被摧毁时，它会在其所束缚的地点内于[[/br 2d4 #days]]{2d4天}后重新成形，且完全痊愈。只有当有人确定其存在的原因，并纠正阻止灵魂休息的一切时，幽灵（特征）才能被永久摧毁。

Setting right the injustice that led to the commoner's death allows it to move on to the afterlife.

When a ghost is destroyed, it re-forms after [[/br 2d4 #days]]{2d4 days} within the location it's bound to, fully healed. A ghost can be permanently destroyed only if someone determines the reason for its existence and sets right whatever prevents the spirit from resting.

Aesephna Menhemes.privateNotes:
此版本的阿塞芙娜·门赫梅斯是在《雇佣兵市场》第1卷以及《游戏主持指南》中的 NPC 画廊的帮助下创建的。

This version of Asephna Menhemes was created with the help of Mercenary Marketplace Volume 1, and the NPC Gallery from the Gamemastery guide.
Aesephna Menhemes.blurb:
女性幽灵（特征）冒险者
Female ghost adventurer
Aesephna Menhemes.prototypeToken: 牧师艾斯法娜·曼妮姆斯 Aesephna Menhemes

Otari Ilvashti.name: 奥塔里·伊瓦什提 Otari Ilvashti
Otari Ilvashti.tokenName: 奥塔里·伊瓦什提 Otari Ilvashti

Site Bound.name: 束缚之地 Site Bound
Site Bound.description:
区域 D18

典型的幽灵（特征）只能离它被杀的地点或它出没的地方不远。典型的限制是120尺。一些幽灵（特征）则不是被束缚在某个地点，而是被束缚在一间房间、一栋建筑、一件物品或一个对它而言很特别的生物上。

Area D18

A typical ghost can stray only a short distance from where it was killed or the place it haunts. A typical limit is 120 feet. Some ghosts are instead bound to a room, building, item, or creature that was special to it rather than a location.

Rejuvenation.name: 复生 Rejuvenation
Rejuvenation.description:
确保获得玫瑰团的四件遗珍并将其放置在D13区域的祭坛上，可让玫瑰团继续前往来世。

当一个幽灵（特征）被摧毁时，它会在其所绑定的地点于[[/br 2d4 #days]]{2d4 days}后重新形成，并完全恢复。只有在有人查明其存在的原因，并纠正任何阻止灵体休息的事物时，幽灵（特征）才能被永久摧毁。

Securing the four icons of the Roseguard and placing them on the altar in area D13 allows the Roseguard to move on to the afterlife.

When a ghost is destroyed, it re-forms after [[/br 2d4 #days]]{2d4 days} within the location it's bound to, fully healed. A ghost can be permanently destroyed only if someone determines the reason for its existence and sets right whatever prevents the spirit from resting.

Sneak Attack.name: 偷袭 Sneak Attack
Sneak Attack.description:
奥塔里对措手不及的生物造成额外2d6点精准伤害。

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SneakAttack]

Otari deals 2d6 extra precision damage to off-guard creatures.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SneakAttack]

Debilitating Strike.name: 致残打击 Debilitating Strike
Debilitating Strike.description:
触发 佣兵游荡者的打击命中一名措手不及的生物并造成伤害

施加下列一种衰弱，持续至佣兵游荡者下个回合结束：

  • 衰弱 目标的速度承受-10英尺的状态减值。
  • 衰弱 目标变为@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1}。

@Compendium[pf2e.feat-effects.yBTASi3FvnReAwHy]{效果：衰弱打击}

Trigger The Mercenary Rogue's Strike hits an off-guard creature and deals damage

Apply one of the following debilitations, which lasts until the end of the Mercenary Rogue's next turn:

  • Debilitation The target takes a -10-foot status penalty to its Speeds.
  • Debilitation The target becomes @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1}.

@Compendium[pf2e.feat-effects.yBTASi3FvnReAwHy]{Effect: Debilitating Strike}

Sidestep.name: 侧步 Sidestep
Sidestep.description:
触发：以雇佣盗贼为目标的打击的攻击掷骰失败，或大失败。

雇佣盗贼灵巧地快步避开攻击，让这一击继续打向其身旁的生物。将该攻击重定向至一个由雇佣盗贼选择、与其相邻且在触发攻击触及范围内的生物。攻击者对新的目标重骰该打击的攻击掷骰。 

Trigger: The attack roll for a Strike targeting the Mercenary Rogue fails, or critically fails.

The Mercenary Rogue deftly steps out of the way of the attack, letting the blow continue to a creature next to them. Redirect the attack to a creature of the Mercenary Rogue's choice adjacent to them, and within reach of the triggering attack. The attacker rerolls the Strike's attack roll against the new target.

Feint.name: 虚招 Feint
Feint.description:
需求 你处于你尝试对其进行虚招的目标的近战触及范围内。

你以误导性的花招动作，使对手未能准备好应对你真正的攻击。尝试一次欺瞒检定，对抗你的目标的察觉DC。

大成功或大失败 你完全扰乱了敌人针对你的防御。直到你下个回合结束为止，你对其进行的近战攻击中，目标获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}。

成功 你的敌人上当了，但只是一瞬间。在你当前回合结束前，你对其尝试的下一次近战攻击中，目标处于off-guard状态。

大成功或大失败 你的虚招适得其反。直到你下个回合结束为止，目标对你进行的近战攻击中，你处于off-guard状态。

Requirements You are within melee reach of the target you attempt to Feint.

With a misleading flourish, you leave an opponent unprepared for your real attack. Attempt a Deception check against your target's Perception DC.

Critical Success You throw your enemy's defenses against you entirely off. The target is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} against melee attacks that you attempt against it until the end of your next turn.

Success Your foe is fooled, but only momentarily. The target is off-guard against the next melee attack that you attempt against it before the end of your current turn.

Critical Failure Your feint backfires. You are off-guard against melee attacks the target attempts against you until the end of your next turn.

Sneak.name: 潜行 Sneak
Sneak.description:
你可以在变为或保持 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{未被察觉} 的同时尝试移动到另一个位置。疾行至多你 速度 的一半。（如果你具有相应的 移动 类型，你可以在掘地、攀爬、飞行或游泳时使用 潜行 来替代疾行；你必须以该 速度 的一半移动。）

如果某个 生物 未察觉到你，且该 生物 不可能观察到你（对典型 生物 而言，这包括当你处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}、观察者处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲}，或你在 黑暗 中且该 生物 无法在 黑暗 中视物时），那么对于你在进行 潜行 的 检定 中掷出的任何大失败，你改为获得 失败。若你对这类 生物 失去 掩蔽 或 高等掩蔽，或不再对其处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}，你也仍会保持未被察觉。

在你的 移动 结束时，GM 会秘密为你掷你的 隐匿 检定，并将结果与每个在你开始移动时对其处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{躲藏} 或未被察觉的 生物 的 察觉 DC 进行比较。若你在整个疾行过程中始终对该 生物 具有 掩蔽 或 高等掩蔽，你的隐匿 检定 获得来自 掩蔽 的 +2 环境加值（或来自 高等掩蔽 的 +4）。由于你在移动，来自 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{采取掩蔽} 的加值提升不适用。若在你的 移动 结束时，你既未对某 生物 处于隐蔽，也未对其拥有 掩蔽 或 高等掩蔽，则你不会与该 生物 进行掷骰对抗。该 生物 会自动将你变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.1wQY3JYyhMYeeV2G]{被观察}。

成功 在你的 移动 期间该 生物 未察觉到你，并且在 移动 结束时仍未察觉到你。

只要你做出任何非 躲藏、潜行或踏步的行为，你就会立刻变为被观察。若你尝试对某 生物 进行打击，该 生物 会在那次 攻击 中依然处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}，随后你变为被观察。若你进行任何其他行为，除非 GM 另有裁定，否则你会在行动前一刻变为被观察。GM 可能允许你执行某个特别不显眼的动作而不被注意到，可能需要再进行一次隐匿 检定。若你说话或故意制造响亮噪音，你将变为躲藏而非未被察觉。

若某 生物 使用 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜寻} 且你因此对其变为躲藏，若你想再次对该 生物 变为未被察觉，你必须 潜行。

失败 某种泄露踪迹的声音或其他迹象暴露了你的位置，但你仍未被看见。你在整个 移动 期间都对该 生物 处于躲藏状态，并在结束时仍如此。

大失败 你被发现了！你在整个 移动 期间都被该 生物 观察到，并在结束时仍如此。若你处于隐形且先前对该 生物 处于躲藏，则你不会变为被观察，而是改为在整个 移动 期间都处于躲藏，并在结束时仍如此。

You can attempt to move to another place while becoming or staying @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected}. Stride up to half your Speed. (You can use Sneak while Burrowing, Climbing, Flying, or Swimming instead of Striding if you have the corresponding movement type; you must move at half that Speed.)

If you're undetected by a creature and it's impossible for that creature to observe you (for a typical creature, this includes when you're @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}, the observer is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded}, or you're in darkness and the creature can't see in darkness), for any critical failure you roll on a check to Sneak, you get a failure instead. You also continue to be undetected if you lose cover or greater cover against or are no longer @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} from such a creature.

At the end of your movement, the GM rolls your Stealth check in secret and compares the result to the Perception DC of each creature you were @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} from or undetected by at the start of your movement. If you have cover or greater cover from the creature throughout your Stride, you gain the +2 circumstance bonus from cover (or +4 from greater cover) to your Stealth check. Because you're moving, the bonus increase from @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{Taking Cover} doesn't apply. You don't get to roll against a creature if, at the end of your movement, you neither are concealed from it nor have cover or greater cover against it. You automatically become @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.1wQY3JYyhMYeeV2G]{Observed} by such a creature.

Success You're undetected by the creature during your movement and remain undetected by the creature at the end of it.

You become observed as soon as you do anything other than Hide, Sneak, or Step. If you attempt to Strike a creature, the creature remains @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} against that attack, and you then become observed. If you do anything else, you become observed just before you act unless the GM determines otherwise. The GM might allow you to perform a particularly unobtrusive action without being noticed, possibly requiring another Stealth check. If you speak or make a deliberate loud noise, you become hidden instead of undetected.

If a creature uses @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} and you become hidden to it as a result, you must Sneak if you want to become undetected by that creature again.

Failure A telltale sound or other sign gives your position away, though you still remain unseen. You're hidden from the creature throughout your movement and remain so.

Critical Failure You're spotted! You're observed by the creature throughout your movement and remain so. If you're invisible and were hidden from the creature, instead of being observed you're hidden throughout your movement and remain so.

Mobile.name: 移动端 Mobile
Mobile.description:
当佣兵游荡者执行跨步动作以移动其速度的一半或更少时，该移动不会触发反应动作。

When the Mercenary Rogue takes a Stride action to move half of its Speed or less, that movement does not trigger reactions.

Filth Fever.name: 腐热症 Filth Fever
Filth Fever.description:
由腐热症导致的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{反胃} 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识（特征）} 状态在疾病被治愈之前不会自行改善。

豁免检定 @Check[fortitude|dc:25]

阶段 1 携带者，无不良效果（[[/br 1d4 #Incubation]]{1d4小时}）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{反胃 1}（1天）

阶段 3 反胃 1，并且只要受影响的生物仍处于反胃状态，就会 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}（1天）

阶段 4 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识（特征）}（1天）

阶段 5 死亡

The @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} conditions from filth fever don't improve on their own until the disease is cured.

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:25]

Stage 1 carrier with no ill effect ([[/br 1d4 #Incubation]]{1d4 hours})

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (1 day)

Stage 3 Sickened 1 and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} as long as the affected creature remains sickened (1 day)

Stage 4 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} (1 day)

Stage 5 dead

Infested Shadow.name: 鬼影 Infested Shadow
Infested Shadow.description:
奥塔里淡化消失，短暂地从30尺内另一个生物的幽影中现身，并对该生物触及范围内的单一目标进行一次幽灵之手打击（但不能以他所寄生幽影的生物为目标）。

若打击成功，目标还会获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} 直到奥塔里下一回合开始。随后，奥塔里在其起始位置重新出现。

奥塔里所寄生幽影的生物会暴露于腐热症。

Otari fades away, momentarily emerges from the shadow of another creature within 30 feet, and makes a ghostly hand Strike against a single target within reach of this creature (but not against the creature whose shadow he infests).

On a successful Strike, the target is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the start of Otari's next turn. Otari then reappears at his starting point.

The creature whose shadow Otari infests is exposed to filth fever.

Otari Ilvashti.privateNotes:
此版本的奥塔里·伊瓦什提使用《雇佣兵市场集市》第1卷与《憎恨魔窟》制作。

This version of Otari Ilvashti was created using Mercenary Marketplace Volume 1 and Abomination Vaults.
Otari Ilvashti.blurb:
男性幽灵冒险者
Male ghost adventurer
Otari Ilvashti.prototypeToken: 奥塔里·伊瓦什提 Otari Ilvashti

Vol Rajani.name: 沃尔·拉贾尼 Vol Rajani

Site Bound.name: 束缚之地 Site Bound
Site Bound.description:
典型的幽灵只能离开它被杀害之处或它所出没的地方一小段距离。典型的限制是120英尺。有些幽灵则会被束缚在对它而言特别的一间房间、一栋建筑、一件物品或一个生物上，而非某个地点。

A typical ghost can stray only a short distance from where it was killed or the place it haunts. A typical limit is 120 feet. Some ghosts are instead bound to a room, building, item, or creature that was special to it rather than a location.

Rejuvenation.name: 复生 Rejuvenation
Rejuvenation.description:
纠正导致平民死亡的不公正能让它继续前往来世。

当一个幽灵（特征）被摧毁时，它会在其所束缚的地点内于[[/br 2d4 #days]]{2d4天}后重新成形，并完全痊愈。只有当有人查明其存在的原因，并纠正任何阻止灵魂休息的事物时，幽灵（特征）才能被永久摧毁。

Setting right the injustice that led to the commoner's death allows it to move on to the afterlife.

When a ghost is destroyed, it re-forms after [[/br 2d4 #days]]{2d4 days} within the location it's bound to, fully healed. A ghost can be permanently destroyed only if someone determines the reason for its existence and sets right whatever prevents the spirit from resting.

Dwelling Lore (applies to the place the.name: 居所学识（适用于幽灵（特征）所束缚的地点） Dwelling Lore (applies to the place the ghost is bound to)

Attack of Opportunity.name: 借机攻击 Attack of Opportunity

Sudden Charge.name: 突袭冲锋 Sudden Charge
Sudden Charge.description:
劫掠者以北风般的速度冲入战斗。他们疾行两次，若他们在移动结束时位于至少一名敌人的近战触及范围内，便可对该敌人进行一次近战打击。

The Ravager rushes into battle with the speed of the North wind. They Stride twice, if they end their movement within melee reach of at least one enemy, they can make a melee Strike against that enemy.

Swipe.name: 横扫 Swipe
Swipe.description:
劫掠者进行一次宽阔的弧形挥击。进行一次近战打击，并将该次攻击掷骰结果与至多两个敌人的AC进行比较；每个敌人都必须在其近战触及范围内，且彼此相邻。只掷一次伤害，并将其应用于每个被命中的生物。挥扫在决定劫掠者的多重攻击减值时计作两次攻击。如果他们正在使用具有横扫特征的武器，其调整值适用于所有挥扫攻击。

The Ravager makes a wide, arcing swing. Make a single melee Strike and compare the attack roll result to the ACs of up to two foes, each of whom must be within its melee reach and adjacent to the other. Roll damage only once and apply it to each creature hit. A Swipe counts as two attacks for determining the Ravager's multiple attack penalty. If they're using a weapon with the sweep trait, its modifier applies to all Swipe attacks.

Protective: Take Blow.name: 防护：承受打击 Protective: Take Blow
Protective: Take Blow.description:
触发 一个与该生物相邻的盟友被一次打击命中，或该盟友在对抗一个不会同时影响该生物的效果的豁免中失败。

该生物替其盟友承受打击。命中或豁免失败的所有效果改为施加在该生物身上，而非盟友身上。如果目标在豁免中大成功或大失败，或该次打击为大成功或大失败，则该生物如常承受大成功或大失败/大成功或大失败的效果。该生物的免疫、弱点与抗力如常适用于该次伤害。 

Trigger an ally adjacent to this creature is hit by a Strike, or the ally fails a saving throw against an effect that doesn't also effect this creature.

This creature takes the blow in place of their ally. All the effects of the hit or failed save are applied to this creature instead of the ally. If the target critically failed the save, or the strike was a critical hit, the creature takes the effects of a critical failure/critical hit as normal. This creature's immunities, weakness and resistances apply normally for this damage.

Blind-Fight.name: 盲斗 Blind-Fight
Blind-Fight.description:
你的战斗洞察使你更能察觉被隐蔽与隐形的对手。你不需要成功通过纯骰检定即可将 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} 生物作为目标。

对于那些对你处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} 的生物，你不会处于@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} （除非你因藏匿（状态）以外的原因而对它们处于措手不及），且你只需成功通过一次 DC 5 的纯骰检定即可将藏匿的生物作为目标。

当你与一个等级等于或低于你的 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected} 生物相邻时，它改为仅对你处于藏匿。

Your battle insights make you more aware of concealed and invisible opponents. You don't need to succeed at a flat check to target @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} creatures.

You're not @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} to creatures that are @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} from you (unless you're off-guard to them for reasons other than the hidden condition), and you need only a successful DC 5 flat check to target a hidden creature.

While you're adjacent to an @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected} creature of your level or lower, it is instead only hidden from you.

Resounding Bravery.name: 回响的英勇 Resounding Bravery
Resounding Bravery.description:
当佣兵战士在对抗恐惧术效果的意志豁免中掷出成功时，它改为获得大成功。此外，任何时候它获得惊惧（状态）时，将其数值降低 1。

每当佣兵战士在对抗敌人的能力的意志豁免中大成功时，它在 1 分钟内获得对豁免的 +1 状态加值，以及等同于其等级一半数量的临时生命值。若它在对抗恐惧术效果时大成功，这些增益翻倍。 

@Compendium[pf2e.feat-effects.NMmsJyeMTawpgLVR]{效果：回响英勇}
@Compendium[pf2e.feat-effects.Cumdy84uIkUHG9zF]{效果：回响英勇（对抗恐惧术）}

When the Mercenary Fighter rolls a success at a Will save against a fear effect, they get a critical success instead. In addition, anytime they gain the frightened condition, reduce its value by 1.

Whenever the Mercenary Fighter critically succeeds at a Will save against a foe's ability, it gains a +1 status bonus to saves and a number of temporary Hit Points equal to half its level for 1 minutes. These benefits are doubled if it critically succeeds against a fear effect. 

@Compendium[pf2e.feat-effects.NMmsJyeMTawpgLVR]{Effect: Resounding Bravery}
@Compendium[pf2e.feat-effects.Cumdy84uIkUHG9zF]{Effect: Resounding Bravery (vs. Fear)}

Shield Warden.name: 护盾术守卫 Shield Warden
Shield Warden.description:
当队长举起他们的护盾术时，他们可以在对相邻盟友进行攻击时使用@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.m4HQ2o5aPxjXf2kY]{盾牌格挡}。若他们这样做，护盾术会防止该盟友承受伤害，而非队长。

When the captain has their shield raised, they can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.m4HQ2o5aPxjXf2kY]{Shield Block} when an attack is made against an adjacent ally. If they do, the shield prevents that ally from taking damage instead of the captain.

Bon Mot.name: 妙语连珠 Bon Mot
Bon Mot.description:
沃尔向一名敌人抛出一句犀利的俏皮话，使其分心。她选择30尺内的一名敌人，并对抗该目标的意志DC进行一次交涉检定。

大成功 目标分心，在1分钟内其察觉与意志豁免承受-3状态减值。

效果：妙语连珠（大成功）

目标可以用对她妙语连珠的回击来提前结束该效果。这可以是一个带有专注（特征）的单动作，或一个用于组织其回击的适当技能动作。由GM决定哪些技能动作符合条件，但它们至少必须花费1个动作。通常，回击需要使用一个语言的、以魅力为基础的技能动作。

成功 同大成功，但减值为-2。

效果：妙语连珠

大失败 沃尔的俏皮话糟糕透顶。你承受与敌人在你成功时会承受的相同减值。该效果在1分钟后结束，或当你再次施放妙语连珠并成功时结束。

Vol launches an insightful quip at a foe, distracting them. She chooses a foe within 30 feet and roll a Diplomacy check against the target's Will DC.

Critical Success The target is distracted and takes a -3 status penalty to Perception and Will saves for 1 minute.

Effect: Bon Mot (Critical Success)

The target can end the effect early with a retort to her Bon Mot. This can either be a single action that has the concentrate trait or an appropriate skill action to frame their retort. The GM determines which skill actions qualify, though they must take at least 1 action. Typically, the retort needs to use a linguistic Charisma-based skill action.

Success As critical success, but the penalty is -2.

Effect: Bon Mot

Critical Failure Vol's quip is atrocious. You take the same penalty an enemy would take had you succeeded. This ends after 1 minute or if you issue another Bon Mot and succeed.

Vol Rajani.privateNotes:
此版本的沃尔·拉贾尼是在《Mercenary Marketplace Volume 1》、《Gamemastery guide》中的 NPC 图库以及《Pathfinder Bestiary》的帮助下制作的。

This version of Vol Rajani was created with the help of Mercenary Marketplace Volume 1, the NPC Gallery from the Gamemastery guide, and the Pathfinder Bestiary.
Vol Rajani.blurb:
女性幽灵（特征）冒险者
Female ghost adventurer

Zarmavdian.name: 扎马夫迪安 Zarmavdian

Site Bound.name: 束缚之地 Site Bound
Site Bound.description:
典型的幽灵只能离开其被杀之处或其盘踞之地一小段距离。一个典型的限制是120尺。有些幽灵则不是被束缚在某个地点，而是被束缚在对其意义特殊的一个房间、建筑、物品或生物上。

A typical ghost can stray only a short distance from where it was killed or the place it haunts. A typical limit is 120 feet. Some ghosts are instead bound to a room, building, item, or creature that was special to it rather than a location.

Rejuvenation.name: 复生 Rejuvenation
Rejuvenation.description:
纠正导致这名平民死亡的不公正，会让它得以前往来世。

当一个幽灵（特征）被摧毁时，它会在其所束缚的位置内，于[[/br 2d4 #days]]{2d4天}后重新成形，并完全恢复。只有当有人查明其存在的原因，并纠正任何阻止灵魂休息的事物时，幽灵（特征）才能被永久摧毁。

Setting right the injustice that led to the commoner's death allows it to move on to the afterlife.

When a ghost is destroyed, it re-forms after [[/br 2d4 #days]]{2d4 days} within the location it's bound to, fully healed. A ghost can be permanently destroyed only if someone determines the reason for its existence and sets right whatever prevents the spirit from resting.

Dwelling Lore (applies to the place the.name: 居所学识（适用于幽灵（特征）被束缚的地点） Dwelling Lore (applies to the place the ghost is bound to)

Occult Spontaneous Spells.name: 异能自发法术 Occult Spontaneous Spells

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你释放出一道脉冲，用以记录魔法的存在。你获得的信息仅限于魔法是否存在。你可以选择忽略你已完全知晓的魔法，例如你与你盟友的魔法物品与持续中的法术。你仅在幻术魔法的效果阶位低于你的侦测魔法法术阶位时，才能侦测到该幻术魔法。然而，具有幻术灵光但外观并不具欺骗性的物品（例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{隐形术药水}）通常仍会被正常侦测到。

升阶（3环）你得知该法术所侦测到的最强魔法效果的阶位或等级，由GM决定。

升阶（4环）同3环，但你还会锁定最高阶魔法的来源。如同模糊感官一样，你不会得知确切位置，但可以将来源缩小到一个5尺立方体范围内（若来源大于该范围，则为最近的一个）。

You send out a pulse that registers the presence of magic. You receive no information beyond the presence or absence of magic. You can choose to ignore magic you're fully aware of, such as the magic items and ongoing spells of you and your allies. You detect illusion magic only if that magic's effect has a lower rank than the rank of your detect magic spell. However, items that have an illusion aura but aren't deceptive in appearance (such as an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{Invisibility Potion}) typically are detected normally.

Heightened (3rd) You learn the rank or level of the most powerful magical effect the spell detects, as determined by the GM.

Heightened (4th) As 3rd rank, but you also pinpoint the source of the highest-rank magic. Like for an imprecise sense, you don't learn the exact location, but can narrow down the source to within a 5-foot cube (or the nearest if larger than that).

Electric Arc.name: 电 弧击 Electric Arc
Electric Arc.description:
一道闪电弧从一个目标跳跃到另一个目标。每个目标受到2d4点电击伤害，并进行一次基础反射豁免。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加1d4。

An arc of lightning leaps from one target to another. Each target takes 2d4 electricity damage with a basic Reflex save.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Prestidigitation.name: 魔法伎俩 Prestidigitation
Prestidigitation.description:
最简单的魔法会听从你的吩咐。只要你维持该法术，你就能施展简单的魔法效果。每次你维持该法术时，你可以从四个选项中选择一个。

  • 烹调 使 1 磅的非生物材料变凉、变温热或调味。
  • 举起 缓慢地 将一个无人看管、负载为轻或更低的物体抬离地面 1 英尺。
  • 制造 创造一个临时物体，其负载可忽略不计，由凝结的魔法物质制成。该物体外观粗糙且人工痕迹明显，并且极其脆弱——它不能用作工具、武器或法器，也不能作为法术的材料或代价。
  • 整理 为一个负载为轻或更低的物体上色、清洁或弄脏。你可以用 10 轮的专注影响一个负载为 1 的物体，而影响更大的物体则需要每负载 1 分钟。

魔法伎俩不能造成伤害或导致不利状态。对物体的任何实际改变（除上述所注明者外）仅在你维持该法术期间持续。

The simplest magic does your bidding. You can perform simple magical effects for as long as you Sustain the spell. Each time you Sustain the spell, you can choose one of four options.

  • Cook Cool, warm, or flavor 1 pound of nonliving material.
  • Lift Slowly lift an unattended object of light Bulk or less 1 foot off the ground.
  • Make Create a temporary object of negligible Bulk, made of congealed magical substance. The object looks crude and artificial and is extremely fragile-it can't be used as a tool, weapon, or locus or cost for a spell.
  • Tidy Color, clean, or soil an object of light Bulk or less. You can affect an object of 1 Bulk with 10 rounds of concentration, and a larger object a 1 minute per Bulk.

Prestidigitation can't deal damage or cause adverse conditions. Any actual change to an object (beyond what is noted above) persists only as long as you Sustain the spell.

Shield.name: 护盾术 Shield
Shield.description:
你升起一道由力场构成的魔法护盾。此举视为使用“举起护盾”动作，使你在直到你下个回合开始前获得 AC +1 环境加值，但不需要空出手来使用。

当该法术处于效果中时，你可以用你的魔法护盾使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{盾牌格挡} 反应动作（）。该护盾的 硬度 为 5。你可以用该法术的反应动作（）来减少来自任何法术或魔法效果的伤害，即使其不造成物理伤害也可以。在你使用盾牌格挡后，该法术结束，且你在 10 分钟内无法再次施放它。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{法术效果：护盾}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.QF6RDlCoTvkVHRo4]{效果：护盾 免疫}

升阶（+2） 该护盾的 硬度 增加 5。

You raise a magical shield of force. This counts as using the Raise a Shield action, giving you a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn, but it doesn't require a hand to use.

While the spell is in effect, you can use the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{Shield Block} reaction with your magic shield. The shield has Hardness 5. You can use the spell's reaction to reduce damage from any spell or magical effect, even if it doesn't deal physical damage. After you use Shield Block, the spell ends and you can't cast it again for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{Spell Effect: Shield}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.QF6RDlCoTvkVHRo4]{Effect: Shield Immunity}

Heightened (+2) The shield's Hardness increases by 5.

Telekinetic Hand.name: 念动力之手 Telekinetic Hand
Telekinetic Hand.description:
你创造出一只漂浮的魔法手，既可以是隐形的也可以是幽灵般的，它抓住目标物体并将其缓慢地向任意方向浮空至多20英尺。当你维持法术时，你可以额外移动该物体20英尺。若法术结束时该物体仍在空中，该物体会坠落。

升阶（3环）你可以以负载为1或更少的无人看管物体为目标。

升阶（5环）射程增加至60英尺，并且你可以以负载为1或更少的无人看管物体为目标。

升阶（7环）射程增加至60英尺，并且你可以以负载为2或更少的无人看管物体为目标。

You create a floating, magical hand, either invisible or ghostlike, that grasps the target object and levitates it slowly up to 20 feet in any direction. When you Sustain the spell, you can move the object an additional 20 feet. If the object is in the air when the spell ends, the object falls.

Heightened (3rd) You can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 1 or less.

Heightened (5th) The range increases to 60 feet, and you can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 1 or less.

Heightened (7th) The range increases to 60 feet, and you can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 2 or less.

Mystic Armor.name: 秘法护甲 Mystic Armor
Mystic Armor.description:
你用闪烁的魔法能量守护自己，获得 AC +1 物品加值，并将最大敏捷调整值设为 +5。当你穿着秘法护甲时，你使用你的无甲熟练度来计算你的 AC。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.qkwb5DD3zmKwvbk0]{法术效果：秘法护甲}

升阶（4环） 你获得豁免检定 +1 物品加值。

升阶（6环） AC 的物品加值提高至 +2，并且你获得豁免检定 +1 物品加值。

升阶（8环） AC 的物品加值提高至 +2，并且你获得豁免检定 +2 物品加值。

升阶（10环） AC 的物品加值提高至 +3，并且你获得豁免检定 +3 物品加值。

You ward yourself with shimmering magical energy, gaining a +1 item bonus to AC and a maximum Dexterity modifier of +5. While wearing mystic armor, you use your unarmored proficiency to calculate your AC.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.qkwb5DD3zmKwvbk0]{Spell Effect: Mystic Armor}

Heightened (4th) You gain a +1 item bonus to saving throws.

Heightened (6th) The item bonus to AC increases to +2, and you gain a +1 item bonus to saving throws.

Heightened (8th) The item bonus to AC increases to +2, and you gain a +2 item bonus to saving throws.

Heightened (10th) The item bonus to AC increases to +3, and you gain a +3 item bonus to saving throws.

Dizzying Colors.name: 目眩炫彩 Dizzying Colors
Dizzying Colors.description:
你释放出一片旋涡般的万千色彩，依据生物的意志豁免使其目眩神迷。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 1 轮。

失败 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1}，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲} 1 轮，并目眩 1 分钟。

大失败 该生物陷入震慑 1 轮并目盲 1 分钟。

You unleash a swirling multitude of colors that overwhelms creatures based on their Will saves.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round, and dazzled for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The creature is stunned for 1 round and blinded for 1 minute.

Force Barrage.name: 力场弹幕 Force Barrage
Force Barrage.description:
你向一名你能看见的生物发射一枚凝固的魔法碎片。它自动命中并造成 1d4+1 点力场伤害。施放法术时你每额外使用 1 个动作，发射的碎片数量便增加 1 枚，最多在使用 3 个动作时发射 3 枚碎片。你分别为每枚碎片选择其目标。若你将多枚碎片射向同一目标，在应用伤害加值或减值、抗力、弱点等之前，先将伤害合并。

升阶（+2） 你每花费 1 个动作，便额外发射 1 枚碎片。

You fire a shard of solidified magic toward a creature that you can see. It automatically hits and deals 1d4+1 force damage. For each additional action you use when Casting the Spell, increase the number of shards you shoot by one, to a maximum of three shards for 3 actions. You choose the target for each shard individually. If you shoot more than one shard at the same target, combine the damage before applying bonuses or penalties to damage, resistances, weaknesses, and so forth.

Heightened (+2) You fire one additional shard with each action you spend.

Dispel Magic.name: 解除魔法 Dispel Magic
Dispel Magic.description:
你解开某个法术或效果背后的魔法。对目标尝试一次反制检定。若你成功反制一件魔法物品，该物品在10分钟内变为其类型的普通物品。这不会改变该物品的非魔法属性。若目标是一件神器或类似的物品，你自动失败。

You unravel the magic behind a spell or effect. Attempt a counteract check against the target. If you successfully counteract a magic item, the item becomes a mundane item of its type for 10 minutes. This doesn't change the item's non-magical properties. If the target is an artifact or similar item, you automatically fail.

Revealing Light.name: 显现之光 Revealing Light
Revealing Light.description:
一波魔法光芒掠过该区域。你可以选择光芒的外观，例如彩色、无热的火焰或闪烁的光点。受到揭示之光影响的生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}。如果该生物曾处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}，则改为变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}。如果该生物因任何其他原因已经处于隐蔽，则不再隐蔽。

大成功或大失败 成功 目标不受影响。

成功 光芒影响该生物，持续2轮。

失败 光芒影响该生物，持续1分钟。

大成功或大失败 失败 光芒影响该生物，持续10分钟。

A wave of magical light washes over the area. You choose the appearance of the light, such as colorful, heatless flames or sparkling motes. A creature affected by revealing light is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled}. If the creature was @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} instead. If the creature was already concealed for any other reason, it is no longer concealed.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The light affects the creature for 2 rounds.

Failure The light affects the creature for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The light affects the creature for 10 minutes.

Web.name: 蛛网术 Web
Web.description:
你在区域内创造出一片黏稠的蛛网术，每当生物试图穿过时都会阻碍其移动。充满蛛网术的方格为困难地形。每个方格都可以通过一次造成至少5点挥砍伤害或1点火焰伤害的单次攻击或效果清除蛛网术。一个方格的AC为5，并且其豁免会自动失败。

每当一名处于蛛网术中的生物开始使用一个移动动作，或在一个移动动作中进入蛛网术时，它必须尝试一次对抗你的法术DC的运动检定或反射豁免，以避免其速度受到环境减值或变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{禁足（状态）}。从蛛网术中脱离的生物不再承受来自蛛网术对其速度的环境减值。

大成功或大失败 成功该生物不受影响，并且本回合无需再对蛛网术尝试进一步的运动检定或豁免。若其使用的是运动检定，则在离开一个方格后，会清除其离开的每个方格中的蛛网术。

成功该生物在其动作期间不受影响。若其使用的是运动检定，则在离开一个方格后，会清除其离开的每个方格中的蛛网术。

失败该生物的速度受到-10尺环境减值，持续至其下个回合开始。

大成功或大失败 失败该生物禁足（状态），持续至其下个回合开始；在此之后，其速度受到-10尺环境减值，持续1轮。它可以尝试逃脱以移除其禁足（状态）。

升阶（4环）该法术的区域增至20尺爆发，其射程增至60尺。

You create a sticky web in the area that impedes creatures' movement each time they try to move through it. Squares filled with the web are difficult terrain. Each square can be cleared of the web by a single attack or effect that deals at least 5 slashing damage or 1 fire damage. A square has AC 5, and it automatically fails its saving throws.

Each time a creature in the web begins to use a move action or enters the web during a move action, it must attempt an Athletics check or Reflex save against your spell DC to avoid taking a circumstance penalty to its Speeds or becoming @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}. A creature that gets out of the web ceases to take a circumstance penalty to its Speed from the web.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected, and it doesn't need to attempt further Athletics checks or saving throws against the web this turn. If it used an Athletics check, it clears the web from every square it leaves after leaving the square.

Success The creature is unaffected during its action. If it used an Athletics check, it clears the web from every square it leaves after leaving the square.

Failure The creature takes a -10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds until the start of its next turn.

Critical Failure The creature is Immobilized until the start of its next turn, after which it takes a -10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds for 1 round. It can attempt to Escape to remove its Immobilized condition.

Heightened (4th) The spell's area increases to a 20-foot burst, and its range increases to 60 feet.

Haste.name: 加速术 Haste
Haste.description:
魔法赋予目标更快行动的能力。它获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{迅捷（状态）}状态，并且每轮只能将该额外动作用于打击与疾行动作。

升阶（7环） 你可以指定至多6个生物作为目标。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ElkXovNrHB0Doi6O]{法术效果：加速术}

Magic empowers the target to act faster. It gains the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} condition and can use the extra action each round only for Strike and Stride actions.

Heightened (7th) You can target up to 6 creatures.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ElkXovNrHB0Doi6O]{Spell Effect: Haste}

Paralyze.name: 麻痹术 Paralyze
Paralyze.description:
你阻断了目标的运动冲动，使其无法从大脑传出，威胁要将目标冻结在原地。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功或大失败成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标受到 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

失败 目标 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹} 1轮。

大成功或大失败失败 目标麻痹4轮。在其每个回合结束时，它可以尝试一次新的意志豁免，将剩余持续时间减少1轮；或在大成功或大失败成功时完全结束该效果。

升阶（7环） 你最多可以以10个生物为目标。

You block the target's motor impulses before they can leave its mind, threatening to freeze the target in place. The target must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The target is Paralyzed for 4 rounds. At the end of each of its turns, it can attempt a new Will save to reduce the remaining duration by 1 round, or end it entirely on a critical success.

Heightened (7th) You can target up to 10 creatures.

Lightning Bolt.name: 闪电束 Lightning Bolt
Lightning Bolt.description:
一道闪电从你的手中向外击出，造成4d12电击伤害。

升阶（+1） 伤害提高1d12。

A bolt of lightning strikes outward from your hand, dealing 4d12 electricity damage.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d12.

Clairvoyance.name: 鹰眼术 Clairvoyance
Clairvoyance.description:
你在射程内的一个位置创造一只@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}的漂浮之眼（即使该位置在你的视觉线或效果线之外）。这只眼睛无法移动，但你可以如同使用你正常的视觉感官一样，从该点向所有方向观察。

You create an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} floating eye at a location within range (even if it's outside your line of sight or line of effect). The eye can't move, but you can see in all directions from that point as if using your normal visual senses.

False Vitality.name: 虚假活力 False Vitality
False Vitality.description:
你用通常用于操控不死生物的能量来强化你的血肉。你获得10点临时生命值。

升阶（+1） 临时生命值增加3点。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.PANUWN5xXC20WBg2]{法术效果：虚假活力}

You augment your flesh with the energies typically used to manipulate the undead. You gain 10 temporary Hit Points.

Heightened (+1) The temporary Hit Points increase by 3.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.PANUWN5xXC20WBg2]{Spell Effect: False Vitality}

Resilient Sphere.name: 弹力法球 Resilient Sphere
Resilient Sphere.description:
你创造一个固定不动的力场球体，用以困住或保护目标，阻挡任何试图穿过球体的事物。球体的AC为5，硬度10，并具有40点生命值。它免疫大成功或大失败与精准伤害。解离术会立即摧毁球体。若目标不愿意，球体的效果取决于目标的反射豁免。

Critical Success 目标扰乱球体的完整性，使其彻底崩塌。

Success 球体正常运作，但生命值只有10点而非40点。

Failure 球体产生其正常效果。

You create an immobile sphere of force to either trap or protect the target, blocking anything that would pass through the sphere. The sphere has AC 5, Hardness 10, and 40 Hit Points. It's immune to critical hits and precision damage. Disintegrate destroys the sphere instantly. If the target is unwilling, the effects of the sphere depend on the target's Reflex save.

Critical Success The target disrupts the sphere's integrity, causing it to collapse entirely.

Success The sphere functions normally but has only 10 Hit Points instead of 40.

Failure The sphere has its normal effect.

Drop Dead.name: 猝死 Drop Dead
Drop Dead.description:
触发 射程内的一个生物被敌人的一次攻击命中。

目标看起来倒下死亡，但实际上它变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}。它的幻象尸体留在倒下之处，并带有逼真的致命伤口。这种幻象在外观与触感上都如同一具尸体。若目标的“死亡”显得荒谬——例如，一名满生命值的野蛮人看起来被造成2点伤害就杀死——GM可以给予攻击者一次立即的察觉检定以识破该幻象。若目标使用敌对动作，该法术结束。这会结束整个法术，因此幻象尸体也会一并消失。

升阶（7环） 若目标使用敌对动作，该法术不会结束。

Trigger A creature within range is hit by an attack from an enemy.

The target appears to fall down dead, though it actually turns @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}. Its illusory corpse remains where it fell, complete with a believable fatal wound. This illusion looks and feels like a dead body. If the target's death seems absurd-for instance, a barbarian at full health appears to be slain by 2 damage-the GM can grant the attacker an immediate Perception check to disbelieve the illusion. If the target uses hostile actions, the spell ends. This ends the entire spell, so the illusory corpse disappears too.

Heightened (7th) The spell doesn't end if the target uses hostile actions.

Primal Innate Spells.name: 原始天赋法术 Primal Innate Spells

Vitality Lash.name: 活力鞭笞 Vitality Lash
Vitality Lash.description:
你用来自创世熔炉的能量摧毁目标被腐化的本质。你造成2d6活力伤害，目标进行一次基础强韧豁免。如果该生物在豁免中大失败，则它还会获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} 状态，持续到你下个回合开始。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加1d6。

You demolish the target's corrupted essence with energy from Creation's Forge. You deal 2d6 vitality damage with a basic Fortitude save. If the creature critically fails the save, it is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} until the start of your next turn.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Gnome, Fey-Touched.name: 侏儒，妖精之触 Gnome, Fey-Touched
Gnome, Fey-Touched.description:
这名侏儒具有特别强大的妖精传承。它从原初法术列表中获得一个戏法。它可以随意将该法术作为原初先天法术施放。戏法会被升阶至等同于其等级一半（向上取整）的法术等级。它每天一次可以通过冥想使自身与第一世界重新对齐，从同一列表中将该戏法更换为另一个；这是一个持续10分钟的行动，且具有专注（特征）。

除非该生物以其他方式受训于原初根源，否则此施法条目的DC应为 [[10+max(2,ceil(1.5*floor(@actor.level/3)))+(@actor.level)+(@actor.system.abilities.cha.mod)]]，且施法攻击调整值应为 [[2+max(2,ceil(1.5*floor(@actor.level/3)))+(@actor.level)+(@actor.system.abilities.cha.mod)]]

运行以下宏以自动设置施法条目并选择戏法。@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-macros.Macro.g5wjnIPgSqByo7Kq]{Primal Ancestral Cantrips}

This gnome has a particularly strong fey heritage. It gains one cantrip from the primal spell list. It can cast this spell as a primal innate spell at will. A cantrip is heightened to a spell level equal to half its level rounded up. It can change this cantrip to a different one from the same list once per day by meditating to realign itself with the First World; this is a 10-minute activity that has the concentrate trait.

Unless this creature is otherwise trained in the Primal tradition, the DC for this spellcasting entry should be [[10+max(2,ceil(1.5*floor(@actor.level/3)))+(@actor.level)+(@actor.system.abilities.cha.mod)]] and the spellcasting attack modifier should be [[2+max(2,ceil(1.5*floor(@actor.level/3)))+(@actor.level)+(@actor.system.abilities.cha.mod)]]

Run the following macro to automatically set up the spellcasting entry and select the cantrip. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-macros.Macro.g5wjnIPgSqByo7Kq]{Primal Ancestral Cantrips}

Eldritch Researcher Defense.name: 骇物研究者防御 Eldritch Researcher Defense
Eldritch Researcher Defense.description:
你对奇异生物及其怪异解剖结构的知识使你能够预判它们的物理攻击，并减少你因此受到的伤害。你获得针对异怪与泥怪以近战攻击造成的物理伤害的抗力。此抗力等于你等级的三分之一（3）。

Your knowledge of strange creatures and their bizarre anatomy allows you to anticipate their physical attacks and reduce the damage you take from them. You gain resistance to physical damage from melee attacks made by aberrations and oozes. This resistance is equal to one-third your level (3).

Zarmavdian.privateNotes:
此版本的扎马夫迪安使用《雇佣兵集市》第一卷与《探路者怪物图鉴》制作。

This version of Zarmavdian was created using Mercenary Marketplace Volume 1 and the Pathfinder Bestiary.
Zarmavdian.blurb:
男性幽灵冒险者
Male ghost adventurer

Falxi Orshendiel.name: 法尔西·奥申迪尔 Falxi Orshendiel
Falxi Orshendiel.tokenName: 法尔西·奥申迪尔 Falxi Orshendiel

Divine Innate Spells.name: 神圣先天法术 Divine Innate Spells

Darkness (At Will).name: 黑暗术（随意） Darkness (At Will)
Darkness (At Will).description:
你创造一层黑暗帷幕，阻止光线在该区域内穿透或向外发散。光线不会进入该区域，且任何非魔法光源（如火把或提灯）在区域内都不会发出任何光，即使其光照半径原本会延伸到黑暗之外。此效果也会压制你该黑暗术的等级或更低等级的魔法光源。光线无法穿过，因此在该区域内的生物无法看见外面。从外部看去，它呈现为一个纯粹黑暗的球体。

强化（4环） 即使具有黑暗视觉（但不包括高等黑暗视觉）的生物也只能勉强透过黑暗看见。他们将透过黑暗看到的目标视为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}。

You create a shroud of darkness that prevents light from penetrating or emanating within the area. Light does not enter the area and any non-magical light sources, such as a torch or lantern, do not emanate any light while inside the area, even if their light radius would extend beyond the darkness. This also suppresses magical light of your darkness spell's level or lower. Light can't pass through, so creatures in the area can't see outside. From outside, it appears as a globe of pure darkness.

Heightened (4th) Even creatures with darkvision (but not greater darkvision) can barely see through the darkness. They treat targets seen through the darkness as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}.

Faerie Fire (At Will).name: 妖火术（随意） Faerie Fire (At Will)
Faerie Fire (At Will).description:
你施放该法术时处于区域内的所有生物，在持续时间内都会被你选择颜色的绚丽、无热的火焰勾勒轮廓。受妖火术影响时，可见生物不能处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}。如果这些生物处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}，则在受妖火术影响期间它们处于Concealed，而不是@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected}。

All creatures in the area when you cast the spell are limned in colorful, heatless fire of a color of your choice for the duration. Visible creatures can't be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} while affected by faerie fire. If the creatures are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}, they are Concealed while affected by faerie fire, rather than being @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected}.

Dancing Lights.name: 舞光术 Dancing Lights
Dancing Lights.description:
你创造至多四个漂浮的光亮术，彼此间距不超过10尺。每个如同火把般照明。当你维持该法术时，你可以将任意数量的光亮术移动至多60尺。每个光亮术必须保持在你120尺内，并且与所有其他光亮术保持在10尺内，否则它会熄灭。

You create up to four floating lights, no two of which are more than 10 feet apart. Each sheds light like a torch. When you Sustain the Spell, you can move any number of lights up to 60 feet. Each light must remain within 120 feet of you and within 10 feet of all others, or it winks out.

Arrows.name: 箭矢 Arrows
Arrows.description:
这些投射物是弓的弹药。箭杆由木头制成。它在飞行时由一端的箭羽稳定，另一端装有金属箭头。

These projectiles are the ammunition for bows. The shaft of an arrow is made of wood. It is stabilized in flight by fletching at one end and bears a metal head on the other.

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 对抗魔法时所有豁免获得+1状态加值 +1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic

+2 Status to All Saves vs. Mental.name: 对所有对抗精神效果的豁免获得+2状态加值 +2 Status to All Saves vs. Mental

Deft Evasion.name: 灵巧反射 Deft Evasion
Deft Evasion.description:
当猎人在反射豁免中掷骰获得成功时，改为获得大成功。

When the hunter rolls a success on a Reflex save, they get a critical success instead.

Hunter's Wound.name: 猎手之伤 Hunter's Wound
Hunter's Wound.description:
频率 每轮一次

先决条件 猎人正持用一把装填为0的远程武器

效果 猎人对其猎物进行两次远程打击。若两次攻击均命中并造成伤害，则目标额外承受 @Localize[PF2E.PersistentDamage.Bleed1d8.success]。

Frequency once per round

Prerequisites The hunter is wielding a ranged weapon with a reload of 0

Effect The hunter makes two ranged Strikes against their prey. If both hit and deal damage, the target takes an additional @Localize[PF2E.PersistentDamage.Bleed1d8.success].

Skirmish Strike.name: 快速战斗 Skirmish Strike
Skirmish Strike.description:
猎人可以先迈步然后打击，或先打击然后迈步。

The hunter can Step and then Strike, or Strike and then Step.

Studded Leather Armor.name: 镶嵌皮甲 Studded Leather Armor
Studded Leather Armor.description:
这件皮制护甲用金属铆钉加固，有时还会加上小块金属板，在提供与皮制护甲几乎同等灵活性的同时，提供更坚固的防护。

This leather armor is reinforced with metal studs and sometimes small metal plates, providing most of the flexibility of leather armor with more robust protection.

Hunt Prey.name: 猎杀目标 Hunt Prey
Hunt Prey.description:
赏金猎人指定一个他们能看见并听见的生物，或一个他们正在追踪的生物，作为他们的猎物。赏金猎人获得+2环境加值用于察觉检定以@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜寻}该猎物，以及用于生存检定以@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{Track}该猎物。此效果持续至赏金猎人再次使用猎杀目标为止。

The bounty hunter designates a single creature they can see and hear, or one they're Tracking, as their prey. The bounty hunter gains a +2 circumstance bonus to Perception checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} the prey and to Survival checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{Track} the prey. This effect lasts until the bounty hunter uses Hunt Prey again.

Falxi Orshendiel.publicNotes:
他解释说自己来自更深处地下一个名为伊尔达里斯的小型卓尔聚居地，但他不愿向陌生人透露太多关于伊尔达里斯的细节。他只说这座城市欢迎商人，如果英雄们来到该区域，应该以和平方式前往拜访。法尔西·奥申迪尔和另外两名卓尔当时在比平常更远的地方侦察，透肌魔人袭击了他们；他被打昏，不知怎的就到了这里。

如果英雄们放他离开，他最终会返回伊尔达里斯，并可能在区域 I06 与英雄们相遇。英雄们与法尔西的遭遇应当暗示伊尔达里斯是一个可以安全拜访的地方，并为与生活在较低等级的卓尔进行一场和平遭遇奠定阶段。

猎手们搜寻猎物，以维持卓尔社群的供给与运作。

由于在其主要聚居地崇拜恶魔，卓尔有着邪恶的名声。然而，如同任何族裔的成员一样，卓尔也可能拥有任何阵营，尤其是在脱离恶魔领主阴险影响时。

He explains that he hails from a small drow settlement deeper underground called Yldaris, but he’s unwilling to give much detail about Yldaris to strangers. He says only that the city welcomes traders and that the heroes should visit, peacefully, if they come to the area. Falxi and two other drow were scouting farther from their settlement than usual when urdefhans attacked them; he was knocked unconscious and somehow ended up here.

If the heroes let him go, he eventually returns to Yldaris and might meet the heroes in area I06. The heroes’ encounter with Falxi should suggest that Yldaris is a safe place to visit, and set the stage for a peaceful encounter with drow living in the lower levels.

Hunters seek out game to keep drow communities fed and functioning.

Drow have a reputation for evil due to demon worship in their major settlements. However, like members of any ancestry, drow can have any alignment, especially when removed from the demon lords' sinister influence.
Falxi Orshendiel.blurb:
家规猎人版本
Homebrew Hunter Version
Falxi Orshendiel.allSaves: +1 status to all saves vs. magic, +2 status to all saves vs. mental
Falxi Orshendiel.prototypeToken: 法尔西·奥申迪尔 Falxi Orshendiel

Horned Dragon (Adult).name: 有角巨龙（成年） Horned Dragon (Adult)
Horned Dragon (Adult).tokenName: 有角巨龙（成年） Horned Dragon (Adult)

Primal Innate Spells.name: 原始先天法术 Primal Innate Spells

Suggestion.name: 暗示术 Suggestion
Suggestion.description:
你甜言蜜语，令生物难以抗拒。你向目标施加暗示术，提出一条行动方案；该方案必须以对目标而言似乎合乎逻辑的方式措辞，且不能是自我毁灭的，或明显违背目标自身利益。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功或大失败 目标不受影响，并且知道你试图控制它。

成功 目标不受影响。

失败 目标立即遵从你的暗示。该法术的持续时间为 1 分钟，或直到目标完成一个有限的暗示内容，或该暗示变得自我毁灭，或产生其他明显的负面效果为止。

大成功或大失败 同失败，但基础持续时间为 1 小时。

强化（8环） 你最多可以以 10 个生物为目标。

Your honeyed words are difficult for creatures to resist. You suggest a course of action to the target, which must be phrased in such a way as to seem like a logical course of action to the target and can't be self-destructive or obviously against the target's self-interest. The target must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected and knows you tried to control it.

Success The target is unaffected.

Failure The target immediately follows your suggestion. The spell has a duration of 1 minute, or until the target has completed a finite suggestion or the suggestion becomes self-destructive or has other obvious negative effects.

Critical Failure As failure, but the base duration is 1 hour.

Heightened (8th) You can target up to 10 creatures.

Entangling Flora.name: 纠缠植物群 Entangling Flora
Entangling Flora.description:
植物与真菌爆发般涌出或迅速生长，缠住生物。区域内的所有表面都是困难地形。每一轮当生物在该区域内开始其回合时，它必须尝试一次反射豁免。若失败，它的速度在离开该区域前承受–10英尺的环境减值；若大成功或大失败，它还会获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} 状态，持续1轮。生物可以尝试 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱} 以移除这些效果。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.rjM25qfw5BKj9h97]{法术效果：缠绕植物群}

Plants and fungi burst out or quickly grow, entangling creatures. All surfaces in the area are difficult terrain. Each round that a creature starts its turn in the area, it must attempt a Reflex save. On a failure, it takes a –10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds until it leaves the area, and on a critical failure, it's also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} for 1 round. Creatures can attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} to remove these effects.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.rjM25qfw5BKj9h97]{Spell Effect: Entangling Flora}

Charm (At Will).name: 魅惑术（意志） Charm (At Will)
Charm (At Will).description:
对目标而言，你的话语如蜜般甜美，你的面容仿佛笼罩在梦幻的薄雾中。它必须尝试一次意志豁免；如果你或你的盟友近期威胁过它或对它使用过敌对动作，则该豁免获得+4环境加值。

你可以解消该法术。若你对目标使用敌对动作，则该法术结束。当法术结束时，目标不一定会意识到自己曾被魅惑术影响，除非它对你的友善程度或你说服它采取的动作与它的预期相冲突；这意味着你有可能通过世俗手段说服目标继续做你的朋友。

大成功 目标不受影响，并意识到你试图魅惑术它。

成功 目标不受影响，但会认为你的法术是某种无害的东西而非魅惑术，除非它辨识该法术。

失败 目标对你的态度变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{友善}。若它原本为友善，则变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{乐于助人}。它不能对你使用敌对动作。

大失败 目标对你的态度变为乐于助人，且它不能对你使用敌对动作。

升阶（4环） 持续时间持续到你下次进行每日准备。

升阶（8环） 持续时间持续到你下次进行每日准备，且你最多可以以10个生物为目标。

To the target, your words are honey and your visage seems bathed in a dreamy haze. It must attempt a Will save, with a +4 circumstance bonus if you or your allies recently threatened it or used hostile actions against it.

You can Dismiss the spell. If you use hostile actions against the target, the spell ends. When the spell ends, the target doesn't necessarily realize it was charmed unless its friendship with you or the actions you convinced it to take clash with its expectations, meaning you could potentially convince the target to continue being your friend via mundane means.

Critical Success The target is unaffected and aware you tried to charm it.

Success The target is unaffected but thinks your spell was something harmless instead of charm, unless it identifies the spell.

Failure The target's attitude becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{Friendly} toward you. If it was Friendly, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{Helpful}. It can't use hostile actions against you.

Critical Failure The target's attitude becomes Helpful toward you, and it can't use hostile actions against you.

Heightened (4th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations.

Heightened (8th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 对所有对抗魔法的豁免获得+1状态加值 +1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic

Twisting Tail.name: 扭曲尾巴 Twisting Tail
Twisting Tail.description:
触发 一个位于巨龙尾巴触及范围内的生物使用一个移动动作，或在其正在使用的移动动作期间离开一个方格

效果 巨龙以–2减值对该生物进行一次尾巴打击。若该打击命中，巨龙扰乱该生物的动作。

Trigger A creature within reach of the dragon's tail uses a move action or leaves a square during a move action it's using

Effect The dragon makes a tail Strike at the creature with a –2 penalty. If the Strike hits, the dragon disrupts the creature's action.

Draconic Frenzy.name: 龙族狂乱 Draconic Frenzy
Draconic Frenzy.description:
巨龙以任意顺序进行两次爪击打击与一次角击打击。

The dragon makes two claw Strikes and one horn Strike in any order.

Draconic Momentum.name: 龙族动势 Draconic Momentum
Draconic Momentum.description:
每当巨龙以一次打击造成大成功或大失败时，他们的毒息就会重新充能。

The dragon recharges their Poison Breath whenever they score a critical hit with a Strike.

Forest Passage.name: 森林通道 Forest Passage
Forest Passage.description:
有角巨龙无视由植物造成的任何困难地形，例如灌木、藤蔓和灌丛。即使是被魔法操控的植物也无法阻碍它们的前进。

The horned dragon ignores any difficult terrain caused by plants, such as bushes, vines, and undergrowth. Even plants manipulated by magic don't impede their progress.

Impaling Charge.name: 穿刺冲锋 Impaling Charge
Impaling Charge.description:
需求 龙的角上没有刺穿一名生物

效果 龙试图用角顶刺一名敌人。它先疾行，然后尝试一次角击打。若命中，目标会被刺穿在龙的角上。该生物在角上时处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}状态（并且可以如常尝试@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱}）。龙不需要使用额外动作来维持被刺穿生物的被抓住状态。若龙移动，它会把被抓住的生物一并带着移动。

Requirements The dragon doesn't have a creature impaled on their horn

Effect The dragon attempts to gore a foe. They Stride, then attempt a horn Strike. On a hit, the target becomes impaled on the dragon's horn. The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} while on the horn (and can attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} as normal). The dragon doesn't need to use additional actions to keep the impaled creature grabbed. If the dragon moves, they bring the grabbed creature along with them.

Poison Breath.name: 毒息 Poison Breath
Poison Breath.description:
巨龙吐出一团剧毒云雾，在一个 @Template[cone|distance:50] 内造成 @Damage[13d6[poison]] 伤害（@Check[fortitude|dc:31|basic] 豁免）。

他们在 [[/br 1d4 #Recharge Poison Breath]]{1d4 轮} 内无法再次使用毒息。

The dragon breathes a toxic cloud that deals @Damage[13d6[poison]] damage in a @Template[cone|distance:50] (@Check[fortitude|dc:31|basic] save).

They can't use Poison Breath again for [[/br 1d4 #Recharge Poison Breath]]{1d4 rounds}.

Trackless Journey.name: 无踪旅程 Trackless Journey
Trackless Journey.description:
长角龙在自然环境中总能获得掩盖踪迹的好处，即使在全速移动时也是如此。

The horned dragon always gains the benefits of Cover Tracks in natural surroundings, even while moving at full speed.

Horned Dragon (Adult).publicNotes:
流经原初巨龙的魔法能在特定类型的巨龙身上显现出更具动物性或野兽般的特征。其中最引人注目的，便是有角巨龙那对巨大的成对犄角。尽管它们魁梧的身躯、天然的体色以及显眼的棱脊鳞片各有其独到之处，但第一眼最明显且最震撼的仍是那对犄角。有角巨龙会用犄角将猎物刺穿，以迅猛而残酷的方式展现其力量。它们通常沉思内省，并执着于知识与自律——这些特征与其野兽般的外表形成反差。因此，有角巨龙通常更愿意与外来者说话。

巨龙形态万千，许多巨龙拥有魔法能力或与魔法有所关联。有些巨龙能从魔法中汲取比其他巨龙更强大的力量，使它们在长时间暴露于魔法之下能够显现能力或改变体格。随着年代增长，这些巨龙会变得更加强大，并强化其与自身魔法起源的联系。学者们对这些巨龙的分类争论不休，有人偏好“魔法巨龙”之名，亦有人因其与特定魔法根源的联系而称之为“传统巨龙”。无论名称如何，这些巨龙都共享若干特征：它们能够汲取魔法能量；随着变老，其力量与狡黠愈发增强；并倾向于囤积海量的宝藏与财富。

The magic that flows through primal dragons can manifest more animalistic or bestial features in a given type of dragon. Notably among these are the massive paired horns of the horned dragon. While their bulky frames, natural coloration, and prominent ridged scales are all remarkable in their own way, it's the horns that are most obvious and striking at first glance. Horned dragons use their horns to impale their prey in a quick and brutal display of their might. They are generally contemplative and have a fixation on knowledge and self-discipline, traits belied by their bestial appearance. As a result, horned dragons are generally more open to speaking with outsiders.

Dragons come in myriad forms, with many having magical abilities or connections to magic. Some dragons draw greater power from magic than others, allowing them to manifest abilities or alter their physiques with prolonged exposure to magic. These dragons become more powerful as they age and strengthen their connections with their magical origins. Scholars debate the classification of these dragons, with some preferring the name magical dragons and others using traditional dragons due to their connection to specific magical traditions. Regardless of their names, these dragons share a number of characteristics: their ability to tap into magical energies, intensified might and cunning as they grow older, and an inclination to hoard vast amounts of treasure and wealth.
Horned Dragon (Adult).allSaves: +1 status to all saves vs. magic
Horned Dragon (Adult).prototypeToken: 有角巨龙（成年） Horned Dragon (Adult)

Portaged.name: 搬运 Portaged
Portaged.description:
这艘划艇可以由2个中型生物或1个大型生物在陆地上搬运。这样做时，这些生物处于负重状态。

The rowboat can be carried overland by 2 Medium creatures or 1 Large creature. Those creatures are encumbered when doing so.

Morrigna.name: 摩莉甘猎魂使 Morrigna

Divine Spontaneous Spells.name: 神圣自发法术 Divine Spontaneous Spells

Divine Innate Spells.name: 神圣天生法术 Divine Innate Spells

Field of Life.name: 生命领域 Field of Life
Field of Life.description:
一片生命能量场充满该区域，散发出温暖，并使其中的生物恢复活力。每个活体生物在该区域内开始其回合时恢复1d8生命值，而任何不死生物在该区域内开始其回合时受到1d8活力伤害。

升阶（8环） 治疗与伤害提高至1d10。

升阶（9环） 治疗与伤害提高至1d12。

A field of life energy fills the area, exuding warmth and rejuvenating those within. Each living creature that starts its turn in the area regains 1d8 Hit Points, and any undead creature that starts its turn in the area takes 1d8 vitality damage.

Heightened (8th) The healing and damage increase to 1d10.

Heightened (9th) The healing and damage increase to 1d12.

Spirit Blast.name: 灵魂冲击 Spirit Blast
Spirit Blast.description:
你凝聚以太能量并攻击一个生物的灵魂，造成16d6灵魂伤害，目标进行一次基础强韧豁免。

强化（+1） 伤害增加2d6。

You concentrate ethereal energy and attack a creature's spirit, dealing 16d6 spirit damage with a basic Fortitude save.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Call Spirit.name: 召唤灵魂 Call Spirit
Call Spirit.description:
你撕裂通往来世的隐匿之纱，并从其最终的休息之地召来一个灵魂。你必须以名字呼唤该灵魂，并且你必须提供与该灵魂的联系物，例如一件占据术对象、一件衣物，或其尸体的一部分。不愿响应你呼唤的灵魂可以尝试一次意志豁免来避免；在大成功或大失败时，一个恶作剧的灵魂会冒充你原本想召唤的灵魂。如果你生前未曾见过该灵魂，则该意志豁免的DC降低2。无论如何，灵魂都会以你原本想召唤的生物的缥缈形态出现。在持续时间的每一分钟，你都可以向该灵魂提出一个问题。它可以随意回答，甚至拒绝回答。如果该灵魂不在来世（例如它是不死生物），除大成功或大失败之外的所有结果都使用失败效果。

大成功或大失败 该灵魂格外配合，即使它有充分理由欺骗你，它在其欺瞒检定上也会承受-2环境减值。

成功 你召来该灵魂。

失败 你未能召来灵魂。

大成功或大失败 一个或多个邪恶灵魂出现并攻击。

You tear the veil to the afterlife and call a spirit from its final resting place. You must call the spirit by name, and you must provide a connection to the spirit, such as a possession, a garment, or a piece of its corpse. A spirit unwilling to heed your call can attempt a Will save to avoid it; on a critical success, a trickster spirit Impersonates the spirit you meant to call. The DC of the Will save is 2 lower if you haven't met the spirit in life. Either way, the spirit appears as a wispy form of the creature you meant to call. Each minute of the duration, you can ask the spirit a question. It can answer how it pleases or even refuse to answer. If the spirit isn't in the afterlife (such as if it's an undead), all results other than critical failures use the failure effect.

Critical Success The spirit is particularly cooperative, and even if it has strong reasons to deceive you, it takes a -2 circumstance penalty to its Deception checks.

Success You call the spirit.

Failure You fail to call a spirit.

Critical Failure One or more evil spirits appear and attack.

Scouting Eye.name: 侦察之眼 Scouting Eye
Scouting Eye.description:
你在500英尺内一处你能看见的位置创造一个@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}、漂浮的眼睛，直径1英寸。它以你正常的视觉感官向所有方向观察，并持续将其所见传递给你。

每轮中你第一次维持该法术时，你可以选择将眼睛移动至多30英尺（仅看见眼睛前方的事物），或将其移动至多10英尺（看见其周围所有方向的一切）。眼睛离你能移动多远没有限制，但若你与眼睛在任何时候不再处于同一存在位面，该法术会立刻结束。若你想用它进行察觉检定，你可以通过眼睛尝试搜寻动作。对眼睛造成的任何伤害都会摧毁它并结束该法术。

You create an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}, floating eye, 1 inch in diameter, at a location you can see within 500 feet. It sees in all directions with your normal visual senses and continuously transmits what it sees to you.

The first time you Sustain the spell each round, you can either move the eye up to 30 feet, seeing only things in front of the eye, or move it up to 10 feet, seeing everything in all directions around it. There is no limit to how far from you the eye can move, but the spell ends immediately if you and the eye ever cease to be on the same plane of existence. You can attempt Seek actions through the eye if you want to attempt Perception checks with it. Any damage dealt to the eye destroys it and ends the spell.

Sending.name: 发送 Sending
Sending.description:
你向该生物发送一段不超过25个词的精神传讯术，而它可以立即用自己不超过25个词的传讯术回应。

You send the creature a mental message of 25 words or fewer, and it can respond immediately with its own message of 25 words or fewer.

Truespeech (Constant).name: 真言（恒定） Truespeech (Constant)
Truespeech (Constant).description:
目标可以理解所有词语，无论语言为何，并且也能说出其他生物的语言。当处于由多种生物组成的混合群体中时，每当目标说话时，它可以选择一个生物，并用该生物能理解的语言说话，即使目标不知道那是什么语言。

强化（第7环） 持续时间为8小时。

The target can understand all words regardless of language and also speak the languages of other creatures. When in a mixed group of creatures, each time the target speaks, it can choose a creature and speak in a language that creature understands, even if the target doesn't know what language that is.

Heightened (7th) The duration is 8 hours.

Dispelling Globe.name: 驱散法球 Dispelling Globe
Dispelling Globe.description:
你在自己周围创造一个无法移动的球形结界，它会尝试反制任何来自球体外部、其区域或目标进入球体内的法术，如同该球体是一个@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{解除魔法}法术，其环阶比此法术的实际环阶低1。

若反制尝试成功，它只会阻止原本会进入球体内的那一部分法术效果（因此若该法术也有位于球体外的目标，或其区域的一部分在球体之外，那些目标或那部分区域仍会正常受到影响）。

你必须在一处连续且开放的空间中塑成该球体，使其边缘不会穿过任何生物或物体，否则该法术会失效（不过在法术施放后，生物仍可进入球体）。

You create an immobile globe around yourself that attempts to counteract any spell from outside the globe whose area or targets enter into the globe, as if the globe were a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic} spell 1 rank lower than its actual spell rank.

If the counteract attempt succeeds, it prevents only the portion of the spell that would have entered the globe (so if the spell also has targets outside the globe, or part of its area is beyond the globe, those targets or that area is affected normally).

You must form the sphere in an unbroken open space, so its edges don't pass through any creatures or objects, or the spell is lost (though creatures can enter the globe after the spell is cast).

Read Omens.name: 阅读机运 Read Omens
Read Omens.description:
你窥视未来。选择一个你计划在1周内进行的特定目标或行动，或一个你预计可能在1周内发生的事件。你会得知一条晦涩的线索或一段可能对所选事件有所帮助的建议，通常以押韵诗句或预兆的形式呈现。

You peek into the future. Choose a particular goal or activity you plan to engage in within 1 week, or an event you expect might happen within 1 week. You learn a cryptic clue or piece of advice that could help with the chosen event, often in the form of a rhyme or omen.

Talking Corpse.name: 会说话的尸体 Talking Corpse
Talking Corpse.description:
你赋予目标尸体一种近似生命的形态，使其回答向它提出的三个问题。此法术调用的是肉体的潜在记忆，而非召回死者的灵魂，因此尸体必须基本完整才能使法术生效。尸体受到的伤害越多，它的回答就越不准确或越支离破碎，并且它必须有喉咙和嘴才能开口说话。如果在过去一周内有人曾对该尸体施放过此法术，则该法术自动失败。尸体可以使用其死亡时代原本生物的数据尝试一次意志豁免，以抗拒回答这些问题，产生以下效果。

大成功或大失败 成功 目标可以说谎或拒绝回答你的问题，并且目标的灵魂会在24小时内纠缠你，烦扰你，使你在这段时间内无法获得任何休息。

成功 目标可以提供虚假信息或拒绝回答你的问题。

失败 目标必须如实作答，但它的回答可以简短、晦涩且重复。它仍然可以对你施展假象术，或试图拖延，以便在你问完所有问题之前让此法术的持续时间耗尽。

大成功或大失败 失败 同失败，但目标的回答更直接且不那么重复，尽管仍然晦涩。它在进行欺瞒检定以欺骗或对你施展假象术时承受-2状态减值。

You grant the target corpse a semblance of life, which it uses to speak the answers to three questions posed to it. This spell calls on the physical body's latent memories rather than summoning back the deceased's spirit, so the corpse must be mostly intact for the spell to function. The more damage the corpse has taken, the more inaccurate or patchwork its answers are, and it must have a throat and mouth to speak at all. If anyone has previously cast this spell on the corpse in the last week, the spell automatically fails. The corpse can attempt a Will save to resist answering the questions using the statistics of the original creature at its time of death, with the following effects.

Critical Success The target can lie or refuse to answer your questions, and the target's spirit haunts you for 24 hours, bothering you and causing you to be unable to gain any rest for that time.

Success The target can provide false information or refuse to answer your questions.

Failure The target must answer truthfully, but its answers can be brief, cryptic, and repetitive. It can still mislead you or attempt to stall so that the spell's duration runs out before you can ask all your questions.

Critical Failure As failure, but the target's answers are more direct and less repetitive, though still cryptic. It takes a -2 status penalty to Deception checks to deceive or mislead you.

Unfettered Movement.name: 无拘移动 Unfettered Movement
Unfettered Movement.description:
你驱退那些会妨碍生物或减缓其移动的效果。在此法术效果影响下，目标无视那些会使其速度承受环境减值的效果。当其尝试@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱}一个使其@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}的效果时，除非该效果是魔法且阶位高于unfettered movement法术，否则其自动成功。

You repel effects that would hinder a creature or slow its movement. While under this spell's effect, the target ignores effects that would give them a circumstance penalty to Speed. When they attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} an effect that has them @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}, they automatically succeed unless the effect is magical and of a higher rank than the unfettered movement spell.

Blindness.name: 目盲术 Blindness
Blindness.description:
你使目标目盲。效果由目标的强韧豁免决定。随后目标在1分钟内获得暂时免疫。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} 状态，直到其下一回合开始。

失败 目标目盲1分钟。

大失败 目标永久目盲。

You blind the target. The effect is determined by the target's Fortitude save. The target then becomes temporarily immune for 1 minute.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} until its next turn begins.

Failure The target is Blinded for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The target is Blinded permanently.

Crisis of Faith.name: 信念崩塌 Crisis of Faith
Crisis of Faith.description:
你冲击目标的信仰，使该生物充满疑虑与精神动荡，造成6d6精神伤害；若其能施放神圣法术，则改为造成6d8精神伤害。其效果由其意志豁免决定。

对许多神祇而言，若无重大理由而对你自身神祇的追随者施放该法术属于禁忌。

大成功或大失败 成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标承受一半伤害。

失败 目标承受全额伤害；若目标能施放神圣法术，则其在1轮内为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1}。

大成功或大失败 失败 目标承受双倍伤害，在1轮内为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1}，且在1轮内无法施放神圣法术。

强化（+1） 伤害增加2d6（若目标是神圣施法者，则改为增加2d8）。

You assault the target's faith, riddling the creature with doubt and mental turmoil that deal 6d6 mental damage, or 6d8 mental damage if it can cast divine spells. The effects are determined by its Will save.

To many deities, casting this spell on a follower of your own deity without significant cause is anathema.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes half damage.

Failure The target takes full damage; if the target can cast divine spells, it's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The target takes double damage, is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round, and can't cast divine spells for 1 round.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6 (or by 2d8 if the target is a divine spellcaster).

Dream Message.name: 梦境传讯术 Dream Message
Dream Message.description:
你向你的目标的梦境发送一则传讯术。该传讯术是单向的，最多为1分钟的讲话内容（约150词）。如果目标正在睡觉，他们会立刻收到传讯术。若非如此，他们会在下一次入睡时收到。一旦他们收到，法术结束，并且你知道传讯术已送达。
