升阶（4环） 你可以以最多10个你知道其姓名且曾亲自见过的生物为目标。你必须向他们所有人发送同一则传讯术；法术会对每个生物分别结束

You send a message to your target's dream. The message is one-way, up to 1 minute of speech (roughly 150 words). If the target is asleep, they receive the message instantly. If not, they receive it the next time they sleep. As soon as they receive it, the spell ends, and you know the message was sent.

Heightened (4th) You can target up to 10 creatures you know by name and have met in person. You must send the same message to all of them; the spell ends for each creature individually

Calm.name: 冷静 Calm
Calm.description:
你强制令区域内的生物冷静下来，将它们安抚至非暴力状态；每个生物必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功或大失败 成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 平静的冲动对该生物的攻击掷骰施加-1状态减值。

失败 任何将会影响该生物的情绪效果都会被压制，且该生物无法使用敌对动作。若目标受到任何其他生物的敌对影响，它将不再受calm影响。

大成功或大失败 失败 同失败，但敌对不会结束该效果。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.Qr5rgoZvI4KmFY0N]{法术效果：冷静}

You forcibly calm creatures in the area, soothing them into a nonviolent state; each creature must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success Calming urges impose a -1 status penalty to the creature's attack rolls.

Failure Any emotion effects that would affect the creature are suppressed and the creature can't use hostile actions. If the target is subject to hostility from any other creature, it ceases to be affected by calm.

Critical Failure As failure, but hostility doesn't end the effect.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.Qr5rgoZvI4KmFY0N]{Spell Effect: Calm}

Dispel Magic.name: 解除魔法 Dispel Magic
Dispel Magic.description:
你解构法术或效果背后的魔法。尝试对目标进行一次反制检定。如果你成功反制一件魔法物品，该物品在10分钟内变为其类型的普通物品。这不会改变该物品的非魔法属性。如果目标是神器或类似物品，你将自动失败。

You unravel the magic behind a spell or effect. Attempt a counteract check against the target. If you successfully counteract a magic item, the item becomes a mundane item of its type for 10 minutes. This doesn't change the item's non-magical properties. If the target is an artifact or similar item, you automatically fail.

See the Unseen.name: 见不可见者 See the Unseen
See the Unseen.description:
你的目光能穿透幻象并发现@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}生物和灵体。你能看见隐形生物，如同它们并未隐形一般，不过它们的细节会变得模糊，使其处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}状态且难以辨认。你也能看见虚体生物，例如具有幽灵（特征）的生物，它们会以模糊的形态显现在物体之后（仿佛穿过该物体），只要它们位于距离该物体表面10英尺以内。更微妙的线索也会使你在进行识破幻象的检定时获得+2状态加值。

升阶（5环）此法术的持续时间为8小时。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.T5bk6UH7yuYog1Fp]{法术效果：看见不可见者}

Your gaze pierces through illusions and finds @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} creatures and spirits. You can see invisible creatures as though they weren't invisible, although their features are blurred, making them @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} and difficult to identify. You can also see incorporeal creatures, like ghosts, phased through an object from within 10 feet of an object's surface as blurry shapes seen through those objects. Subtler clues also grant you a +2 status bonus to checks you make to disbelieve illusions.

Heightened (5th) This spell has a duration of 8 hours.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.T5bk6UH7yuYog1Fp]{Spell Effect: See the Unseen}

Silence.name: 沉默术 Silence
Silence.description:
目标不发出任何声音，阻止生物仅凭听觉注意到它。目标不能使用音波攻击，也不能使用带有听觉（特征）的动作。这会阻止它施放法术，因为施法涉及的魔法咒词，但隐秘法术除外。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.mmJNE57hC7G3SPae]{法术效果：沉默术}

升阶（4环） 该法术在被触及的生物周围创造一个10尺散发的灵光，使其中或穿过其中的所有声音都被沉默。在灵光范围内的生物，受到与目标相同的效果影响。根据效果的位置，生物可能会注意到没有声音传到它那里（例如，阻隔来自队伍的噪音）。

The target makes no sound, preventing creatures from noticing it using hearing alone. The target can't use sonic attacks, nor can it use actions with the auditory trait. This prevents it from casting spells due to the magical words involved in casting, with the exception of subtle spells.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.mmJNE57hC7G3SPae]{Spell Effect: Silence}

Heightened (4th) The spell creates an aura in a 10-foot emanation around the touched creature, silencing all sound in or passing through it. While within the aura, creatures are subject to the same effects as the target. Depending upon the position of the effect, a creature might notice the lack of sound reaching it (blocking off the noise coming from a party, for example).

Speak with Animals (Constant).name: 动物交谈（恒定） Speak with Animals (Constant)
Speak with Animals (Constant).description:
你可以向动物提问、从它们那里获得回答，并对动物使用交涉（技能）。该法术不会让它们比平常更友善。狡猾的动物可能会言辞简短且闪烁其词，而不那么聪明的动物则常常会发表愚蠢的评论。

You can ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the Diplomacy skill with animals. The spell doesn't make them more friendly than normal. Cunning animals are likely to be terse and evasive, while less intelligent ones often make inane comments.

Bane.name: 绝望术 Bane
Bane.description:
你以疑惑充斥敌人的心智。区域内的敌人必须成功通过一次意志豁免，否则只要他们仍在该区域内，就会在攻击掷骰上承受–1状态减值。在后续回合中，每轮一次，你可以维持该法术，使该散发的半径增加10英尺，并迫使区域内尚未受此影响的敌人再尝试一次豁免。

绝望术可以反制 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XSujb7EsSwKl19Uu]{祝福术}。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.UTLp7omqsiC36bso]{法术效果：绝望术}

You fill the minds of your enemies with doubt. Enemies in the area must succeed at a Will save or take a –1 status penalty to attack rolls as long as they are in the area. Once per round on subsequent turns, you can Sustain the spell to increase the emanation's radius by 10 feet and force enemies in the area that weren't yet affected to attempt another saving throw.

Bane can counteract @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XSujb7EsSwKl19Uu]{Bless}.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.UTLp7omqsiC36bso]{Spell Effect: Bane}

Bless.name: 祝福术 Bless
Bless.description:
来自彼岸的祝福帮助你的伙伴精准打击。你和你的盟友在光环范围内时，攻击掷骰获得+1状态加值。在后续回合中每轮一次，你可以维持该法术，使光环的半径增加10英尺。

祝福术可以反制@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.7ZinJNzxq0XF0oMx]{绝望术}。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.RfCEHpMoEAZvB9IZ]{光环：祝福术}

Blessings from beyond help your companions strike true. You and your allies gain a +1 status bonus to attack rolls while within the emanation. Once per round on subsequent turns, you can Sustain the spell to increase the emanation's radius by 10 feet.

Bless can counteract @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.7ZinJNzxq0XF0oMx]{Bane}.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.RfCEHpMoEAZvB9IZ]{Aura: Bless}

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一道脉冲，用以感知魔法的存在。你获得的信息仅限于魔法存在与否。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你与盟友的魔法物品以及持续中的法术。你只有在该幻术魔法的效果位阶低于你的侦测魔法法术位阶时，才能侦测到幻术魔法。然而，带有幻术灵光但外观并不具有欺骗性的物品（例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{隐形术药水}）通常仍会被正常侦测到。

强化（第3） 你得知该法术所侦测到的最强魔法效果的位阶或等级，由GM判定。

强化（第4） 同第3位阶，但你还能精确定位最高位阶魔法的来源。与模糊感官类似，你不会得知确切位置，但可以将来源缩小到一个5尺立方体内（若来源大于该范围，则为最近的一个）。

You send out a pulse that registers the presence of magic. You receive no information beyond the presence or absence of magic. You can choose to ignore magic you're fully aware of, such as the magic items and ongoing spells of you and your allies. You detect illusion magic only if that magic's effect has a lower rank than the rank of your detect magic spell. However, items that have an illusion aura but aren't deceptive in appearance (such as an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{Invisibility Potion}) typically are detected normally.

Heightened (3rd) You learn the rank or level of the most powerful magical effect the spell detects, as determined by the GM.

Heightened (4th) As 3rd rank, but you also pinpoint the source of the highest-rank magic. Like for an imprecise sense, you don't learn the exact location, but can narrow down the source to within a 5-foot cube (or the nearest if larger than that).

Enfeeble.name: 虚弱 Enfeeble
Enfeeble.description:
你削弱目标的力量，效果取决于其强韧豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 1}，直到你下个回合开始。

失败 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 2}，持续 1 分钟。

大失败 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 3}，持续 1 分钟。

You sap the target's strength, depending on its Fortitude save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} until the start of your next turn.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 3} for 1 minute.

Heal.name: 治疗术 Heal
Heal.description:
你引导生命能量来治疗活物或伤害不死生物。若目标是自愿的活体生物，你恢复其1d8生命值。若目标是不死生物，你对其造成等量的生命力伤害，并且它必须进行一次基本强韧豁免。你在施放此法术时花费的动作数量决定其目标、射程、区域以及其他参数。

1 该法术的射程为接触。

2 (concentrate) 该法术的射程为30英尺。若你在治疗一个活体生物，将恢复的生命值增加8。

3 (concentrate) 你在一个@Template[emanation|distance:30]中散布生命能量。这以爆发内所有活体与不死生物为目标。

升阶（+1） 治疗或伤害的数值增加1d8，且2动作版本的额外治疗增加8。

You channel vital energy to heal the living or damage the undead. If the target is a willing living creature, you restore 1d8 Hit Points. If the target is undead, you deal that amount of vitality damage to it, and it gets a basic Fortitude save. The number of actions you spend when Casting this Spell determines its targets, range, area, and other parameters.

1 The spell has a range of touch.

2 (concentrate) The spell has a range of 30 feet. If you're healing a living creature, increase the Hit Points restored by 8.

3 (concentrate) You disperse vital energy in a @Template[emanation|distance:30]. This targets all living and undead creatures in the burst.

Heightened (+1) The amount of healing or damage increases by 1d8, and the extra healing for the 2-action version increases by 8.

Read Aura.name: 阅读灵光 Read Aura
Read Aura.description:
你将注意力集中于目标物体，敞开心智以感知魔法灵光。施放完成后，你会知道该物品是否具有魔法。你或任何你向其说明该灵光的人，在该物品上进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.eReSHVEPCsdkSL4G]{辨识魔法} 时获得+2环境加值。如果该物体是幻觉，你只有在该效果的环阶低于你的阅读灵光法术的环阶时才会侦测到这一点。

升阶（3环）你可以以最多10个物体为目标。

升阶（6环）你可以以任意数量的物体为目标。

You focus on the target object, opening your mind to perceive magical auras. When the casting is complete, you know whether that item is magical. You or anyone you advise about the aura gains a +2 circumstance bonus to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.eReSHVEPCsdkSL4G]{Identify Magic} on the item. If the object is illusory, you detect this only if the effect's rank is lower than the rank of your read aura spell.

Heightened (3rd) You can target up to 10 objects.

Heightened (6th) You can target any number of objects.

Stabilize.name: 稳定伤势 Stabilize
Stabilize.description:
生命能量关闭死亡之门。目标失去@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{濒死（状态）}状态，不过其在0生命值时仍保持@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{昏迷}状态。

Life energy shuts death's door. The target loses the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{Dying} condition, though it remains @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} at 0 Hit Points.

Vitality Lash.name: 活力鞭笞 Vitality Lash
Vitality Lash.description:
你用源自造物熔炉的能量摧毁目标被腐化的精华。你造成2d6活力伤害，且目标进行一次基础强韧豁免。若该生物在豁免中大失败，它还会获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1}，直到你下个回合开始。

强化（+1） 伤害增加1d6。

You demolish the target's corrupted essence with energy from Creation's Forge. You deal 2d6 vitality damage with a basic Fortitude save. If the creature critically fails the save, it is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} until the start of your next turn.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Void Warp.name: 虚空扭曲 Void Warp
Void Warp.description:
你呼唤虚空来以伤害生命力。目标受到2d4点虚空伤害，并进行一次基础强韧豁免。在大失败时，目标还会获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1}，持续到你下个回合开始。

强化（+1） 伤害增加1d4点。

You call upon the Void to harm life force. The target takes 2d4 void damage with a basic Fortitude save. On a critical failure, the target is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} until the start of your next turn.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 对抗魔法时所有豁免获得+1状态加值 +1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic

Regeneration 20 (Deactivated by Acid or.name: 再生 20（被酸或火焰停用） Regeneration 20 (Deactivated by Acid or Fire)

Change Shape.name: 变形 Change Shape
Change Shape.description:
摩莉甘猎魂使可以呈现为任何小型或中型动物或类人生物的外貌。这不会改变其速度，亦不会改变其打击的攻击与伤害调整值，但可能会改变其打击所造成的伤害类型。除非它们选择在新形态中显现其蛛网术裹覆，否则它们无法进行蛛网术裹覆打击。

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

A morrigna can take the appearance of any Small or Medium animal or humanoid. This doesn't change their Speed or their attack and damage modifiers with their Strikes, but it might change the damage type their Strikes deal. Unless they choose to manifest their web wrappings in their new form, they cannot make web wrappings Strikes.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

Shepherd's Touch.name: 牧羊人的接触 Shepherd's Touch
Shepherd's Touch.description:
摩莉甘猎魂使的打击会影响虚体生物，如同刻有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.JQdwHECogcTzdd8R]{幽冥}属性符文一般，并对活体生物造成@Damage[4d6[虚空]]伤害，或对不死生物造成@Damage[4d6[vitality]]伤害。

A morrigna's Strikes affect incorporeal creatures as though etched with a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.JQdwHECogcTzdd8R]{Ghost Touch} property rune and deal @Damage[4d6[void]] damage to living creatures or @Damage[4d6[vitality]] damage to undead.

Spider Minions.name: 蜘蛛仆从 Spider Minions
Spider Minions.description:
摩莉甘猎魂使召唤一只@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-monster-core.Actor.4ISm82EYQeOndynw]{巨型狼蛛}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-monster-core.Actor.NcYbJS5PWBGdNDqh]{蜘蛛群}。这些蜘蛛具有被召唤（特征），并持续10分钟或直到其生命值降至0，以先发生者为准。摩莉甘猎魂使无需维持该法术即可指挥这些被召唤的生物，并且摩莉甘猎魂使可以同时存在任意数量的被召唤蜘蛛。摩莉甘猎魂使在任何时候都可以通过其任意被召唤蜘蛛的眼睛视物。

The morrigna summons a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-monster-core.Actor.4ISm82EYQeOndynw]{Giant Tarantula} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-monster-core.Actor.NcYbJS5PWBGdNDqh]{Spider Swarm}. These spiders have the summoned trait and remain for 10 minutes or until reduced to 0 Hit Points, whichever comes first. The morrigna does not need to Sustain the Spell to direct these summoned creatures, and the morrigna can have any number of summoned spiders in existence at once. The morrigna can see through the eyes of any of their summoned spiders at any time.

Wrappings Lash.name: 裹布鞭击 Wrappings Lash
Wrappings Lash.description:
触发 处于摩莉甘猎魂使的蛛网术缠裹触及范围内的一个生物使用一个动作进行打击或尝试一次技能检定

效果 摩莉甘猎魂使对触发的生物进行一次蛛网术缠裹打击。如果该打击为大成功或大失败命中，则触发的动作被打断。

Trigger A creature within reach of the morrigna's web wrappings uses an action to Strike or attempt a skill check

Effect The morrigna makes a web wrappings Strike against the triggering creature. If the strike is a critical hit, the triggering action is disrupted.

Morrigna.publicNotes:
作为赏金猎人和调查员，摩莉甘猎魂使会搜寻那些阻挠死亡或干涉灵魂自然流动的生物。摩莉甘猎魂使身着飘逸的蛛丝衣装，佩戴令人联想到蛛网术的面具，因为他们将耐心而警觉的蜘蛛视为自己的灵性近亲。

引魂者是骨园中亡者的守护者与牧引者；骨园是一片广袤的墓冢位面，在那里凡人灵魂被审判，并被送往其永恒的奖励或诅咒。引魂者确保亡者能够接受自己从凡俗到彼岸的转变，并被妥善分派到合适的来世。他们也会保护灵魂不受超自然掠食者的侵害。几乎所有引魂者都戴着面具，尤其是在他们可能与凡人接触时；不过，他们佩戴的面具类型如同引魂者自身一样多种多样。骨园的诸庭以雷奎安语审理事务，这是一种阴郁而富于旋律的语言，以缓慢的语速发音，并伴随多种声调变化。

许多引魂者与骨园庞大的官僚体系密切相关。很少有引魂者追求怜悯、正义或个人利益；他们对法莱斯玛及其骨园的职责至高无上。尽管如此，个别引魂者会以不同方式解读自己的职责，这可能使他们与凡人、甚至彼此之间产生冲突。

Bounty hunters and investigators, morrignas seek out creatures who thwart death or interfere with the natural flow of souls. Morrignas dress in flowing spider silk and wear masks reminiscent of webs, as they consider patient and watchful spiders to be their spiritual kin.

Psychopomps are guardians and shepherds of the dead in the Boneyard, the vast plane of graves where mortal souls are judged and sent on to their eternal rewards or damnations. Psychopomps ensure that the dead come to terms with their transition from mortality and are properly sorted into the appropriate afterlife. They also protect souls from being preyed upon by supernatural predators. Nearly all psychopomps wear masks, especially when they're likely to be interacting with mortals, although the types of masks they wear are as varied as the psychopomps themselves. The courts of the Boneyard preside in Requian, a somber yet melodic language spoken slowly with various tonal shifts.

Many psychopomps are intimately involved with the Boneyard's massive bureaucracy. Few pursue mercy, justice, or personal gain; their duties to Pharasma and her Boneyard are supreme. Nevertheless, individual psychopomps interpret their duties in different ways, which might put them in conflict with mortals or even with each other.
Morrigna.allSaves: +1 status to all saves vs. magic

Yldaris Trading Post.name: 伊尔达里斯贸易站 Yldaris Trading Post
Yldaris Trading Post.tokenName: 伊尔达里斯贸易站 Yldaris Trading Post

Arrows.name: 箭矢 Arrows
Arrows.description:
这些投射物是弓的弹药。箭的箭杆由木头制成。它在飞行中由一端的箭羽稳定，另一端装有金属箭头。

These projectiles are the ammunition for bows. The shaft of an arrow is made of wood. It is stabilized in flight by fletching at one end and bears a metal head on the other.

Bedroll.name: 铺盖 Bedroll
Bedroll.description:
一个卷起的床铺。

A rolled up bed.

Candlecap.name: 烛帽菇 Candlecap
Candlecap.description:
烛帽的帽冠是缝制成小碗形状的缝合皮革。碗内固定着一小块融化的蜡，带着一根小小的黑色灯芯。

启动 1 交互

效果 你摇晃脑袋，灯芯随即点燃。烛帽在20英尺半径内提供昏暗光照。蜡烛不需要氧气，无法被闷灭或浇灭。再次启动烛帽会熄灭光照。

The crown of a candlecap is stitched leather sewn in the shape of a small bowl. Fixed inside the bowl is a melted nub of wax with a small black wick.

Activate 1 Interact

Effect You shake your head, and the candle wick ignites. The candlecap sheds dim light in a 20-foot radius. The candle doesn't require oxygen and can't be smothered or quenched. Activating the candlecap again douses the light.

Greataxe.name: 巨斧 Greataxe
Greataxe.description:
这把大型战斧太重，无法仅用单手挥舞。许多巨斧带有两片斧刃，而且往往是“带钩”的，在底部有一个钩子，以增强其劈砍力量。

This large battle axe is too heavy to wield with only one hand. Many greataxes incorporate two blades, and they are often "bearded," having a hook at the bottom to increase the strength of their chopping power.

Healing Potion (Minor).name: 治疗药水（次级） Healing Potion (Minor)
Healing Potion (Minor).description:
启动 A（操作）

治疗药水是一小瓶红宝石般的红色液体，饮用者在伤口迅速愈合时会感到一阵刺痛。当你饮用一瓶治疗药水时，你恢复[[/r 1d8[healing]]]{1d8生命值}。

Activate A (manipulate)

A healing potion is a vial of a ruby-red liquid that imparts a tingling sensation as the drinker's wounds heal rapidly. When you drink a healing potion, you regain [[/r 1d8[healing]]]{1d8 Hit Points}.

Heavy Crossbow.name: 重弩 Heavy Crossbow
Heavy Crossbow.description:
这把大型十字弓比普通十字弓更难装填，也更加结实，但能打出更强的威力。

This large crossbow is harder to load and more substantial than a regular crossbow, but it packs a greater punch.

Acid Flask (Lesser).name: 强酸瓶（次级） Acid Flask (Lesser)
Acid Flask (Lesser).description:
启动 A 打击

这个装满腐蚀性酸液的烧瓶造成1点酸伤害、1d6点持续酸伤害，以及1点酸液飞溅伤害。

Activate A Strike

This flask filled with corrosive acid deals 1 acid damage, 1d6 persistent acid damage, and 1 acid splash damage.

Blowgun.name: 吹箭筒 Blowgun
Blowgun.description:
这根又长又窄的管子用于发射吹箭筒飞镖，仅依靠用力呼出的气息所产生的力量。

This long, narrow tube is used for shooting blowgun darts, using only the power of a forcefully exhaled breath.

Lamellar Breastplate.name: 札甲胸甲 Lamellar Breastplate
Lamellar Breastplate.description:
大多数札甲胸甲由上漆的钢片或其他金属片组成，并以皮革或丝绳穿缀固定。上漆可防止金属腐蚀。

Slats of lacquered steel or other metal held together with cord, whether leather or silk, make up most lamellar breastplates. The lacquering prevents the metal from corroding.

Numbing Tonic (Minor).name: 麻木补剂（次级） Numbing Tonic (Minor)
Numbing Tonic (Minor).description:
启动 1 交互

麻木补剂让你更容易顶着战斗的痛苦前进，并摆脱原本会致残的打击。当你饮用该炼金药剂时，你获得2点临时生命值，并且在接下来1分钟内，你每个回合开始时再次获得2点临时生命值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.BTWuGksjSU1SYUcf]{效果：麻木补剂（次级）}

Activate 1 Interact

Numbing tonic makes it easier to push through the pain of battle and shrug off otherwise debilitating blows. You gain 2 temporary Hit Points when you drink the elixir, and again at the start of each of your turns for 1 minute.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.BTWuGksjSU1SYUcf]{Effect: Numbing Tonic (Minor)}

Shielding Salve.name: 护盾药膏 Shielding Salve
Shielding Salve.description:
启动 1 交互

这种闪烁的膏体具有许多 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.TVKNbcgTee19PXZR]{护盾术} 法术的特性。当你将其涂抹在一个生物或物体上时，目标在 1 轮内获得 AC +1 环境加值。在该轮内第一次有一次物理攻击或力场弹幕命中目标时，该油膏会阻止该次攻击或法术造成的 5 点伤害，然后该油膏的效果结束。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.16tOZk4qy329s2aK]{效果：护盾油膏}

Activate 1 Interact

This shimmering paste has many properties of a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.TVKNbcgTee19PXZR]{Shield} spell. When you slather it onto a creature or object, the target gains a +1 circumstance bonus to AC for 1 round. The first time a physical attack or a force barrage hits the target during that round, the oil prevents 5 damage from that attack or spell, and then the oil's effect ends.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.16tOZk4qy329s2aK]{Effect: Shielding Salve}

Splint Mail.name: 板条甲 Splint Mail
Splint Mail.description:
这种护甲是用柔韧、相互扣合的金属板加固的链甲，通常位于穿戴者的躯干、上臂和腿部。一套这种护甲附带一件内衬的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.zBYEU9E7034ENCmh]{填充护甲} 和一对 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Ix2vicchE79d6Cl3]{护手}。

This type of armor is chain mail reinforced with flexible, interlocking metal plates, typically located on the wearer's torso, upper arms, and legs. A suit of this armor comes with an undercoat of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.zBYEU9E7034ENCmh]{Padded Armor} and a pair of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Ix2vicchE79d6Cl3]{gauntlets}.

Cantrip Deck (Full Pack).name: 戏法牌组（全套） Cantrip Deck (Full Pack)
Cantrip Deck (Full Pack).description:
为了尽可能广泛地传播魔法知识，奈瑟斯的崇拜者发现了一种方法，将戏法束缚在卡片中，使得即使是非施法者也能使用。此卡组包含厚实的羊皮纸卡片，每张大约只有扑克牌的一半大小。每张卡片都以精确、简洁的字体，仅写明其戏法名称，并根据其学派以颜色区分。

此套装包含24张卡片——《核心规则书》中每个戏法各一张。

启动 1 或更多（构想，交互）

效果 你构想你想要的戏法，使其卡片升至牌库顶端，并抽出该卡片。卡组以1环法术施放该戏法，DC为15，法术攻击调整为+5。随着戏法生效，卡片崩解为尘。启动所需的动作数量与所选戏法施放所需的动作数量相同。

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gISYsBFby1TiXfBt]{酸液飞溅}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.mAMEt4FFbdqoRnkN]{虚空扭曲}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WBmvzNDfpwka3qT4]{光亮术}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.4gBIw4IDrSfFHik4]{眩晕术}

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.kcelf6IHl3L9VXXg]{活力鞭笞}

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.tXa5vOu5giBNCjdR]{识路}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WBmvzNDfpwka3qT4]{光亮术}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.pwzdSlJgYqN7bs2w]{念动之手}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.vLzFcIaSXs7YTIqJ]{传讯术}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Qw3fnUlaUbnn7ipC]{魔法伎俩}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.O9w7r4BKgPogYDDe]{燃火术}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gYjPm7YwGtEa1oxh]{霜冻射线}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.OhD2Z6rIGGD5ocZA]{阅读灵光}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.TVKNbcgTee19PXZR]{护盾术}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.AUctDF2fqPZN2w4W]{魔法印记}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.SnjhtQYexDtNDdEg]{稳定伤势}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.uZK2BYzPnxUBnDjr]{纠缠藤蔓}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.60sgbuMWN0268dB7]{念动射弹}

In an effort to spread the knowledge of magic as widely as possible, worshippers of Nethys discovered a way to bind cantrips into cards accessible even to non-spellcasters. The deck contains thick parchment cards, each roughly half the size of a playing card. In precise, no-nonsense script, each card simply states the name of its cantrip, color-coded based on its school.

This pack contains 24 cards-one of each cantrip in the Core Rulebook.

Activate 1 or more (envision, Interact)

Effect You envision your desired cantrip, causing its card to rise to the top of the deck, and draw the card. The deck casts that cantrip as a 1st-rank spell, with a DC of 15 and a spell attack modifier of +5. The card crumbles into dust as the cantrip takes effect. The activation takes the same number of actions as the cantrip you chose takes to cast.

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gISYsBFby1TiXfBt]{Acid Splash}

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.AUctDF2fqPZN2w4W]{Sigil}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.SnjhtQYexDtNDdEg]{Stabilize}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.uZK2BYzPnxUBnDjr]{Tangle Vine}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.60sgbuMWN0268dB7]{Telekinetic Projectile}

Shortbow.name: 短弓 Shortbow
Shortbow.description:
这把较小的弓由一整块木头制成，深受散兵和骑兵的青睐。

This smaller bow is made of a single piece of wood and favored by skirmishers and cavalry.

Alcohol.name: 酒精 Alcohol
Alcohol.description:
酒精是一种常见物质，种类繁多，令人目不暇接。一剂酒精的价格取决于具体饮品。在受其影响期间，你无法从酒精导致的恶心（状态）中恢复。

如果你在对抗酒精的豁免中失败（初始豁免除外），该苦难的阶段不会提高；提高酒精苦难阶段的唯一方式是摄入更多酒精。

启动 A 交互（摄入）

豁免 @Check[fortitude|dc:12]

潜伏期 10分钟

阶段 1 对抗恐惧术的豁免获得+1物品加值（10分钟）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}，对抗恐惧术效果的豁免获得+1物品加值（10分钟）

阶段 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}，措手不及，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 2}（10分钟）

阶段 4 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2}和@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}（10分钟）

阶段 5 笨拙2，恶心2，以及迟钝2（10分钟）

阶段 6 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{昏迷}（8小时）

阶段 7 死亡

Alcohol is a common substance available in stunning variety. The Price of a dose of alcohol depends on the specific beverage. You can't recover from the sickened condition from alcohol while affected.

If you fail a saving throw against alcohol other than initial saves, the affliction's stage doesn't increase; the only way to increase the stage of alcohol's affliction is to consume more alcohol.

Activate A Interact (Ingested)

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:12]

Onset 10 minutes

Stage 1 +1 item bonus to saving throws against fear (10 minutes)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}, +1 item bonus to saving throws against fear effects (10 minutes)

Stage 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}, off-guard, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} (10 minutes)

Stage 4 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} (10 minutes)

Stage 5 clumsy 2, sickened 2, and stupefied 2 (10 minutes)

Stage 6 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} (8 hours)

Stage 7 death

Battle Axe.name: 战斧 Battle Axe
Battle Axe.description:
这些斧头被明确设计为武器，而非工具。它们通常更轻，斧柄以金属箍或螺栓加固，刃部也更锋利，使其更适合砍断肢体而非木材。

These axes are designed explicitly as weapons, rather than tools. They typically weigh less, with a shaft reinforced with metal bands or bolts, and have a sharper blade, making them ideal for chopping limbs rather than wood.

Puzzle Box (Complex).name: 谜题盒（复杂） Puzzle Box (Complex)
Puzzle Box (Complex).description:
一个谜题盒具有可移动部件、锁定机构以及其他旨在迷惑使用者的组件。解开一个谜题盒通常需要进行三次成功的 DC 20 棋类学识或 @Check[thievery|dc:20|name:Puzzle Box] 检定来打开锁，不过谜题盒有无数种构造与主题，GM 可以决定哪些技能是合适的。

A puzzle box features moving parts, locking mechanisms, and other components designed to confound the user. Solving a puzzle box typically requires three successful DC 20 Games Lore or @Check[thievery|dc:20|name:Puzzle Box] checks to Open a Lock, though puzzle boxes come in countless configurations and themes, and the GM can determine which skills are appropriate.

Reading Ring.name: 阅读戒指 Reading Ring
Reading Ring.description:
阅读戒指会为其使用者进行个性化设置，并且只能阅读使用者精通的语言。每枚戒指都是独一无二的，除与其特定绑定的使用者之外，任何人都无法使用。阅读戒指会在一个过程中与其使用者绑定，该过程会触及使用者的内在潜能，类似于一件已灌注的物品，只是该过程需要10分钟、是永久性的，并且不计入你已灌注物品的数量。你可以用多种方式佩戴这枚戒指，通常要么戴在手指上，要么如果你无法将其戴在指头上，就把它系在佩戴在身上的铁链上。你可以通过执行一个交互动作来使用阅读戒指阅读文字，你使用戒指阅读的速度大致与视觉阅读者相同。以这种方式使用戒指阅读的次数没有限制。

A reading ring is personalized to its user and capable of reading only languages in which the user is fluent. Each ring is unique and can't be used by anyone other than its specific bonded user. A reading ring is bonded to its user in a process that taps into the user's inner potential, similar to an invested item, except the process takes 10 minutes, is permanent, and doesn't count toward your number of invested items. You can wear the ring in various ways, often either on a finger or a chain worn about your person if you can't have it on a digit. You can use the reading ring to read text by taking an Interact action, and you read with the ring at roughly the same rate as a visual reader. There is no limit to how often you can use the ring to read in this manner.

Swordstealer Shield.name: 夺剑者护盾术 Swordstealer Shield
Swordstealer Shield.description:
这种专门的钢盾表面装有数个宽大的金属钩。这些钩子有助于钩住剑刃和其他刀刃，减轻其来袭攻击的冲击。

This specialized steel shield features several wide metal hooks along its surface. These hooks help catch swords and other blades, reducing the impact of their incoming attacks.

Bola.name: 流星锤 Bola
Bola.description:
这种投掷武器由系在长绳末端的重物组成，可用于打击敌人或缠住他们的腿。

This throwing weapon consists of weights tied to the end of long cords, which can be used to bludgeon foes or entangle their legs.

Cutlery.name: 餐具 Cutlery
Cutlery.description:
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.MMYL2rfbYNWT0Rs1]{Spoon Gun}的弹药

使用者通常会把他们餐具抽屉里的全部内容一股脑倒进枪里，朝着敌人大致方向瞄准，然后祈祷能打中什么东西。

Ammunition for the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.MMYL2rfbYNWT0Rs1]{Spoon Gun}

Users typically upend the entire contents of their cutlery drawer into the gun, aim it in the general direction of the foe, and hope it hits something.

Pinwheel.name: 风车 Pinwheel
Pinwheel.description:
这个纸制和木制的风车在被人或风吹动时会旋转。

This paper and wood pinwheel spins when blown upon by a person or the wind.

Ranseur.name: 骑枪戟 Ranseur
Ranseur.description:
这把长柄武器是一支长三叉戟，中间的叉齿比另外两根更长。

This polearm is a long trident with a central prong that's longer than the other two.

Splendid Pyschopomp Mask.name: 华美引魂使面具 Splendid Pyschopomp Mask

Stormfeather.name: 风暴羽毛 Stormfeather
Stormfeather.description:
用法 附着于护甲

启动 1 互动

需求 你在特技中为专家。

即使在附着时，这根电蓝色的羽毛也会在空气中轻轻摇曳，仿佛总有微风相伴。启动后，该护符对你施放飞行，不过持续时间为1分钟。你可以解消该次启动。若你这么做，你会受到 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.TTwOKGqmZeKSyNMH]{轻柔着陆} 的影响。

Usage affixed to armor

Activate 1 Interact

Requirements You're an expert in Acrobatics.

Even while affixed, this electric blue feather sways lightly in the air, as if always accompanied by a breeze. When activated, the talisman casts fly on you, though the duration is 1 minute. You can Dismiss this activation. If you do, you're affected by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.TTwOKGqmZeKSyNMH]{Gentle Landing}.

Potion of Fire Resistance (Moderate).name: 火焰抗力药水（中等） Potion of Fire Resistance (Moderate)
Potion of Fire Resistance (Moderate).description:
激活 A（操纵）

饮用这瓶浓稠、强身的药水可在1小时内获得对火焰伤害的抗力10。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.8zKGaGrkTd8ALqJO]{效果：抗火药水（中等）}

Activate A (manipulate)

Drinking this thick, fortifying potion grants resistance 10 against fire damage for 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.8zKGaGrkTd8ALqJO]{Effect: Potion of Fire Resistance (Moderate)}

Healing Potion (Lesser).name: 治疗药水（次级） Healing Potion (Lesser)
Healing Potion (Lesser).description:
启动 A（操作）

治疗药水是一小瓶红宝石般鲜红的液体，饮用者的伤口迅速愈合时会带来刺痛般的感觉。当你饮用一瓶治疗药水时，你恢复[[/r (2d8+5)[healing]]]{2d8+5生命值}。

Activate A (manipulate)

A healing potion is a vial of a ruby-red liquid that imparts a tingling sensation as the drinker's wounds heal rapidly. When you drink a healing potion, you regain [[/r (2d8+5)[healing]]]{2d8+5 Hit Points}.

Potion of Water Breathing.name: 水下呼吸药水 Potion of Water Breathing
Potion of Water Breathing.description:
启动 A（操作）

这种薄膜状的灰色药水闻起来像陈旧的鱼类垃圾堆，味道更糟。饮用此药水后，你获得2环@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.MZGkMsPBztFN0pUO]{水下呼吸}法术的效果，持续1小时。

Activate A (manipulate)

This filmy, gray potion smells of an old fish midden and tastes even worse. After drinking this potion, you gain the effects of a 2nd-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.MZGkMsPBztFN0pUO]{Water Breathing} spell for 1 hour.

Ration Tonic.name: 口粮补剂 Ration Tonic
Ration Tonic.description:
启动 1（操作）

这支纤细的小瓶看起来装着干净、清澈的水，并带有一丝淡淡的果香。饮用一剂口粮补剂会以魔法方式滋养你，其效果等同于一天份的食物与饮水。该补剂味道细腻而怡人，其具体风味在药剂制作时选定。

Activate 1 (manipulate)

This slender vial appears to hold clean, clear water with a faintly fruity scent. Drinking a ration tonic magically nourishes you with the equivalent of a day's worth of food and water. The tonic has a subtle, pleasant taste, its particulars chosen when the potion is crafted.

Potion of Emergency Escape.name: 紧急逃脱药水 Potion of Emergency Escape
Potion of Emergency Escape.description:
启动 A（操作）

紧急逃脱药水的瓶塞被制作得能在危急情况下轻易掰开。你饮用该药水时，你成为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} 1分钟，并且只要你正在逃跑，你在持续时间内所有速度获得+40尺状态加值。你立即进行一次步行。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.EZsHuGGSLER67CiM]{效果：紧急逃脱药水}

Activate A (manipulate)

The stopper for a potion of emergency escape is crafted to easily snap open in dire circumstances. When you drink this potion, you become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} for 1 minute, and you gain a +40-foot status bonus to all your Speeds for the duration as long as you are fleeing. You immediately Stride.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.EZsHuGGSLER67CiM]{Effect: Potion of Emergency Escape}

Antiplague (Lesser).name: 抗疫药剂（次级） Antiplague (Lesser)
Antiplague (Lesser).description:
启动 A（操作）

抗疫剂可以强化身体对抗疾病的防御。饮用抗疫剂后，你在24小时内对抗疾病的强韧豁免获得+2物品加值；这也适用于你每天为抵抗疾病进展所进行的豁免。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.kkDbalYEavzRpYlp]{效果：抗疫剂（次级）}

Activate A (manipulate)

Antiplague can fortify the body's defenses against diseases. Upon drinking an antiplague, you gain a +2 item bonus to Fortitude saving throws against diseases for 24 hours; this applies to your daily save against a disease's progression.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.kkDbalYEavzRpYlp]{Effect: Antiplague (Lesser)}

Bloodeye Coffee.name: 血眼咖啡 Bloodeye Coffee
Bloodeye Coffee.description:
一种浓烈的混合饮品，加入了数种在珂莱士的帕迪莎帝国常见的香料，血眼咖啡是内海地区广受欢迎的晨饮。血眼咖啡的最大成瘾阶段永远不会超过阶段 1。

启动 A 交互（摄入）

豁免 @Check[fortitude|dc:14]

潜伏期 10 分钟

最长持续时间 8 小时

阶段 1 针对因 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{疲乏（状态）} 状态而承受减值的 AC 与豁免，你获得 +1 物品加值（10 分钟）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 1}（1 小时）

阶段 3 无法从疲乏（状态）中恢复（1 天，之后该药物结束）

A strong blend including several spices common in the Padishah Empire of Kelesh, bloodeye coffee is a favorite morning drink across the Inner Sea region. The maximum addiction stage of bloodeye coffee never progresses beyond stage 1.

Activate A Interact (Ingested)

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:14]

Onset 10 minutes

Maximum Duration 8 hours

Stage 1 +1 item bonus to AC and saves to which you are taking penalties caused by the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} condition (10 minutes)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} (1 hour)

Stage 3 can't recover from fatigued (1 day, after which the drug ends)

Healing Potion (Moderate).name: 治疗药水（中等） Healing Potion (Moderate)
Healing Potion (Moderate).description:
启动 A（操作）

治疗药水是一小瓶红宝石般赤红的液体，饮用者的伤口迅速愈合时会感到一阵刺痛。饮用治疗药水时，你恢复[[/r (3d8+10)[healing]]]{3d8+10 生命值}。

Activate A (manipulate)

A healing potion is a vial of a ruby-red liquid that imparts a tingling sensation as the drinker's wounds heal rapidly. When you drink a healing potion, you regain [[/r (3d8+10)[healing]]]{3d8+10 Hit Points}.

Elixir of Life (Lesser).name: 生命药剂（次级） Elixir of Life (Lesser)
Elixir of Life (Lesser).description:
启动 A（操作）

生命药剂会加速活体生物的自然治疗过程与免疫系统。饮用此药剂后，你恢复[[/r (3d6+6)[healing]]]{3d6+6 生命值}，并在10分钟内对抗疾病与毒素的豁免检定获得+1物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.EpB7yJPEuG6ez4z3]{效果：生命药剂（次等）}

Activate A (manipulate)

Elixirs of life accelerate a living creatures natural healing processes and immune system. Upon drinking this elixir, you regain [[/r (3d6+6)[healing]]]{3d6+6 Hit Points} and gain +1 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.EpB7yJPEuG6ez4z3]{Effect: Elixir of Life (Lesser)}

Elixir of Life (Moderate).name: 生命药剂（中等） Elixir of Life (Moderate)
Elixir of Life (Moderate).description:
启动 A（操作）

生命药剂会加速活体生物的自然治疗过程与免疫系统。喝下此药剂后，你恢复[[/r (5d6+12)[healing]]]{5d6+12生命值}，并在10分钟内对抗疾病与毒素的豁免检定获得+2物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.Yxssrnh9UZJAM0V7]{效果：生命药剂（中等）}

Activate A (manipulate)

Elixirs of life accelerate a living creature's natural healing processes and immune system. Upon drinking this elixir, you regain [[/r (5d6+12)[healing]]]{5d6+12 Hit Points} and gain +2 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.Yxssrnh9UZJAM0V7]{Effect: Elixir of Life (Moderate)}

Elixir of Life (Minor).name: 生命灵药（次级） Elixir of Life (Minor)
Elixir of Life (Minor).description:
启动 A（操作）

生命药剂会加速活体生物的自然治疗过程与免疫系统。饮用此药剂后，你恢复[[/r 1d6[healing]]]{1d6生命值}，并在10分钟内获得+1物品加值，用于对抗疾病与毒素的豁免检定。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.lPRuIRbu0rHBkoKY]{效果：生命药剂（次级）}

Activate A (manipulate)

Elixirs of life accelerate a living creature's natural healing processes and immune system. Upon drinking this elixir, you regain [[/r 1d6[healing]]]{1d6 Hit Points} and gain +1 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.lPRuIRbu0rHBkoKY]{Effect: Elixir of Life (Minor)}

Feather Token (Swan Boat).name: 羽毛徽记（天鹅船） Feather Token (Swan Boat)
Feather Token (Swan Boat).description:
每枚羽毛令牌看起来都像某种异域鸟类的一根简单羽毛。羽毛的羽轴浸镀黄金，上面刻有一道奥术符文。激活羽毛令牌会使其变形为另一种物体，随后便可如同正常使用该物体一样使用。每根羽毛只能激活一次，其中大多数会永久变为其描述中的物品。

激活 A 交互

这根羽毛只有在被抛入一大片水域（如湖泊或宽阔的河流）时才能被激活。它会变形为一艘天鹅造型的小船，最多可载运32个中型生物、8个大型生物或2个巨型生物。小船在水面上的速度为50尺，持续1天。

Each feather token appears to be a simple feather from some exotic bird. The feather's shaft, dipped in gold, bears a single arcane rune. Activating a feather token causes it to transform into another object, which then can be used as normal for that object. Each feather can be activated only once, with most of them permanently becoming the item in their description.

Activate A Interact

This feather can be activated only when tossed into a large body of water, such as a lake or broad river. It transforms into a swan-shaped boat capable of carrying up to 32 Medium creatures, 8 Large creatures, or 2 Huge creatures. The boat moves on the water at a Speed of 50 feet, and lasts 1 day.

Wand of Knock (Rank 2).name: 敲击魔杖（2环） Wand of Knock (Rank 2)
Wand of Knock (Rank 2).description:
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.6Ot4N22t5tPD51BO]{Knock}

这根短杖约一英尺长，内含一个法术。其外观通常与其中的法术相关。

启动 施法

频率 每日一次，另加过载

效果 你以标示的环阶施放该法术。

制造需求 提供一次以所列环阶施放该法术。

注：要制作特定法术的卷轴或魔杖，将该法术从资料库或资料库浏览器拖入PC、NPC或战利品演员的物品栏中。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.6Ot4N22t5tPD51BO]{Knock}

This baton is about a foot long and contains a single spell. The appearance typically relates to the spell within.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day, plus overcharge

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated rank.

Craft Requirements Supply a casting of the spell at the listed rank.

Note: To create a scroll or wand of a specific spell, drag the spell from the compendium or compendium browser into the inventory of a PC, NPC, or loot actor.

Wand of Acidic Burst (Rank 1).name: 酸性爆发魔杖（阶级 1） Wand of Acidic Burst (Rank 1)
Wand of Acidic Burst (Rank 1).description:
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rnNGALRtsjspFTws]{酸性爆发}

这根警棍长约一英尺，内含一个法术。其外观通常与其中的法术相关。

启动 施法

频率 每日一次，外加过载

效果 你以标示的环阶施放该法术。

制作需求 提供一次以所列环阶施放该法术。

注：要制作一张特定法术的卷轴或魔杖，将该法术从资料库或资料库浏览器拖入 PC、NPC 或战利品角色的物品栏中。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rnNGALRtsjspFTws]{Acidic Burst}

This baton is about a foot long and contains a single spell. The appearance typically relates to the spell within.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day, plus overcharge

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated rank.

Craft Requirements Supply a casting of the spell at the listed rank.

Note: To create a scroll or wand of a specific spell, drag the spell from the compendium or compendium browser into the inventory of a PC, NPC, or loot actor.

Yldaris Trading Post.prototypeToken: 伊尔达里斯贸易站 Yldaris Trading Post

Addiction.name: 成瘾 Addiction
Addiction.description:
来源 游戏主持人指南 第120页
追踪你在每种药物的成瘾中所达到的最高阶段。这个最高阶段与该药物的当前成瘾阶段相互独立。最高阶段无法降低，即使你完全移除了疾病也是如此。当你服用该药物时，会发生两件事：你尝试一次对抗成瘾的豁免检定，并且你会压制成瘾的效果1天。因服用该药物而导致的成瘾豁免检定失败，会使你进入比你此前达到过的最高阶段高1个阶段（大失败则高2个阶段）。如果你在因服用药物而尝试豁免时正遭受成瘾影响，你无法改善你的阶段；若你在该豁免中成功，该阶段保持不变。

当你每周尝试一次对抗成瘾的豁免检定时，你当前所处的阶段不会恶化——只可能保持不变或改善。成瘾带来的状态在你受成瘾影响期间无法移除，而通过服用该药物来压制成瘾只会避免其效果——并不会移除该疾病。

豁免 强韧（DC等同于该药物的DC）； 

潜伏期 1天； 

阶段 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued}（1周）

阶段 2 疲乏且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}（1周）； 

阶段 3 疲乏、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}，以及恶心1（1周）； 

阶段 4 疲乏、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}，以及 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2}（1周）

Source Gamemastery Guide pg. 120
Track the maximum stage you reach with each drug’s addiction. This maximum stage is separate from your current addiction stage for the drug. The maximum stage can’t be reduced, even if you fully remove the disease. When you take the drug, two things happen: you attempt a saving throw against addiction, and you suppress the effects of addiction for 1 day. Failing a save against addiction caused by taking the drug causes you to go to 1 stage higher than the maximum stage you had previously reached (2 stages higher on a critical failure). If you’re currently suffering from addiction when you attempt a save from taking the drug, you can’t improve your stage; if you succeed at the save, the stage remains the same as it was.

When you attempt your save against addiction each week, the stage you are currently at can’t get worse—it can only stay the same or improve. The conditions from addiction can’t be removed while you are affected by the addiction, and suppressing addiction by taking the drug only avoids the effects—it doesn’t remove the disease.

Saving Throw Fortitude (DC equals that of the drug); 

Onset 1 day; 

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} (1 week)

Stage 2 fatigued and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (1 week); 

Stage 3 fatigued, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}, and sickened 1 (1 week); 

Stage 4 fatigued, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} (1 week)

Bloodeye Coffee.name: 血眼咖啡 Bloodeye Coffee
Bloodeye Coffee.description:
启动 A 交互（摄入）

豁免 DC 14 强韧

潜伏期 10 分钟

最大持续时间 8 小时

阶段 1 对 AC 与豁免获得 +1 物品加值，该加值仅适用于你因疲乏状态而承受减值的那些 AC 与豁免（10 分钟）

阶段 2 迟钝 1（1 小时）

阶段 3 无法从疲乏中恢复（1 天，之后该药物 en

Activate A Interact (Ingested)

Saving Throw DC 14 Fortitude

Onset 10 minutes

Maximum Duration 8 hours

Stage 1 +1 item bonus to AC and saves to which you are taking penalties caused by the Fatigued condition (10 minutes)

Stage 2 Stupefied 1 (1 hour)

Stage 3 can't recover from fatigued (1 day, after which the drug en

Bog Rot.name: 沼腐症 Bog Rot
Bog Rot.description:
此苦难无法被降低到低于阶段 1，并且其造成的伤害也无法被治疗，直到用 净化苦难 或类似效果成功治疗为止；之后，该苦难即可如同疾病一样正常被移除。被沼腐症杀死的生物会融化成有毒污泥，除非通过 7 环 起死回生 仪式或类似魔法，否则无法起死回生

豁免 DC 21 强韧

阶段 1 携带者，无不良效果（1 分钟）

阶段 2 3d6 虚空 伤害并获得 笨拙 1（1 天）

This affliction can't be reduced below stage 1, nor can the damage from it be healed, until it's successfully treated with Cleanse Affliction or a similar effect; the affliction can then be removed as normal for a disease. A creature killed by bog rot melts into a noxious sludge and can't be resurrected except by a 7th‑level Resurrect ritual or similar magic

Saving Throw DC 21 Fortitude

Stage 1 carrier with no ill effect (1 minute)

Stage 2 3d6 void damage and Clumsy 1 (1 day)

Filth Fever.name: 腐热症 Filth Fever
Filth Fever.description:
由腐热症导致的恶心与昏迷状态在疾病被治愈前不会自行改善。

豁免 DC 25 强韧

阶段 1 携带者，无不良效果（1d4 小时）

阶段 2 恶心 1（1 天）

阶段 3 恶心 1 且在受影响的生物保持恶心期间获得迟缓 1（1 天）

阶段 4 昏迷（1 天）

阶段 5 死亡

The Sickened and Unconscious conditions from filth fever don't improve on their own until the disease is cured.

Saving Throw DC 25 Fortitude

Stage 1 carrier with no ill effect (1d4 hours)

Stage 2 Sickened 1 (1 day)

Stage 3 Sickened 1 and Slowed 1 as long as the affected creature remains sickened (1 day)

Stage 4 Unconscious (1 day)

Stage 5 dead

Fungal Rot.name: 真菌腐症 Fungal Rot
Fungal Rot.description:
• 这种起效迅速的疾病会使微小的孢子在皮下扎根，并在肺部或血液中绽放。你会很容易气喘，且无法快速移动。在你被真菌腐症折磨期间，你无法降低你的恶心（状态）。

    • 豁免检定： DC 22 强韧

    潜伏期： 1小时

    • 阶段 1： 恶心 1 （1天）
    • 阶段 2： 迟缓 1 和 恶心 1 （1天）
    • 阶段 3： 迟缓 2 和 恶心 3 （1天）
    • 阶段 4： 昏迷 （1天）
    • 阶段 5：死亡
    • This fast-acting disease causes tiny spores to take root under the skin and blossom in the lungs or in the bloodstream. You become easily winded and incapable of moving quickly. You can’t reduce your sickened condition while afflicted with fungal rot.

    Saving Throw: DC 22 Fortitude

    Onset: 1 hour

    • Stage 1: Sickened 1 (1 day)
    • Stage 2: Slowed 1 and Sickened 1 (1 day)
    • Stage 3: Slowed 2 and Sickened 3 (1 day)
    • Stage 4: Unconscious (1 day)
    • Stage 5: death

Mummy Rot.name: 腐尸症 Mummy Rot
Mummy Rot.description:
该疾病及其造成的任何伤害在该诅咒被移除前都无法被治疗。被腐尸症杀死的生物会化为尘土，且无法起死回生，除非通过一个第7环的 起死回生 仪式或类似魔法。

豁免检定 DC 24 强韧

阶段 1 携带者，无不良效果（1分钟）

阶段 2 6d6 虚空 伤害且 目眩 1（1天）

注：该疾病本身不会杀死受腐尸症折磨的生物。死亡效果会在诅咒造成足够的虚空伤害使该生物进入濒死（状态）后生效。

This disease and any damage from it can't be healed until this curse is removed. A creature killed by mummy rot turns to dust and can't be resurrected except by a 7th-rank Resurrect ritual or similar magic.

Saving Throw DC 24 Fortitude

Stage 1 carrier with no ill effect (1 minute)

Stage 2 6d6 void damage and Stupefied 1 (1 day)

Note: the disease itself does not kill the creature afflicted by Mummy Rot. The death effect applies once the curse causes enough void damage to put the creature in the Dying condition.

Rajani Bloodline Curse.name: 拉贾尼血脉诅咒 Rajani Bloodline Curse
Rajani Bloodline Curse.description:
该诅咒一次只影响一个人。当前的受诅者是纳塔妮娅·拉贾尼，卡尔曼的母亲。

阶段

豁免检定：无——当受诅者死亡时，诅咒会自动转移至同一代中距离最近的成年拉贾尼；否则转移至下一代中距离最近的成年拉贾尼。

如果没有可用的成年人，潜伏期将不会开始，直到最年长的未成年人年满16岁。

诅咒会尝试在转移到另一代之前耗尽同一代的所有成员，但它只能转移到在受诅者死亡时位于其附近的人。它可以转移到配偶身上，但仅当这段婚姻生育了子女。

潜伏期：1年

阶段 1：对家人、恋爱对象与挚友的态度转变为不关心——1年

从此时起，当受诅者独处时该诅咒不会产生效果。此外，受诅者无法对自己造成自我伤害。

阶段 2：对朋友的态度转变为不友好＝1年，且受诅者在对抗魅力时为迟钝 2，在对抗感知时为迟钝 1。

阶段 3：对熟人的态度转变为不友好——1年，且受诅者在对抗魅力时为迟钝 4，在对抗感知时为迟钝 2。

它不会改变负面的态度。

一旦诅咒达到阶段 3，除非使用升阶至4环的净化苦难进行反制，否则将终生停留在该阶段。施法者DC：28（夜鬼婆（特征））。

This curse affects one person at a time. The current cursebearer is Natanya Rajani, Carman's mother.

Stages

Savings Throw: None - when the cursebearer dies, the curse passes automatically to the nearest adult Rajani who is within same generation; otherwise it passes to the nearest adult Rajani in the subsequent generation.

If there are no adults are available, the onset will not begin until the oldest minor is sixteen years old.

The curse will try to exhaust all members of one generation before moving to another, but it can only move to a person who is near the cursebearer at his or her time of death. It can move to a spouse, but only if the marriage produced children.

Onset: 1 Year

Stage 1: Disposition toward family members, romantic attachments and beloved friends changes to Indifferent - 1 year

From this point, the curse has no effect when the accursed is alone. Additionally, the accursed is unable to inflict self-harm.

Stage 2: Disposition toward friends changes to Unfriendly = 1 year, plus the accursed is Stupefied 2 vs. Charisma and Stupefied 1 vs. Wisdom.

Stage 3: Disposition toward acquaintances changes to Unfriendly - 1 year, plus the accursed is Stupefied 4 vs. Charisma and Stupefied 2 vs. Wisdom.

It does not change negative dispositions.

Once the curse reaches Stage 3, it remains at that stage for life unless counteracted with a Cleanse Affliction heightened to Rank 4. Caster DC: 28 (Night Hag).

Sewer Haze.name: 下水道痴呆症 Sewer Haze
Sewer Haze.description:
许多治疗者与炼金术师怀疑下水道痴呆症具有超自然的起源，因为它与格外强大的食腐兽有关。

豁免检定： DC 23 强韧

潜伏期： 2 天

  • 阶段 1： 目眩 2 （1 天）
  • 阶段 2： 衰弱 2 以及 目眩 2 （1 天）
  • 阶段 3： 衰弱 3 以及 目眩 3（1 天）

Many healers and alchemists suspect that sewer haze has a supernatural origin, given its association with particularly strong otyughs.

Saving Throw: DC 23 Fortitude

Onset: 2 Days

  • Stage 1: Stupefied 2 (1 day)
  • Stage 2: Drained 2 and Stupefied 2 (1 day)
  • Stage 3: Drained 3 and Stupefied 3 (1 day)

Belcorra's Journal.name: 贝科拉的日记 Belcorra's Journal
Belcorra's Journal.description:
这似乎是贝科拉本人所写的私人日记。

在适当的时候让这些笔记可见：

北侧书架上最大的一本书是一本大型日记，内容主要聚焦于贝科拉对艾巴萨罗姆的憎恨。它用阿克洛语写成，一位英雄花费 8 小时阅读后，会得知她的家族史——从流放至贫困，到她最终重返该地区，建造巢穴，希望以此向那座让她家族蒙羞并陷入贫困的城市复仇。日记最后几页记录了她在建造憎恨魔窟过程中的大量工作。尽管日记没有提供太多具体细节，但其中提到建造塑肉仪式实验室、为取乐而让敌人对阵怪物冠军的竞技场、牢房、拷问室、通往幽暗地域的通道，以及一座宏伟的神殿——“空无之死曾亲自擦过这脆弱的世界。”贝科拉的记录常以抽象方式谈及她的爪牙，仿佛在夸耀有多少人前来效命，协助她打造这座复合体，但她只点名提到过一位：“虚荣得可笑”的学徒，沃鲁克·阿兹里尼。最后几条记录之一描述这名学徒来自“下方一个新贵而又爱多管闲事的卓尔社群”，前来侍奉贝科拉。这些笔记未提供关于该卓尔社群的更多信息。

This appears to be a personal journal by Belcorra, herself.

Make these notes visible when appropriate:

The largest book on the northern shelf is a large journal that focuses largely on Belcorra’s hatred of Absalom. It’s written in Aklo, and a hero who spends 8 hours reading it learns of her family history from their exile to poverty and her eventual return to the region to build a lair from which she hoped to exact revenge on the city that disgraced and impoverished her family. The last several pages of the journal document much of her work in building the Abomination Vaults. While the journal doesn’t offer many specific details, it mentions construction of fleshwarping laboratories, arenas where she pitted enemies against monstrous champions for her amusement, prisons, torture chambers, links to the Darklands, and a great temple where “once the Empty Death herself brushed against this fragile world.” Belcorra’s entries often speak of her minions in the abstract, as if bragging about how many have come to serve her in creating the complex, but she only ever mentions one by name: her “amusingly vain” apprentice, Volluk Azrinae. One of the last entries describes how this apprentice arrived from “a community of upstart and meddlesome drow below” to serve Belcorra. The notes don’t provide any further information about this drow community.

Gauntlight Notes.name: 凄凉灯塔笔记 Gauntlight Notes

Grave Feasts.name: 墓地之宴 Grave Feasts
Grave Feasts.description:
发现于C36抄写间。

Found in C36 Scriptorium.

Ineffable Hauntings.name: 《不可言说的鬼故事》 Ineffable Hauntings
Ineffable Hauntings.description:
一位英雄在翻阅这套藏书时，若通过一次 @Check[type:perception|dc:20]{察觉} 检定，就会发现一本名为《不可言说的鬼故事》的薄册子，被夹在一本更大的、关于幽灵（特征）的书里。这本册子包含用于制造骚灵的 @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.c3b6LdLlQDPngNIb]{唤起死灵} 仪式的配方。它也包含对 @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.AMEu5zzLN7uCX645]{幽冥武器} 法术的一份详尽、学术性的分析。一名能够施放3级奥术或异能法术的角色，可以使用这些笔记，将自己已知的一个3级法术重训为幽冥武器，并且只需要1天的休整模式。法师则可以直接将该法术抄录进他们的法术书。这本书价值20 gp。

A hero who succeeds at a @Check[type:perception|dc:20]{Perception} while perusing this collection turns up a slender volume called Ineffable Hauntings tucked inside of a larger book about ghosts. This volume contains the formula for the @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.c3b6LdLlQDPngNIb]{Create Undead} ritual to create poltergeists. It also contains a detailed, academic analysis of the @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.AMEu5zzLN7uCX645]{Ghostly Weapon} spell. A character who can cast 3rd-level arcane or occult spells can use these notes to retrain a 3rd-level spell they know into ghostly weapon with only 1 day of downtime. A wizard can simply transcribe this spell into their spellbook. This book is worth 20 gp.

Librarian's Note.name: 图书管理员注释 Librarian's Note
Librarian's Note.description:
在 B3 - 沃卢克的卧室中发现

这封信写着如下内容：

  1. 如虫所晓
  2. 墓地之宴
  3. 颅骨之秘

誊写将花费数月时间，但我会尽快把这些书还给你，亲爱的！

Found in B3 - Volluk's Bedroom

This missive reads the following:

  1. What The Worm Knows
  2. Grave Feasts
  3. Secrets of the Skull

Transcription will take months, but I’ll try to have these books back to you as soon as possible, my love!

Pathways of the Worm.name: 《蠕虫之路》 Pathways of the Worm
Pathways of the Worm.description:
一本记载骇人仪式献祭、其目的不可知的书。发现于C37 贝科拉的阅览室。

A book of grisly ritual sacrifices for an unknowable purpose. Found in C37 Belcorra's Reading Room.

Secrets of the Skull.name: 颅骨之秘 Secrets of the Skull
Secrets of the Skull.description:
发现于C36抄写间。

Found in C36 Scriptorium.

Teleportation Network.name: 传送网络 Teleportation Network
Teleportation Network.description:
一份夹册夹在北侧书架上几本关于传送的书之间，里面包含数个深奥的图示。该夹册详述了贝科拉为在憎恨魔窟中快速移动而设置的一系列相互连接的传送法阵，并注明：若因时代推移或意外导致其力量耗尽，使用唤醒传送门仪式来重新启用它们至关重要。唤醒传送门仪式也收录在这些页面之中。

发现于 C35 绝密藏书。

A folio containing several esoteric diagrams is sandwiched between several books on teleportation on the north shelf. The folio details Belcorra's series of linked Teleportation Circles to quickly move around the Abomination Vaults, and it notes the importance of using the Awaken Portal ritual to activate them should time or mischance deplete them of power. The awaken portal ritual is included within the pages.

Found in C35 Secure Collection.

What the Worm Knows.name: 如虫所晓 What the Worm Knows
What the Worm Knows.description:
在C36抄写间中发现。

Found in C36 Scriptorium.

Azvalvigander's Key.name: 阿兹瓦维甘德之钥 Azvalvigander's Key
Azvalvigander's Key.description:
这个钥匙的原始版本属于装备类型，而不是宝藏，这意味着它很容易在装备列表中被忽略。

The original version of this key was of the Equipment type, rather than Treasure, which means it is easy to lose in equipment lists.

Book Key.name: 书籍键 Book Key
Book Key.description:
这把钥匙被装在钥匙圈上（原本是锈蚀的钥匙圈），该钥匙圈是在 A13 贝科拉的密室中发现的。

它上面有一个书本的图标。

This key was installed on the keyring (originally, the Rusted Ring of Keys) found in A13 Belcorra's Sanctum.

It has an icon of a book on it.

Lighthouse Key.name: 灯塔钥匙 Lighthouse Key
Lighthouse Key.description:
这把钥匙被安装在钥匙环上（原本是生锈的钥匙环），该钥匙环在 A13 贝科拉的圣所中被发现。

上面有一枚灯塔图标。

This key was installed on the keyring (originally, the Rusted Ring of Keys) found in A13 Belcorra's Sanctum.

It has an icon of a lighthouse on it.

Belcorra's Keyring.name: 贝科拉的钥匙圈 Belcorra's Keyring
Belcorra's Keyring.description:
注意：此物品替换原模组中的 @UUID[Item.jDszN0s4ucrnNhc9]{生锈的钥匙环}。该钥匙环上的钥匙并未以单独的装备物品呈现，但你可以在物品标签页中，凄凉灯塔额外内容文件夹内的“钥匙”文件夹中找到它们。

两把钥匙为：

@UUID[Item.QMnBWUnFldZ5EVpy]{书之钥}

@UUID[Item.CCOUOoFqnFUvGfGo]{灯塔钥匙}

当一把钥匙被放到这个钥匙环上时，它的重量变得可忽略不计。

它最多可容纳20把每把重1光亮术的钥匙，以及无限把重量可忽略不计的钥匙。

当你伸手去取一把钥匙时，你想要找的那一把总是你接下来找到的那一把。

如果你不确定哪把钥匙能打开某个特定的锁，你仍然必须通过反复尝试与出错来找到正确的那一把。

Note: This item replaces the @UUID[Item.jDszN0s4ucrnNhc9]{Rusted Ring of Keys} in the original module. The keys on this keyring were not represented by individual equipment items, but you can find them in the Keys folder within the Gauntlight Extras folder on the items tab.

The two keys are:

@UUID[Item.QMnBWUnFldZ5EVpy]{Book Key}

@UUID[Item.CCOUOoFqnFUvGfGo]{Lighthouse Key}

When a key is placed on this keyring, its weight becomes negligible.

It can hold a maximum of 20 keys that weigh one light each, and an unlimited number of negligible-weight keys.

When you reach for the a key, the one you are looking for is always the next one you find.

If you are not sure which key will open a particular lock, you will still have to find the correct one through trial and error.

Mr. Beak Doll.name: 喙先生玩偶 Mr. Beak Doll
Mr. Beak Doll.description:
这是喙先生玩偶的破碎残骸，在英雄们于A23沃卢克的工坊击败它之后留下的。

@UUID[Item.I1oZX7cQWcveXYX8]{喙先生的灵魂焦点}藏在后方的一块面板后面。

This is the broken remains of the Mr. Beak doll, after the heroes defeat it in A23 Volluk's Workshop.

@UUID[Item.I1oZX7cQWcveXYX8]{Mr. Beak's Soul Focus} is hidden behind a panel in the back.

Mr. Beak's Soul Focus.name: 喙先生的灵魂焦点 Mr. Beak's Soul Focus
Mr. Beak's Soul Focus.description:
喙先生的灵魂专注宝石位于他的背上，夹在他的翅膀之间。

Mister Beak's soul focus gem is located on his back, nestled between his wings.

Portrait of Volluk Azrinae.name: 沃鲁克·阿兹里尼的肖像 Portrait of Volluk Azrinae

Librarian's Book Satchel.name: 图书管理员的书袋 Librarian's Book Satchel
Librarian's Book Satchel.description:
这个结实的斜挎书袋看起来像是专门用来装三本厚书的。实际上，它能装下整整一书架的书。佩戴者正在寻找的那本书总会随手可得。如果佩戴者没有在找某一本特定的书，那么最后放入书袋的三本书将会可见。

它只容纳书籍、卷轴以及其他纸质物品。除此之外的任何东西都不会显得有空间可放。

要使用这个书袋，装备它并将书籍拖入容器区域。

This sturdy crossbody satchel appears to be designed to hold three thick books. In reality, it will hold an entire bookshelf worth of books. The book the wearer is seeking will always be at the ready. If the wearer is not looking for any book in particular, then the last three books that were added to the satchel will be visible.

It only holds books, scrolls and other paper items. There simply will not appear to be room for anything else.

To use the satchel, equip it and drag books into the container area.

Cooperative Blade.name: 合作之刃 Cooperative Blade
Cooperative Blade.description:
这把+1 强袭长剑的剑刃如镜面般光亮，尽管已有数千年历史却仍无任何锈蚀。

合作之刃具有以下能力，并会随持用者的等级提升：

  • 5级 - 每日一次，它可以给予一名与其持用者并肩作战的盟友与该剑的强度与强袭符文相同的增益，如同 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.R5ugeFK3MPwkbv0s]{效果：强度水晶}
  • 8级 - 它获得高等强度符文效果。
  • 11级 - 它获得高等强袭符文效果，并且可以如上所述分享额外伤害的效果，如同 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.aSRUX4WGfalK4A5J]{强度水晶（高等）}。

 

This +1 striking longsword has a mirror-like blade free of tarnish despite being millennia old.

The Cooperative Blade has the following abilities, which level up with the bearer:

  • 5th Level - Once a day, it can grant an ally who is fighting alongside its bearer the same benefits of the blade's potency and striking runes, as per a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.R5ugeFK3MPwkbv0s]{Effect: Potency Crystal}
  • 8th Level - It gains the Greater Potency Rune effect.
  • 11th Level - It gains the Greater Striking Rune effect, and can share the effects of the additional damage, as described above, as per a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.aSRUX4WGfalK4A5J]{Potency Crystal (Greater)}.

Otari's Thieves' Tools.name: 奥塔里的盗贼工具 Otari's Thieves' Tools
Otari's Thieves' Tools.description:
你需要盗贼工具来使用贼活（技能）进行开锁或解除装置（某些类型）。高等盗贼工具为开锁与解除装置的检定提供+1物品加值。

此外，奥塔里的工具具有一种特殊的惑控系效果，可减轻失败。对开锁与解除陷阱的检定出现的大失败将改为失败。

 

You need thieves' tools to Pick Locks or Disable Devices (of some types) using the Thievery skill. Infiltrator thieves' tools add a +1 item bonus to checks to Pick Locks and Disable Devices.

Additionally, Otari's tools has a special enchantment to mitigate failure. Critical failures to Pick a Lock and Disarm a Trap checks become failures, instead.

Thresholds of Truth.name: 真理的门槛 Thresholds of Truth
Thresholds of Truth.description:
扎马夫迪安的法术书《真理门槛》曾经是一部内容直白的奥术与玄秘学识论著，收录了数个实用的法术。然而，它被大量
批注，以至于原文变得难以阅读。显然，扎马夫迪安想要阻止骇物生物操控无辜的心智，但对那些追寻危险或难以参透的秘闻之人而言，这本法术书却是一座宝库。书商莫里宾特目前将此书收藏在怪谈故事之中。

《真理门槛》提供@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.vx5FGEG34AxI2dow.JournalEntryPage.JBPXisA4IdXI9gVn]{骇物研究者}变体的许可，并包含以下法术：

戏法

  • 虚空扭曲
  • 光亮术
  • 眩晕术
  • 侦测魔法
  • 电 弧击
  • 幻音术
  • 心灵遥手
  • 光亮术
  • 魔法伎俩
  • 阅读灵光
  • 护盾术

1环

  • 魔法警报
  • 魅惑术
  • 眩目彩光
  • 秘法护甲
  • 力场弹幕
  • 稳准一击
  • 幻象仆从

2环

  • 通晓语言
  • 解除魔法
  • 虚假活力
  • 显形之光
  • 蛛网术

3环

  • 加速术
  • 闪电束
  • 定位术
  • 麻痹术
  • 缓慢术

4环

  • 鹰眼术
  • 白日做梦咒
  • 弹力法球

5环

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.bay4AfSu2iIozNNW]{放逐术}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.scTRIrTfXquVYHGw]{猝死术}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gfVXAW95YWRz0pJC]{心灵联结}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.R9xqCBblkS5KE4y7]{传讯术}

6环

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.TDNlDWbYb58Y55Da]{连锁闪电}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Cpj05laa7ogqGwS3]{元素汇聚}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.r784cIz17eWujtQj]{探知术}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.uqlxMQQeSGWEVjki]{真知术}

7环

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WG91Z5TiR6oO5FOw]{应急预案}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.37ESlJzUvVbOudOT]{反转重力}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.d6o52BnjViNz7Gub]{虹光喷射y}

Zarmavdian’s spellbook, Thresholds of Truth, was once a straightforward treatise on arcane and occult lore containing several useful spells. It’s been so heavily
annotated, however, that the original text is hard to read. It’s clear that Zarmavdian wanted to prevent eldritch creatures from manipulating innocent minds, but his spellbook is a treasure trove for those seeking dangerous or inscrutable lore. The
bookseller Morlibint currently keeps this book in his collection at Odd Stories.

Thresholds of Truth provides access to the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.vx5FGEG34AxI2dow.JournalEntryPage.JBPXisA4IdXI9gVn]{Eldritch Researcher} archetype and contains the following spells:

Cantrips

  • Void Warp
  • Light
  • Daze
  • Detect Magic
  • Electric Arc
  • Ghost Sound
  • Telekinetic Hand
  • Light
  • Prestidigitation
  • Read Aura
  • Shield

1st Level

  • Alarm
  • Charm
  • Dizzying Colors
  • Mystic Armor
  • Force Barrage
  • Sure Strike
  • Phantasmal Minion

2nd Level

  • Translate
  • Dispel Magic
  • False Vitality
  • Revealing Light
  • Web

3rd Level

  • Haste
  • Lightning Bolt
  • Locate
  • Paralyze
  • Slow

4th Level

  • Clairvoyance
  • Daydreamer's Curse
  • Resilient Sphere

5th Level

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.bay4AfSu2iIozNNW]{Banishment}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.scTRIrTfXquVYHGw]{Drop Dead}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gfVXAW95YWRz0pJC]{Telepathic Bond}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.R9xqCBblkS5KE4y7]{Sending}

6th Level

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.TDNlDWbYb58Y55Da]{Chain Lightning}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Cpj05laa7ogqGwS3]{Elemental Confluence}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.r784cIz17eWujtQj]{Scrying}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.uqlxMQQeSGWEVjki]{True Seeing}

7th Level

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WG91Z5TiR6oO5FOw]{Contingency}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.37ESlJzUvVbOudOT]{Reverse Gravity}
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.d6o52BnjViNz7Gub]{Prismatic Spray}

Chafkham's Spellbook Pages.name: 查夫卡姆的法术书书页 Chafkham's Spellbook Pages
Chafkham's Spellbook Pages.description:
条目 法术 奥术预备法术
不受拘束的移动,
魅影杀手,
法术免疫,
符文陷阱,
加速术,
读心术,
朦胧术,
解除魔法,

看见不可见,

命令术,
眩晕术,

虚弱,

Chafkhem's Magic Circle.name: 查夫肯姆的魔法法阵 Chafkhem's Magic Circle
Chafkhem's Magic Circle.description:
这个魔法法阵仅对查夫肯姆生效。摘自他在《憎恨魔窟》中的日志条目：

房间中央的魔法法阵协助查夫肯姆维持魔法能量。该法阵在他进行仪式时，使其技能检定获得+2状态加值。此外，当他处于法阵内时会处于加速状态，但这额外的动作只能用于维持一个法术。

如果有机会，查夫肯姆会将这个魔法法阵誊写在从长沙发上扯下来的室内装饰布料上，并随身携带。

This magic circle is specific to Chafkhem only. From his journal entry in Abomination Vaults:

The magic circle at the center of the room assists Chafkhem with maintaining magical energy. The circle gives him a +2 status bonus to skill checks when performing rituals. Additionally, he’s quickened while within the circle but can use the additional action only to Sustain a Spell.

If given the opportunity, Chafkhem will transcribe the magic circle to uphulstery torn off of the divan, and will carry it on his person.

Earthly Tuning Fork.name: 尘世音叉 Earthly Tuning Fork
Earthly Tuning Fork.description:
这把水晶与钢制音叉用于施放位面转移法术时，将目标旅行至土位面。

This crystal and steel tuning fork is used during the casting of a Plane Shift spell that travels the target to the Plane of Earth.

Grandmaster's Missive.name: 宗师的信函 Grandmaster's Missive
Grandmaster's Missive.description:
卷轴中有如下书信：

问候！

若你找到了这封信，那么你已成功摧毁了幽魂之门。我也推想你已成功解决了沃鲁克·阿兹里尼，以及那只拴着他缰绳的可怕虚空暴食者，因为若他们任一仍活着，摧毁幽魂之门都不大可能成功。

若真如此，恭喜你。

你或许在想，这封信是否是贝科拉的某个代理人设下的诡计。请放心，我此生从未见过贝科拉；即便见过，我也绝不会同意为她效力。事实上，她的归来已相当程度地扰乱了我的行动。

就此事而言，我愿意接受你想施放的任何真实法术，而且不会因此心生芥蒂。在这种情况下，你的怀疑是合理的。

但你或许会问：我是谁？为何要费心留给你这封书信？

嗯，在凄凉灯塔的这一层有一座奇妙的斗技场。我初到这些地窖时，它令人遗憾地被荒废，甚至被一头格外骇人的巨兽般生物当作巢穴。但那家伙早已被解决，斗技场也已打理妥当，比赛重新开始！我与地城此处的掌权者达成了协议，得以随心所欲地经营这座斗技场。

不过，直到最近为止都是如此。为此，我希望我们能彼此互助。若你愿意谈谈，只需沿着恢弘长廊向下走——正前方，并穿过这卷轴对面的那扇门——直到你抵达桥边。

到了那里，为了你的安全，你应当停下，因为斗技场有可怕的守卫，能以一瞥将你杀死。只需在那儿等候，我会立刻前来，因为当你打开这卷轴时，我会收到通知。

为证明我的诚意，我随信附上一件小物品，若你不幸与石化蜥蜴发生遭遇，你或许会发现它很有用。

希望你能接受我的邀请。我们见面时，我会提供更多细节。

 

此致，

大宗师

Within the scroll is the following missive:

Greetings!

If you find this letter, then you were successful in bringing down the Ghostgate. I also imagine that you have successfully dispatched Volluk Azrinae, along with that horrible voidglutton that holds his leash, since bringing down the Ghostgate would not have been probable if either still lived.

If so, my congratulations.

You may be wondering if this letter is some trick by an agent of Belcorra. Let me assure you that I have never met Belcorra in my life, and even if I had, I would never have agreed to serve her. In fact, her return has disrupted my operations considerably.

In this matter, I am willing to submit to any truth spell you may wish to cast, and there will be no hard feelings. Your suspicion, in this instance, would be appropriate.

But who am I, you may be wondering, and why did I take the trouble to leave you this missive?

Well, on this floor of Gauntlight, there is a wonderous arena. When I first arrived to these Vaults, it was sadly neglected, and had even been used as a nesting site for a particularly monstrous behemoth of a creature. But it has long since been dispatched, the arena tidied up, and the games resumed! I have agreements with the powers that be in this part of the dungeons, and am able to operate the Arena to my heart's content.

Well, that is, I was until recently. In this, I am hoping we can be of mutual assistance to each other. If you care to chat about it, simply head down the Grand Concourse — directly ahead, and through the door opposite this scroll — until you reach the bridge.

At that point, for your own safety, you should stop because the arena has fearsome guards that can kill you with a glance. Simply wait there, and I will be along directly, because I will receive a notification when you open this scroll.

To prove my sincerity, I am enclosing a small item that you may find useful in case you do have an unfortunate encounter with the basilisks. 

I hope you will accept my invitation. I can provide more details when we meet.

 

Sincerely,

The Grandmaster

Scroll of Stone to Flesh (Level 6).name: 石化复原卷轴（等级 6） Scroll of Stone to Flesh (Level 6)
Scroll of Stone to Flesh (Level 6).description:
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Pr1ruNTbzGn3H9w5]{石化转肉身}

从卷轴施法需要用一只手持握卷轴，并以施法（行动）来启动它，使用该法术通常所需的动作数量。

要从卷轴施法，该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。因为是由你来施法，使用你的法术攻击掷骰与法术DC。该法术也会获得与你的根源相应的特征（奥术、神圣、秘法或原初）。

卷轴在制作时就已提供任何实体材料成分与花费，因此你从卷轴施法时不需要再提供它们。你必须将该法术所需的任何材料成分替换为一个姿势成分。若该法术需要一个法器，你必须持有该法器才能从卷轴施法。

注：要制作某个特定法术的卷轴或魔杖，将该法术从资料集或资料集浏览器拖入PC、NPC或战利品角色的物品栏中。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Pr1ruNTbzGn3H9w5]{Stone to Flesh}

Casting a Spell from a scroll requires holding the scroll in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell.

To Cast a Spell from a scroll, the spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack roll and spell DC. The spell also gains the appropriate trait for your tradition (arcane, divine, occult, or primal).

Any physical material components and costs are provided when a scroll is created, so you don't need to provide them when Casting a Spell from a scroll. You must replace any required material component for that spell with a somatic component. If the spell requires a focus, you must have that focus to Cast the Spell from a scroll.

Note: To create a scroll or wand of a specific spell, drag the spell from the compendium or compendium browser into the inventory of a PC, NPC, or loot actor.

Shaitan vs. Behemoth Painting.name: 沙坦对比贝希摩斯绘画 Shaitan vs. Behemoth Painting
Shaitan vs. Behemoth Painting.description:
这幅画描绘了久远以前沙伊坦与贝希摩斯之间的战斗。

（图片由必应图像创作者提供。）

This painting depects the long-ago battle between Shaitan and the Behemoth.

(Image courtesy of Bing Image Creator.)

Spells of Earthen Mystery.name: 大地奥秘法术 Spells of Earthen Mystery
Spells of Earthen Mystery.description:
这是沙伊坦的法术书。它至少包含他奥术已准备法术中的法术，以及其他一些法术。

This is Shaitan's spellbook. It holds at least the spells in his Arcane Prepared Spells, plus an assortment of others.

Aeon Stone (Polished Pebble).name: 永劫之石（抛光卵石） Aeon Stone (Polished Pebble)
Aeon Stone (Polished Pebble).description:
一颗抛光卵石元灵石使你充盈着土之力，给予你对抗擒抱或吞噬你的尝试时，强韧豁免与DC获得+1物品加值。

该石的共鸣力量使你每天一次以原初先天法术施放@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Wu0xFpewMKRK3HG8]{油腻术}。你只能以此法术指定表面，而非物体作为目标。

A polished pebble aeon stone imbues you with the strength of the earth, granting a +1 item bonus to Fortitude saves and DCs against attempts to grapple or swallow you.

The stone's resonant power allows you to cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Wu0xFpewMKRK3HG8]{Grease} as a primal innate spell once per day. You can target only surfaces, not objects, with this spell.

Alchemist Goggles.name: 炼金术师护目镜 Alchemist Goggles
Alchemist Goggles.description:
这副黄铜护目镜刻有火焰纹样，并配有厚重的镜片。

佩戴时，它使你在使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.rmwa3OyhTZ2i2AHl]{制造} 炼金物品时进行的制作检定获得+1物品加值，并且使用炼金炸弹进行攻击掷骰时获得+1物品加值。

你在使用炼金炸弹进行打击时，也可以忽略次等掩蔽。

These brass goggles are engraved with flame patterns and have thick, heavy lenses.

While worn, they give you a +1 item bonus to Crafting checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.rmwa3OyhTZ2i2AHl]{Craft} alchemical items and a +1 item bonus to attack rolls with alchemical bombs.

You can also ignore lesser cover when making Strikes with alchemical bombs.

Cantrip Deck (Full Pack).name: 戏法牌组（全套） Cantrip Deck (Full Pack)
Cantrip Deck (Full Pack).description:
为了尽可能广泛地传播魔法知识，奈西斯的崇拜者发现了一种将戏法束缚进卡牌的方法，甚至让非施法者也能使用。该牌组包含厚羊皮纸卡牌，每张约为扑克牌大小的一半。每张卡牌都以精确、直截了当的字体，仅写明其戏法名称，并依据其学派进行颜色编码。

此包包含24张卡牌——《核心规则书》中每个戏法各一张。

启动 1 或更多（构想，交互）

效果 你构想所需的戏法，使其卡牌浮至牌库顶端，并抽出该卡牌。牌组将该戏法作为1环法术施放，DC为15，法术攻击调整为+5。随着戏法生效，卡牌崩解成尘。启动所需的动作数量与施放你所选择的戏法所需的动作数量相同。

In an effort to spread the knowledge of magic as widely as possible, worshippers of Nethys discovered a way to bind cantrips into cards accessible even to non-spellcasters. The deck contains thick parchment cards, each roughly half the size of a playing card. In precise, no-nonsense script, each card simply states the name of its cantrip, color-coded based on its school.

This pack contains 24 cards-one of each cantrip in the Core Rulebook.

Activate 1 or more (envision, Interact)

Effect You envision your desired cantrip, causing its card to rise to the top of the deck, and draw the card. The deck casts that cantrip as a 1st-level spell, with a DC of 15 and a spell attack modifier of +5. The card crumbles into dust as the cantrip takes effect. The activation takes the same number of actions as the cantrip you chose takes to cast.
