Caterwaul Sling.name: 嚎叫投石索 Caterwaul Sling
Caterwaul Sling.description:
由闪亮的棕色皮革制成，这把+1 强袭投石索的索绳中交织着一根白色线。

启动 D 交互（音波）

频率 每日一次

效果 你将白色线抽出，然后以高速画圈挥舞投石索。它会发出刺耳的声浪。每个处于 @Template[type:cone|distance:30] 内的生物受到 @Damage[4d6[sonic]] 伤害（@Check[type:fortitude|dc:21|basic:true|traits:sonic] 豁免）。任何失败的生物在 1 轮内陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{耳聋}，而在大成功或大失败中的大失败时则持续 1 小时。

Made of shiny brown leather, this +1 striking sling has a single white thread interwoven into its cord.

Activate D Interact (sonic)

Frequency once per day

Effect You pull the white thread free, then whirl the sling in circles at high speed. It lets out an ear-piercing wave of sound. Each creature in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30] takes @Damage[4d6[sonic]] damage (@Check[type:fortitude|dc:21|basic:true|traits:sonic] save). Any creature that fails is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened} for 1 round, or 1 hour on a critical failure.

Ghoul Hide.name: 食尸鬼（特征） 躲藏 Ghoul Hide
Ghoul Hide.description:
由食尸鬼皮肤的碎片缝合而成，这套+1 兽皮护甲使你在对抗疾病与麻痹的豁免检定上获得+1物品加值，并使你免疫食尸鬼的麻痹。带有强韧符文的食尸鬼兽皮会使强韧符文对抗疾病与麻痹的豁免检定的物品加值提高1（最高+4）。

食尸鬼兽皮在精灵的接触下会以嘶嘶作响的仇恨低语作出反应。若由具有精灵（特征）的生物穿戴，该护甲获得嘈杂特征。

Stitched together from pieces of ghoul skin, this suit of +1 hide armor grants you a +1 item bonus to saving throws against disease and paralysis and makes you immune to the paralysis of ghouls. Ghoul hide with a resilient rune increases the resilient rune's item bonus to saving throws against disease and paralysis by 1 (maximum +4).

Ghoul hide hisses with sibilant hatred at the touch of elves. When worn by a creature with the elf trait, the armor gains the noisy trait.

Horn of Fog.name: 迷雾号角 Horn of Fog
Horn of Fog.description:
这个巨大的公羊角号角始终闪烁着细小的水滴，如同凝结的水珠。

启动 D 交互

频率 每小时一次

效果 你通过深深地向号角中吹气来启动它，使其发出低沉的号音，并施放一个2环的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9XHmC2JgTUIQ1CCm]{迷雾}法术。你可以在任何时候用交互动作在号角上吹出第二个音符来解消迷雾。

This large ram's horn perpetually glistens with tiny droplets of water, much like condensation.

Activate D Interact

Frequency once per hour

Effect You activate the horn by blowing deeply into it, causing it to issue forth a low blast and cast a 2nd-level @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9XHmC2JgTUIQ1CCm]{Mist} spell. You can Dismiss the mist at any time by blowing a second note on the horn using an Interact action.

Scroll of Conductive Weapon (Level 1).name: 导电武器卷轴（等级 1） Scroll of Conductive Weapon (Level 1)
Scroll of Conductive Weapon (Level 1).description:
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.fkUCvynklBGb4LaI]{传导武器}

从卷轴施法需要你用一只手持握卷轴，并以施法（行动）将其启动，使用该法术正常所需的动作数量。

要从卷轴施法，该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。因为你是施法者，使用你的法术攻击掷骰和法术DC。该法术也会获得与你的根源相应的特征（奥术、神圣、秘法或原初）。

任何实体材料成分与费用都会在制作卷轴时提供，因此你在从卷轴施法时不需要再提供它们。你必须将该法术所需的任何材料成分替换为姿势成分。如果该法术需要法器，你必须持有该法器才能从卷轴施法。

注意：要制作特定法术的卷轴或魔杖，将该法术从资料库或资料库浏览器拖入PC、NPC或战利品演员的物品栏中。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.fkUCvynklBGb4LaI]{Conductive Weapon}

Casting a Spell from a scroll requires holding the scroll in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell.

To Cast a Spell from a scroll, the spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack roll and spell DC. The spell also gains the appropriate trait for your tradition (arcane, divine, occult, or primal).

Any physical material components and costs are provided when a scroll is created, so you don't need to provide them when Casting a Spell from a scroll. You must replace any required material component for that spell with a somatic component. If the spell requires a focus, you must have that focus to Cast the Spell from a scroll.

Note: To create a scroll or wand of a specific spell, drag the spell from the compendium or compendium browser into the inventory of a PC, NPC, or loot actor.

Scroll of Tremorsense (Level 2).name: 震颤感知卷轴（等级 2） Scroll of Tremorsense (Level 2)
Scroll of Tremorsense (Level 2).description:
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.EAYViUegegttJF1u]{震颤感知}

从卷轴施法需要一只手持握卷轴，并以施法（行动）启动它，使用该法术通常所需的动作数量。

要从卷轴施法，该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。由于是你在施法，使用你的法术攻击掷骰和法术DC。该法术还会获得与你的根源相应的特征（奥术、神圣、秘传或原初）。

卷轴在制作时已提供所有实体材料成分与费用，因此你从卷轴施法时无需再提供它们。你必须将该法术所需的任何材料成分替换为姿势成分。若该法术需要法器，你必须持有该法器才能从卷轴施法。

注：要制作特定法术的卷轴或魔杖，将该法术从合集或合集浏览器拖拽到PC、NPC或战利品actor的物品栏中。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.EAYViUegegttJF1u]{Tremorsense}

Casting a Spell from a scroll requires holding the scroll in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell.

To Cast a Spell from a scroll, the spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack roll and spell DC. The spell also gains the appropriate trait for your tradition (arcane, divine, occult, or primal).

Any physical material components and costs are provided when a scroll is created, so you don't need to provide them when Casting a Spell from a scroll. You must replace any required material component for that spell with a somatic component. If the spell requires a focus, you must have that focus to Cast the Spell from a scroll.

Note: To create a scroll or wand of a specific spell, drag the spell from the compendium or compendium browser into the inventory of a PC, NPC, or loot actor.

Wand of Cozy Cabin (Level 3).name: 舒适小屋魔杖（等级 3） Wand of Cozy Cabin (Level 3)
Wand of Cozy Cabin (Level 3).description:
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.mwPfoYfVGSMAaUec]{舒适小屋}

这根指挥棒约有一英尺长，内含一个法术。其外观通常与其中的法术相关。

启动 施法

频率 每日一次，外加过载

效果 你以标示的等级施放该法术。

制作需求 提供一次以所列等级施放该法术。

注：要制作特定法术的卷轴或魔杖，将该法术从资料库或资料库浏览器拖入PC、NPC或战利品角色的物品栏中。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.mwPfoYfVGSMAaUec]{Cozy Cabin}

This baton is about a foot long and contains a single spell. The appearance typically relates to the spell within.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day, plus overcharge

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated level.

Craft Requirements Supply a listed-level casting of the spell.

Note: To create a scroll or wand of a specific spell, drag the spell from the compendium or compendium browser into the inventory of a PC, NPC, or loot actor.

Cynemi's Rhythm Bone.name: 赛涅米的韵律骨骼 Cynemi's Rhythm Bone
Cynemi's Rhythm Bone.description:
这块小巧的附魔骨头（通常是一块下颚骨）两端往往包着金属。通过将其敲击在坚硬表面上来启动。

启动 1 交互

效果 这块骨头开始录制接下来1分钟的环境声音（包括说话声）；这些声音需要进行DC 15或更低的察觉检定才能听见。骨头的录音不会复制魔法性的听觉效果，例如施法时的效果、鹰身女妖的歌声或女妖的哀嚎。以这种方式启动节奏骨之后，它会在其余生中保留录下的声音，并且无法再以这种方式启动。

启动 1 交互

效果 这块骨头回放其录制的声音。

制作需求 提供一次施放@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.atlgGNI1E1Ox3O3a]{幻音术}。

播放时的对话：

（窸窣声）

女人：你为什么喜欢我？

卡门：（困倦）嗯？

女人：你为什么会被我吸引？

卡门：我真的很喜欢你的尾巴。

女人：认真点。

卡门：我就是啊。

女人：（恼火地叹气）

卡门：好吧，你想要答案？那你先来。

女人：嗯……你跟我想象的一点也不一样。

卡门：真的？你为什么会期待什么呢？

女人：（慌乱）你知道……你是有名声的。

卡门：真的？跟我讲讲我那……名声。

女人：嗯，我知道你有点像个小偷和无赖……从你的名声来看……但我没想到……你竟然是这么令人印象深刻的身体标本。

卡门：所以我喜欢你是因为你的尾巴，而你喜欢我是因为我的身体。听起来我们都挺肤浅的。

女人：不只是你的身体。

卡门：那是什么？我要给你答案，我也想要个答案。

女人：我觉得你只是在拖时间，好让你想点什么出来。

卡门：我觉得你也是。

女人：你很有趣。

卡门：我很有趣？只是在床上？

女人：不。我们现在就很开心，不是吗？

卡门：我猜是吧。我就只是有趣？就这样？

女人：那你觉得呢？你觉得我想要给你生孩子吗？

卡门：我觉得你想。他们会像我一样是身体标本。

女人：而且他们可能会有我的尾巴。好吧，现在轮到你了。

卡门：我觉得你宁愿我这么做。

女人：（恼火）卡门！

（录音的剩余部分除了窸窣声之外什么都没有，偶尔夹杂几声女性的轻笑。）

This small, enchanted bone (most often a jaw) is usually capped with metal at its ends. It's activated by striking it against a hard surface.

Activate 1 Interact

Effect The bone begins recording the next 1 minute of ambient sounds (including speech) that require a DC 15 or lower Perception check to hear. The bone's recording doesn't copy magical auditory effects, such as those of spellcasting, a harpy's song, or a banshee's wail. Once the rhythm bone has been activated in this way, it retains the recorded sound for the rest of its existence and can't be activated this way again.

Activate 1 Interact

Effect The bone replays its recorded sounds.

Craft Requirements Supply a casting of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.atlgGNI1E1Ox3O3a]{Ghost Sound}.

Dialog when played:

(Rustling sound)

Woman: Why do you like me?

Carman: (sleepy) Huh?

Woman: Why are you attracted to me?

Carman: I really like your tail.

Woman: Be serious.

Carman: I do.

Woman: (exasperated sigh)

Carman: Okay, you want an answer? You go first.

Woman: Well ... you're nothing like what I expected.

Carman: Really? Why were you expecting anything at all?

Woman: (flustered) You know ... you have a reputation.

Carman: Really? Tell me all about my . . . reputation.

Woman: Well, I knew you were a bit of a thief and a scoundrel ... from your reputation ... but I didn't expect ... such a impressive physical speciman.

Carman: So I like you for your tail, and you like me for my body. Sounds like we're both pretty shallow.

Woman: It wasn't just your body.

Carman: Well then, what is it? If I'm gonna give you an answer, I want an answer too.

Woman: I think you're just stalling so you can think of something.

Carman: And I think you're doing the same thing.

Woman: You're fun.

Carman: I'm fun? Just in bed?

Woman: No. We're having fun right now, aren't we?

Carman: I guess. I'm just fun? That's it?

Woman: Well, what do you think? That I want your babies?

Carman: I think you do. They'd be physical specimens like me.

Woman: And they might have my tail. Okay, it is your turn now.

Carman: I think you'd rather I did this.

Woman: (exasperated) Carman!

(The rest of the recording is nothing but rustling sounds and an occasional feminine giggle.)

Idriniliss's Notes.name: 伊德里尼莉丝的笔记 Idriniliss's Notes
Idriniliss's Notes.description:
这些包括 @UUID[JournalEntry.OyNcqrpRClyhr8BJ]{G: 牢房} 日志中详述的信息，包括：

  • 一份第一人称日志，记录她如何来到这里、她与贝科拉会面的经过，以及一些杂记。

  • 关于她的 @UUID[JournalEntry.dHfrhlefwZxcjRj1.JournalEntryPage.3phyMR5lLyrs9k10]{针对贝科拉的复仇计划} 的细节。

  • 她凝视祭坛时获得的、令人无法理解的灵感。

  • 关于她在监狱内当前结盟对象的笔记，以及她与夏坦和贾法基的遭遇（若有）。

  • 一份用密码写成的卷轴，需要花费时代才能破译（这与 @UUID[JournalEntry.GPXU0ZLTdoTKQPui]{拉贾尼血脉诅咒} 有关）。

  • 传送门笔记：

这里有强大的入侵者，他们正在系统性地杀死这一层的所有东西。我在这里的时代有限。我已经毁掉了我唯一一份传送门仪式的副本，并计划用它加入“孩子们”，增强他们的力量。当我到达另一边后，我会再次施放它，将其封印在我身后。

 

These include the information detailed in the @UUID[JournalEntry.OyNcqrpRClyhr8BJ]{G: Prison} journal, including:

  • A first-person journal of how she got here, and who her meetings with Belcorra, plus some miscellaenous notes.

  • Details on her @UUID[JournalEntry.dHfrhlefwZxcjRj1.JournalEntryPage.3phyMR5lLyrs9k10]{Plan of Revenge for Belcorra}.

  • Incomprehensible inspirations granted by her contemplations of the altar

  • Notes on her current alliances within the prison, and her encounters (if any) with Shaitan and Jafaki

  • A scroll written in a cypher that will take time to break (this is regarding the @UUID[JournalEntry.GPXU0ZLTdoTKQPui]{Rajani Bloodline Curse}).

  • Portal note:

There are powerful intruders here, and they are systematically killing everything on this floor. My time here is limited. I have destroyed my only copy of the portal ritual and plan to use it to join the Children and bolster their strength. When I am on the other side, I will cast it again to seal it behind me.

Urevian's Papers.name: 乌瑞维安的文件 Urevian's Papers
Urevian's Papers.description:
乌瑞维安的文件内容详见 @UUID[JournalEntry.OyNcqrpRClyhr8BJ.JournalEntryPage.YSOnwMgSJVzVm31U]{G10. 乌瑞维安的领地}。

The contents of Urevian's papers are detailed in @UUID[JournalEntry.OyNcqrpRClyhr8BJ.JournalEntryPage.YSOnwMgSJVzVm31U]{G10. Urevian’s Domain}.

Wooden Shield.name: 木制护盾术 Wooden Shield
Wooden Shield.description:
尽管木制盾牌有各种形状和体型，但它们提供的防护来自其材料的坚固性。木制盾牌比钢盾更便宜，但也更容易损坏。

硬度 HP BT
3 12 6

Though they come in a variety of shapes and sizes, the protection offered by wooden shields comes from the stoutness of their materials. While wooden shields are less expensive than steel shields, they break more easily.

Hardness HP BT
3 12 6

Ghost Hunter Dedication.name: 幽灵猎手入门 Ghost Hunter Dedication
Ghost Hunter Dedication.description:
先决条件 受训于神秘学或宗教

你将训练重点放在追猎并击败幽魂、精魂，以及各种各样的作祟现象。选择精魂学识或作祟学识；你在该技能上变为受训。若你在两个技能上都已受训，则你在一项你选择的新学识（技能）上变为受训。

从神秘法术列表中选择两个戏法。每个戏法都必须具有预言系、惑控系或死灵系特征。你可以将这些法术作为天生神秘法术施法。若你之前没有获得施法（行动），你获得施法（行动）的许可。你在神秘法术攻击掷骰与法术DC上受训。你通常可以用姿势成分替代材料成分，因此你不需要法术成分包。你施放这些法术的关键施法能力为魅力。

特殊 在你从@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.vx5FGEG34AxI2dow.JournalEntryPage.LL4YD16kPqcGibKG]{幽灵猎手}变体获得另外两个专长之前，你无法选择另一个奉献专长。

Prerequisites Trained in Occultism or Religion

You have focused your training on hunting and defeating ghosts, spirits, and all manner of haunts. Pick Spirit Lore or Haunt Lore; you become trained in this skill. If you were already trained in both skills, you become trained in a new Lore skill of your choice.

Choose two cantrips from the occult spell list. Each cantrip must have the divination, enchantment, or necromancy trait. You can cast these spells as innate occult spells. You gain access to the Cast a Spell activity if you didn't have it already. You're trained in occult spell attack rolls and spell DCs. You can usually replace material components with somatic components, so you don't need a spell component pouch. Your key spellcasting ability for these spells is Charisma.

Special You can't select another dedication feat until you have gained two other feats from the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.vx5FGEG34AxI2dow.JournalEntryPage.LL4YD16kPqcGibKG]{Ghost Hunter} archetype.

Ghost Hunter's Codex.name: 幽灵猎手法典 Ghost Hunter's Codex
Ghost Hunter's Codex.description:
这本书由@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.QZD0u1jxwz0kj8uI]{法莱斯玛}的一位祭司呈交给获得她垂青之人。

经过一周的研读后，这本书将按照英雄的决定，产生下列之一的效果。

  • 它将传授幽灵猎手入门，英雄可以在下一次升级时将其加入自己的职业专长中。
  • 或者，它将立即重训一个已有的职业专长。

在这段研读期结束后，这本书将崩解为尘。

一旦此人开始追随幽灵猎手入门，他或她便可以自由地将其传授给他人。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.mkp6lhBbTASEmKwY]{幽灵猎手入门}

This book is presented by a priest of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.QZD0u1jxwz0kj8uI]{Pharasma} to one who finds her favor. 

After a one week period of study, the book will do one of the following, as the Hero decides.

  •  It will teach the Ghost Hunter Dedication, which the hero can add to his or her class feats at the next level up.
  • Or, it will immediately retrain an existing class feat.

After this period of study, the book will crumble into dust.

Once that person has begun to follow the Ghost Hunter Dedication, he or she is free to teach it to others.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.mkp6lhBbTASEmKwY]{Ghost Hunter Dedication}

Awaken Portal.name: 唤醒传送门 Awaken Portal
Awaken Portal.description:
You attempt to reactivate a dormant gate, portal, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.5ZW1w9f4gWlSIuWA]{Teleportation Circle} by infusing it with magical energies. This ritual must be successfully performed twice, once at each location the portal connects. While the teleportation circles and portals found in the Abomination Vaults require no additional cost to awaken, other portals might require rare items or specific materials as a cost for this ritual at the GM's discretion—some portals might even be so powerful that this ritual cannot awaken them at all.

The DC required to successfully awaken a portal varies based on the strength and distance between its end points. For the portals found in the Abomination Vaults Adventure Path, the DC varies according to the dungeon level on which it is located. Use the DCs by Spell Rank section of Table 10-5 to determine the DC for a portal, using the dungeon level in place of spell rank. Thus, activating the portal on the first level of the Abomination Vaults requires a successful DC 15 check, while activating the portal on the fourth level requires a successful DC 23 check. (Note: The complete table is below. -TN)

Critical Success You awaken the portal. If its other side is awakened, the portal can be used normally and won't deactivate naturally. If its other side is not awakened, this side remains awakened for 1 year, possibly allowing you enough time to find and awaken the connecting portal.

Success As critical success, but if the portal's other side is not awakened, this side remains awakened for only [[/r 1d6 #days]]{1d6 days} before it fades and falls dormant again.

Failure You fail to activate the portal, and magical backlash leaves you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 24 hours.

Critical Failure As failure, but in addition, a hostile creature is drawn through the portal and immediately attacks anyone present. The creature drawn through the portal varies, according to the portal's nature; in the Abomination Vaults, the creature conjured depends on the dungeon level where the ritual was attempted, as listed below.

  • First Level @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary-2.Actor.NQ6qRvpD9DIwVxt3]{Vampiric Mist}
  • Second Level @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.abomination-vaults-bestiary.Actor.Nkz8Z5TrEqRePGlk]{Scalathrax}
  • Third Level @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.dEAneTvoPuQXZoLR]{Gibbering Mouther}

  • Ninth Level @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary-2.Actor.MUVc2ZjwGtlpcuX1]{Gosreg}
  • Tenth Level @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.t4JYGYJqT1CaqKvh]{Shining Child}

Create Undead.name: 唤起死灵 Create Undead
Create Undead.description:
你将目标转化为一个不死生物，其等级上限如“生物创生仪式”表所允许。该仪式有许多版本，每个版本都针对某一种特定类型的不死生物（例如所有丧尸（特征）共用一个仪式、骷髅（特征）共用一个、食尸鬼（特征）共用一个，等等），而能创造稀有不死生物的仪式也同样稀有。某些不死形态（如巫妖）会通过其自身独特的方法形成，无法用任何版本的唤起死灵来创造。

大成功或大失败 成功 目标成为适当类型的不死生物。若其等级至少比你低4级，你可以使其成为一个仆从（特征）。这会使其获得仆从（特征），意味着当你对其施以命令术时，它可以使用2个动作；而对其施以命令术是一个具有听觉与专注（特征）的单动作。你最多能同时控制四个仆从（特征）。若其具有智能且未成为仆从（特征），该不死生物会因你将其唤醒而对你有帮助，尽管它仍是可怖而邪恶的生物。若其不具智能且未成为仆从（特征），你可以给予其一个简单的命令。它会一心一意地追逐该目标，无视你之后的任何命令术。

成功 同大成功或大失败 成功，但未成为你仆从（特征）的有智能不死生物仅对你友善；而未成为你仆从（特征）的无智能不死生物会放任你不管，除非你攻击它。它会在当地区域内肆虐，而非遵从你的命令术。

失败 你未能创造该不死生物。

大成功或大失败 失败 你创造了该不死生物，但其灵魂被你污秽的死灵法术折磨，心中除了对你的憎恨再无他物。它会试图摧毁你。

生物创生仪式

生物等级 所需法术阶位 成本
-1或0 2 15 gp
1 2 60 gp
2 3 105 gp
3 3 180 gp
4 4 300 gp
5 4 480 gp
6 5 750 gp
7 5 1,080 gp
8 6 1,500 gp
9 6 2,100 gp
10 7 3,000 gp
11 7 4,200 gp
12 8 6,000 gp
13 8 9,000 gp
14 9 13,500 gp
15 9 19,500 gp
16 10 30,000 gp
17 10 45,000 gp

You transform the target into an undead creature with a level up to that allowed in the Creature Creation Rituals table. There are many versions of this ritual, each specific to a particular type of undead (one ritual for all zombies, one for skeletons, one for ghouls, and so on), and the rituals that create rare undead are also rare. Some forms of undead, such as liches, form using their own unique methods and can't be created with a version of create undead.

Critical Success The target becomes an undead creature of the appropriate type. If it's at least 4 levels lower than you, you can make it a minion. This gives it the minion trait, meaning it can use 2 actions when you command it, and commanding it is a single action that has the auditory and concentrate traits. You can have a maximum of four minions under your control. If it's intelligent and doesn't become a minion, the undead is helpful to you for awakening it, though it's still a horrid and evil creature. If it's unintelligent and doesn't become a minion, you can give it one simple command. It pursues that goal single-mindedly, ignoring any of your subsequent commands.

Success As critical success, except an intelligent undead that doesn't become your minion is only friendly to you, and an unintelligent undead that doesn't become your minion leaves you alone unless you attack it. It marauds the local area rather than following your command.

Failure You fail to create the undead.

Critical Failure You create the undead, but its soul, tortured by your foul necromancy, is full of nothing but hatred for you. It attempts to destroy you.

Creatures Creation Rituals

Creature Level Spell Rank Required Cost

1 2 60 gp

16 10 30,000 gp
17 10 45,000 gp

Crimson Portal Ritual.name: 猩红传送门仪式 Crimson Portal Ritual
Crimson Portal Ritual.description:
你试图在两面墙、柱子或其他至少5'厚的坚固结构之间召唤一道屏障。

该仪式由同一段咒唱与手势序列在一小时内重复三次构成。

DC：24

大成功或成功 你创造出该传送门。

失败 你未能创造该传送门，魔法反噬使你在24小时内 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1}。

大失败 你未能创造该传送门，魔法反噬使你在24小时内 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} 且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2}。

You attempt to call into being a barriar between two walls, pillars, or other substantial structure at least 5' thick.

The ritual consists of the same sequence of chants and gestures repeated three times over the course of the hour.

DC: 24

Critical Success or Success You create the portal. 

Failure You fail to create the portal, and magical backlash leaves you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 24 hours.

Critical Failure You fail to create the portal, and magical backlash leaves you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} for 24 hours.

Hunter's Brooch.name: 猎人胸针 Hunter's Brooch
Hunter's Brooch.description:
佩戴这枚埃拉斯蒂尔的银质宗教圣徽时，你可以将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.kcelf6IHl3L9VXXg]{Vitality Lash} 戏法作为先天神圣法术施放。

启动 3 命令术，交互

频率 每日一次

效果 你将所持用的武器触碰圣徽，并说出祈求埃拉斯蒂尔沉稳之手的恳求，使该武器获得致命 d12 特征。对抗不死生物时，该武器改为获得致伤 d12 特征。此祝福持续 1 分钟，或直到你用该武器打出一次大成功或大失败，或直到你不再持用该武器为止。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.COVEnItnyRmx42EY]{效果：猎人胸针}

While wearing this silver religious symbol of Erastil, you can cast the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.kcelf6IHl3L9VXXg]{Vitality Lash} cantrip as an innate divine spell.

Activate 3 command, Interact

Frequency once per day

Effect By touching a weapon you wield to the symbol and uttering a plea for Erastil's steadying hand, you grant that weapon the deadly d12 trait. Against undead, the weapon instead gains the fatal d12 trait. This blessing lasts for 1 minute, until you score a critical hit with the weapon, or until you aren't wielding the weapon.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.COVEnItnyRmx42EY]{Effect: Hunter's Brooch}

Crimson Fulcrum Lens.name: 猩红支点镜片 Crimson Fulcrum Lens
Crimson Fulcrum Lens.description:
这枚凹透镜内有一团漂浮的猩红云雾，仿佛缓慢旋转的血液。只要你将猩红支点镜片投入，你便会因几乎无法抑制的恶意狂怒而沸腾。你对抗恐惧术效果的豁免获得+2物品加值，且你的近战打击伤害获得+2物品加值（若该近战打击为啃咬攻击，则此伤害加值提升至+4物品加值）。你也可以用下列方式启动该镜片。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.ytqvHyF0oMKbo65P]{效果：猩红支点镜片}

启动 2 交互

频率 每日一次

效果 你用一只手握住猩红支点镜片，并进行一次不需要该手的打击。该打击造成额外1d8精准伤害（若你进行一次啃咬打击，则为2d8精准伤害），且不计入你的多重攻击减值。

启动 2 交互（攻击，占据术）

效果 在握持镜片时，进行一次近战法术攻击掷骰，调整值为[[/r 1d20+18]]{+18}。命中时，你迫使镜片中宁布洛斯本质的碎片占据术该目标。你不再将该镜片投入，且目标获得如同其已将该镜片投入般的益处，但无法启动该镜片的其他能力。此效果为永久，但可被任何移除占据术效果的效果终止。在占据术效果结束前，该镜片不具备任何魔法能力；当其结束时，该本质会返回镜片。

This concave lens has a drifting crimson cloud resembling slowly swirling blood within it. While you have the Crimson Fulcrum Lens invested, you seethe with malevolent fury you can barely contain. You gain a +2 item bonus to saving throws against fear effects and a +2 item bonus to your melee Strike damage (this increases to a +4 item bonus to damage if the melee Strike is a jaws attack). You can also activate the lens in the following ways.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.ytqvHyF0oMKbo65P]{Effect: Crimson Fulcrum Lens}

Activate 2 Interact

Frequency once per day

Effect You grasp the Crimson Fulcrum Lens in one hand and make a Strike that doesn't require that hand. The Strike deals an additional 1d8 precision damage (or 2d8 precision damage if you make a jaws Strike) and doesn't count toward your multiple attack penalty.

Activate 2 Interact (attack, possession)

Effect While grasping the lens, make a melee spell attack roll with a modifier of [[/r 1d20+18]]{+18}. On a hit, you force the splinter of Nhimbaloth's essence from the lens to possess the target. You're no longer invested in the lens, and the target gains the benefits as though it had invested the lens but can't activate the lens's other abilities. This effect is permanent, but it can be ended by any effect that removes a possession effect. The lens doesn't have any magical abilities until the possession effect ends; when it does, the essence returns to the lens.

Emerald Fulcrum Lens.name: 翡翠支点镜片 Emerald Fulcrum Lens
Emerald Fulcrum Lens.description:
这块凹陷的绿色镜片布满凹坑且有瑕疵；其锯齿状边缘可能割伤不小心拿取它的人。当你投入翡翠支点镜片时，你的血肉看起来如蜡般苍白。你获得虚空治疗，且@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wdA52JJnsuQWeyqz]{伤害术}法术对你恢复的生命值获得+4状态加值。你也可以用以下方式启动该镜片。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.vlTiBE0h2kyw5J9o]{效果：翡翠支点镜片}

启动 2 交互（治疗）

频率 每日一次

效果 你用一只手握住翡翠支点镜片，恢复[[/r 30[healing]]]{30生命值}，并在1轮内对抗魔法的豁免检定获得+2物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.rH6RHxy6sNTLusKX]{效果：翡翠支点镜片（豁免检定）}

启动 2 交互（攻击，占据术）

当你握住镜片时，以[[/r d20+20]]{+20}的调整值进行一次近战法术攻击掷骰。若命中，你迫使镜片中宁布洛斯精华的碎片占据目标。你不再投入该镜片，而目标如同其已投入该镜片般获得其益处，但无法启动镜片的其他能力。此效果为永久，但可被任何移除占据术效果的效果所终止。在占据术效果结束前，该镜片不具有任何魔法能力；当其结束时，精华回到镜片中。

This concave green lens is pitted and flawed; its jagged edges can cut those who don't handle it with care. While you have the Emerald Fulcrum Lens invested, your flesh appears waxen and pallid. You gain void healing and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wdA52JJnsuQWeyqz]{Harm} spells gain a +4 status bonus to the Hit Points they restore to you. You can also activate the lens in the following ways.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.vlTiBE0h2kyw5J9o]{Effect: Emerald Fulcrum Lens}

Activate 2 Interact (healing)

Frequency once per day

Effect You grasp the Emerald Fulcrum Lens in one hand, regain [[/r 30[healing]]]{30 Hit Points}, and gain a +2 item bonus to saving throws against magic for 1 round.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.rH6RHxy6sNTLusKX]{Effect: Emerald Fulcrum Lens (Saving Throw)}

Activate 2 Interact (attack, possession)

While grasping the lens, make a melee spell attack roll with a modifier of [[/r d20+20]]{+20}. On a hit, you force the splinter of Nhimbaloth's essence from the lens to possess the target. You're no longer invested in the lens, and the target gains the benefits as though it had invested the lens but can't activate the lens's other abilities. This effect is permanent, but it can be ended by any effect that removes a possession effect. The lens doesn't have any magical abilities until the possession effect ends; when it does, the essence returns to the lens.

Ochre Fulcrum Lens.name: 赭石支点镜片 Ochre Fulcrum Lens
Ochre Fulcrum Lens.description:
这枚褐橙色的镜片无论抛光多少次，总是让人感觉蒙着灰尘、粗糙发涩，但这并不会妨碍光线穿过它。

当你将赭石支点镜片投入时，倦怠感攫住你，你的情绪也难以被动摇。你获得精神伤害抗力10，以及对抗情绪效果的豁免获得+2状态加值。

你也可以用以下方式启动该镜片。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.5KXsyN9J78glG25I]{效果：赭石支点镜片}

启动 2 交互

频率 每日一次

效果 你将手中的赭石支点镜片举起，该物品施放 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.GaRQlC9Yw1BGKHfN]{绝望灵光之潮}（@Check[will|dc:31|traits:emotion,enchantment,mental,occult] 豁免）。

启动 2 交互（攻击，占据术）

当你握持镜片时，以调整值[[/r 1d20+21]]{+21}进行一次近战法术攻击掷骰。若命中，你强迫镜片中宁布洛斯本质的一片碎屑占据目标。你不再对镜片进行投入，而目标获得如同其已投入该镜片般的增益，但无法启动镜片的其他能力。该效果为永久，但可被任何移除占据术效果的效果终止。占据术效果结束前，镜片不具备任何魔法能力；当其结束时，本质会回归镜片。

This brownish-orange lens always feels dusty and gritty, regardless of how often it's polished, though it doesn't impede light shining through it.

While you have the Ochre Fulcrum Lens invested, lassitude grips you and your emotions are hard to sway. You gain resistance 10 to mental damage and a +2 status bonus to saves against emotion effects.

You can also activate the lens in the following ways.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.5KXsyN9J78glG25I]{Effect: Ochre Fulcrum Lens}

Activate 2 Interact

Frequency once per day

Effect You hold up the Ochre Fulcrum Lens in your hand and the item casts @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.GaRQlC9Yw1BGKHfN]{Wave of Despair} (@Check[will|dc:31|traits:emotion,enchantment,mental,occult] save).

Activate 2 Interact (attack, possession)

While grasping the lens, make a melee spell attack roll with a modifier of [[/r 1d20+21]]{+21}. On a hit, you force the splinter of Nhimbaloth's essence from the lens to possess the target. You're no longer invested in the lens, and the target gains the benefits as though it had invested the lens but can't activate the lens's other abilities. This effect is permanent, but it can be ended by any effect that removes a possession effect. The lens doesn't have any magical abilities until the possession effect ends; when it does, the essence returns to the lens.

Psychopomp Mask.name: 引魂使面具 Psychopomp Mask
Psychopomp Mask.description:
这些次级魔法物品被涂绘成酷似你的面孔，或某种对其的隐喻性描绘，以鼓励死亡的引路者改为带走面具而不是你。若你在自己回合开始时的濒死（状态）值为3或更高，则你不进行复苏检定，而是失去濒死（状态），但仍在0生命值时保持昏迷。随后，面具裂成两半并被摧毁。灵魂引渡者不会再那么容易上当——你在1年内暂时免疫任何灵魂引渡者面具的效果。

These minor magic items are painted to resemble your face, or some metaphorical depiction thereof, to encourage the ushers of death to take the mask in your place. If you begin your turn with a dying value of 3 or greater, instead of making your recovery check, you lose the dying condition but remain unconscious at 0 Hit Points. The mask then cracks in half and is destroyed. The psychopomps won't be so easily fooled again-you are temporarily immune to the effects of any psychopomp mask for 1 year.

Timeline - Trail of Otari.name: 时间线——奥塔里的足迹 Timeline - Trail of Otari

Otari's Activities.name: 奥塔里的活动 Otari's Activities
Otari's Activities.text:
引言

要完整拼凑奥塔里的故事并不容易，因为它分散在三层地下城与许多日志条目之中。本日志将他的故事以时间线的方式整合起来，并附上讲述该故事的日志页面链接。我还加入了一些出自我个人想象的缺失细节。

第2层

首先，在与贝科拉的战斗中，他被卷入了一次魔法爆炸，爆炸炸出了一个塌陷坑，直通地下城第2层：

坠入塌陷坑 @UUID[JournalEntry.kDJSn9wbVvjnqYEj.JournalEntryPage.g363pURldvDgwmoc]{A08. Sinkhole}

他醒来后，沿着北侧走廊前进，并在一间洗手间里避难。在那里，他用艾瑟芙娜坚持要他学习的医疗技能处理了伤势，蜷缩在角落里，随后休息。

在洗手间休息 @UUID[JournalEntry.uMZ0RiCcPSqsx1Nm.JournalEntryPage.BHmLYQVCwzBneNFu]{B28. 闹鬼的洗手间}

稍作恢复后，他向西前进，随后发现自己与一具骸骨巨人交战：

与骸骨巨人之战 @UUID[JournalEntry.uMZ0RiCcPSqsx1Nm.JournalEntryPage.7Cs3QciAV15HwrG8]{B31. 接待室}

他杀死了它（暂时如此——它会随着时间回来），在继续沿着走廊向西前进前喝下了一瓶治疗药水。他看到了一个出口，但岸边遍布的褐霉菌让他犹豫不前。随后，他敏锐的双眼发现了暗门，于是他从B32的楼梯向下走去。

第3层

他从C10双楼梯进入了图书馆所在的楼层。他向西前进，在C06守卫室遭到三名迷雾追踪者袭击。

与迷雾追踪者之战 @UUID[JournalEntry.KeWKr2yd8dbppeS5.JournalEntryPage.AU1IGoQPqItk9Dms]{C06. Guard room}

他杀死了其中两名，但伤势严重到难以为继。于是他猛地向南冲入他看到的第一间房间。令他惊讶的是，迷雾追踪者并没有追进来。在治疗了最严重的伤势后，他休息了。

阅览室避难处

@UUID[JournalEntry.KeWKr2yd8dbppeS5.JournalEntryPage.LSGUFeDZHwsJMxev]{C03. 闹鬼的阅览室}

醒来后，他决定回到楼上，试试能否攀越褐霉菌。他认为如果能回到艾瑟芙娜身边，她可以用治疗术治好真菌可能感染他的任何疾病。

在返回楼梯的路上，他冲过守卫室进入楼梯间。他开始向上爬楼梯，但听到了河流龙兽的咆哮（现今那只的祖先）。因此，他折返了。

他在楼梯间里等待，直到迷雾追踪者回到它的岗哨。随后他穿过寂静的图书馆前行。他没有看到任何图书管理员的踪影，最终找到了通往第4层的门。

第4层

在楼梯间里，他花了一些时间为自己处理了更多伤势。他终于来到石亭，但充当垃圾处理单元的食腐怪攻击了他。他在战斗中喝下了最后一瓶治疗药水。

与食腐怪之战 @UUID[JournalEntry.Os5bHdzCDiXgJBQ6.JournalEntryPage.2GyngLCPk5da2fMK]{D16. 闹鬼的楼梯}

他成功脱身，但只能向南逃离。他跃入水中，逃进了另一处洞穴。

最终安息之地 @UUID[JournalEntry.Os5bHdzCDiXgJBQ6.JournalEntryPage.J8ggyg2kxws3Sa1h]{D18. Otari’s Doom}

他试图再次治疗伤势，但伤得太重了，而在石亭水域的游泳让他浑身湿冷。接下来的一天里，食腐怪在洞穴外围困着他，他意识到它让他染上了一种可怕的疾病。

第二天，他用尽最后的力气，取出自己的里拉琴，拨弄出一段悲伤的旋律——这旋律在过去总能带给他慰藉。

里拉琴已不复存在，但他的音乐至今仍在洞穴中萦绕不散。

Introduction

It can be difficult to pick up on Otari's story as a whole, as it is scattered across three dungeon levels and many journal entries. This journal brings his story together in a timeline with links to the journal pages that tell the story. I have added some missing detail from my own imagination.

Level 2

First, during the battle with Belcorra, he was caught in a magical blast that opened a sinkhole down to the 2nd dungeon level:

Collapse into Sinkhole @UUID[JournalEntry.kDJSn9wbVvjnqYEj.JournalEntryPage.g363pURldvDgwmoc]{A08. Sinkhole}

When he came to, he proceeded down the north hallway and took refuge in a washroom. There, he patched up his injuries with the medical skill that Aesephna insisted he learn, hunkered in a corner, and rested.

Rest at Washroom @UUID[JournalEntry.uMZ0RiCcPSqsx1Nm.JournalEntryPage.BHmLYQVCwzBneNFu]{B28. Haunted Washroom}

After recovering somewhat, he headed west, and then found himself in combat with a skeletal giant:

Battle with Skeletal Giant @UUID[JournalEntry.uMZ0RiCcPSqsx1Nm.JournalEntryPage.7Cs3QciAV15HwrG8]{B31. Reception Room}

After killing it (for now—it comes back over time), he drank a healing potion before heading down the hall to the west. He saw an exit, but brown mold all over the shoreline made him hesitate. Then, his keen eyes spotted the secret door and he headed down the stairs at B32.

Level 3

He entered the library level at C10 Twin Staircases. He headed west, and was attacked by the three mist stalkers in C06 Guard Room.

Battle with Mist Stalkers @UUID[JournalEntry.KeWKr2yd8dbppeS5.JournalEntryPage.AU1IGoQPqItk9Dms]{C06. Guard room}

He killed two of them before his injuries became too great. He then bolted to the south and into the first room he saw. To his surprise, the mist stalker did not come in after him. After treating the worst of his injuries, he rested.

Reading Room Refuge

@UUID[JournalEntry.KeWKr2yd8dbppeS5.JournalEntryPage.LSGUFeDZHwsJMxev]{C03. Haunted Reading Room}

When he awoke, he decided to go back upstairs and try his luck at climbing past the brown mold. He figures if he can get back to Aesephna, she can heal any disease the fungus may infect him with.

On his way back to the stairs, he dashed through the guard room and into the stairway. He started heading up the stairs, but heard the roar of a river drake (an ancestor of the current one). Therefore, he turned back.

He waited in the stairwell until the mist stalker returned to its post. Then he made his way through the silent library. He saw no sign of any librarian before finding the door leading down to the 4th level.

Level 4

In the stairwell, he took some time to patch up more of his injuries. He finally emerged onto the Pavilion, but the otyugh that serves as a garbage disposal unit attacked him. He took his last healing potion during the battle.

Battle with Otyugh @UUID[JournalEntry.Os5bHdzCDiXgJBQ6.JournalEntryPage.2GyngLCPk5da2fMK]{D16. Haunted Stairs}

He was able to break away, but only by heading south. He plunged into the waters and fled into another cavern.

Final Resting Place @UUID[JournalEntry.Os5bHdzCDiXgJBQ6.JournalEntryPage.J8ggyg2kxws3Sa1h]{D18. Otari’s Doom}

He tried to treat his injuries once again, but they were too great, and the swim in the pavilion waters left him wet and cold. Over the next day, as the otyugh besieged him outside the cavern, he realized that it has inflicted a terrible disease upon him.

The following day, with the last of his strength, he took out his lyre and strummed a sad tune that has always brought him comfort in the past.

Nothing of the lyre remains, but his music haunts the cavern to this day.

Version 1.0.1.name: 版本 1.0.1 Version 1.0.1
Version 1.0.1.text:
1. 修复 pf2e 系统版本；其他调整
  1. Fixed pf2e system version; other tweaks

Version 1.0.2.name: 版本 1.0.2 Version 1.0.2
Version 1.0.2.text:
1. 为 Foundry 上线做准备的一般性清理。复核并校对了每一本日志。修正或澄清了许多检定，使其更符合 PF2E 规则。收紧了故事线并填补了剧情漏洞。
  2. 这是一个大型模组，所以我可能没能涵盖所有内容。如果你发现任何问题，请在 Discord 上私信 tianze_scribe，或在 github 上提交 issue。
  1. General clean-up in preparation for Foundry launch. Reviewed and proofread every journal. Fixed or clarified many checks to better follow PF2E rules. Tightened up storylines and plugged plot holes.
  2. This is a large module so I may not have captured everything. If you find any issues, please either DM tianze_scribe in Discord or open an issue in github.

Version 1.1.0.name: 版本 1.1.0 Version 1.1.0
Version 1.1.0.text:
1. 添加了更新日志日志条目。
  2. 升级了模组和宏，使所有内容在 v12 中都能正常工作。
  3. 修复了晨花图书馆地图上的一些光亮术问题，这些问题在 v12 中更明显。
  1. Added changelog journal.
  2. Upgraded module and macros so everything works in v12.
  3. Fixed some light issues on the Dawnflower Library map that were more noticable with v12.

Version 1.2.0.name: 版本 1.2.0 Version 1.2.0
Version 1.2.0.text:
增强

  • 新增场景：H - 带额外内容的农场，包含环境音效、灯光、战利品actor、播放列表、宏和日志图钉。

  • 将拉贾尼家族诅咒加入卡曼的剧情线，包含新的诅咒苦难与一条日志条目。同时将该苦难加入纳坦雅·拉贾尼actor。

  • 加入夏伊坦的回归，包含新场景“夏伊坦的集市”、一条日志条目，以及一家商店。

  • 为贝科拉的长子新增时间线。

  • 为微灵牧师萨奎伊希新增时间线。

  • 为“贝科拉攻击”遭遇新增带有短促音效与战斗音乐的播放列表。

  • 新增一本日志，提供“贝科拉攻击”遭遇的玩法点子，并附带可启动新播放列表的宏。

修复

  • 替换了无法再构建的冒险合集。

  • 从等级7 - 牢房中部分生物的攻击里移除了已废弃的“evil”标签。仍有一些保留，但似乎未造成任何问题。

Enhancements

  • Added new scene: H - Farm with Extras, with soundscaping, lighting, loot actors, playlists, macros and journal pins.

  • Added Rajani Family Curse to Carman's storyline, with a new curse affliction and a journal entry. Also added the affliction to the Natanya Rajani actor.

  • Added the return of Shaitan, with a new scene, Shaitan's Bazaar, a journal entry, and a shop.

  • Added a timeline for the Elder Child of Belcorra.

  • Added a timeline for the wisp cleric, Sacuishi.

  • Added playlists with stings and battle music for Belcorra Attacks encounters.

  • Added a journal with gameplay ideas for Belcorra Attacks encounters, along with macros that launch new the playlists.

Fixes

  • Replaced Adventure compendium, which would no longer build.

  • Removed the obsolete "evil" tags from the attacks of some of the creatures on Level 7 - Prison. Many remain, but appear to not be causing any problems.

Version 1.2.1.name: 版本 1.2.1 Version 1.2.1
Version 1.2.1.text:
• 替换了本模组原创角色的所有标记肖像和图像。将新标记添加到所有相关场景，并将新肖像添加到相关日志中。

  • 审阅了每一本日志，并进行了各种微调和编辑。

  • 猎人胸针曾缺失——已将其加回。

  • 为与奥塔里镇相关的条目添加了一本索引日志。

  • Replaced all token portraits and images for characters that are original to this mod. Added the new tokens to all relevant scenes, and the new portraits to the relevant journals.

  • Reviewed every journal and made various tweaks and edits.

  • Hunter's Brooch was missing — added it back.

  • Added an index journal for entries relevant to the Town of Otari.

Version 1.3.0.name: 版本 1.3.0 Version 1.3.0
Version 1.3.0.text:
更新了等级8农场

  • 将等级8中对卓尔的引用改为指代洞穴精灵。

  • 将划艇改为链接角色数据，这使你的角色更容易在划艇中保存物品栏。

新增等级9狩猎场

  • 伊尔达里斯（含额外内容）

    • 伊尔达里斯贸易站 - 高等级杂货店

  • 狩猎场（含额外内容）

    • 替换黑龙的有角巨龙，含支线任务

  • 透肌魔人营地

Updated Level 8 Farm

  • Changed references to drow on Level 8 to refer them to Cavern Elves.

  • Changed the rowboat to link actor data, which makes it easier for your characters to keep inventory in the rowboat.

Added Level 9 Hunting Grounds

  • Yldaris with Extras

    • Yldaris Trading Post - high level general store

  • Hunting Grounds with Extras

    • Horned dragon that replaces the black dragon, with subquests

  • Urdefhan Camp

Version 1.3.1.name: 版本 1.3.1 Version 1.3.1
Version 1.3.1.text:
• 为夏伊坦以及第7等级上的鬼婆（特征）添加了角色图片。

  • Added actor images for Shaitan and the hags on the 7th level.

Version 1.3.2.name: 版本 1.3.2 Version 1.3.2
Version 1.3.2.text:
• 为伊尔达里斯贸易站、贫瘠之地和 Arcana Obcsura 补上了缺失的图块。这个问题对我来说是隐形的，因为所有图块都在我的游戏世界里，而不是在模组中。一个新手错误，我以前也因此吃过亏！

  • 替换了牢房等级上一些损坏且体型不正确的角色。

  • 为上述疏漏致歉，并感谢 https://github.com/chaoticnote 提供详尽的错误报告。

  • 将所有图块、地图图片和原始小场景转换为 webp，以减小文件体积并改善加载时间。

  • 替换了 Arcana Obcsura 中沙伊坦的角色。

  • 将沙伊坦的角色放置到 Lv. 5 竞技场，使石化蜥蜴可见，并微调了相关的 Glory Days 日志页面。

  • 改进了牢房等级宁布洛斯祭坛周围的黑暗化效果。

  • 为农场和透肌魔人狩猎场中携带支点透镜的角色添加了其能力。

  • 补充了一篇缺失的日志条目，内容是关于幽影 Malice 在伊尔达里斯的最后一场演出。

  • 编辑了一些日志页面。

  • Added missing tiles for the Yldaris Trading Post, the Barrens, and Arcana Obcsura. This issue was invisible to me because all the tiles were in my game world, rather than the module. A noob mistake that has burned me before!

  • Replaced some broken and mis-sized actors on the Prison level.

  • Apologies for the above oversights and thank you, https://github.com/chaoticnote, for the detailed bug report.

  • Converted all tiles, map images and original vignettes to webps to reduce file size and improve load times.

  • Replaced Shaitan's actor in Arcana Obcsura.

  • Placed Shaitan's actor in the Lv. 5 Arena, made the basilisks visibile, and tweaked the relevant Glory Days journal pages.

  • Improved the darkenss effect around the Prison-level Nhimbaloth altar.

  • Added the fulcrum lens abilities to the actors that carry them in the Farm and Urdefhan Hunting Grounds.

  • Added a missing journal entry about Shadow Malice's last show in Yldaris.

  • Edited some journal pages.

Version 1.4.0.name: 版本 1.4.0 Version 1.4.0
Version 1.4.0.text:
• 新增音效：风铃，添加到神殿内两个位置，以及奥塔里中瑞恩的商店。

  • 新增场景：J - 带额外内容的神殿，这是《憎恨魔窟》冒险路径中的最后一个场景。

    • 与贝科拉的最终战斗，包含原本的玫瑰团，以及法莱斯玛与宁布洛斯之间的对峙。

    • 为法莱斯玛及其一名摩莉甘猎魂使添加了演员图片。为法莱斯玛和宁布洛斯都添加了演员棋子（其中宁布洛斯使用了虚空暴食者的角色美术）。

    • 为法莱斯玛剧情线添加了灵魂引渡者面具

    • 添加了音效、地砖与微调以改善游玩体验与氛围，其中包括新的风铃音效。

  • 为伊尔达里斯贸易站补上缺失的商人演员。

  • 新增日志：冒险之后。

  • 在所有提及之处澄清《奥塔里的足迹》是一个独立模组（非我拥有）（感谢 chaoticnote）。

  • 由于这是我将添加到本模组中的最后一个主要场景，我通过审查每个场景与日志进行了整理。我修复了大量可能让你感到烦恼的文本与连续性问题。

    • 我仍预计会在未来发布更新来修复漏洞，并使本模组跟上系统与 Foundry 的变更；并且在未来的跑团中，我也可能会有新想法，从而带来新的更新。

  • Added new sound: wind chimes, to two places in the Temple and to Wrin's Shop in Otari.

  • Added scene: J - Temple with Extras, the last scene in the Abomination Vaults Adventure Path.

    • Final battle with Belcorra that includes the original Roseguard and a confrontation between Pharasma and Nhimbaloth.

    • Added actor image for Pharasma and one of her morrignas. Added actor tokens for both Pharasma and Nhimbaloth (where I used the character art for the voidglutton).

    • Added psychopomp mask for the Pharasma storyline

    • Added sounds, tiles and tweaks to improve gameplay and ambiance, including the new wind chime sound.

  • Added missing merchant actor to Yldaris Trading Post.

  • Added new journal: After the Adventure.

  • Clarified that Footsteps of Otari is a separate module (not owned by me) wherever I reference it (thanks, chaoticnote).

  • Since this is the last major scene I am adding to this module, I tidied up by reviewing every scene and jouranl. I fixed a bunch of textual and continuity issues that might have been annoying you.

    • I still expect to issue future updates to address bugs and to keep this module up with system and Foundry changes, and I may have new ideas in future play-throughs that result in new updates.

Version 2.0.0.name: 版本 2.0.0 Version 2.0.0
Version 2.0.0.text:
• 在凄凉灯塔的每个等级中都添加了一个场景区域，以更好地控制黑暗。

  • 添加了一个宏，用于在第7等级打开和关闭通往首领领域的传送门。

  • 添加了一个宏，用于在第8等级将一块船只图块替换为一个船只角色。

  • 将难看的旧宏替换为从憎恨魔窟宏改编的宏。

  • 将第6与第9等级中幽影恶意乐队演奏位置的幽影恶意阶段灯光，更改为新的反应式脉冲灯光。

  • 在狩猎场日志的导言中添加了关于与贝科拉最终之战的信息，以便为这场战斗推动一切展开。

  • 对所有日志进行了重大编辑审阅，修复问题并澄清内容。这包括从日志中移除所有“即将到来的等级”的表述，因为这些等级现已完成。我希望我终于把它们都找出来了。

  • Added a scene region to every Gauntlight level, to better control the darkness.

  • Added a macro to open and close the portal to the boss domain in the 7th level.

  • Added a macro to exchange a boat tile on the 8th level for a boat actor.

  • Replaced ugly old macros with ones adapted from Abomination Vaults macros.

  • Changed Shadow Malice stage lights to the new reactive pulse lights in the places on Levels 6 and 9, where the Shadow Malice band plays.

  • Added information about the final battle with Belcorra to the introduction for the Hunting Grounds journal, in order to set everything in motion for the battle.

  • Made a major editorial pass through all journals, fixing issues and clarifying things. This included removing all instances of "upcoming levels" in the journals since those levels are now complete. I hope I finally got them all.

Rajani Bloodline Curse.name: 拉贾尼血脉诅咒 Rajani Bloodline Curse

Overview.name: 概览 Overview
Overview.text:
引言

在我与我的英雄们一同深入《憎恨魔窟》的过程中，我感觉拉贾尼家族一定是被诅咒了。

门赫姆斯家族兴旺发达，子女众多且拥有庞大的家族庄园；而拉贾尼家族几乎只剩下铁匠铺，似乎也只剩卡尔曼一人。

本日志详述拉贾尼血脉诅咒，以及它可能被打破的方式。

诅咒的可能来源

以下任一情况都可能对拉贾尼家族施加了诅咒，使其衰败成昔日的幽影：

  • 在原始故事中，那位想让乌瑞维安交付卡尔曼灵魂的存在，早在很久以前就诅咒了这个家族。也许如今卡尔曼是最后的在世后裔，并且看起来不太可能繁衍子嗣，因此那个存在现在想要他的灵魂，以便能无休止地延续折磨。诅咒也有助于让潜在的妻子远离。

  • 在本模组的第7等级修订中，有一个鬼婆（特征）集会，最初的玫瑰团通过杀死其中一名成员而将其瓦解。他们杀死的那名鬼婆（特征）是集会中最强大的成员——一名夜鬼婆（特征）。

    • 玫瑰团以某种方式设法在鬼婆（特征）落单时逮到她。也许他们成功欺骗了她。

    • 在随后的战斗中，沃尔·拉贾尼冷酷而高效地使用了她的“妙语连珠”能力，使鬼婆（特征）陷入彻底的暴怒，并阻止她逃离——若非如此她本可能会逃走。

    • 鬼婆（特征）临死之际，对她进行报复，施放了血脉诅咒。

无论哪种情况，诅咒直到她的长子成年后才开始生效。

对拉贾尼家族的影响

尽管沃尔最终确实结婚，但她的第一个孩子是在婚外出生的，因此奠定了拉贾尼王朝。

起初拉贾尼家族繁荣昌盛，但诅咒在未彻底击垮家族的情况下持续蚕食其根基。数百年来，他们一方面积累财富，另一方面又在诅咒接连打击一代又一代继承人时将其挥霍殆尽。

家族产业从镇子北端的大型庄园，缩水为伊瓦什提街南侧相邻地块上的两栋房屋与一间铁匠铺。

尽管诅咒并不影响繁衍子嗣的能力，它却影响婚姻与寿命，直到当代，卡尔曼成为唯一幸存的继承人。

Introduction

It seemed to me, as I progressed along in Abomination Vaults along with my heroes, that the Rajani family must have been cursed.

While the Menhemes family is thriving, with lots of children and a sprawling family estate, the Rajani family owns little but the smithy, and only Carman seems to be left.

This journal details the Rajani Bloodline Curse, and how it might be broken.

Possible Sources of the Curse

Either of the following put a curse upon the Rajani family, which reduced it to a shadow of what it once was:

  • In the original story, whatever entity that wanted Urevian to deliver Carman's soul cursed the family long ago. Perhaps now that Carman is the last surviving descendant, and seems unlikely to produce progeny, the entity now wants his soul so it can continue its torment indefinitely. The curse helps keep potential wives away.

  • In this module's Level 7 revisions, there is a coven of hags that the original Roseguard broke up by killing one of the members. The hag that they killed was the most powerful member of the coven, a night hag.

    • The Roseguard was somehow able to catch the hag alone. Perhaps they were able to trick it.

    • During the ensuing battle, Vol Rajani mercilessly and effectively used her Bon Mot ability, driving the hag to an absolute rage, and preventing her from fleeing, as she might otherwise have done.

    • As the hag died, it took revenge upon her by casting the bloodline curse.

In either case, the curse did not take effect until her firstborn child became an adult.

Effect on the Rajani Family

Although Vol eventually did marry, her first child was born out-of-wedlock, and thus founded the Rajani dynasty.

At first the Rajani family prospered, but the curse has taken its toll without defeating the Rajani family entirely. Over the centuries, they both built up wealth and then squandered it away as the curse struck heir after heir.

The family property diminished from a large estate at the north end of town, to two houses and the smithy south on adjoining properties on the south side of of Ilvashti Street.

Although the curse did not affect the ability to produce progeny, it affected marriages and lifespans until, in the current generation, Carman is the only surviving heir.

Breaking the Curse.name: 打破诅咒 Breaking the Curse
Breaking the Curse.text:
虽然破除诅咒的 DC 很高，但破除方法很直接。

要破除诅咒，必须通过若干次成功的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.SUKaxVZW2TlM8lu0]{净化苦难} 施放来成功反制，使阶段降至 0。

反制：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.SUKaxVZW2TlM8lu0]{净化苦难} 升阶至 4 级。施法者 DC：28（@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.WQy7HBUcgDLsfVJd]{夜鬼婆}）。

按规则原文，你在每个已升阶的法术环阶上只能施放此类法术一次，所以一名 7 级牧师即使反制成功，也要等到 9 级才能再次施放，然后到 11 级才能再施放一次。

在我自己的游戏中，我选择将其放宽为每个施法者等级可施放一次，这样就能让卡尔曼的故事在终局之前得到解决。

Although the DC to break the curse is challenging, it is straightforward to break.

To break the curse, it must be successfully counteracted with a number @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.SUKaxVZW2TlM8lu0]{Cleanse Affliction} castings, to reduce the Stage to 0.

Counteract: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.SUKaxVZW2TlM8lu0]{Cleanse Affliction} heightened to Level 4. Caster DC: 28 (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.WQy7HBUcgDLsfVJd]{Night Hag}).

The rules as written state that you can only cast such a spell once per heightened spell rank, so a level 7 cleric who succeeded in a counteract would not be able to cast it again until level 9, and then again at level 11.

In my own game, I chose to relax this to one spell per caster level, which allows Carman's story to resolve before the endgame.

Rajani Bloodline Curse.name: 拉贾尼血脉诅咒 Rajani Bloodline Curse
Rajani Bloodline Curse.text:
这个诅咒一次只影响一人。当前的诅咒承受者是娜坦雅·拉贾尼，卡尔曼的母亲。

阶段

豁免：无——当诅咒承受者死亡时，诅咒会自动传给同一代中距离最近的成年拉贾尼；否则传给下一代中距离最近的成年拉贾尼。

如果没有可用的成年人，潜伏期在最年长的未成年人年满十六岁之前不会开始。

诅咒会试图在转移到另一代之前耗尽同一代的所有成员，但它只能转移到在诅咒承受者死亡时靠近其身边的人。它也可以转移到配偶身上，但仅限于该婚姻育有子女的情况。

潜伏期：1 年

阶段 1：第一年后，对家庭成员、恋爱对象与挚爱朋友的态度变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fuG8dgthlDWfWjIA]{不关心}

从此刻起，当受诅咒者独处时，诅咒不产生效果。此外，受诅咒者无法对自己造成自我伤害。

阶段 2：第二年后，对朋友的态度变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.I1ffBVISxLr2gC4u]{不友好}；此外，受诅咒者在对抗魅力时为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 2}，在对抗感知时为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 1}。

阶段 3：第三年后，对熟人的态度变为 不友好——1 年；此外，受诅咒者在对抗魅力时为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 4}，在对抗感知时为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 2}。

它不会改变负面的态度。

由于魅力与感知不断下降，受诅咒者的行为会逐渐变得更加糟糕。

一旦诅咒到达阶段 3，除非以升阶至 4 级的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.SUKaxVZW2TlM8lu0]{净化苦难} 进行对抗，否则它将终生维持在该阶段。豁免 DC：28（@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.WQy7HBUcgDLsfVJd]{夜鬼婆（特征）}）。

This curse affects one person at a time. The current cursebearer is Natanya Rajani, Carman's mother.

Stages

Savings Throw: None - when the cursebearer dies, the curse passes automatically to the nearest adult Rajani who is within same generation; otherwise it passes to the nearest adult Rajani in the subsequent generation.

If there are no adults are available, the onset will not begin until the oldest minor is sixteen years old.

The curse will try to exhaust all members of one generation before moving to another, but it can only move to a person who is near the cursebearer at his or her time of death. It can move to a spouse, but only if the marriage produced children.

Onset: 1 Year

Stage 1: After the first year, disposition toward family members, romantic attachments and beloved friends changes to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fuG8dgthlDWfWjIA]{Indifferent}

From this point, the curse has no effect when the accursed is alone. Additionally, the accursed is unable to inflict self-harm.

Stage 2: After the second year, disposition toward friends changes to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.I1ffBVISxLr2gC4u]{Unfriendly}, plus the accursed is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} vs. Charisma and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} vs. Wisdom.

Stage 3: After the third year, disposition toward acquaintances changes to Unfriendly - 1 year, plus the accursed is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 4} vs. Charisma and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} vs. Wisdom.

It does not change negative dispositions.

Due to declining charasma and wisdom, the behavior of the acurrsed one gradually gets more terrible.

Once the curse reaches Stage 3, it remains at that stage for life unless counteracted with a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.SUKaxVZW2TlM8lu0]{Cleanse Affliction} heightened to Level 4. Save DC: 28 (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.WQy7HBUcgDLsfVJd]{Night Hag}).

Natanya Rajani.name: 娜塔妮娅·拉贾尼 Natanya Rajani
Natanya Rajani.text:
娜坦娅在十七岁时嫁给了卡尔曼的父亲沃尔特·拉贾尼。他们的婚姻曾经幸福美满，直到沃尔特的父亲在铁匠铺的一场事故后去世，沃尔特继承了诅咒。那时卡尔曼十一岁。

到卡尔曼十四岁时，诅咒已完全发挥效果。他的青少年时期因父亲日益恶化的行为而动荡不安。沃尔特试图把自己的铁匠手艺教给卡尔曼，但卡尔曼最终学到的本事却来自沃尔特的一位长期忍受折磨的雇员。

沃尔特的行为招来了仇敌。卡尔曼十九岁时，沃尔特在一次前往艾巴萨罗姆的旅途中，于街头被人持刀刺死。

娜坦娅对丈夫日渐恶化的行为感到困惑，但她一直陪伴他直到最后。如今，她也同样对自己的行为感到困惑。

她讨厌独处，因为独处时她必须面对自己行为的后果。她独自一人时常常一边哭泣一边写下发自肺腑的道歉信。然而，由于她无法表现得像是真心道歉，这些道歉往往会产生负面效果。

卡尔曼

卡尔曼记得更快乐的时光。若不是母亲每晚的哭泣，他几乎会怀疑她是否真的在乎过他。他过去总会在听到她哭泣时尝试与她交谈，但她在他开口时总会表现得同样刻薄。第二天早上，他会发现她留下的道歉便条，可一旦他们面对面，她又会否认便条里写的一切。

他认为她疯了。他把房子交给她居住，而自己住在锻炉上方的一间房里。他把另一栋房子租给了自己的一名铁匠。

她不需要看护，因为她才五十多岁。他相信自己总有一天注定要照料她，因为再也不会有别人愿意忍受她的行为。

诅咒的进程

以下是它如何影响她对家人和朋友的态度：

  • 起初，她与卡尔曼以及她最亲密的朋友塔米莉·坦德威尔的关系开始变质。

  • 第二阶段毁掉了她与艾娜拉·门赫梅斯、布雷达·范克维尔的友谊，以及“口渴的羊驼”酒馆老板娘的友谊——那位老板娘在酒馆倒塌事件中身亡。

  • 在这段时间里，她的魅力与感知力下降，使她结交新朋友的能力降低。

  • 第三阶段使她与镇上大多数其余年长居民疏远，唯有瓦布·查泰尔例外——而她本来就对他不友好。

  • 此时她魅力与感知力的下降已使她对所遇到的每个人都显得极其令人反感且粗暴。

由于这诅咒的表现就像逐步堕入疯狂，镇上无人猜到究竟发生了什么，而拉贾尼家族长期以来一直被认为天生容易发疯。

Natanya married Carman's father, Volt Rajani, when she was seventeen. Their marriage was happy until Volt's father died after an accident at the smithy, and Volt inherited the curse. Carman was eleven at the time.

The curse was in full effect by the time Carman was fourteen. HIs teenage years were tumultuous due to his father's declining behavior. Volt tried to teach Carman his trade as a blacksmith, but Carman ended up learning what he knows from one of Volt's long-suffering employees.

Volt's behavior brought on enemies. He was knifed in the streets during a trip to Absalom when Carman was nineteen.

Natanya was bewildered by her husband's declining behavior, but she stuck with him until the end. Now, she is equally bewildered by her own behavior.

She hates being alone, because that is when she must face the consequences of her actions. When she is alone, she is often weeping and writing heartfelt apologies. However, since she is unable to act as if her apology is sincere, these apologies often have a negative effect.

Carman

Carman remembers happier times. If it were not for his mother's nightly weeping sessions, he would wonder if she cared anything about him at all. He used to try to talk to him whenever he heard her weeping, but she always acted just as spiteful when he did. The next morning, he would find her notes of apology, but once they were face to face, she would repudiate everything her note said.

He thinks she is insane. He has given the house over to her and he lives in a room over the forge. He leases the other house to one one of his smiths.

She does not need a caretaker because she is only in her mid-fifties. He believes he is doomed to looking after her one day, because there will be no one else who would suffer her behavior.

Progression of the Curse

Here is how it affected her dispositions toward her family and friends:

  • First, her relationship with Carman and her closest friend, Tamily Tanderveil, began to sour.

  • Stage Two ruined her friendship with Emnala Menhemes and Brelda Venkervale, and the wife of the owner of the Thirsty Alpaca, who died in the tavern collapse.

  • Her charisma and wisdom declined during this time, decreasing her ability to form new friendships.

  • Stage Three alienated her from most of the rest of the older town citizens, except Wrab Chertel, to whom she was already unfriendly.

  • Her decrease in charisma and wisdom by now made her very off-putting and abrasive to everyone she met.

Because the curse behaves like a gradual descent into insanity, no one in town has guessed what is going on, and the Rajani family has long been thought to be prone to insanity.

Tianze's Gauntlight Extras.name: 天择的凄凉灯塔额外内容 Tianze's Gauntlight Extras

Introduction.name: 引言 Introduction
Introduction.text:
天则的凄凉灯塔扩展内容（Tianze's Gauntlight Extras）是一组旨在增强 Paizo 的憎恨魔窟冒险路径（常简称为 AV）游戏体验的内容合集。

它包含该冒险路径中每个场景的注释版与音景版，以及额外的支线任务、扩展剧情线和 NPC 时间线。

要使本模组正常运作，必须安装憎恨魔窟冒险路径的 Foundry 模组。本模组中的许多场景、演员、日志和物品都会直接指向憎恨魔窟模组文件夹中的资源。

随本模组发布的资源使用了多种工具制作：

  • 原始地图使用 DungeonDraft 制作，并使用了 Forgotten Adventures 的资源。

  • 小插图、角色图与指示物使用下列任一工具制作：

    • Bing Image Creator（使用我自己编写的提示词）

    • Affinity Designer and Photo

    • Faststone Image Viewer

    • 风铃音效：由 freesound_community 提供，来源于 Pixabay

2.0 版本 - V13 与场景区域更新

很抱歉 v13 更新拖了这么久。我手头有很多正在进行的项目不想搁置，同时我也在参与自己的一些游戏。:)

在此版本中，我决定利用场景区域的改进，为每一个凄凉灯塔场景（以及喧闹的石斑鱼）都制作区域，以便更好地控制光照等级。在我自己的跑团过程中，我经常发现自己在和随一天中的时间变化而改变的光照等级“搏斗”，并且很难让系统把“地下”区域保持为不被照亮。也许为场景区域做得有些过头了，但至少它们能稳定地起作用。

另见 @UUID[JournalEntry.W9M9HrZ2lFWQ1uLY]{注意！场景区域黑暗}。

我还使用新的“声音反应脉冲”，让幽影恶意（Shadow Malace）的灯光随音乐节拍脉动。注意：在你或某位玩家的高亮指示物进入该声音半径范围之前，灯光不会激活。

概览

本模组包括：

  • 以下地点的全新原创场景：

    • 晨花图书馆

    • 喧闹的石斑鱼

    • 隐秘空地

    • Arcana Obcsura（故意拼错）

    • 凄凉灯塔扩展内容登陆页（用于纯叙事战斗/心象戏法式游玩）。

  • 憎恨魔窟随附的每一个场景的全新版本，包含音景、额外照明、游戏建议、图块，以及指向相关憎恨魔窟小插图的地图图钉。这些场景指向重制后的地图。

  • 一本用于整理憎恨魔窟随附所有小插图的日志。

  • 用于详细说明所有地图改动的日志，包括一份全面的改动清单。

  • 为奥塔里新增的演员，以及憎恨魔窟随附的每一位奥塔里市民肖像（及其关联的指示物美术）的演员。

  • 为凄凉灯塔地下城新增的演员，包括一个替代的牢房等级首领、她的盟友、竞技场的主持人、战利品箱，以及一名待救的受害者。

  • 一伙与玩家竞争的冒险者帮派，以及他们的悲剧故事。

  • 玫瑰团每位成员的幽灵版本，包含延续到不死状态的技能与法术，以及他们扩展后的故事。

  • 用于整理魔窟中大量钥匙与书籍的便捷魔法物品，这将有助于保持游戏主持人的理智，也同样能帮到玩家。

  • 一个效果文件夹，用于英雄在冒险中可能感染的各种长期苦难。

  • 对部分已被击杀的怪物与首领的再动画版本——非常适合那些喜欢复活死者的反派。

所有内容都整理在一个冒险资料库（Adventure compendium）中，便于安装。

更完整的新增与改动清单请参见 @UUID[.BwK8VkoFkLMFGvpp]{改动列表}。我在制作本模组时尽量将所有内容逐条列出，但可能仍有遗漏。

Tianze's Gauntlight Extras is a collection of of content designed to enhance the gameplay of Paizo's Abomination Vaults Adventure Path (often abbreviated to AV).

It includes annotated and soundscaped versions of each scene in the adventure path, plus additional side quests, expanded storylines, and NPC timelines.

The Abomination Vaults Adventure Path Foundry module is required for this mod to function. Many of the scenes, actors, journals and items in this module points directly to assets in the Abomination Vaults module folder.

Assets shipped with this module were created using several tools:

  • Original maps were created with DungeonDraft using assets from Forgotten Adventures.

  • Vignettes, character art and tokens were created using any of these:

    • Bing Image Creator using prompts written by myself

    • Affinity Designer and Photo

    • Faststone Image Viewer

    • Wind Chime Sound Effect by freesound_community from Pixabay

Version 2.0 - V13 and Scene Region Update

Apologies for the long delay in getting a v13 update out there. I had a lot of projects that I was in the middle of, that I did not want to set aside, plus I was involved in my own games. :)

For this release, I decided to take advantage of the improvements to the scene regions to make regions for every Gauntlight scene, plus the Rowdy Rockfish, to better control the light level. During my own playthrough, I constantly found myself fighting with the light levels that change with the time of day, and the difficulting in getting the system to leave "underground" areas unlit. Perhaps the scene regions are overkill,but at least they consistently work.

See also @UUID[JournalEntry.W9M9HrZ2lFWQ1uLY]{NOTE! Scene Region Darkness}.

I also made the lights for Shadow Malace pulse in time with the music, using the new sound-reactive pulse. Note: the lights will not activate until you or a player have a highlighted token within the sound's radius.

Overview

This module includes:

  • New original scenes for:

    • Dawnflower Library

    • Rowdy Rockfish

    • Secluded Clearing

    • Arcana Obcsura (deliberately misspelled)

    • Gauntlight Extras Landing, for theater of mind play.

  • A new version of every scene that shipped with Abomination Vaults, with soundscapes, additional lighting, gameplay suggestions, tiles, and map pins to relevant Abomination Vaults vignettes. These scenes point to the remade maps.

  • A journal that organizes every vignette that shipped with Abomination Vaults.

  • Journals detailing all changes to maps, including a comprehensive list of changes.

  • New actors for Otari, plus actors for each Otari citizen portrait (and associated token art) that shipped with Abomination Vaults.

  • New actors for the Gauntlight dungeons, including an alternate Prison level boss, her allies, a Gamesmaster for the Arena, loot boxes, and a victim to rescue.

  • A competing adventurer gang, and their tragic story.

  • Ghostly versions of each member of the Roseguard, with skills and spells that persisted into their undeath, and their expanded story.

  • Convenient magic items to organize the many keys and books found in the Vaults, which will help preserve the gamemaster's sanity as well as the players.

  • A folder of effects for the various longterm afflictions the heroes may contract while on the adventure.

  • Reanimations of select once-killed monsters and bosses, handy for villains who like to raise dead.

Everything is organized in an Adventure compendium for easy installation.

See @UUID[.BwK8VkoFkLMFGvpp]{List of Changes} for a more comprehensive list of everything I added and changed. I tried to itemize everything as I was building this module, but there may be gaps.

But What if I Don't Like Some of Your Co.name: 但如果我不喜欢你的一些内容呢？ But What if I Don't Like Some of Your Content?
But What if I Don't Like Some of Your Co.text:
没问题！你有两个选项：

  • 使用《憎恨魔窟》中的原始场景。我没有办法更改那里的任何内容。

  • 如果你想要声音、光亮术、晕影地图图钉以及其他增强内容，但不想要某个特定场景中的部分或全部内容，那么绝大多数更改都在这些地方：

    • 等级 3

      • C15 灯塔阅览室 - actor（KraDup）

    • 等级 5

      • E01 Upper Shaft - tiles

      • E09 精英包厢 - tiles

      • E26 竞技场区域 - tiles

    • 等级 6

      • F10 囚犯审讯室 - tiles and actors

      • F11 瞎酿酒馆酒馆 - lighting and tiles，actor（NoxAg）以及阶段上的乐队

      • F25 Main Lab - tiles，actor（PipNee）

      • F26 竞技场区域 - tiles

    • 等级 7

      • G10 乌瑞维安的领域 - tiles，actors（Idriniliss 以及她的微灵），lights

      • G11 交叉口 - lighting，actors（鬼婆（特征））

    • 等级 9 伊尔达里斯

      • 伊尔达里斯交易站

      • 贫瘠之地中的洞穴墙壁

  • 查看“更改列表”以获得更全面的清单，并查看相关区域的各个日志。

  • 我移除的任何生物实际上仍然在场景中，可以在地图边缘、靠近相关房间的位置找到。

No problem! You have two options:

  • Use the original scene from Abomination Vaults. I have no way of changing anything there.

  • If you want the sounds, lights, vignette map pins, and other enhancements, but you don't want some or all of the content for a particular scene, then the vast majority of changes are in these places:

    • Level 3

      • C15 Gauntlight Reading Room - actor (KraDup)

    • Level 5

      • E01 Upper Shaft - tiles

      • E09 Elite Viewing Room - tiles

      • E26 Arena area - tiles

    • Level 6

      • F10 Prisoner Processing - tiles and actors

      • F11 Warped Brew Tavern - lighting and tiles, actor (NoxAg) and band on stage

      • F25 Main Lab - tiles, actor (PipNee)

      • F26 Arena area - tiles

    • Level 7

      • G10 Urevian's Domain - tiles, actors (Idriniliss and her wisps), lights

      • G11 Nexus - lighting, actors (hags)

    • Level 9 Yldaris

      • Yldaris Trading Post

      • Cavern walls in the Barrens

  • See the List of Changes for a more comprehensive list, and the individual journals for the areas in question.

  • Any creatures that I removed are actually still in the scenes, and can be found in the margins of the map near the room in question.
