Recommended Modules and Services.name: 推荐的模块与服务 Recommended Modules and Services
Recommended Modules and Services.text:
我想借此机会感谢并推荐这些模组和服务的创作者，以及配套模组。

付费模组

  • 奥塔里的麻烦，是 Paizo 推出的一系列短篇冒险，全部发生在奥塔里及其周边区域。

  • Pathfinder Token Pack: Bestiaries 是一套价格略高但内容全面的代币合集，涵盖各本图鉴中的许多生物。它会自动为生物应用正确的代币。而且他们也在持续随 Remaster 的改动保持更新。

  • Mercenary Marketplace：一个极佳的方式，用于构建基于 PC 角色职业、工作与定位的分级 NPC。完全值得这个价格。

免费模组

  • PF2e a shopping experience 是一个很棒的小型内容模组：其中一套是为奥塔里商人准备的预设商店，另一套则是适用于任何战役的分级预设商店。

  • Item Piles。我强烈推荐使用这个模组，为商人 actor 带来更多便利与自动化。我太喜欢这个模组了，甚至差点把它作为本模组的依赖。

  • 或者，Pf2e Toolbelt 现在已经包含了商人工具，让你直接与商人 actor 进行买卖变得极其简单。

  • Wall Height，用于便于在狩猎场的狩猎小屋中使用屋顶。

  • Tianze's Landing Page，这是我最新的模组。它只是一些场景叠加层和用于构建落地页的说明。极其简单。

其他服务

  • RollAdvantage 的 Token Stamp 可以从任何图片创建代币。该服务快速且优秀。

I would like to take this opportunity to thank and recommend the creators of these modules and services, in addition to the companion modules.

Paid Modules

  • Troubles in Otari, is a series of short adventures from Paizo, which all take place in Otari and in the surrounding areas.

  • Pathfinder Token Pack: Bestiaries is a somewhat pricey but comprehensive set of tokens for many creatures in the various bestiaries. It automatically applies the correct token to the creatures. And, they are keeping it up-to-date with the remaster changes.

  • Mercenary Marketplace: A terrific way to build leveled NPCs that are based on PC character classes, jobs and roles. Well worth the price.

Free Modules

  • PF2e a shopping experience is a sweet little content module with one set of prebuilt shops for Otari merchants, and another set of leveled prebuilt shops suitable for any campaign.

  • Item Piles. I highly recommend the use of this module to bring more convenience and automation to the merchant actors. I liked this module so much that I almost included it as a dependency on this one.

  • Alternately, Pf2e Toolbelt now includes merchant tools that makes buying and selling directly to and from the merchant actor dead simple.

  • Wall Height to facilitate the use of the roof of the Hunting Lodge in the Hunting Grounds.

  • Tianze's Landing Page, which is my newest module. It's just some scene overlays and instructions for building a landing page. Dead simple.

Other Services

  • RollAdvantage's Token Stamp can create a token from any image. The service is quick and excellent.

Who is Tianze?.name: 天泽是谁？ Who is Tianze?
Who is Tianze?.text:
在到处都放了 Tianze 之后，我决定干脆以我自己的名字来发布这些内容。或者更准确地说，用我一辈子的昵称。

我从大约 1986 年起就一直在玩跑团。一切都始于我当时的男朋友（现在的丈夫）在每周某些晚上没空。我开始好奇，然后想起母亲曾给过我一些建议，大意是：了解他感兴趣的东西，于是我请他给我展示这个游戏。

于是我捏了一个牧师。

随后就是许多个周末的跑团宅乐。我们拉来了一个朋友，很快，小偷 Nan、无名法师，以及其他各式各样的角色一起挑战了邪恶元素神殿。遗憾的是，我们没能一路通关。

我们玩得最开心的游戏系统有：AD&D2e （我们至今还留着一本核心规则！）、克苏鲁的呼唤、漫威超级英雄、星际旅行者，当然还有现在的 Pathfinder 2E。

第一个角色 Gwennyth 收在我的《英雄夹》里，那里面有厚厚一叠几乎包含我们俩捏过的每一个角色，外加一些朋友的角色。

我也发表过一些小说，如果你愿意翻找，可以在 https://www.tianevitt.com 找到。那里还有个博客，我最近也重新打理了一下。

After putting Tianze everywhere, I decided to go ahead and publish these under my own name. Or rather, my lifelong nickname.

I have been gaming since about 1986. It all started when my then-boyfriend (and now-husband) was unavailable on certain nights of the week. I got curious, and after remembering some advice from my mother that went something like, learn about what interests him, I asked him to show me the game.

And so I rolled up a cleric.

Many weekends of gaming geekery followed. We pull in some friend of ours, and pretty soon Nan the theif, the No Name Mage, and assorted other characters took on the Temple of Elemental Evil. Sadly, we did not make it all the way through.

The game systems that we have had the most fun with AD&D2e (we still have a copy of Core Rules!), Call of Cthulhu, Marvel SuperHeroes, Traveller, and now, of course, Pathfinder 2E.

That first character, Gwennyth, is in my Binder of Heroes, which contains a thick sheaf of practically every character that either one of us ever rolled up, plus the characters of some friends.

I also have some fiction published, which you can find at https://www.tianevitt.com if you dig around. There's a blog there too, which I have brushed off recently.

Dependency and Companion Modules.name: 依赖与同伴模块 Dependency and Companion Modules
Dependency and Companion Modules.text:
模组依赖

我把憎恨魔窟设为本模组的依赖项，因为我直接使用了该模组文件夹中的许多资源。若未安装憎恨魔窟，本模组将无法运行。

配套模组

除本模组外，对于任何以奥塔里为舞台的游戏，我都强烈推荐以下内容：

  • Tianze's Otari Extras——是的，我知道这是我自己的模组。我之所以推荐它，是因为我很难在本模组与Otari Extras之间划清界限。

    • 最终，我决定把所有与憎恨魔窟直接相关的内容都纳入本模组。这样我就能在 Paizo 的 Community Use 政策许可范围内，直接使用并基于憎恨魔窟的资源进行扩展。

    • 同时，我也注意确保Tianze's Otari Extras不包含此类依赖。Otari Extras 模组中的一切内容都是独立的，使用完全分离的资源与美术。同样地，Otari Extras与本模组之间也不存在依赖关系，并尽可能减少重复。

    • 归根结底，我希望服务两类受众——既包括推进憎恨魔窟冒险路径的玩家，也包括更广泛的《开拓者》玩家群体；尤其是许多初次接触《开拓者》的人会游玩《新手入门盒》的冒险，而该冒险同样发生在奥塔里。

    • 那么里面有什么？场景及其配套内容，包括：

      • 两个“口渴的羊驼废墟”的场景，以及一个短冒险《深入废墟》。

      • 三个“骗子之角”场景（含商人演员），以及一个短冒险《鱼鹰俱乐部的邀请》。

      • “乌鸦之桶”场景、商人演员，以及遭遇。

      • “奥塔里市场”场景与遭遇，以及商人演员。

      • 对奥塔里的麻烦中的“鱼营地”进行清理与翻新，并附带一个遭遇。

  • Footsteps of Otari——我称其为配套模组，但该模组作者 Mike Pearce 并不知道我这么做。我非常喜欢他的合集，以至于我只制作了那些不在他合集中的地图。此外，我还添加了地图图钉，在前三个等级的多个节点提示你使用他的内容。

我没有在本模组的系统文件中对这些推荐进行编码。这是因为我不喜欢 Foundry 仅仅因为你安装或移除了本模组，就提示你安装/移除这些推荐模组的方式。这对依赖模组来说没问题，但对推荐模组而言似乎有些用力过猛。

Module Dependency

I made Abomination Vaults a dependency on this one because I am making direct use of many assets within the module folders. This mod simply will not operate without Abomination Vaults installed.

Companion Modules

Along with this module, I highly recommend the following for any Otari-based game:

  • Tianze's Otari Extras - yes, I know it is my own module. I am recommending it because I had a difficult time drawing a line between this module and Otari Extras.

    • In the end, I decided to pull everything that directly involved the Abomination Vaults into this module. This allowed me to make direct use of and build upon the Abomination Vaults assets, as permitted in Paizo's Community Use policy.

    • At the same time, I took care ensure that Tianze's Otari Extras has no such dependencies. Everything in the Otari Extras module is standalone, with completely separate assets and artwork. Likewise, there are no dependencies between Otari Extras and this one, with as little duplication as possible.

    • Ultimately, I wanted to serve two audiences - both those going through the Abomination Vaults Adventure Path, and the wider general Pathfinder gaming population, especially since many people who are new to Pathfinder play the Beginner Box adventure, which also takes place in Otari.

    • So what's in it? Scenes, with accompanying content, including:

      • Two scenes with the ruins of the Thirsty Alpaca, plus a short adventure, "Into the Ruins".

      • Three scenes of Crooks Nook with merchant actors, plus a short adventure, "An Invitation to the Osprey Club".

      • Crow's Casks scene, merchant actor, and encounter.

      • Otari Market scene and encounter, plus merchant actors.

      • A cleaned-up and refunished Fish Camp from Troubles in Otari, with an encounter.

  • Footsteps of Otari - I am calling this a companion module, but the mod author, Mike Pearce, has no idea I am doing so. I liked his collection so much that I only created maps that were NOT in his collection. Plus I added map pins that suggest your use of his content at various points in the first three levels.

I have stopped short of encoding these recommendations in this module's system files. This is because I don't like the way Foundry will ask you to install/remove the recommended mods just because you installed or removed this one. This works fine for dependent mods, but seems a bit heavy-handed for recommended mods.

New Versions of AV Scenes.name: AV 场景的新版本 New Versions of AV Scenes
New Versions of AV Scenes.text:
“场景”选项卡中的“凄凉灯塔额外内容”文件夹包含了《憎恨魔窟》随附的每个场景的一个副本。我使用单独的副本，因为这是我能让指示物、日志、音效和图块在你的游戏世界中保持持久化的唯一方法。

不过，当这些场景与原版《憎恨魔窟》场景同时在游戏世界中处于活动状态时，可能会让人困惑。尤其是因为原版场景在场景导航栏中占用了大量空间。

以下是我的建议：

  • 创建一个场景资料集。

  • 将整个《憎恨魔窟》文件夹结构导出到该资料集中。

  • 从“场景”选项卡中删除《憎恨魔窟》文件夹（以及其所有内容）。

这样，你就不会有同一场景的额外副本；同时，如果你需要回到原始地图，仍然可以迅速从资料集中把任意场景拉出来。

额外的加值是：该文件夹结构比原模块更友好，所有内容都在一个文件夹中。

一些备注：

  • 本模块中的所有场景都未启用“在导航中显示”选项。为了避免导航过于杂乱，我发现最简单的做法是只在导航中显示当前地图、上一张地图和下一张地图；再加上任何你经常访问的其他场景。

  • 所有地图都已根据 @UUID[JournalEntry.3T1M395V6J75OsEp]{憎恨魔窟} 等级引言，使用场景地区进行了调暗处理。

The Gauntlight Extras folder in the Scenes tab has a copy of every scene shipped with Abomination Vaults. I used separate copies because that is the only way I could make the token, journals, sounds and tiles persist in your game world.

However, it can get confusing to have these scenes active in the game world at the same time as the original Abomination Vaults scenes. Especially since the original scenes take up so much space in the scene navigation bar.

Here's what I recommend:

  • Create a Scene compendium.

  • Export the entire Abomination Vaults folder structure into the compendium.

  • Delete the Abomination Vaults folder (and all its contents) from the Scenes tab.

This way, you won't have an extra copy of the same scene, and you will still be able to pull any scene out of the compendium in a flash if you need to go back to the original map.

As an added bonus, the folder structure is friendlier than the original module, with everything in one folder.

Some notes:

  • None of the scenes in this module have the "Show in Navigation" option on. To keep the navigation from getting too cluttered, I found it was easiest if I only show the current map, the previous map and the next map in the navigation. Plus any other scene that you frequently visit.

  • All maps have been darkened, using scene regions, according to the @UUID[JournalEntry.3T1M395V6J75OsEp]{Abomination Vaults} level introductions.

Carman Rajani.name: 卡曼·拉贾尼 Carman Rajani
Carman Rajani.text:
（本页包含对卡曼·拉贾尼角色的完整重新构想。原版卡曼请见 @UUID[JournalEntry.DQepDGIcXuhkYOuU.JournalEntryPage.hv8jCTjoKEFVFV4Q]{Carman Rajani}。）

性格

我把卡曼·拉贾尼塑造成了一个有点混蛋的人——至少一开始是这样。他不会购买0级或1级的武器或护甲，而是会把英雄们指去奥塔里卫队，让他们去“卖掉他们的垃圾”，他会很直白地这么说。

当被问到他会买什么时，他表示他想要些有趣的东西。他会很乐意购买仪式用、镶宝石的，或2级武器与护甲。他主要对金属物品感兴趣，但也会购买由其他材料制成的物品——同样前提是它们“有趣”。他甚至会给出一个还不错的价格。

他是一名专家等级的符文铁匠。

卡曼的父亲是一名战士，并期望他也成为战士。他的职业倾向与“恶棍”一致，因此他是游荡者与战士的结合体。

名声

如果英雄们在镇上打听他，这里是一些人可能会说的话：

  • Wren会说他的活做得很有质量。她没什么坏话可说，但如果追问，她也确实想不出什么好话。

  • 玛吉洛不喜欢他。因为他咄咄逼人的打牌风格，她不得不把他赶出去过一两次；而且她往往会很早就停止给他酒水以避免麻烦。

  • 如果Yinyasmira信任英雄们——比如他们救回了她失踪的盗贼之后——她会承认自己从未让他进入鱼鹰俱乐部。被问及原因时，她解释说她不认为他能很好地接受命令，或在她的团队中很好地共事。

  • 他似乎和Tamily关系不错。这可能是因为她看着他长大，并不愿意把任何一个童年时光赤脚在海滩上奔跑、或在她的码头上钓鱼、并且曾被她从一两次小麻烦中救出来的人想得太坏。

  • 憎恨魔窟的模组提到伐木之刃有“熟练的铁匠”。这暗示卡曼至少有两名铁匠员工为他工作。其中至少有一人应当是有才华的熟练工。

    在我看来，如果他们不喜欢为他工作，他们就会自己开店。他替他们省了这份麻烦。因此，尽管他们偶尔会抱怨，但总体而言他们是满意的。

    他们也可以成为下方流言信息的良好来源。

角色成长

随着游戏推进，英雄们一次又一次地去找这个暴躁的铁匠，角色应当展现出更深的一面。这里有一些潜在点子，但团队不该直接从他那里得知太多。他不是个爱说话的人。

  • 他35岁，眼下看不到任何可能的妻子人选。他痛苦地意识到自己是拉贾尼家族血脉的最后一人。

  • 他曾有过一些认真的恋情，但他阴暗的一面让任何正派的女人都不愿考虑与他共度真正的未来。

  • 他不想谈这事，但在他的工作区域里有一幅装框的女性肖像。他亲手画的，技艺还不错。

  • 虽然他至少竞选过两次市长，但他看起来并不是真的想要这份工作。如果被问到是否还会再参选，他会说他还没决定。

    事实上，这事如今看起来不再是个好主意，而且给人一种“捞偏门结果翻车”的感觉。

  • 铁匠铺坐落在拉贾尼家族最初的庄园旧址上。大部分地产都已售出，但拉贾尼家族仍拥有三栋建筑，其中包括铁匠铺。

  • 卡曼的母亲娜坦雅住在其中一栋房子里。他们关系糟透了，她不断对他唠叨。他父亲在他少年时去世，而她从未再婚。他记得更快乐的时光，并认为她只是因年轻守寡而变得苦涩。

    • 实际上，她被诅咒了。见 @UUID[JournalEntry.GPXU0ZLTdoTKQPui]{Rajani Bloodline Curse}。

一位旧日情人

当我第一次读到牢房等级里的Cynemi时，我就知道她必须是卡曼的情人。关于我如何改编她的故事，见这篇日志：@UUID[JournalEntry.dHfrhlefwZxcjRj1.JournalEntryPage.mbcegTU3VKg52nbl]{Cynemi}。

其实她一直都在担心他。因为她知道他有敌人（乌瑞维安或Indrililiss——我替换的另一位头目），而他对此一无所知。因此，即便她在胡须魔或鬼婆（特征）不关心的看守下，在牢房的囚室里腐烂，她仍拼命想逃出去警告他。

卡曼工作区域里的那位肖像女性并不是Cynemi，这可能会在后续剧情中成为争吵的导火索。

(This page contains a complete re-imagining of Carman's character. For the original Carman, see @UUID[JournalEntry.DQepDGIcXuhkYOuU.JournalEntryPage.hv8jCTjoKEFVFV4Q]{Carman Rajani}.)

Personality

I made Carman Rajani something of a jerk — at least at first. He will not buy 0 or 1st level weaponry or armor, and will direct the heroes to the Otari Garrison to "sell their junk," and he will bluntly put it.

When asked what he will buy, he states that he wants something interesting. He will readily buy ceremonial, jeweled, or level 2 weapons and armor. He mostly is interested in metallic items, but will buy items made of other materials, again, if they are "interesting." He'll even offer a decent price.

He is an expert-level runesmith.

Carman's father was a warrior, and expected him to become a warrior as well. His character class aligns to the Scoundrel, so he is a combination of rogue and fighter.

Reputation

If the heroes ask around town about him, here is what some others might say:

  • Wren will say he does quality work. She does not have anything bad to say and, when pressed, she really cannot think of anything good, either.

  • Magiloy does not like him. She's had to throw him out a time or two for his aggressive card-playing style, and she tends to cut him off early to avoid trouble.

  • If Yinyasmira trusts the heroes — such as after they have rescued her missing thieves — she will acknowledge that she never let him into the Osprey Club. When asked why, she explains that she does not think he would take orders well, or work well within her group.

  • He seems to have gotten on Tamily's good side. This is probably because she watched him grow up, and is not inclined to think badly of anyone who spent his boyhood running barefoot on the beach, or fishing from her docks, and who she rescued from a scrape or two.

  • The AV modules speaks of "skilled smiths" at Blades for Glades. This implies that Carman has a staff of at least two smiths working for him. At least one of them should be a talented journeyman.

    In my opinion, if they did not like working for him, they would open shops of their own. He saves them the trouble. Therefore, while they may have the occasional grumble, they are, on the whole, content.

    They can also be a good sources for the gossip information below.

Character Growth

As the game progresses and the heroes go to the surly blacksmith again and again, a little more depth should come out. Here are some potential ideas, but the group should not learn much directly from him. He is not a talker.

  • He is thirty-five years old, with no potential wife in sight. He is painfully aware that he is the last of the Rajani line.

  • He has had some serious love affairs, but his darker side has put off any decent woman from considering a real future with him.

  • He doesn't want to talk about it, but there is a framed portrait of a woman in his work area. He drew it himself, with a decent amount of skill.

  • Although he has run for mayor at least two times, he doesn't seem like he actually wants the job. If asked if he will run again, he will say he has not decided.

    In truth, it no longer seems like such a good idea, and has the feel of a caper gone sour.

  • The smithy stands on the land where the original Rajani estate once stood. Most of it has been sold off, but the Rajanis still own three buildings, including the smithy.

  • Carman's mother, Natanya, lives in one of the houses. They have a terrible relationship, with her nagging at him constantly. His father died when he was a teen, and she never remarried. He remembers happier times, and thinks she is just bitter at becoming a widow at a young age.

    • In actuality, she is cursed. See @UUID[JournalEntry.GPXU0ZLTdoTKQPui]{Rajani Bloodline Curse}.

A Former Paramour

When I first read about Cynemi in the prison level, I knew she had to be Carman's paramour. See this journal for how I adapted her story: @UUID[JournalEntry.dHfrhlefwZxcjRj1.JournalEntryPage.mbcegTU3VKg52nbl]{Cynemi}.

She has actually been worried about him all this time. This is because she knows that he has enemies (either Urevian or Indrililiss, my alternative boss) that he knows nothing about. So even as she rots in a prison cell under the indifferent care of barbazu or hags, she is desperate to get away and to warn him.

The woman in the portrait in Carmen's work area is NOT Cynemi, and it could be fodder for an argument later in the story.

Klorte Hengus.name: 克洛特·亨格斯 Klorte Hengus
Klorte Hengus.text:
克洛特·亨格斯，在@UUID[JournalEntry.PrAuOqj2BsexgBgU.JournalEntryPage.SwlmaUjeeiiPHhsr]{巨人之轮}那边，一开始可能跟英雄们没什么交集。不过，如果他们之中有人开始以战士的名声传开，克洛特也许会手痒，想要测试一下战士的实力。

而他会发出挑战。

到这时候，英雄们可能已经有点厌战了，尤其是如果他们已经正在参加竞技场战斗。

@UUID[Actor.9VsLTvYbjS78IBVL]{克洛特·亨格斯}

时间

英雄们选择的某一天的日落时分。这能确保太阳位于悬崖之后，但也不会让任何人因黑暗而获得特别优势。

地点

加伦丁速递围栏内的院子，有时会在克洛特偶尔发出这些挑战时，成为一个非正式的竞技场。

曾经的对手

以下人物曾在接受克洛特的挑战后与之交手并落败：

  • 欧瑟夫·曼妮姆斯

  • 卡曼·拉贾尼

克洛特也曾挑战过拉杜斯·长鞍，但后者为避免削弱自己的权威而拒绝了。该挑战仍然有效。

Klorte Hengus, over at @UUID[JournalEntry.PrAuOqj2BsexgBgU.JournalEntryPage.SwlmaUjeeiiPHhsr]{The Giant’s Wheel}, may not have much to do with the heroes, at first. However, if one of them starts to develop a reputation as a warrior, Klorte might feel the itch for a test of warrior prowess.

And he will issue a challenge.

By this time, the heroes might be a bit combat weary, especially if they are already in the midst of the arena battles.

@UUID[Actor.9VsLTvYbjS78IBVL]{Klorte Hengus}

The Time

Sundown on a day that the heroes chooses. This will ensure that the sun is behind the cliffs, but will also not give anyone a particular advantage with darkness.

The Place

The fenced yard at Gallentine Deliveries has sometimes become an informal arena for the occasional time that Klorte issues these challenges.

Former Combatants

The following have faced Klorte after a challenge and lost:

  • Oseph Menhemes

  • Carman Rajani

Klorte has also challenged Lardus Longsaddle, who declined to avoid undermining his authority. The challenge is still open.

Wrin Sivinxi.name: 瓦琳·希温尼斯 Wrin Sivinxi
Wrin Sivinxi.text:
这份角色研究建立在随模块一同发布的原始角色研究之上，原文见此：@UUID[JournalEntry.DQepDGIcXuhkYOuU.JournalEntryPage.raJDQ95RBqeXxV14]{瓦琳·希温尼斯}

瓦琳是一名从邪教中逃脱的幸存者。

摘自她的官方描述：

瓦琳·希温尼斯认为古玩店古怪的布置有个非常充分的理由——她在曲线中看见安全，在棱角中看见威胁，并且还带着一点幽闭恐惧。中央穹顶是她的居所，而她把内部表面涂绘成夜空的模样，上面有篷车星座群的全部星座，这样即使在阴云密布的夜晚，她也能在群星之下入睡。

瓦琳还是个年少的青少年时，曾被一名年轻男子深深吸引；那人牵涉进一个异界邪教，该邪教从棱角中汲取诡异力量，并对非欧几里得几何进行奇异操控。也正是在那段时期，她觉醒了自身与生俱来的术法力量，其力量源自原初源头。

随着她被一步步拖入邪教深处，她在得知更多真相后逐渐感到惊恐。事实证明，邪教对她的力量变得过于贪婪，过早揭露了太多秘密；瓦琳因此经历了一段短暂的理智崩溃。

在她勉强恢复之后，她逃回了童年的家，回到深爱她的父母与兄弟姐妹身边；家人张开双臂欢迎她归来。

然而，邪教成员追踪而至，因为他们如今将她视为威胁。某个夜晚，几名邪教徒现身，以传送的方式出现在家中各个卧室的角落里。邪教徒很快发现，希温尼斯一家并非没有自保的能力；众人合力，成功将他们击退。

然而，瓦琳在这场战斗中失去了一位姐妹，她至今无法原谅自己。

家中其余成员组织了一支队伍去追击邪教徒。他们攻入邪教神殿，将其摧毁。

一切安好，直到数年之后，如瓦琳的@UUID[JournalEntry.DQepDGIcXuhkYOuU.JournalEntryPage.raJDQ95RBqeXxV14]{日志条目}中所述，毁木者恶魔的攻击发生。尚不清楚这次恶魔袭击是否与邪教徒有关。

那段短暂的理智崩溃，以及邪教徒从她童年家中角落发动的袭击，都促成了她直到今日仍在与之挣扎的幽闭恐惧。

其余一切均依照她的日志条目发展。

This character study builds on the original character study shipped with the module, found here: @UUID[JournalEntry.DQepDGIcXuhkYOuU.JournalEntryPage.raJDQ95RBqeXxV14]{Wrin Sivinxi}

Wrin is a cult escapee.

From her official description:

Wrin Sivinxi has what she regards as a very good reason for the curio shop's strange arrangement- she sees safety in curves and menace in angles and suffers from a touch of claustrophobia. The central dome is her domicile, and she's painted the interior surfaces to resemble a night sky featuring all the constellations of the Cosmic Caravan, so that even on overcast nights she can fall asleep under the stars.

When Wrin was a young teenager, she became enthralled by a young man who was involved in an otherworldly cult that drew strange power from angles and strange manipulations of non-Euclidean geometry. She developed her own inborn sorcery power at that time, which draws from a primal source.

As she was drawn deeper into the cult, she gradually grew alarmed as more was revealed to her. It turned out that the cult got too greedy for her powers, and it revealed too much too soon, and Wrin suffered a brief case of sanity loss.

After she had barely recovered, she fled back to her childhood home and her loving parents and siblings, who welcomed her with open arms.

However, members of the cult chased her down, as they now considered her a threat. Several of them appeared one night, teleporting into in the corners of their various bedchambers. The cultists soon found that the Sivinxi family members were not without the ability to defend themselves, and together, they were able to fight them off.

However, Wrin lost a sister in the battle, for which she has never forgiven herself.

The rest of the family raised a group to go after the cultists. They invaded their temple and destroyed them.

All was well until several years later, when the attack of the Treerazer demons occurred as detailed in Wrin's @UUID[JournalEntry.DQepDGIcXuhkYOuU.JournalEntryPage.raJDQ95RBqeXxV14]{journal entry}. It is not known of the demon attack was connected to the cultists.

The brief stint of sanity loss, along with the attack of the cultists from the corners of her childhood home, contributed to the claustrophobia that she struggles with to this day.

Everything else proceeds according to her journal entry.

Vol Rajani.name: 沃尔·拉贾尼 Vol Rajani
Vol Rajani.text:
本条目基于此处可找到的玫瑰团的原始人物传记条目：@UUID[JournalEntry.DQepDGIcXuhkYOuU.JournalEntryPage.Gx2mnbeUctXU7XUN]{玫瑰团}

沃尔创建了玫瑰团，并曾是最初的队长，直到她做了个错误决定，差点害扎马夫迪安丧命。她请求阿瑟芙娜接任。

沃尔在战斗时会频繁使用威吓或她的妙语连珠技能。她的座右铭是：要是吓不住他们，就嘲讽他们。

她喜欢给人起绰号，因此她给队伍里的每个人都起了一个。毕竟她自己也把名字从沃尔扬拉缩短了，她觉得这样才公平。

她与扎马夫迪安建立了伙伴关系，并会运用她的防护技能在战斗中用护盾术保护他，甚至替他承受原本指向他的伤害。

@UUID[Actor.V4PkTZFzk5Y5T5JM]{沃尔的幽灵}

This entry builds on the original biographical entry for the Roseguard found here: @UUID[JournalEntry.DQepDGIcXuhkYOuU.JournalEntryPage.Gx2mnbeUctXU7XUN]{The Roseguard}

Vol founded the Roseguard and was and the original party leader before she made a bad call and almost got Zarmavdian killed. She asked that Asephna take over.

Vol makes liberal use of either intimidation or her Bon Mot skill while she fights. Her motto is, if you can't scare 'em, taunt 'em.

She likes to give nicknames, so she has bestowed one on everyone in her party. Since she has shortened her own name from Volyanla, she thinks it is only fair.

She has formed a partnership with Zarmavdian, and she will use her protective skills to shield him in combat and to even take damage that was aimed at him.

@UUID[Actor.V4PkTZFzk5Y5T5JM]{Vol's Ghost}

Otari Ilvashti.name: 奥塔里·伊瓦什提 Otari Ilvashti
Otari Ilvashti.text:
本条目基于此处的玫瑰团原始人物传记条目：@UUID[JournalEntry.DQepDGIcXuhkYOuU.JournalEntryPage.Gx2mnbeUctXU7XUN]{The Roseguard}，以及奥塔里·伊瓦什提的原始传记：@UUID[JournalEntry.DQepDGIcXuhkYOuU.JournalEntryPage.hmllmOvUuS2wnnVT]{Otari Ilvashti}

奥塔里是沃尔招募的第一个人，他也带上了阿塞芙娜。

奥塔里是一名半精灵。他有点像个亡命徒，喜欢偷偷接近敌人的挑战，不管对方有多强大。他是个业余竖琴弹奏者，在背包里一直带着一把精灵工艺打造的木制里拉琴。

在战斗中他往往独自行动，并从幽影中出击，以便造成毁灭性的伤害。

他爱着阿塞芙娜。

沃尔给他起了个绰号，叫“Oat”。

@UUID[Actor.JvzCKApEU3vzEfJH]{奥塔里的幽灵（特征）}

This entry builds on the original biographical entry for the Roseguard found here: @UUID[JournalEntry.DQepDGIcXuhkYOuU.JournalEntryPage.Gx2mnbeUctXU7XUN]{The Roseguard}, and Otari's original bio: @UUID[JournalEntry.DQepDGIcXuhkYOuU.JournalEntryPage.hmllmOvUuS2wnnVT]{Otari Ilvashti}

Otari was the first person that Vol recruited, and he brought along Asephna.

Otari is a half-elf. He is a bit of a daredevil, and loves the challenge of sneaking up on a foe, no matter how powerful. He is an amateur lyrist, and keeps an elven-crafted wooden lyre in his pack.

He tends to work alone in combat, and to strike from the shadows so he can deal devastating damage.

He is in love with Asephna.

Vol has given him the nickname of "Oat".

@UUID[Actor.JvzCKApEU3vzEfJH]{Otari's Ghost}

Aesephna Menhemes.name: 牧师艾斯法娜·曼妮姆斯 Aesephna Menhemes
Aesephna Menhemes.text:
本条目基于此处所载的玫瑰团原始传记条目扩展而来：玫瑰团

艾瑟芙娜是在奥塔里请求她加入时加入的。她并不真的认为自己是个冒险的祭司，因为艾瑞斯提尔的牧师很少如此，但玫瑰团的目标与她自己的目标一致，而她也怀有超越神殿牧师职责的抱负。

在沃尔提出请求时，她勉为其难地接过了队伍的指挥权。

事实证明，她成为了一位比连她自己都预期更出色的领袖，而沃尔是她最坚定的支持者。

她也回应着奥塔里的爱慕，但她发誓在重返神殿履职之前保持贞洁。她具有圣洁（特征）。

沃尔给了她“赛芙”的昵称。

@UUID[Actor.CwC6aBucr3HvAFoL]{艾瑟芙娜的幽灵（特征）}

This entry builds on the original biographical entry for the Roseguard found here: The Roseguard

Aesephna joined when Otari asked her to. She didn't really think of herself as an adventuring priest, because clerics of Eristil rarely do, but the goals of the Roseguard matched her own, and she had aspirations beyond that of a temple cleric.

She reluctantly took command of the group at Vol's request.

She has proven to be a better leader than even she ever expected, and Vol is her best supporter.

She returns Otari's affection, but vowed to remain chaste until she resumes temple duty. She has the Holy trait.

Vol has granted her the nickname of "Sef".

@UUID[Actor.CwC6aBucr3HvAFoL]{Aesephna's Ghost}

Zarmavdian.name: 扎马夫迪安 Zarmavdian
Zarmavdian.text:
本条目基于此处的玫瑰团原始人物传记条目扩展而来： 玫瑰团

扎马夫迪安是最后一个被招募的人。必须先说服他加入，因为他很清楚自己对周遭环境有多么迟钝。在探索地城时，他往往更专注于在地板或墙壁的刻痕中寻找神秘学含义，而不是注意他正前方的威胁。

他形容自己“分心到一种长期持续的程度，甚至连一只精力过剩的小狗都能潜行到我身后。”

因此，他的法术往往要么造成巨量伤害，要么保护队伍免受伤害，要么帮助队伍获取信息。

沃尔称他为“马夫”，而他也觉得这个绰号合情合理。此外，他知道隐藏自己的真名是有价值的。

扎马夫迪安的法术从他的法术书《真理的门槛》中挑选。

注：《憎恨魔窟》中扎马夫迪安的角色速写称他为一名法师，但他所有的法术、属性与能力，以及对他的相关描述，似乎都表明他是一名异能术士。-TN

@UUID[Actor.KmHFeQqAs6Zt6yCm]{扎马夫迪安的幽灵（特征）}

This entry builds on the original biographical entry for the Roseguard found here: The Roseguard

Zarmavdian was the last to be recruited. He had to be convinced to join because he is well aware of how oblivious he is to his surroundings. While exploring dungeons, he tends to be more focused on finding occult meaning in the etchings on the floor or walls, rather than the threats directly ahead of him.

He describes himself as "so perpetually distracted that even a hyperactive puppy could sneak up on me." 

For these reasons, his spells tend to either deliver massive damage, to protect the group from harm, or help the group learn things.

Vol calls him Mav, and he sees the logic in this nickname. Also, he knows that there is value in keeping his real name hidden. 

Zarmavdian's spells are selected from his spellbook, Thresholds of Truth.

Note: Zarmavdian's character sketch in Abomination Vaults refers to him as a wizard, but all his spells, his attributes and abilities, and the references to him seem to indicate that he is an occult sorcerer. -TN

@UUID[Actor.KmHFeQqAs6Zt6yCm]{Zarmavdian's Ghost}

Inactive Sound Marker.name: 非活动音效标记 Inactive Sound Marker
Inactive Sound Marker.text:
此日志条目会出现在放置了未启用音效的场景中。

前往左侧边栏的“音乐”控件，并在适当时机启用已禁用的音乐。

This journal entry appears in scenes where inactive sounds have been placed.

Go to the Music control in the left sidebar and activate the disabled music when appropriate.

Purpose.name: 目的 Purpose
Purpose.text:
我写这本日志，作为我在各处地城里放置的暗示术和提醒的存放处。

如果没有地图作为背景，它们不会太有意义。

许多蓝色书本的地图图钉都会指向这些页面（颜色：#00c7b0）。

如果你没有安装 Footsteps of 奥塔里 模组，Footsteps of 奥塔里 页面中的图像将会损坏。

I wrote this journal as a repository for suggestions and reminders that I have placed throughout the dungeons.

They won't make much sense without the map as context.

Many of the blue book map pins lead to these pages (Color: #00c7b0).

The images in the Footsteps of Otari pages will be broken if you do not have that module installed.

Footsteps of Otari Hazard Token Images.name: 奥塔里脚步声 危害 代币图像 Footsteps of Otari Hazard Token Images
Footsteps of Otari Hazard Token Images.text:
此日志条目仅在你安装了出色的《奥塔里的足迹》模块时才相关。

该模块包含了此走廊中发现的危害的替换图像。

如果你安装了该模块，那么图像将显示在下方。如果没有安装，图像将缺失并显示断开的链接占位符。

你可以在这里找到它们：

modules/footsteps-of-otari/artwork/hazards/b29-hall-of-hatred

This journal entry is only relevant if you have the excellent Footsteps of Otari module installed.

That module includes replacement images for the hazards found in this hallway.

If you have the module installed, then the images will appear below. If not, the images will be missing and will show broken link placeholders.

You'll find them here:

modules/footsteps-of-otari/artwork/hazards/b29-hall-of-hatred

Footsteps of Otari Bound Lasda Token Ima.name: 奥塔里的脚步 绑定 拉斯达 代币图像 Footsteps of Otari Bound Lasda Token Image
Footsteps of Otari Bound Lasda Token Ima.text:
此日志条目仅在你安装了优秀的《奥塔里的足迹》模组时才相关。

该模组包含一张拉斯达的图片，呈现他被绑在祭坛上的样子。它被标注为代币图片，但我发现把它用作图块效果最好，因为这样我就能拉伸并调整它，直到它能完美覆盖地图上的刑讯台。

如果你安装了该模组，那么图片会显示在下方。如果没有安装，图片将缺失，并会显示一个断开的链接占位符。

modules/footsteps-of-otari/artwork/tokens/d9-lasda-venkervale.webp

This journal entry is only relevant if you have the excellent Footsteps of Otari module installed.

That module includes an image of Lasda, as he would appear bound to the altar. it is labeled as a token image, but I found it best to use as a tile, because then I was able to stretch and manipulate it until it fit perfectly over the torture table on the map.

If you have the module installed, then the image will appear below. If not, the image will be missing and will show a broken link placeholder.

modules/footsteps-of-otari/artwork/tokens/d9-lasda-venkervale.webp

Footsteps of Otari Augrael Token Image.name: 奥塔里的脚步 奥格雷尔 代币图像 Footsteps of Otari Augrael Token Image
Footsteps of Otari Augrael Token Image.text:
此日志条目仅在你安装了优秀的《奥塔里的足迹》模组时才相关。

该模组包含奥格雷尔的俯视图像。

如果你已安装该模组，那么图像将显示在下方。如果没有安装，图像将缺失并显示为断开的链接占位符。

你可以在此处找到它：

modules/footsteps-of-otari/artwork/tokens

This journal entry is only relevant if you have the excellent Footsteps of Otari module installed.

That module includes a topdown image of Augrael.

If you have the module installed, then the image will appear below. If not, the image will be missing and will show a broken link placeholder.

You can find it here:

modules/footsteps-of-otari/artwork/tokens

Footsteps of Otari Volluk Azrinae Token.name: 奥塔里的脚步 沃鲁克·阿兹里尼 令牌图像 Footsteps of Otari Volluk Azrinae Token Images
Footsteps of Otari Volluk Azrinae Token.text:
此日志条目仅在你安装了出色的《奥塔里的足迹》模组时才相关。

该模组包含沃鲁克·阿兹里尼的俯视图像，包括有虫和无虫两种。

如果你安装了该模组，那么图像将显示在下方。若未安装，图像将缺失并显示为损坏链接的占位符。

你可以在这里找到它们：

modules/footsteps-of-otari/artwork/tokens

This journal entry is only relevant if you have the excellent Footsteps of Otari module installed.

That module includes topdown images of Volluk Azrinae, both with and without worms.

If you have the module installed, then the images will appear below. If not, the images will be missing and will show broken link placeholders.

You can find them here:

modules/footsteps-of-otari/artwork/tokens

Inactive Light Marker.name: 未激活的光亮术标记 Inactive Light Marker
Inactive Light Marker.text:
此日志条目会出现在放置了未激活光源的场景中。

前往左侧边栏中的光亮术控制，并在适当的时候激活已禁用的光亮术。

This journal entry appears in scenes where inactive lights have been placed.

Go to the Light control in the left sidebar and activate the disabled light when appropriate.

Awaken Portal Ritual.name: 唤醒传送门仪式 Awaken Portal Ritual
Awaken Portal Ritual.text:
此处的唤醒传送门仪式包含对重制前规则书中某张表格的引用，导致难以查找。我已将其添加到此副本中的该法术描述里：

@UUID[Item.c2o97uGQzxpWL3bk]{唤醒传送门}

The Awaken Portal ritual found here contains a reference to a table in the pre-Remaster rulebook, making it difficult to find. I have added it to the spell description in this copy of the spell:

@UUID[Item.c2o97uGQzxpWL3bk]{Awaken Portal}

Footsteps of Otari - Footsteps Macro.name: 奥塔里的足迹 - 足迹宏 Footsteps of Otari - Footsteps Macro
Footsteps of Otari - Footsteps Macro.text:
此日志条目仅在你安装了优秀的《奥塔里的脚步声》模组时才相关。

这是奥塔里现身的房间之一。

《奥塔里的脚步声》包含一个名为“Open Footsteps Control”的宏。模组安装后，你可以在资料库中找到该宏。

将该宏拖到你的宏栏上。

到那里后，打开 Open Footsteps Control 宏，选择地图版本和相应的凄凉灯塔等级，然后点击播放按钮。

我建议你以 1/2 到 1/4 的速度播放，并在玩家被耽搁时让幽灵等待玩家赶上。

This journal entry is only relevant if you have the excellent Footsteps of Otari module installed.

This is one of the rooms in which Otari makes his appearance.

Footsteps of Otari includes a macro called "Open Footsteps Control". Once the module is installed, you can find the macro in the compendium.

Drag the macro onto your macrobar.

Once there, open the Open Footsteps Control macro, select the map version and the appropriate Gauntlight level, and then hit the play button.

I recommend you play it at 1/2 to 1/4 speed, and have the ghost wait for the players to catch up when they are delayed.

Footsteps of Otari Watching Wall Image.name: 奥塔里的脚步 偷窥墙 图像 Footsteps of Otari Watching Wall Image
Footsteps of Otari Watching Wall Image.text:
此日志条目仅在你安装了优秀的《奥塔里的足迹》模块时才相关。

该模块包含偷窥墙的一张图片。

如果你安装了该模块，那么图片将显示在下方。若未安装，图片将缺失并显示一个损坏链接的占位符。

modules/footsteps-of-otari/artwork/c4-watching-wall.webp

This journal entry is only relevant if you have the excellent Footsteps of Otari module installed.

That module includes an image of the Watching Wall.

If you have the module installed, then the image will appear below. If not, the image will be missing and will show a broken link placeholder.

modules/footsteps-of-otari/artwork/c4-watching-wall.webp

Doomed Goblin Gang.name: 注定灭亡的地精帮派 Doomed Goblin Gang
厄运地精帮 Doomed Goblin Gang
Doomed Goblin Gang.text:
NooDupAgNee帮从一些狗头人口中听说了英雄们的事迹——那些狗头人从某个地城逃了出来，并把冒险英雄的传说带回了艾巴萨罗姆的水洼区。

成员：

  • DudNoo——男性战士，最初是突击队员。
  • KraDup——男性游荡者，最初是战士。
  • NoxAg——男性术士，最初是纵火者。
  • PipNee——女性秘学者，最初是吟唱者。

他们对地精而言既富有又装备精良，而且在这些变体上已经超越了通常的技能等级。他们应该会构成一场艰难的挑战。

这支队伍由秘学者PipNee创立并领导。然而，DudNoo最有常识，必要时往往会把这点“敲”进其他人脑子里。

事件概览

  • 他们应当在英雄们完成1级遗迹之后、并在他们在2级仆从宿舍深入太远之前抵达。

  • 他们在奥塔里最便宜的旅店（骗子之角）落脚，然后花了一些时间争论接下来该做什么。唯一真正派上用场的是DudNoo，他开始在镇上做修理工作，甚至赢得了拉杜斯·长鞍勉强的尊重。

  • 凄凉灯塔照亮墓地之后，PipNee受到启发，认为自己已经找到答案。她提议他们进入凄凉灯塔，找到头目，并提供他们的服务，作为爪牙效命。

  • 四个地精中有三个支援这个想法。DudNoo完全不想当任何人的爪牙，他对此提出反对。PipNee态度坚决，DudNoo也同样坚持。因此，其他人不带他就离开了。

  • 从那以后就再也没有他们的消息了。这就是他们的故事。

注：与NooDupAgNee帮全体成员遭遇时使用的主题在这里：

@UUID[Playlist.vB0om49dkEPYW2nD.PlaylistSound.tlZzNjRt6WLxhUuA]{Just One More Fight}

尽量在与该帮派的所有互动中使用它。这会让音乐更具辨识度——当英雄们与帮派每个成员迎来最终遭遇时，便能立刻认出来。

The NooDupAgNee Gang hears about the heroes from some kobolds who escaped one dungeon or another and took the tale of adventuring heroes back in the Puddles in Absalom.

Members:

  • DudNoo - male fighter who started as a commando.
  • KraDup - male rogue who started as a warrior.
  • NoxAg - male sorcerer who started as a pyro.
  • PipNee - female occultist who started as a chanter.

They are rich and well-equipped for goblins, and have advanced beyond the usual skill level for these archetypes. They should present a tough challenge.

The group was founded and is led by the occultist PipNee. However, DudNoo has the most common sense, and tends to knock some of it into the rest when necessary.

Overview of Events

  • They should arrive after the heroes have completed Lv. 1 Ruins and before they get very far in Lv. 2 Servants Quarters.

  • They find lodging in the cheapest inn in Otari (Crook's Nook), and proceed to spend some time debating and arguing about what to do next. The only one who makes himself useful is DudNoo, who starts doing repairs around town. He even earns the grudging respect of Lardus Longsaddle.

  • After the Gauntlight shines on the graveyard, PipNee is inspired and decided that she has her answer. She proposes that they go into Gauntlight, find the boss, and offer their services as minions.

  • Three out of the four goblins are in support of the idea. DudNoo has no desire to be anyone's minion, and he argues against it. PipNee is determined, but DudNoo is as well. Therefore, the others depart without him.

  • They have not been heard from since. This is their story.

Note: the theme used for encounters with all members of the NooDupAgNee gang is here:

@UUID[Playlist.vB0om49dkEPYW2nD.PlaylistSound.tlZzNjRt6WLxhUuA]{Just One More Fight}

Try to use this with all interactions with the gang. This will make the music recognizable when the heroes have their ultimate encounter with each member of the gang.

Minions in Search of a Boss.name: 寻找首领的仆从 Minions in Search of a Boss
Minions in Search of a Boss.text:
NooDupAgNee帮派应该在英雄们之前几天进入图书馆等级。理想的时机是在凄凉灯塔照亮墓地之后的一个平静期。

图书馆中的恐怖

帮派偷偷绕过泥蛙（如果它还活着），进入凄凉灯塔废墟。在前两层，帮派几乎一无所获，因为英雄们很可能已经把任何活物都清理干净。他们没有探索学徒岛。

因此，他们继续前往第3层的图书馆。在那里，他们发现地城依然“活”得很……或者至少说，是“不死”。

他们首先遭遇溃烂教徒；对方靠近发动攻击，希望增加自己的数量。在与不死生物爆发的战斗中，PipNee绝望地试图谈判，解释他们来此是想向掌权者提供服务。

于是，溃烂教徒把他们带去见纳卡扎林。

纳卡扎林听取了PipNee想在宝库里工作并成为爪牙的想法，认为或许该让自己在更下层的头目面前讨个好感。然而，她也想要自己的爪牙，于是要求他们留下一个成员，成为一名溃烂教徒。

KraDup

PipNee和NoxAg冷酷无情地决定让KraDup当祭品。KraDup提出反对，但他们在听到他的惨叫之前就逃走了。

@UUID[JournalEntry.6TLGspYpzZ5QbHQZ.JournalEntryPage.QbJYnWKPBKrF5R0E]{地精帮派 - KraDup的命运}

实验室中的重生

NoxAg和PipNee对被牺牲的KraDup毫不在意，继续前往第4层。在那里，他们在祭坛附近被闪火折磨，直到沃鲁克·阿兹里尼发现他们。

他听了他们想成为爪牙的计划，认为自己可以从中获利。他通过一个【传送】法术越过屏障，前往第6层的实验室，把他们卖给塑肉仪式师贾法基，以换取卷轴和魔法物品——这些物品他后来要么用掉了，要么拿去交易了。他用其中一张卷轴把帮派送过屏障，而一名双尾虫怪研究者正在那里等着他们。

终于，他们见到了贾法基；他轻而易举地让他们相信，通过塑肉仪式把自己改造成更强大的版本是个好主意。

NoxAg

NoxAg决定变成一名蛛化精灵。

塑肉仪式完成后，他大部分时间都待在瞎酿酒馆酒馆，作为维斯查芮的新保镖。

摩洛克们嫉妒并憎恨他，因为他在贾法基的塑肉仪式队列里插到了他们前面。不过他们也害怕他，因为他很快就会把惹恼他的人点着。

他对自己的塑肉仪式很满意，甚至比以往任何时候都更疯狂、更邪恶。

@UUID[JournalEntry.L1z6lNaPHMHY6GN6.JournalEntryPage.Pri825LugvqJ4oP9]{注定覆灭的帮派 - NoxAg的变形}

@UUID[JournalEntry.ZSZ6TzjoIUvr5zi2.JournalEntryPage.mzQ3Urluou2c4mH0]{NoxAg的挑战}

PipNee

PipNee选择变成一只铁骨怪。

她对自己的塑肉仪式结果欣喜若狂，并且生平第一次觉得自己很美。她现在是贾法基的虔诚追随者。先前在那里的蛛化精灵提出反对，贾法基让她和对方打上一场。她赢得了自己的位置，而他们如今在一种不安的和平中共处。

@UUID[JournalEntry.L1z6lNaPHMHY6GN6.JournalEntryPage.VFZZhJwa4qaqPfNR]{注定覆灭的帮派 - PipNee的变形}

@UUID[JournalEntry.dtjp0y5WgyZO47rH]{Lv. 5 时间线 - 查夫肯姆的复仇}

@UUID[JournalEntry.L1z6lNaPHMHY6GN6.JournalEntryPage.VwBtzoMLkzNHm3Tb]{酒馆住客的背水一战}

The NooDupAgNee gang should should enter the Library level a few days ahead of the heroes. An ideal time would be during a lull after the Gauntlight shines on the graveyard.

Terror in the Library

The gang snuck passed the slurk (if it is still alive) and into the Gauntlight ruin. On the first two levels, the gang does not find much, since the heroes have probably left nothing alive behind them. They do not explore Apprentice Island.

Therefore, they proceeded to the Library on the 3rd level. There, they found the dungeon very much alive … or at least, undead.

They first encounter the Canker Cultists, who move in to attack, hoping to increase their numbers. While engaged in the ensuing fight with the undead, PipNee desperately attempts a parley, explaining that they were here to offer their services to whoever was in charge.

And so they take them to Nhakazarin. 

Nhakazarin listens to PipNee's inspiration to work in the Vaults and to become a minion, and decides it might be good to ingratiate herself to the bosses further below. However, she also wants her own minion, and demands that they leave one of their member behind to become a Canker Cultist.

KraDup

PipNee and NoxAg mercilessly decide that KraDup should be the sacrifice. KraDup objects, but they flee before they can hear his screams.

@UUID[JournalEntry.6TLGspYpzZ5QbHQZ.JournalEntryPage.QbJYnWKPBKrF5R0E]{Goblin Gang - KraDup's Fate}

Rebirth in the Labs

With nary a thoght of the sacrificed KraDup, NoxAg and PipNee proceeds to the 4th level. There, they are tormented by the flickerwisps near the altar until Volluk Azrinae finds them.

He listens to their plans of becoming minions, and decides that he could profit by this. He teleports past the barrier via a Translocate spell, goes down to the Labs on the 6th level, and sells them to the fleshwarper Jafaki for scrolls and magical items that he has since either used or bargained away. He uses one of the scrolls to send the gang past the barrier, where a Seugathi Researcher awaits them.

At last, they meet Jafaki, who easily sells them on the idea of fleshwarping into a more powerful version of themselves.

NoxAg

NoxAg decides to become a drider.

Once his fleshwarping is complete, he spends most of his time in the Warped Brew Tavern as Vischari's new bouncer.

The morlocks are jealous of him and hate him because he jumped ahead of them in line for Jafaki's fleshwarping. However, they also fear him, because he is quick to set whoever annoys him on fire.

He is happy with his fleshwarping, and is even more crazy and evil than he ever was.

@UUID[JournalEntry.L1z6lNaPHMHY6GN6.JournalEntryPage.Pri825LugvqJ4oP9]{Doomed Gang - NoxAg Transformed}

@UUID[JournalEntry.ZSZ6TzjoIUvr5zi2.JournalEntryPage.mzQ3Urluou2c4mH0]{NoxAg's Challenge}

PipNee

PipNee opts to become a dreshkan.

She is thrilled with her fleshwarping results, and she believes, for the first time in her life, that she is beautiful. She is now Jafaki's devoted follower. The drider who was there before her objected, and Jafaki had them fight it out. She earned her place, and they now live in an uneasy peace.

@UUID[JournalEntry.L1z6lNaPHMHY6GN6.JournalEntryPage.VFZZhJwa4qaqPfNR]{Doomed Gang - PipNee Transformed}

@UUID[JournalEntry.dtjp0y5WgyZO47rH]{Lv. 5 Timeline - Chafkhem's Revenge}

@UUID[JournalEntry.L1z6lNaPHMHY6GN6.JournalEntryPage.VwBtzoMLkzNHm3Tb]{Tavern-Dwellers' Last Stand}

DudNoo.name: DudNoo DudNoo DudNoo DudNoo
DudNoo.text:
DudNoo 是一名通情达理的战士。他很擅长修理东西，并且是一位技术娴熟的机械师。

DudNoo 有两个版本，一个是更强大的地精突击队员版本，另一个是3级战士版本，可供玩家扮演。

他是团队中唯一没有邪恶倾向的成员，因此他往往会防止团队一路滑向彻底的反派行径，跌入深水池尾端。

他最大的缺点也是他的优点——他是个很棒的追随者。他与 PipNee 共同领导，通常会顺着她的计划行事。他同样也很适合投身于一位守护者的事业。这主要是因为地精普遍较低的感知。对他而言，这并不是一个无法改变的角色缺陷。为了体现这一点，突击队员版本的 DudNoo 感知为 0，而 PC 版本则被强化了两次，感知提升到 1。

PC: @UUID[Actor.In7uOjnyLaQ717NC]{DudNoo}

NPC: @UUID[Actor.Sp1IdnLnxDrVYsrw]{DudNoo}

DudNoo is a commensense warrior. He has a knack for fixing things, and is an accomplished mechanic.

There are two versions of DudNoo, one as a more powerful version of a goblin commando, and the other as a level 3 Fighter, which could be available for a player to play.

He is the only member of the group without an evil streak, and thus, he tends to keep the group from going off the deep end into full-on villainy.

His biggest flaw is also his strength—he is a great follower. He co-leads with PipNee, and usually goes along with her schemes. He would do equally well taking on the cause of a champion. This is mostly due to the low wisdom that common among goblins. For him, is not an intractable character flaw. To reflect this, the Commando version of DudNoo has a wisdom of 0, and the PC version has been buffed twice to a wisdom of 1.

PC: @UUID[Actor.In7uOjnyLaQ717NC]{DudNoo}

NPC: @UUID[Actor.Sp1IdnLnxDrVYsrw]{DudNoo}

PipNee.name: PipNee PipNee PipNee PipNee
PipNee.text:
PipNee 生来就想领导他人，但尽管她被赋予了魅力，她其实并不擅长。她的邪恶倾向在于她完全自私。她常常构想一些疯狂的计划，执行时完全不在乎会伤到谁。她很享受带领这个团体的感觉，而她之所以能一直这么做，只是因为当 DudNoo 反对她那些更离谱的点子时，她总会退让。

另一方面，KraDup 和 NoxAg 则会欣然附和她提出的任何事情。

Pip 非常倾向于背叛。她也极度渴望权力。这两个特征会促使她背叛他们中的一名成员，并最终接受一种骇人的转变——她相信，那会让她这辈子第一次变得美丽。

吟唱者 Pip：@UUID[Actor.XwZejRLuuT21Qxj9]{PipNee}

铁骨怪 Pip：@UUID[Actor.12G2R36cFMxLRV9Z]{PipNee Dreshkan}

PipNee lives to lead, but despite the charisma she's been gifted with, she's just not very good at it. Her evil tendency is that she is completely selfish. She tends to construct madcap schemes, and doesn't care who gets hurt while carrying them out. She is getting a kick out of leading this group, and only gets away with doing so because she always backs down when DudNoo objects to some of her more deranged ideas.

KraDup and NoxAg, on the other hand, readily go along with anything she proposes.

Pip has a strong propensity for treachery. She also has a strong desire for power. These two traits will lead her to betray one of their members, and to eventually accept a horrifying transformation that, she believes, will make made her, for once in her life, beautiful.

Pip the Chanter: @UUID[Actor.XwZejRLuuT21Qxj9]{PipNee}

Pip the Dreshkan: @UUID[Actor.12G2R36cFMxLRV9Z]{PipNee Dreshkan}

KraDup.name: KraDup KraDup KraDup KraDup
KraDup.text:
KraDup（“Kray”）为盗窃的刺激而活，并已抛弃地精战士之道，成为一名游荡者。不过，他仍然带着他的犬切刀，并将其与一把匕首配对使用。

不过，他更喜欢不战斗。他喜欢潜入禁地，然后带着口袋里装满来路不正的赃物离开。

他不像 PipNee 或 NoxAg 那样邪恶，但他很贪婪，而且确实有能力进行背叛与背后捅刀。

游荡者 Kray：@UUID[Actor.8KGriUJQii41jbiz]{KraDup}

食尸鬼（特征） Kray：@UUID[Actor.Aeuws6jKtVMT1cyb]{KraDup Ghoul}

KraDup ("Kray") lives for the thrill of the steal, and has abandoned the way of the goblin warrior to become a rogue. However, he still has his dogslicer, and uses it paired with a dagger.

He prefers not to fight, however. He likes to sneak into forbidden places, and leave with his pockets filled with ill-gotten loot.

He is not as evil as PipNee or NoxAg, but he is greedy, and is certainly is capable of treachery and back-stabbery.

Kray the Rogue: @UUID[Actor.8KGriUJQii41jbiz]{KraDup}

Kray the Ghoul: @UUID[Actor.Aeuws6jKtVMT1cyb]{KraDup Ghoul}

NoxAg.name: 诺克斯银色尖啸者 NoxAg
NoxAg.text:
NoxAg是这群人里最邪恶的。他是个彻底无可救药的纵火狂，成长为彻头彻尾的火元素使。而且他最喜欢的事莫过于把人烧掉。他身上有很多烧伤疤痕，因为这也包括他自己。他是个炭皮地精，而且看起来就是那样。

纵火狂诺克斯：@UUID[Actor.Le61tqNELdk0MVYs]{NoxAg}

蛛化精灵诺克斯：@UUID[Actor.Le61tqNELdk0MVYs]{NoxAg}

NoxAg is the most evil of the group. He is a thoroughly unredeemable pyro grown into a full-blown fire elementalist. And he loves nothing more than to burn people. He has many burn scars because this includes himself. He is a charhide goblin, and looks like it.

Nox the Pyro: @UUID[Actor.Le61tqNELdk0MVYs]{NoxAg}

Nox the Drider: @UUID[Actor.Le61tqNELdk0MVYs]{NoxAg}

Introduction.name: 引言 Introduction
Introduction.text:
此日志在同一处汇总了所有小插图图像的完整列表。其他日志按地点拆分这些图像，并且是地图图钉中使用的日志。

This journal has the complete list of vignette images in one place. The other journals break the images up by location, and are the journals used in the map pins.

Fogfen.text:
月光沼泽

微灵小径

Moonlit Swamp

Introduction.name: 引言 Introduction
Introduction.text:
本页面作为《憎恨魔窟》随附全部美术作品的完整目录，并按章节编排。此外，为了提醒你将这些展示给你的玩家，各个页面已作为蓝色地图图钉放置在地城地图的凄凉灯塔 Extras 版本中。

为便于与其他地图图钉区分，它们的日志标题都包含“Vignette”。

只需点击日志图片，然后点击图片，再点击 Show Players。

This page serves as a compete catalog to all the artwork shipped with Abomination Vaults, arranged by chapters. Additionally, to remind you to show these to your players, the individual pages have been placed as blue map pins throughout the Gauntlight Extras versions of the dungeon maps.

To distinguish them from other map pins, all include "Vignette" in the journal title.

Just click the journal image, then click the image, and then click Show Players.

Belcorra Battle - Setup.name: 贝科拉之战 - 设置 Belcorra Battle - Setup
Belcorra Battle - Setup.text:
改动总结

我对贝科拉的最终战做了一些改动，因为，当然我会这么做。

尽管原本的结局——贝科拉在最后一刻决定她最不想要的就是空无之死——相当戏剧化，但这与我已经建立的背景设定并不完全一致：宁布洛斯会拒绝赐予她的追随者空无之死，以便在其他时候利用他们。

为了与该背景设定保持一致，我想要让贝科拉也无法得到空无之死。

我也认为，如果英雄们能卷入一场历史性的、灾变性的事件——两位神祇真的再次走到一起进行战斗——那将会非常刺激且令人难忘。关于他们第一次遭遇的更多信息，请参见 @UUID[JournalEntry.YbOS6pQRxoWI0Q56.JournalEntryPage.ohFJrgStEzdvGEEU]{宁布洛斯} 并向下滚动到接近底部的位置。

因此，其中一位英雄会被选中，获得在恰当时机真正召唤法莱斯玛的手段。她到来有两个原因：强行收取贝科拉的灵魂，并为其准备了一个特殊的来世；以及再次直面宁布洛斯。

最后，我增加了一些参战者。由于我早就计划让玫瑰团有限度地再度登场，我也在贝科拉一方加入了几只生物，以保持平衡。

如果这些改动引起你的兴趣，请继续阅读！

到达神殿等级之前的准备

在本模组早期，我在英雄们完成图书馆等级后不久就将法莱斯玛的祭司萨姆带到镇上，从而首次引入了一个更为积极主动的法莱斯玛，以教导一名冒险者获得幽灵猎手入门。

当他们逐渐接近神殿时，他会接近其中一人，交付一项特殊任务：

  • 如果有一位英雄信奉法莱斯玛，萨姆会选择那位英雄。

  • 如果没有，而某位英雄选择了幽灵猎手入门，萨姆会选择那个人。

  • 如果还没有，萨姆会从牧师或其他神圣职业，或一位冠军中选择一人。

如果你们没有这样的角色，那么也许这个结局并不适合你的小队。

摄魂使面具

萨姆向被选中的英雄呈上一件看起来只是普通的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.i5SEEbSALTzH9rgg]{摄魂使面具}。

他提出如下请求：

  • 英雄应将面具放在一个易于取用的斑点，但不要实际投入它或尝试使用它。系在腰带上会很理想。

  • 在与贝科拉的战斗中，在队伍将三枚支点透镜碎片全部投入贝科拉之后，如果英雄非常强烈地感受到宁布洛斯的存在（他会的），英雄应将其砸碎。

萨姆解释道：

我不知道你打碎它时会发生什么，但我要告诉你一个关于摄魂使面具的法莱斯玛秘密。按照它们的传说，如果你在死亡时佩戴着其中一个，前来收取你灵魂的摄魂使会被面具欺骗，转而试图把面具带走，从而使面具碎裂。这样，你就能欺骗死亡——至少维持一段时间。

你真以为法莱斯玛的仆从会被这种东西骗到吗？这些小型魔法物品确实能起作用，但只是因为她允许它们起作用、允许它们存在。

她希望它们稍微常见一些，因为偶尔，法莱斯玛会对其中某个面具有别的用途。现在就是这种时候。

他还会补充道：

如果你不小心把它掉在地上，它不会轻易摔碎。只有当你有意图地砸碎它时才会破裂。若你感知到宁布洛斯的存在，就这么做。

布置战斗场景

贝科拉的盟友

（这里的想法假设英雄们在 J08 吞噬室杀死了微灵，而不是让它们传送到神殿房间。）

虽然与贝科拉的战斗看起来已经相当艰难，但我认为如果能让更多剧情线在此处首尾呼应，会更有冲击力。

因此，我为这场遭遇加入了一些强力的生物，它们很可能仍然活着：

  • 那只留在 I64 受训者之室的微灵，位于狩猎场中乌木之门后方。它在贝科拉的右侧。

  • 卡利多·哈鲁维克斯，此时已经从先前与英雄们的战斗中恢复。他潜伏在门的北侧。

玫瑰团

在这段时间里，英雄们见过玫瑰团的不同成员守在各等级出口处。他们与其最后一次真正的互动大概发生在农场等级。

玫瑰团会在战斗中采取一些有限的动作，详见《最终冲突》日志页面。他们也会在最后的高潮场景中协助摩莉甘猎魂使带走贝科拉。

法莱斯玛与宁布洛斯

法莱斯玛与宁布洛斯的指示物被布置在房间的东北与西南角，设置如下：

  • 两个指示物都没有可见图像。它们只有光亮术效果。为了压制指示物图像，我将它们的高度设为 -1。这样，光亮术效果会生效，但指示物不会可见。

    • 你可能想测试一下，以确保玩家看不到指示物。某些模组可能会改变该行为。例如 PF2E Toolbelt 的 Underground 设定。只要把它设为 No Filter 即可。

  • 指示物可见性被关闭，以便在你准备好之前压制光亮术效果。这意味着它们在游戏画布上完全不可见。我把它们分别放在东北与西南角墙壁凹口前方。将鼠标悬停在它们上面可以看到指示物轮廓。

  • 每个指示物都设置为使用 Simple NPC Sheet，因为它们的神力数据并不重要。

用于末日检定的场景地区

作为游戏主持人，我的一个弱点是：在激烈的战斗中，记得做一些诸如“英雄跨过一条小水沟时要检定末日”之类的事情。对这样一场复杂的战斗来说尤其如此。

因此，我在所有沼泽小水道上方创建了场景地区，并将其连接到一个简单的聊天宏：每当某个行动者在其回合中跨过小水道时，该宏就会把相关日志文本输出到聊天栏。

@UUID[Macro.LKNokcnnxRzogend]{玩家末日检定}

如果这变得令人烦躁，先说声抱歉。我也将这些地区对 GM 可见，作为额外提醒。

Summary of Changes

I made a few changes to Belcorra's final battle, because, of course I did.

Although the origional ending, where Belcorra decides at the very end that the last thing she wants is an empty death, is quite dramatic, it was not quite in keeping with the lore I had established, where Nhimbaloth denies her followers an empty death so she can use them at some other time.

In order to keep consistant with that lore, I wanted to deny the empty death to Belcorra.

I also thought it would be quite exciting and unforgettable if the heroes were involved in a historic and cataclismic event where two deities actually come together to do battle a second time. For more information about their first encounter, see @UUID[JournalEntry.YbOS6pQRxoWI0Q56.JournalEntryPage.ohFJrgStEzdvGEEU]{Nhimbaloth} and scroll almost to the bottom.

Therefore, one of the heroes is selected to be given the means to actually summon Pharasma when the time is right. She comes for two reasons: to forcibly collect Belcorra's soul, for which she has prepared a special afterlife, and to once again face Nhimbaloth.

Finally, I added some combatants. Since I long planned to have the Roseguard make a limited reappearance, I also added a few creatures on Belcorra's side, to keep things balanced.

If these changes intrigue you, read on!

Preparations before reaching the Temple Level

Early in this module, I first introduced a more active Pharasma when I brought Saam, the priest of Pharasma, into town shortly after the heroes completed the Library level, in order to teach an adventurer the Ghost Hunter dedication.

As they draw near the temple, he will approach one of them for a special task:

  • If one of the heroes follows Pharasma, Saam will choose that hero.

  • If not, if one of the heroes took on the Ghost Hunter Dedication, Saam will choose that person.

  • If not, Saam will choose someone from either the cleric or other divine class, or a champion.

If you have no such character, then, perhaps this ending is not right for your party.

The Psychopomp Mask

Saam presents the chosen hero with what appeared to be an ordinary @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.i5SEEbSALTzH9rgg]{Psychopomp Mask}.

He requests the following:

  • The hero should keep the mask in an easily-accessable spot, without actually investing it or attempting to use it. On a belt would be ideal.

  • During the battle with Belcorra, after the party has invested all three fulcrum lens splinters into Belcorra, if the hero feels Nhimbaloth's presance very strongly (which he will), the hero should smash it.

Saam explains:

I don't know what is to happen when you break it, but I will let you into a Pharasma secret about psychopomp masks. According to their legend, if you are wearing one when you die, the psychopomp that comes to collect your soul will be fooled by the mask and attempt to take it instead, which shatters the mask. This way, you can cheat death, at least for a while.

Do you honestly think that Pharasma's minions are fooled by such a thing? These minor magical items do work, but only because she allows them to work, and to exist.

She wanted them to be somewhat common because every once in a while, Pharasma has another purpose for one of these masks. This is such a time.

He will further add:

It will not break easily if you happen to drop it. Only if you smash it with purpose. Do so if you sense Nhimbaloth's presance.

Preparing the Scene of Battle

Belcorra's Allies

(The ideas here assume that the heroes killed the wisps in J08 Devoruing Chamber instead of allowing them to teleport to the temple room.)

While the battle with Belcorra seemed quite tough, I thought it would be more impactful if it brought more plot threads full circle.

Therefore, I added some tough creatures to this encounter, which are probably still alive:

  • The wisp that stayed behind in I64 Initiates Chamber, beyond the Ebon Doors in the Hunting Grounds. It is to Belcorra's right.

  • Caliddo Haruvex, who by now has rejuvinated from his previous battle with the heroes. He is lurking north of the doors.

The Roseguard

During all this time, the heroes have seen various members of the Roseguard standing guard at level exits. The last real interaction with them was probably on the Farm level.

The Roseguard will take some limited actions in the battle, as detailed in The Final Conflict journal page. They will also help the morrigna take Belcorra away in the final climatic scene.

Pharasma and Nhimbaloth

The tokens for Pharasma and Nhimbaloth are set up at the NE and SW corners of the room, with the following settings:

  • Neither token has a visible image. They only have light effects. In order to surpress the token image, I set their elevations to -1. This way, the light effect works without a token being visible.

    • You may want to test this to ensure the player cannot see the token. A mod may change this behavior. One example of this is the Underground setting in PF2E Toolbelt. Just set it to No Filter.

  • The token visiblity is off to surpress the light effect until you are ready for them. This means that they are not visible at all on the game canvas. I put each of them in front of the notch in the walls in the NE and SW corners. Hover over them to see the token outline.

  • Each token is set up to use the Simple NPC Sheet because their divine stats do not matter.

Scene Regions for Doom Check

As a gamemaster, one of my weaknesses is remembering things like checking for doom when the heroes pass over a rivulet in the heat of combat. This is espeically true for a battle as complicated as this one.

Therefore I created scene regions over all the swamp rivulets, and attached them to a simple chat macro that dumps the relevant journal text into the chat whenever an actor crosses a rivulet during their turn.

@UUID[Macro.LKNokcnnxRzogend]{Player Doom Check}

Apologies if this gets irritating. I also made the regions visible to the GM as an extra reminder.

J10, J11, J12 - Paths of Memories.name: J10、J11、J12——记忆之路 J10, J11, J12 - Paths of Memories
J10, J11, J12 - Paths of Memories.text:
我为 @UUID[JournalEntry.yn21bNM6kpV4xRol.JournalEntryPage.YtiItJUQB7PEc61I]{J10. 愉悦回忆之径}、@UUID[JournalEntry.yn21bNM6kpV4xRol.JournalEntryPage.kzauNC4XPJrmBf4e]{J11. 失败之径} 和 @UUID[JournalEntry.yn21bNM6kpV4xRol.JournalEntryPage.xiziHQMNSOhwPi4t]{J12. 无力之径} 添加了额外的音效，让这些区域更令人难忘。

我还为映照之室新增了一种音效——风铃声。

I added additional sounds to the the @UUID[JournalEntry.yn21bNM6kpV4xRol.JournalEntryPage.YtiItJUQB7PEc61I]{J10. Path of Pleasant Memories}, the @UUID[JournalEntry.yn21bNM6kpV4xRol.JournalEntryPage.kzauNC4XPJrmBf4e]{J11. Path of Failure} and the @UUID[JournalEntry.yn21bNM6kpV4xRol.JournalEntryPage.xiziHQMNSOhwPi4t]{J12. Path of Powerlessness} to make these areas a bit more memorable.

I also added a new sound — wind chimes for the Chamber of Reflection.

J06 Crematorium.name: J06 火葬场 J06 Crematorium
J06 Crematorium.text:
很少有冒险者有胆量留在这个房间里与岩浆蝎战斗。然而，当英雄们沿着任一通道撤退时，蝎子会追赶他们。

由于蝎子体型巨大而走廊只有5'宽，因此它们将适用挤入空间规则。

Few adventurers will have the stomach to remain in this room to fight the magma scorpians. However, when the heroes retreat down either passage, the scorpion will chase them.

Since the scorpions are large and the halls are only 5'wide, the squeeze rules will apply to them.

Overview.name: 概述 Overview
Overview.text:
除了与贝科拉的最终战斗外，我对神殿所做的大部分改动只是添加光源和音效，并做了少量额外调整。

  • 在绝望灵光的挑战房间中添加了声音，以加入既愉快又不愉快的回忆。

  • 在第一、第二与第三挑战室中添加了嗡鸣声。

  • 在致命沼泽与瀑布处添加了沼泽声效。

  • 在致命沼泽中加入指向北方的拉杆地砖。

  • 在神殿中添加了更多声音，并加入贝科拉的战斗音乐。

  • 为管道修改了墙体，使其不比管道本身更宽大。

  • 遭遇 - @UUID[.U8sC2KOCcj1ZUgrI]{与贝科拉的最终战斗}。

Except for the final battle with Belcorra, the majority of changes I made to the temple were to simply to add lights and sounds, with a few small additional changes.

  • Sounds added to the Challenge of Despair rooms, to add both pleasant and unpleasant memories.

  • Drone sound added to the First, Second and Third challenge chambers.

  • Swamp sounds added to the Deadly Swamp, and the waterfall.

  • Lever tiles that point north, in the Deadly Swamp.

  • Additional sounds added to the Temple, along with Belcorra's battle music.

  • Walls modified for the pipes so they are not larger than the pipe, itself.

  • Encounter - @UUID[.U8sC2KOCcj1ZUgrI]{Final Battle with Belcorra}.

J15 Deadly Swamp.name: J15 致命沼泽 J15 Deadly Swamp
J15 Deadly Swamp.text:
我添加了使用相同拉杆图像的图块，帮助你跟踪哪些拉杆被英雄们转向北方。

当英雄们转动每个阀门时，只需让它可见即可。

这不是一个完美的解决方案，因为下面的拉杆仍然会可见，但我仍然认为这会有帮助。

I added tiles with the same lever image to help you keep track of which levers the heroes have turned to the north.

As the heroes turn each valve, simply make it visible.

It is not a perfect solution, because the lever under it will still be visible, but I still think it will help.

J19 Passage to the Depths.name: J19 通往深渊的通道 J19 Passage to the Depths
J19 Passage to the Depths.text:
我把触手蟹放在坑上方，并将其高度设为 -180，以便计算扰动尸体或制造明显噪音后，它需要两轮才会到达。

I placed the Irlgaunt over the pit and set its elevation to -180, to account for the two rounds it takes to arrive after disturbing the corpse or making significant noise.

The Final Conflict.name: 最终冲突 The Final Conflict
The Final Conflict.text:
除下文另有说明外，本场战斗按 @UUID[JournalEntry.yn21bNM6kpV4xRol.JournalEntryPage.a9b40LjI7QwLgirk]{J20. 空无之窟} 中“小标题《最终决战》”所述进行。

玫瑰团参与

玫瑰团将按如下方式参与：

  • 艾瑟芙娜将在首次有人生命值降至 10% 以下时出现。她会对该英雄施放自己最强力的治疗法术。

  • 若英雄们缺乏飞行能力，因此在尝试灌注镜片时无法对贝科拉进行接触攻击，则沃尔会出现。她会使用自己的运动来尝试抓住贝科拉并将她摔到地上。因为她们双方都是幽灵（特征），她能够做到这一点。

  • 若卡利多的存在使遭遇失衡过多，扎马夫迪安将出现。他会尝试释放一个毁灭性的法术来吸收卡利多的生命值。

  • 若在此之后的任何时刻英雄们都被压制，奥塔里将出现。

我已将隐形的玫瑰团指示物放在沼泽水池里，在需要之前它们大概不会碍事。

每个幽灵将出现并持续 1 轮。尽量不要在同一轮中让超过一个幽灵处于活动状态。四个幽灵都出现过之后，何时以及如何再次使用它们，请自行作出最佳判断。

另外，如果任何幽灵受到伤害，记得它们穿过细流时会被治疗，从而把贝科拉的房间变成对付她自己的武器。

与幽灵的徒手近战

要将各个支点镜片的“碎片”强行作用于贝科拉，必须对贝科拉进行一次“近战法术攻击掷骰”。这本质上就是徒手搏斗。

如果你的英雄们没有为与飞行目标进行徒手近战做好适当准备，那么除非沃尔帮忙把贝科拉摔到地上，否则他们可能根本无法赢得这场战斗。

然而，沃尔的帮助也应当有限。如果英雄们无法与贝科拉交战，那么他们就必须撤退，去获得一个飞行法术，或想办法把贝科拉拉进触及范围内。

我找到的一些可能的法术与物品（均低于 12 级）：

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.A2JfEKe6BZcTG1S8]{Fly} 法术

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.KlJSw919hpN6V9oK]{Potion of Flying (Standard)}

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.1erd18HS57aCyC6r]{Flying Broomstick}

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.aaua3vcUXyBFpRe9]{Soaring Wings}

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.aKoMqPDmVzPI7Q20]{Winged Sandals}

可能还有更多。

如果你的英雄打碎面具

演绎这一幕时请从容推进。英雄们灌注了碎片并打碎面具之后，他们的任务已经完成，接下来他们将成为一场宇宙戏剧的旁观者。运用你在过去 10 个地城等级中磨练出的叙事能力来描述行动，并用指示物移动来呈现动作。但也不要拖得太久。

当宁布洛斯在最后一枚来自支点镜片的碎片作用于贝科拉之后、紧接着现身时，你的英雄应当打碎面具。

  • 首先，通过激活房间西南端的隐形指示物来引入宁布洛斯。

  • 朗读 @UUID[JournalEntry.yn21bNM6kpV4xRol.JournalEntryPage.a9b40LjI7QwLgirk]{J20. 空无之窟} 中“宁布洛斯降临”标题下的文本块。

理想情况下，你的英雄此时应当打碎面具。打碎面具会召唤法莱斯玛。一名 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-monster-core.Actor.z9jEyLrsoBMmh9qg]{摩莉甘猎魂使} 将随她同行。

首先，激活房间东北端的隐形指示物，然后朗读以下内容：

房间东北端出现了一股幽蓝能量的旋风，伴随着呼啸的狂风——这风拍击的不是你的血肉，而是你的灵魂。

接着，在她身旁激活摩莉甘猎魂使。摩莉甘猎魂使在此是为了收取贝科拉的灵魂。法莱斯玛在此是为了直面宁布洛斯。

在法莱斯玛之风的激流中，一个发光的存在显现出来。她呈女性性相，身披长而飘逸、如蛛网术般的裹布，并戴着一副带有蛛网术纹样的面具。她是一名摩莉甘猎魂使，一位法莱斯玛的引魂使。

摩莉甘猎魂使将俯冲上前，试图抓住贝科拉。

摩莉甘猎魂使向贝科拉俯冲而去。与此同时，玫瑰团的每一位成员都出现在浑浊水池的上方。他们向试图后退的贝科拉飞去。众人合力将她围住，摩莉甘猎魂使用裹布抽打贝科拉。那如蛛网术般的鞭挞缠住贝科拉，紧紧箍住——这束缚甚至能困住幽灵（特征）。在她最后一声尖叫中，摩莉甘猎魂使将她拖拽而去。

他们全都消失无踪。

此时，将法莱斯玛的漩涡向宁布洛斯的散溢体移动。

一阵轰鸣自凄凉灯塔的竖井深处回荡而下；在高处，凄凉灯塔开始崩塌。

如果你的玩家不打碎面具

如果你的英雄在纷乱的行动中忘了打碎面具，你或许可以考虑提醒一下。希望其他玩家中的一人会帮忙。

如果你决定让他们承担后果，或玩家 просто 决定不打碎面具，那么贝科拉将如 @UUID[JournalEntry.yn21bNM6kpV4xRol.JournalEntryPage.a9b40LjI7QwLgirk]{J20. 空无之窟} 中“摧毁贝科拉”所述那样获得她的空无之死。

法莱斯玛会对英雄感到失望，这也许还能提供一些有趣的游戏素材。她的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.boons-and-curses.Item.ParIWsb6B4fdhrHF]{Minor Curse} 可能很合适。

事后

无论哪种情况，英雄们继续留在房间里都已不再安全。如有必要，艾瑟芙娜会再次出现，停留片刻对英雄们大喊快走。

如果你愿意，你可以让玫瑰团最后再出现一次——当英雄们抵达一个相对安全的地方时，比如北侧挑战房间。这段互动应当简短：玫瑰团向英雄们鞠躬致谢，然后永远消失。

Except as noted below, the battle proceeds as described in @UUID[JournalEntry.yn21bNM6kpV4xRol.JournalEntryPage.a9b40LjI7QwLgirk]{J20. Empty Vault}, heading "The Final Battle".

Roseguard Participation

Roseguard will participate as follows:

  • Aesephna will appear the first time someone's health drops below 10%. She will cast her most powerful healing spell on the hero.

  • Vol will appear if the heroes lack the ability to fly and are therefore unable to inflict a touch attack on Belcorra while trying to invest the lenses. She will use her athletics to try to grab Belcorra and wrestle her to the ground. Because they are both ghosts, she is able to do this.

  • Zarmavdian will appear if the presance of Caliddo overbalances the encounter too much. He will attempt to unlease a devastating spell to soak up Caliddo's health.

  • Otari will appear if the heroes are overmatched at any point after this.

I have placed the invisible Roseguard tokens in the swamp pools, where they will probably be out of the way until needed.

Each ghost will appear for the duration of one round. Try not to have more than one active during any one round. After all four ghosts have appeared, use your best judgement when and how to use them again.

Also, if any of the ghosts are damaged, remember that they will be healed by crossing the rivulets, thus using Belcorra's room against her.

Hand-to-Hand Combat with a Ghost

To force the "splinters" from the various Fulcrum Lenses upon Belcorra, it is necessary to make a "melee spell attack roll" upon Belcorra. This is essentially hand-to-hand combat.

If your heroes have not properly prepared for hand-to-hand combat with a flying target, then this battle might be impossible for them to succeed without Vol's help in wrestling Belcorra to the ground.

However, Vol should only be able to help so much. If the heroes cannot engage Belcorra, then the heroes will have to retreat to acquire either a fly spell, or to find some way to bring Belcorra into reach.

Some possible spells and items that I found, that are under 12th level:

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.A2JfEKe6BZcTG1S8]{Fly} spell

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.KlJSw919hpN6V9oK]{Potion of Flying (Standard)}

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.1erd18HS57aCyC6r]{Flying Broomstick}

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.aaua3vcUXyBFpRe9]{Soaring Wings}

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.aKoMqPDmVzPI7Q20]{Winged Sandals}

There are probably more.

If your Hero Breaks the Mask

Take your time while playing out this scene. After the heroes have invested the splinters and broken the mask, they have done their part, and they are now observers in a cosmic drama. Use your narrative powers honed over the last 10 dungeon levels to describe the action, while illustrating the action with token movements. However, do not drag it out too much.

Your hero should break the mask when Nhimbaloth makes her appearance just after the final splinter from the fulcrum lenses has been inflicted upon Belcorra.

  • First, introduce Nhimbaloth by activating the invisible token at the southwest end of the chamber.

  • Read the block text in the Nhimbaloth's Entrance heading of @UUID[JournalEntry.yn21bNM6kpV4xRol.JournalEntryPage.a9b40LjI7QwLgirk]{J20. Empty Vault}.

Ideally, your hero should break the mask at this point. The breaking of the mask will summon Pharasma. A @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-monster-core.Actor.z9jEyLrsoBMmh9qg]{Morrigna} will accompany her.

First, activate the invisible token at the northeast end of the chamber, and then read the following:

A whirlwind of ghostly blue energy appears at the northeast end of the chamber, accompanied by the howl of winds that buffet your soul, rather than your flesh.

Next, activate the morrigna next to her. The morrigna is there to collect Belcorra's soul. Pharasma is there to face Nhimbaloth.

A glowing being appears within the torrent of Pharasmid winds. It has a female aspect, and wears long, flowing web-like wrappings and a mask with a web design. It is a morrigna, a psychopomp of Pharsama.

The morrigna will swoop in and attempt to grab Belcorra.

The morrigna swoops toward Belcorra. At the same time, each member of the Roseguard appears above the murky pools. They fly toward Belcorra as she attemps to back away. Together, they surround her as the morrigna lashes Belcorra with her wrappings. The web-like lash wraps around Belcorra with a grip that can trap a ghost. The morrigna pulls her in as she screams one last time.

They all vanish.

At this point, move the Pharasma vortex toward the Nhimbaloth enamation.

A rumble echoes down from the Gauntlight shaft as far above, Gauntlight begins to collapse.

If Your Player Does Not Break the Mask

If your hero forgets to break the mask in the midst of all the action, you might want to consider a reminder. Hopefully, one of the other players will help.

If you decide to let them deal with the consequences, or if the player simply decides not to break the mask, then Belcorra will get her empty death as described in @UUID[JournalEntry.yn21bNM6kpV4xRol.JournalEntryPage.a9b40LjI7QwLgirk]{J20. Empty Vault} under "Destroying Belcorra."

Pharasma will be disappointed in the hero, which might also provide some interesting game fodder. Her @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.boons-and-curses.Item.ParIWsb6B4fdhrHF]{Minor Curse} might be appropriate.

Afterward

Either way, it is no longer safe for the heroes to remain in the room. If necessary, Aesephna will reappear long enough to yell at the heroes to go.

If you wish, you can have the Roseguard appear one final time, once the heroes have reached a semi-safe place, such as the north Challenge room. This interaction should be brief, in which the Roseguard bows to the heroes in thanks, and then disappears forever.

H13 Isolated Cage.name: H13 孤立囚笼 H13 Isolated Cage
H13 Isolated Cage.text:
我在柱子和壁架周围添加了地形墙，因为它应该在水面上方30'。

I added terrain walls to around pillar and ledge because it is supposed to be 30' above the water.

H11 Carrion Ambush.name: H11 食腐伏击 H11 Carrion Ambush
H11 Carrion Ambush.text:
我在壁架周围添加了邻近墙，因为它应该在水面上方20'。

I added proximity walls to the ledge because it is supposed to be 20' above the water.

H03 Hazy Shrine.name: H03 朦胧神殿 H03 Hazy Shrine
H03 Hazy Shrine.text:
我不同意@UUID[JournalEntry.FwWmtOBFHhvM2gtf.JournalEntryPage.nbkVdyakrVBzbfTb]{情境}，而且我不认为卡利格尼会立刻发动攻击。

他们不是贝科拉的仆从，他们也不是没有心智或本质邪恶的。我认为他们会对这些英雄是谁、想要什么抱有一定的求知欲。

尤其是在“贝科拉发动攻击”事件刚刚发生的情况下。

如果贝科拉在攻击期间尖叫……

如果英雄们刚刚与贝科拉战斗并且她尖叫了，那么声音会在这片区域回荡。

因此，卡利格尼会清空这片区域。他们中的大多数会冲向H05 兵营。其中一名会去H08警告杜拉克，另一名会去H06警告帕德利。

否则……

他们会站起来，询问英雄们是谁，以及他们在这里下面做什么。

在某个时刻，其中一名会想去@UUID[JournalEntry.FwWmtOBFHhvM2gtf.JournalEntryPage.LyqYciAwy0l9vyed]{H08 杜拉克的房间}把他们的首领叫来。

I disagree with the @UUID[JournalEntry.FwWmtOBFHhvM2gtf.JournalEntryPage.nbkVdyakrVBzbfTb]{scenario}, and I don't think the Caligni would immediately attack.

They are not Belcorra's servants, and neither are they mindless or intrinsically evil. I think they would have some intellectual curiosity as to who the heroes are and what they want.

Especially if a Belcorra Attacks event just happened.

If Belcorra screamed during the attack …

If the heroes just fought Belcorra and she screamed, then the sound would have echoed throughout this area.

Therefore, the the Caligni would have cleared the area. Most of them would have dashed to H05 Barracks. One of their number would have gone to alert Dulac in H08, and another would have gone to alert Padli in H06.

Otherwise …

They would stand up and ask who the heroes are and what they are doing down here.

At some point, one of them will want to go get their leader from @UUID[JournalEntry.FwWmtOBFHhvM2gtf.JournalEntryPage.LyqYciAwy0l9vyed]{H08 Dulac's Chamber}.

H35. Webbed Crossroads.name: H35. 蛛网交叉路口 H35. Webbed Crossroads
H35. Webbed Crossroads.text:
我将蜘蛛的海拔高度改成与@UUID[JournalEntry.FwWmtOBFHhvM2gtf.JournalEntryPage.b0AhkI9gXf14Ns4p]{ AV journal}页面一致。

Darkwood Shield 链接已损坏，所以我在等级 8 物品中添加了一个 @UUID[Item.0wdu0Kv9pLaz2B3D]{Duskwood Shield}。

我还为在此处找到的所有物品创建了一个 @UUID[Actor.QdRiTcbdxGgDafqM]{战利品容器}，并将该容器放置在场景中蜘蛛以南、海拔高度 20 的位置。

I changed the elevation of the spider to match the@UUID[JournalEntry.FwWmtOBFHhvM2gtf.JournalEntryPage.b0AhkI9gXf14Ns4p]{ AV journal} page.

The Darkwood Shield link was broken, so I added a @UUID[Item.0wdu0Kv9pLaz2B3D]{Duskwood Shield} to the level 8 items.

I also created a @UUID[Actor.QdRiTcbdxGgDafqM]{loot container} for all the items found here and placed the container on the scene, south of the spider, at elevation 20.

H17 Dock and Lift.name: H17 码头与升降机 H17 Dock and Lift
H17 Dock and Lift.text:
我修改了这部分的剧情，以移除在@UUID[JournalEntry.FwWmtOBFHhvM2gtf.JournalEntryPage.4gMUpcEFebuDe1Tf]{H17. 码头与升降机}日志条目中关于升降机的所有机械与制作检定。

根据牢房等级中@UUID[JournalEntry.OyNcqrpRClyhr8BJ.JournalEntryPage.JLM4Hwqvk9V8qvbp]{剧情}所述，封住升降机的闸门设置时间并不长。因此，升降机处于如此糟糕的状态似乎不太合理。这看起来像是剧情连续性的问题。

另外。我的英雄们在牢房等级里为了下到这里已经经历了足够多的繁琐步骤。有时候，你只是希望剧情推进下去。

贝科拉之子

所有贝科拉之子都携带@UUID[Item.ZIrgQiUhjMcwpwsC]{沼腐症}，这是我在物品标签中添加的苦难之一。

扎马夫迪安

玫瑰团@UUID[Actor.KmHFeQqAs6Zt6yCm]{术士}扎马夫迪安，在上方楼层的封印被打破后来到这里站岗。他大多会在升降机机构的机械装置之间保持隐形，我把他的角色放置在了那里。然而，如果英雄们在此处任意一场战斗中被压制，他应当在看似全盘皆输时现身来帮忙。

Mav是一名能干的术士，而且可能比玩家更强。他的法术以进攻为主。他喜欢力场齐射，因为它从不会失手。

如果英雄们不需要他，他会在所有战斗结束后出现，只是让英雄们知道他在。

无论他是否与他们并肩作战，战斗结束后，他都会保持可见足够长的时间，向他们点头以示敬意，回到自己的位置，然后消失。他不怎么说话。

萨奎舒

如果牢房等级中的萨奎舒存活下来，她会在这里等待英雄们下降。由于她是贝科拉的间谍，她不应立刻发动攻击。我为她整理了@UUID[JournalEntry.4iQ258OONGWrBrzO.JournalEntryPage.b9RuUGOykC19VNqG]{一份时间线}，其中包含英雄们第一次下降时她的动作。

她的角色位于码头西端以北的一个壁龛里。我让指示物保持可见，但启用了变暗能力使她隐形。

笼子

每个有人占据的笼子都已经有一个未激活的声音效果，除了南边那个，我在那里放置了一个。

I changed the story for this part to eliminate all the mechanical and crafting checks for the lift in the @UUID[JournalEntry.FwWmtOBFHhvM2gtf.JournalEntryPage.4gMUpcEFebuDe1Tf]{H17. Dock and Lift} journal entry.

Per @UUID[JournalEntry.OyNcqrpRClyhr8BJ.JournalEntryPage.JLM4Hwqvk9V8qvbp]{the story} in the Prison level, the gate that seals off the lift has not been in place very long. Therefore, it does not seem reasonable that the lift be in such poor condition. It seemed like a story continuity issue.

Besides. my heroes had to jump through enough hoops in the Prison level to get down here. Sometimes, you just want the story to progress.

Children of Belcorra

All the Children carry @UUID[Item.ZIrgQiUhjMcwpwsC]{Bog Rot}, which is among the afflictions I added in the Item tab.

Zarmavdian

The Roseguard @UUID[Actor.KmHFeQqAs6Zt6yCm]{sorcerer}, Zarmavdian, came here to stand guard after the seal is broken on the level above. He will mostly be invisible among the machinary of the lift mechanism, which is where I placed his actor. However, if the heores are overmatched during any of the battles in this location, he should pop out to help when all seems lost.

Mav is a capable sorceror, and is likely more powerful than the players. His spells are mostly offensive. He is fond of Force Barrage, since it never misses.

If the heroes did not need him, he will appear when all the battles are over, just to let the heroes know that he is there.

Regardless of whether he fights alongside them, after the battles, he will remain visible long enough to give them a nod of respect, return to his place, and disappear. He does not talk much.

Sacuishu

If Sacuishu in the Prison level survived, she will be here, waiting for the heroes to descend. Since she is Belcorra's spy, she should not attack right away. I put together @UUID[JournalEntry.4iQ258OONGWrBrzO.JournalEntryPage.b9RuUGOykC19VNqG]{a timeline} for her, which includes her actions the first time the heores descend.

Her actor is in a nook just north of the western end of the dock. I left the token visible, but activated the Go Dark ability to make her invisible.

Cages

Each occupied cage already had an inactive sound, except the one to the south, where I placed one.

H17 and H03 Roseguard Guardians.name: H17 和 H03 玫瑰团守护者 H17 and H03 Roseguard Guardians
H17 and H03 Roseguard Guardians.text:
由于艾塞芙娜和沃尔一直在牢房等级站岗，@UUID[Actor.JvzCKApEU3vzEfJH]{奥塔里}和@UUID[Actor.KmHFeQqAs6Zt6yCm]{扎马夫迪安}接替这里，以便让他们休息。

扎马夫迪安在@UUID[JournalEntry.FwWmtOBFHhvM2gtf.JournalEntryPage.4gMUpcEFebuDe1Tf]{H17. 码头与升降机}站岗。

奥塔里在@UUID[JournalEntry.FwWmtOBFHhvM2gtf.JournalEntryPage.nbkVdyakrVBzbfTb]{H03. 朦胧神殿}中一扇秘密门后的楼梯间站岗。

Since Aesephna and Vol have been standing guard on the Prison level, @UUID[Actor.JvzCKApEU3vzEfJH]{Otari} and @UUID[Actor.KmHFeQqAs6Zt6yCm]{Zarmavdian} take over here in order to give them a rest.

Zarmavdian stands guard at @UUID[JournalEntry.FwWmtOBFHhvM2gtf.JournalEntryPage.4gMUpcEFebuDe1Tf]{H17. Dock and Lift}.

Otari stands guard in stairwell behind a secret door in @UUID[JournalEntry.FwWmtOBFHhvM2gtf.JournalEntryPage.nbkVdyakrVBzbfTb]{H03. Hazy Shrine}.

H08 Dulac's Chambers.name: H08 杜拉克的寝室 H08 Dulac's Chambers
H08 Dulac's Chambers.text:
我再次不同意这里的情境。为什么幽暗之魂要和英雄们战斗，明明他们可以成为打破乌塔古尔对卡灵尼掌控的如此明显的棋子？

幽暗之魂也许在指引并影响卡灵尼，但它是个聪明的生物，会很快推断出英雄们能派上用场。此外，幽暗之魂很迷人，把它在一场毫无意义的战斗里杀掉似乎太浪费了。

以下是我做的改动：

  • 幽暗之魂在最初的会面与谈判期间保持隐藏。当它听说英雄们想要摆脱贝科拉时，它开始操纵杜拉克与英雄们合作。

  • 在某个时刻，当英雄们在清理该等级方面取得了显著进展时，它会与一名卡灵尼一起，在通往牢房等级的升降梯附近等待他们。

  • 它现身，并把那名卡灵尼当作自己的传声筒。我给了它说通用语的能力。

  • 随后它与英雄们交谈，试图说服他们：它想打破乌塔古尔对卡灵尼的掌控，与下一层（正下方的等级）的卡灵尼重新团聚，然后离开该区域。它承诺如果他们愿意在这件事上帮忙，就把杜拉克房间里的宝藏给他们。

  • 让他们离开该区域的任务在第9等级继续。

Once again, I disagree with the scenario here. Why would the owb fight the heroes when they could be such obvious pawns in breaking Urthagul's hold on the caligni?

The Owb may be directing and influencing the caligni, but it is an intelligent creature that would quickly deduce that the heroes could prove useful. Besides, owbs are fascinating, and it seemed a waste to kill it off in a meaningless fight.

Here's what I did:

  • The owb stays hidden during the initial meeting and negotiations. When it hears that the heroes are trying to be rid of Belcorra, it begins to manipulate Dulac to work with the heroes.

  • At some point, when the heroes have made significant progress in clearing the level, it waits for them near the lift to the Prison level along with one of the caligni.

  • It reveals itself and uses the caligni as its voice. I gave it the ability to speak common.

  • It then speaks to the heroes, trying to convince them that it would like to break Urgathul's hold on the caligni, reunite with the caligni on the level just below, and depart the area. It promises the treasure in Dulac's chamber if they will help in this task.

  • The quest for them to depart the area continues on Level 9.

H23 Shadowed Dock.name: H23 影影绰绰的码头 H23 Shadowed Dock
H23 Shadowed Dock.text:
为了让码头真正处于阴影中，并让它随着缚灵移动，我让这里的惧栗缚灵可见，但带有一个阴影的光亮术效果。

我还使用了肖像角色而不是标记，这样你的玩家就不太确定他们在与什么作战。

In order to make the dock actually shadowed, and to make it move with the wraith, I made the Dread Wraith here visible, but with a shadowed light effect.

I also used the portrait actor instead of the token so your players are not quite sure about what they are fighting.

H35 and H41 Iridescent Walls.name: H35 与 H41 虹彩之墙 H35 and H41 Iridescent Walls
H35 and H41 Iridescent Walls.text:
这里虹彩般的墙面是由洞穴精灵施作，用以标记他们领地的入口。

此音效放置在伊尔达里斯领地内的某些地点：

modules/pf2e-abomination-vaults/assets/audio/music/stings/a-dark-memory.ogg

The iridescent walls here were applied by the cavern elves to mark entrances to their territory.

This sound is placed in certain loactions in Yldaris territory:

modules/pf2e-abomination-vaults/assets/audio/music/stings/a-dark-memory.ogg

H3 Otari.name: H3 奥塔里 H3 Otari
H3 Otari.text:
这段楼梯间是奥塔里的岗哨。

他会很高兴再次见到英雄们，并且会相当健谈，想知道自从他们上次与他真正交谈（远在第4等级时）以来发生的一切。

不过，他没有新的信息可以告诉英雄们，除了告诉他们楼下的人形生物与楼上的那些很像。他也告诉他们，他没有办法阻止“黑暗幽灵”（他指的是幽暗之魂）经过——它已经这样做过几次了。它确实尝试过心灵沟通，但奥塔里没有回应。

奥塔里只会允许英雄们（以及他们护送的任何人）沿任一方向通行。

This stairwell is Otari's post.

He will be glad to see the heroes again, and will be quite talkative, wanting to know everything that has happened since his last real conversation with them way back on Level 4.

He has no new information to give the heroes, however, except to tell them that the humaoids downstairs are much like those upstairs. He also tells them that he has no way of preventing the "dark spectre" (by which he means the owb) from going by, which it has done a few times. It did attempt mental communication, but Otari did not respond.

Otari will only allow the heroes to go in either direction, along with anyone they are escorting.

Mushroom Cavern Vignette.name: 蘑菇洞窟小景 Mushroom Cavern Vignette

Introduction.name: 引言 Introduction
Introduction.text:
在对本层之上的许多等级做了一些大刀阔斧的改动之后，我在这里的改动就轻得多了。我没有移除任何怪物，不过有少数我在自己的游戏里选择淡化其存在感。

这里的改动旨在强化现有的遭遇与故事线——最显著的是“贝科拉攻击”遭遇——以及与卡林吉和卓尔的互动，还有玩法上的暗示术。

我从AV素材里添加了大量音效，让这一层更有生命力。如果你的性能受影响，你可能会想删除其中一些。

另请参阅以下内容：

@UUID[JournalEntry.jwDeGNl42MKee1zQ]{Lv. 8 贝科拉攻击}

@UUID[JournalEntry.4iQ258OONGWrBrzO]{Lv. 8 时间线}

关于重制版改动的说明

《Pathfinder》游戏系统正在用艾因迪拉（Ayindilar），亦即洞窟精灵，来替换幽暗地域的原住民。我推测这些改动最终也会渗透到《憎恨魔窟》中。在此期间，我已开始以“洞窟精灵”来称呼他们，并尝试在这些日志中贯彻这一改动。Actor在《憎恨魔窟》中被替换之前将保留原始名称。

派系

以下是你在本层会遇到的派系概览。除这些生物外，每个派系还有各自独特的领袖。

贝科拉之子

有三种自称为贝科拉之子的沼泽木乃伊：

@UUID[Actor.vHei0y2PKlXfxQ8Z]{贝科拉之子}

@UUID[Actor.00s3MhFQ4yOp2rTf]{贝科拉之子长老}

@UUID[Actor.jCJUvzs1FaL6PAkq]{空无之死 博达克}

贝科拉之子出现在@UUID[JournalEntry.FwWmtOBFHhvM2gtf.JournalEntryPage.4gMUpcEFebuDe1Tf]{H17. 码头与升降机}、@UUID[JournalEntry.FwWmtOBFHhvM2gtf.JournalEntryPage.hD6CSfmfkrSopsaw]{H21. 远古者洞窟}与@UUID[JournalEntry.FwWmtOBFHhvM2gtf.JournalEntryPage.Vwd8vMBerJCAoN4N]{H23. 阴影笼罩的码头}周边的区域。

微灵

@UUID[Actor.2TOXR7nKS6xPng2Y]{恐怖鬼火}

@UUID[Actor.3vn9W5SThovdsEnY]{萨奎舒}

萨奎舒与其他微灵几乎没有关联，除了会使用它们巢穴中的水盆；这些巢穴位于@UUID[JournalEntry.FwWmtOBFHhvM2gtf.JournalEntryPage.0EtecMBSYJDok7n7]{H02. 眼之厅}与@UUID[JournalEntry.FwWmtOBFHhvM2gtf.JournalEntryPage.tXdibKRkxLO9wGnz]{H10. 乌塔古尔的阶梯}。

它们不会去招惹她。

卡林吉

本层的卡林吉及其相关生物如下：

@UUID[Actor.gWxpeqOQ54Jd4HTG]{卡林吉潜行者}

@UUID[Actor.JkJRKxuIGJ3DOD9L]{幽暗之魂}

卡林吉住在@UUID[JournalEntry.FwWmtOBFHhvM2gtf.JournalEntryPage.nbkVdyakrVBzbfTb]{H03. 朦胧神龛}周边区域，以及下方第9层。他们停留在此处，是因为H10区域的微灵阻止他们前去拜访乌塔古尔。

洞窟精灵

洞窟精灵在@UUID[JournalEntry.FwWmtOBFHhvM2gtf.JournalEntryPage.4QXTuClUwtKkEjHA]{H45 }与@UUID[JournalEntry.FwWmtOBFHhvM2gtf.JournalEntryPage.5Fkuvc9hgwKyc4tY]{H41}周边有一处据点，H41通往下一层他们的前哨站。他们会在蘑菇花园周围巡弋，但目前巨硕蜘蛛把他们困在了里面。

本层的变体与相关生物如下：

@UUID[Actor.OqoWbYOyHDGHEeHV]{卓尔猎手}

@UUID[Actor.DawBQWRyrM4cKfGI]{卓尔卫士}

@UUID[Actor.E4ctF7Fvi3cdkgQq]{猎蛛}

After making some heavy-handed changes to many of the levels above this one, my touch here is quite a bit lighter. I have removed none of the monsters, although a few I chose to de-emphasize in my own game.

The changes here are to enhance existing encounters and storylines—most prominently the Belcorra Attacks encounters—interactions with the caligni and the drow, and gameplay suggestions.

I added a lot of sounds from the AV assets to make this level come alive. If your performance is suffering, you may want to delete some of them.

See also the following:

@UUID[JournalEntry.jwDeGNl42MKee1zQ]{Lv. 8 Belcorra Attacks}

@UUID[JournalEntry.4iQ258OONGWrBrzO]{Lv. 8 Timelines}

A Note on the Remaster Changes

The Pathfinder game system is replacing the original inhabitants of the Darklands with Ayindilar, or cavern elves. I am assuming those changes will eventually perculate to Abomination Vaults. In the meantime, I have begun to refer to them as cavern elves, and have attempted to make this change througout these journals. Actors will retain the original names until replaced in Abomination Vaults.

Factions

Here is an overview of the factions you will find on this level. In addition to these creatures, each faction has unique leaders.

Children of Belcorra

There are three types of bog mummies that call themselves Children of Belcorra:

@UUID[Actor.vHei0y2PKlXfxQ8Z]{Child of Belcorra}

@UUID[Actor.00s3MhFQ4yOp2rTf]{Elder Child of Belcorra}

@UUID[Actor.jCJUvzs1FaL6PAkq]{Empty Death Bodak}

Children are found in the areas around @UUID[JournalEntry.FwWmtOBFHhvM2gtf.JournalEntryPage.4gMUpcEFebuDe1Tf]{H17. Dock and Lift}, @UUID[JournalEntry.FwWmtOBFHhvM2gtf.JournalEntryPage.hD6CSfmfkrSopsaw]{H21. Ancients’ Caves} and @UUID[JournalEntry.FwWmtOBFHhvM2gtf.JournalEntryPage.Vwd8vMBerJCAoN4N]{H23. Shadowed Dock}.

Wisps

@UUID[Actor.2TOXR7nKS6xPng2Y]{Dread Wisp}

@UUID[Actor.3vn9W5SThovdsEnY]{Sacuishu}

Sacuishi has little to do with the other wisps other than to use the basins in their lairs, which are @UUID[JournalEntry.FwWmtOBFHhvM2gtf.JournalEntryPage.0EtecMBSYJDok7n7]{H02. Hall of Eyes} and @UUID[JournalEntry.FwWmtOBFHhvM2gtf.JournalEntryPage.tXdibKRkxLO9wGnz]{H10. Stairs of Urthagul}.

They leave her alone.

Caligni

The caligni and their associated creatures on this level are:

@UUID[Actor.gWxpeqOQ54Jd4HTG]{Caligni Stalker}

@UUID[Actor.JkJRKxuIGJ3DOD9L]{Owb}
