The caligni live in the area around @UUID[JournalEntry.FwWmtOBFHhvM2gtf.JournalEntryPage.nbkVdyakrVBzbfTb]{H03. Hazy Shrine}, and downstairs on the 9th level. They stay in this area since the wisps in area H10 are preventing them from visiting Urthagul.

Cavern Elves

The cavern elves have a stronghold around @UUID[JournalEntry.FwWmtOBFHhvM2gtf.JournalEntryPage.4QXTuClUwtKkEjHA]{H45 }and @UUID[JournalEntry.FwWmtOBFHhvM2gtf.JournalEntryPage.5Fkuvc9hgwKyc4tY]{H41}, which leads to their outpost on the next level down. They prowl around the mushroom garden, but currently, the goliath spider has them penned in.

The variants here and associated creatures on this level are:

@UUID[Actor.OqoWbYOyHDGHEeHV]{Drow Hunter}

@UUID[Actor.DawBQWRyrM4cKfGI]{Drow Warden}

@UUID[Actor.E4ctF7Fvi3cdkgQq]{Hunting Spider}

H17 Rowboat.name: H17 划艇 H17 Rowboat
H17 Rowboat.text:
划艇

码头区域中的所有船只都是图块。我在其中一个图块上放置了一个处于隐形状态的 @UUID[Actor.2kTDXd2odS35Ok9Y]{Rowboat} actor。当你的英雄准备好冒险出湖时，使用这个宏将图块设为隐形，并让划艇 actor 变为可见。

@UUID[Macro.JhTiVvjkD2IOzBTm]{Toggle Farm Boat}

在你进行遭遇之前，划艇 actor 可以代表队伍。我把“Owner”权限给了整个队伍，所以你的玩家应该能够透过它看到。

当你确实在湖上发生战斗时（这很可能），划艇 actor 会很有用，因为即使数值调得过强，它也可以作为一个避难处。只需把你的队伍 actor 添加到场景中，然后开始你的遭遇。

Rowboat

All of the boats in the dock area are tiles. I put a @UUID[Actor.2kTDXd2odS35Ok9Y]{Rowboat} actor over one of those tiles, in an invisible state. When your heroes are ready to venture out onto the lake, use this macro to turn the tile invisible and the rowboat actor visible.

@UUID[Macro.JhTiVvjkD2IOzBTm]{Toggle Farm Boat}

The rowboat actor can represent the party until you have an encounter. I gave the "Owner" permission to the entire pary, so your players should be able to see through it.

When you do have an on-lake battles, which is likely, the Rowboat actor will be useful since, even if overtuned, it could be a place of refuge. Simply add your party actors to the scene, and start your encounter.

If H19 Elder Child Survives ....name: 若H19年长的孩子幸存…… If H19 Elder Child Survives ...
If H19 Elder Child Survives ....text:
为了让贝科拉的长子更棘手一些，他应该设法逃走，而不是战斗至死。

  • 首先，他会尝试通过“与石合一”法术的“融入岩石”选项逃离。如果成功，他会尝试前往一处沼泽。规则并未说明他在融入时是否能移动，因此我给了他每轮5点移动。这会给他足够时间一路向北直到碰到水，然后游下去进入湖底的沼泽。

  • 如果还有其他孩子幸存，他们会在他们的沼泽之家重新会合。这也包括来自其他区域的木乃伊（特征）。

  • 长者以每天9点hp的速度恢复，但两天后会浮出水面，开始大快朵颐英雄们留下的任何死肉。规则并未提供沼泽木乃伊（特征）以这种方式进行治疗的机制，因此我根据啃食尸体的食尸鬼（特征）的治疗速率编写了如下规则。

啃食尸体

需求 沼泽木乃伊（特征）与一具在过去两天内死亡的生物的尸体相邻

效果 沼泽木乃伊（特征）吞食尸体的一块肉，并根据尸体死亡时间恢复生命值：

少于12小时 - 恢复 [[/r 1d8[healing]]]{1d8 Hit Points}

12至24小时之间- 恢复 [[/r 1d6[healing]]]{1d6 Hit Points}

24至48小时之间- 恢复 [[/r 1d4[healing]]]{1d4 Hit Points}

沼泽木乃伊（特征）从任意一具特定尸体中只能恢复一次Hit Points。

注：微灵的海绵状残骸尤其富含虚空治疗的精华，因此它从任何变体的死去微灵身上获得的生命值是原来的两倍。

  • 一旦他恢复完毕，并且也让几名同胞恢复了一些，他就会埋伏等待英雄们下次出现在码头周围的区域。

为便于升级计算，这场战斗应当与贝科拉和萨奎舒的战斗分开。这样可以确保英雄们在乘升降梯下行时始终保持清醒机敏。

To make the Elder Child even more troublesome, he should get away rather than fight to the death.

  • First, he would try to get away via a One With Stone spell's Merge with Stone option. If successful, he would try to get to a bog. The rules do not state whether or not he can move while merged, so I gave him 5 movement points a round. This would give him time to go to the north until he hits water, and then swim down into the bog at the bottom of the lake.

  • If any other children survived, they would reunite in their boghome. This includes mummies from other areas.

  • The elder heals at a rate of 9 hp per day, but will surface after two days and start feasting on any dead flesh that the heroes left lying around. The rules do not provide for bog mummy healing in this manner, so I made up the following rules based on the healing rate of a ghoul that consumes dead flesh.

Consume Flesh

Requirements The bog bog mummy is adjacent to the corpse of a creature that died in the last two days

Effect The bog mummy devours a chunk of the corpse and regains hit points according to how old it is:

Less than 12 hours - regain [[/r 1d8[healing]]]{1d8 Hit Points}

Between 12 and 24 hours - regain [[/r 1d6[healing]]]{1d6 Hit Points}

Between 24 and 48 hours - regain [[/r 1d4[healing]]]{1d4 Hit Points}

The bog mummy can regain Hit Points from any given corpse only once.

Note: the spongy remains of a wisp is especially rich in void healing goodness, so it gains twice the amount of hit points from any variant of dead wisp.

  • Once he has healed, and healed up a few of his brethern, he would wait in ambush for the next time the heroes appear in the area around the docks.

For leveling purposes, this battle should be separate from the Belcorra and Sacuishu battle. This will ensure the heroes always have their wits about them when they descend the lift.

Sacuishu Timeline.name: 萨奎舒时间线 Sacuishu Timeline
Sacuishu Timeline.text:
升降梯中的第一次下降

在码头上方很高处，萨奎舒一直注视着上方的竖井，等待升降梯下降。

当升降梯下降时，她会观察英雄们的行动，小心不靠得太近。

然而，她必须保持专注才能让她的变暗效果持续生效，而描述中并未提及任何能让她长时间维持该效果的能力。因此，她需要大约每十号分钟左右进行一次短暂的休息，以重新补充她的变暗。

因此，在下行途中，英雄们至少应当看到一次神秘光亮的短暂闪现。

后续行动

她会在远处观察英雄们如何应对贝科拉之子以及升降梯区域周围的所有危险。因此，这道神秘光亮应当会持续出现。她会尝试在不被看见时变暗，例如当角色正在进行调查行动某个房间，或藏在某处缝隙中时。

向贝科拉汇报

过一段时间后，她会想要向贝科拉汇报。为此，她会前往 H02 眼之厅，并使用那里的一只探知碗。如果英雄们在那里逮到她，她不会参与任何战斗，而是会变暗并向北方逃脱。

与贝科拉的战斗

关于萨奎舒的最终战斗，见 @UUID[JournalEntry.jwDeGNl42MKee1zQ.JournalEntryPage.FVsfyDYAE0epm4xo]{贝科拉攻击 H17}。

The First Descent in the Lift

High above the docks, Sacuishu has been watching the shaft above, waiting for the lift to descend.

When it does, she observes the heroes activities, being careful not to get too close.

However, she must concentrate to keep her Go Dark effect active, and the description does not mention any ability to sustain it for a long period of time. Therefore, she needs to take a brief rest every ten minutes or so, to recharge her Go Dark.

Therefore, on the way down, the heroes should see at least one brief shining of a mysterious light.

Subsequent Activities

She will watch, from a distance, while the heroes deal with the Children of Belcorra and all the dangers around the lift area. Therefore, the mysterious light should continue to appear. She will try to Go Dark while out of sight, such as when the characters are investigating a room, or within some cranny.

Reporting to Belcorra

After a while, she will want to report in to Belcorra. To do so, she will go to H02 Hall of Eyes, and use one of the scrying bowls there. If the heroes catch her there, she will not take part in any battle, but will Go Dark and escape to the north.

Battle with Belcorra

For Sacuishu's final battle, see @UUID[JournalEntry.jwDeGNl42MKee1zQ.JournalEntryPage.FVsfyDYAE0epm4xo]{Belcorra Attack H17}.

Lv. 4 Side Quest - The Cooperative Blade.name: 4级支线任务 - 合作之刃 Lv. 4 Side Quest - The Cooperative Blade

The Theft of the Cooperative Blade.name: 合作之刃的盗窃 The Theft of the Cooperative Blade
The Theft of the Cooperative Blade.text:
在《憎恨魔窟》第 5 章的序章中，Carmen Rajani 放火以分散晨花图书馆工作人员的注意力，然后打碎合作之刃的展示柜，抓起长剑就逃之夭夭。

然而，看一眼 Carmen 的角色资料页就能知道，Carmen 是个技术娴熟的盗贼。做出如此拙劣的抢劫，未免有失他的职业尊严。

而且，他最想做的就是避免把注意力引到自己身上。他知道自己已经因为那把剑闹出了足够大的动静，因此他会是头号嫌疑人。

因此，依我拙见，他会在深夜使用盗窃工具撬入晨花图书馆。进入后，他会小心打开展示柜，取走长剑，再把柜子关好，然后潜行离开。

这样一来，要过上好几个小时才会有人意识到是他拿走了它。

为了方便这次盗窃，你可以使用一个宏来在展示柜内切换合作之刃的可见性开关。你可以在这里找到这个宏：

@UUID[JournalEntry.hAAwqEULqXjnDBsG.JournalEntryPage.8WizgDjMQhvbpqX7]{Main Chamber}

In the prelude to Chapter 5 of the Abomination Vaults, Carmen Rajani sets a fire to distract the staff of the Dawnflower Library, and then shatters the display case of the Cooperative Blade, grabs the sword, and bolts.

However, a glance at Carmen's actor sheet tells me that Carmen is a skillful thief. It would be beneath his professional dignity to execute such a shoddy robbery.

Also, he would want most of all to avoid drawing attention to himself. He knows he has caused enough fuss about the blade that he would be the prime suspect.

Therefore, in my humble opinion, he would have used thievery tools to break into the Dawnflower Library in the dead of the night. Once within, he would carefully open the display case, take the sword, close the case, and sneak away.

This way, it would be hours before anyone realizes that he took it.

To facilitate the theft, you can use a macro to turn the visibility of the Cooperative Blade within the display case on and off. You can find this macro here:

@UUID[JournalEntry.hAAwqEULqXjnDBsG.JournalEntryPage.8WizgDjMQhvbpqX7]{Main Chamber}

Confronting Carmen.name: 直面卡门 Confronting Carmen
Confronting Carmen.text:
在使用这段支线剧情之前，请先考虑我在 @UUID[JournalEntry.LhSYWJS9K8maR8sQ.JournalEntryPage.h3ooov1Qjx2XrnEu]{卡门·拉贾尼}角色研究中提出的角色构想。

这场遭遇始于英雄们在合作之刃被盗后追踪并找到卡门，并在 @UUID[Scene.OqDydStfUOPyOyIv]{走私者避难所}与他对峙之时。关于场景的特定信息，请参阅此日志：@UUID[JournalEntry.jhmtGaWQPikTwLSI]{4级 走私者避难所}

由于英雄们很可能已经不得不和卡门打过好几次交道，他们应该对他略有了解。最终，他们应当会追踪他到走私者避难所。

到这时，卡门已经在后悔自己鲁莽地拿走那把剑的决定。当英雄们出现时，他可能会说诸如“哦，是你们。”或“他们派你们来的？”之类的话，但他并没有要战斗的意思。

如果英雄们试图谈判，他将终于愿意开口。如果他们立刻开打，他仍会在自卫的同时试图用类似下面的话来阻止战斗。

先等等。有种感觉告诉我拉杜斯没派你们来。这样吧，我在洞穴后面发现了一瓶老威士忌，是好东西。我们到火堆边喝一杯，我尽量给你们一些答案。

一旦在火堆旁坐下，他会把在洞里找到的“老律法威士忌”那瓶酒递给大家轮流喝。

  • 对于盗窃这件事，他没什么好为自己辩解的，只会说自己总是会因一时冲动而把生活搞砸，而塔米莉已经为此和他说过很多次了。

  • 如果被问到他和市长之间的矛盾，他会解释说多年前他被送去跟奥瑟夫学剑术当学徒，结果嘛，并不顺利。从那以后他们一直不对付。

    • （如果英雄们去问奥瑟夫，连他自己都会承认他是个糟糕的导师，这也是他为什么会为孩子们雇佣家教。）

  • 如果英雄们提到是奥塔里本人派他们来的，在最初的难以置信之后，他会问那位幽灵（特征）要这把剑做什么。

  • 如果他们告诉他关于奥塔里在祭坛上提议的仪式，他会皱起脸想一会儿，然后说道：

我想亲眼看看那件事完成。如果你们承诺在把剑放到那个祭坛上时带我一起去，我现在就把它给你们。

他信守承诺。一旦他们做出承诺，他会把剑交给队伍里最显眼的战士，并提出要和他们一起回到晨花图书馆。

范迪痛恨盗窃，并且对他有所怀疑；但由于他在拿走武器时小心翼翼没有造成任何损坏，而且他已经归还了那把剑，她并不打算追究任何指控。

然而，作为偿还，她要求他以铁匠的技能参与寺院周围的若干工程，让他在接下来的几周里一直忙个不停。

Before using this subplot, please consider the character ideas that I present in the @UUID[JournalEntry.LhSYWJS9K8maR8sQ.JournalEntryPage.h3ooov1Qjx2XrnEu]{Carmen Rajani} Character Study.

This encounter begins after the heroes track Carman down after the theft of the Cooperative Blade, when they confront him at @UUID[Scene.OqDydStfUOPyOyIv]{Smuggler's Refuge}. See this journal for scene-specific information: @UUID[JournalEntry.jhmtGaWQPikTwLSI]{Lv. 4 Smuggler's Refuge}

Since the heroes most likely have had to do business with Carmen more than a few times, they should know him a little. Eventually, they should track him down to the Smuggler's Refuge.

By this time, Carmen is already regretting his rash decision to take the blade. When the heroes show up, he might say something like, "Oh, it's you." or "They sent you?" but he makes no move to fight.

If the heroes try to parley, he will finally be inclined to talk. If they immediately start a fight, he will still try to stop combat by saying something like the following while defending himself.

Now hold on. Something tells me Lardus didn't send you. Tell you what. I found this old bottle of whisky in the back of the cave. It's some good stuff. Let's have a drink at the fire and I'll try to give you some answers.

Once seated around the fire, he will pass around the bottle of Old Law Whiskey that was in the cave.

  • He doesn't have much to say for himself about the theft, except to say that he has a tendency to ruin his life with rash impulses, and that Tamily has spoken to him about it many times.

  • If asked about the rivalry between him and the Mayor, he will explain that years ago, he was sent to apprentice with Oseph in swordfighting, and, well, it did not work out well. They have been at odds ever since.

    • (If the heroes ask Oseph about it, even he will acknowledge that he is a poor instructor, which is why he hires tutors for his children.)

  • If the heroes mention being sent by Otari himself, after some initial disbelief, he will ask what the ghost wants with the sword.

  • If they tell him about Otari's proposed ritual at the altar, he will scrunch up his face, think for a moment, and then say,

I would like to see that done. If you promise that you will take me with you when you place the sword on that altar, I'll give it to you right now.

He keeps his word. Once they make the promise, he will hand the blade over to the most obvious warrior in the group, and will offer to return to Dawnflower Library with them.

Vandy hates theft, and is suspicious of him, but, since he took the weapon while taking care to not damage anything, and because he already returned the blade, she is not inclined to press any charges.

However, in repayment, she demands his skill as a smith in a number of projects around the temple that will keep him busy for several weeks.

Pharasma's Cleric, Saamsuma.name: 法莱斯玛的牧师，Saamsuma Pharasma's Cleric, Saamsuma
Pharasma's Cleric, Saamsuma.text:
当英雄们闯过凄凉灯塔第三层的大部分区域时，他们已经有机会解放数个饱受折磨的灵魂：

  • 波波，曾是沃鲁克·阿兹里尼的仆人，如今被束缚在一颗灵魂宝石中，

  • 尚德里·尹萨，曾爱着沃鲁克·阿兹里尼，

  • 贾瑞尔·卡德瑞恩，那位无法休息的图书管理员，

  • 以及这些楼层各处的数个怨灵作祟。

在原本的故事中，当英雄们解放波波时，这会引起法莱斯玛的注意，而她会赐予“法莱斯玛的恩宠”。

按我的想法，当他们也解放了两位幽灵（特征）以及数个怨灵作祟之后，英雄们将会引起这位女神更大的关注。

于是她会派来一位牧师。

@UUID[Actor.R8Y8NbULhNkyoBcV]{Saamsuma}

萨姆苏玛，或简称萨姆，不仅仅是一名牧师——他还是一名拥有幽灵猎手变体的牧师。他在第三个灵魂被解放后大约一周左右抵达，并向队伍提供一本魔法典籍，使其中一人能够重训为幽灵猎手。他把它放在自己的物品栏里。

@UUID[Item.Mg7wK84qPHvHIRvA]{Ghost Hunter's Codex}

他也愿意亲自训练其他人，但这将花费更长的时间。

萨姆苏玛很快决定无限期留在奥塔里，并在奥塔里墓园的悬崖边入口处建立一座法莱斯玛的神龛。他开始在喧闹的石斑鱼租房。他将在本次冒险的余下部分都能作为导师为英雄们提供帮助。

They the time the heroes get through most of third level of the Gauntlight, they have had the opportunity to set free several tortured souls:

  • Borbo, the onetime servant of Volluk Azrinae, now bound to a soul gem,

  • Chandriu Invisar, who loved Volluk Azrinae,

  • Jarelle Kaldrian, the librarian who cannot rest,

  • several haunts throughout these levels.

In the original story, when the heroes free Borbo, it attracts Pharasma's attention and she grant's Pharasma's Favor.

In my thinking, by the time they have also freed two ghosts and several haunts, the heroes will have attracted even greater notice from the goddess.

And she would send a cleric.

@UUID[Actor.R8Y8NbULhNkyoBcV]{Saamsuma}

Saamsuma, or just Saam, is more than a cleric, he is a cleric with the Ghost Hunter archetype. He arrives a week or so after the third soul is freed, and offers to the party a magical volume that will allow one person to retrain as a Ghost Hunter. It is in his inventory.

@UUID[Item.Mg7wK84qPHvHIRvA]{Ghost Hunter's Codex}

He is also willing to train others himself, but this will take longer.

Saamsuma soon decides to stay in Otari indefinitely, and he establishes a shrine to Pharasma at the cliffside entrance to the Otari Graveyard. He begins renting rooms at the Rowdy Rockfish. He will be available to the heroes for the rest of the adventure, as a mentor.

C36 - Chandriu and Volluk.name: C36 - 钱德里乌与沃鲁克 C36 - Chandriu and Volluk
C36 - Chandriu and Volluk.text:
当英雄们抵达 C36 抄写间时，他们应该已经了解了不少关于那位术士兼透镜匠沃鲁克·阿兹里尼的事迹。在得知他对波波做了什么之后，他们也许已经开始憎恨他了。

在这个区域里，你有机会让英雄们更加憎恨他。因为尚德里·尹萨已经对他魂牵梦萦了 500 年。

@UUID[Actor.3H1rBpUQwTcNd6xZ]{尚德里·尹萨}

让尚德里永久安息的关键，写在她的 Actor 页面中，“复生”条目下的“被动”标题里：

要让尚德里永久安息，英雄必须成功进行一次 @Check[type:diplomacy|dc:21|name:Convince Chandriu|overrideTraits:true] 检定，说服她不再对沃鲁克魂牵梦萦。

尚德里在没有飘浮于她想象中的抄写员上方时，会不断重复他的名字并哀叹：

沃鲁克·阿兹里尼，沃鲁克·阿兹里尼，你为什么离开我？你去了哪里？你还活着吗？你忘了我吗？沃鲁克·阿兹里尼，沃鲁克·阿兹里尼！

她是个力量较弱的幽灵（特征），因此无法长时间思考其他任何事情。只要有机会，她就应该重复他的全名，这会帮助你在英雄们心中牢牢记住他的身份。

如果这些“新抄写员”问太多问题，或试图让她思考，尚德里可能会失去耐心。但他们必须对她保持耐心，才能让她的灵魂安息，因为他们需要进入那扇暗门之后的区域。若她仍处于活跃状态，他们试图进入该区域时，她会攻击他们。

一些说服她“沃鲁克也许不值得她如此哀叹”的点子：

  • 他怎么可能为了一个只想着复仇、渴求力量的中年女人，而离开像尚德里这样美丽的姑娘？

  • 他背叛了忠诚的仆从波波——波波信任他，而他却骗波波接受了被困在娃娃里的可怕不朽。若他们能向她展示破损的 @UUID[Item.5OzSdD8ClCBO8BZR]{Mr. Beak Doll}（他们在其中找到了波波的灵魂宝石），并描述沃鲁克打算最终把波波转移进那具将承载波波灵魂的 @UUID[Item.CsnA44p9IJlw72rg]{不完整的缚魂娃娃}，将会非常有帮助。她会亲切地回忆起那个地精。若被告知沃鲁克对波波做了什么，以及他如何冷酷地抛弃了波波，这也许会震撼她，让她放下沃鲁克。

  • 一旦他们真正见过沃鲁克，并目睹他令人作呕地变形为蠕虫形态，他们可能会带着他对自己所做之事的报告回来找她。她起初也许不信，但若他们能准确描述他目前的形态，那种恐怖也许会让她彻底崩溃。她甚至可能回想起他对某本书的痴迷：如虫所晓。

归根结底，让她安息的 DC 并不高；在我看来，GM 应该用“成功的结果”奖励良好的角色扮演，而不是依赖掷骰。若英雄们已经让尚德里得以平静安息，那么击败沃鲁克·阿兹里尼将会更令人满足。

抄写间的剧本文字包含沃鲁克·阿兹里尼的肖像图片，但它实际上并不是一件库存物品。我已将该肖像制作成一件物品，并把它和一件缺失的 +1 链甲衫一起加入尚德里的骸骨中。为此我不得不使用一个新的战利品 Actor，否则这些改动不会在你的游戏世界中持续保留。

@UUID[Actor.DB2rFujEH73bGTFR]{尚德里的遗骸（含额外物品）}

By the time the heroes reach C36 Scriptorium, they should have learned quite a bit about the sorcerer and lenscrafter, Volluk Azrinae. They might already hate him after learning what he did to Borbo.

In this area, you have an opportunity to make the heroes hate him even more. For Chandriu Invisar has been pining over him for 500 years.

@UUID[Actor.3H1rBpUQwTcNd6xZ]{Chandriu Invisar}

The key to putting Chandriu to rest permanently is found on her Actor sheet, under the Passive heading of "Rejuvenation":

To put Chandriu to rest permanently, a hero must convince her to stop pining over Volluk with a successful @Check[type:diplomacy|dc:21|name:Convince Chandriu|overrideTraits:true] check.

Chandriu, when she is not hovering over her imaginary scribes, is constantly repeating his name while lamenting:

Volluk Azrinae, Volluk Azrinae, why did you leave me? Where did you go? Are you even alive? Have you forgotten me? Volluk Azrinae, Volluk Azrinae!

She is a low-powered ghost, and therefore is unable to think about anything else for long. She should repeat his full name whenever she has a chance, which will help cement his identity in your heroes.

Chandriu may lose patience with her "new scribes" if they ask too many questions or attempt to get her to think. But they must be patient with her in order to put her spirit to rest, for they need what is beyond the secret door. She will attack them if they try to enter that area while she is active.

Some ideas on convincing her that Volluk might not be worth her laments:

  • How could he possibly leave such a beautiful girl as Chandriu for a power-mad middle-aged woman who only thinks of revenge?

  • He betrayed his faithful servant, Borbo, who trusted him, by tricking him to accept a horrible immortality trapped in a doll. It would greatly help if they show her the broken @UUID[Item.5OzSdD8ClCBO8BZR]{Mr. Beak Doll}, where they found his soul gem, and describe how Volluk intended to eventually move him into the @UUID[Item.CsnA44p9IJlw72rg]{Incomplete Soulbound Doll} that was to carry Borbo's soul. She will recall the goblin fondly. If told what Volluk did to Borbo, and how he callously abandoned him, it might shock her into letting him go.

  • Once they have actually met Volluk, and witnessed his repulsive transformation into worm-form, they might return to her with a report of what he did to himself. She might not believe them at first, but the horror of it might put her over the edge if they are able to accurately describe his current form. She may even recall his obsession with a certain book, What the Worm Knows.

Ultimately, the DC to put her to rest is not difficult, and in my opinion, the gamemaster should reward good roleplaying with a successful outcome, rather than relying on dice rolls. It will be that much more satisfying to defeat Volluk Azrinae if they have already given Chandriu her peaceful rest.

The scenario text for the Scriptorium includes the image of Volluk Azrinae's portrait, but it is not actually an inventory item. I have created an item from the portrait and added it to Chandriu's bones, along a missing +1 chain shirt. I had to use a new loot actor for this, otherwise the changes would not persist in your game world.

@UUID[Actor.DB2rFujEH73bGTFR]{Chandriu's Remains with Extras}

C13 - Jarelle Kaldrian.name: C13 - 贾瑞尔·卡德瑞恩 C13 - Jarelle Kaldrian
C13 - Jarelle Kaldrian.text:
在 C13 房间“图书管理员的工作室”里，图书管理员卡瑞尔·卡德瑞恩痴迷于她的工作。

@UUID[Actor.hia81Ut7fEREbhkq]{贾瑞尔·卡德瑞恩}

她的角色卡上写着，只要把房间里的工具和桌子搬走，就能让她得以休息。

我在跑团时没在角色卡上看到这段，所以我自己编了一个：食尸鬼把她逼到死亡，她只有在食尸鬼女王纳卡扎林死后才能得以休息。

为了游戏便利，我制作了这个挎包，它就在贾瑞尔的工坊里四散的物品之中。

@UUID[Item.6RWcpGdJqNEpXTUD]{图书管理员的书本挎包}

In room C13 Librarian's Workroom, the librarian Karelle Kaldarian is obsessed with her work.

@UUID[Actor.hia81Ut7fEREbhkq]{Jarelle Kaldrian}

Her actor sheet states that she can be put to rest by removing the tools and tables from the room.

When I was running the game, I did not see this on the actor sheet, so I came up with something on my own: the ghouls drove her to her death, she will only be put to rest by the death of the ghoul queen, Nhakazarin.

For gameplay convenience, I created this satchel, which is among the items scattered around Jarelle's workshop.

@UUID[Item.6RWcpGdJqNEpXTUD]{Librarian's Book Satchel}

C15 - Goblin Gang - KraDup's Fate.name: C15 - 地精帮派 - 克拉杜普的命运 C15 - Goblin Gang - KraDup's Fate
C15 - Goblin Gang - KraDup's Fate.text:
目前为止的故事详见：@UUID[JournalEntry.UPCJOXs6P7caGN4c.JournalEntryPage.ABgfwm0uoOnFMY5m]{寻找首领的爪牙}。

尽管KraDup一生诡诈，但他从未经历过如此背叛。当他的两名伙伴继续前往下方的楼梯时，溃烂教徒扑向了他，从他身上撕咬下一块块血肉，并让他感染了食尸鬼热，直到最后，他死去了。

第二天，在纳卡扎林的房间里，他以食尸鬼（特征）的形态苏醒。

纳卡扎林将一条由他自身血肉制成的项链交给他，以此接纳他加入溃烂教团。

他游荡了一段时间，最终来到了灯塔阅览室。在那里，他得以治疗术至全盛状态。从那以后，他的大部分时间都在这里度过。

他过去的大多数财物对他已毫无用处，但他仍保留着些许昔日的贪婪，让他把旧背包躲藏在阅览室的一张小桌子下面。

@UUID[Actor.Aeuws6jKtVMT1cyb]{KraDup Ghoul}

@UUID[Actor.1WHQ0I8Psdvvet1p]{KraDup's Stuff}

注：当我把KraDup放进这个房间时，这里已经有两只食尸鬼和一名溃烂教徒。KraDup按精英食尸鬼运作，但不具备溃烂教徒的法术。若他在此会使战斗失衡，则考虑将一只或多只怪物移到另一个房间。

The story so far is detailed in: @UUID[JournalEntry.UPCJOXs6P7caGN4c.JournalEntryPage.ABgfwm0uoOnFMY5m]{Minions in Search of a Boss}.

Although he has lived a life of treachery, KraDup has never experienced treachery like this before. As his two companions proceed to the stairs below, the Canker Cultists descend upon him, eating hunks out of his flesh and infecting him with Ghoul Fever, until at last, he died.

The next day, in Nhakazarin's chamber, he arose as a ghoul.

Nhakazarin inducted him into the Canker Cult by presenting him with a necklace made of his own flesh.

He spent some time wandering, and finally ended up in the Gauntlight Reading Room. There, he was able to heal up to full strength. He has spent most of his time here ever since.

Most of his former possessions are no longer of any use to him, but still he has enough of his former greed for him to hide his old pack under one of the small tables in the reading room.

@UUID[Actor.Aeuws6jKtVMT1cyb]{KraDup Ghoul}

@UUID[Actor.1WHQ0I8Psdvvet1p]{KraDup's Stuff}

NOTE: When I placed KraDup in this room, there were already two ghouls and a Canker Cultist. KraDup functions as an elite ghoul, but does not have the spells of a Canker Cultist. If his presence here overbalances the battle, then consider moving one or more of the monsters to another room.

C08 Korlok's Post.name: C08 科罗克的岗哨 C08 Korlok's Post
C08 Korlok's Post.text:
如果你的英雄们没有杀死科罗克，并且如果他们按照原始故事把他的契约还给他，他会非常感激，以至于会把他在凄凉灯塔较低等级里所认识的其他魔鬼的情况告诉英雄们。

在我看来，这种背叛他的魔鬼同伴的行为，会让他回到家后受到特别的惩罚。

因此，我在 @UUID[JournalEntry.g4Rx11TDnvw14ICf.JournalEntryPage.EPUZnQngwmI7nivH]{Timeline - 沃鲁克·阿兹里尼} 中给了他一个让自己“赎罪”的方法。

If your heroes do not kill Korlok, and if they return him his contract, per the original story, he is so thankful that he tells the heroes of the other devils that he knows in the lower levels of Gauntlight.

In my opinion, this betrayal of his fellow devil will merit him special punishment when he gets home.

Therefore, I gave him a way to "redeem" himself in @UUID[JournalEntry.g4Rx11TDnvw14ICf.JournalEntryPage.EPUZnQngwmI7nivH]{Timeline - Volluk Azrinae}.

Encounter: Deadtide for Otari.name: 遭遇：奥塔里的尸潮 Encounter: Deadtide for Otari
Encounter: Deadtide for Otari.text:
本次遭遇建立在 @UUID[JournalEntry.3T1M395V6J75OsEp.JournalEntryPage.bwT6PloCsffN9m73]{奥塔里的尸潮} 中的第一次遭遇之上；在那次遭遇中，凄凉之光射线启动，并开始唤醒奥塔里墓园中的不死生物。

奥塔里墓园场景已添加了墙体、音效、战斗音乐以及一束凄凉之光射线；其使用与登陆页面上凄凉之光射线相同的光亮术设定，但改为利用 Foundry 绝佳的旋转光源设定来实现的旋转光。

建议：

  • 将此地图用于奥塔里的尸潮遭遇，具体如憎恨魔窟文件夹中的 @UUID[JournalEntry.3T1M395V6J75OsEp.JournalEntryPage.bwT6PloCsffN9m73]{奥塔里的尸潮} 日志所述。

  • 为增强紧张感，光亮术应在遭遇的大部分时间里保持旋转，但当不死生物遭遇接近尾声时，你应在每次脉冲之间将其停用。

  • 在本次遭遇结束后，我建议你立刻预加载晨花图书馆地图，以用于 @UUID[.CbKQStmK1RRmPYqO]{油鳞蛛的攻击}。

  • 在地图加载期间，英雄们可以处理不死生物遭遇的收尾。

    • 我也建议你把英雄角色演员放置在晨花图书馆地图上并准备就绪。（这是一张很大的地图，因此对加载时间表示歉意。我已尽可能压缩了地图。）

  • 我在我认为最可能被凄凉灯塔激活不死生物的位置附近放置了带有不死生物低吼的音效。遭遇结束后你应将这些关闭，以防英雄之后想要返回墓园进行许愿术。

This encounter builds upon the first encounter in @UUID[JournalEntry.3T1M395V6J75OsEp.JournalEntryPage.bwT6PloCsffN9m73]{Deadtide for Otari}, in which the Gauntlight beam activates and begins to awaken undead in Otari Graveyard.

The Otari Graveyard scene has been enhanced with walls, sounds, battle music and a Gauntlight beam using the same light settings from the Gauntlight beam on the landing page, except set up as a revolving light using Foundry's awesome revolving light setting.

Recommendations:

  • Use this map for the Deadtide for Otari encounter, as detailed in @UUID[JournalEntry.3T1M395V6J75OsEp.JournalEntryPage.bwT6PloCsffN9m73]{Deadtide for Otari} journal from the Abomination Vaults folders.

  • For added tension, the light should revolve for most of the encounter, but you should deactivate it between pulses as the undead encounter draws to a conclusion.

  • Immediately after the conclusion of this encounter, I recommend you preload the Dawnflower Library map for the @UUID[.CbKQStmK1RRmPYqO]{Attack of the Scalathrax}.

  • While the map is loading, the heroes could be resolving the conclusion of the undead encounter.

    • I also recommend that you have the hero actors set up on the Dawnflower Library map and ready to go. (It is a large map, so my apologies for the loading time. I have compressed the map as much as possible.)

  • I have placed a sound with undead growling near spots that would be, in my opinion, the most likely places that Gauntlight would activate the undead. You should turn these off after the encounter, in case the heroes later wish to return to the graveyard.

Encounter: Attack of the Scalathrax.name: 遭遇：油鳞蛛的攻击 Encounter: Attack of the Scalathrax
Encounter: Attack of the Scalathrax.text:
这场遭遇构建于 @UUID[JournalEntry.3T1M395V6J75OsEp.JournalEntryPage.bwT6PloCsffN9m73]{奥塔里的尸潮} 中的第二场遭遇之上：在那里，油鳞蛛在一道凄凉灯塔的光束中现身，作为最终Boss战登场。

我制作了晨花图书馆与悬崖步道的地图，因为我对这场遭遇该如何展开有一个明确的想法。Paizo在奥塔里墓园地图以及亡灵崛起的部分做得很好，我也毫不犹豫地照着他们的内容复制了过来。

我想要的是一场沿着悬崖步道一路追逐的跑动战斗，最终甚至能威胁到晨花图书馆本身。用现有的地图，悬崖步道实在太小了，而图书馆也完全没有被充分呈现。

因此，这是一个围绕单场遭遇的小型冒险。它从油鳞蛛出现在悬崖步道入口时开始。

时机

我建议你在击败亡灵之后、并在油鳞蛛现身之前立刻加载晨花图书馆地图。

闪耀

在地图东北端之外有一个光亮元素，其设定与“奥塔里墓园（附加内容）”场景中的那个相同，只是被设置为一束紧密聚焦、固定不动的光束。

该版本的光束在靠近步道处终止。地图加载时它会被点亮，同时在光束末端还有另一个具有相同颜色与设定的光亮。

地图加载后不久，你应当切换位于光束中的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.abomination-vaults-bestiary.Actor.Nkz8Z5TrEqRePGlk]{油鳞蛛} 的可见性。

使用此宏可一次性关闭凄凉之光射线与聚光灯：

@UUID[Macro.5TfdlLcEO8YOaV4J]{Toggle Gauntlight Visibility}

最好让油鳞蛛在英雄们至少相距35英尺时现身，以确保在悬崖步道上有一场精彩的追逐。

油鳞蛛现身的瞬间就开始这场遭遇。

以下是一些暗示术，基于我这场遭遇的实际进展：

  • 为了增加沿崖追逐的乐趣，让油鳞蛛先进行一次未能奏效的攻击，然后开始沿悬崖迅速爬行撤离。

  • 由于油鳞蛛会不断分泌油脂，它过于湿滑，无法像典型蜘蛛那样攀爬峭壁。因此，它会一路沿着小径向下。

  • 当英雄与油鳞蛛在下行途中交错而过时，油鳞蛛会尝试把它的腿刺或毒油向上射向英雄。当双方交错时，你应当假设高度差刚好在油鳞蛛20英尺射程以内。

  • 如果油鳞蛛一路成功抵达底部，它应该直奔那扇在一片兴奋混乱中被某位牧师忘了关上的门。

其余内容都应当如同在 奥塔里的尸潮 中那样进行。

This encounter builds upon on the second encounter in @UUID[JournalEntry.3T1M395V6J75OsEp.JournalEntryPage.bwT6PloCsffN9m73]{Deadtide for Otari}, in which the Scalathrax appears in a beam of Gauntlight's light as a final boss battle.

I created the Dawnflower Library and Cliff Walk map because I had a certain idea about how I wanted this encounter to go. Paizo did a fine job with the Otari Graveyard map and the undead rising, and I wasted no time in duplicating what they had there.

What I wanted was a running battle down the cliff walk, one that could eventually threaten the Dawnflower Library itself. With the existing map, the cliff walk was entirely too small, and the Library was not fully represented at all.

Therefore, this is a mini-adventure around a single encounter. It begins when the Scalathrax appears at the entrance of the cliff walk.

Timing

I recommend you load the Dawnflower Library map after defeating the undead, and immediately before the appearance of the Scalathrax.

The Shining

Off the NE end of the map is a light element with the same settings as the one in the Otari Graveyard with Extras scene, except set up as a tightly focused, stationary beam of light.

This version of the light terminates near the footpath. It will be illuminated when the map loads, along with another light at the end of the beam with the same color and settings.

Shortly after the map loads, you should toggle the visibility of the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.abomination-vaults-bestiary.Actor.Nkz8Z5TrEqRePGlk]{Scalathrax} that is within the light's beam.

Use this macro to turn off both the Gauntlight beam and spotlight at once:

@UUID[Macro.5TfdlLcEO8YOaV4J]{Toggle Gauntlight Visibility}

Preferably, the Scalathrax should appear when the heroes are at least 35 feet away, to ensure a good chase down the cliff walk.

Begin the encounter the moment that the Scalathrax appears.

A few suggestions, based on how my encounter went:

  • For cliff-chasing fun, have the Scalathrax make an abortive attack and then start scuttling down the cliff.

  • Due to the oil that the Scalathrax constantly excretes, it is too slick to scale cliffs like typical spiders. Therefore, it will take the path all the way down.

  • As the heroes and the Scalathrax pass each other on the way down, the Scalathrax attempts to shoot its leg quills or toxic oils up to the heroes. When they pass each other, you should assume the height difference is just within the reach of the Scalathrax's 20' range.

  • If the Scalathrax makes it all the way down, it should beeline for the door that one of the clerics left open in all the excitement.

Everything else should proceed as it does in Deadtide for Otari.

Overview.name: 概述 Overview
Overview.text:
本等级的两项重大改动是加入竞技场战斗，以及为查夫肯姆的复仇制定时间线。

竞技场战斗

我一直很期待在这里跑一些竞技场战斗，但那种在没有任何观众、也没有获得荣耀机会的情况下只打一头巨兽的点子，有点让人失望。我四处找灵感，找到了一份指南，可在 DriveThruRPG 获取：

憎恨魔窟：扩展版，游戏主持人资源（作者：Taylor Hodgskiss）

我买了一份并通读了一遍。虽然 Hodgskiss 加入了一个包含竞技场战斗的章节，但并不完全符合我的需求，主要是因为我不想要一个恶魔化的赛事主持人。

不过他的想法很扎实，所以我决定自己做一套。我在 Bestiary Browser 里翻找了一些强力的非邪恶生物，看到精怪（djinn）的条目。把所有变种都读完后，我决定让我的赛事主持人是一个 Shaitan。我还把他做成了法师，这样他就能在第6或第7等级的任一层与任何首领正面对抗。相关内容都在“光辉岁月”支线任务中详述：

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.ZSZ6TzjoIUvr5zi2]{5等级支线任务 - 光辉岁月}

查夫肯姆的复仇

在我的游玩过程中，我发现自己遇到了一个《憎恨魔窟》剧本并未考虑到的情况——我让我的英雄们忙到不可开交，以至于查夫肯姆的时间线耗尽了。因此，我不得不问自己一个问题：他现在要做什么？ 这篇日志记录了他接下来的行动，以及所遵循的时间线。它为他在更上方楼层伏击英雄提供了机会；或者如果英雄们得知了他的动向，也能去追猎他。

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.dtjp0y5WgyZO47rH]{5等级时间线 - 查夫肯姆的复仇}

The two major changes to this level are the inclusion of arena battles, and a timeline for Chafkhem's revenge.

Arena Battles

I was looking forward to running some arena battles here, but the idea of fighting one behemoth, without any spectators, and with no chance of glory, was a bit underwhelming. I looked around for ideas, and I found this guideline, which is available from DriveThruRPG:

The Abomination Vaults: Expanded, A Resource for Game Masters By Taylor Hodgskiss

I bought a copy and read through it. While Hodgskiss included a section with arena battles, it was not quite what I was looking for, mostly because I did not want a demonic gamesmaster.

But his ideas were solid, so I decided to build my own. I looked through the Bestiary Browser for some powerful nonevil creatures, and came across the entries on the djinn. After reading through all the varieties, I decided to make my gamesmaster a Shaitan. I also made him a wizard, so he could have stood toe-to-toe against any of the bosses on either level 6 or 7. It is all detailed in the Glory Days side quest:

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.ZSZ6TzjoIUvr5zi2]{Lv. 5 Side Quest - Glory Days}

Chafkhem's Revenge

During my playthrough, I found myself in a position that the Abomination Vaults scenario did not account for — I kept my heroes so busy that the timeline for Chafkham ran out. Therefore, I had to ask myself the question, what is he going to do now? This journal details his subsequent actions, and the timeline it follows. It provides opportunities for him to ambush the heroes in the floors above, or for them hunt him down, if they get wind of his activities.

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.dtjp0y5WgyZO47rH]{Lv. 5 Timeline - Chafkhem's Revenge}

E26 Arena - Summary of Changes.name: E26 竞技场 - 变更摘要 E26 Arena - Summary of Changes
E26 Arena - Summary of Changes.text:
为了协助沙伊坦及其行动，竞技场本身在上层有如下改动。所有这些图块最初都是隐藏的。

  • 等级 5

    • 中央阳台顶部有两个大型拉杆，用于打开楼梯底部的落闸门。

    • 竞技场地面东端有一座砂岩王座。

      沙伊坦用它来休息。他只是坐在上面，并放松进入土元素形态。

    • 王座后方有一处围栏与一个深坑，他会在英雄们准备好与它们战斗之前，将石化蜥蜴和各种其他生物关在那里。

    • 在“凄凉灯塔 Extras”actors 文件夹中有一个“竞技场游戏奖品”战利品 actor。他会将其从沙子里拉出来，以便给游戏的胜者颁发奖品。按需要用游戏奖品填充它。

    • 西端有一间隐藏的温馨小屋。

    • 中央有若干立柱和铁链，应在与克拉托尼斯的战斗中使用。

另见 @UUID[JournalEntry.L1z6lNaPHMHY6GN6.JournalEntryPage.nKDqoUqPEPLDvEYR]{F26 竞技场 - 改动摘要}。

如果这些图块在隐藏时放在游戏画布上过于分散注意力，那么你可以暂时将它们拖到地图左下或右下角的虚空中。

To facilitate Shaitan and his operations, the Arena itself has the following changes in the upper level. All of these tiles are initially hidden.

  • Level 5

    • there are two large levers on top of the central balcony, to open the portcullises at the bottom of the stairs.

    • There is a sandstone throne at the eastern end of the Arena floor.

      Shaitan uses it to rest. He simply sits in it, and relaxes into an earthen form.

    • Behind the throne is an enclosure and a pit, where he will keep the basilisks and various other creatures until the heroes are ready to fight them.

    • In the Gauntlight Extras actors folder is an Arena Games Prizes loot actor. He will pull this up from the sand in order to award prizes to the winners of the games. Fill it with game prizes as appropriate.

    • There is a hidden Cozy Cabin at the western end.

    • In the middle, there are a number of pillars and chains, which should be used during the fight with Cratonys.

See also @UUID[JournalEntry.L1z6lNaPHMHY6GN6.JournalEntryPage.nKDqoUqPEPLDvEYR]{F26 Arena - Summary of Changes}.

If these tiles are too distracting to have on the game canvas while hidden, then you can temporarily drag them into the void of the map at the lower left or lower right corners.

E10. Elite Viewing Room.name: E10. 精英包厢 E10. Elite Viewing Room
E10. Elite Viewing Room.text:
在英雄们说服E10 精英包厢中的骚灵离开后，沙伊坦会将这里改造成英雄们可以休息的地方。

这里有一块隐藏的图块，会替换房间的全部内容。只需在合适的时机将其激活即可。如果在进行骚灵战斗时它出现在场景中太过分散注意力，那么地图左下角有足够的空间可以把它藏起来。

它包含房间原本就有的两座烤炉，此外他还添加了一张带凳子的砂岩桌。

任何站在东侧门附近的角色都可能听到楼下瞎酿酒馆酒馆的音乐。可按需打开或关闭声音控制。

After the heroes have convinced the poltergeists in E10 Elite Viewing Room to leave, Shaitan will repurpose it into a place where the heroes can rest.

There is a hidden tile here that replaces the entire contents of the room. Just activate it at an appropriate time. If it is too distracting to have in the scene while running the poltergeist battle, then there is plenty of room to tuck it away in the lower left corner of the map.

It has the two ovens that were in the room originally, plus he adds a sandstone table with stools.

Any characters who stand near the eastern door might hear music from the Warped Brew Tavern, downstairs. Turn the sound control on or off as desired.

Invasion from Below.name: 来自下方的入侵 Invasion from Below
Invasion from Below.text:
如果英雄们在打开幽灵之门后没有立即下到竞技场（如果他们带着卡曼同行，这很可能发生），那么当他们返回时，E01中的胶化人和呓语之喉很可能已经移动到了第4等级。

无论如何，英雄们都需要先解决它们才能继续前进。

If the heroes do not immediately descend to the Arena after opening Ghostgate (which is probable if they have Carman with them), then when they return, it is likely that the Grothluts and the Gibbering Mouther from E01 have moved up to the 4th level.

Either way, the heroes will need to dispatch them before they can proceed.

E13 Ready Room Supply Closet.name: E13 预备室储物间 E13 Ready Room Supply Closet
E13 Ready Room Supply Closet.text:
查看 @UUID[Actor.OYsKIV09eWcAZo44]{E13 补给储藏室} 战利品角色以获取在此房间中找到的物品。

See the @UUID[Actor.OYsKIV09eWcAZo44]{E13 Supply Closet} loot actor for items found in this room.

E. 21 Staging Area.name: E. 21 集结区 E. 21 Staging Area
E. 21 Staging Area.text:
查看 @UUID[Actor.XfJcO4OxV6slW9Pm]{E21 集结区 战利品} 战利品角色以获取在此房间中发现的物品。

See the @UUID[Actor.XfJcO4OxV6slW9Pm]{E21 Staging Area Loot} loot actor for items found in this room.

E01. Upper Shaft.name: E01. 上部竖井 E01. Upper Shaft
E01. Upper Shaft.text:
此房间内的所有变更均详细记载于 @UUID[JournalEntry.ZSZ6TzjoIUvr5zi2]{Lv. 5 支线任务 - 光辉岁月}。

All changes in this room are detailed in @UUID[JournalEntry.ZSZ6TzjoIUvr5zi2]{Lv. 5 Side Quest - Glory Days}.

F10 Prisoner Processing - Loving Caretak.name: F10 囚犯审讯室 - 慈爱的看守者 F10 Prisoner Processing - Loving Caretaker
F10 Prisoner Processing - Loving Caretak.text:
我添加了这些塑肉仪式缸，因为我在实验室里找不到任何与这幅小插图相符的场景：

看守者显然是厄拿刻斯，所以我把这些缸加到了 F10 囚犯审讯室。以下是我编造的背景故事：

很久以前，厄拿刻斯毁掉了其中一个缸。索伽提对它施以极其严厉的惩罚，以至于它现在会相当温柔地照看这些缸，甚至在无人注意时抚摸它们。任何人只要靠近任意一个缸五码之内，都会引起厄拿刻斯的特别关注。

在这些塑肉仪式缸中，从右上角开始顺时针向下分别是：

  • 一名摩洛克

  • （损坏）

  • 一名摩洛克

  • 一名半身人（@UUID[JournalEntry.L1z6lNaPHMHY6GN6.JournalEntryPage.krPk2YMlBSjZwSS8]{Raydolph}）

如今，这名受折磨的厄拿刻斯有两项职责：它守夜于塑肉仪式缸，并且限制进入竞技场。

I added the fleshwarping vats after I was unable to find any scene in the labs that matched this vignette:

The keeper is clearly the Irnakurse, so I added the vats to F10 Prisoner Processing. Here is the backstory that I invented:

Long ago, the Irnakurse destroyed one of the vats. The Saugathi punished it so severely that it now looks after the vats quite lovingly, and will even caress them when unobserved. Anyone who gets within five feet of any vat will earn the Irnakurse's special attention.

Within the fleshwarping vats are, from top right, and clockwise down:

  • A morlock

  • (broken)

  • A morlock

  • A halfling (@UUID[JournalEntry.L1z6lNaPHMHY6GN6.JournalEntryPage.krPk2YMlBSjZwSS8]{Raydolph})

The Afflicted Irnakurse now has two duties: it watches over the fleshwarping vats, and it restricts entry into the Arena.

F25 Main Laboratory.name: F25 主实验室 F25 Main Laboratory
F25 Main Laboratory.text:
我在贾法基的实验室里又添加了两个额外的塑肉仪式缸，你可以按需要使用。我在每个缸里都“放”了一个摩洛克。

PipNee 终于可以在这里找到。

@UUID[Actor.12G2R36cFMxLRV9Z]{PipNee 铁骨怪}

查看她的日志条目：

@UUID[.VFZZhJwa4qaqPfNR]{PipNee Transformed}

I added two additional fleshwarping vats to Jafaki's Lab, which you could use as you see fit. I put a morlock "in" each vat.

PipNee can at last be found here.

@UUID[Actor.12G2R36cFMxLRV9Z]{PipNee Dreshkan}

See her journal entry:

@UUID[.VFZZhJwa4qaqPfNR]{PipNee Transformed}

F11 Warped Brew Tavern.name: F11 瞎酿酒馆酒馆 F11 Warped Brew Tavern
F11 Warped Brew Tavern.text:
居住者

我已擅自将酒馆内的所有居住者设为可见，唯独后屋里的维斯查芮以及黄色霉菌陷阱除外。没有其他人正在尝试（或有躲藏的能力）躲藏。

就实际情况而言，这里的所有人都住在酒馆里。他们需要睡觉时，就只是瘫在椅子上或靠着墙。只有乐队“幽影恶意”才有一间真正的房间。

灯光

即使拥有黑暗视觉的生物也会欣赏光亮术营造的氛围。此外，有哪个乐队会不想让灯光秀为他们的音乐伴奏呢？

因此，我加入了灯光与灯具地砖。乐队“幽影恶意”正在舞台上演出，通往酒馆的走廊里也能听到音乐。

在这里，英雄们将首次遇见血肉扭曲的 @UUID[Actor.PirOzls2fnKFsohC]{NoxAg 蛛化精灵}。

参见 @UUID[.Pri825LugvqJ4oP9]{NoxAg Transformed}。

乐队音乐

由于夏坦会在有战斗时付钱让“幽影恶意”在竞技场演出，他在某个时刻必然会提到他们。因此，当英雄们打开通往酒馆的走廊大门，并能听到音乐声时，也不应感到意外。

夏坦对他们的评价中立。他不记得他们曾被归咎于任何特定的邪恶行径，但他们与酒馆里的邪恶居民来往，而且他们的名字很阴暗，这可能有意义，也可能没有。

我强烈建议当队伍进入该区域时，让乐队就在舞台上演奏。这会制造极佳的紧张感，因为英雄们完全不知道这支乐队会不会成为敌人。

因此，整个区域都充满了声音。我已将酒馆周围的所有墙壁改为“无”的声音设定，这样无论你在酒馆里走到哪里，都能在某种程度上听见乐队。

唯一的例外是通往 F20 下层观景台的楼梯间。

当乐队不演奏时，务必关闭音乐与灯光。

Chipper 会在英雄们首次到达时播放。我也将另外两条音乐轨道 Shadow Malice Combat 与 Breakdown 加入了舞台区域，并设为非激活状态。

最终战斗？

如果英雄们在贾法基被杀后才来到这里，或许就到了 @UUID[.VwBtzoMLkzNHm3Tb]{酒馆住民的最后抵抗} 的时候了。

Occupants

I have taken the liberty of making all occupants of the tavern visible except Vischari in the back room, and the yellow mold trap. No one else is trying (or has the ability) to hide.

For all intents and purposes, everyone here lives in the tavern. They simply collapse in a chair or against a wall when they need sleep. Only the band, Shadow Malice, has an actual room.

Lights

Even creatures with darkvision appreciate the ambiance of light. Besides, what band would not want a light show to accompany their music?

Therefore, I have added lights and light fixture tiles. The band, Shadow Malice, is playing onstage, and the music will be audible in the hallway leading up to the tavern.

Here, the heroes will meet the fleshwarped @UUID[Actor.PirOzls2fnKFsohC]{NoxAg Drider} for the first time.

See @UUID[.Pri825LugvqJ4oP9]{NoxAg Transformed}.

Band Music

Since Shaitan pays Shadow Malice to perform in the Arena when there is a battle, he will inevitably mention them at some point. Therefore, it should not be a surprise when the heroes open the door to the hallway leading to the tavern, and are able to hear the sound of music.

Shaitan has a neutral opinion of them. He does not recall them attributed with any particular evil, but they associate with the evil residents of the tavern, and they have a dark name, which may or may not be meaningful.

I strongly recommend that the band be onstage and playing when the group enters the area. It creates a terrific sense of tension, because the heroes will have no idea if the band will be enemies or not.

Therefore, the entire area is flooded with sound. I have changed all the walls around the tavern to a sound setting of "None" so no matter where you go in the tavern, you can hear the band to some extent.

The only exception is the stairway leading to the F20 Lower Observation Deck.

Be sure to turn off the music and lights when the band isn't playing.

Chipper is playing when the heroes first arrive. I also added the other two music tracks, Shadow Malice Combat and Breakdown, to the stage area in an inactive state.

Final Battle?

If the heroes come here after Jafaki is killed, it may be time for the @UUID[.VwBtzoMLkzNHm3Tb]{Tavern-Dwellers' Last Stand}.

Doomed Gang - NoxAg Transformed.name: 末日帮派 - NoxAg 变形 Doomed Gang - NoxAg Transformed
Doomed Gang - NoxAg Transformed.text:
NoxAg 坐在酒馆最阴影重重的角落里的一张桌旁。光亮术表演让他心烦，但在这里还算能忍受。

英雄们一进来他就会立刻看到他们。如果他们朝他那边看，他会平静地点头，并做手势示意他们过去与他同坐。

这场遭遇不应以战斗收场，因为 NoxAg 将向 Shaitan 发出挑战，同时也会对酒馆里的其他几位住客如此。

NoxAg has the table in the most shadowy corner of the tavern. The light show annoys him, but here, it is more tolerable.

He will readily see the heroes when they enter. If they look his way, he will nod at them calmly and gesture for them to join him.

This encounter should not end in combat, as NoxAg will be delivering a challenge to Shaitan, along with several other residents of the tavern.

Doomed Gang - PipNee Transformed.name: 注定覆灭的帮派 - PipNee 变形后 Doomed Gang - PipNee Transformed
Doomed Gang - PipNee Transformed.text:
PipNee可以在贾法基的实验室里找到。她已经实现了她的许愿术——她现在是一个强大生物的仆从。

而且她是一只铁骨怪。

不过，她并不急于为任何人去死，不管对方是谁。当有人攻击贾法基时，无论是英雄还是Chafkham，她都会尽最大努力逃走。

PipNee can be found in Jafaki's lab. She has achieved her wish — she is now the minion of a powerful creature.

And she is a dreshkan.

However, she is not eager to die for anyone, regardless of who it is. When someone attacks Jafaki, be it the heroes or Chafkham, she will do her best to get away.

Tavern-Dwellers' Last Stand.name: 酒馆住客的最后防线 Tavern-Dwellers' Last Stand
Tavern-Dwellers' Last Stand.text:
在贾法基被击败后的某个时间点，瞎酿酒馆酒馆的居民会倒戈对付英雄，并做出他们孤注一掷的努力来摆脱英雄。PipNee 在煽动这场战斗方面会有很大的影响力。

然而，幽影·恶意其实更愿意做音乐而不是战斗，并且看不出试图杀死那些会轻易击败他们的英雄能有什么好处。当阴谋开始时，他们就会逃走，并且在英雄回来时应该已经不见了。不过，他们仍在上层的某个地方徘徊，基本上被困在那里，直到英雄清理出通往第7等级的道路为止。（我让他们最后到了沃鲁克·阿兹里尼的旧房间里。之后对英雄变得有些友善，并最终在英雄打开那条路后通过伊尔达里斯逃走。）

别忘了最后再用一次 NooDupAgNee 帮派的主题曲：

@UUID[Playlist.vB0om49dkEPYW2nD.PlaylistSound.tlZzNjRt6WLxhUuA]{再打一场就好}

At some point after Jafaki's defeat, the residents of Warped Brew Tavern will turn on the heroes, and will make their last ditch effort to get rid of them. PipNee will have a lot of influence in instigating this battle.

Shadow Malice, however, really would rather make music than battle, and see no profit in trying to kill heroes who would easily defeat them. When the scheming starts, they bolt, and should be gone by the time the heroes return. However, they are still hanging around on the upper levels somewhere, and are basically stranded until the heroes clear the way past the 7th level. (I had them end up in Volluk Azrinae's old rooms. Then ended up somewhat friendly to the heroes, and eventually escaped via Yldaris once the heroes opened up that way.)

Don't forget to use the NooDupAgNee Gang theme one last time:

@UUID[Playlist.vB0om49dkEPYW2nD.PlaylistSound.tlZzNjRt6WLxhUuA]{Just One More Fight}

F26 Arena Floor - Summary of Changes.name: F26 竞技场地板 - 变更摘要 F26 Arena Floor - Summary of Changes
F26 Arena Floor - Summary of Changes.text:
为方便夏坦及其行动，竞技场本身在实验室等级有如下改动。所有这些图块起初均为隐藏。

  • 夏坦在F20下层看台前放置了一道砂岩石墙。他这么做是为了能在一定私密性下行动。当他敲响锣时，他会溶解这道墙，并在战斗结束后再次竖起它。

  • 由于索加提研究员现在在竞技场里没什么可看的，它会在看台与F08看台长廊的南端之间来回移动。

  • 塑肉残渣巨兽已被移至地图边缘、靠近竞技场东南端的位置。（夏坦在几十年前就让它脱离痛苦了。）

另见 @UUID[JournalEntry.Ae6g5nx2QNP2ZamL.JournalEntryPage.nKDqoUqPEPLDvEYR]{E26 竞技场 - 改动摘要}。

To facilitate Shaitan and his operations, the Arena itself has the following changes in the Lab level. All of these tiles are initially hidden.

  • Shaitan has placed a sandstone stone wall in front of F20 Lower Observation Deck. He has done this so he can operate with some privacy. When he rings the gong, he dissolves this wall, and erects it again after the battle.

  • Since the Saugathi Researcher now has nothing to watch in the Arena, it would move back and forth between the Observation Deck and the southern end of F08 Observation Gallery.

  • The Shanrigol Behemoth has been moved to the margin of the map near the southeast end of the Arena. (Shaitan put it out of its misery decades ago.)

See also @UUID[JournalEntry.Ae6g5nx2QNP2ZamL.JournalEntryPage.nKDqoUqPEPLDvEYR]{E26 Arena - Summary of Changes}.

Raydolph.name: 雷道夫 Raydolph
Raydolph.text:
这个半身人是这些大缸里唯一不情愿的实验对象。他当时正沿着雾隐沼泽以北的道路旅行，看到凄凉灯塔的光亮术朝着奥塔里照射。他明智地等到第二天早晨，然后冒险进入雾隐沼泽进行调查。

不幸的是，在雾隐沼泽的阴霾中，闪火找上了他，如同这段其他小插曲所述：

闪火成功以困惑术迷乱了他的狗，让它转而攻击他。他被迫自卫，直到他也屈服于困惑术为止。狗死后，微灵以他的恐惧术为食，并将他引向凄凉灯塔。

在那里，他被抓获，并在溃烂教徒认定他作为交易品比作为教徒更有价值后，最终被交易给了贾法基。

贾法基并不反对偶尔弄来不情愿的实验对象，但不确定该如何处理这个半身人，于是把他放进一个保存缸里，直到它作出决定。

@UUID[Actor.kxxfNHMNvQxLP1ej]{Raydolph}

获救之后

Raydolph会在奥塔里休养，先在神殿，然后在喧闹的石斑鱼。

以下是我在自己游戏里使用Raydolph的方式：他最终会遇到沃里温，而她会协助他的康复。如果她收留了Drex——那只曾属于Jaul的狼——她会鼓励他们建立羁绊，因为他对自己狗的死怀有深重的愧疚。

不过，谁拥有那只狼其实差别不大，因为从那以后，Raydolph和沃里温就成了搭档。在我自己的游戏里，我让他们通过巡逻“僻静空地”和奥塔里之间的林地与沼泽来支援英雄们，因为通往憎恨魔窟4等级的洞窟入口是他们偏好的进入路线。

The halfling is the only unwilling subject of the vats. He had been traveling the road north of the Fogfen when he saw the lighthouse's light shining toward Otari. He wisely waited until the next morning, and then ventured into the Fogfen to investigate.

Unfortunately, in the gloom of Fogfen, the flickerwisps found him, as per this other vignette:

The flickerwisps successfully confused his dog into attacking him. He was forced to defend himself until he he succumbed to the confusion as well. Once the dog was dead, the wisps fed on his fear and led him to Gauntlight.

There, he was captured and eventually traded down to Jafaki when the Canker Cultists decided he was worth more in trade than as a Cultist.

Jafaki is not opposed to the occasional unwilling subject, but is not sure what to do with the halfling, so it put him in a preserving vat until it makes a decision.

@UUID[Actor.kxxfNHMNvQxLP1ej]{Raydolph}

After his Rescue

Raydolph will convalesce in Otari, first at the temple, and then at the Rowdy Rockfish.

Here's how I used Raydolph in my own game: He eventually meets Worliwynn, and she assists in his recovery. If she has taken in Drex, the wolf who once belonged to Jaul, she will encourage a bond between them, because he feels a terrible guilt over the death of his dog.

However, it does not make much of a difference who owns the wolf, because from then on, Raydolph and Worliwynn are partners. In my own game, I had them support the heroes by patrolling the woods and swamp between the Secluded Clearing and Otari, because the cavern entrance to Level 4 was their preferred entry route into Abomination Vaults.

F05 The Deep End.name: F05 深水池尾端 F05 The Deep End
F05 The Deep End.text:
查看 @UUID[Actor.SbBFfvAtirHQqgcA]{溺亡魔巢穴} 战利品角色，以获取该水池底部的物品。

See the @UUID[Actor.SbBFfvAtirHQqgcA]{Sarglagon Lair} loot actor for items at the bottom of this pool.

Lv. 4 Side Quest - Opening Ghostgate.name: 4级支线任务——开启鬼门 Lv. 4 Side Quest - Opening Ghostgate

Meeting Otari, at last.name: 终于与奥塔里会面了 Meeting Otari, at last
Meeting Otari, at last.text:
当英雄们终于在 D18 房间“奥塔里的末日”中、他死亡之处发现奥塔里的幽灵（特征）时，英雄们已经 @UUID[JournalEntry.3TP6JlaRwQ380Dqy]{追随他的足迹} 走完了整整两个地城等级。此时，英雄们（很可能还有 GM）大概已经被他的故事深深吸引。

在原版冒险中，与真正的奥塔里相遇的遭遇很短暂。他会讲述他在《憎恨魔窟》人物条目中详述的“悲惨故事”（@UUID[JournalEntry.DQepDGIcXuhkYOuU.JournalEntryPage.hmllmOvUuS2wnnVT]{奥塔里·伊瓦什提}），告诉他们如何打破 @UUID[JournalEntry.3T1M395V6J75OsEp.JournalEntryPage.5MfX6RVIF7rOroV3]{幽魂封印}，然后，相信新的英雄会拨乱反正，便得以休息。

（作者提出的另一种故事要黑暗得多：在贝科拉死之前，他都无法解脱。我更喜欢第一个故事；我只是觉得它太短了。）

奥塔里不会在讲完他的故事后消失，而是会请求英雄们在收集齐所有遗珍后把它们带来给他。

在他们带着这些物品回来之前，他都可以继续与英雄们讨论；不过，他的所有知识都已经过时了 500 年。

当被问到他怎么知道如何击败幽灵之门时，他会承认自己并不知道。

我为这三件遗珍制作了替代版本：

  1. @UUID[Item.3IinViTYOQK3oTRL]{合作之刃}（更改主要效果）

  2. @UUID[Item.m9fVw4jK8TVcOHVN]{奥塔里的盗贼工具}（添加失败效果）

  3. @UUID[Item.Dm1wNl3bTUdzxZmS]{真理的门槛}（添加更高等级法术）

Once the heroes finally discover Otari's ghost at the site of his death in room D18 Otari's Doom, the heroes have been @UUID[JournalEntry.3TP6JlaRwQ380Dqy]{following in his footsteps} for two complete dungeon levels. By now the heroes (and likely the GM) are probably captivated by his story.

In the original adventure, the encounter with the actual Otari is brief. He relates his "tale of woe" as detailed in his Abomination Vaults biographical entry (@UUID[JournalEntry.DQepDGIcXuhkYOuU.JournalEntryPage.hmllmOvUuS2wnnVT]{Otari Ilvashti}), tell them how to break the @UUID[JournalEntry.3T1M395V6J75OsEp.JournalEntryPage.5MfX6RVIF7rOroV3]{Spectral Seal}, and then, trusting that the new heroes will make things right, is at rest.

(An alternative story posed by the author is much darker, in which he is not free until Belcorra is dead. I liked the first story better; I just felt it was too short.)

Instead of disappearing after relating his tale, Otari will ask the heroes to bring the icons to him when they have gathered them all.

Until they return with the items, he is available for further discussion, however, all of his knowledge is 500 years out of date.

When asked how he knows how to defeat the Ghostgate, he will acknowledge that he does not know.

I have created alternative versions of these three icons:

  1. @UUID[Item.3IinViTYOQK3oTRL]{Cooperative Blade} (changed main effect)

  2. @UUID[Item.m9fVw4jK8TVcOHVN]{Otari's Thieves' Tools} (added failure effect)

  3. @UUID[Item.Dm1wNl3bTUdzxZmS]{Thresholds of Truth} (added higher level spells)

Gathering the Icons.name: 收集遗珍 Gathering the Icons
Gathering the Icons.text:
当英雄们将所有要求的物品交给奥塔里后，他会逐一查看，并用他幽灵般的手抚过每一件。随后，他会环顾众人并说道：

既然你们正在延续玫瑰团的事业，你们每个人都应当代表玫瑰团的一位成员，并将每个徽记依次放在祭坛上。

接着，他会尝试将一名或多名队伍成员（如果人数超过四人）分配去代表玫瑰团最初的某一位成员。

  • 吟游诗人、术士、法师或其他主要施法者。

作为这支队伍的知识守护者，你应当代表扎马夫迪安。

  • 战士、武僧、野蛮人

沃尔·拉贾尼会很荣幸由你来代表她。

  • 神圣施法者或能够施放治疗术的角色

你应当代表牧师艾斯法娜·曼妮姆斯，因为你们都是虔诚的医者。

  • 游荡者、调查员、游侠、游侠剑客

如果你愿意代表我——奥塔里·伊瓦什提——我将深感荣幸。

  • 卡门·拉贾尼，以及其他任何可能在场的人。

你们应当作为我们的见证人。记下你们在此见到的功绩。

最后，他会再次转向众人并说道：

在你们身上，玫瑰团再度复生。因此，至少在这项小小的任务中，你们应当继承我们的名号。

（他转向见证人。）听我说，见证人们！玫瑰团再度复生！

但首先，最初的玫瑰团必须摧毁那道屏障。到祭坛那里来见我！

他朝出口走去，随后消失不见。

When the heroes present Otari with all the requested items, he will look them over, one by one, and will run his ghostly hand over each one. Then, he will look around the group and say the following:

Since you are carrying on the Roseguard's work, you should each represent a member of the Roseguard, and place each icon on the altar, one by one.

He will then attempt to assign one or more party member (in case there are more than four) to one of the original Roseguard.

  • Bard, Sorcerer, Wizard or another primary spellcaster.

As the keeper of knowledge for this group, you should represent Zarmavdian.

  • Fighter, Champion, Barbarian

Vol Rajani would be honored for you to represent her.

  • Divine caster or a character who can heal

You should represent Aesephna Menhemes, since you are both devoted healers.

  • Rogue, investigator, ranger, swashbuckler

I would be honored if you would represent me, Otari Ilvashti.

  • Carmen Rajani, and anyone else who may be present.

You should be our witnesses. Take note of the deeds you see done here.

Finally, he will turn back to the group and say the following:

In you, the Roseguard lives again. You should, therefore, take on our name, at least in this small task.

(He turns to the witnesses.) Hear me, Witnesses! The Roseguard lives again!

But first, the original Roseguard must destroy that barrier. Meet me at the altar!

He heads for the exit, and disappears.

Breaking the Spectral Seal.name: 破除幽影封印 Breaking the Spectral Seal
Breaking the Spectral Seal.text:
场景设置

D13 宁布洛斯的上层神殿

先决条件：英雄必须已经击败最初在祭坛上的闪火与爬行手。

你可以在侧边栏的 Actor 标签页中，“玫瑰团成员”文件夹里找到玫瑰团。

将每个玫瑰团幽灵放在祭坛旁，以菱形或方形的队形摆放，使他们的幽冥光芒笼罩祭坛。将他们的指示物可见性关闭。

这个神圣的仪式将净化奥塔里，使其摆脱腐热症。因此，在放置奥塔里的指示物之前，从他的 actor 卡中移除“鬼影”动作与“腐热症”被动。

放置遗珍

当英雄们携带玫瑰团遗珍进入房间时，他们仍能听到声音并感受到其效果，但祭坛不再有力量令他们陷入恐惧术。

邀请你的每位英雄描述他们如何走近祭坛，并将各自被指派的遗珍放上去。当每个人这么做时，对应的幽灵应当显现：

  • 阿瑟芙娜的猎人胸针 - @UUID[Actor.CwC6aBucr3HvAFoL]{Aesephna's Ghost}

  • 沃尔的合作之刃 - @UUID[Actor.V4PkTZFzk5Y5T5JM]{Vol's Ghost}

  • 扎马夫迪安的真理的门槛 - @UUID[Actor.KmHFeQqAs6Zt6yCm]{Zarmavdian's Ghost}

  • 奥塔里的盗贼工具 - @UUID[Actor.JvzCKApEU3vzEfJH]{Otari's Ghost}

当最后一个幽灵显现，并且四个幽灵的光芒一同笼罩祭坛时，执行此宏以一次性关闭灯光与声音：

@UUID[Macro.ijNWBsgFRisYMKit]{D13 - Toggle Altar Ambience}

之后，玫瑰团成员之间将有一次短暂的重逢，其进展由 GM 自行决定。

玫瑰团的鼓励之语

接下来，玫瑰团的每位成员都应对各自的代表说几句话。这将有助于强化英雄与其所代表的玫瑰团成员之间的亲缘感。

下面给出一些想法，但实际上应根据你的英雄以及他们至今塑造的故事进行定制。也许这甚至可以作为一种得体的方式，向你的玩家传递一些提示，帮助他们改进自己角色的玩法。

  • 阿瑟芙娜会与队伍中的治疗者交谈，并就他们技能的运用给出一些暗示术，或许还会警告他们：他们所面对的挑战可能导致失去某位朋友。

  • 沃尔会对武者说话，提醒他们照看队伍中较弱的成员。她也可能告诫任何使用“妙语连珠”技能专长的人：在对抗长生或不朽的反派时使用它要小心，因为对方可能会把怨恨发泄在他们的后裔身上（这是个小小的铺垫）。

  • 奥塔里会警告任何支援型角色不要逞强；把前线战斗交给战士，并专注于成为队伍的大脑，而非肌肉。

  • 扎马夫迪安会告诫施法者保持警觉，或不要让自己被更黑暗的法门迷魂。

沃尔的训诫

在这段时间里，卡尔曼一直沉默地注视着，因身处传说中幽冥祖先的面前而心神震荡、惊愕不已。

在玫瑰团沿着幽灵之路向下行进之前，沃尔会转向卡门。

你，我的后裔，已令拉贾尼之名蒙羞。你不得挥舞合作之刃。对你而言，它已被诅咒。

它将由新的玫瑰团保管，直到他们不再需要它。届时，他们应将其归还晨花图书馆。它会留在那里，如我所愿，好让它能用来对抗奥塔里镇所面对的诸多威胁。

她的表情随即柔和下来。

但你终究是我的后裔，我会给你一个赎罪的机会。若你能改过自新，若你能养育出有出息的孩子，那么他们之中就会有人能够将其取回。

玫瑰团的幽灵门之战

朗读或描述如下内容：

接着，玫瑰团的每位成员都抽出一把幽冥武器，沿着幽灵之路前进。

他们开始奔跑，在幽灵之路上越跑越快，直到全力冲锋。

他们高举武器，猛然撞上屏障。屏障炸裂成数百缕独立的微灵之光，四散并消融于黑暗之中。

随后，沉默术。

为便于呈现此场景，先让这群幽灵每次移动一格。随后开始每次移动两到三格，最后一段应当以一次疾走的速度进行。

来自《憎恨魔窟》日志的以下宏将打破幽魂封印：

@UUID[Macro.pDzkFlraunFyBL5G]{D12 - Breaking the Seal}

 

Scene Setup

D13 Upper Temple of Nhimbaloth

Prerequisite: The heroes must have already defeated the flickerwisps and crawling hands that are initially on the altar.

You can find the Roseguard in the "Roseguard Members" folder in the Actor tab of the sidebar.

Place each Roseguard Ghost next to the altar in either a diamond or square configuration, so their ghostly lights envelops the altar. Turn their token visibility off.

This holy ritual will cleanse Otari of his Filth Fever. Therefore, before placing Otari's token, remove the Infested Shadow action and the Filth Fever passive from his actor sheet.

Placing the Icons

When the heroes enter the room while bearing the Roseguard icons, they can still hear the sounds and feel the effects of it, but the altar no longer has the power to bring them fear.

Invite each of your heroes to describe how they approach the altar and place their assigned icons on it. When each does so, each associated ghost should appear:

  • Asephna's Hunter's Brooch - @UUID[Actor.CwC6aBucr3HvAFoL]{Aesephna's Ghost}

  • Vol's Cooperative Blade - @UUID[Actor.V4PkTZFzk5Y5T5JM]{Vol's Ghost}

  • Zarmavdian's Thresholds of Truth - @UUID[Actor.KmHFeQqAs6Zt6yCm]{Zarmavdian's Ghost}

  • Otari's Thieves Tools - @UUID[Actor.JvzCKApEU3vzEfJH]{Otari's Ghost}

When the last ghost appears, and the light from all four ghosts envelops the altar, then execute this macro to turn off the lights and sounds all at once:

@UUID[Macro.ijNWBsgFRisYMKit]{D13 - Toggle Altar Ambience}

After this, there will be a brief reunion among the members of the Roseguard, which should proceed how the GM wishes.

Roseguard's Encouraging Words

Next, each of the Roseguard should have a few words for each of their representatives. This will help strengthen the sense of kinship that each of the heroes will hopefully have for the Roseguard member whom they represent.

Below are a few ideas, but really, these should be customized for your heroes and the stories they have created so far. Maybe it would even be a graceful way to pass on some hints to help your players improve their character's play.

  • Aesephna would talk to the healers in the group and offer some suggestions in the use of their skills, or perhaps to warn them that the challenges they face may result in the loss of one of their friends.

  • Vol would speak to the warriors, and remind them to look out for their weaker party members. She might also caution anyone who uses Bon Mot skill feat to be wary when using it against long-lived or immortal villains, as they make take it out on their descendants (this is a little foreshadowing).

  • Otari would warn any support characters against getting in over their head; to leave the front-line fighting to the fighters, and concentrate on being the brains of the group, rather than the brawn.

  • Zarmavdian would caution any spellcasters to keep their wits about them, or to not let themselves become too fascinated by the darker arts.

Vol's Admonishment

During all this time, Carman has been watching silently, shaken and astonished at being in the presence of his legendary ghostly ancestor.

Before the Roseguard heads down the GhostWalk, Vol will turn to Carmen.

You, my descendant, have been a disgrace to the Rajani name. You shall not wield the Cooperative Blade. For you, it is cursed.

It will remain in the custody of the new Roseguard for as long as they need it. When they no longer need it, they shall return it to Dawnflower Library. There, it shall stay, as I intended it, so it can be used to combat the many threats that the town of Otari faces.

Her expression then softens.

But you are my descendent, and I will give you a chance to redeem yourself. If you turn your life around, and if you father worthy children, then one of them will be able to reclaim it.

Roseguard's Ghostgate Battle

Read or describe the following:

Next, each member of the Roseguard draws a ghostly weapon and proceeds down Ghostwalk.

They begin to run, moving faster and faster down the Ghostwalk, until they are in a full charge.

They slam into the barrier with weapons raised. It explodes into hundreds of individual wisps of light, which disperses into darkness.

Then, silence.

To facilitate this scene, first move the group of ghosts one square at a time. Then, start moving them two or three squares, and the last stretch should be the speed of one stride.

The following macro, from the Abomination Vaults journals, will break the Spectral Seal:

@UUID[Macro.pDzkFlraunFyBL5G]{D12 - Breaking the Seal}

Overview.name: 概述 Overview
Overview.text:
这个子任务扩展了奥塔里的故事，以及整个玫瑰团的故事。

在原始故事中，当英雄们在贝科拉的避难所内将玫瑰团遗珍放置在宁布洛斯的祭坛上时，幽灵（特征）奥塔里便得以休息，从而摧毁了祭坛的力量以及走廊尽头的幽灵之路之门。

在此修订版本中，放置遗珍的行为实际上会召唤出玫瑰团的每一位成员；他们在来世已同意以这种方式被召唤。

此后，他们的幽灵（特征）会以某种类似幽灵般回归人世的方式继续存在，只是他们没有摧毁贝科拉的力量。但贝科拉也同样没有摧毁他们的力量。只有在她死亡时，他们才能得以休息。

在英雄们触及牢房等级及更深处之前，他们都不会再次现身。

这个支线任务的活动围绕收集玫瑰团遗珍、解锁祭坛，以及玫瑰团本身——他们四人——前去与幽灵之路路障处的幽灵（特征）展开一场战斗。

该子任务包含以下内容：

  • 每位玫瑰团幽灵（特征）成员的棋子与美术资源，其数据以他们死亡时代的角色数据为基础，并附加幽灵（特征）数据。

  • 新的玫瑰团遗珍，具备更实用的能力与特征。

  • 奥塔里任命英雄们为新的玫瑰团。

  • 新旧玫瑰团之间的一幕场景。

以下是玫瑰团每位成员的角色研究：

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.LhSYWJS9K8maR8sQ.JournalEntryPage.3mI67FsDoIbm7Dkt]{沃尔·拉贾尼}

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.LhSYWJS9K8maR8sQ.JournalEntryPage.EtiwKzti1px6j2tU]{奥塔里·伊瓦什提}

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.LhSYWJS9K8maR8sQ.JournalEntryPage.yY2k1zvbcS49TIqi]{牧师艾斯法娜·曼妮姆斯}

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.LhSYWJS9K8maR8sQ.JournalEntryPage.vnE7Gww7PxeixGWm]{扎马夫迪安}

This subquest expands on the story of Otari, and the entire Roseguard.

In the original story, the ghost Otari is put to rest when the heroes place the Roseguard icons on the Nhimbaloth altar in Belcorra's Retreat, thus destroying the power of the alter and the Ghostgate at the end of the hall.

In this revision, the act of placing the icons actually summons each member of the Roseguard, who, in the afterlife, have agreed to be summoned in in this way.

Thereafter, their ghosts live on something like ghostly revenants, except they do not have the power to destroy Belcorra. But neither does she have the power to destroy them. They can only be put to rest with her death.

They will not show up again until the heroes reach the Prison level and beyond.

The activities in this side quest is around the gathering of the Roseguard Icons, the unlocking of the altar, and the Roseguard itself — all four of them — heading to a battle against the ghosts of the Ghostwalk barricade.

This subquest includes the following:

  • Tokens and art for each ghostly member of the Roseguard, with stats that are appropriate for their character stats at their time of death, plus ghost stats.

  • New Roseguard icons, with more useful abilities and traits.

  • Otari's appointment of the heroes as the new Roseguard.

  • A scene between the new and old Roseguard.

Here is a character study for each member of the Roseguard:

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.LhSYWJS9K8maR8sQ.JournalEntryPage.3mI67FsDoIbm7Dkt]{Vol Rajani}

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.LhSYWJS9K8maR8sQ.JournalEntryPage.EtiwKzti1px6j2tU]{Otari Ilvashti}

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.LhSYWJS9K8maR8sQ.JournalEntryPage.yY2k1zvbcS49TIqi]{Aesephna Menhemes}

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.LhSYWJS9K8maR8sQ.JournalEntryPage.vnE7Gww7PxeixGWm]{Zarmavdian}

Lv. 2 Servants' Quarters.name: 2级 仆从宿舍 Lv. 2 Servants' Quarters

Introduction.name: 引言 Introduction
Introduction.text:
这个等级唯一的改动是地图图钉，指向“玩法提醒”和“小插曲”日志中的各个页面。

在开始这个等级之前，你可能想先通读一下 @UUID[JournalEntry.3TP6JlaRwQ380Dqy]{时间线 - 奥塔里之径}，以便了解奥塔里的故事。

The only changes to this level are map pins to various pages in the Gameplay Reminders and the vignettes journal.

Before starting this level, you might want to read over the @UUID[JournalEntry.3TP6JlaRwQ380Dqy]{Timeline - Trail of Otari} to get a feel for Otari's story.

A19 - Spookywisp, AKA Tangletop.name: A19 - 吓人鬼，又名 鸡窝头 A19 - Spookywisp, AKA Tangletop
A19 - Spookywisp, AKA Tangletop.text:
我不喜欢游戏系统提供的默认棕仙图像，因为我认为那个“恐怖孩童”的图片与棕仙这种善良的生物并不相符。

所以我替换了他的肖像和棋子图像。你可以在这里找到默认图像：

modules/pf2e-abomination-vaults/assets/bestiary-portraits/ch-01/tangletop.webp

I disliked the default brownie images provided by the game system, since I did not think that the terror child image matched up with the goodly creatures that are brownies.

So I swapped his portrait and token images. You can find the default image here:

modules/pf2e-abomination-vaults/assets/bestiary-portraits/ch-01/tangletop.webp

A13 - Belcorra's Keyring.name: A13 - 贝科拉的钥匙圈 A13 - Belcorra's Keyring
A13 - Belcorra's Keyring.text:
该物品替换 A13 贝科拉的工坊中的 @UUID[Item.jDszN0s4ucrnNhc9]{生锈的钥匙环}。

@UUID[Item.3dr3iYlp9m3bVCmR]{贝科拉的钥匙圈}

它包含原本生锈的钥匙环上的两把钥匙。

要使用该钥匙圈，装备它并将钥匙拖入贝科拉的钥匙圈容器中。

This item replaces the @UUID[Item.jDszN0s4ucrnNhc9]{Rusty Ring of Keys} in A13 Belcorra's Workshop.

@UUID[Item.3dr3iYlp9m3bVCmR]{Belcorra's Keyring}

It includes the two keys that were on the original Rusty Ring of Keys.

To use the keyring, equip it and drag keys into the Belcorra's Keyring container.

A23 - Broken Mr. Beak.name: A23 - 破损的比克先生 A23 - Broken Mr. Beak
A23 - Broken Mr. Beak.text:
这件物品应在玩家击败喙先生后可用。

@UUID[Item.5OzSdD8ClCBO8BZR]{喙先生玩偶}

This item should become available after the players have defeated Mr. Beak.

@UUID[Item.5OzSdD8ClCBO8BZR]{Mr. Beak Doll}

A09 - Fake Skeleton Guard.name: A09 - 假骷髅（特征）守卫 A09 - Fake Skeleton Guard
A09 - Fake Skeleton Guard.text:
这个战利品角色包含了密特弗利特为其在 @UUID[JournalEntry.kDJSn9wbVvjnqYEj.JournalEntryPage.YWWlJBVLGkdNcjxf]{A09. 步道} 中描述的伪装骷髅（特征）守卫添加的 +1 钉头锤。该“护甲”毫无价值。

它也用作一个视觉提醒，表明那个“守卫”甚至就在那里。

This loot actor contains the +1 Morningstar that the mitflit added to their fake skeleton guard described in @UUID[JournalEntry.kDJSn9wbVvjnqYEj.JournalEntryPage.YWWlJBVLGkdNcjxf]{A09. Walkway}. The "armor" is worthless.

It also serves as a visual reminder that the "guard" is even there.

Afterward - Doomed Goblin Gang Arrives.name: 事后——注定灭亡的地精帮到来 Afterward - Doomed Goblin Gang Arrives
Afterward - Doomed Goblin Gang Arrives.text:
在英雄完成这一等级期间或之后的某个时候，@UUID[JournalEntry.UPCJOXs6P7caGN4c]{注定毁灭的地精帮}应当抵达城镇。

Sometime during or after the heroes complete this level, the @UUID[JournalEntry.UPCJOXs6P7caGN4c]{Doomed Goblin Gang} should arrive in town.

Lv. 5 Side Quest - Glory Days.name: 5级支线任务——光辉岁月 Lv. 5 Side Quest - Glory Days

Grandmaster's Letter.name: 宗师的信件 Grandmaster's Letter
Grandmaster's Letter.text:
当英雄们下降到第5等级时，他们会在楼梯底部的三脚架上发现一块告示牌。告示牌上写着：

注意，冒险者！

钉在这句问候下方的是一份卷轴。告示牌上的一道发光的光亮术使它不可能被忽视。

这是一份精美的卷轴，用红色蜡封封缄。

@UUID[Item.H9tLNIWA8Sc5doac]{Grandmaster's Missive}

当封缄被破开时，一点微弱的火花逸出并消失不见。

这份卷轴缠绕在一张@UUID[Item.wVqSjBYQCAImZUwu]{Scroll of Stone to Flesh (Level 6)}外面，这是一张非常珍贵的卷轴。

When the heroes descend to the 5th level, they will find a sign posted on a tripod at the base of the stairs. The sign says:

Attention, Adventurers!

Pinned blow this greeting is a scroll. A glowing light spell upon the sign makes it impossible to miss.

This is a fine scroll with a seal in red wax.

@UUID[Item.H9tLNIWA8Sc5doac]{Grandmaster's Missive}

When broken, a faint spark breaks free and disappears.

The scroll is wrapped around a @UUID[Item.wVqSjBYQCAImZUwu]{Scroll of Stone to Flesh (Level 6)}, which is a very valuable scroll.

Shaitan, the Arena Grandmaster.name: 沙伊坦，竞技场大宗师 Shaitan, the Arena Grandmaster
Shaitan, the Arena Grandmaster.text:
总管是一名沙伊坦巫师。他会从竞技场入口处张开双臂，向英雄们大声致意。

@UUID[Actor.9h09UgtfTuVJm1GX]{沙伊坦巫师}

然后他会把石化蜥蜴赶走，让英雄们可以安全通过。它们无法石化他，所以他把它们当作守卫使用。

之后，他会把它们关进他王座后方的坑里。

他告诉英雄们可以称呼他为沙伊坦。如果他们询问他的真名，他会发出一种无法发音的刺耳摩擦声。

角色扮演沙伊坦

沙伊坦是一名巨灵，因此在各个方面都极尽夸张、比生命更宏大。进行沙伊坦的角色扮演时，可以想想罗宾·威廉姆斯在阿拉丁中饰演的巨灵。

尽管他为了经营自己的竞技场而与一些令人不齿的生物合作，但他将贝科拉的归来视为一场灾祸，并且真心想要帮助英雄们。

如果他们同意他的计划，沙伊坦应取代查夫肯姆，成为关于第5与第6等级信息的来源。

The Grandmaster is a Shaitan wizard. He will bellow a greeting to the heroes with outspread arms from the entrance to the arena.

@UUID[Actor.9h09UgtfTuVJm1GX]{Shaitan Wizard}

He will then herd away the basilisks so the heroes can safely pass. They cannot petrify them, so he uses them as guards.

Later, he will have them penned up in the pit behind his throne.

He tells the heroes they can call him Shaitan. If they ask his real name, he will make an unpronounceable grinding sound.

Roleplaying Shaitan

Shaitan is a djinn, and therefore, is larger than life in every possible way. When roleplaying Shaitan, think Robin Williams' Genie from Aladdin.

Although he worked with distasteful creatures in order to operate his Arena, he sees Belcorra's return as a calamity, and he genuinely want to help the heroes.

If they agree to his schemes, Shaitan should replace Chafkhem as the font of information regarding levels 5 and 6.

Gamemaster's Scheme.name: 游戏主持人的谋划 Gamemaster's Scheme
Gamemaster's Scheme.text:
寒暄介绍过后，沙伊坦会询问他们是否有任何法术或效果，能让他们在相对私密的环境中交谈。如果他们没有，他会问自己是否可以施法。如果他们同意，他将带他们前往竞技场，并施放 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.mwPfoYfVGSMAaUec]{温馨小屋}。

他的温馨小屋具备典型温馨小屋的同样特征，但外观体现了他的文化：它像毡房一样是圆形而非方形，壁炉位于中央，四周垂挂着雅致的帷幔。它事先安置在竞技场地面上，伪装成一块隐藏的地砖。

进入其中后，他会煮一壶辛辣的茶，鼓励大家围坐在火旁。随后他递上一支烟斗。

它确实会带来轻微的欣快效果，但相当无害，不会留下任何持久效果或成瘾。我会尽量不在你们受其影响期间与你们达成任何交易。这只不过相当于精怪之间一起分享一大壶好麦酒罢了。

等愿意的人都抽过一口后，他会讲述他的故事。

数年前——也许是数十年前，也许是数百年前——我听人提起过一座地城，里面有一处被遗弃的竞技场。我很感兴趣，便开始追查这些传闻：谁会遗弃一座竞技场呢？我的打听把我带进了幽暗地域，在那里我还听到了其他传闻——关于竞技场里的生物能“改良”人。我循着传闻一路追踪，最终从幽暗地域找到了通往此地的入口。当我抵达这些等级时，我发现两条传闻大多都是真的。

确实，这里有一座令人惊叹的竞技场。这里也有些骇人的生物，能够把一个人“塑肉”成……嗯……别的东西。起初我以为他们是在绑架人来这么做，但我发现事实并非如此。你们在这里见到的大多数——若非全部——被塑肉的生物，其实都是自愿的。令人震惊，但千真万确。唯一的例外似乎是那些本来就是无心智怪物的畸形体。

这些塑肉者自称双尾虫怪。他们看起来完全不像这个世界的存在。他们的外形是巨大的虫形怪物，长着三角形的口器，而且相当聪明。其中一位名叫贾法基的炼金术师兼塑肉者，掌管着在本层下一等级的主实验室。

我到来时，发现竞技场已成了数种生物的巢穴。蛇发鸡蜥的凝视对我无效，他们很快就学会了别来招惹我。我决定把他们留作守卫。只要我在他们每次产卵时把卵偷走——我确实每次都这么做——他们就会保持成对配偶关系，也就不会离开。

然而，那只双尾虫怪巨兽必须得走。双尾虫怪们正在研究它。想象一下，他们有一天的惊讶——我出现在竞技场里，并在单挑中击败了它！那真是了不起的专长，我为此非常自豪。我把生物推撞进岩石里的能力证明相当有价值，但也确实耗费了我不少法师的法术，而有那么一阵子，我几乎以为自己注定要完蛋了。

（沙伊坦的随身物品中包含他在击败巨兽后从竞技场地面收集到的物品。）

但幸好，我赢了。随后，双尾虫怪的首领贾法基派了个爪牙来请求会面。我同意了，并与他们三个见了面。我告诉他们，我只想经营这座竞技场。他们竟然赞同这个想法，甚至还想把他们塑肉出来的造物送到我这里，让它们在战斗中接受检验。

注：以下内容假设你也使用了 @UUID[JournalEntry.dHfrhlefwZxcjRj1]{Lv. 7 牢房} 日志中对第7等级的改动。否则，请按需调整：

实验室下方的第七等级，是牢房与训练场的结合体，曾经是某个恶魔之类的家。然而，他与贝科拉那个女人的契约似乎在很久以前就已到期，使得第七等级不再有明确的领袖。那一层有一套升降系统，能继续通往更深处；多年来——数十年？——源源不断的准角斗士与观众前来参与并观看战斗。

那是何等辉煌。

但当贝科拉归来后，一切都改变了。

我不清楚她究竟何时回来，但我有一段时间一直听到相关传闻。随后，来自第七等级的往来彻底中断。我下去查探发生了什么，却迎面碰上了一位鬼婆（特征）。

那位鬼婆（特征）告诉我，如今通往下方与自下而上的通行，只允许那些宣誓效忠贝科拉的人。她也证实贝科拉已从死亡中归来，成为幽灵（特征）。

说到这里，他轻蔑地嗤了一声。

所谓的空无之死，就这？

总之，看来有位强大的女祭司接管了那一层，并在升降系统周围布置了某种屏障。现在，唯有得到她亲自认可的人，才能进出。

简而言之，她毁了我所有的乐趣。

自从贝科拉归来，周遭的土似乎被施加了某种惑控系，而我无法再借由土遁穿行其中。看起来，唯一能离开这里的通道，只剩下地城建造前就存在的那些。而且，尽管我能在这些地城较窄的走廊里挤入空间通过，但所有隧道都太小了，若不靠土遁我根本过不去。

于是，我与下方失去了联系。并且由于楼梯顶部的屏障，我也与上方隔绝。不过，你们已经打开了那条路，我现在有机会离开这里，在别处开始另一番事业。

然而，我发现……嗯……我的好奇心太强了，没法就这么离开。我必须与你们谈谈。

而且我得看看，你们是否会对一个小计划感兴趣。

接着，这位宗师分享了他的计划：

我想协助你们将贝科拉从世界上清除，而我认为协助你们的最佳方式，就是帮助你们获得一些经验。

因此，我希望让你们参加一系列战斗。

这座地城各处散落着不少可怖的怪物。我认为其中只有少数适合作为竞技场战斗。我提议，你们与这些怪物进行一连串公开表演赛。

我警告你们，这会吸引注意力，所以我建议你们把最拿手的把戏留在最后，免得将来不得不与贾法基及其他双尾虫怪交战时，你们已经把底牌全都亮完。些许佯装与欺瞒很适合滋长自负——而让敌人培养自负，总归是件好事。

你们每赢下一场战斗，我就会从我的私人藏品中拿出魔法物品作为奖励。

等你们打过一两次之后，或许就会开始有来自下一等级的挑战者上来。你们可以自行决定是否接受。不过，在事情拖得太久之前，必须要有一场盛大的终局——一场终结所有战斗的战斗。

他忍不住咧嘴一笑。

不过，那个我们稍后再谈。你们觉得如何？

After the introductions, Shaitan will ask if they have any spell or effect that will allow them to talk with some privacy. If they do not, he will ask if he might cast a spell. If they agree, he will lead them to the Arena and cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.mwPfoYfVGSMAaUec]{Cozy Cabin}.

His Cozy Cabin has the same features of a typical Cozy Cabin, but his reflects his culture. It is round like a yurt instead of square, with the fireplace in the middle. It is swathed in elegant draperies. It is pre-positioned on the arena floor, as a hidden tile.

Once within, he will brew up a spicy tea, encourage everyone to gather around his fire. He then passes around a pipe.

It does have a mild euphoric effect, but is quite harmless, and leaves no lasting effects or addictions. I will attempt to make no deals with you while we are under its effects. This is simply the djinn equivalent of sharing a good flagon of ale together.

Once those who wish to have taken a puff, he will tell his tale.

Some years ago, perhaps decades, perhaps centuries, I heard tell of a dungeon with an abandoned arena within it. I was intrigued, I began to trace the rumors, for who would abandon an arena? My inquires took me into the Darklands, where I heard other rumors as well, rumors of creatures within the arena who can "improve" people. I followed the rumors, and eventually found the entry to this place from the Darklands. Once I reached these levels, I discovered that both rumors were mostly true.

Indeed, there is this impressive arena. There were also horrifying creatures who could "fleshwarp" a person into … well … something else. At first, I assumed they were kidnapping people for these purposes, but I found out that it was not true. Most, if not all, of the fleshwarped creatures you will find here were, in fact, volunteers. Astonishing, but true. The only exception seems to be those that were mindless monstrosities to begin with.

The fleshwarpers call themselves Seugathi. They do not appear to be of this world at all. The have the form of monstrous worms, with triangular mouths. And they are quite intelligent. One of them, an alchemist and fleshwarper named Jafaki, runs the main laboratory one level below this one.

When I arrived, I found that the arena had become the home of several creatures. The gaze of the basilisk did not work on me, and they quickly learned to leave me alone. I decided to keep them as guards. As long as I steal their eggs, which I do whenever they lay, they will remain a mated pair, and they will not leave.

However, the Seugathi Behemoth had to go. The Seugathi were studying it. Imagine their surprise one day when I showed up in the arena, and bested it in single combat! It was quite the feat, for which I am very proud. My ability to shove creatures into stone turned out to be quite valuable, but it did take a good number of my wizardly spells as well, and for a while, I rather feared I was doomed.

(Shaitan's inventory includes items that he collected from the Arena Floor after defeating the Behemoth.)

But happily, I prevailed, and the Seugathi leader, Jafaki, sent some minion to ask for a meeting. I agreed, and met with three of them. I told them that I only wished to run the arena. They actually approved of the idea, and even wanted to send their fleshwarped creations to me, in order to prove them in combat.

Note: The following assumes that you are are also using the changes to Level 7 in the @UUID[JournalEntry.dHfrhlefwZxcjRj1]{Lv. 7 Prison} journal. Otherwise, adapt the following as necessary:

The level below the laboratory, the seventh level, is a combination of a prison and a training ground, and was once home to some devil or another. However, it seems his contract with that Belcorra woman had expired long ago, leaving the seventh level with no clear leader. There is a lift system on that level that goes further below, and for many years—decades?—a steady supply of would-be gladiators and spectators came to participate in and watch the fights.

It was glorious.

But all that changed when Belcorra returned.

I don't know exactly when she came back, but I heard rumors of it for some time. Then, traffic from the seventh level ceased. I ventured down there to find out what was going on, and was greeted by a hag.

The hag told me that traffic to and from Below was now restricted to those who took an oath to serve Belcorra. The hag also confirmed that Belcorra had returned from the dead as a ghost.

At this point he sniffs in disdain.

So much for the so-called Empty Death!

In any case, it seems that a powerful priestess has taken over that level, and had put in place some kind of barrier around the lift system, and now, the only people who can now come and go must do so with her personal sanction.

In short, she ruined all my fun.

Ever since Belcorra returned, the surrounding earth has some kind of enchantment on it, and I am unable to Earth Glide through it. The only tunnels that lead out of here, it seems, are the ones that existed prior to the dungeon's construction. And although I can squeeze through the narrower corridors in these dungeons, all the tunnels are too small for me to get through without Earth Gliding.

There, I am cut off from the Below. And due to the barrier at the top of the stairs, I was also cut off from the Above. However, you have opened that path, and I now have the chance to get out of here and begin some other endeavor elsewhere.

However, I found … well, my curiosity was too great for me to just leave. I had to talk to you.

And I had to see if you might be interested in a little scheme.

Next, the Grandmaster shares his scheme:

I would like to assist you in ridding the world of Belcorra, and I think the best way for me to assist you is to help you gain some experience.

Therefore, I wish to run you through a series of fights.

Scattered throughout this dungeon is a number of frightful monsters. Only a few, I think, are suitable for Arena fights. I propose that you fight these monsters in a series of public spectacles.

I warn you, this will attract attention, so I advise you to keep your best tricks to yourself so you have not given everything away if you must eventually face Jafaki and the other saugathi in combat. A little subterfuge is great for building overconfidence, which is always a good thing to cultivate in your enemy.

When you win each battle, I will reward you with magical items from my private stash.

By the time you have fought a time or two, you may start getting challengers from the level below. It would be up to you wither or not you accept them. However, before this goes on too long, there must be a grand finale. A battle to end all the battles.

He is unable to repress a grin.

But more on that later. What do you think?

Leveling.name: 升级 Leveling
Leveling.text:
因为这个竞技场方案使用的是地下城里已有的怪物，所以应该不会有等级方面的问题。失去与塑肉残渣巨兽战斗的机会，已被与NooDupAgNee帮派战斗的机会所取代。

Because this arena scheme uses monsters that are already in the dungeon, there should be no leveling issues. The loss of the opportunity to fight the Shanrigol Behemoth has been replaced by the opportunity to fight the NooDupAgNee gang.

First Round.name: 第一轮 First Round
First Round.text:
在第一轮开始前，沙伊坦会请求队伍帮助他将E25角斗士的宴会厅里的骸骨角斗士赶出来。他计划用一道土墙来完成此事，但需要英雄们协助把它引诱到宴会厅与竞技场之间的走廊里。从那里，他会把角斗士逼到竞技场看台上，然后再把它弄到竞技场地面。

为了更有趣，你可以用遭遇模式来进行，在此期间角斗士肯定会反击。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.abomination-vaults-bestiary.Actor.rketcmqDQJbFFYfq]{骸骨角斗士} - 原始日志页面：@UUID[JournalEntry.JT0zCcIwsSpKnbB5.JournalEntryPage.xVfdltaZZguZ35F1]{E25. 角斗士的宴会厅}

  • 一旦英雄们把角斗士引到走廊里，沙伊坦会在角斗士身后施放Wall of Stone，制造一个10x10的石块。

  • 然后他会与角斗士交战，尝试使用推撞入石将其推进石块中。

  • 一旦成功，他会把石块抬进竞技场，然后把它推到看台的破损部分，并将其推到竞技场地面上。它会落入沙地中，不会受到显著伤害。它会在石块中保持8小时。

  • 如果他失败了，并且他们被迫杀死角斗士，那么他会允许他们杀死它，而他不再进一步介入。

  • 如果角斗士受伤了，他会询问英雄们是否有任何法术能对不死生物施放治疗术。若没有，他会希望让该生物在战斗开始前先恢复。

角斗士可以在竞技场地面上无限期停留，直到英雄们准备好与它战斗为止。如果它闹得太凶，沙伊坦就会直接把它埋进沙里。

胜者战利品

把这些放入@UUID[Actor.RkFprigAuxmk7vMF]{Arena Games Prizes}容器中。如果队伍获胜，把它放到竞技场地面上。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.PlB4I1LFOpRYwvEg]{Aeon Stone (Polished Pebble)}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.xTdrhiLqFYUllrpK]{Cantrip Deck (Full Pack)}

在他们于竞技场地面成功击败角斗士之后，沙伊坦会建议他们探索竞技场其余的等级。

然而，他请求他们请避开E02附近的区域——大型怪物关押区域，直到他有机会与克拉托尼斯就她可能的参与进行谈判。

Before the first round, Shaitan ask the group to help him herd the Bone Gladiator from E25 Gladiator's Mess Hall. He plans to do so using a wall of earth, but will need the heroes help in luring it into the hallway between the Mess Hall and the Arena. From there, he will force the Gladiator onto the Arena balcony and then onto the Arena floor.

For added fun, you could do this in encounter mode, during which the Gladiator will definitely fight back.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.abomination-vaults-bestiary.Actor.rketcmqDQJbFFYfq]{Bone Gladiator} - Original Journal Page: @UUID[JournalEntry.JT0zCcIwsSpKnbB5.JournalEntryPage.xVfdltaZZguZ35F1]{E25. Gladiators’ Mead Hall}

  • Once the heroes have lured the Gladiator into the hallway, Shaitan will cast Wall of Stone beyond the Gladiator to create a 10x10 block of stone.

  • He will then engage the Gladiator, attempting to use Shove into Stone to push it into the block.

  • Once successful, he will heave the block into the arena, and then will shove it to the broken portion of the balcony, and push it onto the arena floor. It will fall into the sand, and will not take significant injury. It will remain in the stone for 8 hours.

  • If he is unsuccessful, and they are forced to kill the Gladiator, then he will allow them to kill it without further intervention by him.

  • If the Gladiator is injured, he will ask the heroes if they have any spells that can heal undead. If not, he will want to allow the creature to heal before the battle takes place.

The Gladiator can stay on the Arena floor indefinitely until the heroes are ready to fight it. If it gets too rowdy, Shaitan will simply bury it in the sand.

Victor's Spoils

Place these in the @UUID[Actor.RkFprigAuxmk7vMF]{Arena Games Prizes} container. If the party wins, place it on the arena floor.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.PlB4I1LFOpRYwvEg]{Aeon Stone (Polished Pebble)}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.xTdrhiLqFYUllrpK]{Cantrip Deck (Full Pack)}

After they successfully defeat the Gladiator on the Arena Floor, Shaitan will suggest they explore the rest of the arena level.

HOWEVER, he asks them to please avoid the area around E02 Large Monster Holding area until he has a chance to negotiate with Cratonys about her potential involvement.

Third Round.name: 第三轮 Third Round
Third Round.text:
在第3轮，夏坦将把雕像从恢弘长廊带进来，杀死一只石化蜥蜴，并用石化蜥蜴的血将这些生物复原为血肉之躯。等英雄们回来时，他会把它们关在自己的坑里。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary-2.Actor.e5yE4RkwLQojRYHm]{透肌魔人战士}

他说这名透肌魔人是来自幽暗地域的强壮战士，但他们的技能足以轻松将其杀死。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.abomination-vaults-bestiary.Actor.zsgW8hHm3JfZUgwF]{钢皮魔人}

他说这是一个血肉畸变的透肌魔人，但对它们了解不够，无法提供任何警告。

这些生物最初出现在 @UUID[JournalEntry.JT0zCcIwsSpKnbB5.JournalEntryPage.DKiYbkAmfzGL3UgV]{E10. 恢弘长廊} 中。

维克多的战利品

将这些放入 竞技场游戏奖品 容器中。如果队伍获胜，就把它放在竞技场地面上。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.7JVgLiNTAs4clEW8]{炼金术士护目镜}

@UUID[Item.B4NqCU3AlwqRi9D0]{导能武器卷轴（等级1）}

For the 3rd round, Shaitan will bring the statues in from the Concourse, slay one of the basilisks, and revert the creatures to flesh with the basilisk blood. He will have them penned up in his pit the time the Heroes return.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary-2.Actor.e5yE4RkwLQojRYHm]{Urdefhan Warrior}

He says the Urdefhan is a stout warrior from the Darklands, but easily within their skills to slay.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.abomination-vaults-bestiary.Actor.zsgW8hHm3JfZUgwF]{Mulventok}
