He says this is a fleswarped urdefhan, but does not know enough about them to provide any warnings.

These creatures originally appeared in the @UUID[JournalEntry.JT0zCcIwsSpKnbB5.JournalEntryPage.DKiYbkAmfzGL3UgV]{E10. Grand Concourse}.

Victor's Spoils

Place these in the Arena Games Prizes container. If the party wins, place it on the arena floor.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.7JVgLiNTAs4clEW8]{Alchemist Goggles}

@UUID[Item.B4NqCU3AlwqRi9D0]{Scroll of Conductive Weapon (Level 1)}

Second Round.name: 第二轮 Second Round
Second Round.text:
在第2轮，他从E02大型怪物关押区域征召克拉托尼斯。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.abomination-vaults-bestiary.Actor.9Tr4aUNr2wxxMDcg]{Cratonys} 原始日志页面：@UUID[JournalEntry.JT0zCcIwsSpKnbB5.JournalEntryPage.oBe9I7ccu1SIxdsG]{E02. Large Monster Holding}

在第2轮与第3轮之间的间隙，夏坦将为克拉托尼斯创造一个可供战斗的区域，如同竞技场地板中央带有柱子与铁链的地砖所模拟的那样。她将拥有攻击20尺内任何人的能力。她不会离开她的铁链区域。准备好时启动它。

如果夏坦认为自己与英雄们的实力差距过大，他也会用他对骸骨角斗士使用过的同样手法，从E03怪物关押处移动一个或多个塑肉残渣堆，并将它们放在竞技场内、靠近她的铁链区域。它们恐惧术她，并且不会攻击她。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.abomination-vaults-bestiary.Actor.qXT1SQDtGqMkVl7Q]{Shanrigol Heaps} - 原始日志页面：@UUID[JournalEntry.JT0zCcIwsSpKnbB5.JournalEntryPage.UgMnFry9Z6qFiRMX]{E03. Monster Holding}

胜利者的战利品

将这些放入竞技场比赛奖品容器中。如果队伍获胜，将其放在竞技场地板上。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.2KNAip9W6IoBrfIU]{Caterwaul Sling}

@UUID[Item.1hPnB3H8Uxhfyd21]{颤动感知卷轴（等级2）}

For the second round, he recruits Cratonys from E02 Large Monster Holding area.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.abomination-vaults-bestiary.Actor.9Tr4aUNr2wxxMDcg]{Cratonys} Original Journal Page: @UUID[JournalEntry.JT0zCcIwsSpKnbB5.JournalEntryPage.oBe9I7ccu1SIxdsG]{E02. Large Monster Holding}

In an interim between the 2nd and 3rd rounds, Shaitan will create an area for Cratonys to fight from, as simulated by the tile with the pillars and chains in the center of the arena floor. She will have the ability to attack anyone within 20 feet. She will not move out of her chain area. Activate it when ready.

If Shaitan believes she is too outmatched by the heroes, he will also move one or more of the Shanrigol Heaps from E03 Monster Holding using the same technique he used on the Bone Gladiator, and will put them in the arena near her chain area. They fear her, and will not attack her.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.abomination-vaults-bestiary.Actor.qXT1SQDtGqMkVl7Q]{Shanrigol Heaps} - Original Journal Page: @UUID[JournalEntry.JT0zCcIwsSpKnbB5.JournalEntryPage.UgMnFry9Z6qFiRMX]{E03. Monster Holding}

Victor's Spoils

Place these in the Arena Games Prizes container. If the party wins, place it on the arena floor.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.2KNAip9W6IoBrfIU]{Caterwaul Sling}

@UUID[Item.1hPnB3H8Uxhfyd21]{Scroll of Tremorsense (Level 2)}

NoxAg's Challenge.name: 诺克斯艾格的挑战 NoxAg's Challenge
NoxAg's Challenge.text:
此挑战将在英雄们首次在瞎酿酒馆酒馆与NoxAg遭遇后的某个时间点进行。

在这场战斗中，英雄们可以选择面对一名挑战者——NoxAg与维斯查芮，瞎酿酒馆酒馆的经理。她可以在瞎酿酒馆酒馆内向队伍发起此挑战，或将挑战消息送至夏伊坦。

贾法基会派来一只铁骨怪。

@UUID[Actor.PirOzls2fnKFsohC]{NoxAg}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.abomination-vaults-bestiary.Actor.qoyopMMlRdgPAbXZ]{维斯查芮} - 原始日志页面：@UUID[JournalEntry.KI33EAGPVHP4zyFZ.JournalEntryPage.96tKiXroDGWLKvJk]{F16. 酒馆办公室}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.abomination-vaults-bestiary.Actor.DnAeqlJRZc5N7hve]{铁骨怪}

战斗音乐

不要使用通常的竞技场音乐，改用NooDupAgNee帮派主题曲。两段音效都已预先放置在阳台附近。

@UUID[Playlist.vB0om49dkEPYW2nD.PlaylistSound.tlZzNjRt6WLxhUuA]{再打一场就好}

胜者战利品

除上述的占据物外，夏伊坦还会追加以下内容：

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.hRwnNTMj7wa8S4Ji]{食尸鬼（特征） 躲藏}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.hcGvN03ieNWlSQYa]{云袋}（重制版号角之雾替代品）

This challenge will take place at some point after the heroes first encounter NoxAg in the Warped View Tavern.

For this battle, the heroes have the option to face a challenger - NoxAg and Vischari, the manager of the Warped Brew Tavern. She may either issue this challenge to the group in the Warped Brew tavern, or she may send word of the challenge to Shaitan.

Jafaki sends along a Dreshkan.

@UUID[Actor.PirOzls2fnKFsohC]{NoxAg}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.abomination-vaults-bestiary.Actor.qoyopMMlRdgPAbXZ]{Vischari} - Original Journal Page: @UUID[JournalEntry.KI33EAGPVHP4zyFZ.JournalEntryPage.96tKiXroDGWLKvJk]{F16. Tavern Office}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.abomination-vaults-bestiary.Actor.DnAeqlJRZc5N7hve]{Dreshkan}

Combat Music

Rather than use the usual arena music, use the NooDupAgNee Gang theme. Both sounds are prepositioned near the balcony.

@UUID[Playlist.vB0om49dkEPYW2nD.PlaylistSound.tlZzNjRt6WLxhUuA]{Just One More Fight}

Victor's Spoils

In addition to the possessions of the above, Shaitan adds the following:

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.hRwnNTMj7wa8S4Ji]{Ghoul Hide}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.hcGvN03ieNWlSQYa]{Cloud Pouch} (remaster Horn of Fog replacement)

Finale.name: 终章 Finale
Finale.text:
在终幕中，谢坦提出了一个欺骗计划。他会主动提出担任挑战者，试图引出贾法基。毕竟过了这么久，他认为自己已经理解了这名血肉塑形师的思维方式。

这场所谓的战斗应当发生在他们清理掉本层大部分区域之后（除瞎酿酒馆酒馆外），并且在他们挑战贾法基之前。

然而，这一切都是诡计。他建议英雄们转而闯入贾法基的实验室，把它砸个稀巴烂，然后埋伏等待，而谢坦则尽力去“取悦”观众（如果还剩下任何观众的话）。

如果查夫肯姆在英雄们有机会杀死贾法基之前就杀了贾法基，那么跳过本节。

For the Finale, Shaitan propses a deception. He will offer himself as challenger in an effort to lure out Jakafi. After all this time, he thinks he understands the fleshwarper's thinking.

This alleged battle should take place after they have cleared out most of the floor except the Warped Brew Tavern, and before they challenge Jafaki.

However, it is all a ruse. He suggests that the heroes instead break into Jakafi's lab, trash it, and await it in ambush while Shaitan does his best to "entertain" the crowds (if any are left).

If Chafkhem killed Jafaki before the heroes have a chance to, then skip this section.

Vignette - Shaitan Behemoth Battle.name: 短景——沙伊坦巨兽之战 Vignette - Shaitan Behemoth Battle

Vignette - Shaitan in Throne.name: 小插曲——王座中的沙伊坦 Vignette - Shaitan in Throne

Shaitan's Goodbye.name: 沙坦的告别 Shaitan's Goodbye
Shaitan's Goodbye.text:
一旦竞技结束并清理完第5与第6等级，沙伊坦就准备永远离开凄凉灯塔。

幽灵观众

在他离开前，队伍将有机会让幽灵观众得以休息。

摘自他们的行动者卡：

如果幽灵观众被说服竞技场比赛已经永远结束，他们就会得以休息。说服他们的一种方法，是摧毁竞技场大锣的支架，让它掉到竞技场地面上。

如果英雄们已经弄明白这一点并请求沙伊坦摧毁锣的支架，他很乐意这么做。

如果英雄们选择这个选项，那么一旦大锣落地，幽灵（特征）将变得可见，并会缓慢地列队前往恢弘长廊，在那里他们将永远消失。

否则，每一群幽灵（特征）都需要被逐一说服。随着他们看见幽灵（特征）同伴离去，每一群的DC都应当更容易一些。

沙伊坦的离去

沙伊坦会陪同队伍前往第4等级，并从洞穴入口出去，抵达僻静空地。旅程的第一段对他而言会相当挤入空间，但一旦越过贝科拉的魔法影响范围，他就会毫不费力地以Earth Glide穿出，进入僻静空地。

到了那里，他会欢快地一头扎进土里，又在另一处破土而出。

随后，他会道别。他会告诉他们，他会在自己的位面上独自休息一小段时间后返回。然后，他会给他们最后的赋礼，接着他将施展Plane Shift并离去。

作为临别赠礼的一部分，他将他的@UUID[Item.YK5azHQOODE7AACL]{Wand of Cozy Cabin (Level 3)}交给队伍。

在英雄们抵达憎恨魔窟的农场等级之后，当他们陷入困境或处于黑暗时刻时，他将会归来。见@UUID[JournalEntry.18XyXWeRQdjcao7Y]{Shaitan's Bazaar}。

Once the games are over and levels 5 and 6 are cleared, Shaitan is ready to depart Gauntlight forever.

Ghostly Spectators

Before he leaves, the group will have the opportunity to put the Ghostly Spectators to rest.

From their Actor card:

The Ghostly Spectators will be put to rest if they are convinced that the Arena games are over for good. One way to convince them is to destroy the mounting for the arena gong so it falls to the Arena floor.

If the Heroes have figured this out and ask Shaitan to destroy the gong mountings, he is happy to do so.

If the heroes choose this option, once the gong falls to the floor, the ghosts will become visible and will slowly file to the Grand Concourse, where they will vanish for good.

Otherwise, each group of ghosts will need to be convinced one by one. The DC should get easier for each group, as they have seen their ghostly comrades depart.

Shaitan's Departure

Shaitan will accompany the party to Level 4, and out the cave entrance to the Secluded Clearing. The first part of the journey will be quite a squeeze for him, but once beyond Belcorra's magic, he will effortlessly Earth Glide out into the Secluded Clearing.

Once there, he will joyfully dive into the earth, only to erupt out of it in another place.

Then, he will say goodbye. He will tell them that he will return after a brief period of rest on his own plane. Then, he gives them his final gifts, and then he will Plane Shift and be gone.

As a parting gift, he gives his @UUID[Item.YK5azHQOODE7AACL]{Wand of Cozy Cabin (Level 3)} to the group.

After the heroes have reached the Farm level of Abomination Vaults, when they are in a pinch or in a dark moment, he will return. See @UUID[JournalEntry.18XyXWeRQdjcao7Y]{Shaitan's Bazaar}.

Before Each Battle.name: 每场战斗前 Before Each Battle
Before Each Battle.text:
当英雄们准备就绪后，在每场战斗之前，夏伊坦会采取以下动作。你可以只把其中一些用角色扮演的方式呈现出来。

  • 他会把所有非战斗生物，比如石化蜥蜴，沉入他王座后方的深坑中。

  • 他会溶解第6等级观景室前方的屏障。

  • 接着，他会登上楼梯来到阳台，并敲响铜锣。回声将传遍第5与第6等级。

  • 观战的幽灵（特征）将会现身，因此把它们的棋子设为可见。

除诺克斯阿格的挑战外，所有竞技场战斗的音乐都在这里：

@UUID[Playlist.vB0om49dkEPYW2nD.PlaylistSound.bnpBPVm2YpsdFSsI]{Fighting For Tomorrow}

它是位于阳台正南方的一段未启用的环境音。

幽影观众

幽影观众位于第5层地图的竞技场看台上，棋子可见性为关闭。

他们是那些在竞技场中、或自竞技场建成以来在第5或第6等级任何地方死亡之人的幽灵（特征）。

每当铜锣响起时，竞技场看台上的幽影观众应当变为可见。他们会在原地停留1小时，或直到战斗结束为止。他们会为胜者欢呼——无论胜者是谁。

如果他们被说服认为竞技场游戏将永远结束，幽影观众便可得以休息。一种说服他们的方法，是摧毁竞技场铜锣的支架，让它坠落到竞技场地面上。

到场者

用下列角色填充观众阳台（或仅作描述；棋子数量很多）：

来自竞技场等级：

  • 克拉托尼斯会露面，直到她自己成为战斗人员为止。

  • （查夫哈姆，如果他已获释且仍然活着，会留在自己的房间里，因为他宁愿把自己新获得的自由对索加提保密。）

来自实验室等级：

  • 索加提研究员与他们随行的铁骨怪会前往F20下层观测平台等级观景室。梅尔申会从F22桑拿房加入他们。

  • 扭曲视界酒馆会清空，其居民与老板会冲上竞技场等级，在阳台周围就位。他们会避开幽影观众。

  • 幽影恶意乐队的成员会加速术赶去在中央阳台、两根拉杆之间架设设备。随后，他们会开始“演奏”夏伊坦指定的音乐。阳台充当魔法麦克风，音乐将响彻整个竞技场。他每次演出都会用魔法小饰品支付他们报酬。

  • F24 拷问室中的魔鬼不会暴露自己，但可能会从竞技场地面西侧的门后探头窥视。

  • （雅卡菲无视铜锣。蛛化精灵与皮普妮想要参加，但没有办法从主实验室到达那里。从竞技场地面东侧的门口，他们只能看到夏伊坦的关押栏，而他们也没有 许愿术 去招惹石化蜥蜴。）

When the heroes are ready, before each fight, Shaitan will take the following actions. You can just roleplay some of these.

  • He will sink all noncombatant creatures, such as the basilisks, into the deep pit behind his throne.

  • He will dissolve the barrier in front of the 6th level viewing chamber.

  • Next, he will ascend the stairs to the balcony, and ring the gong. It will reverberate throughout the 5th and 6th level.

  • The spectator ghosts will appear, so make their tokens visible.

The music for all of the Arena battles, except NoxAg's challenge, is found here:

@UUID[Playlist.vB0om49dkEPYW2nD.PlaylistSound.bnpBPVm2YpsdFSsI]{Fighting For Tomorrow}

It is an inactive ambiant sound just south of the balcony.

Ghostly Spectators

The Ghostly Spectators are in the Arena seats on the 5th floor map, with token visibility off.

They are the ghosts of those who have died in the arena, or anywhere on the 5th or 6th level, since the arena was built.

Whenever the gong sounds, the ghostly spectators in the arena seating should become visible. They will remain in place for 1 hour or until the battle is over. They will cheer for the victor, whoever it is.

The Ghostly Spectators can be put to rest if they are convinced that the Arena games are over for good. One way to convince them is to destroy the mounting for the arena gong so it falls to the Arena floor.

Attendees

Populate the spectator balcony with the following actors (or just describe it; it's a lot of tokens):

From the Arena level:

  • Cratonys will make an appearance until she becomes a combatant, herself.

  • (Chafham, if he has been freed and is still alive, will remain in his rooms, because he would rather keep his newfound freedom a secret from the Saugathi.)

From the Labs level:

  • The Saugathi Researchers and their attendant dreshkan will go to the F20 Lower Observation Deck level viewing chamber. Merschen will join them from F22 Sauna.

  • The Warped View Tavern will empty itself, and it's residents and owner will rush up to the Arena level to take up positions around the balcony. They avoid the ghostly spectators.

  • The members of the Shadow Malice band will make haste to set up on the center balcony, just between the levers. There, they will start to "play" music that Shaitan has specified. The balcony acts as a magical microphone, and the music will resound throughout the arena. He pays them in magical trinkets for each performance.

  • The devils in F24 Torture Chamber will not reveal themselves, but may peek out the door on the west side of the Arena floor.

  • (Jakafi ignores the gong. The drider and PipNee would like to attend, but have no way of getting to it from the Main Lab. From the door at the east side of the Arena floor, they can only see into Shaitan's holding pen, and they have no wish to tangle with the basilisks.)

To the Death?.name: 至死方休？ To the Death?
To the Death?.text:
沙伊坦习惯于竞技场战斗持续到另一方被制服为止。它们不一定要打到死亡，但这种事确实会发生。

如果有生物在战斗中倒下，他会使用其尘世之力将倒下的战斗者推撞出战场。

他会尽量安排既具挑战性但仍可获胜的战斗。然而，他并非完全公平，而且他确实希望英雄们活下来。若英雄们实力不及对手，偶尔作弊对他来说也不算过分，尤其是在他认为自己能蒙混过关的时候。他可能作弊的一种方式，是用他的塑石术法术绊倒某人，或悄悄放入一片流沙使地形变得难以通行。

如果任何一方有人主动介入以复苏倒下的同伴，他都不会干涉。

Shaitan is accustomed to arena battles continuing until the other side is subdued. They are not necessarily to the death, but these things happen.

If a creature falls in battle, he will use his earthly powers to Shove the fallen combatant away from the battle.

He will try to arrange battles that are challenging but winnable. He is, however, not entirely fair, and he definitely wants to see the heroes survive. He is not above the occasional cheat if the heroes are outclassed, especially if he thinks he can get away with it. One way he might cheat is to use his Stone Shape spell to trip someone, or sneak in a Shifting Sand to make the terrain difficult.

If anyone actively intervenes to revive a fallen comrade, on either side, he will not interfere.

Shaitan's Goals.name: 沙伊坦的目标 Shaitan's Goals
Shaitan's Goals.text:
沙伊坦坦诚自己想要帮助英雄们的意图，而且他确实认为自己能做到的最佳方式，就是帮助他们获得一些经验。

他痛苦地意识到，作为一个不老的巨灵，他的局限意味着他永远无法承担凡人能够承担的那种挑战——比如对抗贝科拉这样的挑战。

如果有人问他是否要加入队伍一同踏上任务，沙伊坦会承认自己的一些弱点。

确实，我目前比你们更强大。然而，我所缺少的，是你们的潜力。

作为不老的沙伊坦，我的成长机会有限。大多数沙伊坦都满足于自身的力量，但我通过研习法师的技能来追求更多。这让我比其他沙伊坦更强大。

然而，正因为我不老，神祇在我体内设置了某些限制。我的技能只能提升到某个程度，而我也不知道那个极限在哪里。现在，我可以施放第五环的法师法术。我在这个等级上已经停留了几个世纪。从我对贝科拉的了解，以及我亲眼所见她的作为、她能够召唤的生物与她能从死亡中唤起的生物来看，她的力量远远超过我。

你们作为凡人生物，并没有这样的限制。正如贝科拉在四十岁之前就获得了巨大的力量一样，你们也会因为所面对的挑战而获得强大的力量——只要你们能活下来。看看你们在如此短的时间里已经走了多远。等你们找到贝科拉的巢穴时，你们会比现在强大得多。而且你们会比我更强。

再者，就算我能再提升一环法术，那也得是几个世纪之后的事。贝科拉采取行动之前，你们可没有几个世纪可以等待。

换句话说，沙伊坦知道，等英雄们准备好面对贝科拉时，他们的实力将会增长到超过他。

Shaitan is honest about his intentions of helping the heroes, and he really does think that the best way he can do so is by helping them gain some experience.

He is painfully aware that his limitations as an ageless djinn means that he can never take on the type of challenge that a mortal can — a challenge like taking on Belcorra.

If asked about joining the group on their quest, Shaitan will acknowledge some weaknesses in himself.

It is true that I am currently more powerful than you are. However, what I do not have is your potential.

As an ageless shaitan, I have limited opportunity for growth. Most shaitan are content with their powers, but I have striven for more by studying wizardly skills. This makes me more powerful than other shaitan.

However, because I am ageless, the gods have placed certain limitations within me. I can only take my skills so far, and I don't know how far that is. Right now, I can cast wizard spells in the fifth rank. I have been at that level for centuries. From what I have learned of Belcorra, and from what I have seen of her works, and the creatures she is able to summon and raise from the dead, her power far exceeds my own.

You, as mortal creatures, have no such limitations. Just as Belcorra achieved massive power before she was forty, you, due to the challenges you take on, will also achieve great power, as long as you survive them. Look at how far you have come in such a short time. By the time you find Belcorra's lair, you will be far more powerful than you are now. And you will be far more powerful than me.

Besides, even if I do gain another spell rank, it will be centuries before that happens. You do not have centuries before Belcorra makes her move.

In other words, Shaitan knows that by the time the heroes are ready to face Belcorra, they will have outgrown him.

Idriniliss.name: 伊德里尼莉丝 Idriniliss
Idriniliss.text:
背景

两年前，在她家族被逐出艾巴萨罗姆的第500周年之际，贝科拉那不得安宁的灵魂再度骚动。作为回应，宁布洛斯挥了挥手，将贝科拉作为带着幽灵（特征）归返凄凉灯塔，去完成她未竟之事。

当她苏醒时，魔窟被她的灵性所浸透，墙壁的崩坏也随着黑暗魔法的涌动而停止。这股魔法将会持续，只要贝科拉的幽灵（特征）仍徘徊不去。

到这个时候，憎恨魔窟的各个地城等级早已在各自的地城等级上蜕变为彼此独立的封地。第7等级也不例外，只是乌瑞维安已不在那里（详见 @UUID[.lB5MUrBw04oKUqSO]{G10 Boss Domain}）。

为填补这处领导真空，贝科拉派出使者进入幽暗地域，最终，宁布洛斯的一名牧师伊德里尼利斯回应了她的召唤。

在空无之窟与贝科拉会面后，伊德里尼利斯拜访了奥塔里，并欣喜地发现玫瑰团的后裔仍生活在该区域。

随后，她花了一些时间进行占卜，查明是否仍有人在世，并依旧对玫瑰团怀有怨恨。在这次占卜中，她得知了破碎密会——她们居住在奥塔里东北方森林边缘。她前去寻找，找到了她们，以复仇的许诺诱惑她们，并将她们带回身边。

贝科拉对她的努力很满意。她将自己那份乌瑞维安吊坠的复制品交给了她，并命令她接管牢房等级，探明乌瑞维安的秘密。

在鬼婆（特征）盟友的帮助下，又有贝科拉的支持，伊德里米利斯在牢房等级建立了秩序，安置自己于乌瑞维安昔日的领地，并重启了乌瑞维安曾放弃的训练计划。

@UUID[Actor.9ivDmrYncKxHvAal]{Idriniliss}

Background

Two years ago, upon the 500th anniversary of her family's exile from Absalom, Belcorra's unquiet spirit stirred. In response, Nhimbaloth, with a wave of her hand, Nhimbaloth sent Belcorra back to Gauntlight as a ghost to finish what she started.

When she arose, the Vaults became imbued with her spirit, and the crumbling of the walls ceased as a dark magic surged through it. The magic will persist as long as Belcorra's ghost lingers.

By this point, the various dungeon levels of Abomination Vaults had long devolved to independent fiefdoms on each dungeon level. Level 7 was no exception, except Urevian was no longer there (see @UUID[.lB5MUrBw04oKUqSO]{G10 Boss Domain} for details).

To fill this leadership gap, Belcorra sent messengers into the Darklands, and eventually Idriniliss, a cleric of Nhimbaloth, answered her call.

After meeting with Belcorra in the Empty Vault, Idriniliss paid a visit to Otari and was pleased to discover that there were descendants of the Rosegaurd still living in the area.

She next spent some time scrying to learn if there might be anyone still alive who might still have a grudge against the Roseguard. During this scrying, she learned of the Broken Coven, who lived on the fringes of the forest northeast of Otari. She sought them out, found them, tempted them with promises of vengeance, and brought them back with her.

Belcorra was pleased with her efforts. She gave her her own copy of Urevian's pendant, and told her to take over the prison level and learn Urevian's secrets.

With the hags as her allies, and with Belcorra's backing, Idrimiliss established order on the Prison level, ensconced herself in Urevian's former domain, and restarted the training programs that Urevian had abandoned.

@UUID[Actor.9ivDmrYncKxHvAal]{Idriniliss}

The Unbroken Coven.name: 不破密会 The Unbroken Coven
The Unbroken Coven.text:
当“破碎鬼婆集会”的两名幸存成员初次抵达牢房等级时，她们欣喜若狂地发现巫火守卫就在静滞间房间（G17）里。

@UUID[Actor.aIDLQY5mBPyxTjZ2]{巫火守卫}

@UUID[Actor.7YzegJ2P1nqUN9lC]{安妮丝鬼婆}

@UUID[Actor.9xafLYBCSTl3g0H7]{绿鬼婆}

她们从“破碎鬼婆集会”变成了“未破碎鬼婆集会”。

只有在三者都还活着时，集会的所有成员才能许可使用她们的集会能力与法术。

巫火仍受贝科拉命令所束缚，必须留在静滞间附近。

集会战斗

集会成员痛苦地意识到，绿鬼婆是她们的薄弱环节。若她死去，她们就会失去集会能力。

因此，安妮丝鬼婆会站在她与英雄之间保护她，而绿鬼婆则在远处施展她的法术，并在受到骚扰时随时变为隐形。

巫火守卫无疑是三者中最强大的。她被限制在G17静滞间，并且只会冒险前进到G11交叉口为止。她的伤害抗力尤其难以克服。若被杀死，她将如其NPC资料中“复生”章节所述那样重塑形体。

When the two surviving members of the Broken Coven first arrived at the Prison level, they were overjoyed to discover the Witchfire Warden in the Stasis Chamber room (G17).

@UUID[Actor.aIDLQY5mBPyxTjZ2]{Witchfire Warden}

@UUID[Actor.7YzegJ2P1nqUN9lC]{Annis Hag}

@UUID[Actor.9xafLYBCSTl3g0H7]{Green Hag}

They went from the Broken Coven to the Unbroken Coven.

All members of the coven will be able access to her coven abilities and spells only while all three are still alive.

The Witchfire is still bound by her orders from Belcorra, and must remain near the Stasis Chambers.

The Coven in Battle

The members of the coven are painfully aware that the Green Hag is their weak link. If she dies, then they lose their coven abilities.

Therefore, the Annis Hag will protect her by standing between her and the heroes, while the Green Hag uses her spells from a distance and goes invisible whenever she is harried.

The Witchfire Warden is by far the most powerful of the three. She is restricted to G17 Stasis Chambers, and will only venture as far as G11 Nexus. Her damage resistance is especially difficult to overcome. If killed, she will reform as described in the Rejuvenation section of her NPC sheet.

G01 or G12 - The Roseguard's Warning.name: G01 或 G12 - 玫瑰团的警告 G01 or G12 - The Roseguard's Warning
G01 or G12 - The Roseguard's Warning.text:
英雄们并不知道，自从他们摧毁楼梯的屏障以来，玫瑰团的幽灵（特征）就一直在这里。他们承担起阻止往返牢房等级的移动的任务，并将在英雄们下探到更低的等级时继续这项任务。

当英雄们第一次下到牢房等级时，阿塞芙娜或沃尔的幽灵（特征）会出现，取决于他们使用哪段楼梯。

  • 阿塞芙娜出现在G01房间，靠近房间北端。

  • 沃尔出现在G12房间，靠近楼梯，而两只微灵已移动到房间北端。

这些指示物已存在于场景中，但指示物可见性为关闭。

无论是哪位幽灵（特征），每次他们走下楼梯时都会问以下问题，直到他们以肯定回答为止：

你们准备好对付这一等级的敌人了吗？

如果他们肯定回答，她会说：

那么我将继续。

随后她消失。否则，她会说：

那么我会留在这里，直到你们准备好。

这是为了避免英雄们只是下楼看看有什么时，出现尴尬的情况。

注意：只有在你使用Idriniliss剧情线时才使用以下内容。

在英雄们确认自己准备好之后，幽灵（特征）还会补充如下：

当心那位施加空无之死诅咒的女祭司。

对宁布洛斯的敌人而言，空无之死是真正的威胁。

然而，对宁布洛斯的追随者而言，空无之死是一份空洞的寄望。

记住：宁布洛斯连贝科拉本人——祂自己的先兆者——都予以否认，让她得不到她被寄望的空无之死。

也要记住：只要一个人仍然活着，无论他们看起来多么邪恶，仍然存在赎罪的希望。

幽灵（特征）只会说上述内容一次。

Unbeknownst to the heroes, the Roseguard ghosts have been here ever since they destroyed the staircase barrier. They have taken on the task of preventing movement to and from the prison level, and will continue this task as the heroes descend to the levels below.

When the heroes first descend the Prison level, the ghost of either Asephna or Vol will appear, depending on which staircase they use.

  • Aesephna appears in room G01 near the north end of the room.

  • Vol appears in room G12 near the stairs, and the two wisps have moved to the north end of the room.

The tokens are present in the scene with token visibility off.

Either ghost will ask the following question every time they come down the stairs, until they answer in the affirmative:

Are you ready to take on the enemies on this level?

If they answer in the affirmative, she will say,

Then I will proceed.

And she disappears. Otherwise, she says:

Then I will remain here until you are ready.

This is to avoid any awkwardness that may occur if the heroes pop downstairs just to see what's there.

Note: Only use the following if you are using the Idriniliss storyline.

After the heroes have affirmed that they are ready, the ghost will also have this to say:

Beware the priestess who inflicts the Curse of the Empty Death.

To Nhimbaloth's enemies, the Empty Death is a real threat.

However, to Nhimbaloth's followers, the Empty Death is an empty promise.

Remember that Nhimbaloth denied Belcorra herself, her own harbinger, the Empty Death that she was promised.

And remember that while a person lives, no matter how evil they seem, there is still hope of redemption.

The ghost will only say the above once.

G10 Boss Domain.name: G10 首领领域 G10 Boss Domain
G10 Boss Domain.text:
此更改的目的

由于乌瑞维安被描述为“一位颇有名望的契约魔鬼”，而且我并不喜欢以角色扮演来扮演他，所以我认为任何称职的契约魔鬼都不该签下如此受限的契约。因此我让他在贝科拉死后100年契约期满，并送他离开。

（其他恶魔与魔鬼的契约限制要严格得多，因此他们自那以后或多或少都维持了现状。）

贝科拉手边并没有宁布洛斯的牧师（除了萨奎舒，但他作为微灵能力受限），所以我创建了 @UUID[.NR8HlioHYd4zYqq3]{Idriniliss}。

恢复乌瑞维安

如果你更想保留乌瑞维安：

  • 从G10 乌瑞维安的领域中移除两块图块。其中一块覆盖整个区域，另一块在祭坛上方，位于黑暗术之池内。

  • 将灯光颜色重置为原本的红色：#ff0000，并把它们移回火盆上方。

  • 移除祭坛上方的黑色光源。

  • 将原本的演员（乌瑞维安与两只胡须魔）从黑色祭坛附近的地图边缘拖回场景中。乌瑞维安在他的书桌附近，两只胡须魔分别站在入口两侧。

Idriniliss的领域

本节描述Idriniliss所做的更改。关于乌瑞维安的领域，请参见 @UUID[JournalEntry.OyNcqrpRClyhr8BJ.JournalEntryPage.YSOnwMgSJVzVm31U]{原始日志条目}。

屏障

AV模组没有提供用于解除屏障的宏，所以我添加了这个。注意它只会停用中央光源，以表明传送门仍可开启与关闭。

@UUID[Macro.ILMo5676dRN3eiDn]{G10 - Open Domain Door}

该宏会再次关上门，但不会上锁；这很合理，因为到了这一步，英雄们应该已经拿到了坠饰，而且这扇门对他们来说不再上锁。

卧室

该区域有Idriniliss的白骨床、一张边桌、一只闷燃着蓝色火焰的火盆，以及一只装有备用衣物与少量个人用品的箱子。

恐惧祭坛

这座祭坛翻涌着宁布洛斯的黑暗能量。只要它仍处于激活状态，就会在此生成两只鬼火。若有鬼火被杀死，则会在[[/r 1d6]]{1d4}天后生成一只替代者。

注意！ 鬼火在使用其“变暗”能力时变为隐形的表现，可能会因你对代币视野的设置方式不同而有所差异。我发现当你开启PF2E Token Vision时效果最佳。否则，你可能需要进行一些试验才能让它正确运作。

这些微灵目前已将“变暗”开启。

如果Idriniliss被杀死且祭坛被亵渎解除神圣化，那么你可以移除祭坛图块，或将其指向这张图片：

modules/tianzes-gauntlight-extras/Assets/Tiles/Inactive-Profane-Circle.png

书房

这里有大量纸张。其中一大叠用蛛形笔迹书写，采用恶魔文字的书写体系。其余则是Idriniliss的各种笔记与清单。

乌瑞维安的文件

乌瑞维安文件的内容详见 @UUID[JournalEntry.OyNcqrpRClyhr8BJ.JournalEntryPage.YSOnwMgSJVzVm31U]{G10. 乌瑞维安的领域}

@UUID[Item.mWnmq4EG9wyE67H5]{乌瑞维安的文件}

Idriniliss的笔记

其中包含这些日志中详述的信息，包括：

  • 一份第一人称日记，记录她如何来到这里、她与贝科拉的会面，以及一些杂项笔记。

  • 关于她的 @UUID[.3phyMR5lLyrs9k10]{为贝科拉复仇的计划} 的细节

  • 由她对祭坛的沉思所赐予的、难以理解的灵感

  • 关于她在牢房内当前的结盟情况的笔记，以及她与Shaitan和贾法基的遭遇（若有）

  • 一份用密码书写的卷轴，需要花时间破解（这与 @UUID[JournalEntry.GPXU0ZLTdoTKQPui]{拉贾尼血脉诅咒} 有关）。

参见 @UUID[Item.bsq7HwWZwtOIoXlv]{Idriniliss的笔记}。

乌瑞维安的坠饰

AV日志指出，完好的坠饰将永久解锁这扇门。在我的游戏中，我将其改为：它只会让门开启一分钟，或直到再次使用它将门关闭为止。

她的坠饰在Idriniliss的物品栏中。

Purpose of this Change

Since Urevian is described as a "contract devil of some renown," and because I didn't enjoy the prospect of roleplaying him, I decided that any contract devil worth his salt would not have such a restrictive contract. So I expired his 100 years after Belcorra's death and sent him on his way.

(The other demons and devils had much more restrictive contracts, and they have more-or-less kept the status quo ever since.)

Belcorra does not have a cleric of Nhimbaloth at hand (other than Sacuishu, who is limited as a wisp), so I created @UUID[.NR8HlioHYd4zYqq3]{Idriniliss}.

To Restore Urevian

If you'd rather keep Urevian:

  • Remove the two tiles from G10 Urevian's Domain. One covers the entire area, and one is over the altar, in the pool of darkness.

  • Reset the color of the lights to the original red: #ff0000 and move them back over braziers.

  • Remove the black light over the altar.

  • Drag in the original actors (Urevian and two barbazu) back into the scene from the margin of the map near the black altar. Urevian is near his desk, and the barbazu are on either side of the entrance.

Idriniliss's Domain

This section describes the changes that Idriniliss made. For Urevian's Domain, see the @UUID[JournalEntry.OyNcqrpRClyhr8BJ.JournalEntryPage.YSOnwMgSJVzVm31U]{original journal entry}.

The Barrier

The AV module did not provide a macro to take down the barrier, so I added this one. Note it only deactivates the central light, indicating that the portal can still be opened and closed.

@UUID[Macro.ILMo5676dRN3eiDn]{G10 - Open Domain Door}

The macro will close the door again, but it will not lock it, which makes sense because by now, the heroes should have the pendant and the door is no longer locked for them.

Bedroom

This area has Idriniliss's bone bed, a side table, a brazier that smolders with blue flame, and a chest with spare clothing and sparse personal supplies.

Dread Altar

This altar swirls with Nhimbaloth's dark energy. Two will-o-wisps spawn here as long as it is active. If any are killed, a replacement will be spawned in [[/r 1d6]]{1d4} days.

Note! The behavior in which the wisps go invisible when using their Go Dark power may differ depending on the way you have your token vision set up. I found that it works best if you have PF2E Token Vision turned on. Otherwise, you may have to experiment in order to get it right.

The wips have their Go Dark currently turned on.

If Idriniliss is killed and the altar desanctified, then you can either remove the altar tile, or repoint it to this image:

modules/tianzes-gauntlight-extras/Assets/Tiles/Inactive-Profane-Circle.png

Study

Here is a large number of papers. A large stack of them are in a spidery hand, written in a fiendish script. The rest are Idriniliss's various notes and lists.

Urevian's Papers

The contents of Urevian's papers are detailed in @UUID[JournalEntry.OyNcqrpRClyhr8BJ.JournalEntryPage.YSOnwMgSJVzVm31U]{G10. Urevian’s Domain}

@UUID[Item.mWnmq4EG9wyE67H5]{Urevian's Papers}

Idriniliss's Notes

These include the information detailed in these journals, including:

  • A first-person journal of how she got here, and who her meetings with Belcorra, plus some miscellaenous notes.

  • Details on her @UUID[.3phyMR5lLyrs9k10]{Plan of Revenge for Belcorra}

  • Incomprehensible inspirations granted by her contemplations of the altar

  • Notes on her current alliances within the prison, and her encounters (if any) with Shaitan and Jafaki

  • A scroll written in a cypher that will take time to break (this is regarding the @UUID[JournalEntry.GPXU0ZLTdoTKQPui]{Rajani Bloodline Curse}).

See @UUID[Item.bsq7HwWZwtOIoXlv]{Idriniliss's Notes}.

Urevian's Pendant

The AV Journals state that the intact pendant will permanently unlock the door. In my own game, I changed it so that it simply opens it for a period of one minute, or until used again to close it.

Her pendant is in Idriniliss's inventory.

Plan of Revenge for Belcorra.name: 贝科拉的复仇计划 Plan of Revenge for Belcorra
Plan of Revenge for Belcorra.text:
伊德里尼利丝的主要目标，除了继续推进第7等级所需完成的工作之外，就是帮助贝科拉把她的复仇臻于完美——将其施加在玫瑰团幸存后裔身上。

为此，她计划利用鬼婆（特征）。

  • 她把鬼婆（特征）一个接一个地派往奥塔里，披上美丽的伪装，去勾引卡门以及奥瑟夫或乌斯廷中的一人。她先从卡门下手，因为他看起来最为腐化。

  • 她探知他喜欢什么样的女人，并派出鬼婆（特征）去从附近城镇引诱一名合适的女性。鬼婆（特征）用一份所谓的赏金猎人工作把西内米诱了出来。关于她的完整故事，见 @UUID[.mbcegTU3VKg52nbl]{entry on Cynemi}。

  • 西内米失踪一段时间后，一名鬼婆（特征）会返回卡门身边，伪装成她，并尝试使其怀孕。

  • 一旦引诱结出果实，伊德里尼利丝将陪同鬼婆（特征）前去杀死卡门，但在动手之前，她会以空无之死诅咒他。

  • 然后，她会对乌斯廷或奥瑟夫做同样的事。

  • 最后，她会放任鬼婆（特征）去杀死所有姓门赫梅斯的后裔。

Idriniliss's main goal, other than to continue the work required on the 7th level, is to help Belcorra perfect her revenge by inflicting it on the surviving descendants of the Roseguard.

To do so, she plans to use the hags.

  • She sends the hags into Otari, one by one, under beautiful disguises, to seduce Carmen and either Oseph or Ustin. She starts with Carman, since he seems the most corrupt.

  • She learns what kind of woman he likes, and sends out the hags to lure in some appropriate female from a nearby town. The hags lured in Cynemi with a supposed bounty hunter job. See the @UUID[.mbcegTU3VKg52nbl]{entry on Cynemi} for her full story.

  • Once Cynemi has been missing for a while, a hag will return to Carman, disguised as her, and will attempt to get with child.

  • Once the seduction has born fruit, Idriniliss will accompany the hags when they go to kill Carman, but before they do so, she will curse him with the Empty Death.

  • Then, she will do the same thing to either Ustin or Oseph.

  • Finally, she will turn the hags loose to kill all descendants that bear the name Menhemes.

G14 Imprisoned Bounty Hunter.name: G14 被囚禁的赏金猎人 G14 Imprisoned Bounty Hunter
G14 Imprisoned Bounty Hunter.text:
我将 @UUID[JournalEntry.OyNcqrpRClyhr8BJ.JournalEntryPage.cHr53ke6UWjhc6NZ]{Cynemi 的原始故事} 改编如下：

Cynemi 被一份赏金猎人契约引诱来到这里，该契约要求一名女性猎手。她与 Idriniliss 会面，并接受了一份去勾引 Carmen Rajani 的工作。这不是她通常会做的那种工作，但她已经在镇上见过他，而且她喜欢自己看到的。Idriniliss 告诉了她一些关于他的基本情况，以及他会在骗子之角度过大量空闲时间。

（Idriniliss 的目的，是让她在建立关系后神秘失踪，然后让其中一位鬼婆以她的伪装重新出现，作为他失散多年的爱人。）

因此她回到奥塔里，在骗子之角开了个房间，并与他调起情来。他们很快就变得亲密无间。

然而，她是真的爱上了他；而他只对与一位长尾涅斐林的风流韵事感兴趣。所以最终变成了他在引诱她。

当她该回去见 Idriniliss 时，她决定不去了。然而鬼婆们在她逾期未归后前来并抓住了她。Carmen 想知道她后来怎样了，但他认为她只是离开小镇漂走了。他对她（以及她的尾巴）有一些美好的回忆，但并没有为她相思成疾。

鬼婆们把她拖回牢房，Idriniliss 把她关了起来，并指示胡须魔要让她活着。它们这么做的方法，就是勉强只喂她足够活命的食物，纯粹出于邪恶。

以下内容已加入 Cynemi 的物品栏：

@UUID[Item.3vMGkyuGy6DF5WGQ]{Cynemi 的节奏骨}

她把它随身带着，藏在头发下面并系在她的角上。发现它的 DC 不应很高。

当前情况

如果英雄们直接从西南区域的楼梯下来，那么 Cynemi 仍会像 @UUID[JournalEntry.OyNcqrpRClyhr8BJ.JournalEntryPage.cHr53ke6UWjhc6NZ]{G14. 被囚禁的赏金猎人} 所描述的那样，被从天花板上锁链吊着。

如果英雄们已经杀死了所有胡须魔，那么 Idriniliss 本人会亲自来查看她。她会把她从天花板上放下来，对她施放治疗术，并留给她一份可吃一周的口粮包和三袋水。但她也会把她用镣铐铐在墙上。

如果英雄们救了她，她会请求被带去见 Carmen，这样她就能告诉他针对他的阴谋。然而，她所知道的只有她最初契约的条款。

她经常播放节奏骨里录下的对话。当我的英雄们第一次遇到她时，他们在牢房外通过一次中等偏高的察觉检定，就能听到 Carman 的声音。这让他们极其好奇。当他们问她时，她坚持说那是“高度私人的”。只有当某人成为她亲近且信任的朋友时，她才会允许对方听。

她的随身物品在 G13 空牢房。

@UUID[Actor.jrQbOuwLExqiBevy]{Cynemi 的随身物品}

角色成长

Cynemi 虽然从来不是彻头彻尾的反派，但当她最初接受 Indriliss 的工作时，确实有明显的邪恶倾向。然而，在邪恶之手中待了太久之后，她开始质疑自己的选择与过去的人生。因此，当英雄们救出她时，她已不再邪恶。

她仍然确实爱着 Carman。

那 Carman 呢？

然而，Carman 对她并不那么确定。Vol 对他施加的诅咒仍萦绕在他心头，他不确定她是否能生下一个配得上合作之刃的孩子。他也不确定自己是否想再次与她纠缠在一起——不管有没有尾巴。

此外，他的母亲憎恨她到了一种程度，以至于 Carman 实际上对她会攻击 Cynemi 的事感到恐惧术。

因此，Cynemi 去和 Wrin 住在一起，直到她恢复体力。我能想象她们会成为好朋友。

最终，一旦她康复，她就去为奥罗瑞亚·加仑丁工作，担任斥候。

I adapted @UUID[JournalEntry.OyNcqrpRClyhr8BJ.JournalEntryPage.cHr53ke6UWjhc6NZ]{Cynemi's original story} as follows:

Cynemi was lured here by a bounty hunter contract that called for a female hunter. She met with Idriniliss and accepted a job to seduce Carmen Rajani. It's not the sort of job she usually does, but she has already seen him in town, and she liked what she saw. Idriniliss told her some basic facts about him, and that he spends much of his free time in Crook's Nook.

(Idriniliss's purpose was to have her mysteriously disappear after she has established a relationship, and then to have one of the hags reappear in her guise as his long-lost lover.)

She therefore returned to Otari, took a room at Crook's Nook, and struck up a flirtation with him. They quickly became intimate.

However, she actually fell in love with him, whereas he was only interested in a dalliance with a tailed nephilim. So he ended up being the one to seduce her.

Once she was due to return to Idriniliss, she decided not to go. However, the hags came and caught her once she was overdue. Carmen wondered what became of her, but he figured she had just drifted out of town. He has pleasant memories about her (and her tail), but he is hardly pining.

The hags dragged her back to the Prison and Idriniliss locked her up with instructions to the barbazu to keep her alive. The do so by just barely feeding her enough, just out of sheer evil.

The following has been added to Cynemi's inventory:

@UUID[Item.3vMGkyuGy6DF5WGQ]{Cynemi's Rhythm Bone}

She keeps it on her person, hidden under her hair and tied to her horn. The DC to find this should not be high.

Current Situation

If the heroes came straight down the staircase in the SW area, then Cynemi will still be chained up from the ceiling, as per @UUID[JournalEntry.OyNcqrpRClyhr8BJ.JournalEntryPage.cHr53ke6UWjhc6NZ]{G14. Imprisoned Bounty Hunter}.

If the heroes have killed all the barbazu, Idriniliss herself looks in on her, herself. She takes her down from the ceiling, heals her up, and leaves her with a one-week ration pack and three skins of water. But she also leaves her manacled to the wall.

If the heroes rescue her, she will ask to be taken to Carmen so she can tell him of the plot against him. However, all she knows is the terms of her original contract.

She often plays the dialog recorded in the rhythm bone. When my own heroes first came across her, they were able to hear Carman's voice from outside the cell with a moderately high perception check. This made them intensely curious. When they asked her about it, she insisted it was "highly personal". She will only allow someone to hear it if they become a close and trusted friend.

Her possessions are in G13 Empty Jail Cell.

@UUID[Actor.jrQbOuwLExqiBevy]{Cynemi's Belongings}

Character Growth

While never an outright villain, Cynemi definitely had evil tendencies when she first accepted her job from Indriliss. However, after being in the hands of evil for so long, she started questioning her choices and her past life. Therefore, by the time the heroes rescue her, she is no longer evil.

She is definitely still in love with Carman.

And Carman?

However, Carman is not so sure about her. Vol's curse upon him is still on his mind, and he is not sure she that would be able to provide a child that would be worthy of the Cooperative Blade. He is also not sure if he wants to get involved with her again, tail or not.

Besides, his mother hates her to the point where Carman actually fears that she will attack Cynemi.

Therefore, Cynemi goes to stay with Wrin while she regains her strength. I can see them becoming good friends.

Eventually, once she has recovered, she goes to work for Oloria Gallentine as a scout.

Introduction.name: 引言 Introduction
Introduction.text:
在本章中，我提出一个替代原本契约魔鬼的首领：宁布洛斯的牧师伊德里尼莉丝（Idriniliss），以及两名对老玫瑰团怀有私人宿怨的鬼婆（特征）。

这一等级再次出现四名玫瑰团的幽灵（特征）。一旦英雄到达等级 6，沃尔（Vol）与阿塞芙娜（Asephna）便开始把守等级 6 与等级 7 之间的楼梯。英雄会看到其中之一，取决于他们使用哪一段楼梯。

最后，当英雄准备下行至等级 8 时，玫瑰团的四名成员将会全部现身。

In this chapter, I present an alternative boss to the original contract devil: Idriniliss, a cleric of Nhimbaloth, along with two hags that have a personal grudge against the old Roseguard.

This level again features the four Roseguard ghosts. Once the heroes reach level 6, Vol and Asephna start guarding the stairways between levels 6 and 7. The heroes will see one or the other, depending on which stairway they use.

And finally all four members of the Roseguard will show up when the heroes are ready to descend to level 8.

Idriniliss's Prison Alliances.name: Idriniliss的牢房联盟 Idriniliss's Prison Alliances
Idriniliss's Prison Alliances.text:
以下概述了伊德里尼莉丝在整个牢房中建立的联盟。这些房间里的生物要么与她合作，要么不合作。

盟友

  • G03 训练场

  • G04 储藏室

  • G05 地狱熔炉

  • G06 守卫室

  • G08 隔离室

  • G12 竞技场通道

  • G15 兵营

  • G18 作战大厅

不关心

  • G09 阅兵室

  • G07 召唤间

敌对

  • G14 被囚禁的赏金猎人（实际上，她非常害怕她）

  • G17 静滞间，巫火*除外

  • G21 秘密虚空

*巫火只有在她的女巫团另外两名成员仍然活着时，才会与伊德里尼莉丝结盟。

Below is an overview of the alliances that Idriniliss has made throughout the Prison. The creatures in these rooms are either cooperating with her, or not.

Allied

  • G03 Drill Field

  • G04 Storage Cells

  • G05 Hellforge

  • G06 Guard Chamber

  • G08 Isolation Chamber

  • G12 Arena Walk

  • G15 Barracks

  • G18 War Room

Indifferent

  • G09 Observation Room

  • G07 Summoning Chamber

Hostile

  • G14 Imprisoned Bounty Hunter (actually, she is terrified of her)

  • G17 Stasis Chambers, except the Witchfire*

  • G21 The Secret Void

*The witchfire is only allied with Idriniliss as long as the other two members of her coven are alive.

The Roseguard and the Portal Ritual.name: 玫瑰团与传送门仪式 The Roseguard and the Portal Ritual
The Roseguard and the Portal Ritual.text:
此仪式仅在你使用伊德里尼莉丝剧情线时才会发生。它不应在伊德里尼莉丝被击败之前发生。

如果你不使用伊德里尼莉丝剧情线，则跳过此场景。玫瑰团幽灵（特征）将只会留在传送门另一侧，帮助阻止升降机的上下移动，直到英雄们准备好前往8级农场。

时机

此场景发生在英雄们杀死伊德里尼莉丝之后，下一次造访牢房等级期间。

场景设置

  1. 将 @UUID[Actor.CwC6aBucr3HvAFoL]{艾瑟芙娜的幽灵（特征）} 放置在G1下层井道，房间中央，处于可见状态。

  2. 将 @UUID[Actor.i0sRsmi6UGJieO1j]{伊德里尼莉丝祟灵} 放置在G04钻探场，屏障前方，处于隐形状态。

  3. 将其余玫瑰团幽灵（特征）放在屏障的另一侧，处于隐形状态。

    1. @UUID[Actor.JvzCKApEU3vzEfJH]{奥塔里的幽灵（特征）}

    2. @UUID[Actor.V4PkTZFzk5Y5T5JM]{沃尔的幽灵（特征）}

    3. @UUID[Actor.KmHFeQqAs6Zt6yCm]{扎马夫迪安的幽灵（特征）}

概述

当英雄们下次返回牢房等级时，艾瑟芙娜正在G1下层井道等待他们。

当他们进入房间时，她会说：

我们即将召唤伊德里尼莉丝的祟灵——就是你们上次来这里时斩杀的那名牧师。

在你们杀死她的前几天，当你们离开时，她曾来执行能降低通往下一层屏障的仪式。请仔细看，因为在相当长的一段时间内，我们将无法再次召唤她的祟灵。如果你们无法复现这个仪式，就必须另寻他法下去。

请前往传送门房间，并沿房间墙壁就位，不要干扰她的灵体。她不会知道你们在那里。

仪式

当他们按她所指示集合后，@UUID[Actor.i0sRsmi6UGJieO1j]{伊德里尼莉丝祟灵} 应该会出现。

艾瑟芙娜的幽灵（特征）现在应当消失——这是个好机会将她移动到屏障另一侧，与其他玫瑰团成员会合。

祟灵走近发光的门，执行一个复杂的仪式。她需要1小时来完成仪式，其间她会将同样的基础手势与吟诵重复三次。仪式结束时，她将一种闪烁的物质沿着屏障正前方一路洒下。

这种物质是普通的海盐，被磨得很细。

你的英雄应进行一次 @Check[type:arcana|dc:25|traits:action:recall-knowledge]{奥术}、@Check[type:occultism|dc:25|traits:action:recall-knowledge]{秘学} 或 @Check[type:religion|dc:25|traits:action:recall-knowledge]{宗教} 的回忆知识检定，以成功记录或记住该仪式。他们应有三次机会这么做。

@UUID[Item.1T5QlOijI6WHWVmX]{猩红传送门仪式}

仪式结束时，门前的光亮术将熄灭。使用这个AV宏来关闭灯光并打开墙壁：

@UUID[Macro.6RFoXgFGwaBWdNIm]{G03 - 炼狱屏障}

然而，在她能够继续前进之前，玫瑰团的四名幽灵（特征）全部现身。

此时，四名玫瑰团幽灵（特征）都应在屏障另一侧变为可见。

她会盯着他们看上一会儿。短暂僵持后，她一言不发，再次执行仪式，并将大部分海盐扫起。随后她转身离开，返回G1方向。

在区域内搜查的英雄可以在靠近屏障的角落里找到一些海盐。很容易辨认出它是海盐。

如果 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.abomination-vaults-bestiary.Actor.3vn9W5SThovdsEnY]{萨奎舒} 仍然活着，艾瑟芙娜还会再说一件事：

唉，在她短暂打开门的那段时间里，一个长着苍白女子面孔的奇异微灵飞了过去，我们还来不及阻止它。恐怕你们很可能还会再次遭遇它。

下到农场

玫瑰团幽灵（特征）将继续在屏障另一侧守卫，直到英雄们使用升降机下降至8级农场。

This ritual only occurs if you are using the Idriniliss storyline. It should not occur until after Idriniliss's defeat.

If you are not using the Idriniliss storyline, then skip this scene. the Roseguard ghosts will simply remain beyond the portal to help prevent movement up and down the lift until the heroes are ready to proceed to Lv. 8 Farm.

Timing

This scene occurs during the heroes next visit to the Prison level after they have killed Idriniliss.

Scene Setup

  1. Place @UUID[Actor.CwC6aBucr3HvAFoL]{Aesephna's Ghost} in G1 Lower Shaft, in the center of the room, with a visible state.

  2. Place @UUID[Actor.i0sRsmi6UGJieO1j]{Idriniliss Haunt} in G04 Drill Field, in front of the barrier, with an invisible state.

  3. Place the rest of the Roseguard ghosts just beyond the barrier, with an invisible state.

    1. @UUID[Actor.JvzCKApEU3vzEfJH]{Otari's Ghost}

    2. @UUID[Actor.V4PkTZFzk5Y5T5JM]{Vol's Ghost}

    3. @UUID[Actor.KmHFeQqAs6Zt6yCm]{Zarmavdian's Ghost}

Overview

Aesephna is waiting for the heroes in G1 Lower Shaft when they next return to the Prison level.

When they enter the room, she will say.

We are about to summon a haunt of Idriniliss, the cleric that you slayed when you were last here.

A few days before you slayed her, while you were away, she came to perform the ritual that lowers the barrier to the next level down. Play close attention, because we will not be able to summon her haunt again for quite some time. If you are unable to recreate this ritual, you will need to find some other way down.

Please proceed to the portal room, and take positions along the walls of the room, and do not interfere with her spirit. She will not know you are there.

The Ritual

When they have gathered as she directed, @UUID[Actor.i0sRsmi6UGJieO1j]{Idriniliss Haunt} should appear.

Aesephna's ghost should now vanish, which is a good opportunity to move her beyond the barrier with the other Roseguard members.

The haunt approaches the glowing gate and performs a complex ritual. It takes one hour for her to perform the ritual, during which she repeats the same basic gestures and vocalizations three times. At the conclusion of the ritual, she sprinkles a sparkling substance all along the front of the barrier.

This substance is ordinary sea salt, crushed fine.

Your heroes should make a @Check[type:arcana|dc:25|traits:action:recall-knowledge]{Arcana}, @Check[type:occultism|dc:25|traits:action:recall-knowledge]{Occultism}, or @Check[type:religion|dc:25|traits:action:recall-knowledge]{Religion} to successfully record or memorize the ritual. They should have three opportunities to do so.

@UUID[Item.1T5QlOijI6WHWVmX]{Crimson Portal Ritual}

At the end of the ritual, the light in front of the gate will go out. Use this AV macro to turn off the lights and open the walls:

@UUID[Macro.6RFoXgFGwaBWdNIm]{G03 - Infernal Barrier}

However, before she can proceed, all four of the Roseguard ghosts appear.

At this point, all four Roseguard ghosts should become visible just beyond the barrier.

She will stare at them for a moment. There is a brief impasse. Then, without a word, she will perform the ritual again, and will sweep up most of the sea salt. She will then depart back toward G1.

A hero who searches the area can find some of the sea salt in the corners near the barrier. It is easily identified as sea salt.

If @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.abomination-vaults-bestiary.Actor.3vn9W5SThovdsEnY]{Sacuishu} still lives, Aesephna will have one more thing to say:

Alas, during the brief period that she had the gate open, a strange wisp with the face of a pale woman flew through before we had a chance to stop it. I am afraid you will probably encounter it again.

Down to the Farm

The Roseguard ghosts will remain on guard beyond the barrier until the heroes use the lift to descend to Lv. 8 Farm.

G11 Nexus - The Hags' New Home.name: G11 交叉口 - 鬼婆（特征）们的新家 G11 Nexus - The Hags' New Home
G11 Nexus - The Hags' New Home.text:
不破密盟中的两位鬼婆（特征）将这里作为她们的居所。这对她们来说并不是最便利的房间，但它就在G17的走廊对面，密盟的第三位成员被迫留在那里。

当她们在这里时，@UUID[Actor.E0FMRiGNCv5n7AVH]{麻痹之光陷阱}会被停用。如果英雄们杀死了鬼婆（特征），那么在英雄们离开期间，一只长须魔鬼或伊德里尼莉丝会重新启动陷阱。

由于密盟的第三位成员在G17 静滞间中，鬼婆（特征）会让这间房与静滞间之间的所有门都保持敞开。

@UUID[.Olw2wlbioc5l0S9r]{不破密盟}

至少会有一位鬼婆（特征）大多数时候待在这里。其他时候，两位鬼婆（特征）中的任意一位都可能在任何走廊被遭遇，但一旦她们察觉到英雄们的存在，安妮丝会与绿鬼婆（特征）待在一起。

@UUID[Actor.7YzegJ2P1nqUN9lC]{安妮丝鬼婆（特征）}

@UUID[Actor.9xafLYBCSTl3g0H7]{绿鬼婆（特征）}

Two of the hags in the Unbroken Coven make their home here. It is not the most convenient room for them, but it is just across the hall from G17, where the third member of their coven is bound to stay.

While they are here, the @UUID[Actor.E0FMRiGNCv5n7AVH]{Paralyzing Light Trap} is deactivated. If the heroes kill the hags, then either a bearded devil or Idriniliss will reactivate the trap while the heroes are away.

Since the third member of the coven is G17 Stasis Chambers, the hags leave all doors open between this room and the Stasis Chambers.

@UUID[.Olw2wlbioc5l0S9r]{The Unbroken Coven}

At least one hag will be here most of the time. Other times, either hag could be encountered in any of the hallways, but once they catch onto the presance of the heroes, the Annis will stay with the Green.

@UUID[Actor.7YzegJ2P1nqUN9lC]{Annis Hag}

@UUID[Actor.9xafLYBCSTl3g0H7]{Green Hag}

G21 The Secret Void.name: G21 秘密虚空 G21 The Secret Void
G21 The Secret Void.text:
这个空房间里唯一的居住者是一只名为萨奎舒的独特鬼火（我把它读作 sa-KI-shu）。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.abomination-vaults-bestiary.Actor.3vn9W5SThovdsEnY]{Sacuishu}

日志把她描述为一名间谍，而她的角色卡显示她是一名牧师职业。然而，她绝不是伊德里尼利斯的盟友。她憎恨伊德里尼利斯，主要是嫉妒贝科拉赋予她的权威。伊德里尼利斯曾来见过她一次，但萨奎舒拒绝现身。伊德里尼利斯警告她别挡路，并从那以后一直放任不管。

遭遇写道，她几乎可以在任何地方被遭遇到，并且她会逃往G03，“希望那里已经打开；如果被堵住，她就会在那里做最后的抵抗。”

依我看，如果她是间谍，她会干脆在那儿等到通道被打开。她的间谍式游荡应该已经发现英雄们正试图把通道打开，而她认为他们最终会成功。如果没有，嗯，她是间谍，所以她会得知他们的死亡。

当通道确实打开时，她会“嗖”地一下冲进洞里，快到连玫瑰团都来不及阻止她。在与玫瑰团幽灵（幽灵（特征））进行的@UUID[.VM8oGvcnArkcjaZb]{Idriniliss's Secret Portal Ritual}遭遇中，艾瑟芙娜会提到他们看到她飞下到了第8等级。

The only occupant of this empty room is a unique will-o'-wisp named Sacuishu (which I pronounce sa-KI-shu).

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.abomination-vaults-bestiary.Actor.3vn9W5SThovdsEnY]{Sacuishu}

The journals describe her as a spy, and her actor sheet shows that she is a cleric. She is, however, no ally of Idriniliss. She hates her, mostly due to jealousy of the authority that Belcorra has given to her. Idriniliss came to see her once, but Sacuishu refused to appear. Idriniliss gave her a warning to stay out of her way, and has left alone ever since.

The encounter states that she can be encountered most anywhere, and that she will flee to G03 "hoping it has opened; it it's blocked, she makes her last stand there."

In my opinion, if she is a spy, she would simply wait there until the way is opened. Her spy wanderings should have revealed that the heroes are trying to get the way opened, and she thinks they will eventually succeed. If not, well, she is a spy, so she will learn of their deaths.

When the way does open up, she would whoosh down into the hole too quickly for even the Roseguard to stop her. During the @UUID[.VM8oGvcnArkcjaZb]{Idriniliss's Secret Portal Ritual} encounter with the Roseguard ghosts, Aesephna will mention that they saw her fly down to the 8th level.

Idriniliss in Battle.name: 战斗中的伊德里尼利斯 Idriniliss in Battle
Idriniliss in Battle.text:
当英雄们抵达伊德里尼莉丝身边时，她除了守在祭坛附近的两只微灵之外，应该已经没有任何盟友了。她已经认命，并期待着自己的空无之死，也期待能拉几个英雄陪葬。

我根据在 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.8Oy4qHylOOp79JxD]{宁布洛斯} 条目中找到的信息来塑造伊德里尼莉丝。这里也包含了一些来自《憎恨魔窟》pdf 的额外信息，包括教士领域法术。

我还赋予了她施加战斗版空无之死诅咒的能力，以及一些特定弱点。

@UUID[Actor.9ivDmrYncKxHvAal]{伊德里尼莉丝}

赌注

当英雄们进入房间时，这场战斗的赌注看起来很明确。这个教士是宁布洛斯的祭司，正在积极推进贝科拉的目标。她必须被铲除。

他们不应知道伊德里尼莉丝决意把一个仪式带进坟墓里，而那正是英雄们所需要的：一个能够打开通往升降系统屏障、并下行至第8等级的仪式。

微灵会在这件事上帮助她；如果她落入任何一名英雄的控制之下，它们甚至会亲手杀死她。

伊德里尼莉丝很聪明，不会暗示或炫耀这份知识。英雄们只有在 @UUID[Item.bsq7HwWZwtOIoXlv]{她的笔记} 中发现这些内容时才会意识到这一点。

这里有强大的入侵者，他们正系统性地屠杀这一层的所有东西。我在这里的时间有限。我已经毁掉了传送门仪式的唯一副本，并计划用它加入诸子并增强他们的力量。当我抵达另一侧后，我会再次施放它，将其封在我身后。

她试图将这个计划付诸行动，但被玫瑰团挫败。详见 @UUID[.VM8oGvcnArkcjaZb]{传送门仪式}。

战斗

以下是我在主持这场战斗时尝试做的事。

战斗初期，伊德里尼莉丝会试图对一名教士型角色施加空无之死诅咒。如果有任何角色展现出任何冠军的力量，那个人会立刻成为她的目标。

在我跑的那场游戏中，英雄以重击成功豁免，因此准备一个备用方案会很有帮助。

  • 若成功施加空无之死……

    • ……微灵会立刻着手试图杀死那个人。

    • 伊德里尼莉丝会把注意力转向其他英雄。她会先使用自己最强的法术，以压倒他们并尽可能造成更多伤害。这应包括她的神圣专注法术。

    • 如果被诅咒的英雄进入濒死（状态），她会在下一次可用的动作中对其施放死亡丧钟。

  • 若她的空无之死诅咒失败……

    • ……她会退而求其次，只求杀戮。她会尝试找出队伍中最弱的成员，并施放“封印命运”，选择钝击伤害，随后用相同伤害类型施放幽影爆破。之后，她会使用连枷。

    • 她可以用一个反应动作（）来施放“血之复仇”，并以“骇人失血”接续；后者只会消耗她一个动作。

  • 由于她的神祇只提供伤害术，她只有一个强力的治疗术可用，并会在生命值接近30%时使用。

  • 她也可以通过“血红迷雾”或她的“恐惧盛宴”专注法术回复生命值。

  • 如果你的英雄队伍中有冠军，请特别留意她对冠军的特定弱点，尤其是“救赎一瞥”。

空无之死？

由于宁布洛斯连贝科拉本人都拒绝赐予空无之死，我决定她通常不会把空无之死赐给那些真正渴望它的人。她会欣然吞食那些反对她之人的灵魂；但当她自己的追随者死亡时——无论是像贝科拉那样虔诚的追随者，还是像伊德里尼莉丝那样强大的祭司——她都会把他们藏进自己私密的领域里，以备将来所需。

我觉得这与她的性格相符，因为她甚至会忽视她自己的追随者与祭司。

因此，如果英雄们击败了伊德里尼莉丝，她不会进入自己所期待的空无之死。

By the time the heroes reach Idriniliss, she should be all out of allies, except for two wisps that stay near her altar. She is resigned and is looking forward to her empty death, and to taking a few of the heroes with her.

I modeled Idriniliss after the information found in the entry on @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.8Oy4qHylOOp79JxD]{Nhimbaloth}, It also includes some additional information that was in the Abomination Vaults pdf, including clerical domain spells.

I have also given her the ability to inflict a combat version of the Empty Death curse, plus some specific weaknesses.

@UUID[Actor.9ivDmrYncKxHvAal]{Idriniliss}

The Stakes

When the heroes enter the room, the stakes for the battle seem clear. The cleric is a priest of Nhimbaloth who is actively working to further Belcorra's goals. She's got to be eliminated.

They should not know that Idriniliss is determined to take a ritual to the grave with her, and it is one that the heroes need: a ritual that will open the barrier to the lift system that descends to the 8th level.

The wisps will help her in this, and they will kill her themselves if she comes under the control of any of the heroes.

Idriniliss is wise, and will not hint at or flaunt this knowledge. The heroes will realize this only when they find this among @UUID[Item.bsq7HwWZwtOIoXlv]{her notes}.

There are powerful intruders here, and they are systematically killing everything on this floor. My time here is limited. I have destroyed my only copy of the portal ritual and plan to use it to join the Children and bolster their strength. When I am on the other side, I will cast it again to seal it behind me.

She tries to put this plan into action, but is thwarted by the Roseguard. See @UUID[.VM8oGvcnArkcjaZb]{Portal Ritual} for details.

The Battle

Here is what I tried to do in when I ran this battle.

Early in the battle, Idriniliss will seek to inflict the Empty Death curse on a clerical character. If any characters display any Champion powers, that person will immediately become her target.

In the game I ran, the hero critically saved, so it helps to have a backup plan.

  • If successful in inflicting Empty Death …

    • … the wisps will immediately set about trying to kill that person.

    • Idriniliss will turn her attention to the other heroes. She will use her most powerful spells first in order to overwhelm them and inflict as much damage as possible. This should include her Divine Focus spells.

    • If the cursed hero reaches a Dying condition, she will cast Death Knell on him or her with her next available actions.

  • If her Empty Death curse fails …

    • … she will settle for just death. She will try to identify the weakest party member and cast Seal Fate with bludgeoning damage, followed by a Shadow Blast using the same damage type. Afterward, she will use her flail.

    • She can use a reaction to cast Blood Vandetta, and she will follow it up using Horrifying Blood Loss, which only casts her one action.

  • Since her deity only provides Harm spells, she has only one powerful Heal spell available, which she will use when near 30% health.

  • She can also regain health via Sanguine Mist or her Fearful Feast focus spell.

  • If you have a champion among your heroes, take special note of her specific weaknesses to champions, especially a Glimpse of Redemption.

Empty Death?

Since Nhimbaloth denied Belcorra herself the Empty Death, I decided that she generally does not give an empty death to those that actually want it. She will gladly feast on the souls of those who oppose her, but when one of her own dies, whether they are a devoted follower like Belcorra, or a powerful priest like Idriniliss, she tucks them away in her own private domain for when she has need of them.

I thought this in keeping with her character, since she even neglects her own followers and priests.

Therefore, if the heroes defeat Idriniliss, she will not go onto the empty death that she is expecting.

G17 Stasis Chambers.name: G17 静滞间 G17 Stasis Chambers
G17 Stasis Chambers.text:
请参见 @UUID[Actor.Tq2ZqHi6qBK66fSu]{G17 巫火守卫之柱} 战利品角色，以查看此静滞舱室的内容。

See the @UUID[Actor.Tq2ZqHi6qBK66fSu]{G17 Witchfire Warden Pillar} loot actor for the contents of this stasis chamber.

Lv. 5 Timeline - Chafkhem's Revenge.name: 5级时间线——查夫肯姆的复仇 Lv. 5 Timeline - Chafkhem's Revenge

Overview.name: 概述 Overview
Overview.text:
此时间线假定与查夫肯姆的初次遭遇以非战斗方式结束，并且在查夫肯姆把自己的事务料理妥当之前，英雄们没有带着贾法基死亡的消息返回。由于宗师会让英雄们忙得不可开交，这种情况完全可能发生。

如果英雄们未能再次现身并带回贾法基被解决的消息，查夫肯姆会怎么做？依我看，他自身就有绰绰有余的力量来复仇。

注：为配合下方时间线中对查夫肯姆物品栏的改动，我已将额外的物品放在此版本的他的角色表中，该角色表位于“竞技场 凄凉灯塔 额外内容”场景里：

@UUID[Actor.zYggj5E6LkywLa5j]{Chafkhem}

This timeline assumes that the initial encounter with Chafkhem ends without combat, and the heroes do not return with news of Jafaki's death by the time Chafkhem gets his affairs in order. Since the Grandmaster keeps the heroes quite busy, this is entirely possible.

What does Chafkhem do if the heroes fail to reappear with news of Jafaki's dispatch? In my opinion, he has more than enough power to take revenge, himself.

Note: to accommodate changes to Chafkham's inventory in the timeline below, I have placed the additional items in this version of his actor sheet, which is on the Arena Gauntlight Extras scene:

@UUID[Actor.zYggj5E6LkywLa5j]{Chafkhem}

Chafkhem on Ghostwalk.name: 鬼行道上的查夫肯姆 Chafkhem on Ghostwalk
Chafkhem on Ghostwalk.text:
查夫肯姆会对任何在他仍在前往图书馆途中抵达该区域的人保持警惕。因此，他会主动在自己前方和后方进行搜索，因为他知道自己处于暴露状态。

如果英雄们在他仍在前往图书馆的路上时穿过4层的贝科拉的避难所，那么他们应当在鬼行道与他遭遇。

  • 如果英雄们在开阔地带逮到他，他会尝试奉承并向他们表达感谢，感谢他们释放了他们，并补充说他已经替他们省去了消灭贾法基以及那个麻烦的蛛化精灵的麻烦。他还会提到贾法基的实验室里的一切现在都归他们所有。

  • 如果他在他们察觉到他之前先察觉到他们，他会对自己施放隐形术。拟形怪会伪装成一套套护甲——这是它们上一次使用的伪装——而在鬼行道中央出现这种东西应当显得相当不协调。

    • 随后，查夫肯姆会抛下拟形怪，并利用他的隐形术在英雄们调查时脱身。

    • 他那纸质的裹缠物使他几乎无法进行多少潜行，因此他依赖他的隐形术。

    • 他无法压制他的绝望灵光，因此这可以用作回忆知识来辨别他就在该区域内。

尽管他的法术如今已经有所耗尽，他仍然是一个可怕的对手。

Chafkhem is on alert for anyone arriving in the area while he is still heading for the Library. Therefore, he is actively searching ahead and behind him, since he knows he is exposed.

If the Heroes go through Lv. 4 Belcorra's Retreat while he is still en route to the Library, then they should encounter him on Ghostwalk.

  • If the heroes catch him out in the open, he will attempt flattery and express his appreciation to them for releasing them, adding that he has saved them the trouble of eliminating Jafaki and the troublesome drider. He also mentiones that everything in Jafaki's lab is now theirs.

  • If he becomes aware of them before they are aware of him, he will cast invisibility on himself. The mimics will disguise themselves as suits of armor, which was the last disguises they used, and which should look quite incongruous out there in the middle of Ghostwalk.

    • Chafkhem will then abandon the mimics and use his invisibility to get away while the heroes investigate.

    • His papery wrappings prevent him from moving with much stealth at all, so he relies on his invisibility.

    • He is unable to suppress his aura of despair, so this may be used as a recall Knowledge to discern that he is in the area.

Even though his spells are now somewhat depleted, he still makes a formidable opponent.

Chafkhem's Activities.name: 查夫肯姆的活动 Chafkhem's Activities
Chafkhem's Activities.text:
一点小小的文学发挥

正如他在其 @UUID[JournalEntry.JT0zCcIwsSpKnbB5.JournalEntryPage.5XJBjPHU2XkIZWtN]{日志条目} 中所暗示的那样，查夫克姆应该具备足够的材料，至少可以唤起四个生物：

如果英雄们不顺着查夫克姆的意思，他就决定杀了他们，并把他们复苏成不怎么会顶嘴的不死生物。

由于这里略过了一些法术的需求（例如需要一名副施法者），以及尝试唤起哪怕五级生物都应当是极其艰巨的挑战这一事实，我决定用凄凉灯塔本身来解释这一点。毕竟，溃烂教团的教徒在诉诸同类相食后都开始“复活”为不死生物，因此宣称在《憎恨魔窟》中，“创造不死生物”法术比在其他地方更容易、且需求更少，也不算太牵强。

如果你也觉得这不算太牵强，那就继续往下读吧！

时间线

在最初遭遇之后，查夫克姆将把时间花在巡视与其居所相邻的区域，并发现那里的尸体上。这假定玩家已经杀光了查夫克姆居所周边的所有东西。

因此，他做的第一件事就是先给自己复苏出一对守卫。

第2—3天——将拟形怪复苏为不死生物。

@UUID[Actor.9R8FlvFwlohJcWHU]{Mimic Ghoul}

被唤起后，它们都会伪装成一套套护甲，站在通往 E16“管理者前厅”的门旁。

由于它们的等级比他低4级，我又做了点（更多）文学发挥，假定他在复苏它们时掷出了重大的成功。因此，它们现在成了他的仆从。

第4—5天——接着，他花 2D4 天整理自己的事务，并把他房间地板上的奥术法阵誊写到另一处表面上。外间沙发的绿色软垫正合他意。

我假定掷骰结果是2；请根据你自己的掷骰结果调整。

第6天——准备唤起更多不死生物。

第7天——在拟形怪的帮助下，他唤起一名双尾虫怪守卫——1天。

@UUID[Actor.lKHfwimY6alhWGGu]{Seugathi Guard Ghoul}

该生物仅为友善。

准备

完成誊写后，查夫克姆施放一个隐形仆役，并命令它摧毁其房间里剩下的一切。唯一的例外是他法术书的书页。查夫克姆小心地把这些收拢起来，放入他的裹布之中。他无意间遗落了一道行动自如法术，因此隐形仆役也同样漏掉了它：

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.aqRYNoSvxsVfqglH]{Freedom of Movement}

他前往图书馆楼层的 C36 抄写间。在那里，他把法阵铺展在秘密书房的地面上，并把法术书书页藏好。

  • 第7天——最后，他返回自己的竞技场居所，带上所有盟友下楼，与贾法基开战。

战斗备注

  • 战斗前，查夫克姆会对自己施放法术免疫，以对抗魅影杀手法术。同时，这也很可能是他对贾法基施放的第一道法术。

  • 贾法基对付查夫克姆的最佳开局武器，是“困惑术”，以使查夫克姆成为一名效率较低的施法者。之后，它可能会用各类法术与炸弹袭击查夫克姆，并在压力之下施放魅影杀手。它的长剑上还有一枚强击符文。

  • 由于双尾虫怪守卫和贾法基都是大型生物，即使在漂浮时，贾法基也无法脱离近战射程。这使查夫克姆可以在远处施法，而守卫则贴近进入近战距离。

  • 拟形怪会把注意力集中在皮普妮与蛛化精灵身上。覆盖拟形怪身体的黏胶使它成为一个出人意料的强硬对手。不过，它们移动得很慢。

  • 查夫克姆希望他的拟形怪能活下来，因为它们很聪明且受他控制，所以他会不时向它们丢出防御法术。

  • 如果战况不利，双尾虫怪守卫可能试图逃跑，但查夫克姆会留在实验室入口处以阻止它。

  • 皮普妮会对自己施放隐形术，并尽量避开近战。她主要关心的是自保。

  • 查夫克姆拥有大量防御法术，但进攻法术只有少数。他最好的武器是他的加速术，他会把它施放在某个盟友身上，比如守卫。然后，他会用邪影触须与他的力场弹幕魔杖进行狙击。

  • 理想情况下，皮普妮会逃脱并撤回瞎酿酒馆酒馆。

如果查夫克姆获胜，他会与幸存的盟友一起返回图书馆。他对贾法基的任何占据术都没有兴趣。

  • 如果他带着任何拟形怪，英雄们在同一天进入地城时，就有机会在他撤退途中逮个正着。当他们沿着第4层的鬼行道向下时，他会不耐烦地驱赶着那两只拟形怪前行。详见 @UUID[.Gw6624whXkp2AqO8]{鬼行道上的查夫克姆}。

如果他战败，那么他将在 1D10 天后在抄写间重生，并开始重新收集材料以再次组建盟友。

  • 第7天（续）——一旦在抄写间确保安全，他便开始利用图书管理员的工作室中可用的空白书籍重制他的法术书。

    • 这将花费他许多天（2d4+4）天，因为在此期间，他还忙于唤起对他更有用的仆役，并研究可作为新巢穴的本地地点。他无法再次唤起被杀死的不死生物或恶魔，而沃鲁克·阿兹里尼也已没有任何残骸可供唤起，于是他前往摩洛克楼层，唤起以下个体，并把它们安置在保密藏书房间中充当守卫。

  • 第9天——他唤起格劳格斯特——摩洛克的首领

@UUID[Actor.OvsBqbBLqeWPxjOe]{Graulgust Ghoul}

  • 第11天——他唤起米尼维克斯——梦蛛

@UUID[Actor.AA6Ukjwq1prP6Zp3]{Mimnivix Ghoul}

他会留在抄写间，直到他的法术书完成。到那时，他将永远离开凄凉灯塔。他会抛弃拟形怪，但会带着格劳格斯特与米尼维克斯一起离开该区域，并在不太远的某处开张落脚，继续积攒力量。

A Small Dash of Literary License

As hinted in his @UUID[JournalEntry.JT0zCcIwsSpKnbB5.JournalEntryPage.5XJBjPHU2XkIZWtN]{journal entry}, Chafkhem should have the required materials to raise at least four creatures:

If the heroes don’t indulge Chafkhem, he decides to kill them and animate them as undead who don’t talk back nearly as much.

Since this glosses over some of the spell requirements (such as the need for a secondary caster) and the fact that attempting to raise even fifth-level creatures should be a forbidding challenge, I decided to explain it with Gauntlight itself. After all, the Canker Cultists starting coming to unlife after resorting to cannibalism, so it is not too much of a stretch to declare that Create Undead spell is much easier and has fewer requirements within Abomination Vaults than elsewhere.

If this is not too much of a stretch, then read on!

Timeline

Chafkhem spends his time after the initial encounter in looking around the areas adjoining his chambers, and discovering the corpses there. This assumes that the players have already killed everything surrounding Chafkhem's chambers.

Therefore, the first thing he does is raise himself a couple of guardians.

Day 2 - 3 - Raise mimics as undead.

@UUID[Actor.9R8FlvFwlohJcWHU]{Mimic Ghoul}

Once raised, they both take on the guises of suits of armor, and they stand next to the doors leading out of E16. Administrator’s Antechamber.

Since they are four levels lower than him, I used a little (more) literary license to assume he had a critical successes while raising them. Therefore, they are now his minions.

Days 4 - 5 - Next, he spends the 2D4 days putting his affairs in order and transcribing his arcane circle on the floor of his chamber to another surface. The green upholstery of the sofa in the outer chamber suits his purposes.

I am assuming the dice roll was a 2; adjust per your own dice roll.

Day 6 - Prepare to raise additional undead.

Day 7 - With the help of the mimics, he raises a saugathi guard - 1 day.

@UUID[Actor.lKHfwimY6alhWGGu]{Seugathi Guard Ghoul}

This creature is only Friendly.

Preparations

Once he has finished his transcription, Chafkhem casts an unseen servant and set it to destroying everything that is left in his chamber. The only exception is the pages of his spell book. These, Chefkhem carefully gathers up and places in his wrappings. He inadvertently leaves behind a Freedom of Movement spell, and therefore, the unseen servant misses it as well:

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.aqRYNoSvxsVfqglH]{Freedom of Movement}

He goes up to C36 Scriptorium on the Library level. There, he unfurls his circle on the floor of the secret study, and stashes his spellbook pages.

  • Day 7 - Finally, he returns to his Arena chambers and takes all his allies downstairs to enter into battle with Jafaki.

Battle Notes

  • Before the battle, Chafkhem will cast Spell Immunity upon himself against the Phantasmal Killer spell. At the same time, this is probably the first spell he would cast against Jafaki.

  • Jafaki's best initial weapon against Chafkham is the Confusion spell, in order to make Chafkhem a less effective spellcaster. Afterward, it might swipe at Chafkham with a variety spells and bombs, and casting Phantasmal Killer when pressed. It also has a striking rune on its longsword.

  • Since both the Saugathi Guard and Jafaki are large creatures, Jafaki cannot get out of melee range, even when levitating. This allows Chafkham to cast spells from a distance while the Guard closes into melee range.

  • The mimics will focus on PipNee and the Drider. The adhesive that covers the mimic makes it a surprisingly tough opponent. However, they move very slowly.

  • Chafkhem would like for his mimics to survive, since they are intelligent and under his control, so he will toss a defensive spell their way from time to time.

  • The Saugathi Guard might try to flee if the battle goes poorly, but Chafkhem will stay in the entry of the lab to prevent this.

  • PipNee will cast invisibility on herself and try to avoid melee combat. She is mostly concerned with self-preservation.

  • Chafkham has a large number of defensive spells. However, he only has a few offensive spells. His best weapon is his Haste spell, which he would cast on an ally such as the Guard. Then, he would snipe with Grim Tendrils and his Force Barrage wand.

  • Ideally, PipNee would get away and retreat to the Warped Brew Tavern.

If Chafkhem prevails, he heads back to the library with his surviving allies. He has no interest in any of Jafaki's possessions.

  • If he has any mimics with him, the heroes have an opportunity to catch him in the act of this retreat if they enter the dungeon on the same day. When they head down the Ghostwalk on Level 4, he will be herding along the two mimics impatiently. See @UUID[.Gw6624whXkp2AqO8]{Chafkhem on Ghostwalk} for details.

If he falls, then he will rejuvenate in the scriptorium in 1D10 days, and will begin gathering materials to assemble allies again.

  • Day 7, continued - Once safely in the Scriptorium, he begins recreating his spellbook from the blank books available in the Librarian's Workroom.

    • This will take him many days (2d4+4) days because during this time, he is also busy raising servants that will be more useful to him, and researching local locations to use as a new lair. He cannot re-raise slain undead or demons, and there is nothing left of Volluk Azrinae to raise, so he heads to the Morlock level, raises the following, and places them in the Restricted Collection room as guards.

  • Day 9 – He raises Graulgust - leader of the Morlocks

@UUID[Actor.OvsBqbBLqeWPxjOe]{Graulgust Ghoul}

  • Day 11 – He raises Mimnivix - the dream spider

@UUID[Actor.AA6Ukjwq1prP6Zp3]{Mimnivix Ghoul}

He will remain in the Scriptorium until his spellbook is complete. At this point, he leave Gauntlight forever. He will abandon the mimics, but will take Graulgust and Mimnivix with him as he departs the area and set up shop somewhere not too far away as he continues to gather his strength.

Lv. 4 Side Quest - Lasda's Town Meeting.name: 等级 4 支线任务 - 拉斯达的镇民大会 Lv. 4 Side Quest - Lasda's Town Meeting

Lasda's Post-Recovery Activities.name: 拉斯达的康复后活动 Lasda's Post-Recovery Activities
Lasda's Post-Recovery Activities.text:
在英雄们救出拉斯达之后，他在康复期间，市长奥瑟夫前来探望，而拉斯达用自己在凄凉灯塔地城中的亲身经历把他吓得不轻。市长有些惊魂未定地回了家，但拉斯达反而被进一步激励，决心采取行动。

他开始拜访镇上的居民，从最富有的人家开始，恳求他们行动起来，把自己的磨难经历讲给任何愿意听的人听，并强调威胁迫在眉睫。

他在喧闹的石斑鱼张贴告示，宣布将在那里召开镇民大会。市长也开始支持他的努力，尤其是在他女儿的神秘疾病急转直下、愈发严重之后。

某天，拉斯达会在英雄们在家时前来拜访，身穿鳞甲护甲，背上绑着一把战斧。他会告诉他们关于镇民会议及其 @UUID[.jWSgHUM6PrTVoim0]{议程} 的事，并试图让他们加入。

如果拉斯达没能获得英雄们的支援，那么他会失望地策马离开，而镇民大会也不会召开。

After the heroes rescue Lasda, while he is recovering, Mayor Oseph visits him, and Lasda terrifies him with exactly what he experienced in the Gauntlight dungeons. The Mayor goes home, somewhat shaken, but Lasda is only spurred into further action.

He begins visiting townspeople, starting with the most wealthy, imploring them to action, impressing his ordeal on anyone who will listen, and speak of the urgency of the threat.

He puts up postings about a town hall in the Rowdy Rockfish. The Mayor gets behind his efforts, especially after his daughter's mysterious illness takes a turn for the worse.

Lasda will visit the heroes one day while they are at home, wearing scale armor, and with a battleaxe strapped to his back. He will tell them about the town meeting and its @UUID[.jWSgHUM6PrTVoim0]{agenda}, and will try to get them on board.

If Lasda does not succeed in getting the heroes' support, then he will ride away disappointed, and the town hall will not take place.

Town Meeting Agenda.name: 城镇会议议程 Town Meeting Agenda
Town Meeting Agenda.text:
镇民大会将在喧闹的石斑鱼举行，然后英雄们才会进入 Lv. 5 竞技场。

拉斯达拟定了以下议程，并会尝试看看英雄们是否有任何补充。

  • 成立一个学者委员会，协助研究英雄们对凄凉灯塔的探索中可能出现的任何问题。

  • 对从北方或穿过墓地进入城镇的陌生人进行审查。在北门修建一座塔并全天候（24/7）驻守。

  • 拆除从城镇进入地窖的已知入口：

    • 通往渔场地下室的地下城入口——假设这点为城镇所知。

    • 口渴的羊驼废墟下的狗头人巢穴，它与上述相同的通道相连。

    • （这将使走私者避难所通道暂时仍未被发现。）

The Town Meeting will take place at the Rowdy Rockfish before the heroes enter Lv. 5 Arena.

Lasda draws up the following agenda and will attempt to see if the heroes have anything to add to it.

  • Establish a Scholar Committee to help research any questions that may come from the heroe's exploration of Gauntlight.

  • Scrutiny on strangers entering the town from the North, or through the Graveyard. Buld a tower at the North Gate and man 24/7.

  • Demolition of known entries into the Vaults from town:

    • Into dungeon leading to the Fishery basements - assume this is known to the town.

    • The kobold warren under the ruins of the Thirsty Alpaca, which connects to the same passage as above.

    • (This will leave the Smuggler's Refuge passage undiscovered for now.)

Brelda's Speech.name: 布蕾达的演讲 Brelda's Speech
Brelda's Speech.text:
我知道镇上一直有很多关于这些冒险者的猜测。我是个酒馆老板，每天晚上、整整一夜，我都深陷这些流言里。我知道你们有些人认为，正如你们称呼的那样，这帮“流氓团伙”一直在对这个镇子实施一场精心设计的骗局。你们说这个镇子并不比平时更危险，或者说，它面临的危险更多来自某家竞争的木材公司，而不是什么阴森的灯塔。

这让我想知道你们到底站在哪一边。

你们嘲笑这镇子下面有一只幼虫的说法，可你们却拒绝到渔场下面去，亲眼看看证据。也不肯帮忙封堵那些该死的通道。

一家旅店就在我们镇子的正中心倒塌了，而你们拒绝下去亲眼看看那片废墟下方的地道迷宫，也不帮忙查清它们通向哪里，更不帮忙在不危及那一整片城区的情况下把它们安全地封死。

你们对轮到自己在夜里值守的想法就满腹怨气，可当亡灵出现在墓地时，你们却不在场，也没有帮忙把它们击退。你们也没有帮忙重新安葬我们被亵渎的亡者。

我不是在对你们所有人说话。你们当中有些人确实承认危险的存在，并且正在尽你们所能提供帮助。对你们，我献上感谢。而矮人的感谢，只会在值得的时候才会给出。

但你们当中有些人——不是所有人，甚至也不是很多人——除非你们亲眼看见危险，并且它已经把刀架在你们喉咙上，否则你们就不会行动。

我请求你们，我以一个母亲的身份恳求你们，听听我儿子说的话。他去过下面。这些“流氓”救了他。现在他会向你们所有人讲述他所面对的恐怖。你们也许会怀疑一群冒险者的话，但你们几乎不可能怀疑他。

拉斯达？

拉斯达非常简短地概述了他在地城中的经历，措辞残酷而简练，然后他会立刻切入议程。

I know there's been a lot of speculation in town about these adventurers. I'm a barkeep, and I'm neck-deep in the talk every night, all night. I know that some of you think this "gang of hoodlums" as you call 'em, have been running an elaborate scam on this town. You say this town is in no more danger than usual, or that it is in more danger from some competing lumber company than any spooky lighthouse.

It makes me wonder whose side you are on.

You scoff at the notion of a wormling under this town, yet you refuse to go down under the Fishery and see the evidence for yourself. Or help block off those damned passages.

An inn collapses in the very center of our town, and you refuse to go down and see for yourselves the warrens under that ruin, and you don't help find out where they go, or help safely block them off without endangering that entire part of town.

You bristle at the notion of taking your turn on a nightly watch, yet you weren't there when the undead appeared in the cemetary, and you didn't help fight them off. Nor have you helped rebury our despoiled dead.

I am not speaking to all of you. Some of you do acknowledge the dangers, and are doing what you can to help. To you, I offer my thanks. And thanks, from a dwarf, is only given when it is deserved.

But some of you — not all of you, or even very many of you — will not act until you have seen the dangers with your own eyes, and it is holding a knife to your throat.

I ask you, I implore you as a mother, listen to my son. He has been down there. These "hoodlums" rescued him. He will now describe the horrors he faced to all of you. You may doubt the word of a gang of adventurers, but you can hardly doubt him.

Lasda?

Lasda very briefly covers his experience in the dungeon, using brutal and terse language, and then he will jump right into the agenda.

The Town Meeting.name: 市镇会议 The Town Meeting
The Town Meeting.text:
奥瑟夫将宣布会议开始，并将请出第一位也是唯一一位发言者：布雷达·范克维尔。

辩论在 @UUID[.91yAfs9O3tCBwd7U]{布蕾达的演讲} 之后立刻开始。有些辩论要求以遭遇模式进行。不过请记住，相比战斗，辩论中的时间流逝应当更为流动，让每个人都有发言的时间。

辩论页面上的每个 NPC 都应加入初始轮的遭遇中，英雄们也要加入。根据你认为合适的情况添加其他 NPC。

奥瑟夫将尝试担任主持人，因此会出现在所有遭遇中。

Oseph will bring the meeting to order, and will call for the first and only speaker, Brelda Venkervale.

The debates start immediately after @UUID[.91yAfs9O3tCBwd7U]{Brelda's Speech}. Some of the debates call for it to be run in Encounter Mode. However, keep in mind that the passage of time should be more fluid for a debate than it is in a battle, with everyone getting time to talk.

Each of the NPCs on the debate pages should be added to the encounter for the initial round, plus the heroes. Add other NPCs as you think is appropriate.

Oseph will attempt to fill the role of moderator, and so will be in all encounters.

Debate: Demolition of Vault Entries.name: 辩论：拆除金库入口 Debate: Demolition of Vault Entries
Debate: Demolition of Vault Entries.text:
拉斯达解释说，以下这些通往凄凉灯塔宝库的入口位于城市边界之内，而且可能还存在其他未知的入口。

  • 渔场下方的地穴

  • 口渴羊驼酒馆下方的地穴

他提议镇上应立即摧毁或封堵这些通道。

作为替代方案，拉斯达提出建议：以某种方式限制宝库入口，例如安排守卫、设置陷阱，或设立某种路障。

辩论

以以下NPC、奥瑟夫，以及英雄们开始遭遇：

赞成

  • 拉斯达 - 他会非常咄咄逼人地推动其议程上的每一项。

    • 使用他的交涉进行先攻。

  • 塔米莉 - 她会提醒镇民，那条龙曾就在她的酒馆正下方筑巢。如果你的英雄们没有进行新手盒冒险《奥塔里地下的威胁》，那么那就是另一队冒险者做的。

    • 使用她的交涉进行先攻。

  • 布蕾达 - 她延续塔米莉开头的话题，并补充她的证词：关于《奥塔里地下的威胁》的冒险者，每晚都会成为讨论的话题，以及他们每次从地下城出现时都伤痕累累。

    • 使用她的交涉进行先攻。

反对

  • 拉布 - 他会质疑这项行动将如何筹措经费。

    • 使用他的交涉进行先攻。

  • 克洛特 - 他会想知道劳动力从何而来，并将整个行动斥为毫无意义。

    • 使用他的威吓进行先攻。

Lasda explains that the following entries to the Gauntlight vaults are within the city limits, and there may be others that are unknown.

  • Warren under Fishery

  • Warren under Thirsty Alpaca

He proposes that the town immediately destroy or block these passages.

As an alternative, Lasda offers up the suggestion that they somehow restrict the vault entries, either with guards, traps, or some kind of barricade.

Debate

Begin encounter with the following NPCs, Oseph, and the heroes:

Pro

  • Lasda - He will push very aggressively for each item on his agenda.

    • Use his Diplomacy for initiative.

  • Tamily - She will remind the townspeople of the dragon that was nesting right under her tavern. If your heroes did not do the Beginner Box adventure "Menace Under Otari", then it was another set of adventurers.

    • Use her Diplomacy for initiative.

  • Brelda - She continues what Tamily started, adding her testimony about how the Menace Under Otari adventurers were the subject of discussion nightly, and how beat up they were every time they emerged from the dungeon.

    • Use her Diplomacy for initiative.

Con

  • Wrab - He will question how this operation will be financed.

    • Use his Diplomacy for initiative.

  • Klorte - He will want to know where the labor will come from, and dismiss the entire endeavor as pointless.

    • Use his Intimidation for initiative.

Debate: Scrutiny of Strangers.name: 辩论：审视陌生人 Debate: Scrutiny of Strangers
Debate: Scrutiny of Strangers.text:
提案：对从北方进入城镇、或穿过墓地进入城镇的陌生人进行更严格的审查。建一座塔并安排人员全天候（24/7）驻守。盘问所有陌生人的来意以及他们将在镇上停留多久。记录所有访客。

辩论

以以下NPC、Oseph以及英雄们开始遭遇。

赞成：

  • 拉斯达——是镇上的一个陌生人用他的魔法把他引诱走的。

    • 使用他的交涉进行先攻。

反对：

  • Lardus——他没有足够的人手来全天候（24/7）值守瞭望塔，而且在他们把瞭望塔建好之前，他们又该怎么办？

    • 使用他的威吓进行先攻。

  • Wrin——她会指出，如果他们一直对陌生人抱有怀疑，那么他们一开始就永远不会信任英雄们，而且他们可能会在无意中拒绝潜在的援助。

    • 使用她的表演进行先攻。

Proposal: More scrutiny on strangers entering the town from the North, or through the Graveyard. Build a tower and man it 24/7. Question all strangers as to their business and how long they will be in town. Log all visitors.

Debate

Begin encounter with the following NPCs, Oseph, and the heroes.

Pro:

  • Lasda - it was a stranger in town who was able to lure him away with his magics.

    • Use his Diplomacy for initiative.

Con:

  • Lardus - he does not have enough men to man a watchtower, 24/7, and what will they do until they get the watchtower built?

    • Use his Intimidation for initiative.

  • Wrin - She will point out that if they had been suspicious of strangers, then they never would have never trusted the heroes to begin with, and they may inadvertently be turning away potential help.

    • Use her Performance for initiative.

Debate: Establish Scholar Committee.name: 辩论：成立学者委员会 Debate: Establish Scholar Committee
Debate: Establish Scholar Committee.text:
这是最简单的议题，也没有任何反对者。委员会的所有拟议成员都已经是志愿者。

  • 万迪——宗教

  • 沃琳——奥秘与精魂学识

  • 莫里宾特——奥术与奥秘

  • 沃里温——自然

  • 萨姆苏玛——宗教与幽灵学识

  • 玛吉洛——炼金术

拉斯达对以上内容作了简要说明。没有人反对该动议。对此的表决轻松通过，无人投反对票。

This is the easiest topic, and has no detractors. All proposed members of the committee are already volunteers.

  • Vandy - Religion

  • Wrin - Occult and Spirit Lore

  • Morlibint - Arcana and Occult

  • Worliwynn - Nature

  • Saamsuma - Religion and Ghost Lore

  • Magiloy - Alchemy

Lasda describes the above briefly. There is no one to argue against the motion. The vote on it easily succeeds, with no one voting nay.

Debate: Patronage of Roseguard.name: 辩论：玫瑰团的赞助 Debate: Patronage of Roseguard
Debate: Patronage of Roseguard.text:
拉斯达会在上面较为轻松的话题之后提出这个棘手的话题，而且这应该会让英雄们感到意外，因为这不在他的议程之内。

他会提议设立一笔要支付给玫瑰团的津贴，用以表示对他们代表小镇所做工作的支援。这笔津贴可以按实际开销计算，或按每次远征拨付，或按每个地城等级拨付。

辩论

以以下NPC以及奥瑟夫开始遭遇。英雄们将作为这场辩论的旁观者，因为辩论是代表他们而进行的。

赞成

  • 瑞恩会描述该团队正在出售他们找到的一切，并且据她所知，他们把赚到的每一分钱都投入到为诸如幽冥符文之类的东西提供资金上——这是少数能伤害幽灵（特征）的手段之一。

    • 使用她的表演作为先攻。

  • 玛吉洛会作证称，英雄们为了让团队活下去以及击倒敌人，已经在药水上花了一小笔财富。

    • 使用她的交涉作为先攻。

  • 莫里宾特会为上述证词增添分量，并补充说他相信他们当中许多人一直在提供折扣。

    • 使用他的交涉作为先攻。

反对

  • 拉布会慷慨激昂地谈到伐木家族的经营利润空间极小、寇托斯财团施加了巨大的竞争压力、以及他们派出破坏者来毁坏装备，从而导致受伤、维修，以及库存与声誉的损失。

    • 使用他的交涉作为先攻。

    • 他会把阿利莫拉拉到自己一方，指出他知道她也是在微薄利润下经营，而且她仍然还有“需要供教育与嫁妆的孩子们”。

  • 阿利莫拉——她会不情愿地站在拉布一边，描述她知道他正面临劳动力与融资方面的困难，并确认某些外来伐木公司正在对他们两家的生意使用卑劣手段。

    • 使用她的交涉作为先攻。

  • 此时，除非有玩家已经“认领”他，杜德努会站起来，提出带领一队冒险者执行任务，去调查伐木公司的麻烦。（如果团队不需要他的战斗本领，这可以让他忙一阵子。）

    • 使用他的交涉作为先攻。

如果动议通过

在接下来的一周里，拉布、阿利莫拉与乌斯廷将协商达成一份协议：三家同意支付为确保英雄们生存所需的特定物品（例如药水）或通过某些怪物所需物品（例如幽冥符文）费用的一半。款项将在提交一份报告、详细说明所面临的威胁与所需物品之后拨付。

英雄们很可能会觉得这一流程有些麻烦——这正是拉布的用意。

Lasda will bring up this difficult topic after the easier topics above, and should be a surprise to the heroes, since it was not on his agenda.

He will propose that the establish a stipend to be paid to the Roseguard as a show of support for their work on behalf of the town. It could be based on actual expenses, or funded per expedition, or per dungeon level.

Debate

Begin encounter with the following NPCs, and Oseph. The heroes will be spectators for this debate, since it is taking place on their behalf.

Pro

  • Wrin will describe how the group is selling everything they found, and as far as she can tell, they are pouring every bit of money that they earn into funding things like ghost touch runes, which is one of the few things that can hurt a ghost.

    • Use her Performance for initiative.

  • Magiloy will testify that the heroes have been spending a small fortune on potions to keep the group alive and to bring down the enemy.

    • Use her Diplomacy for initiative.

  • Morlibint will add his weight to the testimony above, and he will add that he believes that many of them have been providing discounts.

    • Use his Diplomacy for initiative.

Con

  • Wrab will talk passionately about how the lumber families operate with very little margin, how the Kortos Consortium applies a great deal of competitive pressure, and how they send in saboteurs to damage equipment, which results in injuries, repairs, and loss of inventory and reputation.

    • Use his Diplomacy for initiative.

    • He will draft Alymora into his side of the argument, pointing out that he knows she operates on thin margins, and she also still has "little ones with educations and dowries to fund".

  • Alymora - she will reluctantly take Wrab's side, describing that she knows he is facing labor and financing difficulties, and will confirm the dirty tricks that some of the outside lumber companies are playing on both of their businesses.

    • Use her Diplomacy for initiative.

  • At this point, unless a player has claimed him, DudNoo will stand up and offer to lead a group of adventurers on a mission to investigate the lumber company troubles. (This could keep him busy if the group has no need for his fighting prowess.)

    • Use his Diplomacy for initiative.

If the Motion Succeeds

Over the next week, Wrab, Alymora, and Ustin will negotiate an agreement in which the three families agree to pay for half of the costs of specific items that are needed to to ensure the heroes' survival (such as potions) or items needed to get past certain monsters (such as ghost touch runes). The amount would be remitted after a submission of a report detailing the threat faced and the items needed.

The heroes may well find this process to be somewhat troublesome, which is exactly what Wrab intended.

Voting.name: 投票 Voting
Voting.text:
任何想要辩论的英雄都会在先攻列表中获得他们的回合。最终的投票将由玩家进行一次交涉检定，并由赞成或反对一方的人提供协助。

但归根结底，投票应该按照游戏主持人的意图进行。

Any heroes who want to argue will get their turn in the initiative list. The final vote will be a diplomacy check on the part of the player, aided by those on either the Pro or Con side.

But ultimately, the vote should go however the gamemaster intends.

Lv. 4 Belcorra's Retreat.name: 4级 贝科拉的避难所 Lv. 4 Belcorra's Retreat

Overview.name: 概述 Overview
Overview.text:
我发现这一等级是我有幸游玩过的最出色的地下城，更不用说以GM身份主持了。正如你会在等级4的日志页面中看到的那样，这些故事确实点燃了我的想象力。

有几条剧情线在这里首尾相接：

  • 英雄们终于追上了奥塔里，并得知他对他们的请求。

    • @UUID[JournalEntry.RXiYnHUvOFNIaQ4d]{等级4支线任务 - 开启鬼门}

  • 英雄们终于能够开始理解卡门，并且也许，帮助他救赎自我。

    • @UUID[JournalEntry.4lMm3yR5WXljB83E]{等级4支线任务 - 合作之刃}

  • 英雄们终于要在至少两场惊心动魄的遭遇中与沃鲁克·阿兹里尼对峙。

    • @UUID[.EPUZnQngwmI7nivH]{时间线 - 沃鲁克·阿兹里尼}

另外：

  • 这一等级上有一名通缉犯——以及一名狼化人。

    • @UUID[.vLb8cCM3Xz9OE5Ob]{杰尔·梅兹勄}

  • 最后，作为等级4与等级5之间的过场，新近获释的拉斯达·兰克维尔召集了一场镇民大会，并请求英雄们出席。

    • @UUID[JournalEntry.eSE7b49WlpcT8KGc]{等级4支线任务 - 拉斯达的镇民大会}

I found this level to be the most excellent dungeon I ever had the privilege to play, not to mention to run as a GM. As you will be able to tell in the Lv. 4 journal pages, these stories really seeded my imagination.

Several plot threads come full circle here:

  • The heroes finally catch up with Otari, and learn what he asks of them.

    • @UUID[JournalEntry.RXiYnHUvOFNIaQ4d]{Lv. 4 Side Quest - Opening Ghostgate}

  • The heroes can finally start to understand Carmen, and perhaps, help him redeem himself.

    • @UUID[JournalEntry.4lMm3yR5WXljB83E]{Lv. 4 Side Quest - The Cooperative Blade}

  • The heroes finally get to confront Volluk Azrinae in what should be at least two thrilling encounters.

    • @UUID[.EPUZnQngwmI7nivH]{Timeline - Volluk Azrinae}

Also:

  • A wanted criminal — and werewolf — is on this level.

    • @UUID[.vLb8cCM3Xz9OE5Ob]{Jaul Mezmin}

  • Finally, as an interlude between Level 4 and Level 5, the newly-freed Lasda Lankerville calls a town meeting, and he asks that the heroes attend.

    • @UUID[JournalEntry.eSE7b49WlpcT8KGc]{Lv. 4 Side Quest - Lasda's Town Meeting}

Jaul Mezmin.name: 杰尔·梅兹勄 Jaul Mezmin
Jaul Mezmin.text:
在这个故事调整中，杰尔·梅兹勄是一个死不悔改的狼化人，也是一个更难以击败的威胁。

艾拉·拉瑟纳

首先，我把艾拉·拉瑟纳被谋杀的时间改得更近——发生在过去五年内的某个时候，而不是三十年前。

我做出这个改动，是因为我也给凯莉诺加了一个已成年的儿子，而我希望他对母亲有深刻的记忆。因此，他母亲去世时，他几乎已经成年。（莱诺·拉瑟纳收录在 Tianze 的《奥塔里》扩展内容中，在“奥塔里市场”场景里作为一名商人演员登场。）

凶恶的大灰狼
