我的第二个改动，是让杰尔成为一个更主动、也更死不悔改的狼化人。他很渴望把自己的诅咒施加到某个英雄身上，因为他很想把这些强大的英雄之一纳入自己的控制之下。

因此，在短暂的交涉之后，他就会发动攻击。

@UUID[Actor.EN3mp0sVObP8ou3p]{杰尔·梅兹勄}

@UUID[Actor.xj1Qn0VA4H4aKSjW]{杰尓的狼}

他的目标不是杀死任何人，而是在沿着隧道逃往 @UUID[Scene.YNWjtKmbO8rTgEsA]{隐蔽空地} 之前，尽可能多地咬到他们、让牙齿刺入他们体内。只要诅咒对其中任何人起效，他就知道这些被诅咒者最终会回到他身边。

他很有可能成功逃脱。不过，即便他逃掉了，至少英雄们也知道了他的藏身处，并且可能会把战斗带到他那里，试图彻底解决他、领取赏金，并消除对该区域的威胁。

这可能会涉及在“隐蔽空地”场景中的某种怪物狩猎，比如英雄们设置陷阱，要么困住他，要么让他被缓慢术拖住。

狼化人与德鲁伊

我跑这个场景时，是按书上原样来跑的，结果战斗太短、也没什么意义。以下是我犯的一些错误，你们可以从中吸取教训：

  • 当他的生命值降到 30 点以下时，不要让他乞求饶命（我的英雄们拒绝了饶命），而是让他尝试沿着隧道逃走。由于地图并未画出隧道，如果他到达离开地图的那个位置，那么他就成功逃脱。英雄们可以追到 @UUID[Scene.YNWjtKmbO8rTgEsA]{隐蔽空地}，但他会不见踪影。

  • 记住他是个德鲁伊！我在这场遭遇中没有充分使用他的德鲁伊能力。他的法术包括用于他自己和他的狼的治疗法术。在逃脱时，他可以使用棘墙术或绊足术（也就是 Tanglevine）。他也可以对狼的牙齿施放魔牙术。

  • 为了逃脱，他不会犹豫抛下那头狼。如果狼活了下来，它会试着跟上并找到杰尔。英雄们可以利用这一点来对付杰尔。

  • 同样地，他应该在战斗早期就施放召唤动物。他大概喜欢召唤虫群或能够施加毒素或疾病的生物。

事后

如果那头狼活了下来，沃莉薇恩会收养它，从那之后你会看到它总是跟她形影不离。我把这头狼命名为德雷克：

@UUID[Actor.6WuJBpIPJgsiyFrt]{德雷克}

如果雷道夫在之后于等级 6 被救出，她会把这头狼送给他，因为他在被抓走时失去了自己的狗。

In this story tweak, Jaul is an unrepentant werewolf, and a more difficult-to-defeat threat.

Ayla Lathenar

First, I made the murder of Ayla Lathenar much more recent - sometime in the last five years rather than thirty years ago.

I made this change because I also also gave Keleeno a grown son, and I wanted him to have strong memories of his mother. Therefore, he was almost an adult when his mother died. (Leno Lathenar is included in Tianze's Otari Extras, as a merchant actor in the Otari Market scene.)

The Big, Bad Wolf

My second change was to make Jaul a much more active and unrepentant werewolf. He is keen to inflict his curse on one of the heroes, since he would love to have one of these powerful heroes under his control.

Therefore, after a brief parley, he will attack.

@UUID[Actor.EN3mp0sVObP8ou3p]{Jaul Mezmin}

@UUID[Actor.xj1Qn0VA4H4aKSjW]{Jaul's Wolf}

His goal is not to kill anyone, but to sink his teeth into as many of them as possible before fleeing down the tunnel to the @UUID[Scene.YNWjtKmbO8rTgEsA]{Secluded Clearing}. If the curse works on any of them, he knows that the cursed ones will return to him, eventually.

There is a good chance he will get away. However, even if he does, then at least the heroes know of his hiding place, and could possibly take the fight to him in order to try to finish him off, collect the reward, and eliminate the threat to the area.

This could involve some monster hunting in the Secluded Clearing scene, with perhaps the heroes setting up snares to either entrap him or slow him down.

A Werewolf and a Druid

When I played this scene, I played it by the book, and the battle ended up being too short and meaningless. Here are some of my mistakes that you can learn from:

  • If reduced to fewer than 30 hit points, rather than have him beg for mercy (my heroes denied mercy), have him try to get away down the tunnel. Since the map does not provide for the tunnel, if he reaches the point where he is off the map, then he gets away. The heroes can chase him to the @UUID[Scene.YNWjtKmbO8rTgEsA]{Secluded Clearing}, but he will be nowhere in sight.

  • Remember that he is a druid! I did not use his druidly powers enough when I ran this encounter. His spells include healing spells for both himself and his wolf. When making his escape, he can use Wall of Thorns or Tanglefoot (aka Tanglevine). He can also cast Magic Fang on the wolf's teeth.

  • He will not hesitate to abandon the wolf to get away. If the wolf survives, he will try to follow and find Jaul. The heroes could use this against Jaul.

  • Likewise, he should cast Summon Animal early on. He probably likes summoning swarms or creatures that can deliver poison or disease.

Afterward

If the wolf survives, then Worliwinn will take it in, and it will be seen everywhere with her from that point. I named the wolf Drex:

@UUID[Actor.6WuJBpIPJgsiyFrt]{Drex}

If Raydolph is later rescued on Level 6, she will give the wolf to him, since he lost his dog when he was captured.

Timeline - Volluk Azrinae.name: 时间线 - 沃鲁克·阿兹里尼 Timeline - Volluk Azrinae
Timeline - Volluk Azrinae.text:
本日志假定沃鲁克·阿兹里尼在与英雄的首次遭遇中幸存下来——这极有可能。它详述了他此后的行动，直到英雄必须再次面对他——最可能是因为又一名受害者被绑架，以及凄凉灯塔的再度启动而引发。

@UUID[Actor.ZAXuvUW6kl6v3SuW]{Volluk Azrinae}

这条时间线从他败北后的第二天开始。

第1天

沃鲁克将他的“蠕虫盛宴”法术换成“安抚”法术——他一直傲慢到不认为自己会需要它。

第2天

他花了一整天用尽所有4级法术位来治疗术恢复。

第3天

在第2天时，他前去与D11拷问室里的拷问者瓦格丽斯特交谈。若她仍活着，她会对他放跑自己珍贵俘虏一事感到好笑。她拒绝帮助他，但提出可以“先把他下一个受害者料理得更软一些”。

遭到这番冷遇后，他终于鼓起勇气去接近D20d的虚空暴食者。

若虚空暴食者仍活着：

  • 沃鲁克将遭受自贝科拉在世以来最残酷的斥责。他对英雄的憎恨加深。虚空暴食者会以最贬低人的措辞建议他先记住自己的职责，并去找另一个受害者放上凄凉灯塔的祭坛。

  • 在他离开后，虚空暴食者将用通神术与贝科拉联络。若英雄通过归还契约而释放了有须魔鬼科罗克，且科罗克背叛了乌瑞维安，贝科拉会安排把他送回去防守沃鲁克的住处，并给他一个赎罪的机会。

若虚空暴食者已死：

  • 如果虚空暴食者已死，沃鲁克在有机会思考之后，也会得出同样的结论。

  • 他在下一场战斗中不会有恶魔盟友，但他会寻找一些新近死亡者，用他的“唤起死灵”仪式将其再度活动化。D10油鳞蛛畜栏中的一只油鳞蛛在他能力范围内可以被再度活动化。

    @UUID[Actor.GE1pO8Y64xqBHEp6]{Scalathrax Ghoul}

当晚，沃鲁克会冒险前往地表。假设英雄在他败北后洗劫了他的房间，那么沃鲁克将失去他的空光提灯——那正是他最初抓住拉斯达的关键。

他将首先尝试抓住沃里温。若未能成功，他将转而抓住@UUID[Actor.2UyWMBmnhxmt3eqT]{Stewt}——一名矮人守卫。

第4天

到第4天时，他的新盟友（科罗克或油鳞蛛食尸鬼）将被安置在沃鲁克的房间与餐厅之间的空间处担任守卫。

沃鲁克会熄灭餐厅里的所有光亮。若D07处理室中的骚灵仍在活动，他会打开那扇门，让骚灵能够攻击英雄。（它被束缚在那间屋子里，但会试图把英雄引诱进去，并尝试把他们推撞进滑槽。）

第5天

到第5天，一名受害者将被安置在凄凉灯塔祭坛上。由于有了新鲜受害者，因此不需要在每次照耀之间花一个月进行充能，凄凉灯塔将再次照耀。

这一次，贝科拉会把来自凄凉之光射线中第6或第7等级的一只铁骨怪送出。她会把它投放在城镇以北通往奥塔里的主路上。它将朝沃林的住处前进，因为沃鲁克此前已将她认定为威胁。

这个生物对她而言将是艰难挑战，但守卫们看到了光并会追击，而且卡门也会加入任何战斗。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.abomination-vaults-bestiary.Actor.DnAeqlJRZc5N7hve]{Dreshkan}

若他再次幸存

若沃鲁克第二次被击败但未被杀死，他将需要大约两倍的时间来再次准备凄凉灯塔，也需要两倍时间来召集盟友。甚至可能出现一种情况：英雄会在更低的楼层与他遭遇，最深可至等级7的牢房。

在每一次后续战斗中，他都应当准备得更不足，盟友也更少。

This journal assumes that Volluk has survives his first encounter with the heroes, which is highly likely. It details his activities until the heroes must face him again — most likely in response to the abduction of another victim and the reactivation of Gauntlight.

@UUID[Actor.ZAXuvUW6kl6v3SuW]{Volluk Azrinae}

This timeline begins the day after his defeat.

Day 1

Volluk trades his Worm's Repast spell for a Soothe spell, which he was always too arrogant to imagine he needed.

Day 2

He spends the day using all his 4th level spellslots to heal up.

Day 3

On the 2nd day, goes to speak to Vaulgrist, the torturer in D11 Torture Chamber. If she is still alive, she is amused that he let his prized captive get away. She refuses to help him, but offers to soften up his next victim.

After this rebufff, he finally summons up the courage to approach the voidglutton in D20d.

If the voidglutton is still alive:

  • Volluk will endure the most brutal chastisement since Belcorra was alive. His hatred for the heroes grows. The voidglutton will suggest, in the most belitting terms, that he first remember his duty, and that he find another victim to place on the Gauntlight altar.

  • After he departs, the voidglutton will commune with Belcorra. If the heroes freed the bearded devil, Korkok, by returning his contract, and if he betrayed Urevian, Belcorra arranges to him him sent back to defend Volluk's quarters, and to give him a chance to redeem himself.

If the voidglutton is dead:

  • If the voidglutton is dead, Volluk will come to the same conclusion now that he has had a chance to think.

  • He will not have a diabolical ally in the next battle, but he will look for some of the freshly dead to re-animate with his Create Undead ritual. One of the Scalathraxs in D10 Scalathrax Pen is within his power to reanimate.

    @UUID[Actor.GE1pO8Y64xqBHEp6]{Scalathrax Ghoul}

That night, Volluk will venture to the surface. Assuming the heroes looted his room after his defeat, then Volluk is without his Lantern of Empty Light, which is what helped him capture Lasda in the first place.

He will first attempt to capture Worliwynn. If he is unsuccessful, he will instead capture @UUID[Actor.2UyWMBmnhxmt3eqT]{Stewt}, one of the dwarven guards.

Day 4

By the 4th day, his new ally (either Korlok or a scalathrax ghoul) is installed as guard in the space between Volluk's chamber and the dining room.

Volluk will extinguish all lights in the dining room. If the poltergeist in D07 Disposal Room is still active, he will open that door, so the poltergeist can attack the heroes. (It is bound to that room, but will try to lure the heroes within, where it will attempt to shove them down the chute.)

Day 5

By day 5, a victim is installed in the Gauntlight Altar. Since it has a fresh victim, and therefore does not need a month to recharge between shinings, Gauntlight shines again.

This time, Belcorra sends one of the dreshkans from the 6th or 7th level in Gauntlight's beam. She will deposit it on the main road north of town leading into Otari. It will head toward Wrin's, as Volluk has previously identified her as a threat.

This creature will be a tough challenge for her, but the guards saw the light and will give chase, plus Carmen will join in any battle.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.abomination-vaults-bestiary.Actor.DnAeqlJRZc5N7hve]{Dreshkan}

If He Survives Again

If Volluk is defeated without being killed a 2nd time, it will take him about twice as long to prepare Gauntlight yet again, and also twice as long to muster allies. There should even be a chance that the heroes will encounter him on one of the lower levels as far down as Lv. 7 Prison.

He should be less prepared and have fewer allies with each subsequent battle.

D12 Ghostwalk.name: D12 幽魂漫步 D12 Ghostwalk
D12 Ghostwalk.text:
幽魂屏障

我按如下方式修订了幽魂屏障的历史：它并非在数日前凄凉灯塔进行试射时才形成，而是在过去五个世纪中逐渐显现并不断增强。

它由贝科拉的敌人的幽灵（特征）所构成，这些敌人的尸体被陈列在幽灵之路通道中。最初只有一个不得安宁的灵体，他想做点什么——任何事——来阻挠地城里的活动。他在楼梯顶端占据了一个位置，向任何试图通过的人发起挑战。其他灵体加入了他，它们聚集并相互融合，最终形成了这道幽魂屏障。

Spectral Barrier

I revised the history of the Spectral Barrier as follows: Instead of it forming just a few days ago, when Gauntlight was test fired, it gradually manifested and strengthened over the past five centuries.

It is formed from ghosts of the enemies of Belcorra whose corpses are on display in the Ghostwalk passage. It started with one unquiet spirit who was looking to do something — anything — to thwart the activities in the dungeon. It took up a post at the top of the stairs, and challenged anyone who tried to pass. Other spirits joined him, and they banded and merged together to form the spectral barrier.

D18 Otari's Doom.name: D18 奥塔里的末日 D18 Otari's Doom
D18 Otari's Doom.text:
当英雄们到达《憎恨魔窟》的第四等级时，他们已经沿着奥塔里的足迹（@UUID[JournalEntry.3TP6JlaRwQ380Dqy]{Timeline - Trail of Otari}），穿越了两个完整的等级。

该区域开启两项支线任务：

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.RXiYnHUvOFNIaQ4d]{Lv. 4 Side Quest - Opening Ghostgate} - 对奥塔里最初提出请求的扩展。

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.4lMm3yR5WXljB83E]{Lv. 4 Side Quest - The Cooperative Blade} - 更深入地探索卡尔曼的角色。

注：奥塔里原本的演员位于墙外、靠近他的装备。我替换了他的指示物图像，主要是为了让它与我为玫瑰团其他成员生成的图像风格一致。

微灵战斗备注

参见 @UUID[Item.85HU19ph3qMlBqE9]{腐热症}，其中包含一种效果，你可以将其施加在与微灵战斗中感染腐热症的任何英雄身上。

注：奥塔里并不知道自己每次侵染英雄的幽影时，都会将自己的疾病传染给英雄。

By the time the heroes reach the fourth level of the Abomination Vaults, they have been following in Otari's footsteps (@UUID[JournalEntry.3TP6JlaRwQ380Dqy]{Timeline - Trail of Otari}) through two complete levels.

This area launches two side quests:

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.RXiYnHUvOFNIaQ4d]{Lv. 4 Side Quest - Opening Ghostgate} - an expansion of Otari's original request.

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.4lMm3yR5WXljB83E]{Lv. 4 Side Quest - The Cooperative Blade} - a deeper dive into Carman's character.

NOTE: Otari's original actor is in the beyond the wall near his equipment. I replaced his token image mainly to make it share the same style as the images I generated for the other members of the Roseguard.

Wisp Battle Note

See @UUID[Item.85HU19ph3qMlBqE9]{Filth Fever} for an effect you can place on any hero that contracts Filth Fever in the fight with the wisps.

Note: Otari does not know he is infesting the heroes with his disease every time he infests their shadow.

Lv. 4 Smuggler's Refuge.name: 4级 走私者避难所 Lv. 4 Smuggler's Refuge

Introduction.name: 导言 Introduction
Introduction.text:
此场景最初作为等级 5 竞技场的序章发布，但由于支线剧情必须在进入第 5 等级之前完成，我将其与等级 4 的内容一并收录。

This scene initially shipped as a prelude to Level 5 Arena, but since the subplot must be complete before entry to the 5th level, I am including it with the Level 4 content.

Campfire at Entry.name: 入口营火 Campfire at Entry
Campfire at Entry.text:
这里燃烧的篝火宣告着洞穴有人占据。然而，洞外没有任何人的迹象，唯一的其他痕迹是在其中一根原木旁丢弃着一个毫无价值的酒瓶。

前方是洞穴宽阔的入口。

The burning fire here announces the fact that the cave is occupied. However, there is no sign of anyone outside the cave, with the only other trace being a worthless wine bottle discarded near one of the logs.

Ahead is the wide opening to the cave.

Cave Chamber.name: 洞穴厅室 Cave Chamber
Cave Chamber.text:
这间外部洞室空无一物，但在远端，可以看到卡曼·拉贾尼沐浴在蜡烛的光亮术中，坐在冰冷的营火前，凝视着面前的合作之刃，陷入沉思。

洞穴深处散落着破碎的板条箱、箱子与简易床铺。两支蜡烛燃烧着，提供昏暗光照。

参见以下相关日志：

@UUID[JournalEntry.LhSYWJS9K8maR8sQ.JournalEntryPage.h3ooov1Qjx2XrnEu]{卡曼·拉贾尼}：关于卡曼的角色研究，可能有助于你在此场景中进行扮演。

@UUID[JournalEntry.4lMm3yR5WXljB83E]{4级支线任务 - 合作之刃}：我对本次遭遇的替代版本，基于上述已确立的卡曼的角色。

This outer chamber is empty, but at the far end, Carman can be seen within the light of a candle, pondering the Cooperative Blade in front of a cold campfire.

The back of the cave is littered with broken crates, boxes, and cots. Two candles burn, providing dim light.

See the following related journals:

@UUID[JournalEntry.LhSYWJS9K8maR8sQ.JournalEntryPage.h3ooov1Qjx2XrnEu]{Carman Rajani} for a character study on Carman , which may help roleplay this scene.

@UUID[JournalEntry.4lMm3yR5WXljB83E]{Lv. 4 Subquest - The Cooperative Blade} for my alternate version of this encounter, based on Carman's character as established above.

Mysterious Thrum.name: 神秘嗡鸣 Mysterious Thrum
Mysterious Thrum.text:
一位警觉的英雄也许会注意到洞穴深处传来一阵神秘的嗡鸣。它源自憎恨魔窟的第5等级，但即使英雄们发现了暗门，他们也无法从这里将其打开。

An attentive hero might notice a mysterious thrum toward the back of the cave. It enimates from Level 5 of the Abomination Vaults, but even if the heroes discover the secret door, they have no way of opening it from here.

Lv. 8 Belcorra Attacks.name: 8级 贝科拉 攻击 Lv. 8 Belcorra Attacks

Belcorra Attacks Events.name: 贝科拉攻击事件 Belcorra Attacks Events
Belcorra Attacks Events.text:
如 @UUID[JournalEntry.3T1M395V6J75OsEp.JournalEntryPage.em5wJ44hCXP8mGGG]{贝科拉攻击} 中所详述，你的英雄们将在此首次直接面对贝科拉。

这些战斗应当令人印象深刻。它们应当是最终考验前令人沮丧的初步战斗。在这些战斗中可能会有永久性的损失——智力的丧失，或生命的丧失。

贝科拉正试图把你的英雄们赶走。

播放列表

与其为贝科拉的遭遇挑选一首单独的音乐，我整理了一些播放列表，并配有用于执行它们的宏。

这是因为我发现要启动一个音乐短促音效、开始战斗、进行战斗、播放一声尖叫、再进行更多战斗、再播放一些音乐，等等，实在太繁琐了。

每个播放列表都类似：

  • 前奏 - “贝科拉的警告” - 它与她的战斗音乐有相同的开场动机，我希望玩家在最终战斗前就能认出这段音乐。

  • 一声尖叫

  • 战斗音乐

  • 另一声尖叫。

以下是宏：

@UUID[Macro.H7CXgYkPacxaxe1F]{贝科拉攻击 H10}

@UUID[Macro.XIs6qjLkaUROKVkg]{贝科拉攻击 H17}

@UUID[Macro.PnsfXoBKhIqCjnl9]{贝科拉攻击 HO2}

玩法思路

  • 贝科拉有大量的接触法术。我认为她只会在最终战斗中使用这些，除非她看到其中一位英雄被削减至濒死（状态）。在那种情况下，她会俯冲下来施放她的死亡丧钟法术。

  • 她应当先攻击明显的勇士，其次是牧师、术士、法师以及其他施法者（诗人除外）。

  • 我认为她会低估诗人、炼金术师、德鲁伊、游侠以及野蛮人。

As detailed in @UUID[JournalEntry.3T1M395V6J75OsEp.JournalEntryPage.em5wJ44hCXP8mGGG]{Belcorra Attacks}, your heroes will face Belcorra directly for the first time here.

These battles should stand out. They should be the frustrating preliminary battles before the final test. There may be permanent loss in these battles — lost of intellect, or loss of life.

Belcorra is trying to drive your heroes away.

Playlists

Rather than picking out a single piece of music for Belcorra's encounters, I put together some playlists, along with macros to execute them.

This was because I found it too cumbersome to start a musical sting, start combat, run combat, play a scream, run more combat, play some music, etc.

Each playlist is similar:

  • Prelude - "Belcorra's Warning" - It has the same opening motif as her combat music, and I want the players to recognize this music by the final battle.

  • A scream

  • Combat music

  • Another scream.

Here are the macros:

@UUID[Macro.H7CXgYkPacxaxe1F]{Belcorra Attacks H10}

@UUID[Macro.XIs6qjLkaUROKVkg]{Belcorra Attacks H17}

@UUID[Macro.PnsfXoBKhIqCjnl9]{Belcorra Attacks HO2}

Gameplay Ideas

  • Belcorra has a large number of touch spells. In my opinion, she will only use these in the final battle, except if she sees one of the heroes reduced to a dying condition. In that case, she would swoop in to use her Death Knell spell.

  • She should attack obvious champions first, followed by clerics, sorcerers, wizards, and other spell-users except bards.

  • I think she would underestimate bards, alchemists, druids, rangers, and barbarians.

Belcorra Attack #H10 Stairs of Urthagul.name: 贝科拉 攻击 #H10 乌塔古尔的楼梯 Belcorra Attack #H10 Stairs of Urthagul
Belcorra Attack #H10 Stairs of Urthagul.text:
我建议你将贝科拉的指示物放在此房间北侧洞窟的尽头。她会先飞上凄凉灯塔井道，然后直奔微灵房间，在北侧洞窟的尽头现身，在那里她可以从远处进行攻击。

以下宏会激活一个播放列表，播放多种音乐并搭配贝科拉的哀号。

播放列表宏：@UUID[Macro.H7CXgYkPacxaxe1F]{Belcorra Attacks H10}

玩法点子

  • 贝科拉会保持距离，因为她知道英雄们很可能拥有幽冥武器。基于这个原因，她会从洞窟进行攻击。

  • 她会尽可能贴近天花板悬停，以便更好地保持距离。

I suggest you place Belcorra's token at the far end of the cavern north of this chamber. She approaches by flying up the Gauntlight shaft before she beelines for the wisp chamber, making her appearance at the far end of the cavern to the north, where she can attack from a distance.

The following macro will activate a playlist that will play a variety of music along with Belcorra wails.

Playlist macro: @UUID[Macro.H7CXgYkPacxaxe1F]{Belcorra Attacks H10}

Gameplay Ideas

  • Belcorra will keep her distance, since she knows that the heroes probably have Ghost Touch weapons. For this reason, she will attack from the cavern.

  • She hovers as close to the ceiling as she can get, to better keep her distance.

Belcorra Attack #H02 Hall of Eyes.name: 贝科拉 攻击 #H02 眼之大厅 Belcorra Attack #H02 Hall of Eyes
Belcorra Attack #H02 Hall of Eyes.text:
在我的游戏中，我把贝科拉的棋子放在东侧的蘑菇走廊里，也就是 H10 过度生长的楼梯。位于此房间北边的洞窟中。

以下宏将启用一个播放列表，它会播放多种音乐，并伴随贝科拉的哀号。

@UUID[Macro.PnsfXoBKhIqCjnl9]{Belcorra Attacks H02}

玩法点子

  • 当音乐播放时，贝科拉通过沿着凄凉灯塔井道向上飞行，从楼梯间现身接近。

  • 她会用她的魔法猛然撞开门，因为这扇门很可能还没有被打开。

  • 在她的初次攻击之后，她应当移动到走廊后方，在那里她会位于凄凉灯塔的足迹范围内。这将使她能够获得许可使用她的作祟灯塔动作。

For my game, I placed Belcorra's token in the mushroom hallway to the east, in H10 Overgrown Stairs. is in the cavern north of this chamber.

The following macro will activate a playlist that will play a variety of music along with Belcorra wails.

@UUID[Macro.PnsfXoBKhIqCjnl9]{Belcorra Attacks H02}

Gameplay Ideas

  • While the music is playing, Belcorra approaches by flying up the Gauntlight shaft appearing in the stairway.

  • She will use her magic to slam open the door, since it is not likely to be opened yet.

  • After her initial attack, she should move to the back of the hall, where she will be in Gauntlight's footprint. This will give enable her to access to her Haunted Lighthouse action.

Belcorra Attack H17.name: 贝科拉 攻击 H17 Belcorra Attack H17
Belcorra Attack H17.text:
在英雄们在农场中推进到大半时，贝科拉会决定是时候摆脱他们了。时机成熟时，她会亲自与萨奎舒一起在升降机区域等着他们。

播放列表宏：@UUID[Macro.XIs6qjLkaUROKVkg]{Belcorra Attacks H17}

玩法点子

我把这设定为与贝科拉的第三场战斗。扎马夫迪安也在场，而且他不会错过攻击贝科拉的机会。这应当能为这场遭遇提供一些平衡。

延续她其他几次出场的风格，她会现身几个轮次，以便释放一些毁灭性的法术。然而，扎马夫迪安应当完全把注意力放在她身上；因此她会撤退，让萨奎舒来解决他们。

这是萨奎舒的最终战斗，她会战斗至死。

After the heroes have gotten most of their way through the Farm, Belcorra will decide it is time to be rid of them. She will be waiting for them, herself, along with Sacuishu, in the Lift area, when the time is opportune.

Playlist macro: @UUID[Macro.XIs6qjLkaUROKVkg]{Belcorra Attacks H17}

Gameplay Ideas

I made this the third battle with Belcorra. Zarmavdian is also present, and he will not miss the opportunity to strike at Belcorra. This should provide some balance to the encounter.

In keeping with her other appearances, she be present for a few rounds so she can unleash some devastating spells. However, Zarmavdian should focus completely on her; she will therefore retreat to let Sacuishu finish them off.

This is Sacuishu's final battle, and she fights to the death.

Shaitan's Bazaar.name: 沙伊坦的集市 Shaitan's Bazaar

The Return of Shaitan.name: 沙伊坦的归来 The Return of Shaitan
The Return of Shaitan.text:
我加入这个场景，是因为我认为需要一家更高等级的商店。我不觉得奥塔里的商店会像《畸变宝库》日志里提到的那样，能一直卖到等级10的物品。出于这个原因，我也在伊尔达里斯加了一家商店。

沙伊坦的店主要有魔法物品和各类奇珍异物，而伊尔达里斯的店更像是一家杂货铺，提供种类繁多的高等级物品。

背景

当沙伊坦回到元素位面时，他与同族的沙伊坦以及其他友善的神灯精灵重聚；他一边与他们共抽许多水烟，一边讲述自己在竞技场中的荣耀事迹，尤其是与玫瑰团并肩作战的经历。

庆祝数日后，他便开始着手工作。他用这些年来获得的一些宝藏交换其他宝藏，并去采矿收集元素位面中极为丰富的宝石。

他委托人编织一顶石亭帐篷，并绘制一块招牌。大约在离开后的一个月，他回到了奥塔里区域。

他在隐秘空地附近的一处林间空地搭起石亭，位置就在通往奥塔里的小径旁。

沃利温和雷诺德比英雄们更早发现这座石亭，但对他们而言里面是空的。害羞的沙伊坦若没有人引荐，是不会在他们面前现身的。

与沙伊坦重逢

英雄们第一次出现时，会感觉到一阵隆隆震动——沙伊坦正匆忙把桌子和货架从他在石亭下方塑出的石头里挪出来。当他们走进帐篷时，他会拿着羽毛掸子，把货品上的岩粉掸掉。

沿着通往石亭的小径，第一块牌子写着：

欢迎来到 Arcana Obcsura

奇迹的游乐场！

其译文使用地精语、侏儒语与半身人语。

若被问起，沙伊坦会承认写牌子的人把“obscura”在这三种语言里全都拼错了。

但他做得实在太棒了，我还能不接受吗？

@Check[type:perception|dc:26]{察觉} 来发现这个小小的说谎；其实是在他委托制作招牌时，把这个词拼错了。

第二块牌子写着：

专营非同寻常的物品——

兼具魔法与艺术特质。

非同寻常的物品——

兼具魔法与艺术特质——高价收购！

（仅以宝石付款。）

帐内，两盏东方油灯长明不灭，以暗红色的发光将内部照亮。一张圆桌上摆放着货品，后方还有两层额外的架子。其间立着一盏灯架，上面点着普通蜡烛，烛火同样发光。

英雄们第一次进入商店时，许多货架空间都是空的，因为沙伊坦仍在建立库存。

他愿意以所有他同意购买的物品价格上浮25%的条件收购，但有个前提：在他积攒到足够的硬币以便店铺正常运营之前，他大多会以宝石付款。

I added this scene because I thought a higher-level shop was necessary. I didn't think it realistic that Otari shops would have items all the way up to level 10, as mentioned in the Abomination Vault journals. For this reason, I also added a shop to Yldaris.

Shaitan's shop mostly has magical items and oddities, and the Yldaris shop is more of a general store with a wide variety of high-level items.

Background

When Shaitan returns to the Elemental Plane, he reunites with his fellow shaitans and other friendly djinn, and they share many pipes together as he recounts his tales of glory in the Arena, especially with the Roseguard.

After several days of celebration, he gets to work. He trades some of the treasures he had obtained over the years for other treasures, and goes mining to gather some of the abundant gemstones that are plentiful in the Elemental Plane.

He commissions a pavilion tent to be woven, and a sign to be painted. He returns to the Otari area about a month after he left.

He sets up his pavilion in a clearing near the Secluded Clearing, along the trail back to Otari.

Worliwinn and Raynold discover the pavilion before the heroes do, but for them it is empty. The shy shaitan will not appear to them without an introduction.

Reunion with Shaitan

When the heroes first show up, they will feel a rumbling as Shaitan hurriedly moves his table and shelves out of the stone he has formed under the pavilion. When they enter the tent, he will be bushing rock dust off of the merchandise with a feather duster.

The first sign along the trail leading up to the pavilion reads:

Welcome to Arcana Obcsura

an Arcade of Wonders!

The translations are in goblin, gnomish and halfling.

If asked, Shaitan will acknowledge that the signmaker misspelled "obscura" in all three languages.

But he did such a fantastic job, how could I do otherwise than accept it?

@Check[type:perception|dc:26]{Perception} to detect this small lie; he actually misspelled the word when he commissioned the sign.

The second sign reads:

Specializing in unusual items of a

magical and artistical nature.

Top prices offered for unusual items of a

magical and artistical nature!

(Payment in gemstones only.)

Within, two eastern lamps perpetually illuminate the interior with a smoldering reddish glow. A circular table holds the merchandise, with two additional shelves behind. A lampstand with conventional candles glows between them.

When the heroes first enter the shop, much of the shelf space is empty, since Shaitan is building his inventory.

He offers a 25% premium on all items that he agrees to purchase, with the caveat being that he would mostly be paying in gemstones until he has amassed sufficient coinage for proper shop operation.

The Rowdy Rockfish.name: 喧闹石斑鱼 The Rowdy Rockfish

Introduction.name: 引言 Introduction
Introduction.text:
喧闹石斑鱼由拉斯达·兰克维尔所有。他在经营这里的时候，这家店名副其实。

然而，自从他失踪后，他的母亲开始经营这家旅店，仍抱着希望，期待有一天他会像突然消失那样突然再度现身。如今它被认为是镇上最安静、最沉静的旅店之一。

@UUID[JournalEntry.eSE7b49WlpcT8KGc]{4级支线任务 - 拉斯达的镇民大会}在此进行。

该地点的商人演员已包含在田泽的奥塔里额外内容中。

The Rowdy Rockfish is owned by Lasda Lankerville. While he was running the place, it lived up to its name.

However, since he went missing, his mother started running the inn, keeping hope alive that one day, he would reappear as suddenly as he disappeared. It is now known as the quietest and the most sedate inns in town.

@UUID[JournalEntry.eSE7b49WlpcT8KGc]{Lv. 4 Subquest - Lasda's Town Meeting} takes place here.

A merchant actor for this location is included in Tianze's Otari Extras.

Main Tavern.name: 主酒馆 Main Tavern
Main Tavern.text:
酒馆占据了整个底层。其右侧中央是一座巨大的炉火，十分醒目。这里总有炖菜咕嘟冒泡，茶水在煮，各类酒精饮品在温热香料中慢慢焖煨。

Venkervale 的起居区在地下室，从楼梯尽头的活板门下去即可到达。那里是矮人尺寸的居住区，不在本模块的范围内。

同样地，这家旅店有六间客房，其中两间为情侣房，四间各配有两张单人床。它们也不在本模块的范围内。

毗邻的一栋建筑提供可容纳六匹马的马厩。

The tavern takes up the entire ground floor. It is dominated by a large cookfire in the center right. There is always stew bubbling, tea brewing, and alcoholic beverages mulling.

The Venkervale living quarters are downstairs, through a trapdoor at the end of the stairway. They are dwarven-sized living quarters, and are beyond the scope of this module.

Likewise, the inn has six rooms, two for couples and four with two single beds each. They are also beyond the scope of this module.

An adjacent building provides stabling for six horses.

Citizen Patrons.name: 市民赞助人 Citizen Patrons
Citizen Patrons.text:
为方便拉斯达的镇民大会，本模组中包含的每位奥塔里市民都在酒馆里，包括：

  • 憎恨魔窟中已包含的演员，包括一队城镇卫兵。

  • 我使用憎恨魔窟的角色图像创建的演员。

  • 我为本模组创建的演员。

如果你有 Tianze's Otari Extras，你也应该把市场里的商人演员加进来，也许再加上鱼鹰俱乐部里几个有头有脸的盗贼。这样真的能把酒馆塞得满满当当。

To facilitate Lasda's Town Meeting, every Otari citizen included in this module is inside the tavern, including:

  • Actors that were included with Abomination Vaults, including a squad of town guards.

  • Actors that I created from Abomination Vaults character images.

  • Actors that I created for this module.

If you have Tianze's Otari Extras, you should also add the merchant actors from the Market, and maybe a couple of ranking thieves from the Osprey Club. This should really fill the tavern to bursting.

Gravel Path.name: 砂砾小径 Gravel Path
Gravel Path.text:
这条碎石小径从镇上通向图书馆，随后分成两条。较宽的小径从图书馆东侧前方经过，并通向一处石质阳台内部。较窄的小径紧贴图书馆西侧。

在图书馆后方，小径分岔通往悬崖步道。

This gravel path approaches the library from the town, and then splits into two. The wider path passes in front of the Library on the east, and inside a stone balcony. The narrow path hugs the western side of the Library.

To the rear of the library, the path branches off toward the Cliff Walk.

Cliff Walk.name: 悬崖行走 Cliff Walk
Cliff Walk.text:
这条之字形小径通向奥塔里墓园。它以平缓的坡度向上延伸，但在几处地方道路相当狭窄。

This switchback path leads up to the Otari Graveyard. It ascends at a gentle slope, but the path is quite narrow in several places.

Triple Temple.name: 三重神殿 Triple Temple
Triple Temple.text:
这间房间里有供奉凯登·凯连、埃拉斯蒂尔和哥兹莱的圣坛。

巨大的金色酒杯代表凯登·凯连。

手持镰刀的农夫代表埃拉斯蒂尔。

打开的金色蛤壳代表哥兹莱。

一座大理石祭坛具有这三位神祇的颜色，并且会在不同的时代为每位神祇举行服务。

这里有六张带软垫的长椅，图书馆的访客可用来阅读，或在礼拜服务期间使用。

This room contains shrines to Cayden Cailean, Erastil, and Gozreh.

The large golden stein represents Caydel Cailean.

The farmer with a sickle represents Erastil.

The open golden clamshell represents Gozreh.

A marble altar has the colors of all three deities, and services for each of the deities are conducted at various times.

There are six cushioned benches used either by patrons of the library for reading, or during worship services.

Sarenrae Temple.name: 莎伦莱神殿 Sarenrae Temple
Sarenrae Temple.text:
这座供奉莎伦莱的圣龛设有一座祭坛、一尊莎伦莱的雕像，以及两本可供研读的宗教典籍。

这里有六张带软垫的长椅，供图书馆的访客阅读使用，或用于礼拜仪式期间的服务。

This shrine to Sarenrae has an altar, a statue of Sarenrae, and two religious texts that are available for study.

There are six cushioned benches used either by patrons of the library for reading, or during worship services.

Main Chamber.name: 主厅 Main Chamber
Main Chamber.text:
图书馆的主厅被书架环绕。书架上方，彩色玻璃窗（仅以光亮术呈现）以彩色光线为室内着色。

在书架的中层有六个展示柜。它们装有玫瑰团的遗物，以及其他具有重要意义的物品。

从右上开始：

  • 一对成套弯刀，曾由创立晨花图书馆的莎伦莱牧师携带。

  • 几份历史卷轴。

  • 一把斧头、一顶头盔以及一枚圣徽（均为非魔法），曾由玫瑰团成员、埃拉斯蒂尔牧师阿塞芙娜·门赫梅斯使用。

  • 一套医疗工具、洗盆、绷带以及一本医学文本。

  • 几本宗教典籍。

  • 合作之刃，曾由玫瑰团战士沃尔·拉贾尼携带。

在书架的内层有一段楼梯通往祭司住处，它们就在彩色玻璃窗的正上方。

祭司住处以及任何地下室都不在本模组的范围内。

合作之刃

为便于盗取合作之刃，你可以使用此宏来切换展示柜内合作之刃的可见性开关。

@UUID[Macro.58vGUuYGTkp7jVe3]{切换被盗之剑可见性}

The main chamber of the library is surrounded by bookshelves. Above the bookshelves, stained glass windows (depicted as lights only) paint the interior with colored light.

Within the middle tier of bookshelves are six display cases. They contain artifacts from the Roseguard, and other items of significance.

From the top right:

  • A pair of matched scimitars once carried by the cleric of Sarenrae who founded the Dawnflower Library.

  • Several historical scrolls.

  • An axe, helmet and holy symbol (all nonmagical) once used by Asephna Menhemes of the Roseguard, cleric of Erastil.

  • A medical kit, wash basin, bandages and a medical text.

  • Several religious texts.

  • The Cooperative Blade, once carried by Vol Rajani, warrior of the Roseguard.

Within the inner tier of bookshelves is a staircase leading up to priestly quarters, which are just above the stained glass windows.

The priestly quarters, as well as any basements, are beyond the scope of this module.

The Cooperative Blade

To facilitate the theft of the Cooperative Blade, you can use this macro to turn the visibility of the Cooperative Blade within the display case on and off.

@UUID[Macro.58vGUuYGTkp7jVe3]{Toggle Stolen Sword Visibility}

Rooftop Visibility.name: 屋顶可见性 Rooftop Visibility
Rooftop Visibility.text:
此时，英雄们已经能够看过图书馆最高的屋顶。根据需要使用此宏来开启或关闭屋顶可见性：

@UUID[Macro.O5gyOagjEITFdgP1]{切换屋顶可见性}

At this point, the heroes are able to see over the tallest rooftop of the library. Use this macro to turn the roof visibility on and off, as needed:

@UUID[Macro.O5gyOagjEITFdgP1]{Toggle Roof Visibility}

Shrine of Pharasma.name: 法莱斯玛圣坛 Shrine of Pharasma
Shrine of Pharasma.text:
像这样的日晷常见于墓地中，用以纪念法莱斯玛。@UUID[Actor.R8Y8NbULhNkyoBcV]{Saamsuma} 在抵达奥塔里并与英雄们取得联系后，在此建立了他的法莱斯玛神龛。

Sundials like this can often be found in graveyards to honor Pharasma. @UUID[Actor.R8Y8NbULhNkyoBcV]{Saamsuma} establishes his shrine of Pharasma here after he arrives in Otari and makes contact with the heroes.

Introduction.name: 引言 Introduction
Introduction.text:
晨花图书馆场景中会发生两件事：

@UUID[JournalEntry.6ijY1DUgWmZLSsKv.JournalEntryPage.CbKQStmK1RRmPYqO]{遭遇：油鳞蛛的攻击}

@UUID[JournalEntry.4lMm3yR5WXljB83E]{4级支线任务 - 合作之刃}

这些日志页面的其余内容包含晨花图书馆场景中被钉住地点的描述。

该地点的一个商人演员包含在天泽的奥塔里额外内容中。

Two events take place within the Dawnflower Library scene:

@UUID[JournalEntry.6ijY1DUgWmZLSsKv.JournalEntryPage.CbKQStmK1RRmPYqO]{Encounter: Attack of the Scalathrax}

@UUID[JournalEntry.4lMm3yR5WXljB83E]{Lv. 4 Side Quest - The Cooperative Blade}

The remainder of these journal pages contain descriptions of the pinned locations in the Dawnflower Library scene.

A merchant actor for this location is included in Tianze's Otari Extras.

Secluded Clearing.name: 僻静空地 Secluded Clearing
Secluded Clearing.text:
这片空地包含一处洞穴，通往 D15 扭曲的隧道，并最终通往 D 贝科拉的避难所中的 D14 Pavillion。隧道内部本身由 AV 日志页面中的游戏主持人自行决定，不过我做了一个小改动：它不是从一处水下海蚀洞离开，而是从海岸附近这片宜人的空地离开。

特征：

  • 一条狭窄的内部通道，可在严重天气时用作庇护所

  • 数道山脊，最高点达 10'

  • 一处淡水池塘：由一条小溪形成，小溪先从 14' 的瀑布落下，再汇成一小片水潭。水流在水潭中旋转，然后流入一个狭窄的落水洞。

    • 瀑布附近的区域足够安全，可用于洗浴；在靠近瀑布的较暗区域，水深约 12 英尺。

    • 落水洞中有危险的暗流，可能把任何不擅长游泳的人卷入洞中。洞口深度为 18 英尺，但水流会通向更深的区域。

      • 洞口上方近水面处的水域是安全的。

      • 若潜入以更仔细地调查洞口，英雄应进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.c8TGiZ48ygoSPofx]{游泳}检定，以能够逃脱暗流：

        • 深度 10 - 15 ' @Check[type:athletics|dc:12]{运动}

        • 深度 16 - 18 ' @Check[type:athletics|dc:17]{运动}

        • 河道内部通道 @Check[type:athletics|dc:22]{运动}

      • 一旦进入通道，与其让鲁莽到敢闯入通道的英雄必死无疑，暗流会把英雄猛地摔到一处岩脊上。该岩脊位于一处狭窄凹 pocket 下方，那里有令人惊讶的新鲜空气，是一个相当安全的地方，英雄可以在此等待队伍其余成员实施救援。

      • 因为幸运眷顾勇者，英雄会发现一位较早潜水者的骸骨遗骸；那名潜水者不幸在岩脊上饿死。

      • @UUID[Actor.WzkjgHRq7UjeSBnY]{落水洞遗骸}

      • 如果英雄选择继续游下去，暗流最终会把浸透的英雄冲到海里。途中应有需要英雄屏住呼吸的情形，但这段旅程应当是可以生还的。

This clearing includes a cave that leads to D15 Twisting Tunnel, and eventually to D14 Pavillion, in D Belcorra's Retreat. The interior of the tunnels itself is left up to the gamemaster in the AV journal pages, but I made the slight change: Rather than exiting at an underwater sea cave, it exits at this lovely clearing near the coast.

Features:

  • A cramped interior passage that could serve as shelter in severe weather

  • Several ridges that are 10' high at the highest points

  • A freshwater pond formed by a small creek that falls down a 14' waterfall before forming a small pool. The waters swirl around the pool before draining into a narrow sinkhole.

    • The waterfall area is safe enough to bathe in, and gets about twelve feet deep in the darker area near the waterfall.

    • The sinkhole has dangerous currents that could pull in anyone who is not a strong swimmer. The hole is at a depth of 18 feet, but flows into deeper areas.

      • The waters near the surface above the hole are safe.

      • If diving to more closely investigate the hole, the hero should make @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.c8TGiZ48ygoSPofx]{Swim} check to be able escape the current:

        • Depth of 10 - 15 ' @Check[type:athletics|dc:12]{Athletics}

        • Depth of 16 - 18 ' @Check[type:athletics|dc:17]{Athletics}

        • Inside river passage @Check[type:athletics|dc:22]{Athletics}

      • Once within the passage, rather than doom the hero who was foolhardy enough to brave the passage, the current dashes the hero up against a ledge. The ledge is under a cramped pocket of surprisingly fresh air, and is a reasonably safe place to stay while the rest of the party affects a rescue.

      • Because fortune favors the bold, the hero finds the skeletal remains of an earlier diver who unfortunately starved to death on the ledge.

      • @UUID[Actor.WzkjgHRq7UjeSBnY]{Sinkhole Remains}

      • If the hero chooses to swim on, the current will eventually wash the waterlogged hero out to sea. There should be instances where the hero must hold his or her breath, but the journey should be survivable.

Lv. 9 Hunting Grounds and Urdefhan Camp.name: 9级 狩猎场与透肌魔人营地 Lv. 9 Hunting Grounds and Urdefhan Camp

Urdefhan Camp.name: 透肌魔人营地 Urdefhan Camp
Urdefhan Camp.text:
这里只有几处改动：

  • 改进帐篷周围墙体的摆放，并添加音效。

  • 将翡翠支点镜片治疗效果添加到库尔费的标记上。

一旦清理完这个区域，长角巨龙就会离开它那狭小的巢穴并搬到这里。

There are only a few changes here:

  • Improve the placement of the walls around the tents, and the addition of sounds.

  • Add the Emerald Fulcrum Lens healing effect to Khurfel's token.

Once this area is cleared out, the horned dragon will move out of its tiny lair and move in here.

Overview.name: 概述 Overview
Overview.text:
我在这里做出的唯一重大剧情改动，是将原本的 OGL 龙替换为 @UUID[.RVC7MbvlfltOxYCj]{重制版河龙}。

除此之外，唯一的改动是添加指示物、加入大量环境音效，并调整墙体。

玫瑰团幽灵（特征）不在这一等级，因为这里的生物并未试图向上移动，而且除了通过宁布洛斯之门之外没有向下的路。

在此时，为了准备最终与贝科拉的战斗，请查阅 @UUID[JournalEntry.zRsCI6WErFnSNEqN.JournalEntryPage.U8sC2KOCcj1ZUgrI]{贝科拉战斗 - 布置}，因为它会在英雄抵达神殿等级之前推动一些事情发生。

The only major story change I made here is to exchange the original OGL dragon for a @UUID[.RVC7MbvlfltOxYCj]{remastered river dragon}.

Other than that, the only changes are to add tokens, add plenty of ambient sounds, and to adjust walls.

The Roseguard Ghosts are not on this level, as the creatures here are not trying to move up, and there is no way down except through the Gate of Nhimbaloth.

At this time, in order to be prepared for the eventual battle with Belcorra, please review @UUID[JournalEntry.zRsCI6WErFnSNEqN.JournalEntryPage.U8sC2KOCcj1ZUgrI]{Belcorra Battle - Setup}, since it sets some things in motion before the heroes reach the Temple level.

I32 Southern Jumble.name: I32 南部荒野 I32 Southern Jumble
I32 Southern Jumble.text:
AV 日志页中提到的两株割颅尘菌不在地图上。我已将它们放置在附近的蘑菇丛中，离地 30'，处于未激活状态。

由于我在跑团过程中完全错过了这条日志条目，我把 AV 日志条目（以及这一条）移到了一个贫瘠的区域，在那里它不会与背景杂物混在一起。

The two Reaper Skull Puffballs mentioned in the AV journal pages were not on the map. I have placed them in nearby mushroom patches, 30' up, in an inactive state.

Since I completely missed this journal entry on my playthrough, I moved the AV journal entry (and this one) to a barren area, where it does not blend in with the background clutter.

I22 - I26 - Hunting Lodge.name: I22 - I26 - 狩猎小屋 I22 - I26 - Hunting Lodge
I22 - I26 - Hunting Lodge.text:
在这里，英雄们可以继续他们的任务，说服卡利格尼离开该区域。

依我看，这不应该很困难。卡利格尼被仆役邪魔和透肌魔人夹在中间，我看不出他们有什么理由不想离开。尤其是在奥布和杜拉克已经达成一致的情况下。

该剧本提到了通往南方和东方的通道，这当然仍然有用，但通过伊尔达里斯贸易站的道路也可能对他们开放。不过，那将需要与洞窟精灵进行额外的谈判。

一个藏身处

狩猎小屋会成为你英雄们的绝佳基地。

火坑没有对应的烟囱，但屋顶上有几个洞可以让烟雾逸出。

南边房间的凸窗被污垢覆盖；如果你的英雄们以某种方式把它们清理干净，你可以把它们改造成近距窗。

屋顶许可

由于屋顶上有大量洞口，以及 I27 处的梯子靠近屋顶，我的英雄们经常使用屋顶，从不费心去移除前门上的符文。

因此，我觉得安装 Wall Heights 模组很方便，以避免当我的英雄与地面附近的生物爆发战斗时出现墙体问题。只要把每个英雄的高度设为与屋顶相同，就能来一场惊险刺激的屋顶战斗。

我的河龙也第一次登场：它在屋顶上打盹，同时等待与英雄们首次会谈的机会。

因此，为了在该区域更便于游玩，我强烈推荐 Wall Heights 模组。

Here, the heroes can continue their quest to convince the caligni to leave the area.

In my opinion, this should not be difficult. The caligni are hemmed in by the Ceustodaemons and the urdefhan, and I see no reason why they would not want to depart. Especially if the olb and Dulac is already in agreement.

The scenario mentions the passages to the south and to the east, which is certainly still useful, but also the way through the Yldaris Trading Post could be open for them. However, that would require additional negotation with the cavern elves.

A Hideout

The hunting lodge would make a great base for your heroes.

The firepit does not have a corresponding chimney, but there are several holes in the roof allowing smoke to escape.

The bay window in the southern room is covered by grime, if your heroes somehow clear them, you could convert them to proximity windows.

Rooftop Access

Due to the abundant holes in the rooftop, and the proximity of the ladder at I27 to the roof, my heroes made frequent use of the roof and never bothered to remove the rune from the front door.

Therefore, I found it expedient to install the Wall Heights module, to avoid wall issues when combat broke out combat between my heroes and the nearby creatures on the ground. Just set each hero's height to the same as the roof for some thrilling rooftop combat.

My river dragon also made his first appearance by taking a slumber on the roof while awaiting a chance for a first parlay with the heroes.

Therefore, for ease of play in this area, I strongly recommend the Wall Heights module.

I51 Ravirex's Fen.name: I51 拉维雷克斯的沼泽 I51 Ravirex's Fen
I51 Ravirex's Fen.text:
为了打乱我的英雄们——他们对老派龙类实在太过熟悉——并且为了走在重制版改动之前，我把拉维雷克斯替换成了重制版图鉴里的角龙。

当我翻看重制版的龙类，想找一个合适的黑龙替代者时，我选择了角龙，因为它看起来有点像自然爱好者，拥有许多也属于德鲁伊（纠缠植物法术）和游侠（林地穿行与无踪旅程）的能力。

描述里说角龙富于沉思，并且比其他龙更愿意与外来者说话，所以这是个很自然的选择。

在我看来，不可能真正与龙成为朋友，因为它们以孤独著称的生物；但与你们目标一致的龙合作当然是可能的。英雄们想要能够穿过狩猎场，而这条龙在清除该区域里一些更为行踪飘忽的异怪时遇到了一些困难。

此外，他也不反对把洞窟中贝科拉的影响彻底根除的想法。

@UUID[JournalEntry.xjnPxrNNcRBWVegm]{Lv. 9 支线任务 - 一条善于交易的龙}

In order to shake up my heroes, who were entirely too familiar with old-school dragons, and to stay ahead of remaster changes, I replaced Ravirex with a Horned Dragon from the remastered bestiary.

When I looked through the remastered dragons to find a likely replacement for the black dragon, I chose the horned dragon because it appeared to be something of a nature lover, with many abilities that also belong to druids (the Entangling Flora spell) and rangers (Forest Passage and Trackless Journey).

The description says that horned dragons are contemplative and more open to speaking with outsiders than other dragons, so this was a natural choice.

In my mind, it would be impossible to truly befriend a dragon, as they are famously solitary creatures, but it certainly would be possible to work with a dragon with whom you have a shared goal. The heroes want to be able to pass through the Hunting Grounds, and the dragon has had some difficulty doing away with some of the more elusive abberations in the area.

Plus, he is not against the idea of ridding the caverns of Belcorra's influence for good.

@UUID[JournalEntry.xjnPxrNNcRBWVegm]{Lv. 9 Side Quest - A Deal-Making Dragon}

I29 Boathouse.name: I29 船屋 I29 Boathouse
I29 Boathouse.text:
我在这里添加了一艘船，以防你的英雄想把它带到湖上。它的高度是 8 英尺，因为它卡在一个架子上。

该场景中没有对应的船只图块。

I added a boat here, in case your heroes want to take it onto the lake. Its elevation is 8 feet, since it is stuck in a rack.

There is no corresponding boat tile on the scene.

Ochre Fulcrum Lens.name: 赭石支点镜片 Ochre Fulcrum Lens
Ochre Fulcrum Lens.text:
此区域中的赭石支点镜片已被移动到拉维雷克斯的宝藏中，由这条有角的巨龙放置在那里。

The Ochre Fulcrum Lens from this area has been moved to Ravirex's hoard, where the horned dragon placed it.

The Town of Otari.name: 奥塔里镇 The Town of Otari

Changes to the Town.name: 城镇的变化 Changes to the Town
Changes to the Town.text:
本日志用作索引，汇总本模组为奥塔里镇引入的所有变更。

场景

  • 城内或城外附近

    • @UUID[JournalEntry.hAAwqEULqXjnDBsG]{晨花图书馆}

    • @UUID[JournalEntry.Dph2dSqTxmiFXOhN]{喧闹石斑鱼}

    • @UUID[JournalEntry.pLITZ6LfSboIsKQ7]{隐蔽的林间空地}

    • @UUID[JournalEntry.18XyXWeRQdjcao7Y]{沙伊坦集市}

角色

  • @UUID[Actor.kxxfNHMNvQxLP1ej]{Raydolph} - 在获救之后，他最终把大部分时间都花在沃利温的营地里

  • @UUID[Actor.HSS3SDYGivu9WqNk]{鸡窝头} - 英雄们与他遭遇后，他会游荡到奥塔里，并在多户人家暂住，同时试着决定要在哪里定居。棕仙喜欢家庭，这将引导他做出最终决定。

  • @UUID[Actor.W6Dtj8S1nZA7HVUX]{艾娜拉·门赫姆斯} - 奥瑟夫的妻子。

  • @UUID[Actor.W5HjwjHOiEYYgLKz]{Natanya Rajani} - 卡曼那被诅咒的母亲。

  • @UUID[Actor.R8Y8NbULhNkyoBcV]{Saamsuma} - 法莱斯玛的牧师，被派来教英雄们如何猎杀幽灵（特征）。

  • @UUID[Actor.2UyWMBmnhxmt3eqT]{Stewt} - 凄凉灯塔最有可能的第二名受害者。

  • @UUID[Actor.i8RYtQXoYU02IwJo]{Ustin Menhemes} - 奥瑟夫的弟弟，负责照看家族生意。

  • NooDupAgNee 帮

    • @UUID[Actor.In7uOjnyLaQ717NC]{DudNoo} 和 @UUID[Actor.Sp1IdnLnxDrVYsrw]{DudNoo}

    • @UUID[Actor.8KGriUJQii41jbiz]{KraDup} 和 @UUID[Actor.Aeuws6jKtVMT1cyb]{KraDup Ghoul}

    • @UUID[Actor.Le61tqNELdk0MVYs]{NoxAg} 和 @UUID[Actor.PirOzls2fnKFsohC]{NoxAg Drider}

    • @UUID[Actor.XwZejRLuuT21Qxj9]{PipNee} 和 @UUID[Actor.12G2R36cFMxLRV9Z]{PipNee Dreshkan}

物品

  • @UUID[Item.by0qBWihePe4Eosp]{成瘾} - 苦难细节

  • @UUID[Item.6QvLtYkqS4cebsRA]{拉贾尼血脉诅咒}

  • @UUID[Item.3IinViTYOQK3oTRL]{合作之刃}（重构版）

  • @UUID[Item.Dm1wNl3bTUdzxZmS]{真理的门槛}（重构版）

  • @UUID[Item.xc9zPduYw0VfjeAw]{猎人胸针}（原版）

  • @UUID[Item.Mg7wK84qPHvHIRvA]{幽灵（特征）猎人法典}

任务与活动

这些任务与剧情线至少有一部分发生在奥塔里，并且要么是本模组新增内容，要么是我做了重大改动。

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.UPCJOXs6P7caGN4c]{注定覆灭的地精帮}

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.6ijY1DUgWmZLSsKv.JournalEntryPage.4aFn8mCulB3p6fF4]{奥塔里的尸潮}

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.6ijY1DUgWmZLSsKv.JournalEntryPage.CbKQStmK1RRmPYqO]{油鳞蛛的攻击}

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.6TLGspYpzZ5QbHQZ.JournalEntryPage.g9gzk11WY6otSrUs]{学习成为幽灵（特征）猎人}（Saamsuma）

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.g4Rx11TDnvw14ICf.JournalEntryPage.vLb8cCM3Xz9OE5Ob]{猎杀狼化人}（Keeleno）

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.4lMm3yR5WXljB83E.JournalEntryPage.QPwAgukw5fHEzTio]{合作之刃的盗窃}（Vandy）

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.RXiYnHUvOFNIaQ4d.JournalEntryPage.pIoH8bjKjVn5zabz]{取回遗珍}（奥塔里）

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.eSE7b49WlpcT8KGc.JournalEntryPage.mWFmaPmRtwTg7Epl]{拉斯达的镇民大会}

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.dHfrhlefwZxcjRj1.JournalEntryPage.mbcegTU3VKg52nbl]{G14 被囚禁的赏金猎人}

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.GPXU0ZLTdoTKQPui]{拉贾尼血脉诅咒}

This journal serves as an index to all the changes to the town of Otari introduced by this module.

Scenes

  • In or Near Town

    • @UUID[JournalEntry.hAAwqEULqXjnDBsG]{Dawnflower Library}

    • @UUID[JournalEntry.Dph2dSqTxmiFXOhN]{The Rowdy Rockfish}

    • @UUID[JournalEntry.pLITZ6LfSboIsKQ7]{Secluded Clearing}

    • @UUID[JournalEntry.18XyXWeRQdjcao7Y]{Shaitan's Bazaar}

Actors

  • @UUID[Actor.kxxfNHMNvQxLP1ej]{Raydolph} - after his rescue, he eventually spends most of his time at Worliwinn's camp

  • @UUID[Actor.HSS3SDYGivu9WqNk]{Tangletop} - After the heroes encounter him, he wanders to Otari where he stays in a number of households while trying to decide where to live. Brownies like families and this will guide his final decision.

  • @UUID[Actor.W6Dtj8S1nZA7HVUX]{Emnala Menhemes} - Oseph's wife.

  • @UUID[Actor.W5HjwjHOiEYYgLKz]{Natanya Rajani} - Carman's cursed mother.

  • @UUID[Actor.R8Y8NbULhNkyoBcV]{Saamsuma} - cleric of Pharasma, sent to teach ghosthunting to the heroes.

  • @UUID[Actor.2UyWMBmnhxmt3eqT]{Stewt} - Gauntlight's most likely second victim.

  • @UUID[Actor.i8RYtQXoYU02IwJo]{Ustin Menhemes} - Oseph's younger brother, who looks after the family business.

  • NooDupAgNee Gang

    • @UUID[Actor.In7uOjnyLaQ717NC]{DudNoo} and @UUID[Actor.Sp1IdnLnxDrVYsrw]{DudNoo}

    • @UUID[Actor.8KGriUJQii41jbiz]{KraDup} and @UUID[Actor.Aeuws6jKtVMT1cyb]{KraDup Ghoul}

    • @UUID[Actor.Le61tqNELdk0MVYs]{NoxAg} and @UUID[Actor.PirOzls2fnKFsohC]{NoxAg Drider}

    • @UUID[Actor.XwZejRLuuT21Qxj9]{PipNee} and @UUID[Actor.12G2R36cFMxLRV9Z]{PipNee Dreshkan}

Items

  • @UUID[Item.by0qBWihePe4Eosp]{Addiction} - Affliction details

  • @UUID[Item.6QvLtYkqS4cebsRA]{Rajani Bloodline Curse}

  • @UUID[Item.3IinViTYOQK3oTRL]{The Cooperative Blade} (reimagined)

  • @UUID[Item.Dm1wNl3bTUdzxZmS]{Thresholds of Truth} (reimagined)

  • @UUID[Item.xc9zPduYw0VfjeAw]{Hunter's Brooch} (original)

  • @UUID[Item.Mg7wK84qPHvHIRvA]{Ghost Hunter's Codex}

Quests and Activities

Thes quests and storylines at least partially take place in Otari, and either are new to this module, or I made significant changes.

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.UPCJOXs6P7caGN4c]{Doomed Goblin Gang}

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.6ijY1DUgWmZLSsKv.JournalEntryPage.4aFn8mCulB3p6fF4]{Deadtide for Otari}

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.6ijY1DUgWmZLSsKv.JournalEntryPage.CbKQStmK1RRmPYqO]{Attack of the Scalathrax}

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.6TLGspYpzZ5QbHQZ.JournalEntryPage.g9gzk11WY6otSrUs]{Learn to be a Ghost Hunter} (Saamsuma)

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.g4Rx11TDnvw14ICf.JournalEntryPage.vLb8cCM3Xz9OE5Ob]{Kill Werewolf} (Keeleno)

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.4lMm3yR5WXljB83E.JournalEntryPage.QPwAgukw5fHEzTio]{Theft of the Cooperative Blade} (Vandy)

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.RXiYnHUvOFNIaQ4d.JournalEntryPage.pIoH8bjKjVn5zabz]{Retrieve Icons} (Otari)

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.eSE7b49WlpcT8KGc.JournalEntryPage.mWFmaPmRtwTg7Epl]{Lasda's Town Meeting}

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.dHfrhlefwZxcjRj1.JournalEntryPage.mbcegTU3VKg52nbl]{G14 Imprisoned Bounty Hunter}

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.GPXU0ZLTdoTKQPui]{Rajani Bloodline Curse}

Lv. 09 Yldaris.name: Lv. 09 伊尔达里斯 Lv. 09 Yldaris

I04. Secret Passage.name: I04. 秘密通道 I04. Secret Passage
I04. Secret Passage.text:
这条通道的彩虹色墙壁似乎是天然形成的——由细致的彩色光亮术纹理构成，彼此交融。这里的精灵进一步强化了这种效果，他们精巧地雕刻这些光线丝缕，使其化为奇幻的抽象图案，随着通道墙壁的起伏而流动。

通往伊尔达里斯的通道使用了与“Farm with Extras”等级中相同的彩虹色照明。

在通往秘密隧道的隐藏岩门对面也有同样的彩虹色光晕，作为一种模糊的提示，指引在对面墙上哪里能找到那扇门。

我还加入了同样的异界音乐——也出现在 I20 冥想洞穴中——以增强氛围。

The iridescent walls of this passage appear to be natural in origin - delicate traceries of colored light that merge into each other. The elves here have enhanced the effect by delicately carving the threads of light into fantastical abstract designs that ebb and flow with the passage walls.

The passage to Yldaris has been illumated with the same iridescent lighting as was found in the Farm with Extras level.

The same iridescance is opposite the hidden rock door to the secret tunnel, as a vague hint regarding where to find the door on the opposite wall.

I also added the same otherworldly music that also appears in I20 Meditation Cave, to increase the ambiance.

I03 Yldaris Trading Post.name: I03 伊尔达里斯贸易站 I03 Yldaris Trading Post
I03 Yldaris Trading Post.text:
伊尔达里斯被描述为一座城镇，但它甚至连一个商人都没有。

因此，我把 I03 马厩中的一个摊位改造成了通用商人。

这家店通常会补充来自幽暗地域的商品，因此他们会对任何在幽暗地域通常找不到的物品感兴趣，比如由真正的地表木材制成的东西、珍珠等材料、棉花和羊毛、草药和香料、皮革、角，以及源自地表生物的毒素——可能性无穷无尽。

同样地，只要这些物品在设定上可能源自幽暗地域，这家店的库存应当比一般杂货店包含更多“不寻常”和“稀有”的物品。此外，它还提供最高到 12 等级的物品。

法尔克西返回并康复后，他开始担任店主。因此，他的指示物在该区域内。

Yldaris is described as a town, but it lacks even one trader.

Therefore, I transformed one of the stalls in I03 Stable into a general-purpose trader.

This shop is generally restocked with merchandise from the Darklands, so they would be interested in any items not usually found in the Darklands, such as those made from genuine surface wood, materials like pearls, cotton and wool, herbs and spices, leathers, horns and poisons derived from surface creatures — the possibilities are limitless.

Likewise, the store should be stocked with more Unusual and Rare items than the usual general store, as long as they could have conceivably originated in the Darklands. Also, it has items through level 12.

After Falxi returns and recovers, he starts to serve as the proprietor. Therefore, his token is in this area.

Introduction.name: 介绍 Introduction
Introduction.text:
这个等级只有少数改动。

  • 我将 @UUID[.0z0cU9Ar4bQHOTzS]{I03 伊尔达里斯贸易站} 加入到了马厩区域。

  • 我在 @UUID[.0lB9gy2KE3dywLcM]{I04. 秘密通道} 中加入了更多虹彩照明。

  • 我调整了 @UUID[.Ww64ifw5Ss4FI0rT]{I20 冥想洞穴} 的照明。

  • 我对 @UUID[.yPMmE1qa5s1fflhO]{I31. 贫瘠之地} 做了一些遭遇改动，并添加了一些洞窟墙壁以缩窄出口通道。

关于重制版改动的说明

《Pathfinder》游戏系统正在用艾因迪拉尔（Ayindilar），即洞窟精灵，来替换幽暗地域的原住民。我假设这些改动最终也会渗透到憎恨魔窟中。在此期间，我已开始以“洞窟精灵”来称呼他们，并尝试在这些日志中贯穿这一改动。在憎恨魔窟中被替换之前，Actor 将保留原始名称。

There are only a few changes to this level.

  • I added the @UUID[.0z0cU9Ar4bQHOTzS]{I03 Yldaris Trading Post} to the stable area.

  • I added more of the iridescent lighting to the @UUID[.0lB9gy2KE3dywLcM]{I04. Secret Passage}.

  • I tweaked the lighting in the @UUID[.Ww64ifw5Ss4FI0rT]{I20 Meditation Cave}.

  • I made some encounter changes to @UUID[.yPMmE1qa5s1fflhO]{I31. The Barrens}, and added some cavern walls to narrow the exit passage.

A Note on the Remaster Changes

The Pathfinder game system is replacing the original inhabitants of the Darklands with Ayindilar, or cavern elves. I am assuming those changes will eventually perculate to Abomination Vaults. In the meantime, I have begun to refer to them as cavern elves, and have attempted to make this change througout these journals. Actors will retain the original names until replaced in Abomination Vaults.

I20 Meditation Cave.name: I20 冥想洞穴 I20 Meditation Cave
I20 Meditation Cave.text:
我在这里调整了光照，让幽灵般的光亮术移动得更慢得多，并将水晶的光照效果替换为星光。我只是觉得更微妙的效果会更具冥想感。

I tweaked the lighting here to make the ghostly light move much more slowly and to replace the crystal lighting effect to Starlight. I just thought a more subtle effect would be more medatative.

I31. The Barrens.name: I31. 贫瘠之地 I31. The Barrens
I31. The Barrens.text:
此处的改动是为了配合 Lv. 09 狩猎场中的一些改动。我添加了照明效果和额外的洞窟墙壁，使通道变得狭窄。

通道改动的原因在于 I51 拉维雷克斯之沼：我将原本的黑龙替换为一条中立的有角龙。理想情况下，英雄们会听从精灵的警告，在与有角龙交谈之前一直贴近北侧墙壁前进。

邪魔之雾

我为雾添加了照明效果，并在其后的通道添加了一扇以太门，因为能见度按设定应在 30 英尺处终止。

在异虫邪魔被击败之前，这片雾将会持续。

使用此宏来清除雾，并恢复通往后方通道的能见度。

@UUID[Macro.RrBgsxcAd7CAnmjY]{Clear 邪魔之雾}

Changes here support some changes in Lv. 09 Hunting Grounds. I added lighting effects and additional cavern walls to make the passage narrow.

The reason for the passage changes is in I51 Ravirex's Fen, where I replaced the original black dragon with a neutral horned dragon. Ideally, the heroes will heed the elves's warning and stay close to the northern wall until they have spoken to the horned dragon.

Daemonic Fog

I added lighting effects to the fog, and I added an etherial door to the passage beyond, because visibility is supposed to end at 30 feet.

Until the Derghodaemon is defeated, the fog will persist.

Use this macro to clear the fog and visibility to the passage beyond.

@UUID[Macro.RrBgsxcAd7CAnmjY]{Clear Daemonic Fog}

Shadow Malice's Last Show.name: 幽影恶意的最后演出 Shadow Malice's Last Show
Shadow Malice's Last Show.text:
在我自己的跑团中，Shadow Malace乐队成员一直待在第4等级，直到通往伊尔达里斯的道路畅通为止。

之后，我的英雄们安排他们穿过前往幽暗地域。

我在伊尔达里斯贸易站（又名 I03 马厩）后方加了几盏未启用的光亮术和壁灯，这样他们就能进行最后一场演出。

在他们离开之前，其中一名成员古尔扎什会提出用他的战斗鲁特琴与一名英雄交换一把符文刻得不错的刀刃。

In my own playthrough, the Shadow Malace band members hung out on the 4th level until the way to Yldaris was clear.

Then, my heroes arranged for them to pass through to the Darklands.

I added a couple of inactive lights and sconces to the back of the Yldaris Trading Post (aka I03 Stable) so they can have one last show.

Before the leave, one of the members, Gulzash, will offer to trade his Battle Lute to one of the heroes in exchange for a decently runed blade.

Lv. 9 Side Quest - A Deal-Making Dragon.name: 9级支线任务——善于交易的巨龙 Lv. 9 Side Quest - A Deal-Making Dragon

First Impression.name: 第一印象 First Impression
First Impression.text:
当英雄们首次探索他巢穴外的区域时，或在他们击败所有围攻狩猎小屋的恶魔之后，巨龙就会现身。

在我自己的游戏里，我让巨龙以一种方式登场：他躺在狩猎小屋的屋顶上打盹，直到英雄们出现。

无论他在哪里与他们遭遇，他都会从打盹中抬起头，打量英雄们，然后说道：

问候。

他会停顿一下，观察英雄们如何反应，以及他们是否会回以问候。

我明白，我的存在往往会让像你们这样的类人感到魔法警报；但我相信，鉴于你们所完成的一切，你们不会对与一条巨龙会谈这件事过于魔法警报吧，嗯？

如果他们问他为何会在这里，他会讲述这个简短的故事：

我来这里没多久。我听说这里有许多挑战，包括一条巨龙。由于我一直在为自己寻找一处狩猎场，我便前来查看这片区域。那条巨龙立刻向我发起挑战；虽然它打得不错，但终究挡不住我的角，诸如此类。我要把它的尸体推入湖中，让那里的畸变体去吞食，而我接手了它那寒酸的宝藏。

那处巢穴不可接受，因为我不会把时间浪费在泥里打滚。我正在寻找另一处更合适的。

在某个时候，玩家很可能会想知道巨龙想要什么。

你们可以为我做些事。事实上，是好几件事。而我有你们需要的东西——一枚独一无二的透镜，对贝科拉非常有价值。若它对她有价值，那么对你们也必然同样有价值。

我提议进行一系列交易——你们的服务以换取那枚透镜，以及我宝藏中若干其他精选物品，你们会发现它们很有用。

你们会发现我所要求的并非不光彩之事；而且也许这些本就是你们无论如何都得去完成的任务。但我更希望你们按我的方式来做，因此，我将给出的报酬是值得的。

随后他会等待，看看他们是否愿意听取他的提议。若他们愿意，继续进行到 @UUID[.26VLQ8gEu18pv2Mk]{巨龙的交易}。

The dragon will come out when the heroes first explore the area outside his lair, or after they have defeated all the daemons that are besieging the hunting lodge.

In my own game, I had the dragon make his appearance by taking a nap on the roof of the hunting lodge until the heroes showed up.

Wherever he encounters them, he will lift his head from a nap, study the heroes, and say:

Greetings.

He will pause to see how the heroes react, and if they return his greeting.

I realize that my very presance tends to alarm humanoids such as yourselves, but I trust, giving all you have accomplished, you will not be too alarmed at a parley with a dragon, hmm?

If they ask him how he came to be here, he will offer this brief story:

I have only been here a short while. I heard that there were many challenges here, including a dragon. Since I have been in search of a hunting ground for myself, I came to look over the area. The dragon immediately challenged me, and although it gave a good fight, it could not withstand my horn, among other things. I shoved its carcass into the lake for the abberations there to devour, and I took over its paltry hoard.

It is an unacceptable lair since I do not spend my time wallowing in mud. I am looking for another that is more suitable.

At some point, the players will probably wonder what the dragon wants.

There is something you can do for me. Several somethings, in fact. And I have something you need, a certain unique lens, which is very valuable to Belcorra. If it is valuable to her, then it must be valuable to you as well.

I propose a series of trades — your services in excahnge the lens, and certain other choice items from my hoard, which you will find useful.

You will not find the things I ask for to be dishonorable, and perhaps they are tasks that you would have to undertake anyway. But I would prefer that you undertake these tasks my way, and therefore, it is worth the payment I will offer.

He will then wait to see if they wish to listen to his offer. If they do, proceed to @UUID[.26VLQ8gEu18pv2Mk]{The Dragon's Deals}.

The Dragon's Deals.name: 巨龙的交易 The Dragon's Deals
The Dragon's Deals.text:
巨龙心中有几项交易。

  • 为了证明他是在提出真诚的提议，他将提供关于该区域内另外两处类人生物建筑的信息：

    • “洞窟的岩壁上嵌着一处建筑，有一道狭窄的岩沿和一扇门，俯瞰着湖面。我从未见过有任何东西进出那里。”

    • “有一座桥从一条狭窄的通道通往一座小岛；岛上有一只翻滚的异怪污染了看起来曾经是一座花园的地方。那条狭窄通道的尽头肯定还有某种你们这类人会感兴趣的建筑。”

  • 以赭石支点镜片作为交换，巨龙要求英雄们消灭贫瘠之地中的恶魔。

    • “如果它传送走了，你们能沿着狭窄的隧道追击它，而我不行。沿隧道前进，直到它变窄成一条蜿蜒的通道，然后在那一点之后杀了它。”

  • 以载他们飞越湖面、往返那处带狭窄岩沿的建筑作为交换，他希望削减湖中致命鱼类的数量，同时观察它们在陆地上的战斗方式。他会把那些生物引到岸边，由英雄们与之战斗。

    • “我认为任何划船探险都会危险得令人毛骨悚然。它会掀翻任何驶上湖面的船，并会在撤回湖底、慢慢消化你们之前，尽可能吞下你们中的更多人。”

  • 他会讲述自己对该区域内生物的观察，并愿意以他宝藏中的钱币换取关于任何其他生物的信息。

    • “如果它明显不自然，而你们又想处理掉它，请尽管去做，但我会为详细的观察记录付钱。”

    • “如果它是某种野兽或其他自然生物，若你们能在让它活着的情况下撤退，我愿意从我的宝藏中给你们钱币。我明白如果你们必须杀了它，但我会感到失望。”

  • 最后，如果他们杀死那个一直躲着他、令他无可奈何的高基特斯，他会从宝藏中挑选一件物品作为报酬：一把带有“强效重击符文”的骨朵。

The dragon has several trades in mind.

  • To prove he is making an honest offer, he will offer information on the two other humanoid structures in the area:

    • "There is a structure built into the cavern, with a narrow ledge and doorway overlooking the lake. I never never see anything come or go from it."

    • "There is a bridge leading from a narrow passage to an island where a wallowing aberration had corrupted what appeared to be once a garden. Surely there is some kind of structure beyond the narrow passage that is of interest to your kind."

  • In exchange for the Ochre Fulcrum Lens, the dragon asks the heroes to eliminate the demon in the Barrens.

    • "If it teleports away, you will be able to pursue it down the narrow tunnel, whereas I am not. Just proceed down the tunnel until it narrows to a twisting passage, and then kill it behind that point."

  • In exchange for a flight over the lake to and from the structure with the narrow ledge, he wishes to cull the numbers of the deadly fish in the lake, and at the same time, to observe how they fight on land. He will lure the creatures to the shoreline, where the heroes will fight them.

    • "I think any boating expedition would be horrifically dangerous. It would capsize any boat that ventures onto the lake, and would try to swallow as many of you as it could before retreating to the bottom of the lake to slowly digest you."

  • He will tell of his observances of the creatures in the area, and will offer coin from his hoard in exchange for information on any other creature.

    • "It it is obviously unnatural, and you wish to dispatch it, please feel free to do so, but I will pay coin for detailed observances."

    • "If it is some sort of beast or other natural creature, I would offer you coin from my hoard if you are able to retreat while leaving it alive. I understand if you must kill it, but I will be disappointed."

  • Finally, he will a choice item from his hoard if they kill the gogiteth that is eluding him: a mace with a "greater striking rune."

After the Deals.name: 交易之后 After the Deals
After the Deals.text:
一旦他们完成了他交给他们的工作，这条龙就会接管乌德芬洞窟，并把他的宝藏搬到那里。他会愉快地把洞窟里所有无人认领的物品都加入自己的宝藏。他会用瓦砾封堵除主通道之外的所有通路。

在他们击败贝科拉并且凄凉灯塔坍塌之前，他不会再骚扰或接近这些英雄。他会在他们从通往乌木之门的区域出来时，在洞窟外等着他们。

通向上方的那根巨大立柱里传来一阵轰隆声。它的墙壁上出现了裂缝，我感觉它已经失去了全部魔法。你们下去过；告诉我发生了什么。

如果他们告诉他贝科拉已死，他会赞许地点头。

她消失了很好。这是一项伟业。既然你们已将她击败，你们打算占据这个洞窟吗？

这条龙正在为一场战斗做准备，他不确定自己是否能活下来。英雄们应当能清楚地看出：如有必要，这条龙会为洞窟而战。

如果他们否定回答，他会说：

那我就来占据它。你们可以随意出入，但未经邀请不要进入我的私人洞窟。若你们这类人有兴趣，我可能偶尔还会有更多工作交给你们。

如果他们肯定回答，他会说：

我不会不战而放弃这个洞窟。准备战斗。

开始战斗。龙希望能趁他们虚弱时逮住他们。如果他们想撤退回乌木之门前的区域，他会尽可能追赶，并用他的毒息充满该区域。

不过，他们撤退应当并不太困难，并可以在自己全盛状态时再来对付他。

后续造访

他们下一次深入洞窟时，会在凄凉灯塔的塔顶附近看到一个巨大的破洞，而下方墙壁上出现了更多裂缝。

这条龙现在有了一条竖井，可用来飞到外面的世界。

Once they have completed the work he has for them, the dragon will take over the urdefen cavern and move his hoard there. He happily adds all unclaimed items from the cavern to his hoard. He will use rubble to block off all passages except the main one.

He will not molest or approach the heroes again until after they have defeated Belcorra and Gauntlight has collapsed. He will be waiting for them outside the cavern when they emerge from the area leading to the Ebon Doors.

There was a rumble within the immense column that leads upward. Cracks have appeared in its walls, and I sense it has lost all of its magic. You were down there; tell me what happened.

If they tell him of Belcorra's death, he will nod in approval.

It is good that she is gone. This was a mighty deed. Do you intend to claim this cavern, now that you have vanquished her?

The dragon is bracing himself for a battle, and he is not sure he will survive. It should be clear to the heroes that the dragon will fight for the cavern, if necessary.

If they answer in the negative, he will say,

Then I shall claim it instead. You may come and go as you wish, but do not enter my personal cavern without an invitation. I may ocassionally have more work for you, if it interests ones such as yourself.

If they answer in the affirmative, he will say.

I will not surrender this cavern without a fight. Prepare for battle.

Begin combat. The dragon is hoping to be able to catch them in a weakened state. If they wish to retreat back into the area before the Ebon Doors, he will chase them as far as he can and fill the area with his poison breath.

However, it should not be too difficult for them to retreat and deal with him when they are at their full strength.

Later Visits

The next time they venture down into the cavern, there will be a giant hole near the ceiling of the gauntlight tower, and even more cracks have appeared in the walls below.

The dragon now has a shaft that he can use to fly up to the outside word.

The Dragon's New Home.name: 巨龙的新家 The Dragon's New Home
The Dragon's New Home.text:
一旦英雄们击败了所有乌尔德芬，这条巨龙就会接管它的巢穴。他会在完成后通知英雄们，并且还会警告他们不要试图进入该区域。

如果他们希望进行谈判，他已在洞窟主入口外设置了一些悬挂的风铃。其他入口他都用岩石和瓦砾封堵了。

Once the heroes have vanquished all the urdefen, the dragon will take over its lair. He will inform the heroes when he has done so, and will also warn them not to try to enter the area.

If they wish to parley, he has rigged some hanging chimes outside the main entrance of the cavern. The other entrances he has blocked with rocks and rubble.

The Horned Dragon.name: 长角巨龙 The Horned Dragon
The Horned Dragon.text:
长角巨龙不久前从更深处的幽暗地域游荡而来，寻找新的领地。它在单挑中杀死了黑龙，并接管了他的宝藏。随后便开始探索这片区域。

  • 它曾经经常摧毁位于I27 梯子的底座的仆役邪魔，直到库尔费亲自前来与它谈判，请它放过这些邪魔。作为允许邪魔留下的交换，库尔费也不认为回答巨龙关于背上镜片是什么、以及为何携带它的问题会有什么不妥。随后，巨龙又索取了贡品，以换取透肌魔人在该区域内的自由移动。

  • 巨龙与I31 贫瘠之地中的恶魔数次纠缠，但恶魔一旦受伤便总会传送到通道深处。它会在穿过一段狭窄蜿蜒的通道之后，于通道内选定一点落脚，从而让自己处于巨龙触及不到的地方。它会待在那里，直到伤势痊愈。

    • 巨龙还观察到，透肌魔人可以自由地从那名邪魔身旁通过。

  • 巨龙观察过I39 夺命湖中的夺命深水触鳍鱼怪，并多次与其交战。它们受伤时总会深潜下去，而巨龙并未选择追随。它知道这些是非自然的生物，因为它们长着密密麻麻的眼睛。它希望进一步研究它们，但担心它们正在吞噬湖中的一切。

  • 它观察过K41 岛巢中的迷音鸟，并倾向于放任它不管。这只鸟即将孵化两枚蛋，而它希望有机会观察其幼雏。

  • 在观察迷音鸟时，它注意到浅滩处有一枚赭色的支点镜片闪烁微光。它把迷音鸟吓走了一会儿，足够它将镜片取回。镜片现在在它的宝藏中。

  • 它在腐化花园中观察到奥法斯，并因厌恶而攻击了它。这场战斗比它预想的更困难，因为双方都免疫彼此的毒素。战后它不得不花上几天从“悲惨的哭泣”中恢复过来。现在它正试图哄着花园重新恢复生机。

  • 它曾试图探索桥另一侧的区域，但它体型太大，无法挤进通道。因此它对该区域所知甚少，只知道那里是类人生物耕作开垦过的。

  • 它在I49 高基特斯洞穴与高基特斯交战，但那只生物在重伤后撤回洞穴，巨龙体型太大而无法追入。如今它一见到巨龙就会逃跑。最令人恼火。

一旦英雄们证明值得信赖，它乐于就以上任何主题交谈。

与贝科拉的互动

贝科拉曾接触过巨龙，并向它推销她对艾巴萨罗姆发动攻击的计划。巨龙听完她的提议，却兴致缺缺。总有一天，它想去地表世界看看，但眼下它更愿意继续驯服自己新夺得的领地。因此它告诉她会考虑这个提议，并让她日后再来。她很恼火，但也无可奈何。

对英雄们的观察

巨龙会知晓英雄们与透肌魔人及邪魔的任何战斗，但会尽力不让自己被看见。也许它会从狩猎小屋上方高处的峭壁栖位守夜；该地点可在 @UUID[JournalEntry.qqYLNFsHGQIZSWkg.JournalEntryPage.uizNE6kRRVENj06X]{Hunting Lodge vignette} 中看到。

英雄们令它感兴趣，尤其是当他们设法杀死透肌魔人并夺走翡翠支点镜片时。

The horned dragon wandered in not too long ago, from the deeper darklands, looking for new terriroty. It killed the black dragon in single combat and took over his hoard. It then set about exploring the area.

  • It was regularly destroying the Ceustodaemons at I27 Ladder Base until Khurfel himself came to negotiate with him about leaving them alone. In return for his allowing the daemons to stay, Khurfel did not see the harm in answering the dragon's questions about what the lens was on his back, and why he carried it. The dragon then extracted a tribute in exchange for the free movement of the urdefhans in the area.

  • The dragon tangled with the demon in I31 The Barrens several times, but the demon always teleports down the passage when it is injured. It picks a point in the passage past a narrow, twisting passage, thus placing itself out of the dragon's reach. It remains there until it has healed.

    • The dragon has also observed that the urdefhans can pass by the daemon freely.

  • The dragon has observed the deadly Deepwater Dhuthorexes in I39 Deadly Lake, and engaged them in combat several times. They always dive deeply when injured, and the dragon has not opted to follow them. He knows they are unnatural creatures due to their profusion of eyes. He would like to study them more, but he is concerned that they are devouring everything in the lake.

  • It observed the Cauthooj in K41 Island Nest, and is inclined to leave it alone. The bird is about to hatch two eggs, and he would like an opportunity to observe its young.

  • While observing the cauthooj, he noticed the ochre fulcum lens glinting in the shallows. He scared the Cauthooj away long enough to retrieve it. It is now in his hoard.

  • He observed the Ofalth in the Corrupted Garden and attacked it in disgust. The battle was more difficult than he expected because they were both immune to each other's poison. He had to spend a few days recovering from the Wreched Weeps after the battle. He is now trying to coax the garden back to life.

  • He has tried to explore the area beyond the bridge, but he is too large to fit in the passage. So all he knows about this area is it is humanoid cultivated.

  • It engaged the Gogiteth in I49 Gogiteth Cave, but the creature retreated into its cave once it was badly injured, and the dragon was too large to follow. It now flees when it sees him. Most vexing.

He enjoys conversing about any of these subjects, once the heroes prove trustworthy.

Interaction with Belcorra

Belcorra has approached the dragon, and made her pitch regarding her attack on Absalom. He listened to her offer without much interest. One day, he would like to go to the surface world, but as of now, he prefers to continue his work of taming his newly-claimed area. So he told her he would consider her offer, and to come back at a later time. She was annoyed, but had little recourse.

Observations of the Heroes

The dragon will be aware of any battles that the heroes will have with the urdefhen and the daemons, but will endeavor to keep out of sight. Perhaps he watches from the lofty perch high above the hunting lodge, which is visible in the @UUID[JournalEntry.qqYLNFsHGQIZSWkg.JournalEntryPage.uizNE6kRRVENj06X]{Hunting Lodge vignette}.

The heroes interest him, especially if they manage to kill the urdefhen and take the emerald fulcrum lens.

After the Adventure.name: 冒险之后 After the Adventure

Happily Ever Afters.name: 幸福快乐直到永远 Happily Ever Afters
Happily Ever Afters.text:
卡尔曼与希涅米？

假设这些角色已经成功释放了 @UUID[Actor.W5HjwjHOiEYYgLKz]{Natanya Rajani} 和拉贾尼家族，使其摆脱血脉诅咒，那么卡尔曼与希涅米之间的未来如今就成为可能。

不过，卡尔曼与希涅米两人还有许多其他选择。你的某位英雄可能会对其中之一感兴趣。卡尔曼可能会尝试与弗琳、奥洛莉娅或伊娜斯梅拉发展恋情。希涅米可能会与奥洛莉娅的一名赶牲口人，或一名城镇守卫共度未来。又或者，你的玩家可能会离开该区域，整件事也就变得无关紧要了。

我甚至也不确定我打算怎么安排他们，所以我想我会让游戏来决定。

雷道夫与沃里温？

雷道夫与沃里温可能会走到一起。也许他们有一天会结婚，并在石环池塘附近建一座朴素的小木屋。

克洛特与？

弗琳是个很有吸引力的角色，可能也是与你的某位英雄发展恋情的一个好目标。伊娜斯米拉和希涅米也是如此。

两人之中的任何一位，都可能在克洛特这里遭遇一些出人意料的竞争。

克洛特现在想安定下来，他盯上了镇上最适合成婚的女性。他认为自己会成为强大且值得的伴侣。如果你的英雄决定他们对弗琳或伊娜斯米拉中的任何一位感兴趣，这可能会给克洛特敲响警钟：他得采取行动了。

Carman and Cynemi?

Assuming the characters have managed to release @UUID[Actor.W5HjwjHOiEYYgLKz]{Natanya Rajani} and the Rajani family from the bloodline curse, a future between Carman is Cynemi is now possible.

However, there are plenty of other options for both Carman and Cynemi. One of your heroes may be interested in either. Carman could try to romance Wrin, Oloria or Yinyasmera. Cynemi could find a future with one of Oloria's drovers, or a town gaurd. Or your players may leave the area and the entire point may become moot.

I'm not even sure what I am going to do with them, so I think I will let the game decide.

Raydolph and Worliwynn?

Raydolph and Worliwynn could up together. Perhaps they will one day get married and build a rustic cabin near Stone Ring Pond.

Klorte and ?

Wryn is a compelling character and is probably a good target for romance with one of your own heroes. The same goes for Yinyasmira and Cynemi.

Either could face some unexpected competition in Klorte.

Korte is looking to settle down now, and has his eye on the town's most eligible females. He believes he would make a powerful and worthy mate. If your heroes decide they are interested in either Wryn or Yinyasmira, it could be a wake-up call to Korte that he needs to make his move.

Dungeon Clean-Up.name: 地城清理 Dungeon Clean-Up
Dungeon Clean-Up.text:
市长会希望在凄凉灯塔倒塌后尽快对英雄们进行事后简报。他会支付承诺的奖励，外加一笔加值，但也会仔细盘问角色。

他的问题可能会揭露一些尚未了结的事务。他可能会提供未来的奖励，以消除以下危险：

怨灵

一些较难以解除的怨灵可能仍在折磨某些区域，例如图书馆中的那些。一旦被解除，它们便不再有力量回归。

@UUID[JournalEntry.KeWKr2yd8dbppeS5.JournalEntryPage.VZPc5GsIN5eRKSVE]{C05. 监视外廊}

@UUID[JournalEntry.KeWKr2yd8dbppeS5.JournalEntryPage.VoqYMxZSwLDn0l4y]{C32. 焚烧间}

复苏的不死生物

如果自以下不死生物被击败以来至少过去了一个月左右，它们可能已经复苏。一旦再次被杀死，它们就会永远消失，因为凄凉灯塔不再将它们带回。这些可能包括：

@UUID[JournalEntry.uMZ0RiCcPSqsx1Nm.JournalEntryPage.kdk3tW3OgViz0cw5]{B15. Crypt} - 总管

@UUID[JournalEntry.uMZ0RiCcPSqsx1Nm.JournalEntryPage.7Cs3QciAV15HwrG8]{B31. 接待室} - 骸骨巨人

@UUID[JournalEntry.KeWKr2yd8dbppeS5.JournalEntryPage.wAoRY1yKOiu1ocVU]{C34. 溃烂神殿} - 纳卡扎林

@UUID[JournalEntry.JT0zCcIwsSpKnbB5.JournalEntryPage.xVfdltaZZguZ35F1]{E25. 角斗士的宴会厅} - 骸骨角斗士

@UUID[JournalEntry.FwWmtOBFHhvM2gtf.JournalEntryPage.hD6CSfmfkrSopsaw]{H21. Ancients’ Caves} - 空无之死波达尸

@UUID[JournalEntry.FwWmtOBFHhvM2gtf.JournalEntryPage.Vwd8vMBerJCAoN4N]{H23. Shadowed Dock} - 惧栗缚灵

被绕过的怪物

玩家有可能在不消灭每一个怪物的情况下穿过许多地城等级，尤其是从等级7开始：

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.OyNcqrpRClyhr8BJ.JournalEntryPage.9ggvXDV6BvojMVBZ]{G17. 静滞间}中的怪物很可能已经冲破其收容牢房，彼此厮杀，并散布到等级7及以上各处。巫火守卫应已离开。

  • 农场中任何未被击败的异怪仍在四处游荡，尤其是那些位于@UUID[JournalEntry.FwWmtOBFHhvM2gtf.JournalEntryPage.EzERYV4NkVvzZeSR]{H15. Fetid Lake}、@UUID[JournalEntry.FwWmtOBFHhvM2gtf.JournalEntryPage.pnTCbvQqpz0arkpz]{H38. Strange Sentry}以及@UUID[JournalEntry.FwWmtOBFHhvM2gtf.JournalEntryPage.MFktSOxcOfKGkbb2]{H39. Lair of the Dreamer}的异怪。

  • 狩猎场中有许多生物仍可能构成威胁。我使用了@UUID[JournalEntry.xjnPxrNNcRBWVegm]{Lv. 9 Side Quest - A Deal-Making Dragon}中详述的差事来鼓励我的英雄们彻底清理，但即便如此也可能仍会留下那条龙希望放过的生物。这可能会在市长的意愿与那条龙的意愿之间制造冲突。

死墓骑士的护甲

如果你的任何英雄愚蠢到穿上死墓骑士的护甲——来自@UUID[JournalEntry.1vlzl3NJsftNB9Dc.JournalEntryPage.iV9RReXcTyfDbDRq]{I56. Caliddo’s Vigil}——那么他们将作为一名死墓骑士（并非特指卡利多）再度崛起，而其余英雄将需要在死墓骑士再次崛起时再度击败他。无论如何，他们都应该得面对护甲的诅咒。

有数种方法可以摧毁这套护甲，如@UUID[Actor.oXnpdJVN6NIE58W3]{卡利多·哈鲁维克斯}的复苏能力中所述。

如果玩家没有许可使用其中任何一种方法，那么@UUID[JournalEntry.OyNcqrpRClyhr8BJ.JournalEntryPage.fK6B6GmATzvRIuh4]{G07. 召唤间}中的熔岩很可能仍然存在，并且能够困住死墓骑士。

熔岩不会摧毁护甲，但它会在接下来的1d10天内，当其试图重塑时不断摧毁正在成形的躯体，从而使其陷入无限的创造—毁灭循环。

作为一种更持久的临时解决方案，如果英雄们接下来按照上方所链接的AV日志页中的方法再次使天花板坍塌并淹没房间，那么我认为躯体将完全无法重塑。

是否能想到这两种可能性应由你的玩家决定。或者他们可能会想出其他点子，例如把它存放在一大槽强酸里。富有想象力的解决方案应该能奏效——至少在一段时间内。

关于微灵的说明

如果你使用了我在@UUID[JournalEntry.zRsCI6WErFnSNEqN.JournalEntryPage.U8sC2KOCcj1ZUgrI]{贝科拉之战 - 准备}与@UUID[JournalEntry.zRsCI6WErFnSNEqN.JournalEntryPage.jF5LWsgIK5fcAbhJ]{最终冲突}中提出的想法，那么整个地城群中的所有祭坛都已被去圣化，且所有剩余的微灵都被摧毁。

如果你使用原始故事，那么那些尚未被去圣化的祭坛仍保持足够的活性以产生微灵，如各自的AV日志条目所示。

The Mayor will want to debrief the heroes as soon as possible after the collapse of Gauntlight. He will pay his promised reward, plus a bonus, but will question the characters closely.

His questions could uncover some unfinished business. He could offer future rewards to eliminate the following dangers:

Haunts

Some of the more difficult-to-dispel haunts may still be plaguing certain areas such as those in the library. Once dispelled, they no longer have the power to return.

@UUID[JournalEntry.KeWKr2yd8dbppeS5.JournalEntryPage.VZPc5GsIN5eRKSVE]{C05. Spying Hall}

@UUID[JournalEntry.KeWKr2yd8dbppeS5.JournalEntryPage.VoqYMxZSwLDn0l4y]{C32. Furnace room}

Rejuvinating Undead

If at least a month or so has passed since the following undead were defeated, they may have rejuvinated. Once they are killed again, they will be gone for good since Gauntlight is no longer bringing them back. These could include:

@UUID[JournalEntry.uMZ0RiCcPSqsx1Nm.JournalEntryPage.kdk3tW3OgViz0cw5]{B15. Crypt} - Majordomo

@UUID[JournalEntry.uMZ0RiCcPSqsx1Nm.JournalEntryPage.7Cs3QciAV15HwrG8]{B31. Reception Room} - Skeletal Giant

@UUID[JournalEntry.KeWKr2yd8dbppeS5.JournalEntryPage.wAoRY1yKOiu1ocVU]{C34. Temple of the Canker} - Nhakazarin

@UUID[JournalEntry.JT0zCcIwsSpKnbB5.JournalEntryPage.xVfdltaZZguZ35F1]{E25. Gladiators’ Mead Hall} - Bone Gladiator

@UUID[JournalEntry.FwWmtOBFHhvM2gtf.JournalEntryPage.hD6CSfmfkrSopsaw]{H21. Ancients’ Caves} - Empty Death Bodaks

@UUID[JournalEntry.FwWmtOBFHhvM2gtf.JournalEntryPage.Vwd8vMBerJCAoN4N]{H23. Shadowed Dock} - Dread Wraith

Bypassed Monsters

It is possible to get through many of the dungeon levels without destroying every monster, especially starting with level 7:

  • The monsters in @UUID[JournalEntry.OyNcqrpRClyhr8BJ.JournalEntryPage.9ggvXDV6BvojMVBZ]{G17. Stasis Chambers} have likely burst out of their containment cells, fought each other, and scattered throughout level 7 and above. The Witchfire Warden would have departed.

  • Any undefeated abberations in the Farm are still prowling around, especially those in @UUID[JournalEntry.FwWmtOBFHhvM2gtf.JournalEntryPage.EzERYV4NkVvzZeSR]{H15. Fetid Lake}, @UUID[JournalEntry.FwWmtOBFHhvM2gtf.JournalEntryPage.pnTCbvQqpz0arkpz]{H38. Strange Sentry} and @UUID[JournalEntry.FwWmtOBFHhvM2gtf.JournalEntryPage.MFktSOxcOfKGkbb2]{H39. Lair of the Dreamer}.

  • There are many creatures in the hunting grounds that could still be threats. I used the jobs detailed in @UUID[JournalEntry.xjnPxrNNcRBWVegm]{Lv. 9 Side Quest - A Deal-Making Dragon} in order to encourage my heroes to be thorough, but even this may leave behind the creatures that the dragon wanted to spare. This may create a conflict between what the Mayor wants and what the dragon wants.

Graveknight's Armor

If any of your heroes were foolish enough to wear the graveknight's armor, from @UUID[JournalEntry.1vlzl3NJsftNB9Dc.JournalEntryPage.iV9RReXcTyfDbDRq]{I56. Caliddo’s Vigil}, then they will arise as a graveknight (not Caliddo, specifically) and the rest of your heroes will need to defeat him again when the graveknight rises again. Either way, they should have to deal with the armor's curse.

There are several ways to destroy the armor, as described in @UUID[Actor.oXnpdJVN6NIE58W3]{Caliddo Haruvex}'s Rejuvination power.

If the players do not have access to any of those methods, then the lava in @UUID[JournalEntry.OyNcqrpRClyhr8BJ.JournalEntryPage.fK6B6GmATzvRIuh4]{G07. Summoning Chamber} is probably still in place, and is capable of containing the graveknight.

The lava will not destroy the armor, but it will continually destroy the body forming within as it tries to reform over the next 1d10 days, thus sending it into a indefinite creation-destruction loop.

For a more enduring temporary solution, if the heroes next collapse the ceiling and flood the room per the method in the AV journal page linked above, then I don't think the body will be able to reform at all.

It should be up to your players to think of either of these possibilities. Or they may think of other ideas, such as storing it in a vat of acid. Imaginative solutions should work—at least for a while.

A Note on the Wisps

If you use the ideas I presented in @UUID[JournalEntry.zRsCI6WErFnSNEqN.JournalEntryPage.U8sC2KOCcj1ZUgrI]{Belcorra Battle - Preparation} and @UUID[JournalEntry.zRsCI6WErFnSNEqN.JournalEntryPage.jF5LWsgIK5fcAbhJ]{The Final Conflict}, then all the altars in the entire dungeon complex have been desanctified, and all remaining wisps destroyed.

If you used the original story, then the altars that have not been desanctified still remain active enough to produce wisps, as indicated in their respective AV journal entries.

Pathfinder Society Invitation.name: 开拓者协会邀请函 Pathfinder Society Invitation
Pathfinder Society Invitation.text:
到这个时候，开拓者协会可能已经听说过这些英雄，并且很可能愿意提供机会，让新的玫瑰团成员成为正式特工。

这可以成为未来冒险的素材。

By this point, the Pathfinder Society could have heard of the heroes and would probably like to extend the opportunity to make the members of the new Roseguard into full-fledged Agents.

This could be fodder for future adventures.

Future Yldaris?.name: 未来的伊尔达里斯？ Future Yldaris?
Future Yldaris?.text:
如今，伊尔达里斯的洞穴精灵已不再受制于对贝科拉的誓言，他们希望返回故土。

然而，伊尔达里斯一直是幽暗地域贸易路线上的重要中转点，因此他们希望将其移交给另一个团体，而不是弃置不管。

一种可能性是通过卡林斯·纳罗格布洛姆引来影侏儒——他是从乌尔德芬手中获救的侏儒德鲁伊。他至少会前往奥塔里一次以偿还对队伍的恩情，因此他肯定会再回来。

如果这行不通，英雄们可以尝试更深入幽暗地域去寻找另一个团体，或者他们也可以前往艾巴萨罗姆，在那里他们或许能通过下城区的幽暗地域入口找到某个团体。

无论如何，这并不完全取决于他们；而且如果英雄们决定什么也不做，那么在两年之内，影侏儒将会在那里定居。

Now that they are free of their oath to Belcorra, the cavern elves of Yldaris would like to return to their homeland.

However, Yldaris has been an important waypoint in the Darklands trade routes, so they would like to turn it over to another group, rather than desert it.

One possiblity is the umbral gnomes, via Calinth Narogblom, the gnomish druid rescued from the urdefhen. He makes at least one visit to Otari to repay his debt to the group, so he is sure to be back.

If that doesn't work out, the heroes could attempt to delve deeper into the darklands to find another group, or they could head to Absalom, where they might find a group through the Darkland entrance via the Undercity.

In any case, it is not entirely up to them, and if the heroes decide to do nothing, then within two years, the umbral gnomes would have taken up residence there.

A Home for Tangletop.name: 鸡窝头的家 A Home for Tangletop
A Home for Tangletop.text:
在我的游戏里，鸡窝头跟着英雄们回了家，然后从一户跳到另一户，搜索最完美的家。他宁愿觉得住户们需要他。

他考虑这些地方：

  • 怪谈故事——店主对魔法过于敏感，而鸡窝头更喜欢一间能让他在住户面前大多时候保持隐蔽的房子。

  • 瓦琳妙妙屋——同样对魔法过于敏感，而且他更想住在室内。

  • 曼妮姆斯庄园——有很多孩子，而多莉安是个相当忧郁的年轻女士，或许需要他。

  • 印科霍兹庄园——有很多孩子，而阿莉莫拉看起来也可能需要他的帮助。

  • 骗子之角、乌鸦之桶或奥塔里渔场——酒馆总是很有趣；即使他最后决定不住在这些地方中的任何一处，他也很可能会是常客。

In my game, Tangletop followed the heroes home and then hopped from household to household, searching for the perfect home. He would rather feel like the residents need him.

He considers these places:

  • Odd Stories - The owners are too magically sensitive, and Tangletop would rather a house where he can remain mostly hidden from the residents.

  • Wrin's Wonders - Also too magically sensitive, plus he would rather live indoors.

  • Menhemes Manor - Has lots of children, and Dorienne is a rather sad young lady who might need him.

  • Inkleholtz Manor - Has lots of children, and Alymora looks like she could use his help.

  • Crook's Nook, Crow's Casks or Otari Fishery - taverns are always fun; even if he decides not to live at any of these places, he would probably be a frequent visitor.

DudNoo.name: DudNoo DudNoo DudNoo DudNoo
DudNoo.text:
假设他没有成为玩家角色，达德努就会在奥塔里卫队站稳脚跟，并很快展现出自己的能力。

在某个时候，他会回到艾巴萨罗姆去接来一些家人和朋友，并在曼提柯街悬崖幽影下、靠近卫队的房屋里建立一个小型地精社区。

Assuming he did not become a player character, DudNoo would have established himself in the Otari Garrison and quickly shown himself capable.

At some point, he would go back to Absalom to get some family and friends, and establish a small goblin community in houses under the shadow of the cliff on Manticore Street, near the Garrison.

List of Changes.name: 变更列表 List of Changes
变更列表 List of Changes
List of Changes.text:
This page contains a detailed guide to changes and additions that is included in this module, arranged by the chapters in which they appear in Abomination Vaults, as well as by other categories that seemed pertinent.

All map pins are colored Gauntlight Blue so they are easy to spot.

Otari

  • Zoomed version of the original Otari map, for easier placement and movement of the player actors around the map. Soundscaped with town, ocean, swamp, and Gauntlight sounds.

  • Added wind chime sounds to Wrin's Wonders.

  • Improved placement of Otari's nighttime building lights.

  • Gauntlight Extras Landing scene, with lights for ambiance, useful for Theater of Mind play.

  • Map of Dawnflower Library

    • Detailed map of Dawnflower Library, including the three shrines and museum area, as well as the cliff walk to the graveyard, with map pins for the encounters, locations, vignettes, music prompts, and prompts to execute macros.

    • Expansion of Deadtide for Otari encounter.

    • Subplot for the theft of the Cooperative Blade.

    • (The merchant actor for Dawnflower Library is included in Tianze's Otari Extras.)

  • Map of the Rowdy Rockfish

    • Noncombat encounter for a Town Meeting after Lasda's rescue.

    • New actors:

      • Ustin Menhemes, Oseph's brother, who runs the family business.

      • Emnala Menhemes, Oseph's wife, who is mentioned in Oseph's journal page in AV.

      • Saamsuma, Cleric of Pharasma.

      • Natanya Rajani, Carman's mother

      • Stewt, a town guard

    • Actors for every named character in Otari, to facilitate the Town Meeting.

    • (The merchant actor for the Rowdy Rockfish is a part of Tianze's Otari Extras.)

  • The NooDupAgNee gang, a gang of goblin adventurers, who have a different goal for entering Abomination Vaults.

    • Includes four gang members, including one with a PC version that a player could pick up after Deadtide for Otari.

    • Subplots and encounters within the Gauntlight dungeons for each remaining member.

  • A new version of the Otari map scene, zoomed in with soundscaping and vignette map pins.

All Gauntlight Levels
