  • Added scene regions for improved darkness control.

Level 1

  • New version of Gauntlight Copula, with vignette map pins, lighting, soundscaping and combat music prompts.

  • New version of Level 1 Ruins, with vignette map pins, added sounds and combat music prompts.

  • New token art for Tanglefoot/Spookywisp with journal page.

  • A magical keyring to replace the Rusty Ring of Keys, for player and GM convenience.

  • An inventory item for the broken Mr. Beak doll.

  • A loot actor for the mitflits' fake skeletal guard.

Level 2

  • New version of Level 2 Servant Quarters, with vignette map pins, lighting, soundscaping, and combat music prompts.

  • New version of Otari Graveyard, with vignette map pins, soundscaping and combat music prompts.

  • Dawnflower Library, as mentioned in the Otari section, above.

  • Journals for the Deadtide for Otari and Attack of the Scalathrax encounters in the Otari Graveyard and Dawnflower Library scenes.

  • Added inactive light to the Portal Chamber, to activate as part of the Awaken Portal spell.

  • Added loot actor from journal to the scene for B30 War Room.

  • Prompts for Footsteps of Otari content and macros.

Level 3

  • New version of Level 3 Library, with vignette map pins, lighting, soundscaping and combat music prompts.

  • Encounter with KraDup, member of the NooDupAgNee gang, who is now one of the Canker Cultists.

  • Journal with expanded encounter for the scrivener ghost Chandriu, how to put her to rest, an inventory item for Volluk Azrinae's portrait, and ideas on how this encounter with her can make your players nurse a thorough hatred for Volluk Azrinae.

  • Added a new version for Chandriu's loot actor including missing item and Volluk Azrinae's portrait.

  • Journal for the librarian ghost Jarelle Kalrian, with an alternate way to put her to rest.

  • A magical book satchel, to organize all the books found throughout Gauntlight.

  • A cleric of Pharasma, who should arrive in an interlude between levels 3 and 4, and who has an offer for the heroes.

  • Added inactive light to the Portal Chamber, to activate as part of the Awaken Portal spell.

  • Prompts for Footsteps of Otari content and macros.

Level 4

  • New version of Level 4 Belcorra's Retreat and Smuggler's Refuge, with vignette map pins, lighting, soundscaping and combat music prompts.

  • Ideas on running the werewolf, Jaul Mezmin.

  • A new map, Secluded Clearing, for the area outside the tunnel leading from the Pavilion area. The battle with the werewolf on the 4th level could easily end up here.

  • Subquest, Opening Ghostgate, including new versions of some Roseguard icons.

  • Subquest, Theft of the Cooperative Blade, including a rethinking of Carman's character and background.

  • New history for the Spectral Barrier.

  • Timeline for Volluk Azrinae, after the heroes defeat him for the first time, along with an undead version of a scalathrax for him to raise.

  • Added inactive light to the Portal Chamber, to activate as part of the Awaken Portal spell.

  • Prompts for Footsteps of Otari content and macros.

Level 5

  • New version of Level 5 Arena, with vignette map pins, lighting, soundscaping and combat music prompts.

  • A new arena games side quest, Glory Days, with an arena gamesmaster, ghostly spectators, items, treasure, and arena battle encounters using monsters that already exist in the scene.

  • Additions and revisions to the Arena area and one of the adjacent rooms using specially crafted map tiles that you can activate and deactivate (or hide away in the map margins) as needed. I also have a tiny modification to the entry stairwell.

  • A timeline for Chefkham, in case his timeline runs out before the heroes solve his murder mystery, with his revenge on Jafaki and subsequent activities.

  • Additional inventory items for Chafkham in a new loot actor, to add after he has made all his preparations for his departure.

  • Undead versions of several bosses and monsters from various areas, which Chefkham raises from the dead if he is permitted to run amok.

  • Loot actor for contents of E13 Gladiator Readiness Room - Supply Closet.

  • Added inactive light to the Portal Chamber, to activate as part of the Awaken Portal spell.

Level 6

  • New version of Level 6 Labs, with vignette map pins, lighting, soundscaping and combat music prompts.

  • Added Ethereal walls added around barrels in the Portal Chamber, so the portal light does not shine upon them.

  • Light effects and sounds for the band, Shadow Malice, playing on stage, with all band members in position. This included changes to most of the walls around the tavern so as to flood the nearby hallway with sound, as well as tiles for the light fixtures.

  • Fleshwarping Vats in the care of the Afflicted Irnakurse, including a new NPC to rescue.

  • Fleshwarping Vats in the Main Laboratory.

  • Two members of the NooDupAgNee Gang, with encounters.

  • Minor changes to the Arena via map tiles.

  • Loot actor for the Sarglagon Lair.

  • Added inactive light to the Portal Chamber, to activate as part of the Awaken Portal spell.

  • Added sound-reactive pulse effect to Shadow Malice stage lights for that disco feel.

    • Note: the lights will not activate until you or a player have a highlighted token in the sound's radius.

Level 7

  • New version of Level 7 Prison, with vignette map pins, lighting, soundscaping and combat music prompts.

  • A new level boss, for gamemasters who would rather not roleplay a soul-dealing demon. It includes details on the new boss, her allies, her enemies, her strengths and weaknesses, and her redesign of Urevian’s Domain.

  • Two hags who have a grudge against the Roseguard, and are willing to help the new boos for a shot at revenge on their descendents. They also form a coven with a witchfire on this level, which makes them a true challenge.

  • The second appearance of the Roseguard, who have a role to play in the breaking of the barrier leading to the lift system.

  • A new story for Cynemi, who I made Carman's former paramour, and who is languishing in a prison cell. Includes a new version of her actor with additional inventory items, and a loot actor for the items taken when she was captured.

  • Added the Hellforge Material from the journal to a hidden loot actor in G05 Hellforge.

  • Added loot actor for G17 Stasis Chambers Witchfire Warden.

  • A new fate for Sacuishu in G21 The Secret Void.

  • Added inactive light to the Portal Chamber, to activate as part of the Awaken Portal spell.

  • Added macro to open the Domain Portal.

Level 8

  • New version of Level 8 Farm, with vignette map pins, lighting, soundscaping, lighting and combat music prompts.

  • Journal covering the Dock and Lift area, with the actors that will be in this area, and an alternative way to handle the game mechanics of the lift operations.

  • Journals covering the Belcorra Attacks encounters, with macros and playlists.

  • Journal covering interactions with the caligni, and an alternate way to handle the owb.

  • Journal with a timeline for the continued activities of Sacuishu, from the Prison level.

  • Journal with a timeline for the Elder Child of Belcorra, and his potential comeback after the initial battle.

  • Lighting effect for the Dread Wraith actor.

  • Loot actor for the contents of the Goliath Spider's web, and vehicle actor for one of the boats at the dock.

  • Special lighting for the entrances to the drow areas.

  • Continued appearances by Roseguard members.

  • The return of Shaitan with a friendly new scene for his bazaar. It includes a journal entry and a shop actor.

  • Details of the Rajani Bloodline Curse, with journal entry, an affliction, and the affliction added to Natanya Rajani's character.

  • Added one of the fulcrum lens affect to Urthagul's actor.

Level 9

  • New version of Level 8 Hunting Grounds, Yaldaris and Urdefhan Camp with vignette map pins, soundscapting, lighting and combat music prompts.

  • Added one of the fulcrum lens affect to Khurfel's actor.

  • Hunting Grounds

    • Journals covering a neutral Horned Dragon that replaces the original OGL dragon, with backstory and side quests.

    • Added Reaper Skull Puffballs that were missing from the Hunting Grounds scene.

    • Added boat actor to boathouse.

    • Finished calingi storyline.

  • Yldaris

    • References cavern elves rather than the original OGL dark elves.

    • Added Yldaris Trading Post, with Falxi as the trader, to the stable area.

    • Added music and iridescent lights to the secret tunnel leading to Yldaris, and opposite the secret door in the lizard run.

    • Changed lighting effects in the meditation cave.

    • Added light effects to the trap in The Barrens; also added cavern features to the southern tunnel to support one of the horned dragon's quests.

    • Added lights and sounds to the back of the stable area, so the Shadow Malace band can have one last show before returning to the darklands forever.

    • Added sound-reactive pulse effect to Shadow Malice stage lights for that disco feel.

      • Note: the lights will not activate until you or a player have a highlighted token in the sound's radius.

Level 10

  • New version of Level 10 Temple with vignette map pins, soundscapting, lighting and combat music prompts.

  • Added temple drone sounds in the Challenge rooms.

  • Added sounds throughout the path the heroes must take in the Challenge of Despair, including new wind chime sounds in the J10 Path of Pleasant Memories and J13 Chamber Reflection.

  • Repositioned walls in the pipes leading to the Deadly Swamp.

  • Added tiles to represent the switches that have been turned to the north position.

  • Added swamp sounds.

  • Created scene regions in the Temple with chat macro to remind the GM to check for doom over the rivulets.

  • Added journals for the battle with Belcorra:

    • A journal about preparing for the battle, including a new task for one of the heroes, a summary of how the temple area is currently set up, and an overview of changes I made to the battle.

    • A journal covering the battle itself, and details on a climatic scene afterward, including the Roseguard and an epic confrontation between Nhimbaloth and Pharasma.

Items Without Items

There are many items found throughout Gauntlight that have descriptions in the journals, but do not have actual Foundry items. I have created many of these in order to give the heroes an item to add to their inventory.

(Note: the sections below include items that may also be mentioned above.)

Journals

  • Journals for Gauntlight Maps - a folder of journals for all levels of Gauntlight, detailing changes and additions.

  • Journals for New Maps - a folder of journals for the three original scenes in this module.

  • Gauntlight Vignette Catalog - a folder with journals that have every vignette that shipped with Abomination Vaults, organized into chapters and pinned onto scenes.

  • Character Studies of:

    • Carman Rajani: how I fleshed out his character to make him both a bit of a jerk and more sympathetic, all at the same time. I also completely revised his background, so I could include a generational curse on his family. Plus, there is a love interest for him in the Prison level. I tried to make him both more redeemable and more compelling.

    • Klorte Hengus: he has a long history of challenging anyone who threatens his reputation as the toughest and most powerful warrior in town. He issues a challenge to the heroes.

    • Wrin Sivinxi - how she became claustrophobic, and why she is determined to defeat the threat of Gauntlight.

    • All members of the original Roseguard.

  • Trail of Otari - A timeline of Otari's last days in the dungeons below Gauntlight, along with links to all journal entries that tell Otari's story.

  • Dawnflower Library - room descriptions and two encounters.

  • Doomed Goblin Gang - Story, actors and encounters.

  • Rajani Bloodline Curse - history, affliction, and its effects on Natanya Rajani.

  • Gameplay Reminders - Just a few things that didn't fit elsewhere.

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.JcJjAqOOrVAAGk3l]{After the Adventure}, with ideas on closing some plot threads and continuing adventures.

Items and Sounds

  • New wind chime sound effect for Wrin's shop.

  • Alternatives to some Roseguard Icons, with more useful powers.

  • Belcorra's Key Ring and Librarian's Book Satchel - convenient magic items to organize the many keys and books found throughout the dungeon. Plus a few keys that were created as equipment rather than treasure.

  • Ghost Hunter Dedication codex.

  • Keys, books, portraits and other items that are described or pictured in the journals, but which did not have items.

  • An Afflictions folder, with an assortment of the afflictions encountered throughout Abomination Vaults. I only included conditions that persist after combat for a number of days, and the list is not comprehensive.

    • Now includes Rajani Bloodline Curse.

  • Added all fulcrum lenses to the items menu.

  • New items added by this module.

New Scenes and Maps

  • Dawnflower Library

  • Rowdy Rockfish

  • Secluded Clearing

  • Gauntlight Extras Landing

  • Shaitan's Bazaar

Actors

New Actors, in order of appearance

  • NuuDupAgNee Gang

    • DudNoo

    • KraDup

    • NoxAg

    • PipNee

  • Saamsuma - cleric of Pharasma

  • Stewt - guard of Otari, who may end up as Volluk Azrinae's second altar victim

  • Emnala Menhemes - Oseph's wife, mentioned in the AV journals, but who had neither artwork nor an actor

  • Ustin Menhemes - Oseph's younger brother

  • Natanya Rajani - Carman's unpleasant mother

  • Roseguard members from AV journals, who had neither artwork nor actors:

    • Aesephna's Ghost

    • Vol's Ghost

    • Zarmavdian's Ghost

  • Shaitan Wizard - Arena Gamesmaster

  • Raydolph - halfling ranger

  • Idriniliss - cleric of Nhimbaloth

Tweaked Versions of Gauntlight Actors

  • Tangletop

  • Otari's Ghost

  • Chafkhem

  • Ghoul versions of:

    • Destrachan

    • Graulgust

    • Mimic

    • Mimnivix

    • Scalathrax

  • Cynemi

  • Numerous Otari Citizens who had portraits, but who did not have actors

  • OGL dragon replaced with Horned Dragon

New Actors From the Bestiaries

  • Drex - wolf companion

  • Ghostly Mobs as arena spectators

  • Annis Hag

  • Green Hag

  • Horned Dragon

  • Morrigna

NOTE! Scene Region Darkness.name: 注意！场景区域：黑暗 NOTE! Scene Region Darkness

Important.name: 重要 Important
Important.text:
此模组中的每个等级现在都有一个场景地区叠加层，其效果与每个《憎恨魔窟》等级注记中所要求的等级黑暗相匹配。

不过，在我的测试机上，这些叠加层对 GM 和玩家来说都显示为完全的黑色。在我的构建机上，它们是半透明的，因此室内看起来很暗，但不是纯黑。

尽管我在构建模组时尽量不去改动系统与 Pathfinder 设定，但在我的构建机（最终构建时安装了 0 个模组）与我的测试机之间，肯定存在某个设定差异。

因此，如果你那边的地区显示为完全黑色，请开启“GM 视觉（GM Vision）”选项。如果我找到了相关设定，我会为其开一个 bug，这样就能在下个版本里注明。

Each level in this module now has a scene region overlay that is appropriate for the level darkness as called for in each Abomination Vaults level notes.

However, on my test machine, these appeared completely black for the GM as well as the player. On my build machine, they are semi-transparent, so the interiors appear dark, but not black.

Although I try not to tinker with System and Pathfinder settings while building modules, there most be some setting between my build box, which has 0 modules installed when I do my final build, and my test box.

Therefore, if the regions appear completely black for you, turn on the GM Vision option. If I find the setting, I'll open a bug for it so I can note it in my next version.
